S.FORM: Nikawrira aka a matawal, o samangahay nga'ay milipalaw to tao, kawra cowa ka lipalaw ci Yihofa.
Nikawrira aka a matawal, o samangahay nga'ay milipalaw to tao, kawra cowa ka lipalaw ci Yihofa.
S.PHON: nikawrira aka a matawaɾ, o~u samaŋaħaj ŋaʡaj miɾipaɾaw to~u tao~u, kawra ʦo~uwa ka ɾipaɾaw ʦi jiħo~ufa.
S.TRANSL: However, we should remember that such deceitful people cannot keep anything secret from Jehovah, for "all things are naked and openly exposed" to him.

S.FORM: Mihaen to demak o midoedoay ci Yisan, aka kao papotal aca ko nengnengen a misawkit to tamdaw.
Mihaen to demak o midoedoay ci Yisan, aka kao papotal aca ko nengnengen a misawkit to tamdaw.
S.PHON: miħaən to~u ɬ~ɮəmak o~u miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uaj ʦi jisan, aka kao~u papo~utaɾ aʦa ko~u nəŋnəŋən a misawkit to~u tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: That is the only way to obey Jesus and stop judging by the outward appearance.

S.FORM: Wa mi'imer kako to niyah ato wawa, aka pakidem a minengneng to milawlaay a kamok anca lalakaw han?
Wa mi'imer kako to niyah ato wawa, aka pakidem a minengneng to milawlaay a kamok anca lalakaw han?
S.PHON: wa miʡimər kako~u to~u nijaħ ato~u wawa, aka pakiɬ~ɮəm a minəŋnəŋ to~u miɾawɾaaj a kamo~uk anʦa ɾaɾakaw ħan?
S.TRANSL: Do we limit our children's exposure, and even our own, to certain programs or reading material?

S.FORM: Mihayi to raraw, aka pisimed to raraw.
Mihayi to raraw, aka pisimed to raraw.
S.PHON: miħaji to~u raraw, aka pisiməɬ~ɮ to~u raraw.
S.TRANSL: Confess and abandon secret sins.

S.FORM: Aka mapawan, pakayniay saka ciepoc no mita ko miharatengan ni Yihofa.
Aka mapawan, pakayniay saka ciepoc no mita ko miharatengan ni Yihofa.
S.PHON: aka mapawan, pakajniaj saka ʦiəpo~uʦ no~u mita ko~u miħaratəŋan ni jiħo~ufa.
S.TRANSL: Yes, let us never forget that Jehovah has our best interests at heart.

S.FORM: Palimo'otay cingra kitaanan, 'aka madenga nonini a hekal,' sanay, mahecad o masowalay isa'ayaw a lalakaw, sasinanoten ita a miliyas ko pinengneng ato harateng no hekal.
Palimo'otay cingra kitaanan, 'aka madenga nonini a hekal,' sanay, mahecad o masowalay isa'ayaw a lalakaw, sasinanoten ita a miliyas ko pinengneng ato harateng no hekal.
S.PHON: paɾimo~uʡo~utaj ʦiŋra kitaanan, ʡaka maɬ~ɮəŋa no~unini a ħəkaɾ,ʡ sanaj, maħəʦaɬ~ɮ o~u maso~uwaɾaj isaʡajaw a ɾaɾakaw, sasinano~utən ita a miɾijas ko~u pinəŋnəŋ ato~u ħaratəŋ no~u ħəkaɾ.
S.TRANSL: The preceding article helped us to appreciate that in order to "stop being molded by this system of things," we must refuse to feed on worldly viewpoints and attitudes.

S.FORM: Kawra, ano awaay ko wacay no Fangcalay Cudad, aka a pasowal iraay ko mitaypiyaway a tatodong no ma'oningay i Fangcalay Cudad."
Kawra, ano awaay ko wacay no Fangcalay Cudad, aka a pasowal iraay ko mitaypiyaway a tatodong no ma'oningay i Fangcalay Cudad."
S.PHON: kawra, ano~u awaaj ko~u waʦaj no~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, aka a paso~uwaɾ iraaj ko~u mitajpijawaj a tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u maʡo~uniŋaj i faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ."
S.TRANSL: Otherwise, we ought to be reluctant to assign an antitypical application to a certain person or account if there is no specific Scriptural basis for doing so."

S.FORM: Aka marawraw, iraay ko matiraay tisowanan a tamdaw.
Aka marawraw, iraay ko matiraay tisowanan a tamdaw.
S.PHON: aka marawraw, iraaj ko~u matiraaj tiso~uwanan a tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: An elder in Britain admits: "There can be a measure of nervousness in preparing for guests.

S.FORM: Mihaenay haw i, so'li'lin caka nga'ay ko ngiha' ita, aka sawad saan romadiw pahemek ci Yihofaan.
Mihaenay haw i, so'li'lin caka nga'ay ko ngiha' ita, aka sawad saan romadiw pahemek ci Yihofaan.
S.PHON: miħaənaj ħaw i, so~uʡɾiʡɾin ʦaka ŋaʡaj ko~u ŋiħaʡ ita, aka sawaɬ~ɮ saan ro~umaɬ~ɮiw paħəmək ʦi jiħo~ufaan.
S.TRANSL: So why should we let our imperfect singing voices stop us from praising Jehovah in song?

S.FORM: Nalifetan No Tamdaw, Seteken ko Faloco' Aka a Matoled Makesem
Nalifetan No Tamdaw, Seteken ko Faloco' Aka a Matoled Makesem
S.PHON: naɾifətan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, sətəkən ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ aka a mato~uɾəɬ~ɮ makəsəm
S.TRANSL: Life Story, Determined Not to Let My Hands Drop

S.FORM: Aka matalaw to 'ada,
Aka matalaw to 'ada,
S.PHON: aka mataɾaw to~u ʡaɬ~ɮa,
S.TRANSL: Fear them not, O my beloved,; Though our enemies will fight it,

S.FORM: "Aka pasowal toya, 'nawiro ikaka no aniniay ko nika nga'ay no iti:yaayho a romi'ad saw?'
"Aka pasowal toya, 'nawiro ikaka no aniniay ko nika nga'ay no iti:yaayho a romi'ad saw?'
S.PHON: "aka paso~uwaɾ to~uja, ʡnawiro~u ikaka no~u aniniaj ko~u nika ŋaʡaj no~u iti:jaajħo~u a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ saw?ʡ
S.TRANSL: "Do not say, 'Why were the former days better than these?'

S.FORM: O cecay misasingdiay a Yutaya tamdaw ci Alon, kaemangho pasifana'an to aka a sowalen ko ngangan no Kawas.
O cecay misasingdiay a Yutaya tamdaw ci Alon, kaemangho pasifana'an to aka a sowalen ko ngangan no Kawas.
S.PHON: o~u ʦəʦaj misasiŋɬ~ɮiaj a jo~u~utaja tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi aɾo~un, kaəmaŋħo~u pasifanaʡan to~u aka a so~uwaɾən ko~u ŋaŋan no~u kawas.
S.TRANSL: From his early years, a Jewish businessman named Aaron was taught that God's name is not to be pronounced.

S.FORM: 'Arawhan, miki'okay ko Fangcalay Cudad, miti'eray ci Yihofaan a milimek a tamdaw, aka marawraw to mamapaekel no matoleday a faloco'.
'Arawhan, miki'okay ko Fangcalay Cudad, miti'eray ci Yihofaan a milimek a tamdaw, aka marawraw to mamapaekel no matoleday a faloco'.
S.PHON: ʡarawħan, mikiʡo~ukaj ko~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, mitiʡəraj ʦi jiħo~ufaan a miɾimək a tamɬ~ɮaw, aka marawraw to~u mamapaəkəɾ no~u mato~uɾəɬ~ɮaj a faɾo~uʦo~uʡ.
S.TRANSL: Nevertheless, the Scriptures assure us that those who take refuge in Jehovah do not need to feel overwhelmed by guilt.

S.FORM: Silsilen ko kadadoedo no demak, patatodongen ko pitokel, limasmasen ko toki pahanhan, talapotal a minengneng to misanga'an no Kawas a makapahay, mafana' pahemek to niyah, micerid miyatayat to tireng, aka cango'ot ko foti'.

Silsilen ko kadadoedo no demak, patatodongen ko pitokel, limasmasen ko toki pahanhan, talapotal a minengneng to misanga'an no Kawas a makapahay, mafana' pahemek to niyah, micerid miyatayat to tireng, aka cango'ot ko foti'.
S.PHON: siɾsiɾən ko~u kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u no~u ɬ~ɮəmak, patato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋən ko~u pito~ukəɾ, ɾimasmasən ko~u to~uki paħanħan, taɾapo~utaɾ a minəŋnəŋ to~u misaŋaʡan no~u kawas a makapaħaj, mafanaʡ paħəmək to~u nijaħ, miʦəriɬ~ɮ mijatajat to~u tirəŋ, aka ʦaŋo~uʡo~ut ko~u fo~utiʡ.
S.TRANSL: Set appropriate priorities, have realistic expectations, daily make room for some quiet time, enjoy God's creation, keep a sense of humor, and get regular exercise and enough sleep.

S.FORM: Aka talaw to 'ada.
Aka talaw to 'ada.
S.PHON: aka taɾaw to~u ʡaɬ~ɮa.
S.TRANSL: Let the Kingdom tidings go.

S.FORM: Ano misodod kita to tao, wa makahi kita mili'ay to tamdaw, aka 'inteh ko faloco'.
Ano misodod kita to tao, wa makahi kita mili'ay to tamdaw, aka 'inteh ko faloco'.
S.PHON: ano~u miso~uɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮ kita to~u tao~u, wa makaħi kita miɾiʡaj to~u tamɬ~ɮaw, aka ʡintəħ ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ.
S.TRANSL: We forgive by pardoning someone who has offended us and by letting go of our resentment toward him.

S.FORM: Palimo'otay ko Loma 12:2 kitaanan: 'Aka madenga nonini a hekal, safaelohen ko harateng a mifalic to niyah, ho cipinang to nga'ayay no Kawas, o malefotay kahemekan Ningra a araaw.'
Palimo'otay ko Loma 12:2 kitaanan: 'Aka madenga nonini a hekal, safaelohen ko harateng a mifalic to niyah, ho cipinang to nga'ayay no Kawas, o malefotay kahemekan Ningra a araaw.'
S.PHON: paɾimo~uʡo~utaj ko~u ɾo~uma **:* kitaanan: ʡaka maɬ~ɮəŋa no~unini a ħəkaɾ, safaəɾo~uħən ko~u ħaratəŋ a mifaɾiʦ to~u nijaħ, ħo~u ʦipinaŋ to~u ŋaʡajaj no~u kawas, o~u maɾəfo~utaj kaħəməkan niŋra a araaw.ʡ
S.TRANSL: At Romans 12:2, we are counseled: "Stop being molded by this system of things, but be transformed by making your mind over, so that you may prove to yourselves the good and acceptable and perfect will of God."

S.FORM: "Aka kao misamangahay ko olah" sa i, o manan ko tatodong hani?
"Aka kao misamangahay ko olah" sa i, o manan ko tatodong hani?
S.PHON: "aka kao~u misamaŋaħaj ko~u o~uɾaħ" sa i, o~u manan ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ħani?
S.TRANSL: What is "love free from hypocrisy"?

S.FORM: Seteken ko Faloco' Aka a Matoled Makesem
Seteken ko Faloco' Aka a Matoled Makesem
S.PHON: sətəkən ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ aka a mato~uɾəɬ~ɮ makəsəm
S.TRANSL: Determined Not to Let My Hands Drop

S.FORM: Aka a masa'fit!
Aka a masa'fit!
S.PHON: aka a masaʡfit!
S.TRANSL: Do not be deceived!

S.FORM: Aka matalaw ci Satanan,
Aka matalaw ci Satanan,
S.PHON: aka mataɾaw ʦi satanan,
S.TRANSL: The Devil has fought and opposed them.

S.FORM: Kawra, ano patahekal kita to hinapalada'ay i, aka pairaen ko misatekeday a faloco'.
Kawra, ano patahekal kita to hinapalada'ay i, aka pairaen ko misatekeday a faloco'.
S.PHON: kawra, ano~u pataħəkaɾ kita to~u ħinapaɾaɬ~ɮaʡaj i, aka pairaən ko~u misatəkəɬ~ɮaj a faɾo~uʦo~uʡ.
S.TRANSL: Yet, we must do so with a pure motive, avoiding any trace of selfishness.

S.FORM: Aka colien ko mirikecay a limasmas no Kawas, tooren ko limasmas ni Yihofa.
Aka colien ko mirikecay a limasmas no Kawas, tooren ko limasmas ni Yihofa.
S.PHON: aka ʦo~uɾiən ko~u mirikəʦaj a ɾimasmas no~u kawas, to~uo~urən ko~u ɾimasmas ni jiħo~ufa.
S.TRANSL: Yes, work with God's discipline, not against it.

S.FORM: Aka misakahemaw to 'icel no mitolonay.
Aka misakahemaw to 'icel no mitolonay.
S.PHON: aka misakaħəmaw to~u ʡiʦəɾ no~u mito~uɾo~unaj.
S.TRANSL: Do not underestimate the value of your prayers with and for a bereaved fellow Christian.

S.FORM: Mikitini ci Yihofaan mananamay ita, sinanoten ko hasowal, aka mafirang a dademak.
Mikitini ci Yihofaan mananamay ita, sinanoten ko hasowal, aka mafirang a dademak.
S.PHON: mikitini ʦi jiħo~ufaan mananamaj ita, sinano~utən ko~u ħaso~uwaɾ, aka mafiraŋ a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: Jehovah's exercise of self-control teaches us that we too ought to weigh our words and consider our steps carefully; we should not rush into things.

S.FORM: Ano makalimay kita ira ko mahecaday ni Yihofa a harateng, 'aka madenga nonini a hekal.'
Ano makalimay kita ira ko mahecaday ni Yihofa a harateng, 'aka madenga nonini a hekal.'
S.PHON: ano~u makaɾimaj kita ira ko~u maħəʦaɬ~ɮaj ni jiħo~ufa a ħaratəŋ, ʡaka maɬ~ɮəŋa no~unini a ħəkaɾ.ʡ
S.TRANSL: Note, however, that in order to make our mind over to Jehovah's way of thinking, we need to "stop being molded by this system."

S.FORM: Aka a pisawad!
Aka a pisawad!
S.PHON: aka a pisawaɬ~ɮ!
S.TRANSL: Do not give up!

S.FORM: Kawra hano mingitangit to Kawas aka padafongen kako saan hani?
Kawra hano mingitangit to Kawas aka padafongen kako saan hani?
S.PHON: kawra ħano~u miŋitaŋit to~u kawas aka paɬ~ɮafo~uŋən kako~u saan ħani?
S.TRANSL: But why did he pray not to have riches?

S.FORM: Polong a lalakaw no jw.org a wangcan madipotay no holic, mihaenay i, aka pasadaken i romaroma wangcan
Polong a lalakaw no jw.org a wangcan madipotay no holic, mihaenay i, aka pasadaken i romaroma wangcan
S.PHON: po~uɾo~uŋ a ɾaɾakaw no~u jw.o~ur* a waŋʦan maɬ~ɮipo~utaj no~u ħo~uɾiʦ, miħaənaj i, aka pasaɬ~ɮakən i ro~umaro~uma waŋʦan
S.TRANSL: No one may post our copyrighted publications on other Internet sites

S.FORM: Aka talalikor.
Aka talalikor.
S.PHON: aka taɾaɾiko~ur.
S.TRANSL: Each one firmly will stand.

S.FORM: Aka a pidoedo kita to pasaripa'an ni Rihopoam, tanekteken ita a midopo ko matatodongay a pidoko.
Aka a pidoedo kita to pasaripa'an ni Rihopoam, tanekteken ita a midopo ko matatodongay a pidoko.
S.PHON: aka a piɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u kita to~u pasaripaʡan ni riħo~upo~uam, tanəktəkən ita a miɬ~ɮo~upo~u ko~u matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a piɬ~ɮo~uko~u.
S.TRANSL: Unlike Rehoboam, we will remain steadfast in true worship.

S.FORM: Padotocay ko coyoh pasowal: "Mariyaaw, aka ka talaw, nawhani tada o kaolahan no Kawas kiso."
Padotocay ko coyoh pasowal: "Mariyaaw, aka ka talaw, nawhani tada o kaolahan no Kawas kiso."
S.PHON: paɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦaj ko~u ʦo~ujo~uħ paso~uwaɾ: "marijaaw, aka ka taɾaw, nawħani taɬ~ɮa o~u kao~uɾaħan no~u kawas kiso~u."
S.TRANSL: Seeing this, the angel said: "Do not be afraid, Mary, for you have found favor with God."

S.FORM: Aka piliyas,
Aka piliyas,
S.PHON: aka piɾijas,
S.TRANSL: Upright we remain.

S.FORM: Tosaay ko pakayraan to papadama tisowanan: Salakat, pa'ayaw a misaday, ato aka a pisawad mitosil.
Tosaay ko pakayraan to papadama tisowanan: Salakat, pa'ayaw a misaday, ato aka a pisawad mitosil.
S.PHON: to~usaaj ko~u pakajraan to~u papaɬ~ɮama tiso~uwanan: saɾakat, paʡajaw a misaɬ~ɮaj, ato~u aka a pisawaɬ~ɮ mito~usiɾ.
S.TRANSL: Two basic steps will help: Prepare well, and do not give up sharing what you know with others.

S.FORM: Taneng 3:11, 12 sanay: 'Wawaaw ako, aka mana'ay to sarikec ni Yihofa... samanen o kaolahan ni Yihofa a tamdaw mirikecan Ningra.'
Taneng 3:11, 12 sanay: 'Wawaaw ako, aka mana'ay to sarikec ni Yihofa... samanen o kaolahan ni Yihofa a tamdaw mirikecan Ningra.'
S.PHON: tanəŋ *:**, ** sanaj: ʡwawaaw ako~u, aka manaʡaj to~u sarikəʦ ni jiħo~ufa... samanən o~u kao~uɾaħan ni jiħo~ufa a tamɬ~ɮaw mirikəʦan niŋra.ʡ
S.TRANSL: "My son, do not reject the discipline of Jehovah... for those whom Jehovah loves he reproves," says Proverbs 3:11, 12.

S.FORM: Aka a matalaw.
Aka a matalaw.
S.PHON: aka a mataɾaw.
S.TRANSL: Will never be denied.

S.FORM: Doloen ko noko'orip, aka ma'anof.
Doloen ko noko'orip, aka ma'anof.
S.PHON: ɬ~ɮo~uɾo~uən ko~u no~uko~uʡo~urip, aka maʡano~uf.
S.TRANSL: Keep your life simple and uncluttered.

S.FORM: "Aka ka rarima kita to nga'ayay a demak.
"Aka ka rarima kita to nga'ayay a demak.
S.PHON: "aka ka rarima kita to~u ŋaʡajaj a ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: "Let us not give up in doing what is fine, for in due time we will reap if we do not tire out."

S.FORM: Sasinanoten ita ko waywayan, mamisamaan mifiyor to tao, aka a misaidahidahi.
Sasinanoten ita ko waywayan, mamisamaan mifiyor to tao, aka a misaidahidahi.
S.PHON: sasinano~utən ita ko~u wajwajan, mamisamaan mifijo~ur to~u tao~u, aka a misaiɬ~ɮaħiɬ~ɮaħi.
S.TRANSL: We need to be aware of how our behavior can affect others and not take ourselves too seriously.

S.FORM: O roma tamdaw cowa ka tanektek a midopo ci Yihofaan, aka a mafiyor nangra kita
O roma tamdaw cowa ka tanektek a midopo ci Yihofaan, aka a mafiyor nangra kita
S.PHON: o~u ro~uma tamɬ~ɮaw ʦo~uwa ka tanəktək a miɬ~ɮo~upo~u ʦi jiħo~ufaan, aka a mafijo~ur naŋra kita
S.TRANSL: Do not let yourself be affected by those who are not taking a firm stand on Jehovah's side

S.FORM: Misamaanay hano aka a pisamangah kita?
Misamaanay hano aka a pisamangah kita?
S.PHON: misamaanaj ħano~u aka a pisamaŋaħ kita?
S.TRANSL: Why should we speak the truth?

S.FORM: Kawra hananay ni Yis a pasowal cangra: "Nikawrira, ano mihakelokelong ko palafoay to sowal namo i, aka ka lipahak kamo tonini.
Kawra hananay ni Yis a pasowal cangra: "Nikawrira, ano mihakelokelong ko palafoay to sowal namo i, aka ka lipahak kamo tonini.
S.PHON: kawra ħananaj ni jis a paso~uwaɾ ʦaŋra: "nikawrira, ano~u miħakəɾo~ukəɾo~uŋ ko~u paɾafo~uaj to~u so~uwaɾ namo~u i, aka ka ɾipaħak kamo~u to~unini.
S.TRANSL: They were joyful because they had performed powerful works, even expelling demons.

S.FORM: Aka malefot ko saali to salikaka.
Aka malefot ko saali to salikaka.
S.PHON: aka maɾəfo~ut ko~u saaɾi to~u saɾikaka.
S.TRANSL: Do not expect perfection from your brothers.

S.FORM: Aka milikaf.
Aka milikaf.
S.PHON: aka miɾikaf.
S.TRANSL: Avoid a critical spirit.

S.FORM: Aka a Matalaw!
Aka a Matalaw!
S.PHON: aka a mataɾaw!
S.TRANSL: Fear Them Not!

S.FORM: Aka pahemek to tamdaw aci Satan.
Aka pahemek to tamdaw aci Satan.
S.PHON: aka paħəmək to~u tamɬ~ɮaw aʦi satan.
S.TRANSL: The world and its rulers we do not try to please.

S.FORM: O ta'arawan no mita a mitodong ci Yihofa, ano caka hatira o niharatengan no niyah ko demak i, aka pakinali a cariraw.
O ta'arawan no mita a mitodong ci Yihofa, ano caka hatira o niharatengan no niyah ko demak i, aka pakinali a cariraw.
S.PHON: o~u taʡarawan no~u mita a mito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ʦi jiħo~ufa, ano~u ʦaka ħatira o~u niħaratəŋan no~u nijaħ ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak i, aka pakinaɾi a ʦariraw.
S.TRANSL: We can imitate Jehovah by not becoming overly concerned when things do not work out as we had expected.

S.FORM: Wa misinanot kita aka pairaen ko maliwasakay a pakayraan i kasakopang.
Wa misinanot kita aka pairaen ko maliwasakay a pakayraan i kasakopang.
S.PHON: wa misinano~ut kita aka pairaən ko~u maɾiwasakaj a pakajraan i kasako~upaŋ.
S.TRANSL: We must be on guard not to allow this thinking to affect our congregations today.

S.FORM: Cowa ko patalipa'elal aca ni Pitiro to Krisciyang, aka pikasimaan misaka dademak to pasalat, somowalay to sasamaan matatodong ko pisaka dademak to pasalat.
Cowa ko patalipa'elal aca ni Pitiro to Krisciyang, aka pikasimaan misaka dademak to pasalat, somowalay to sasamaan matatodong ko pisaka dademak to pasalat.
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa ko~u pataɾipaʡəɾaɾ aʦa ni pitiro~u to~u krisʦijaŋ, aka pikasimaan misaka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak to~u pasaɾat, so~umo~uwaɾaj to~u sasamaan matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ko~u pisaka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak to~u pasaɾat.
S.TRANSL: In his warning against the misuse of freedom, Peter also pointed out the objective.

S.FORM: Aka likafen,
Aka likafen,
S.PHON: aka ɾikafən,
S.TRANSL: We should bear in mind

S.FORM: Ano mifekad ko pasangar hano aka a paisawad to patosokan hani?
Ano mifekad ko pasangar hano aka a paisawad to patosokan hani?
S.PHON: ano~u mifəkaɬ~ɮ ko~u pasaŋar ħano~u aka a paisawaɬ~ɮ to~u pato~uso~ukan ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why should we not give up when difficulties arise?

S.FORM: Aka pasalaten ci Satan a patalaw a milonay to faloco' iso, cato ka madimadi to Kawas.
Aka pasalaten ci Satan a patalaw a milonay to faloco' iso, cato ka madimadi to Kawas.
S.PHON: aka pasaɾatən ʦi satan a pataɾaw a miɾo~unaj to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ iso~u, ʦato~u ka maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮi to~u kawas.
S.TRANSL: Do not let Satan use fear itself to weaken your morale or break your integrity.

S.FORM: Palimo'otay ci Pawlo to Krisciyang, o sida'itay a Kawas ci Yihofa pakayni i wawa Ningra ci Yis Kristoan, pafeli to pasalat i tamdaw, aka saloya'en a minengneng.
Palimo'otay ci Pawlo to Krisciyang, o sida'itay a Kawas ci Yihofa pakayni i wawa Ningra ci Yis Kristoan, pafeli to pasalat i tamdaw, aka saloya'en a minengneng.
S.PHON: paɾimo~uʡo~utaj ʦi pawɾo~u to~u krisʦijaŋ, o~u siɬ~ɮaʡitaj a kawas ʦi jiħo~ufa pakajni i wawa niŋra ʦi jis kristo~uan, pafəɾi to~u pasaɾat i tamɬ~ɮaw, aka saɾo~ujaʡən a minəŋnəŋ.
S.TRANSL: The apostle Paul urged all Christians not to take for granted the freedom that Jehovah has kindly given us through his Son, Jesus Christ.

S.FORM: Tinakoen, nga'ayay rikecen no wama wina ko wawa, aka misacikacikay i kasa'opoan.
Tinakoen, nga'ayay rikecen no wama wina ko wawa, aka misacikacikay i kasa'opoan.
S.PHON: tinako~uən, ŋaʡajaj rikəʦən no~u wama wina ko~u wawa, aka misaʦikaʦikaj i kasaʡo~upo~uan.
S.TRANSL: For example, parents can teach them not to run around in the Kingdom Hall.

S.FORM: Aka macacoli to mararaway a pihakelongan nangra.
Aka macacoli to mararaway a pihakelongan nangra.
S.PHON: aka maʦaʦo~uɾi to~u mararawaj a piħakəɾo~uŋan naŋra.
S.TRANSL: We should not try to argue about all their false religious ideas.

S.FORM: Kawra, sida'itay ko fa'inay padama takowanan, cowato ko 'inorong no mita ko wawa nohatini, aka a picapid kita toniya demak sanay."
Kawra, sida'itay ko fa'inay padama takowanan, cowato ko 'inorong no mita ko wawa nohatini, aka a picapid kita toniya demak sanay."
S.PHON: kawra, siɬ~ɮaʡitaj ko~u faʡinaj paɬ~ɮama tako~uwanan, ʦo~uwato~u ko~u ʡino~uro~uŋ no~u mita ko~u wawa no~uħatini, aka a piʦapiɬ~ɮ kita to~unija ɬ~ɮəmak sanaj."
S.TRANSL: She adds: "But my husband kindly helped me to see that our child was now out of our hands and that we must not interfere."

S.FORM: Aka Kao Papotal Aca ko Nengnengen a Misawkit to Tamdaw
Aka Kao Papotal Aca ko Nengnengen a Misawkit to Tamdaw
S.PHON: aka kao~u papo~utaɾ aʦa ko~u nəŋnəŋən a misawkit to~u tamɬ~ɮaw
S.TRANSL: Do Not Judge by the Outward Appearance

S.FORM: Ci Napal cowa piako'iko'id to nano demak no tao i cingranan, aka matira kita cingranan.
Ci Napal cowa piako'iko'id to nano demak no tao i cingranan, aka matira kita cingranan.
S.PHON: ʦi napaɾ ʦo~uwa piako~uʡiko~uʡiɬ~ɮ to~u nano~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u tao~u i ʦiŋranan, aka matira kita ʦiŋranan.
S.TRANSL: In addition, when we see a bad situation developing, we do well to do what we can to defuse it.

S.FORM: Na'onen ita, aka a pasalaten ko hekal a midenga kitanan.
Na'onen ita, aka a pasalaten ko hekal a midenga kitanan.
S.PHON: naʡo~unən ita, aka a pasaɾatən ko~u ħəkaɾ a miɬ~ɮəŋa kitanan.
S.TRANSL: We who serve God must be careful that we do not become influenced by the unrighteous attitudes of others.

S.FORM: Mihaenay ano icowaay ci Yihofa ato fangcalay saocor Ningra, iraay itira ko pasalat.
Mihaenay ano icowaay ci Yihofa ato fangcalay saocor Ningra, iraay itira ko pasalat.
S.PHON: miħaənaj ano~u iʦo~uwaaj ʦi jiħo~ufa ato~u faŋʦaɾaj sao~uʦo~ur niŋra, iraaj itira ko~u pasaɾat.
S.TRANSL: It stands to reason that in the presence of Jehovah and "where the spirit of Jehovah is," there is freedom.

S.FORM: Ano mamangayho ko mihecaan iso micada to ino', malakapah to i, wa ira ko cowa ka hecad a harateng ato saroero.
Ano mamangayho ko mihecaan iso micada to ino', malakapah to i, wa ira ko cowa ka hecad a harateng ato saroero.
S.PHON: ano~u mamaŋajħo~u ko~u miħəʦaan iso~u miʦaɬ~ɮa to~u ino~uʡ, maɾakapaħ to~u i, wa ira ko~u ʦo~uwa ka ħəʦaɬ~ɮ a ħaratəŋ ato~u saro~uəro~u.
S.TRANSL: For example, if you were baptized as a preteen, you likely will face new feelings and pressures as you enter and pass through adolescence.

S.FORM: Kawra, ano miliyaw tayra nohatini kako i Kapot no Mitosilay a matayal i, misaaliayho to sapadang no salikaka.
Kawra, ano miliyaw tayra nohatini kako i Kapot no Mitosilay a matayal i, misaaliayho to sapadang no salikaka.
S.PHON: kawra, ano~u miɾijaw tajra no~uħatini kako~u i kapo~ut no~u mito~usiɾaj a matajaɾ i, misaaɾiajħo~u to~u sapaɬ~ɮaŋ no~u saɾikaka.
S.TRANSL: Nonetheless, I feel that if I were assigned to work there again, I would still be a novice.

S.FORM: Ano padadotoc kita misaka dademak to so'linay kimad no Fangcalay Cudad wa milifok to maanan a haepoc hani?
Ano padadotoc kita misaka dademak to so'linay kimad no Fangcalay Cudad wa milifok to maanan a haepoc hani?
S.PHON: ano~u paɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ kita misaka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak to~u so~uʡɾinaj kimaɬ~ɮ no~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ wa miɾifo~uk to~u maanan a ħaəpo~uʦ ħani?
S.TRANSL: How will we benefit if we keep applying divine instruction?

S.FORM: O mararamoday a Krisciyang ano misinanot to papacomod to IUD hokira, isalakaten a milengo ko ising, iraay ko masamaanay a sapiateng to poyapoy a dafong, pakayni to fafahi iraay ko manan a epocan ato manan a katalawan.

O mararamoday a Krisciyang ano misinanot to papacomod to IUD hokira, isalakaten a milengo ko ising, iraay ko masamaanay a sapiateng to poyapoy a dafong, pakayni to fafahi iraay ko manan a epocan ato manan a katalawan.
S.PHON: o~u mararamo~uɬ~ɮaj a krisʦijaŋ ano~u misinano~ut to~u papaʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u io~u~uɬ~ɮ ħo~ukira, isaɾakatən a miɾəŋo~u ko~u isiŋ, iraaj ko~u masamaanaj a sapiatəŋ to~u po~ujapo~uj a ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ, pakajni to~u fafaħi iraaj ko~u manan a əpo~uʦan ato~u manan a kataɾawan.
S.TRANSL: A Christian couple considering the use of an IUD might discuss with a qualified medical professional the IUD products available locally as well as possible benefits and risks to the wife.

S.FORM: Ano misi'ayaw kiso to mahecaday a pakayraan, o fanekfekay a harateng iso citodongay to papakahemeken.
Ano misi'ayaw kiso to mahecaday a pakayraan, o fanekfekay a harateng iso citodongay to papakahemeken.
S.PHON: ano~u misiʡajaw kiso~u to~u maħəʦaɬ~ɮaj a pakajraan, o~u fanəkfəkaj a ħaratəŋ iso~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u papakaħəməkən.
S.TRANSL: If that challenge describes your situation, we warmly commend you for your endurance.

S.FORM: Mihaenay, ano tosilen ita ko hatiniay tamdaw i, sapitengilaw cangra to mitenakan ita a hatokel halatek.
Mihaenay, ano tosilen ita ko hatiniay tamdaw i, sapitengilaw cangra to mitenakan ita a hatokel halatek.
S.PHON: miħaənaj, ano~u to~usiɾən ita ko~u ħatiniaj tamɬ~ɮaw i, sapitəŋiɾaw ʦaŋra to~u mitənakan ita a ħato~ukəɾ ħaɾatək.
S.TRANSL: When we meet them, they may want to listen to our message of hope for the first time in their life.

S.FORM: Anini, ano mafana' ci Yihofa to ngangan no mita, wa milifok kita to adihayay sapalemed.
Anini, ano mafana' ci Yihofa to ngangan no mita, wa milifok kita to adihayay sapalemed.
S.PHON: anini, ano~u mafanaʡ ʦi jiħo~ufa to~u ŋaŋan no~u mita, wa miɾifo~uk kita to~u aɬ~ɮiħajaj sapaɾəməɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: We likewise can receive wonderful blessings when Jehovah comes to know us personally.

S.FORM: Ano micudaday kako itiya tono holic i, wa mahecad cangranan a mala pingkosi.
Ano micudaday kako itiya tono holic i, wa mahecad cangranan a mala pingkosi.
S.PHON: ano~u miʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaj kako~u itija to~uno~u ħo~uɾiʦ i, wa maħəʦaɬ~ɮ ʦaŋranan a maɾa piŋko~usi.
S.TRANSL: They do the sort of work I would be doing had I studied law.

S.FORM: Ano matoled,
Ano matoled,
S.PHON: ano~u mato~uɾəɬ~ɮ,
S.TRANSL: Strong though they appear.

S.FORM: Ano hayien ningra ko saali no finawlan, o paro no loma' ningra ato sikawdan, cowato ko kakadofah ko ka'orip nangra.
Ano hayien ningra ko saali no finawlan, o paro no loma' ningra ato sikawdan, cowato ko kakadofah ko ka'orip nangra.
S.PHON: ano~u ħajiən niŋra ko~u saaɾi no~u finawɾan, o~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ niŋra ato~u sikawɬ~ɮan, ʦo~uwato~u ko~u kakaɬ~ɮo~ufaħ ko~u kaʡo~urip naŋra.
S.TRANSL: If he met the people's demands, he, his family, and those of his court might have to cut back on some luxuries and make fewer demands on the people.

S.FORM: Mankora, ano matengil ko pasadakan a radiw i, itinito i kamaro'an a midohinga a mitengil.
Mankora, ano matengil ko pasadakan a radiw i, itinito i kamaro'an a midohinga a mitengil.
S.PHON: manko~ura, ano~u matəŋiɾ ko~u pasaɬ~ɮakan a raɬ~ɮiw i, itinito~u i kamaro~uʡan a miɬ~ɮo~uħiŋa a mitəŋiɾ.
S.TRANSL: Therefore, we are encouraged to be in our seats from the start and to listen attentively to these music programs.

S.FORM: Ano micekiw kita toni lalakaw i, simsimen a miharateng: Toha sakatangongolaw ko nika olah to no'adingoan a odo', wa misamaan kako hani?
Ano micekiw kita toni lalakaw i, simsimen a miharateng: Toha sakatangongolaw ko nika olah to no'adingoan a odo', wa misamaan kako hani?
S.PHON: ano~u miʦəkiw kita to~uni ɾaɾakaw i, simsimən a miħaratəŋ: to~uħa sakataŋo~uŋo~uɾaw ko~u nika o~uɾaħ to~u no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan a o~uɬ~ɮo~uʡ, wa misamaan kako~u ħani?
S.TRANSL: As we do so, meditate on how you personally can deepen your love for these spiritual treasures.

S.FORM: Ano padadotoc kita palahad tonini capeling i, o mamatanam ko adihayay a epoc, mita'lifay to niharatengan ita ko nika adihay.
Ano padadotoc kita palahad tonini capeling i, o mamatanam ko adihayay a epoc, mita'lifay to niharatengan ita ko nika adihay.
S.PHON: ano~u paɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ kita paɾaħaɬ~ɮ to~unini ʦapəɾiŋ i, o~u mamatanam ko~u aɬ~ɮiħajaj a əpo~uʦ, mitaʡɾifaj to~u niħaratəŋan ita ko~u nika aɬ~ɮiħaj.
S.TRANSL: As we develop godly joy, we will experience benefits that go beyond simply how we feel inside.

S.FORM: Ano mihaen to demak kita patahekalay to misalimelaay toni sapakaolah, halo patahekalay to maolahay kita to papitiliday to Fangcalay Cudad a Yihofaan.
Ano mihaen to demak kita patahekalay to misalimelaay toni sapakaolah, halo patahekalay to maolahay kita to papitiliday to Fangcalay Cudad a Yihofaan.
S.PHON: ano~u miħaən to~u ɬ~ɮəmak kita pataħəkaɾaj to~u misaɾiməɾaaj to~uni sapakao~uɾaħ, ħaɾo~u pataħəkaɾaj to~u mao~uɾaħaj kita to~u papitiɾiɬ~ɮaj to~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ a jiħo~ufaan.
S.TRANSL: We thereby show our love and appreciation not only for this divine treasure but, most important, for its Author, Jehovah God.

S.FORM: Ano micekiw kita to Fangcalay Cudad i, mamahapinang ita o madangaray ni Yihofa demak ikakaay to niharatengan ita.
Ano micekiw kita to Fangcalay Cudad i, mamahapinang ita o madangaray ni Yihofa demak ikakaay to niharatengan ita.
S.PHON: ano~u miʦəkiw kita to~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ i, mamaħapinaŋ ita o~u maɬ~ɮaŋaraj ni jiħo~ufa ɬ~ɮəmak ikakaaj to~u niħaratəŋan ita.
S.TRANSL: As we search the Scriptures, time and again we find examples of Jehovah doing the unexpected.

S.FORM: Ano matatodongay ko misa'osian ita, hano mahemek ci Yihofa hani?
Ano matatodongay ko misa'osian ita, hano mahemek ci Yihofa hani?
S.PHON: ano~u matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj ko~u misaʡo~usian ita, ħano~u maħəmək ʦi jiħo~ufa ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why can we say that we have what we need to make wise decisions?

S.FORM: Ano midemak ko cifafahiayto a fa'inayan to ma'odangay, wa nga'ay ko fafahi ningra misa'osi to mamilikong cingraanan.
Ano midemak ko cifafahiayto a fa'inayan to ma'odangay, wa nga'ay ko fafahi ningra misa'osi to mamilikong cingraanan.
S.PHON: ano~u miɬ~ɮəmak ko~u ʦifafaħiajto~u a faʡinajan to~u maʡo~uɬ~ɮaŋaj, wa ŋaʡaj ko~u fafaħi niŋra misaʡo~usi to~u mamiɾiko~uŋ ʦiŋraanan.
S.TRANSL: If, for example, a married man engages in sexual immorality, his wife can decide whether to divorce him or not.

S.FORM: Sowal ni Yis: "Ano caay ko nipafaloco'an no miocoray i takowanan a Wama ko tamdaw a papiraod i takowanan i, awaay ko mamaedeng a tayni i takowanan."
Sowal ni Yis: "Ano caay ko nipafaloco'an no miocoray i takowanan a Wama ko tamdaw a papiraod i takowanan i, awaay ko mamaedeng a tayni i takowanan."
S.PHON: so~uwaɾ ni jis: "ano~u ʦaaj ko~u nipafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan no~u mio~uʦo~uraj i tako~uwanan a wama ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw a papirao~uɬ~ɮ i tako~uwanan i, awaaj ko~u mamaəɬ~ɮəŋ a tajni i tako~uwanan."
S.TRANSL: Jesus said: "No man can come to me unless the Father, who sent me, draws him."

S.FORM: Ano matengil ita ko pakayniay i finawlan ni Yihofa a mararaway a safana' i, misamaanay hano cowa ko mamacekid kita?
Ano matengil ita ko pakayniay i finawlan ni Yihofa a mararaway a safana' i, misamaanay hano cowa ko mamacekid kita?
S.PHON: ano~u matəŋiɾ ita ko~u pakajniaj i finawɾan ni jiħo~ufa a mararawaj a safanaʡ i, misamaanaj ħano~u ʦo~uwa ko~u mamaʦəkiɬ~ɮ kita?
S.TRANSL: Why should we not be shocked if we hear outrageous reports about Jehovah's people?

S.FORM: Ano "mitiri' to Fangcalay Cudad to romi'ami'ad" kita, o mamakilim ko so'linay kimad.
Ano "mitiri' to Fangcalay Cudad to romi'ami'ad" kita, o mamakilim ko so'linay kimad.
S.PHON: ano~u "mitiriʡ to~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ to~u ro~umiʡamiʡaɬ~ɮ" kita, o~u mamakiɾim ko~u so~uʡɾinaj kimaɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: So "find out for yourself" by being diligent in "carefully examining the Scriptures daily."

S.FORM: ANO awa ko Fangcalay Cudad, wa sasamaan ko ka'orip ita hani?
ANO awa ko Fangcalay Cudad, wa sasamaan ko ka'orip ita hani?
S.PHON: ano~u awa ko~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, wa sasamaan ko~u kaʡo~urip ita ħani?
S.TRANSL: CAN you imagine what your life would be like without the Bible?

S.FORM: Ano ira ko pasalat a mipili' hano cowa ko aira ko fadangalan misa'osi to palinian no nga'ayay ato tatiihay hani?
Ano ira ko pasalat a mipili' hano cowa ko aira ko fadangalan misa'osi to palinian no nga'ayay ato tatiihay hani?
S.PHON: ano~u ira ko~u pasaɾat a mipiɾiʡ ħano~u ʦo~uwa ko~u aira ko~u faɬ~ɮaŋaɾan misaʡo~usi to~u paɾinian no~u ŋaʡajaj ato~u tatiiħaj ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why should we not equate free will with the right to decide what is good and what is bad?

S.FORM: Kawra, ano palimo'otay ci Yihofa kitaanan mitosil to tamdaw, lalicayen ita ko niyah: "Wa nga'ay kako misaka dademak to pasalat, mitongal to demak no Hongti Kitakit han?"
Kawra, ano palimo'otay ci Yihofa kitaanan mitosil to tamdaw, lalicayen ita ko niyah: "Wa nga'ay kako misaka dademak to pasalat, mitongal to demak no Hongti Kitakit han?"
S.PHON: kawra, ano~u paɾimo~uʡo~utaj ʦi jiħo~ufa kitaanan mito~usiɾ to~u tamɬ~ɮaw, ɾaɾiʦajən ita ko~u nijaħ: "wa ŋaʡaj kako~u misaka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak to~u pasaɾat, mito~uŋaɾ to~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u ħo~uŋti kitakit ħan?"
S.TRANSL: The question that each of us should consider is, 'Can I use my freedom to give greater support to the Kingdom work?'

S.FORM: Ano ci Tafiti kiso, wa samaan ko demak iso hani?
Ano ci Tafiti kiso, wa samaan ko demak iso hani?
S.PHON: ano~u ʦi tafiti kiso~u, wa samaan ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak iso~u ħani?
S.TRANSL: What would you have done?

S.FORM: Ano misodod kita to tao, o micowatay to rihadayay a tamdaw kita.
Ano misodod kita to tao, o micowatay to rihadayay a tamdaw kita.
S.PHON: ano~u miso~uɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮ kita to~u tao~u, o~u miʦo~uwataj to~u riħaɬ~ɮajaj a tamɬ~ɮaw kita.
S.TRANSL: When we forgive others, we prove ourselves to be peacemakers.

S.FORM: Ano misimsim kita toniya ma'oningay i, kilimen ko cowaho ka sinanot isalakat a demak, mihaen wa matongal ko kacipinang to capeling no Kawas.
Ano misimsim kita toniya ma'oningay i, kilimen ko cowaho ka sinanot isalakat a demak, mihaen wa matongal ko kacipinang to capeling no Kawas.
S.PHON: ano~u misimsim kita to~unija maʡo~uniŋaj i, kiɾimən ko~u ʦo~uwaħo~u ka sinano~ut isaɾakat a ɬ~ɮəmak, miħaən wa mato~uŋaɾ ko~u kaʦipinaŋ to~u ʦapəɾiŋ no~u kawas.
S.TRANSL: As you meditate on such accounts, take note of details that reveal even subtle aspects of Jehovah's qualities.

S.FORM: Misamaanay ano hinapalada' kita wa ira ko haepoc ita?
Misamaanay ano hinapalada' kita wa ira ko haepoc ita?
S.PHON: misamaanaj ano~u ħinapaɾaɬ~ɮaʡ kita wa ira ko~u ħaəpo~uʦ ita?
S.TRANSL: Why is giving good for us?

S.FORM: Ano mafana' kita to nano demak ita nga' nga'ay pala'osi to araaw no Kawas, maedeng wa lipahak kita.
Ano mafana' kita to nano demak ita nga' nga'ay pala'osi to araaw no Kawas, maedeng wa lipahak kita.
S.PHON: ano~u mafanaʡ kita to~u nano~u ɬ~ɮəmak ita ŋaʡ ŋaʡaj paɾaʡo~usi to~u araaw no~u kawas, maəɬ~ɮəŋ wa ɾipaħak kita.
S.TRANSL: If you can see how your daily activities contribute to the advancement of Jehovah's purposes, you will be happy.

S.FORM: Ano mitoor kita to so'linay kimad a ma'orip wa misamaan milingat to kalala'ed no niyah ato tao?
Ano mitoor kita to so'linay kimad a ma'orip wa misamaan milingat to kalala'ed no niyah ato tao?
S.PHON: ano~u mito~uo~ur kita to~u so~uʡɾinaj kimaɬ~ɮ a maʡo~urip wa misamaan miɾiŋat to~u kaɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮ no~u nijaħ ato~u tao~u?
S.TRANSL: When we buy truth, what may happen to some of our relationships?

S.FORM: Tiya ira ko Ta'angayay Lenlen ano ma'oripayho ko wina ato salikaka ni Nowa, cowa kalafadoc toni ta'angayay pades.
Tiya ira ko Ta'angayay Lenlen ano ma'oripayho ko wina ato salikaka ni Nowa, cowa kalafadoc toni ta'angayay pades.
S.PHON: tija ira ko~u taʡaŋajaj ɾənɾən ano~u maʡo~uripajħo~u ko~u wina ato~u saɾikaka ni no~uwa, ʦo~uwa kaɾafaɬ~ɮo~uʦ to~uni taʡaŋajaj paɬ~ɮəs.
S.TRANSL: If Noah's mother and siblings were alive when the Flood began, they did not survive it.

S.FORM: Nikawrira, ano sinanoten ko pina ma'oningay i Fangcalay Cudad, mamafana'o matiliday kadadoedo no tato'asan ni Misiya, cowa ka saheto saan o fisac a wawa.
Nikawrira, ano sinanoten ko pina ma'oningay i Fangcalay Cudad, mamafana'o matiliday kadadoedo no tato'asan ni Misiya, cowa ka saheto saan o fisac a wawa.
S.PHON: nikawrira, ano~u sinano~utən ko~u pina maʡo~uniŋaj i faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, mamafanaʡo~u matiɾiɬ~ɮaj kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u no~u tato~uʡasan ni misija, ʦo~uwa ka saħəto~u saan o~u fisaʦ a wawa.
S.TRANSL: However, a review of Bible accounts shows that a man did not need to be a firstborn son to be an ancestor of the Messiah.

S.FORM: Ano misi'ayaw kita to kafalic i noka'orip i, sasamaan a mitodong to ta'arawan ni Yosif?
Ano misi'ayaw kita to kafalic i noka'orip i, sasamaan a mitodong to ta'arawan ni Yosif?
S.PHON: ano~u misiʡajaw kita to~u kafaɾiʦ i no~ukaʡo~urip i, sasamaan a mito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u taʡarawan ni jo~usif?
S.TRANSL: How can we imitate Joseph's example regardless of our circumstances?

S.FORM: Telocto papidemakan no singsi ko polong a micudaday, ano minokay i, minengneng to cecay manka: Hamaan Tano Sakemo Milowid to Mari'angay.
Telocto papidemakan no singsi ko polong a micudaday, ano minokay i, minengneng to cecay manka: Hamaan Tano Sakemo Milowid to Mari'angay.
S.PHON: təɾo~uʦto~u papiɬ~ɮəmakan no~u siŋsi ko~u po~uɾo~uŋ a miʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaj, ano~u mino~ukaj i, minəŋnəŋ to~u ʦəʦaj manka: ħamaan tano~u sakəmo~u miɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ to~u mariʡaŋaj.
S.TRANSL: For homework the teacher asked each pupil to view the whiteboard animation Beat a Bully Without Using Your Fists.

S.FORM: Haratengen ita, o macadaay ita a lihaf, ano cowa ko naitiraay ci Yihofaan i, o naitiraay i hekal ni Satan.
Haratengen ita, o macadaay ita a lihaf, ano cowa ko naitiraay ci Yihofaan i, o naitiraay i hekal ni Satan.
S.PHON: ħaratəŋən ita, o~u maʦaɬ~ɮaaj ita a ɾiħaf, ano~u ʦo~uwa ko~u naitiraaj ʦi jiħo~ufaan i, o~u naitiraaj i ħəkaɾ ni satan.
S.TRANSL: Remember, there are basically two sources of information, Jehovah and the world under Satan's control.

S.FORM: Ano sinanoten ita ko malayapay a sapalemed nora nolitengan a madimadiay a sikawdan i, o nganga'ay padama kitanan a mihadidi a mitala.
Ano sinanoten ita ko malayapay a sapalemed nora nolitengan a madimadiay a sikawdan i, o nganga'ay padama kitanan a mihadidi a mitala.
S.PHON: ano~u sinano~utən ita ko~u maɾajapaj a sapaɾəməɬ~ɮ no~ura no~uɾitəŋan a maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮiaj a sikawɬ~ɮan i, o~u ŋaŋaʡaj paɬ~ɮama kitanan a miħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮi a mitaɾa.
S.TRANSL: As we contemplate how well things worked out for them, we too will be encouraged to show a waiting attitude.

S.FORM: Ano maolahay kiso a mihaen to demak, ano ma'araw iso ko safaelohay a sinpong ato safana' anca matengil ko cecay milifetan, makalimay mahecad to paratohay to sinpong a tamdaw, malo sakacecay a milasilay tamdaw hokira?

Ano maolahay kiso a mihaen to demak, ano ma'araw iso ko safaelohay a sinpong ato safana' anca matengil ko cecay milifetan, makalimay mahecad to paratohay to sinpong a tamdaw, malo sakacecay a milasilay tamdaw hokira?
S.PHON: ano~u mao~uɾaħaj kiso~u a miħaən to~u ɬ~ɮəmak, ano~u maʡaraw iso~u ko~u safaəɾo~uħaj a sinpo~uŋ ato~u safanaʡ anʦa matəŋiɾ ko~u ʦəʦaj miɾifətan, makaɾimaj maħəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u parato~uħaj to~u sinpo~uŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw, maɾo~u sakaʦəʦaj a miɾasiɾaj tamɬ~ɮaw ħo~ukira?
S.TRANSL: If so, when you see a newly published story in the news media or hear an experience, you might feel like a news reporter who wants to be the first to break an exciting story.

S.FORM: Ano o potal aca ko minengnengan ni Pitiro a misa'osi, tahada'octo cowa ko mamicomod i loma' ni Kornilius.
Ano o potal aca ko minengnengan ni Pitiro a misa'osi, tahada'octo cowa ko mamicomod i loma' ni Kornilius.
S.PHON: ano~u o~u po~utaɾ aʦa ko~u minəŋnəŋan ni pitiro~u a misaʡo~usi, taħaɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦto~u ʦo~uwa ko~u mamiʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i ɾo~umaʡ ni ko~urniɾio~u~us.
S.TRANSL: If Peter had judged matters solely on outward appearance, he would never have entered the home of Cornelius.

S.FORM: Ano misawkit ko malohemay malitengay tono iing a demak i, samaan mitodong to Kawas paihekal to masadafdafay?
Ano misawkit ko malohemay malitengay tono iing a demak i, samaan mitodong to Kawas paihekal to masadafdafay?
S.PHON: ano~u misawkit ko~u maɾo~uħəmaj maɾitəŋaj to~uno~u iiŋ a ɬ~ɮəmak i, samaan mito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u kawas paiħəkaɾ to~u masaɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮafaj?
S.TRANSL: How should elders reflect divine justice when judging cases of wrongdoing?

S.FORM: Ano cowa pihakelong ko raramod iso, mamisamaan ko pinengneng iso to demak?
Ano cowa pihakelong ko raramod iso, mamisamaan ko pinengneng iso to demak?
S.PHON: ano~u ʦo~uwa piħakəɾo~uŋ ko~u raramo~uɬ~ɮ iso~u, mamisamaan ko~u pinəŋnəŋ iso~u to~u ɬ~ɮəmak?
S.TRANSL: How should those with an unbelieving mate view their situation?

S.FORM: So'linna cowa picada ko salawina to kimad ano han i, o mamahemekho kita, samanen tona makapah ko waywayan ita mahemekay ci Yihofa.
So'linna cowa picada ko salawina to kimad ano han i, o mamahemekho kita, samanen tona makapah ko waywayan ita mahemekay ci Yihofa.
S.PHON: so~uʡɾinna ʦo~uwa piʦaɬ~ɮa ko~u saɾawina to~u kimaɬ~ɮ ano~u ħan i, o~u mamaħəməkħo~u kita, samanən to~una makapaħ ko~u wajwajan ita maħəməkaj ʦi jiħo~ufa.
S.TRANSL: Even if our relatives never accept the truth, we can have the joy that comes from pleasing Jehovah by our faithful course.

S.FORM: Ano masamaanto mafalic ko kalosowal no tamdaw, o Kimad no Kawas o mamaterek.
Ano masamaanto mafalic ko kalosowal no tamdaw, o Kimad no Kawas o mamaterek.
S.PHON: ano~u masamaanto~u mafaɾiʦ ko~u kaɾo~uso~uwaɾ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u kimaɬ~ɮ no~u kawas o~u mamatərək.
S.TRANSL: Indeed, God's Word has continued to endure despite changes to the common language.

S.FORM: So'linay haw i, ano, o wama wina kita hokira, anca cowa, o mamisinanot mipili' to widang.
So'linay haw i, ano, o wama wina kita hokira, anca cowa, o mamisinanot mipili' to widang.
S.PHON: so~uʡɾinaj ħaw i, ano~u, o~u wama wina kita ħo~ukira, anʦa ʦo~uwa, o~u mamisinano~ut mipiɾiʡ to~u wiɬ~ɮaŋ.
S.TRANSL: Certainly, whether you are a parent or not, you should not overlook the need to choose your associations wisely.

S.FORM: Ano samaamaanen ni Satan a mikayhid kita, o kalim ita edengan to saka'oripaw ilaeno no sida'itay a sakowan ni Yihofa.
Ano samaamaanen ni Satan a mikayhid kita, o kalim ita edengan to saka'oripaw ilaeno no sida'itay a sakowan ni Yihofa.
S.PHON: ano~u samaamaanən ni satan a mikajħiɬ~ɮ kita, o~u kaɾim ita əɬ~ɮəŋan to~u sakaʡo~uripaw iɾaəno~u no~u siɬ~ɮaʡitaj a sako~uwan ni jiħo~ufa.
S.TRANSL: We will never desire life other than life under Jehovah's rightful and loving sovereignty.

S.FORM: Itini roma kilac, o kaemangay ano pasadak to kaackan a lihaf, mahecaday o mararaway to ma'odangay.
Itini roma kilac, o kaemangay ano pasadak to kaackan a lihaf, mahecaday o mararaway to ma'odangay.
S.PHON: itini ro~uma kiɾaʦ, o~u kaəmaŋaj ano~u pasaɬ~ɮak to~u kaaʦkan a ɾiħaf, maħəʦaɬ~ɮaj o~u mararawaj to~u maʡo~uɬ~ɮaŋaj.
S.TRANSL: In some cases, minors who were involved with sexting have been prosecuted as sex offenders.

S.FORM: Ano tano ka fana'an a nowina sowal a mi'osi to Fangcalay Cudad i, o mamatongal ko olah to Kimad no Kawas, mahaen kitanan aniniay a Krisciyang, ira ko tada kaolahan no tekedan a sinael.
Ano tano ka fana'an a nowina sowal a mi'osi to Fangcalay Cudad i, o mamatongal ko olah to Kimad no Kawas, mahaen kitanan aniniay a Krisciyang, ira ko tada kaolahan no tekedan a sinael.
S.PHON: ano~u tano~u ka fanaʡan a no~uwina so~uwaɾ a miʡo~usi to~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ i, o~u mamato~uŋaɾ ko~u o~uɾaħ to~u kimaɬ~ɮ no~u kawas, maħaən kitanan aniniaj a krisʦijaŋ, ira ko~u taɬ~ɮa kao~uɾaħan no~u təkəɬ~ɮan a sinaəɾ.
S.TRANSL: As readers considered the Holy Writings in a language they could understand, no doubt many came to have a favorite portion, just as we do today.

S.FORM: Ano paihekal kita to manono' faloco', o lalipahak a macacawma' kita.
Ano paihekal kita to manono' faloco', o lalipahak a macacawma' kita.
S.PHON: ano~u paiħəkaɾ kita to~u mano~uno~uʡ faɾo~uʦo~uʡ, o~u ɾaɾipaħak a maʦaʦawmaʡ kita.
S.TRANSL: Loving interest can make any occasion a delight.

S.FORM: Ano eca i, o mamitalaho kami to roma a tamdaw haw?"
Ano eca i, o mamitalaho kami to roma a tamdaw haw?"
S.PHON: ano~u əʦa i, o~u mamitaɾaħo~u kami to~u ro~uma a tamɬ~ɮaw ħaw?"
S.TRANSL: Recall that John the Baptist once asked Jesus: "Are you the Coming One, or are we to expect a different one?"

S.FORM: Ano misakafah kiso, iraay ko toki mikapot to romaroma a misakafahay Krisciyang.
Ano misakafah kiso, iraay ko toki mikapot to romaroma a misakafahay Krisciyang.
S.PHON: ano~u misakafaħ kiso~u, iraaj ko~u to~uki mikapo~ut to~u ro~umaro~uma a misakafaħaj krisʦijaŋ.
S.TRANSL: Full-time service brings you into contact with fellow full-time servants and helps you to mature as a Christian.

S.FORM: O roma satenokan no Iwropa a fafahiyan salikaka sanay: "Na tangongolay ko misakakinihay a harateng ako to tamdaw, ano cowa ko kalecadan no kitakit ato pihakelongan i, tada mapili'ay kako cangranan."
O roma satenokan no Iwropa a fafahiyan salikaka sanay: "Na tangongolay ko misakakinihay a harateng ako to tamdaw, ano cowa ko kalecadan no kitakit ato pihakelongan i, tada mapili'ay kako cangranan."
S.PHON: o~u ro~uma satəno~ukan no~u iwro~upa a fafaħijan saɾikaka sanaj: "na taŋo~uŋo~uɾaj ko~u misakakiniħaj a ħaratəŋ ako~u to~u tamɬ~ɮaw, ano~u ʦo~uwa ko~u kaɾəʦaɬ~ɮan no~u kitakit ato~u piħakəɾo~uŋan i, taɬ~ɮa mapiɾiʡaj kako~u ʦaŋranan."
S.TRANSL: A sister living in central Europe admits: "I was prejudiced, and I hated anyone who was of a different nationality or who had a religion that was different from mine."

S.FORM: Ano iraay ko so'linay olah ita, mamisamaan ko demak ita?
Ano iraay ko so'linay olah ita, mamisamaan ko demak ita?
S.PHON: ano~u iraaj ko~u so~uʡɾinaj o~uɾaħ ita, mamisamaan ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak ita?
S.TRANSL: What will genuine love move us to do?

S.FORM: Ano O mananto ko masi'ayaway ita a pades, wa tooren ni Yihofa ko saki'ok Ningra.
Ano O mananto ko masi'ayaway ita a pades, wa tooren ni Yihofa ko saki'ok Ningra.
S.PHON: ano~u o~u mananto~u ko~u masiʡajawaj ita a paɬ~ɮəs, wa to~uo~urən ni jiħo~ufa ko~u sakiʡo~uk niŋra.
S.TRANSL: This ironclad guarantee is binding despite any calamity that might befall us.

S.FORM: Ihekalay ci Yis mifana', ano iraay ko lalangian ita misodod to salikaka, kawra caka kahi mihaen to demak, cowa ko mamisodod ci Yihofa kitaanan.
Ihekalay ci Yis mifana', ano iraay ko lalangian ita misodod to salikaka, kawra caka kahi mihaen to demak, cowa ko mamisodod ci Yihofa kitaanan.
S.PHON: iħəkaɾaj ʦi jis mifanaʡ, ano~u iraaj ko~u ɾaɾaŋian ita miso~uɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮ to~u saɾikaka, kawra ʦaka kaħi miħaən to~u ɬ~ɮəmak, ʦo~uwa ko~u mamiso~uɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮ ʦi jiħo~ufa kitaanan.
S.TRANSL: Jesus makes it clear that Jehovah will not forgive us if we do not forgive our brothers when there is a sound basis for doing so.

S.FORM: Haratengen hena, ano patikorto ma'orip i lakoing ci Apraham, hakowa ko hemek ningra.
Haratengen hena, ano patikorto ma'orip i lakoing ci Apraham, hakowa ko hemek ningra.
S.PHON: ħaratəŋən ħəna, ano~u patiko~urto~u maʡo~urip i ɾako~uiŋ ʦi apraħam, ħako~uwa ko~u ħəmək niŋra.
S.TRANSL: But just imagine Abraham's joy when he is resurrected back to a paradise earth.

S.FORM: Mitokel cangra a mitala, o malafelay a wawa papatikol i loma' no Kawas, ano hacowa.
Mitokel cangra a mitala, o malafelay a wawa papatikol i loma' no Kawas, ano hacowa.
S.PHON: mito~ukəɾ ʦaŋra a mitaɾa, o~u maɾafəɾaj a wawa papatiko~uɾ i ɾo~umaʡ no~u kawas, ano~u ħaʦo~uwa.
S.TRANSL: They can also hope that the wayward child will one day come "home" to Jehovah.

S.FORM: Ano pohayen palafang ko tamdaw, nga'ayay palahedaw to tatiihay noka piharateng cangranan, halo mamafalic ko pinengneng cangranan.
Ano pohayen palafang ko tamdaw, nga'ayay palahedaw to tatiihay noka piharateng cangranan, halo mamafalic ko pinengneng cangranan.
S.PHON: ano~u po~uħajən paɾafaŋ ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, ŋaʡajaj paɾaħəɬ~ɮaw to~u tatiiħaj no~uka piħaratəŋ ʦaŋranan, ħaɾo~u mamafaɾiʦ ko~u pinəŋnəŋ ʦaŋranan.
S.TRANSL: Extending hospitality to someone can reduce friction and soften hard feelings.

S.FORM: Sadaken ko tinakoan, o so'linay widang mamihinom kitanan, so'lin ano awa ko paro no loma' a mihaen to demak.
Sadaken ko tinakoan, o so'linay widang mamihinom kitanan, so'lin ano awa ko paro no loma' a mihaen to demak.
S.PHON: saɬ~ɮakən ko~u tinako~uan, o~u so~uʡɾinaj wiɬ~ɮaŋ mamiħino~um kitanan, so~uʡɾin ano~u awa ko~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ a miħaən to~u ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: Give an example of how true friends can bring comfort even when close relatives fail to do so.

S.FORM: Haratengen hena, ano misinanotan ni Yihofa ko awaay ko 'orip a masanga'ay, coko a ikaka ko kaciharateng Ningra to maolahay Cingranan a madimadiay sikawdan han?
Haratengen hena, ano misinanotan ni Yihofa ko awaay ko 'orip a masanga'ay, coko a ikaka ko kaciharateng Ningra to maolahay Cingranan a madimadiay sikawdan han?
S.PHON: ħaratəŋən ħəna, ano~u misinano~utan ni jiħo~ufa ko~u awaaj ko~u ʡo~urip a masaŋaʡaj, ʦo~uko~u a ikaka ko~u kaʦiħaratəŋ niŋra to~u mao~uɾaħaj ʦiŋranan a maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮiaj sikawɬ~ɮan ħan?
S.TRANSL: If Jehovah takes a personal interest in his inanimate creation, imagine how he feels about you who serve him, not because you have been programmed to do so, but because you love him!

S.FORM: Ano mitengil to lihaf no Hongti Kitakit, micekiw to Fangcalay Cudad ato mitepangan cudad, micada to pipacekiw to Fangcalay Cudad, misaday to lalakaw no sa'opo anca mirienang to sa'opo, oha mamipalak to toki.

Ano mitengil to lihaf no Hongti Kitakit, micekiw to Fangcalay Cudad ato mitepangan cudad, micada to pipacekiw to Fangcalay Cudad, misaday to lalakaw no sa'opo anca mirienang to sa'opo, oha mamipalak to toki.
S.PHON: ano~u mitəŋiɾ to~u ɾiħaf no~u ħo~uŋti kitakit, miʦəkiw to~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ ato~u mitəpaŋan ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, miʦaɬ~ɮa to~u pipaʦəkiw to~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, misaɬ~ɮaj to~u ɾaɾakaw no~u saʡo~upo~u anʦa miriənaŋ to~u saʡo~upo~u, o~uħa mamipaɾak to~u to~uki.
S.TRANSL: It takes time to listen to the Kingdom message, read the Bible and Bible literature, have a personal Bible study, and prepare for and attend congregation meetings.

S.FORM: Ano misaharateng kita to samaanan ni Yihofa miharateng ko finawlan Ningra, wa ira ko maanan a epoc hani?
Ano misaharateng kita to samaanan ni Yihofa miharateng ko finawlan Ningra, wa ira ko maanan a epoc hani?
S.PHON: ano~u misaħaratəŋ kita to~u samaanan ni jiħo~ufa miħaratəŋ ko~u finawɾan niŋra, wa ira ko~u maanan a əpo~uʦ ħani?
S.TRANSL: How can we benefit from Bible accounts about the way that Jehovah cares for his people?

S.FORM: Cowa aca ko polong no kitakit ko mihinoman ni Yihofa, ano o kahacecay a tamdaw mihinoman Ningra.
Cowa aca ko polong no kitakit ko mihinoman ni Yihofa, ano o kahacecay a tamdaw mihinoman Ningra.
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa aʦa ko~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kitakit ko~u miħino~uman ni jiħo~ufa, ano~u o~u kaħaʦəʦaj a tamɬ~ɮaw miħino~uman niŋra.
S.TRANSL: Jehovah gave comfort not only to the nation of Israel as a whole but also to each individual.

S.FORM: Kawra, sowal ni Pawlo, ano o malaliyasay ko fafahi ato fa'inay i, 'cowa ka nga'ay miliyaw a ciramod.
Kawra, sowal ni Pawlo, ano o malaliyasay ko fafahi ato fa'inay i, 'cowa ka nga'ay miliyaw a ciramod.
S.PHON: kawra, so~uwaɾ ni pawɾo~u, ano~u o~u maɾaɾijasaj ko~u fafaħi ato~u faʡinaj i, ʡʦo~uwa ka ŋaʡaj miɾijaw a ʦiramo~uɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: The problem was not, for example, that the husband had been immoral, giving the wife a basis for divorce and remarriage.

S.FORM: Cowa ko kafana' aca to capeling ni Yihofa, ano sinanoten ita to samaanay ci Yihofa padama kitaanan i, wa "ma'araw" ita ko Kawas.
Cowa ko kafana' aca to capeling ni Yihofa, ano sinanoten ita to samaanay ci Yihofa padama kitaanan i, wa "ma'araw" ita ko Kawas.
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa ko~u kafanaʡ aʦa to~u ʦapəɾiŋ ni jiħo~ufa, ano~u sinano~utən ita to~u samaanaj ʦi jiħo~ufa paɬ~ɮama kitaanan i, wa "maʡaraw" ita ko~u kawas.
S.TRANSL: In addition to getting to know God's qualities, true worshippers can "see God" by observing the way he acts in their behalf.

S.FORM: Haratengen, ano tahapades i, mitafo to madimadi, papala'osi to manan a patosokan, mamasayarto ko faloco'.
Haratengen, ano tahapades i, mitafo to madimadi, papala'osi to manan a patosokan, mamasayarto ko faloco'.
S.PHON: ħaratəŋən, ano~u taħapaɬ~ɮəs i, mitafo~u to~u maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮi, papaɾaʡo~usi to~u manan a pato~uso~ukan, mamasajarto~u ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ.
S.TRANSL: Why is it comforting to reflect on the value of our faithfulness?

S.FORM: Ano cowa pihakelong ko raramod iso, mamisamaan pasifana' to wawa to so'linay a kimad?
Ano cowa pihakelong ko raramod iso, mamisamaan pasifana' to wawa to so'linay a kimad?
S.PHON: ano~u ʦo~uwa piħakəɾo~uŋ ko~u raramo~uɬ~ɮ iso~u, mamisamaan pasifanaʡ to~u wawa to~u so~uʡɾinaj a kimaɬ~ɮ?
S.TRANSL: How can Christian parents teach their children Bible truth in a religiously divided household?

S.FORM: Ano itini misanga' to tamina i 40, 50 miheca, misamacayay cingra to no'adingoan a demak.
Ano itini misanga' to tamina i 40, 50 miheca, misamacayay cingra to no'adingoan a demak.
S.PHON: ano~u itini misaŋaʡ to~u tamina i **, ** miħəʦa, misamaʦajaj ʦiŋra to~u no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan a ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: Even when building the ark, which may have taken as long as 40 or 50 years, Noah kept his spiritual focus.

S.FORM: Ano misi'ayaw to cowa pakaso'lin to misanga'ay Tatapang a tamdam i, samaan kita padama cangranan misaharaterateng?
Ano misi'ayaw to cowa pakaso'lin to misanga'ay Tatapang a tamdam i, samaan kita padama cangranan misaharaterateng?
S.PHON: ano~u misiʡajaw to~u ʦo~uwa pakaso~uʡɾin to~u misaŋaʡaj tatapaŋ a tamɬ~ɮam i, samaan kita paɬ~ɮama ʦaŋranan misaħaratəratəŋ?
S.TRANSL: How could we reason with someone who claims that there is no Creator?

S.FORM: Ano sawkitento no mato'asay to malipalaway a mipatay cingra nga', patikoren cingra i pilimekan a niyaro'.
Ano sawkitento no mato'asay to malipalaway a mipatay cingra nga', patikoren cingra i pilimekan a niyaro'.
S.PHON: ano~u sawkitənto~u no~u mato~uʡasaj to~u maɾipaɾawaj a mipataj ʦiŋra ŋaʡ, patiko~urən ʦiŋra i piɾiməkan a nijaro~uʡ.
S.TRANSL: Only after they had declared the killing accidental would the fugitive be returned to the city of refuge.

S.FORM: Ano midopo to satadamaanay noka pikowan no Kawas wa misamaan ko sa'osi ita?
Ano midopo to satadamaanay noka pikowan no Kawas wa misamaan ko sa'osi ita?
S.PHON: ano~u miɬ~ɮo~upo~u to~u sataɬ~ɮamaanaj no~uka piko~uwan no~u kawas wa misamaan ko~u saʡo~usi ita?
S.TRANSL: How do supporters of God's sovereignty make personal decisions?

S.FORM: Ano mihaen to demak kita, cowa ko mamatira toya padeteng sanay misafelit to palinian no Kawas a tamdaw, matefoc no Kawas.
Ano mihaen to demak kita, cowa ko mamatira toya padeteng sanay misafelit to palinian no Kawas a tamdaw, matefoc no Kawas.
S.PHON: ano~u miħaən to~u ɬ~ɮəmak kita, ʦo~uwa ko~u mamatira to~uja paɬ~ɮətəŋ sanaj misafəɾit to~u paɾinian no~u kawas a tamɬ~ɮaw, matəfo~uʦ no~u kawas.
S.TRANSL: Thus, we may succeed in escaping Jehovah's judgment against those who deliberately violate his law.

S.FORM: Ano malipalaw a mipatay to tamdaw i, kalikien ningra milaliw tayra i pilimekan a niyaro', tayra i fawahan no niyaro', "pasowalen ko mato'asay no niyaro' to nano demak."
Ano malipalaw a mipatay to tamdaw i, kalikien ningra milaliw tayra i pilimekan a niyaro', tayra i fawahan no niyaro', "pasowalen ko mato'asay no niyaro' to nano demak."
S.PHON: ano~u maɾipaɾaw a mipataj to~u tamɬ~ɮaw i, kaɾikiən niŋra miɾaɾiw tajra i piɾiməkan a nijaro~uʡ, tajra i fawaħan no~u nijaro~uʡ, "paso~uwaɾən ko~u mato~uʡasaj no~u nijaro~uʡ to~u nano~u ɬ~ɮəmak."
S.TRANSL: After he accidentally killed someone, a fugitive first had to "present his case in the hearing of the elders" at the gate of the city of refuge to which he had fled.

S.FORM: Ano patahekal kita to olah, o mamisolot to tao sakafana'aw to Wama ita i kakarayan.
Ano patahekal kita to olah, o mamisolot to tao sakafana'aw to Wama ita i kakarayan.
S.PHON: ano~u pataħəkaɾ kita to~u o~uɾaħ, o~u mamiso~uɾo~ut to~u tao~u sakafanaʡaw to~u wama ita i kakarajan.
S.TRANSL: The love we show for others draws people to our heavenly Father.

S.FORM: Ano caka pihakelong ko tamdaw to Kawas i, wa sao niyah saan misa'osi to maanan ko matatodongay maanan ko tatiihay."
Ano caka pihakelong ko tamdaw to Kawas i, wa sao niyah saan misa'osi to maanan ko matatodongay maanan ko tatiihay."
S.PHON: ano~u ʦaka piħakəɾo~uŋ ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~u kawas i, wa sao~u nijaħ saan misaʡo~usi to~u maanan ko~u matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj maanan ko~u tatiiħaj."
S.TRANSL: If they disobey, they will be left to decide for themselves what is good... and what is not good."

S.FORM: Ano madimadi kiso i, mamahemek ko faloco', samanen mamilifok kiso to hemek ni Yihofa aci Yis, hanaca o papalifonen nangra kiso.
Ano madimadi kiso i, mamahemek ko faloco', samanen mamilifok kiso to hemek ni Yihofa aci Yis, hanaca o papalifonen nangra kiso.
S.PHON: ano~u maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮi kiso~u i, mamaħəmək ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ, samanən mamiɾifo~uk kiso~u to~u ħəmək ni jiħo~ufa aʦi jis, ħanaʦa o~u papaɾifo~unən naŋra kiso~u.
S.TRANSL: Find joy in knowing that Jehovah and Jesus are pleased with you and that they will reward your faithful course.

S.FORM: Ano cowa ko Krisciyang ko raramod iso, mamisamaan pasifana' to wawa mikangodo to wama wina?
Ano cowa ko Krisciyang ko raramod iso, mamisamaan pasifana' to wawa mikangodo to wama wina?
S.PHON: ano~u ʦo~uwa ko~u krisʦijaŋ ko~u raramo~uɬ~ɮ iso~u, mamisamaan pasifanaʡ to~u wawa mikaŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u to~u wama wina?
S.TRANSL: How can Christians teach their children to honor an unbelieving parent?

S.FORM: Ano patahekal kita to matiniay cowa pisateked a olah, o mamatomes to hemek ato epoc ko noka'orip ita.
Ano patahekal kita to matiniay cowa pisateked a olah, o mamatomes to hemek ato epoc ko noka'orip ita.
S.PHON: ano~u pataħəkaɾ kita to~u matiniaj ʦo~uwa pisatəkəɬ~ɮ a o~uɾaħ, o~u mamato~uməs to~u ħəmək ato~u əpo~uʦ ko~u no~ukaʡo~urip ita.
S.TRANSL: When we show or are shown unselfish love, our lives are enriched, being filled with joy and meaning.

S.FORM: Ano matongangan no tao kita sasamaan hani?
Ano matongangan no tao kita sasamaan hani?
S.PHON: ano~u mato~uŋaŋan no~u tao~u kita sasamaan ħani?
S.TRANSL: What, though, if you are a victim of a slanderous accusation?

S.FORM: So'lin mipakideman miroero cangra, o Misawacayay Tamdaw ni Yihofa "o nga'ayay, damsayay tamdaw", ano maroero cangra "mitafoay to madimadi, makelecay cangra", sanay.
So'lin mipakideman miroero cangra, o Misawacayay Tamdaw ni Yihofa "o nga'ayay, damsayay tamdaw", ano maroero cangra "mitafoay to madimadi, makelecay cangra", sanay.
S.PHON: so~uʡɾin mipakiɬ~ɮəman miro~uəro~u ʦaŋra, o~u misawaʦajaj tamɬ~ɮaw ni jiħo~ufa "o~u ŋaʡajaj, ɬ~ɮamsajaj tamɬ~ɮaw", ano~u maro~uəro~u ʦaŋra "mitafo~uaj to~u maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮi, makəɾəʦaj ʦaŋra", sanaj.
S.TRANSL: Even so, despite the bitter persecution they endured, adds the author, the Witnesses showed "dependability and equanimity calmness under stress" as well as "integrity and solidarity."

S.FORM: Ano tikolen miharateng ko mieminay to toki a katayal, mata'lifay ko maharatengay to sapafeli ni Yihofa a sakaraheker.
Ano tikolen miharateng ko mieminay to toki a katayal, mata'lifay ko maharatengay to sapafeli ni Yihofa a sakaraheker.
S.PHON: ano~u tiko~uɾən miħaratəŋ ko~u miəminaj to~u to~uki a katajaɾ, mataʡɾifaj ko~u maħaratəŋaj to~u sapafəɾi ni jiħo~ufa a sakaraħəkər.
S.TRANSL: When I reflect on our life in the full-time service, I have the undeniable feeling that we were blessed by Jehovah beyond what we could have imagined.

S.FORM: So'lin ano caka pasowal cangra, latek mamatira ci Tafitian ko harateng nangra: 'Nanay pahemeken no tamdaw kiso to nika citanengay kiso!'
So'lin ano caka pasowal cangra, latek mamatira ci Tafitian ko harateng nangra: 'Nanay pahemeken no tamdaw kiso to nika citanengay kiso!'
S.PHON: so~uʡɾin ano~u ʦaka paso~uwaɾ ʦaŋra, ɾatək mamatira ʦi tafitian ko~u ħaratəŋ naŋra: ʡnanaj paħəməkən no~u tamɬ~ɮaw kiso~u to~u nika ʦitanəŋaj kiso~u!ʡ
S.TRANSL: Whether they verbalize it or not, they may feel like David, who said: "Blessed be your good sense!"

S.FORM: Mangalef ano mararaw kita tatiih ko teloc i, o pirikec ni Yihofa wa patalipa'elal kitanan, tada kalimelaan ko pihakelong to kakarayan a Wama.
Mangalef ano mararaw kita tatiih ko teloc i, o pirikec ni Yihofa wa patalipa'elal kitanan, tada kalimelaan ko pihakelong to kakarayan a Wama.
S.PHON: maŋaɾəf ano~u mararaw kita tatiiħ ko~u təɾo~uʦ i, o~u pirikəʦ ni jiħo~ufa wa pataɾipaʡəɾaɾ kitanan, taɬ~ɮa kaɾiməɾaan ko~u piħakəɾo~uŋ to~u kakarajan a wama.
S.TRANSL: Moreover, if our actions caused unpleasant consequences, his discipline would remind us of just how important it is to listen to our heavenly Father.

S.FORM: Ano mafana' kita to midemakay ko salikaka to pakidemay misafelit to palinian no Fangcalay Cudad a demak, wa samaan ko hademak?
Ano mafana' kita to midemakay ko salikaka to pakidemay misafelit to palinian no Fangcalay Cudad a demak, wa samaan ko hademak?
S.PHON: ano~u mafanaʡ kita to~u miɬ~ɮəmakaj ko~u saɾikaka to~u pakiɬ~ɮəmaj misafəɾit to~u paɾinian no~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ a ɬ~ɮəmak, wa samaan ko~u ħaɬ~ɮəmak?
S.TRANSL: What responsibility do we have when speaking to the elders about our brothers?

S.FORM: Ano midopo kiso to satadamaanay noka pikowan no Kawas, samaanay ko faloco' ni Yihofa?
Ano midopo kiso to satadamaanay noka pikowan no Kawas, samaanay ko faloco' ni Yihofa?
S.PHON: ano~u miɬ~ɮo~upo~u kiso~u to~u sataɬ~ɮamaanaj no~uka piko~uwan no~u kawas, samaanaj ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ni jiħo~ufa?
S.TRANSL: How does Jehovah feel about your efforts to uphold his sovereignty?

S.FORM: Sanay ci Yis: "Ano cima ko ci'anofay ko faloco' a minengneng to fafahiyan i, o ma'odangayto cingra i faloco' ningra toya fafahiyan.
Sanay ci Yis: "Ano cima ko ci'anofay ko faloco' a minengneng to fafahiyan i, o ma'odangayto cingra i faloco' ningra toya fafahiyan.
S.PHON: sanaj ʦi jis: "ano~u ʦima ko~u ʦiʡano~ufaj ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ a minəŋnəŋ to~u fafaħijan i, o~u maʡo~uɬ~ɮaŋajto~u ʦiŋra i faɾo~uʦo~uʡ niŋra to~uja fafaħijan.
S.TRANSL: Jesus stated: "Everyone who keeps on looking at a woman so as to have a passion for her has already committed adultery with her in his heart.

S.FORM: Paceremay kako ato kasakilac kantok a lomowad, ano malanam adihayay ko milengoan kahemekan a demak.
Paceremay kako ato kasakilac kantok a lomowad, ano malanam adihayay ko milengoan kahemekan a demak.
S.PHON: paʦərəmaj kako~u ato~u kasakiɾaʦ kanto~uk a ɾo~umo~uwaɬ~ɮ, ano~u maɾanam aɬ~ɮiħajaj ko~u miɾəŋo~uan kaħəməkan a ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: "The circuit overseer and I got up early each morning and discussed many interesting topics over breakfast.

S.FORM: Ano mafana'to ko wawa mi'imer to tireng i, mihawadan midama to kapoto' a lalan.
Ano mafana'to ko wawa mi'imer to tireng i, mihawadan midama to kapoto' a lalan.
S.PHON: ano~u mafanaʡto~u ko~u wawa miʡimər to~u tirəŋ i, miħawaɬ~ɮan miɬ~ɮama to~u kapo~uto~uʡ a ɾaɾan.
S.TRANSL: But as the child finds his balance, the parent cautiously lets go for a few moments at a time.

S.FORM: Ano ira ko fadangalan ita a mirikec, wa nga'ay kita misamaan mitodong ci Yihofaan aci Yisan?
Ano ira ko fadangalan ita a mirikec, wa nga'ay kita misamaan mitodong ci Yihofaan aci Yisan?
S.PHON: ano~u ira ko~u faɬ~ɮaŋaɾan ita a mirikəʦ, wa ŋaʡaj kita misamaan mito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ʦi jiħo~ufaan aʦi jisan?
S.TRANSL: When we give discipline, how can we imitate Jehovah and his Son?

S.FORM: Ano ma'araw ita ko papadamaen a tamdaw i, wa mitodong ci Yisan paihekal to sida'it a ciharateng cangranan han?
Ano ma'araw ita ko papadamaen a tamdaw i, wa mitodong ci Yisan paihekal to sida'it a ciharateng cangranan han?
S.PHON: ano~u maʡaraw ita ko~u papaɬ~ɮamaən a tamɬ~ɮaw i, wa mito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ʦi jisan paiħəkaɾ to~u siɬ~ɮaʡit a ʦiħaratəŋ ʦaŋranan ħan?
S.TRANSL: Are we like Jesus, ever ready to show compassionate concern when we meet people who need help?

S.FORM: Ano sapitongalaw kiso to tayal saki Yihofaan, iraay ko maanan a hatayal hani?
Ano sapitongalaw kiso to tayal saki Yihofaan, iraay ko maanan a hatayal hani?
S.PHON: ano~u sapito~uŋaɾaw kiso~u to~u tajaɾ saki jiħo~ufaan, iraaj ko~u maanan a ħatajaɾ ħani?
S.TRANSL: What further opportunities exist if you desire to expand the work you do for Jehovah?

S.FORM: Ano mahaen i, hamaan patelas a misawkit cangraanan, tanamen miharateng ko roray nangra sini'ada cangraanan.
Ano mahaen i, hamaan patelas a misawkit cangraanan, tanamen miharateng ko roray nangra sini'ada cangraanan.
S.PHON: ano~u maħaən i, ħamaan patəɾas a misawkit ʦaŋraanan, tanamən miħaratəŋ ko~u ro~uraj naŋra siniʡaɬ~ɮa ʦaŋraanan.
S.TRANSL: But instead of judging them, let us show insight and compassion.

S.FORM: Kawra ano caka walawal no faloco' i, tanamen mikalasaka dademak ko safalod no Matay 18:15 a misaysay to demak.
Kawra ano caka walawal no faloco' i, tanamen mikalasaka dademak ko safalod no Matay 18:15 a misaysay to demak.
S.PHON: kawra ano~u ʦaka waɾawaɾ no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ i, tanamən mikaɾasaka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak ko~u safaɾo~uɬ~ɮ no~u mataj **:** a misajsaj to~u ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: If after some effort it seems that more is needed, could Matthew 18:15 be applied in principle?

S.FORM: Mihaenay, ano mitosil paihkal to nga'ayay capeling no Krisciyang tada masakalimlaan.
Mihaenay, ano mitosil paihkal to nga'ayay capeling no Krisciyang tada masakalimlaan.
S.PHON: miħaənaj, ano~u mito~usiɾ paiħkaɾ to~u ŋaʡajaj ʦapəɾiŋ no~u krisʦijaŋ taɬ~ɮa masakaɾimɾaan.
S.TRANSL: Clearly, the fruitage of God's spirit should be reflected in our ministry.

S.FORM: O safalod no sinael samanay padama takowanan, ano kalacafay to kafahalan a tamdaw itini i wangcan a misalama, wa nga'ay han?"
O safalod no sinael samanay padama takowanan, ano kalacafay to kafahalan a tamdaw itini i wangcan a misalama, wa nga'ay han?"
S.PHON: o~u safaɾo~uɬ~ɮ no~u sinaəɾ samanaj paɬ~ɮama tako~uwanan, ano~u kaɾaʦafaj to~u kafaħaɾan a tamɬ~ɮaw itini i waŋʦan a misaɾama, wa ŋaʡaj ħan?"
S.TRANSL: Or what should you do if invited to play online games with strangers?

S.FORM: Ano mamilayap to sapadama no Kawas, cowa ka nga'ay kita misamaan to demak?
Ano mamilayap to sapadama no Kawas, cowa ka nga'ay kita misamaan to demak?
S.PHON: ano~u mamiɾajap to~u sapaɬ~ɮama no~u kawas, ʦo~uwa ka ŋaʡaj kita misamaan to~u ɬ~ɮəmak?
S.TRANSL: To benefit from God's help, what should we avoid?

S.FORM: Ano o Hipray ato Krisiya a sowal no Fangcalay Cudad, adihayay ko nika falic.
Ano o Hipray ato Krisiya a sowal no Fangcalay Cudad, adihayay ko nika falic.
S.PHON: ano~u o~u ħipraj ato~u krisija a so~uwaɾ no~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, aɬ~ɮiħajaj ko~u nika faɾiʦ.
S.TRANSL: The same is true of Hebrew and Greek, the languages that most of the Bible was written in.

S.FORM: Ano samanayto, o nga'ayay a widang ita ano cowa ka pisaareteng to palinian ni Yihofa, o mamipalak to nga'ayay kalala'ed no mita ato Kawas alatek.
Ano samanayto, o nga'ayay a widang ita ano cowa ka pisaareteng to palinian ni Yihofa, o mamipalak to nga'ayay kalala'ed no mita ato Kawas alatek.
S.PHON: ano~u samanajto~u, o~u ŋaʡajaj a wiɬ~ɮaŋ ita ano~u ʦo~uwa ka pisaarətəŋ to~u paɾinian ni jiħo~ufa, o~u mamipaɾak to~u ŋaʡajaj kaɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮ no~u mita ato~u kawas aɾatək.
S.TRANSL: In any case, if our close associates do not show a high regard for Jehovah's standards, they can in time destroy our good standing with God.

S.FORM: Ano mararid a mitosil kita, o papadadotoc a misamacay to sakalimlaan a demak.
Ano mararid a mitosil kita, o papadadotoc a misamacay to sakalimlaan a demak.
S.PHON: ano~u marariɬ~ɮ a mito~usiɾ kita, o~u papaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ a misamaʦaj to~u sakaɾimɾaan a ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: Continuing to have a regular share in Jehovah's work can help us to stay focused on the big issue.

S.FORM: Kawra ano samaanto, oha papatado kita a miharateng ato mikangodo to tamdaw, mahawpay ko kacipinang to mitosilan i kilac a tamdaw.
Kawra ano samaanto, oha papatado kita a miharateng ato mikangodo to tamdaw, mahawpay ko kacipinang to mitosilan i kilac a tamdaw.
S.PHON: kawra ano~u samaanto~u, o~uħa papataɬ~ɮo~u kita a miħaratəŋ ato~u mikaŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u to~u tamɬ~ɮaw, maħawpaj ko~u kaʦipinaŋ to~u mito~usiɾan i kiɾaʦ a tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: However, we should always be considerate and respectful, which includes getting to know the local people well.

S.FORM: Ano ma'araw namo ko cecay fa'inayan i pikimadan to patay ako i, sacaciyawen cingra, nanay 'osien namo koni mimingay langdaway a cudad "Mikayatay to Saka Tahada'ocaw a Ma'orip".
Ano ma'araw namo ko cecay fa'inayan i pikimadan to patay ako i, sacaciyawen cingra, nanay 'osien namo koni mimingay langdaway a cudad "Mikayatay to Saka Tahada'ocaw a Ma'orip".
S.PHON: ano~u maʡaraw namo~u ko~u ʦəʦaj faʡinajan i pikimaɬ~ɮan to~u pataj ako~u i, saʦaʦijawən ʦiŋra, nanaj ʡo~usiən namo~u ko~uni mimiŋaj ɾaŋɬ~ɮawaj a ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ "mikajataj to~u saka taħaɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦaw a maʡo~urip".
S.TRANSL: But if you see a man at my funeral who does not seem to belong there, talk to him, and please read this little blue book referring to the Bible study aid "The Truth That Leads to Eternal Life" that he had received years before.

S.FORM: Ano awaay ko toki ato 'icel ita mihamham to tao anca micada to pihamham no tao, wa misamaan kita to demak nga'?
Ano awaay ko toki ato 'icel ita mihamham to tao anca micada to pihamham no tao, wa misamaan kita to demak nga'?
S.PHON: ano~u awaaj ko~u to~uki ato~u ʡiʦəɾ ita miħamħam to~u tao~u anʦa miʦaɬ~ɮa to~u piħamħam no~u tao~u, wa misamaan kita to~u ɬ~ɮəmak ŋaʡ?
S.TRANSL: What might we do if having little time and energy limits our accepting or extending hospitality?

S.FORM: Pakalalokay ko Fangcalay Cudad kitanan patahekal to mihamhamay, mihaen o nganga'ay a misalof to kalala'ed ato tao, ano o 'adato o mamala nga'ay.
Pakalalokay ko Fangcalay Cudad kitanan patahekal to mihamhamay, mihaen o nganga'ay a misalof to kalala'ed ato tao, ano o 'adato o mamala nga'ay.
S.PHON: pakaɾaɾo~ukaj ko~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ kitanan pataħəkaɾ to~u miħamħamaj, miħaən o~u ŋaŋaʡaj a misaɾo~uf to~u kaɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮ ato~u tao~u, ano~u o~u ʡaɬ~ɮato~u o~u mamaɾa ŋaʡaj.
S.TRANSL: To improve relationships, even with enemies, the Bible recommends hospitality.

S.FORM: Mahecaday, ano marariday kita midemak to ka'intehan no Kawas a demak, kalikien ita misalof a mifalic nga'.
Mahecaday, ano marariday kita midemak to ka'intehan no Kawas a demak, kalikien ita misalof a mifalic nga'.
S.PHON: maħəʦaɬ~ɮaj, ano~u marariɬ~ɮaj kita miɬ~ɮəmak to~u kaʡintəħan no~u kawas a ɬ~ɮəmak, kaɾikiən ita misaɾo~uf a mifaɾiʦ ŋaʡ.
S.TRANSL: Similarly, we need to act with urgency in obeying the command to strip off habits that are contrary to God's personality.

S.FORM: Mankora toha saka nga'ayaw no mitosilay demak, midoedoan niyam ko holic, mitokel ano hacowaay mamafalic ko pakayraan.
Mankora toha saka nga'ayaw no mitosilay demak, midoedoan niyam ko holic, mitokel ano hacowaay mamafalic ko pakayraan.
S.PHON: manko~ura to~uħa saka ŋaʡajaw no~u mito~usiɾaj ɬ~ɮəmak, miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uan nijam ko~u ħo~uɾiʦ, mito~ukəɾ ano~u ħaʦo~uwaaj mamafaɾiʦ ko~u pakajraan.
S.TRANSL: So in order to get the preaching work done, we obeyed the laws, hoping that things would change for the better.

S.FORM: Ano iraay ko no'adingoan a harateng i, wa misamaan ko hademak no mita hani?
Ano iraay ko no'adingoan a harateng i, wa misamaan ko hademak no mita hani?
S.PHON: ano~u iraaj ko~u no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan a ħaratəŋ i, wa misamaan ko~u ħaɬ~ɮəmak no~u mita ħani?
S.TRANSL: How will being spiritually-minded affect our life?

S.FORM: Ano sapi'acaw kita to so'linay kimad wa misadak to maanan sapi'aca aki?
Ano sapi'acaw kita to so'linay kimad wa misadak to maanan sapi'aca aki?
S.PHON: ano~u sapiʡaʦaw kita to~u so~uʡɾinaj kimaɬ~ɮ wa misaɬ~ɮak to~u maanan sapiʡaʦa aki?
S.TRANSL: What things may be included in the price we have to pay for the truth?

S.FORM: Ano micoli ko salawina tisowanan midoko ci Yihofaan i, misamaan kiso mitafo to madimadi?
Ano micoli ko salawina tisowanan midoko ci Yihofaan i, misamaan kiso mitafo to madimadi?
S.PHON: ano~u miʦo~uɾi ko~u saɾawina tiso~uwanan miɬ~ɮo~uko~u ʦi jiħo~ufaan i, misamaan kiso~u mitafo~u to~u maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮi?
S.TRANSL: How can you maintain your loyalty to Jehovah if your relatives oppose true worship?

S.FORM: Miki'okan ni Yihofa ko finawlan Ningra, ano misaali cangra i, o mamipadang cangranan.
Miki'okan ni Yihofa ko finawlan Ningra, ano misaali cangra i, o mamipadang cangranan.
S.PHON: mikiʡo~ukan ni jiħo~ufa ko~u finawɾan niŋra, ano~u misaaɾi ʦaŋra i, o~u mamipaɬ~ɮaŋ ʦaŋranan.
S.TRANSL: Jehovah gives us a basis for being convinced that he will help his people when they are in need.

S.FORM: O roma, ano mihai ci Yis a pasata, o mikotoday ci Yisan a tamdaw, wa miliyasto cingranan, sanay ko harateng nangra.
O roma, ano mihai ci Yis a pasata, o mikotoday ci Yisan a tamdaw, wa miliyasto cingranan, sanay ko harateng nangra.
S.PHON: o~u ro~uma, ano~u miħai ʦi jis a pasata, o~u miko~uto~uɬ~ɮaj ʦi jisan a tamɬ~ɮaw, wa miɾijasto~u ʦiŋranan, sanaj ko~u ħaratəŋ naŋra.
S.TRANSL: If Jesus said that taxation was a necessary burden, he could lose the support of his followers.

S.FORM: Midemakay kako to miciwmongay to casi, mitafo a parakat i yofing, anca micada a militemoh to tayraay i Pitil a tamdaw, ano o manan ko silsil no salikaka, makahiyay kako micada.
Midemakay kako to miciwmongay to casi, mitafo a parakat i yofing, anca micada a militemoh to tayraay i Pitil a tamdaw, ano o manan ko silsil no salikaka, makahiyay kako micada.
S.PHON: miɬ~ɮəmakaj kako~u to~u miʦiwmo~uŋaj to~u ʦasi, mitafo~u a parakat i jo~ufiŋ, anʦa miʦaɬ~ɮa a miɾitəmo~uħ to~u tajraaj i pitiɾ a tamɬ~ɮaw, ano~u o~u manan ko~u siɾsiɾ no~u saɾikaka, makaħijaj kako~u miʦaɬ~ɮa.
S.TRANSL: I wrapped magazines for mailing, processed subscriptions, and served as a receptionist; I did whatever I was asked to do.

S.FORM: Ano o ci Pawloto, maedeng miako'iday to sida'it ni Parnapas.
Ano o ci Pawloto, maedeng miako'iday to sida'it ni Parnapas.
S.PHON: ano~u o~u ʦi pawɾo~uto~u, maəɬ~ɮəŋ miako~uʡiɬ~ɮaj to~u siɬ~ɮaʡit ni parnapas.
S.TRANSL: On the other hand, Paul certainly would have appreciated Barnabas' kindness and compassion.

S.FORM: Ano midama kita to demak no Hongti Kitakit, wa milifok to maanan a sapalemed?
Ano midama kita to demak no Hongti Kitakit, wa milifok to maanan a sapalemed?
S.PHON: ano~u miɬ~ɮama kita to~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u ħo~uŋti kitakit, wa miɾifo~uk to~u maanan a sapaɾəməɬ~ɮ?
S.TRANSL: How can we train our children and new ones to have a share?

S.FORM: Ano pasalaten no Wawa kamo i, o so'linayto mapasalat kamo.
Ano pasalaten no Wawa kamo i, o so'linayto mapasalat kamo.
S.PHON: ano~u pasaɾatən no~u wawa kamo~u i, o~u so~uʡɾinajto~u mapasaɾat kamo~u.
S.TRANSL: "If the Son sets you free, you will be truly free."

S.FORM: Ano cisasa ko kaemangay tamdaw to so'linay kimad, samanen no wama wina a padama cangranan?
Ano cisasa ko kaemangay tamdaw to so'linay kimad, samanen no wama wina a padama cangranan?
S.PHON: ano~u ʦisasa ko~u kaəmaŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw to~u so~uʡɾinaj kimaɬ~ɮ, samanən no~u wama wina a paɬ~ɮama ʦaŋranan?
S.TRANSL: If a young person has doubts, how can parents provide assistance?

S.FORM: Ano mapakangolaw kita i, o misapoeneray capeling wa nga'ay padama kitaanan paka'met to tireng.
Ano mapakangolaw kita i, o misapoeneray capeling wa nga'ay padama kitaanan paka'met to tireng.
S.PHON: ano~u mapakaŋo~uɾaw kita i, o~u misapo~uənəraj ʦapəɾiŋ wa ŋaʡaj paɬ~ɮama kitaanan pakaʡmət to~u tirəŋ.
S.TRANSL: Humility also helps us to show self-control when we are provoked.

S.FORM: Mamisa'icel kita rihaday ato salikaka, so'lin ano mapakararaw no tao, anca caka sadafdaf ko picada no tao, mamihaen kita to demak.
Mamisa'icel kita rihaday ato salikaka, so'lin ano mapakararaw no tao, anca caka sadafdaf ko picada no tao, mamihaen kita to demak.
S.PHON: mamisaʡiʦəɾ kita riħaɬ~ɮaj ato~u saɾikaka, so~uʡɾin ano~u mapakararaw no~u tao~u, anʦa ʦaka saɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮaf ko~u piʦaɬ~ɮa no~u tao~u, mamiħaən kita to~u ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: We do everything in our power to maintain peace with our brothers, even when we feel that we have been misunderstood or treated unfairly.

S.FORM: Ano hatiraay i, licayen ko niyah: "Micongeday ko fa'inay takowan a midoko to Kawas han?
Ano hatiraay i, licayen ko niyah: "Micongeday ko fa'inay takowan a midoko to Kawas han?
S.PHON: ano~u ħatiraaj i, ɾiʦajən ko~u nijaħ: "miʦo~uŋəɬ~ɮaj ko~u faʡinaj tako~uwan a miɬ~ɮo~uko~u to~u kawas ħan?
S.TRANSL: If you face a similar situation, ask yourself: 'Is my spouse demanding that I stop worshipping my God?

S.FORM: Ano ma'odangay ko raramod, o makoracay a tamdaw nga'ayay misodod a miliyaw madadi'i to raramod, wa awaayto ko mihaian no Fangcalay Cudad a lalangian a malalikong.
Ano ma'odangay ko raramod, o makoracay a tamdaw nga'ayay misodod a miliyaw madadi'i to raramod, wa awaayto ko mihaian no Fangcalay Cudad a lalangian a malalikong.
S.PHON: ano~u maʡo~uɬ~ɮaŋaj ko~u raramo~uɬ~ɮ, o~u mako~uraʦaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ŋaʡajaj miso~uɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮ a miɾijaw maɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮiʡi to~u raramo~uɬ~ɮ, wa awaajto~u ko~u miħaian no~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ a ɾaɾaŋian a maɾaɾiko~uŋ.
S.TRANSL: When he or she resumes sexual relations with the guilty mate, the grounds for obtaining a Scriptural divorce would be canceled.

S.FORM: Ano malahecito koni demak, edengan oya so'linay midoko ci Yihofaan a tamdaw ko mamaterek i sera.
Ano malahecito koni demak, edengan oya so'linay midoko ci Yihofaan a tamdaw ko mamaterek i sera.
S.PHON: ano~u maɾaħəʦito~u ko~uni ɬ~ɮəmak, əɬ~ɮəŋan o~uja so~uʡɾinaj miɬ~ɮo~uko~u ʦi jiħo~ufaan a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u mamatərək i səra.
S.TRANSL: When this is accomplished, only true worshippers of God will be left on the cleansed earth.

S.FORM: So'linay i, ano caka paratoh to tamdaw, o awaay ko ngodo ato olah.
So'linay i, ano caka paratoh to tamdaw, o awaay ko ngodo ato olah.
S.PHON: so~uʡɾinaj i, ano~u ʦaka parato~uħ to~u tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u awaaj ko~u ŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u ato~u o~uɾaħ.
S.TRANSL: In fact, not offering or responding to a greeting may be taken as unloving or as evidence of bad manners.

S.FORM: Ano misaka dademak kiso to Wa Samaan ko Ka'orip Noikor Hani?
Ano misaka dademak kiso to Wa Samaan ko Ka'orip Noikor Hani?
S.PHON: ano~u misaka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak kiso~u to~u wa samaan ko~u kaʡo~urip no~uiko~ur ħani?
S.TRANSL: You might choose to use the tract What Is the Kingdom of God?

S.FORM: Mihaenay, ano cisasaay kiso toniya lihaf, keni'en ko sapipalahdaw a eca ka pasadak to mararaway a lihaf.
Mihaenay, ano cisasaay kiso toniya lihaf, keni'en ko sapipalahdaw a eca ka pasadak to mararaway a lihaf.
S.PHON: miħaənaj, ano~u ʦisasaaj kiso~u to~unija ɾiħaf, kəniʡən ko~u sapipaɾaħɬ~ɮaw a əʦa ka pasaɬ~ɮak to~u mararawaj a ɾiħaf.
S.TRANSL: If in doubt, hit the delete key, not the send button.

S.FORM: Mikitini toniya lalakaw mahapinangay ita, ano sapahecadaw to harateng ni Yihofa, cowa ko pisa'icel aca miliyas to pifiyor no tatiihay, wa minanamho tano harateng ni Yihofa a misimsim.
Mikitini toniya lalakaw mahapinangay ita, ano sapahecadaw to harateng ni Yihofa, cowa ko pisa'icel aca miliyas to pifiyor no tatiihay, wa minanamho tano harateng ni Yihofa a misimsim.
S.PHON: mikitini to~unija ɾaɾakaw maħapinaŋaj ita, ano~u sapaħəʦaɬ~ɮaw to~u ħaratəŋ ni jiħo~ufa, ʦo~uwa ko~u pisaʡiʦəɾ aʦa miɾijas to~u pifijo~ur no~u tatiiħaj, wa minanamħo~u tano~u ħaratəŋ ni jiħo~ufa a misimsim.
S.TRANSL: As mentioned earlier, to think like Jehovah, we must do more than keep our minds free from corrupting influences.

S.FORM: Mihaenay, ano todongen ita ci Yis, nganga'ay padadotoc patahekal to olah.
Mihaenay, ano todongen ita ci Yis, nganga'ay padadotoc patahekal to olah.
S.PHON: miħaənaj, ano~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋən ita ʦi jis, ŋaŋaʡaj paɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ pataħəkaɾ to~u o~uɾaħ.
S.TRANSL: Yes, if we imitate Jesus, we will always act with love.

S.FORM: Ano malitemoh iso ko cecay Misawacayay Tamdaw ni Yihofa anca cowa pidoko to Kawas a tamdaw, o maanan ko kasasiromaan hani?
Ano malitemoh iso ko cecay Misawacayay Tamdaw ni Yihofa anca cowa pidoko to Kawas a tamdaw, o maanan ko kasasiromaan hani?
S.PHON: ano~u maɾitəmo~uħ iso~u ko~u ʦəʦaj misawaʦajaj tamɬ~ɮaw ni jiħo~ufa anʦa ʦo~uwa piɬ~ɮo~uko~u to~u kawas a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u maanan ko~u kasasiro~umaan ħani?
S.TRANSL: What is unique about meeting other Witnesses?

S.FORM: Ano samisi ko kacipinang ita to pisalof ato faelohay a limasmas no likakawa i, nga'ay haratengen to samaanay ci Kristo mikayat to finawlan no Kawas isalakat.
Ano samisi ko kacipinang ita to pisalof ato faelohay a limasmas no likakawa i, nga'ay haratengen to samaanay ci Kristo mikayat to finawlan no Kawas isalakat.
S.PHON: ano~u samisi ko~u kaʦipinaŋ ita to~u pisaɾo~uf ato~u faəɾo~uħaj a ɾimasmas no~u ɾikakawa i, ŋaʡaj ħaratəŋən to~u samaanaj ʦi kristo~u mikajat to~u finawɾan no~u kawas isaɾakat.
S.TRANSL: When we do not fully understand the reasons for some organizational changes, we do well to reflect on how Christ exercised his leadership in the past.

S.FORM: Ano pakaso'linen ko mararaway a lihaf wa mikidat to pakidemay a teloc.
Ano pakaso'linen ko mararaway a lihaf wa mikidat to pakidemay a teloc.
S.PHON: ano~u pakaso~uʡɾinən ko~u mararawaj a ɾiħaf wa mikiɬ~ɮat to~u pakiɬ~ɮəmaj a təɾo~uʦ.
S.TRANSL: Believing a false report can be disastrous.
