S.FORM: Mahapinangayho ako, ano o samaanayto ko fanges no salikaka, mahecaday kitaanan, kamayan o salikaka ita cangra, o nganga'ay mikinafalah kita to 'orip saki cangraanan.
Mahapinangayho ako, ano o samaanayto ko fanges no salikaka, mahecaday kitaanan, kamayan o salikaka ita cangra, o nganga'ay mikinafalah kita to 'orip saki cangraanan.
S.PHON: maħapinaŋajħo~u ako~u, ano~u o~u samaanajto~u ko~u faŋəs no~u saɾikaka, maħəʦaɬ~ɮaj kitaanan, kamajan o~u saɾikaka ita ʦaŋra, o~u ŋaŋaʡaj mikinafaɾaħ kita to~u ʡo~urip saki ʦaŋraanan.
S.TRANSL: And I have learned that a brother is a brother regardless of skin color, and he will die for you if need be.

S.FORM: Ano padama kita to wawa anca pacekiwan midemak toniya kalimelaan a demak i, haharatengen ko cecay a demak: Ciharatengay ko tamdaw malo Krisciyang, micada to ino' nga' nga'ay.
Ano padama kita to wawa anca pacekiwan midemak toniya kalimelaan a demak i, haharatengen ko cecay a demak: Ciharatengay ko tamdaw malo Krisciyang, micada to ino' nga' nga'ay.
S.PHON: ano~u paɬ~ɮama kita to~u wawa anʦa paʦəkiwan miɬ~ɮəmak to~unija kaɾiməɾaan a ɬ~ɮəmak i, ħaħaratəŋən ko~u ʦəʦaj a ɬ~ɮəmak: ʦiħaratəŋaj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw maɾo~u krisʦijaŋ, miʦaɬ~ɮa to~u ino~uʡ ŋaʡ ŋaʡaj.
S.TRANSL: As we assist our children and other Bible students to take the essential steps, we should bear in mind that genuine discipleship includes baptism.

S.FORM: "Ano icowa ko dafong anca odo' namo i, itira ko faloco' namo."
"Ano icowa ko dafong anca odo' namo i, itira ko faloco' namo."
S.PHON: "ano~u iʦo~uwa ko~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ anʦa o~uɬ~ɮo~uʡ namo~u i, itira ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ namo~u."
S.TRANSL: "Where your treasure is, there your hearts will be also."

S.FORM: Kaemangho kako ato tatolo fafahiyan mipili'an to papafeli to hana ci Atawf Sitelean, ano mikimad cingra i, tayra pafeli to hana i cingranan.
Kaemangho kako ato tatolo fafahiyan mipili'an to papafeli to hana ci Atawf Sitelean, ano mikimad cingra i, tayra pafeli to hana i cingranan.
S.PHON: kaəmaŋħo~u kako~u ato~u tato~uɾo~u fafaħijan mipiɾiʡan to~u papafəɾi to~u ħana ʦi atawf sitəɾəan, ano~u mikimaɬ~ɮ ʦiŋra i, tajra pafəɾi to~u ħana i ʦiŋranan.
S.TRANSL: I was among four little girls chosen to present Adolf Hitler with flowers after he gave a speech one time.

S.FORM: Ano mitosil kita i, sasamaan mitodong to misapoeneray ni Pawlo hani?
Ano mitosil kita i, sasamaan mitodong to misapoeneray ni Pawlo hani?
S.PHON: ano~u mito~usiɾ kita i, sasamaan mito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u misapo~uənəraj ni pawɾo~u ħani?
S.TRANSL: When preaching, how can we imitate Paul's exemplary humility?

S.FORM: Ano pakalalok kita to tamdaw i, sasinanoten ko maanan hani?
Ano pakalalok kita to tamdaw i, sasinanoten ko maanan hani?
S.PHON: ano~u pakaɾaɾo~uk kita to~u tamɬ~ɮaw i, sasinano~utən ko~u maanan ħani?
S.TRANSL: What is essential if we want to build up others?

S.FORM: Ano caka paka'met to tireng, iraay ko maanan a teloc?
Ano caka paka'met to tireng, iraay ko maanan a teloc?
S.PHON: ano~u ʦaka pakaʡmət to~u tirəŋ, iraaj ko~u maanan a təɾo~uʦ?
S.TRANSL: What can result from a lack of self-control?

S.FORM: Ano padadotoc a mitosil itini pakidemay a saroero, papaira to manan nga'ayay a teloc?
Ano padadotoc a mitosil itini pakidemay a saroero, papaira to manan nga'ayay a teloc?
S.PHON: ano~u paɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ a mito~usiɾ itini pakiɬ~ɮəmaj a saro~uəro~u, papaira to~u manan ŋaʡajaj a təɾo~uʦ?
S.TRANSL: What positive results come from continuing to preach despite persecution?

S.FORM: Itiya, miceriday kako mitolon ato romadiw to radiw no Hongti Kitakita, miharateng ano pasalat wa misamaan a mitosil, rihadayay ko faloco' ako mihaen to demak.
Itiya, miceriday kako mitolon ato romadiw to radiw no Hongti Kitakita, miharateng ano pasalat wa misamaan a mitosil, rihadayay ko faloco' ako mihaen to demak.
S.PHON: itija, miʦəriɬ~ɮaj kako~u mito~uɾo~un ato~u ro~umaɬ~ɮiw to~u raɬ~ɮiw no~u ħo~uŋti kitakita, miħaratəŋ ano~u pasaɾat wa misamaan a mito~usiɾ, riħaɬ~ɮajaj ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ako~u miħaən to~u ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: To maintain peace of heart during that time, I constantly prayed, sang Kingdom songs, and imagined how I would preach if I were free again.

S.FORM: Ano misaaretengan iso ko pidoko ci Yihofaan a demak, ano patireng to patosokan i miharateng to pinengneng ni Yihofa, mihaen o mamasalo ko faloco'.
Ano misaaretengan iso ko pidoko ci Yihofaan a demak, ano patireng to patosokan i miharateng to pinengneng ni Yihofa, mihaen o mamasalo ko faloco'.
S.PHON: ano~u misaarətəŋan iso~u ko~u piɬ~ɮo~uko~u ʦi jiħo~ufaan a ɬ~ɮəmak, ano~u patirəŋ to~u pato~uso~ukan i miħaratəŋ to~u pinəŋnəŋ ni jiħo~ufa, miħaən o~u mamasaɾo~u ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ.
S.TRANSL: You too will enjoy a truly satisfying life if you keep service to Jehovah to the fore and set goals with him in mind.

S.FORM: Ano caho ka picada to ino'i, wa awa ko 'inorong ci Yihofaan han?
Ano caho ka picada to ino'i, wa awa ko 'inorong ci Yihofaan han?
S.PHON: ano~u ʦaħo~u ka piʦaɬ~ɮa to~u ino~uʡi, wa awa ko~u ʡino~uro~uŋ ʦi jiħo~ufaan ħan?
S.TRANSL: Does delaying baptism make one less accountable to Jehovah?

S.FORM: Oniya lalakaw wa padama kitaanan mihapinang, so'lin matongalay ko cariraw, sapalifet, ato roray no mita, ano ti'eren ita ci Yihofa wa milifok to sapalifon ato salidong no Kawas.
Oniya lalakaw wa padama kitaanan mihapinang, so'lin matongalay ko cariraw, sapalifet, ato roray no mita, ano ti'eren ita ci Yihofa wa milifok to sapalifon ato salidong no Kawas.
S.PHON: o~unija ɾaɾakaw wa paɬ~ɮama kitaanan miħapinaŋ, so~uʡɾin mato~uŋaɾaj ko~u ʦariraw, sapaɾifət, ato~u ro~uraj no~u mita, ano~u tiʡərən ita ʦi jiħo~ufa wa miɾifo~uk to~u sapaɾifo~un ato~u saɾiɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u kawas.
S.TRANSL: This article helps us to see that even if worries, trials, and pain increase, ultimately our trust in God will be rewarded with deliverance.

S.FORM: Ano caka talipa'elal kita, wa marefong i talakal, mikasimaan misaka dademak to kalimelaan a pasalat.
Ano caka talipa'elal kita, wa marefong i talakal, mikasimaan misaka dademak to kalimelaan a pasalat.
S.PHON: ano~u ʦaka taɾipaʡəɾaɾ kita, wa marəfo~uŋ i taɾakaɾ, mikasimaan misaka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak to~u kaɾiməɾaan a pasaɾat.
S.TRANSL: How easy it is to fall prey to these ploys and to misuse our freedom!

S.FORM: Mihaen to demak, ano o micadaay to sapadang anca mipadangay tamdaw, nganga'ay mala widang ni Yihofa.
Mihaen to demak, ano o micadaay to sapadang anca mipadangay tamdaw, nganga'ay mala widang ni Yihofa.
S.PHON: miħaən to~u ɬ~ɮəmak, ano~u o~u miʦaɬ~ɮaaj to~u sapaɬ~ɮaŋ anʦa mipaɬ~ɮaŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw, ŋaŋaʡaj maɾa wiɬ~ɮaŋ ni jiħo~ufa.
S.TRANSL: Thus, Jehovah's friendship is being freely extended to both the givers and the receivers.

S.FORM: Ano itira kami i Tuplin i, itiniay i loma' no fafahiyan salikaka ci Ma Rutlan milafin, pinaayto miheca midoko to Kawas a madimadiay Krisciyang cingra.
Ano itira kami i Tuplin i, itiniay i loma' no fafahiyan salikaka ci Ma Rutlan milafin, pinaayto miheca midoko to Kawas a madimadiay Krisciyang cingra.
S.PHON: ano~u itira kami i to~u~upɾin i, itiniaj i ɾo~umaʡ no~u fafaħijan saɾikaka ʦi ma ro~u~utɾan miɾafin, pinaajto~u miħəʦa miɬ~ɮo~uko~u to~u kawas a maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮiaj krisʦijaŋ ʦiŋra.
S.TRANSL: One place where pioneers could always stay in Dublin was at the home of Ma Rutland, a longtime faithful sister.

S.FORM: Ano caka olah ko matosilan i, wa samaan kita palahad to sini'adaay a faloco' hani?
Ano caka olah ko matosilan i, wa samaan kita palahad to sini'adaay a faloco' hani?
S.PHON: ano~u ʦaka o~uɾaħ ko~u mato~usiɾan i, wa samaan kita paɾaħaɬ~ɮ to~u siniʡaɬ~ɮaaj a faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ħani?
S.TRANSL: How can we cultivate compassion even when it is challenging to do so?

S.FORM: Ano ira ko pasomaday kitanan i, tanamen mikalasaka dademak ko safalod no Kolosay 3:12 to 14 a misalof to kalala'ed ita.
Ano ira ko pasomaday kitanan i, tanamen mikalasaka dademak ko safalod no Kolosay 3:12 to 14 a misalof to kalala'ed ita.
S.PHON: ano~u ira ko~u paso~umaɬ~ɮaj kitanan i, tanamən mikaɾasaka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak ko~u safaɾo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ko~uɾo~usaj *:** to~u ** a misaɾo~uf to~u kaɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮ ita.
S.TRANSL: Applying the Bible instruction just cited, Colossians 3:12-14, may be a good starting point if someone hurts you.

S.FORM: Pakayni mapasimalay Krisciyang i, ano patikol ma'orip tayra i kakarayan i, wa so'li'lin a paka'araw to Kawas cangra.
Pakayni mapasimalay Krisciyang i, ano patikol ma'orip tayra i kakarayan i, wa so'li'lin a paka'araw to Kawas cangra.
S.PHON: pakajni mapasimaɾaj krisʦijaŋ i, ano~u patiko~uɾ maʡo~urip tajra i kakarajan i, wa so~uʡɾiʡɾin a pakaʡaraw to~u kawas ʦaŋra.
S.TRANSL: Of course, resurrected anointed ones will in a literal sense see Jehovah when they receive their heavenly reward.

S.FORM: Ano patahekal kita to sini'adaay, papaira to manan a epoc?
Ano patahekal kita to sini'adaay, papaira to manan a epoc?
S.PHON: ano~u pataħəkaɾ kita to~u siniʡaɬ~ɮaaj, papaira to~u manan a əpo~uʦ?
S.TRANSL: And what good results can we obtain from doing so?

S.FORM: Kawraan, ano misa'icelayto ko wama wina a paloma to kimad i faloco' no wawa, akato tatiihen ko harateng.
Kawraan, ano misa'icelayto ko wama wina a paloma to kimad i faloco' no wawa, akato tatiihen ko harateng.
S.PHON: kawraan, ano~u misaʡiʦəɾajto~u ko~u wama wina a paɾo~uma to~u kimaɬ~ɮ i faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u wawa, akato~u tatiiħən ko~u ħaratəŋ.
S.TRANSL: Nonetheless, parents who have tried their best to impress the truth on a child's heart have a good conscience.

S.FORM: Ano mamirikec, wa samaan kita mitodong ci Yihofaan aci Yisan?
Ano mamirikec, wa samaan kita mitodong ci Yihofaan aci Yisan?
S.PHON: ano~u mamirikəʦ, wa samaan kita mito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ʦi jiħo~ufaan aʦi jisan?
S.TRANSL: When giving discipline, how can we imitate Jehovah and his Son?

S.FORM: Ano miliso' hahakowa ko halafin?
Ano miliso' hahakowa ko halafin?
S.PHON: ano~u miɾiso~uʡ ħaħako~uwa ko~u ħaɾafin?
S.TRANSL: How long should we stay?

S.FORM: O olah ita to Hongti Kitakit ano malecaday to olah nora misasingdiay to cinco, wa samaan ko demak ita?
O olah ita to Hongti Kitakit ano malecaday to olah nora misasingdiay to cinco, wa samaan ko demak ita?
S.PHON: o~u o~uɾaħ ita to~u ħo~uŋti kitakit ano~u maɾəʦaɬ~ɮaj to~u o~uɾaħ no~ura misasiŋɬ~ɮiaj to~u ʦinʦo~u, wa samaan ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak ita?
S.TRANSL: If we love God's Kingdom as much as the merchant loved the pearl, what will we do?

S.FORM: Ano cowaho patafang to tireng a micada to ino' kiso, haratengen hano kalimlaan mihaen to demak.
Ano cowaho patafang to tireng a micada to ino' kiso, haratengen hano kalimlaan mihaen to demak.
S.PHON: ano~u ʦo~uwaħo~u patafaŋ to~u tirəŋ a miʦaɬ~ɮa to~u ino~uʡ kiso~u, ħaratəŋən ħano~u kaɾimɾaan miħaən to~u ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: If you are not yet dedicated and baptized, consider the significance of taking such a step.

S.FORM: Ora kalimlaan i, ano kalasaka dademak to payci, paihekalen ko nika madimadi.
Ora kalimlaan i, ano kalasaka dademak to payci, paihekalen ko nika madimadi.
S.PHON: o~ura kaɾimɾaan i, ano~u kaɾasaka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak to~u pajʦi, paiħəkaɾən ko~u nika maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮi.
S.TRANSL: Jesus' point was that we can 'prove ourselves faithful' with, or control, those riches once we obtain them.

S.FORM: Nikawrira, ano nengnengen ita milomal ko likisi no pakayniay mihongyakay demak, o papaso'lin kita: Mitooran ni Yihofa ko saki'ok Ningra, mitafo a miterek to Kimad Ningra.
Nikawrira, ano nengnengen ita milomal ko likisi no pakayniay mihongyakay demak, o papaso'lin kita: Mitooran ni Yihofa ko saki'ok Ningra, mitafo a miterek to Kimad Ningra.
S.PHON: nikawrira, ano~u nəŋnəŋən ita miɾo~umaɾ ko~u ɾikisi no~u pakajniaj miħo~uŋjakaj ɬ~ɮəmak, o~u papaso~uʡɾin kita: mito~uo~uran ni jiħo~ufa ko~u sakiʡo~uk niŋra, mitafo~u a mitərək to~u kimaɬ~ɮ niŋra.
S.TRANSL: Nevertheless, when we review the history of these and many other translations that have been published, it gives support to this fact: Just as Jehovah promised, his Word has endured.

S.FORM: Mafana'to kiso ano sawmi.
Mafana'to kiso ano sawmi.
S.PHON: mafanaʡto~u kiso~u ano~u sawmi.
S.TRANSL: I will tell you later.

S.FORM: Ano tahacada to sakayat no likakawa no Kawas ko kasakilac kantok ato malohemay malitengay i, mamisamaan to demak cangra?
Ano tahacada to sakayat no likakawa no Kawas ko kasakilac kantok ato malohemay malitengay i, mamisamaan to demak cangra?
S.PHON: ano~u taħaʦaɬ~ɮa to~u sakajat no~u ɾikakawa no~u kawas ko~u kasakiɾaʦ kanto~uk ato~u maɾo~uħəmaj maɾitəŋaj i, mamisamaan to~u ɬ~ɮəmak ʦaŋra?
S.TRANSL: When directions come from God's organization, what attitude should brothers, such as circuit overseers and congregation elders, have?

S.FORM: Ano mipili'to cacawma'en a tamdaw i, haharatengen ita ko maanan hani?
Ano mipili'to cacawma'en a tamdaw i, haharatengen ita ko maanan hani?
S.PHON: ano~u mipiɾiʡto~u ʦaʦawmaʡən a tamɬ~ɮaw i, ħaħaratəŋən ita ko~u maanan ħani?
S.TRANSL: What can help us to determine whether an associate should be avoided?

S.FORM: Ano miti'er kita ci Yihofaan, miki'okay Cingra to sasamaan ko demak hani?
Ano miti'er kita ci Yihofaan, miki'okay Cingra to sasamaan ko demak hani?
S.PHON: ano~u mitiʡər kita ʦi jiħo~ufaan, mikiʡo~ukaj ʦiŋra to~u sasamaan ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak ħani?
S.TRANSL: What assurances does the book of Habakkuk give us?

S.FORM: Ano miming ko fodawan nora IUD i, cowa ka ci'icel sanay."
Ano miming ko fodawan nora IUD i, cowa ka ci'icel sanay."
S.PHON: ano~u mimiŋ ko~u fo~uɬ~ɮawan no~ura io~u~uɬ~ɮ i, ʦo~uwa ka ʦiʡiʦəɾ sanaj."
S.TRANSL: IUDs with less copper will be less effective."

S.FORM: Nikawrira, ano nga'ayho matadem ci Yis, halo mapatahekal to o nisawawaan ni Yis ko niyah, tatiitiih ko teloc mahemekan nanay cingra.
Nikawrira, ano nga'ayho matadem ci Yis, halo mapatahekal to o nisawawaan ni Yis ko niyah, tatiitiih ko teloc mahemekan nanay cingra.
S.PHON: nikawrira, ano~u ŋaʡajħo~u mataɬ~ɮəm ʦi jis, ħaɾo~u mapataħəkaɾ to~u o~u nisawawaan ni jis ko~u nijaħ, tatiitiiħ ko~u təɾo~uʦ maħəməkan nanaj ʦiŋra.
S.TRANSL: Yet, at this point, he was willing to accept the consequences of giving Jesus a dignified burial and of openly identifying himself as one of Christ's disciples.

S.FORM: Latekay, o sowal ato demak no salikaka pakararaway kitanan, ano kita to pakararaway cangranan.
Latekay, o sowal ato demak no salikaka pakararaway kitanan, ano kita to pakararaway cangranan.
S.PHON: ɾatəkaj, o~u so~uwaɾ ato~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u saɾikaka pakararawaj kitanan, ano~u kita to~u pakararawaj ʦaŋranan.
S.TRANSL: Accordingly, there will be times when we will be irritated by the words or actions of fellow believers, or when they will be annoyed by ours.

S.FORM: Kawraan, ano pakayniay katoled iso a sawad saan mihodop ci Yihofaan, wa kahenay mahapinang iso, edengan o salikaka i kasakopang ato Krisciyang a wama wina iso ko so'linay a maolah tisowanan.
Kawraan, ano pakayniay katoled iso a sawad saan mihodop ci Yihofaan, wa kahenay mahapinang iso, edengan o salikaka i kasakopang ato Krisciyang a wama wina iso ko so'linay a maolah tisowanan.
S.PHON: kawraan, ano~u pakajniaj kato~uɾəɬ~ɮ iso~u a sawaɬ~ɮ saan miħo~uɬ~ɮo~up ʦi jiħo~ufaan, wa kaħənaj maħapinaŋ iso~u, əɬ~ɮəŋan o~u saɾikaka i kasako~upaŋ ato~u krisʦijaŋ a wama wina iso~u ko~u so~uʡɾinaj a mao~uɾaħ tiso~uwanan.
S.TRANSL: But if you allow frustration to make you give up serving Jehovah, you would soon discover that no one else cares for you more genuinely than your God-fearing parents and your congregation.

S.FORM: Ano tahalifa cangra to pasangaray i, wa misatapang miharateng to araaw no tamdaw ma'orip, caayho ka harateng nangra konini i sa'ayaw.
Ano tahalifa cangra to pasangaray i, wa misatapang miharateng to araaw no tamdaw ma'orip, caayho ka harateng nangra konini i sa'ayaw.
S.PHON: ano~u taħaɾifa ʦaŋra to~u pasaŋaraj i, wa misatapaŋ miħaratəŋ to~u araaw no~u tamɬ~ɮaw maʡo~urip, ʦaajħo~u ka ħaratəŋ naŋra ko~unini i saʡajaw.
S.TRANSL: When such events take place, some distressed individuals may ask questions about the meaning of life that at one time they ignored.

S.FORM: Latek ano mafalic ko demak, anca irato ko faelohay fana', mamafalic ko nisa'osian.
Latek ano mafalic ko demak, anca irato ko faelohay fana', mamafalic ko nisa'osian.
S.PHON: ɾatək ano~u mafaɾiʦ ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak, anʦa irato~u ko~u faəɾo~uħaj fanaʡ, mamafaɾiʦ ko~u nisaʡo~usian.
S.TRANSL: On occasion, new circumstances or information may require our doing similarly.

S.FORM: Ano micoli to pihakelongan ita ko paro no loma' i, haharatengen ita ko manan?
Ano micoli to pihakelongan ita ko paro no loma' i, haharatengen ita ko manan?
S.PHON: ano~u miʦo~uɾi to~u piħakəɾo~uŋan ita ko~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ i, ħaħaratəŋən ita ko~u manan?
S.TRANSL: What must we remember if our relatives oppose our efforts to worship Jehovah?

S.FORM: Mansa, ano cariraw ko faloco' i, pakaynien i satolon a mifowah to rawraw no faloco'.
Mansa, ano cariraw ko faloco' i, pakaynien i satolon a mifowah to rawraw no faloco'.
S.PHON: mansa, ano~u ʦariraw ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ i, pakajniən i sato~uɾo~un a mifo~uwaħ to~u rawraw no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ.
S.TRANSL: So when we are anxious, we need to turn our worries into prayers.

S.FORM: Wa pakaso'lin kiso ano ma'araw ni Yihofa ko malifaay iso wa makahi palemed tisowanan han?
Wa pakaso'lin kiso ano ma'araw ni Yihofa ko malifaay iso wa makahi palemed tisowanan han?
S.PHON: wa pakaso~uʡɾin kiso~u ano~u maʡaraw ni jiħo~ufa ko~u maɾifaaj iso~u wa makaħi paɾəməɬ~ɮ tiso~uwanan ħan?
S.TRANSL: Are you confident that Jehovah can see your affliction and bestow a blessing?

S.FORM: Ano mahaenay i, wa samaan a mafana' kita to o maanan a demakan ko kaolahan no Kawas hani?
Ano mahaenay i, wa samaan a mafana' kita to o maanan a demakan ko kaolahan no Kawas hani?
S.PHON: ano~u maħaənaj i, wa samaan a mafanaʡ kita to~u o~u maanan a ɬ~ɮəmakan ko~u kao~uɾaħan no~u kawas ħani?
S.TRANSL: In such areas, how can we determine what is acceptable and pleasing to God?

S.FORM: "Ano caka paso'lin to Kawas, wa nga'ay kako malo nga'ayay tamdaw."
"Ano caka paso'lin to Kawas, wa nga'ay kako malo nga'ayay tamdaw."
S.PHON: "ano~u ʦaka paso~uʡɾin to~u kawas, wa ŋaʡaj kako~u maɾo~u ŋaʡajaj tamɬ~ɮaw."
S.TRANSL: "I can be a good person without believing in God."

S.FORM: Hinatalaay kako ano patikolto cingra ma'orip i, o tanoktokay ko tireng ningra a malalitemoh kami.
Hinatalaay kako ano patikolto cingra ma'orip i, o tanoktokay ko tireng ningra a malalitemoh kami.
S.PHON: ħinataɾaaj kako~u ano~u patiko~uɾto~u ʦiŋra maʡo~urip i, o~u tano~ukto~ukaj ko~u tirəŋ niŋra a maɾaɾitəmo~uħ kami.
S.TRANSL: I look forward to seeing him again in renewed health when he is resurrected.

S.FORM: Ano caka kodait kita, o mamipalak to nika lala'ed ato tao.
Ano caka kodait kita, o mamipalak to nika lala'ed ato tao.
S.PHON: ano~u ʦaka ko~uɬ~ɮait kita, o~u mamipaɾak to~u nika ɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮ ato~u tao~u.
S.TRANSL: Persistent impatience weakens the bonds of love; patience strengthens them.

S.FORM: Ano eca ka langa'ay kita to salikaka, wa samaan mifiyor to pisa'osi no mita hani?
Ano eca ka langa'ay kita to salikaka, wa samaan mifiyor to pisa'osi no mita hani?
S.PHON: ano~u əʦa ka ɾaŋaʡaj kita to~u saɾikaka, wa samaan mifijo~ur to~u pisaʡo~usi no~u mita ħani?
S.TRANSL: How might our judgment be clouded by personality conflicts?

S.FORM: Miki'okan ni Yis, ano mihaen to demak kita i, mamicada to pakaynian ni Yihofa i sapatefoc a so'linay pasalat.
Miki'okan ni Yis, ano mihaen to demak kita i, mamicada to pakaynian ni Yihofa i sapatefoc a so'linay pasalat.
S.PHON: mikiʡo~ukan ni jis, ano~u miħaən to~u ɬ~ɮəmak kita i, mamiʦaɬ~ɮa to~u pakajnian ni jiħo~ufa i sapatəfo~uʦ a so~uʡɾinaj pasaɾat.
S.TRANSL: Just as Jesus promised, we will be truly free when the benefits of his ransom sacrifice are fully applied to us.

S.FORM: Ano mi'osi kita ko nalifetan no nolitengan a sikawdan i, simsimen ita ko manan?
Ano mi'osi kita ko nalifetan no nolitengan a sikawdan i, simsimen ita ko manan?
S.PHON: ano~u miʡo~usi kita ko~u naɾifətan no~u no~uɾitəŋan a sikawɬ~ɮan i, simsimən ita ko~u manan?
S.TRANSL: What do we need to remember as we meditate on the examples of faithful men and women of old?

S.FORM: Ano micadaay to ino'ko wawa iso, ikor cisasa to so'linay kimad, wa samaan ko demak no wama wina hani?
Ano micadaay to ino'ko wawa iso, ikor cisasa to so'linay kimad, wa samaan ko demak no wama wina hani?
S.PHON: ano~u miʦaɬ~ɮaaj to~u ino~uʡko~u wawa iso~u, iko~ur ʦisasa to~u so~uʡɾinaj kimaɬ~ɮ, wa samaan ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u wama wina ħani?
S.TRANSL: What should parents consider if a child who is already baptized begins to waver in faith?

S.FORM: Ano palahad to olah, iraay ko manan a epoc hani?
Ano palahad to olah, iraay ko manan a epoc hani?
S.PHON: ano~u paɾaħaɬ~ɮ to~u o~uɾaħ, iraaj ko~u manan a əpo~uʦ ħani?
S.TRANSL: What further benefits come from cultivating love?

S.FORM: Kapah tamdaw sa harateratengen, ano caay pirikec ko wama wina tisowanan, ano mihaen so'linay a maolah ko wama wina tisowanan han?
Kapah tamdaw sa harateratengen, ano caay pirikec ko wama wina tisowanan, ano mihaen so'linay a maolah ko wama wina tisowanan han?
S.PHON: kapaħ tamɬ~ɮaw sa ħaratəratəŋən, ano~u ʦaaj pirikəʦ ko~u wama wina tiso~uwanan, ano~u miħaən so~uʡɾinaj a mao~uɾaħ ko~u wama wina tiso~uwanan ħan?
S.TRANSL: If your parents never corrected you, would you not wonder if they really cared about you?

S.FORM: Ano palalinien to nolitengan a Israil, iraay ko wacay ita to mamilifok to sida'it ni Yihofa.
Ano palalinien to nolitengan a Israil, iraay ko wacay ita to mamilifok to sida'it ni Yihofa.
S.PHON: ano~u paɾaɾiniən to~u no~uɾitəŋan a israiɾ, iraaj ko~u waʦaj ita to~u mamiɾifo~uk to~u siɬ~ɮaʡit ni jiħo~ufa.
S.TRANSL: In fact, we have even greater reason than the Israelites had for confidence in Jehovah's mercy.

S.FORM: Ano itiniho kita toniya lekakawa a ma'orip, o pisacecay a maolah ci Yihofaan wa tahacada to sapalifet alatek.
Ano itiniho kita toniya lekakawa a ma'orip, o pisacecay a maolah ci Yihofaan wa tahacada to sapalifet alatek.
S.PHON: ano~u itiniħo~u kita to~unija ɾəkakawa a maʡo~urip, o~u pisaʦəʦaj a mao~uɾaħ ʦi jiħo~ufaan wa taħaʦaɬ~ɮa to~u sapaɾifət aɾatək.
S.TRANSL: As long as we live "amid this present system of things," we will face situations that will put our exclusive devotion to Jehovah to the test.

S.FORM: Ano papifiyoren ita koniya hekal to harateng no niyah, wa samaan ko teloc hani?
Ano papifiyoren ita koniya hekal to harateng no niyah, wa samaan ko teloc hani?
S.PHON: ano~u papifijo~urən ita ko~unija ħəkaɾ to~u ħaratəŋ no~u nijaħ, wa samaan ko~u təɾo~uʦ ħani?
S.TRANSL: What will happen if we let the world mold our thinking?

S.FORM: Ano salofen ni Kain ko harateng, wa miliyaw ci Yihofa micada cingranan.
Ano salofen ni Kain ko harateng, wa miliyaw ci Yihofa micada cingranan.
S.PHON: ano~u saɾo~ufən ni kain ko~u ħaratəŋ, wa miɾijaw ʦi jiħo~ufa miʦaɬ~ɮa ʦiŋranan.
S.TRANSL: If only Cain would correct his thinking, Jehovah would restore him to favor.

S.FORM: Ano timolo kita midoko ci Yihofaan, o papakaso'lin to papadotoc a palemed kitanan.
Ano timolo kita midoko ci Yihofaan, o papakaso'lin to papadotoc a palemed kitanan.
S.PHON: ano~u timo~uɾo~u kita miɬ~ɮo~uko~u ʦi jiħo~ufaan, o~u papakaso~uʡɾin to~u papaɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ a paɾəməɬ~ɮ kitanan.
S.TRANSL: When we show courage in our worship of Jehovah, we can be confident of his blessing now and in the future.

S.FORM: Ano pakalowid kako to sakayhid i, tada mahemekay ko harateng!"
Ano pakalowid kako to sakayhid i, tada mahemekay ko harateng!"
S.PHON: ano~u pakaɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ kako~u to~u sakajħiɬ~ɮ i, taɬ~ɮa maħəməkaj ko~u ħaratəŋ!"
S.TRANSL: When I win a struggle, I feel better about myself."

S.FORM: Kita ato salikaka sahetoay cowa ko malefotay, ano malacafay iraay ko cowa kahecadan a harateng.
Kita ato salikaka sahetoay cowa ko malefotay, ano malacafay iraay ko cowa kahecadan a harateng.
S.PHON: kita ato~u saɾikaka saħəto~uaj ʦo~uwa ko~u maɾəfo~utaj, ano~u maɾaʦafaj iraaj ko~u ʦo~uwa kaħəʦaɬ~ɮan a ħaratəŋ.
S.TRANSL: Differences between individuals occur because we are all imperfect.

S.FORM: Ano sapicadaaw ko wawa to ino', papadamaen no wama wina cangra misongila'a miharateng, o maanan ko 'inorong no Krisciyang, samanay ko pinengneng no wawa toniya 'inorong.
Ano sapicadaaw ko wawa to ino', papadamaen no wama wina cangra misongila'a miharateng, o maanan ko 'inorong no Krisciyang, samanay ko pinengneng no wawa toniya 'inorong.
S.PHON: ano~u sapiʦaɬ~ɮaaw ko~u wawa to~u ino~uʡ, papaɬ~ɮamaən no~u wama wina ʦaŋra miso~uŋiɾaʡa miħaratəŋ, o~u maanan ko~u ʡino~uro~uŋ no~u krisʦijaŋ, samanaj ko~u pinəŋnəŋ no~u wawa to~unija ʡino~uro~uŋ.
S.TRANSL: A child who expresses interest in getting baptized should be helped to reason on yet another matter, how he or she feels about the responsibilities that come with being a Christian.

S.FORM: Ano nengnengen, ora nisowalan ni Yis "tonini" hananay, o mifotingay a tayal.
Ano nengnengen, ora nisowalan ni Yis "tonini" hananay, o mifotingay a tayal.
S.PHON: ano~u nəŋnəŋən, o~ura niso~uwaɾan ni jis "to~unini" ħananaj, o~u mifo~utiŋaj a tajaɾ.
S.TRANSL: It seems that Jesus was referring to the fish lying nearby and or the fishing business.

S.FORM: Ano cecay ko hana maedengto, nimaan adihay ko hana hani.
Ano cecay ko hana maedengto, nimaan adihay ko hana hani.
S.PHON: ano~u ʦəʦaj ko~u ħana maəɬ~ɮəŋto~u, nimaan aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u ħana ħani.
S.TRANSL: Had one been sufficient there would have been no more.

S.FORM: Ano hasapi laheciaw ci Solomon toni 'inorong i, timolo a misafa'ina'inayan cingra nga', misatapang a midemak.
Ano hasapi laheciaw ci Solomon toni 'inorong i, timolo a misafa'ina'inayan cingra nga', misatapang a midemak.
S.PHON: ano~u ħasapi ɾaħəʦiaw ʦi so~uɾo~umo~un to~uni ʡino~uro~uŋ i, timo~uɾo~u a misafaʡinaʡinajan ʦiŋra ŋaʡ, misatapaŋ a miɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: To succeed, Solomon would need to be courageous and go to work.

S.FORM: Ano samanayto ko kadoka' no faloco' i salakat, cowato ko mamaharateng ko hatiraay a roray.
Ano samanayto ko kadoka' no faloco' i salakat, cowato ko mamaharateng ko hatiraay a roray.
S.PHON: ano~u samanajto~u ko~u kaɬ~ɮo~ukaʡ no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ i saɾakat, ʦo~uwato~u ko~u mamaħaratəŋ ko~u ħatiraaj a ro~uraj.
S.TRANSL: We are assured that "the former things will not be called to mind, nor will they come up into the heart."

S.FORM: Ano tahalifaay to pasangar i, sasamaanen nangra padadotoc tora 'inorong hani?
Ano tahalifaay to pasangar i, sasamaanen nangra padadotoc tora 'inorong hani?
S.PHON: ano~u taħaɾifaaj to~u pasaŋar i, sasamaanən naŋra paɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~ura ʡino~uro~uŋ ħani?
S.TRANSL: What gave the couple the strength to stay in their assignment when problems arose?

S.FORM: Ano caka lecad ko pihakelongan no mararamoday, sasamaan pasifana' to wawa, nengnengen ko "Salicay No Mi'osiay Tamdaw" i Mikecolay 2002.8.15.
Ano caka lecad ko pihakelongan no mararamoday, sasamaan pasifana' to wawa, nengnengen ko "Salicay No Mi'osiay Tamdaw" i Mikecolay 2002.8.15.
S.PHON: ano~u ʦaka ɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u piħakəɾo~uŋan no~u mararamo~uɬ~ɮaj, sasamaan pasifanaʡ to~u wawa, nəŋnəŋən ko~u "saɾiʦaj no~u miʡo~usiaj tamɬ~ɮaw" i mikəʦo~uɾaj ****.*.**.
S.TRANSL: For more information on training children in a religiously divided household, see "Questions From Readers" in The Watchtower, August 15, 2002.

S.FORM: Ano caka miako'id ko tamdaw to hinapalada' no mita, wa padotoc kita makahi a palada' han? Tadtaden hena.
Ano caka miako'id ko tamdaw to hinapalada' no mita, wa padotoc kita makahi a palada' han? Tadtaden hena.
S.PHON: ano~u ʦaka miako~uʡiɬ~ɮ ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~u ħinapaɾaɬ~ɮaʡ no~u mita, wa paɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ kita makaħi a paɾaɬ~ɮaʡ ħan? taɬ~ɮtaɬ~ɮən ħəna.
S.TRANSL: How do many people react to generosity, and should their reaction affect the way we act?

S.FORM: Ano mifalahan mipatayan no tamdaw ci Yis, wa misamaan a malo 'ta'enengan a fakeloh no loma'' cingra hani?
Ano mifalahan mipatayan no tamdaw ci Yis, wa misamaan a malo 'ta'enengan a fakeloh no loma'' cingra hani?
S.PHON: ano~u mifaɾaħan mipatajan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi jis, wa misamaan a maɾo~u ʡtaʡənəŋan a fakəɾo~uħ no~u ɾo~umaʡʡ ʦiŋra ħani?
S.TRANSL: If Jesus was rejected and killed, how could he become "the chief cornerstone"?

S.FORM: Paihkalay ko ca'of ni Yis, ano sapakahemekaw to Kawas i, matiyaen oya Samariya tamdaw makahi a hinapalada'.
Paihkalay ko ca'of ni Yis, ano sapakahemekaw to Kawas i, matiyaen oya Samariya tamdaw makahi a hinapalada'.
S.PHON: paiħkaɾaj ko~u ʦaʡo~uf ni jis, ano~u sapakaħəməkaw to~u kawas i, matijaən o~uja samarija tamɬ~ɮaw makaħi a ħinapaɾaɬ~ɮaʡ.
S.TRANSL: Jesus' answer shows that like the Samaritan we must be willing to give generously if we are to enjoy God's favor.

S.FORM: Ano minokay cangra matayal mietan to payci, anca miliso' to salawina i, pafelien ko pilafinan nangra.
Ano minokay cangra matayal mietan to payci, anca miliso' to salawina i, pafelien ko pilafinan nangra.
S.PHON: ano~u mino~ukaj ʦaŋra matajaɾ miətan to~u pajʦi, anʦa miɾiso~uʡ to~u saɾawina i, pafəɾiən ko~u piɾafinan naŋra.
S.TRANSL: Could you provide them with accommodations when they return to their country of origin to work or to visit?

S.FORM: Nikawrira, ano mahapinang no kaemangay ko olah no wama wina i, so'lin sato pasangaren cangra, wa makahien a mitoor to sowal no wama wina.
Nikawrira, ano mahapinang no kaemangay ko olah no wama wina i, so'lin sato pasangaren cangra, wa makahien a mitoor to sowal no wama wina.
S.PHON: nikawrira, ano~u maħapinaŋ no~u kaəmaŋaj ko~u o~uɾaħ no~u wama wina i, so~uʡɾin sato~u pasaŋarən ʦaŋra, wa makaħiən a mito~uo~ur to~u so~uwaɾ no~u wama wina.
S.TRANSL: On the other hand, when a youngster senses his parents' genuine love, he is moved to please them even when he is tempted to disobey.

S.FORM: Ano tangongolay ko olah ita ci Yihofaan, wa tangongol ko olah to salikaka, misarocod to 'icel no niyah, padama cangranan i no'adingoan ato no faloco'an a patanektek cangranan.
Ano tangongolay ko olah ita ci Yihofaan, wa tangongol ko olah to salikaka, misarocod to 'icel no niyah, padama cangranan i no'adingoan ato no faloco'an a patanektek cangranan.
S.PHON: ano~u taŋo~uŋo~uɾaj ko~u o~uɾaħ ita ʦi jiħo~ufaan, wa taŋo~uŋo~uɾ ko~u o~uɾaħ to~u saɾikaka, misaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ʡiʦəɾ no~u nijaħ, paɬ~ɮama ʦaŋranan i no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan ato~u no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡan a patanəktək ʦaŋranan.
S.TRANSL: Individually, we can reciprocate his love by loving and building up our spiritual brothers and sisters not only spiritually but also emotionally.

S.FORM: Micerid a mi'osi to Fangcalay Cudad
Micerid a mi'osi to Fangcalay Cudad
S.PHON: miʦəriɬ~ɮ a miʡo~usi to~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ
S.TRANSL: Read it regularly

S.FORM: Palo kafana'an ita a sowal mahongyak ko Fangcalay Cudad, o mamisamaan patahekal ko niyah to misalimelaay to Fangcalay Cudad?
Palo kafana'an ita a sowal mahongyak ko Fangcalay Cudad, o mamisamaan patahekal ko niyah to misalimelaay to Fangcalay Cudad?
S.PHON: paɾo~u kafanaʡan ita a so~uwaɾ maħo~uŋjak ko~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, o~u mamisamaan pataħəkaɾ ko~u nijaħ to~u misaɾiməɾaaj to~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ?
S.TRANSL: And how can we show our appreciation for having access to God's Word in a language we can understand?

S.FORM: Sowal no kaka: "'Acaan ako koniya cudad, limaay a tangloy."
Sowal no kaka: "'Acaan ako koniya cudad, limaay a tangloy."
S.PHON: so~uwaɾ no~u kaka: "ʡaʦaan ako~u ko~unija ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, ɾimaaj a taŋɾo~uj."
S.TRANSL: "I bought that one," he said, "because it only cost five cents."

S.FORM: Isaka 1520 lalintadan, ci Lefifor mihongyakan ko Fangcalay Cudad malo sowal no Frans.
Isaka 1520 lalintadan, ci Lefifor mihongyakan ko Fangcalay Cudad malo sowal no Frans.
S.PHON: isaka **** ɾaɾintaɬ~ɮan, ʦi ɾəfifo~ur miħo~uŋjakan ko~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ maɾo~u so~uwaɾ no~u frans.
S.TRANSL: During the 1520's, Lefèvre translated the Bible into French to make it available to the common people.

S.FORM: Maharatengayho ako pafelian no fofo kako tono Takalok sowal a cudad, ato Fangcalay Cudad.
Maharatengayho ako pafelian no fofo kako tono Takalok sowal a cudad, ato Fangcalay Cudad.
S.PHON: maħaratəŋajħo~u ako~u pafəɾian no~u fo~ufo~u kako~u to~uno~u takaɾo~uk so~uwaɾ a ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, ato~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: I remember that he showed me the booklets Protection, Safety, and Uncovered in the Tagalog language,* as well as a Bible.

S.FORM: Kawraan, malo no'adingoan a tamdaw i salakatho cipinang to samanay ko pinengneng no Fangcalay Cudad to no'adingoan a tamdaw.
Kawraan, malo no'adingoan a tamdaw i salakatho cipinang to samanay ko pinengneng no Fangcalay Cudad to no'adingoan a tamdaw.
S.PHON: kawraan, maɾo~u no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan a tamɬ~ɮaw i saɾakatħo~u ʦipinaŋ to~u samanaj ko~u pinəŋnəŋ no~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ to~u no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan a tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: However, before we answer that, we need to understand clearly what the Bible says about spiritual, or spiritually-minded, people.

S.FORM: Itini i mitepangan a cudad ita, o coka ni Pawlo, cowa ko mikitiniay i materekay a coka no likisi a micokaay.
Itini i mitepangan a cudad ita, o coka ni Pawlo, cowa ko mikitiniay i materekay a coka no likisi a micokaay.
S.PHON: itini i mitəpaŋan a ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ ita, o~u ʦo~uka ni pawɾo~u, ʦo~uwa ko~u mikitiniaj i matərəkaj a ʦo~uka no~u ɾikisi a miʦo~ukaaj.
S.TRANSL: The drawings and paintings in our publications are artistic representations, not images based on proven archaeological facts.

S.FORM: Misafelitay to Fangcalay Cudad a nanaman ato demak.
Misafelitay to Fangcalay Cudad a nanaman ato demak.
S.PHON: misafəɾitaj to~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ a nanaman ato~u ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: Unscriptural customs and practices.

S.FORM: Anini, 'alomanay tahapadesay tamdaw nga'ayay pakayni i pitolon, misimsim to matiliday i Fangcalay Cudad ato micawma' to tamdaw ni Yihofa a milifok to sapahinom.
Anini, 'alomanay tahapadesay tamdaw nga'ayay pakayni i pitolon, misimsim to matiliday i Fangcalay Cudad ato micawma' to tamdaw ni Yihofa a milifok to sapahinom.
S.PHON: anini, ʡaɾo~umanaj taħapaɬ~ɮəsaj tamɬ~ɮaw ŋaʡajaj pakajni i pito~uɾo~un, misimsim to~u matiɾiɬ~ɮaj i faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ ato~u miʦawmaʡ to~u tamɬ~ɮaw ni jiħo~ufa a miɾifo~uk to~u sapaħino~um.
S.TRANSL: Prayer, meditation on examples found in the Bible, and close association with Jehovah's people are helping millions right now to gain comfort in all their trials.

S.FORM: Tano matatodongay pakayraan a pa'araw to sinael, padama to tamdaw a misakareteng to Fangcalay Cudad
Tano matatodongay pakayraan a pa'araw to sinael, padama to tamdaw a misakareteng to Fangcalay Cudad
S.PHON: tano~u matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj pakajraan a paʡaraw to~u sinaəɾ, paɬ~ɮama to~u tamɬ~ɮaw a misakarətəŋ to~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ
S.TRANSL: Introduce texts in a way that increases respect for God's Word

S.FORM: Mata'lif ko pina miheca, tahidangan ni Kolaham ko cecay kanga'ayan ningra a malohemay malitengay malalengo cingranan to Fangcalay Cudad.
Mata'lif ko pina miheca, tahidangan ni Kolaham ko cecay kanga'ayan ningra a malohemay malitengay malalengo cingranan to Fangcalay Cudad.
S.PHON: mataʡɾif ko~u pina miħəʦa, taħiɬ~ɮaŋan ni ko~uɾaħam ko~u ʦəʦaj kaŋaʡajan niŋra a maɾo~uħəmaj maɾitəŋaj maɾaɾəŋo~u ʦiŋranan to~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: Some years later, he asked an elder who had befriended him to study the Bible with him.

S.FORM: Matira o sapali'ayaw no Fangcalay Cudad, ci Yihofa naitiniay i 'kasakitakit, kasangasaw, kasafinacadan' palisopsop to 'alomanay a tamdaw, o "masasi romaromaay ko sowal nangra," mala o "ci'icelay a kitakit", mata'lifayto ko 800 a 'ofad ko ka'aloman nangra.

Matira o sapali'ayaw no Fangcalay Cudad, ci Yihofa naitiniay i 'kasakitakit, kasangasaw, kasafinacadan' palisopsop to 'alomanay a tamdaw, o "masasi romaromaay ko sowal nangra," mala o "ci'icelay a kitakit", mata'lifayto ko 800 a 'ofad ko ka'aloman nangra.
S.PHON: matira o~u sapaɾiʡajaw no~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, ʦi jiħo~ufa naitiniaj i ʡkasakitakit, kasaŋasaw, kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮanʡ paɾiso~upso~up to~u ʡaɾo~umanaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u "masasi ro~umaro~umaaj ko~u so~uwaɾ naŋra," maɾa o~u "ʦiʡiʦəɾaj a kitakit", mataʡɾifajto~u ko~u *** a ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman naŋra.
S.TRANSL: As the Bible foretold, Jehovah is gathering "a great crowd... out of all nations and tribes and peoples and tongues."

S.FORM: O maanan a lalangian ko mihaian no Fangcalay Cudad a malalikong? O roma Krisciyang hano misa'osi caka malalikong?
O maanan a lalangian ko mihaian no Fangcalay Cudad a malalikong? O roma Krisciyang hano misa'osi caka malalikong?
S.PHON: o~u maanan a ɾaɾaŋian ko~u miħaian no~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ a maɾaɾiko~uŋ? o~u ro~uma krisʦijaŋ ħano~u misaʡo~usi ʦaka maɾaɾiko~uŋ?
S.TRANSL: What is the only Scriptural basis for divorce, but why might some decide not to divorce?

S.FORM: Samaanay pasowal ko Fangcalay Cudad to sarikec hani?
Samaanay pasowal ko Fangcalay Cudad to sarikec hani?
S.PHON: samaanaj paso~uwaɾ ko~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ to~u sarikəʦ ħani?
S.TRANSL: How is discipline often presented in the Bible?

S.FORM: Ci Mariko sapi ''acaaw to toki' minanam to Fangcalay Cudad, cowato pirienang to kalo a cawma'.
Ci Mariko sapi ''acaaw to toki' minanam to Fangcalay Cudad, cowato pirienang to kalo a cawma'.
S.PHON: ʦi mariko~u sapi ʡʡaʦaaw to~u to~ukiʡ minanam to~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, ʦo~uwato~u piriənaŋ to~u kaɾo~u a ʦawmaʡ.
S.TRANSL: She also stopped spending time on some social activities in order to buy out time to learn the truth.

S.TRANSL: Yet, the inspired Scriptures also foretold that in our day, a misdirected kind of love characterized by selfishness would be shown by people who are alienated from God.

S.PHON: ʡaɾo~umanaj a mikiɾimaj to~u so~uʡɾinaj kimaɬ~ɮ ato~u so~uʡɾinaj ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ a tamɬ~ɮaw, mao~uɾaħaj to~u so~uʡɾinaj kimaɬ~ɮ iɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: Honesthearted readers reacted positively to the Bible truths it contained.

S.FORM: Ano caka hakowa ko kafana'an a tilid anca awaay ko nowina sowal ningra a mitepangan cudad, wa samaan kiso pasifana' cingranan to so'linay kimad hani?
Ano caka hakowa ko kafana'an a tilid anca awaay ko nowina sowal ningra a mitepangan cudad, wa samaan kiso pasifana' cingranan to so'linay kimad hani?
S.PHON: ano~u ʦaka ħako~uwa ko~u kafanaʡan a tiɾiɬ~ɮ anʦa awaaj ko~u no~uwina so~uwaɾ niŋra a mitəpaŋan ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, wa samaan kiso~u pasifanaʡ ʦiŋranan to~u so~uʡɾinaj kimaɬ~ɮ ħani?
S.TRANSL: How can you teach the truth to someone who has limited reading ability or who has no literature in his language?

S.FORM: I ka'ayaw a lalakaw, malengoay ita ci Kain, Solomon ato iti:yaay Israil tamdaw i Fangcalay Cudad.
I ka'ayaw a lalakaw, malengoay ita ci Kain, Solomon ato iti:yaay Israil tamdaw i Fangcalay Cudad.
S.PHON: i kaʡajaw a ɾaɾakaw, maɾəŋo~uaj ita ʦi kain, so~uɾo~umo~un ato~u iti:jaaj israiɾ tamɬ~ɮaw i faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: The preceding article considered the Bible accounts of Cain, Solomon, and the Israelites.

S.FORM: Ikorto mafana' kako, 'ayaw no mapatay ko wama, na kalacafayay to Misawcayay Tamdaw ni Yihofa a minanam to Fangcalay Cudad.
Ikorto mafana' kako, 'ayaw no mapatay ko wama, na kalacafayay to Misawcayay Tamdaw ni Yihofa a minanam to Fangcalay Cudad.

S.TRANSL: Later I learned that before my father died, he too studied with Jehovah's Witnesses.

S.FORM: Salikoray a masowal no Fangcalay Cudad ci Yosif i, 12 ko mihecaan ni Yis itiya.
Salikoray a masowal no Fangcalay Cudad ci Yosif i, 12 ko mihecaan ni Yis itiya.

S.TRANSL: The last mention of Joseph was when Jesus was 12 years old.

S.FORM: Patahekalay ci Solomon to ta'angayay timolo, itini sapadama ni Yihofa, pitoay ira ko kalitosa miheca milaheci a patireng to tadamaanay a fangcalay sefi.
Patahekalay ci Solomon to ta'angayay timolo, itini sapadama ni Yihofa, pitoay ira ko kalitosa miheca milaheci a patireng to tadamaanay a fangcalay sefi.
S.PHON: pataħəkaɾaj ʦi so~uɾo~umo~un to~u taʡaŋajaj timo~uɾo~u, itini sapaɬ~ɮama ni jiħo~ufa, pito~uaj ira ko~u kaɾito~usa miħəʦa miɾaħəʦi a patirəŋ to~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj a faŋʦaɾaj səfi.
S.TRANSL: He showed great courage, went to work, and with Jehovah's help completed the magnificent temple in seven and a half years.

S.FORM: Hano hamaan matalaw misata'angay to ngiha' a romadiw to fangcalay radiw hani?
Hano hamaan matalaw misata'angay to ngiha' a romadiw to fangcalay radiw hani?

S.FORM: O fangcalay demak Iso.
O fangcalay demak Iso.

S.FORM: Tadi'ecen ko fangcalay saocor ni Yihofa.

S.FORM: O harateng no salikaka sapipasifana'aw to tao na saan, 'arawhan mifekaday to saka lacongisaw i wangcan, telocto, pakangodoay to fangcalay ngangan ni Yihofa.
O harateng no salikaka sapipasifana'aw to tao na saan, 'arawhan mifekaday to saka lacongisaw i wangcan, telocto, pakangodoay to fangcalay ngangan ni Yihofa.

S.FORM: Wa ira ko timolo ni Solomon, mitamorong toni misanga'ay to fangcalay sefi a demakan han?

Anini, 'alomanay madimadiay Krisciyang cowa ka mapasimal no fangcalay saocor, cowa ko mamatahidang cangra tayra kakarayan malacafay ci Kristoan mala hongti.

Kawra mafalicay cangra mikitini i Sowal no Kawas ato sapadama no fangcalay saocor, tahacada to 'icel a masongila' a mafalic.

S.TRANSL: The quality of kindness will be considered in a future article in this series on the fruitage of God's holy spirit.

Toha sapadamaaw kitanan misaday to faloco' a romadiw to fangcalay radiw, 'ayaw no mamisatapang ko taykay, paradiway to 10 a ehon.

S.TRANSL: In contrast, people who love God produce a much different kind of fruitage.

Oni masarayrayay lalakaw, o mamilengo to kahacecay a heci no fangcalay saocor, siwaay, toni lalakaw sasomowal to saka cecay a heci.

S.TRANSL: The second article considers several qualities that are part of the new personality and explains how we can demonstrate these in our life and ministry.

S.FORM: Liyawen minengneng ko Hipray 12:16: "Latek malama'odangay ano eca i, malamitodongay ci Isawan," caay ka ngodo to fangcalay demak no Kawas, "falic han ni Isaw to cecay a kaen ko todong no sapirocok ningra a fisac a ngangan."

Mitooray to 'anof no tireng o mamapatay, mitooray to fangcalay saocor iraay ko rihaday.

S.TRANSL: The former leads to death, the latter to life and peace.

O mitiliday to 'Olic ci Tafiti, kinapinaay mikitini fangcalay saocor no Kawas milifok to 'icel.

Halafinay mihadidi ci Yihofa, pakaynian i fangcalay saocor padama takowanan, mica'edong to faelohay pinangan."
