S.PHON: pafaŋʦaɾən ŋaŋan no~u kawas,
S.TRANSL: Let's share in its sanctification,

S.FORM: Isa'ayaway a mirenec ko Kawas to manan a saali ita?
Isa'ayaway a mirenec ko Kawas to manan a saali ita?
S.PHON: isaʡajawaj a mirənəʦ ko~u kawas to~u manan a saaɾi ita?
S.TRANSL: What comes first when Jehovah extends help to us?

S.FORM: Nga'ayay pakayni i pakiyaho midama to tayal no likakawa no Kawas, samaanay ko harateng iso?
Nga'ayay pakayni i pakiyaho midama to tayal no likakawa no Kawas, samaanay ko harateng iso?
S.PHON: ŋaʡajaj pakajni i pakijaħo~u miɬ~ɮama to~u tajaɾ no~u ɾikakawa no~u kawas, samaanaj ko~u ħaratəŋ iso~u?
S.TRANSL: How do you feel about the privilege you have to support the Kingdom work?

S.FORM: Ci Yona midemakay to sapatorod no Kawas a demak, kawra mafalicay ko pakayraan hato matoleday cingra, mihaenay ko sowal ni Yona: "Yihofaaw, nanay patayen kako imatini.
Ci Yona midemakay to sapatorod no Kawas a demak, kawra mafalicay ko pakayraan hato matoleday cingra, mihaenay ko sowal ni Yona: "Yihofaaw, nanay patayen kako imatini.
S.PHON: ʦi jo~una miɬ~ɮəmakaj to~u sapato~uro~uɬ~ɮ no~u kawas a ɬ~ɮəmak, kawra mafaɾiʦaj ko~u pakajraan ħato~u mato~uɾəɬ~ɮaj ʦiŋra, miħaənaj ko~u so~uwaɾ ni jo~una: "jiħo~ufaaw, nanaj patajən kako~u imatini.
S.TRANSL: Jonah was so disappointed with the way things had turned out in his assignment that he said: "Now, O Jehovah, please take away my life, for it is better for me to die than to live."

S.FORM: Pasowalan no Kawas ci Mosi edengan palimo'ot to fakeloh, kawra seti'an ni Mosi ko fakeloh.
Pasowalan no Kawas ci Mosi edengan palimo'ot to fakeloh, kawra seti'an ni Mosi ko fakeloh.
S.PHON: paso~uwaɾan no~u kawas ʦi mo~usi əɬ~ɮəŋan paɾimo~uʡo~ut to~u fakəɾo~uħ, kawra sətiʡan ni mo~usi ko~u fakəɾo~uħ.
S.TRANSL: God told Moses to speak to the crag. Instead, Moses struck the crag.

S.FORM: O saki'ok no Kawas ci Aprahaman, samaanay paihkal to wa ira ko Lakoing i sera no ikor?
O saki'ok no Kawas ci Aprahaman, samaanay paihkal to wa ira ko Lakoing i sera no ikor?
S.PHON: o~u sakiʡo~uk no~u kawas ʦi apraħaman, samaanaj paiħkaɾ to~u wa ira ko~u ɾako~uiŋ i səra no~u iko~ur?
S.TRANSL: How did God's dealings with Abraham suggest a future paradise?

S.FORM: Patenak ngangan no Kawas.
Patenak ngangan no Kawas.
S.PHON: patənak ŋaŋan no~u kawas.
S.TRANSL: Give witness to God's holy name.

S.FORM: Makaniway a kawas,
Makaniway a kawas,
S.PHON: makaniwaj a kawas,
S.TRANSL: Other gods just cannot see

S.FORM: Papikeriden ko Kimad no Kawas.
Papikeriden ko Kimad no Kawas.
S.PHON: papikəriɬ~ɮən ko~u kimaɬ~ɮ no~u kawas.
S.TRANSL: Let God's Word guide you.

S.FORM: Cowa ka nga'ay kita minanam to micoliay to harateng no Kawas a sasowalen.
Cowa ka nga'ay kita minanam to micoliay to harateng no Kawas a sasowalen.
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa ka ŋaʡaj kita minanam to~u miʦo~uɾiaj to~u ħaratəŋ no~u kawas a saso~uwaɾən.
S.TRANSL: We must stop taking into our minds ideas or viewpoints that are in opposition to God's.

S.FORM: Misapoener ko faloco'misalof to waywayan no niyah wa milifok to sapalemed no Kawas
Misapoener ko faloco'misalof to waywayan no niyah wa milifok to sapalemed no Kawas
S.PHON: misapo~uənər ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡmisaɾo~uf to~u wajwajan no~u nijaħ wa miɾifo~uk to~u sapaɾəməɬ~ɮ no~u kawas
S.TRANSL: Humbly adjusting our attitude leads to God's blessing

S.FORM: Misamaanay hano kaliki a sawaden no Israil tamdaw ko sapatorod no Kawas a demak hani?
Misamaanay hano kaliki a sawaden no Israil tamdaw ko sapatorod no Kawas a demak hani?
S.PHON: misamaanaj ħano~u kaɾiki a sawaɬ~ɮən no~u israiɾ tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u sapato~uro~uɬ~ɮ no~u kawas a ɬ~ɮəmak ħani?
S.TRANSL: How could the Jews have abandoned their divinely appointed task so quickly?

S.FORM: Nanay o pakayraan ita ma'orip paihekalay to so'linay ko niyah mikapot to Kawas.
Nanay o pakayraan ita ma'orip paihekalay to so'linay ko niyah mikapot to Kawas.
S.PHON: nanaj o~u pakajraan ita maʡo~urip paiħəkaɾaj to~u so~uʡɾinaj ko~u nijaħ mikapo~ut to~u kawas.
S.TRANSL: May your answers show that you too 'walk with the true God.'

S.FORM: Haratengen ko limo'ot no Kawas ci Aprahaman, pakayni nano demak ningra ci Isakan.
Haratengen ko limo'ot no Kawas ci Aprahaman, pakayni nano demak ningra ci Isakan.
S.PHON: ħaratəŋən ko~u ɾimo~uʡo~ut no~u kawas ʦi apraħaman, pakajni nano~u ɬ~ɮəmak niŋra ʦi isakan.
S.TRANSL: Think of what God told Abraham to do with Isaac, the long-awaited heir.

S.FORM: O pa'oripay ci Yis ato sakakaay a saysi, samaanay pa'icel to nika pakaso'lin ita to sida'it no Kawas?
O pa'oripay ci Yis ato sakakaay a saysi, samaanay pa'icel to nika pakaso'lin ita to sida'it no Kawas?
S.PHON: o~u paʡo~uripaj ʦi jis ato~u sakakaaj a sajsi, samaanaj paʡiʦəɾ to~u nika pakaso~uʡɾin ita to~u siɬ~ɮaʡit no~u kawas?
S.TRANSL: How can Jesus' role as Ransomer and High Priest strengthen your confidence in God's mercy?

S.FORM: Limo'ot no Kawas,
Limo'ot no Kawas,
S.PHON: ɾimo~uʡo~ut no~u kawas,
S.TRANSL: A model Jesus gave;

S.FORM: Hano mafana' kita to so'linay ci Yopu mafana' to Kawas hani?
Hano mafana' kita to so'linay ci Yopu mafana' to Kawas hani?
S.PHON: ħano~u mafanaʡ kita to~u so~uʡɾinaj ʦi jo~upo~u~u mafanaʡ to~u kawas ħani?
S.TRANSL: In what ways did Job show that he truly knew Jehovah?

S.FORM: Samaanay ci Yopu mafana' to Kawas?
Samaanay ci Yopu mafana' to Kawas?
S.PHON: samaanaj ʦi jo~upo~u~u mafanaʡ to~u kawas?
S.TRANSL: How Job came to know Jehovah.

S.FORM: Wa nga'ay kita misamaan micowat to kalacecay no finawlan no Kawas?
Wa nga'ay kita misamaan micowat to kalacecay no finawlan no Kawas?
S.PHON: wa ŋaʡaj kita misamaan miʦo~uwat to~u kaɾaʦəʦaj no~u finawɾan no~u kawas?
S.TRANSL: How can we promote unity among God's people?

S.FORM: Yihofa a Kawas, 'Icel ita,
Yihofa a Kawas, 'Icel ita,
S.PHON: jiħo~ufa a kawas, ʡiʦəɾ ita,
S.TRANSL: Gracious Jehovah, our strength and our might,

S.FORM: Cowa pacomoden no Kawas ci Mosi i Miki'okan a Pala, mikitini o mamananam ita ko maanan?
Cowa pacomoden no Kawas ci Mosi i Miki'okan a Pala, mikitini o mamananam ita ko maanan?
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa paʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮən no~u kawas ʦi mo~usi i mikiʡo~ukan a paɾa, mikitini o~u mamananam ita ko~u maanan?
S.TRANSL: What do we learn from why God did not allow Moses to enter the Promised Land?

S.FORM: Kawra, o cima ko saso'lin milifok to olah, ato sapalemed no Kawas hani?
Kawra, o cima ko saso'lin milifok to olah, ato sapalemed no Kawas hani?
S.PHON: kawra, o~u ʦima ko~u saso~uʡɾin miɾifo~uk to~u o~uɾaħ, ato~u sapaɾəməɬ~ɮ no~u kawas ħani?
S.TRANSL: But to whom will God grant his favor and blessing?

S.FORM: "Caay ko Mamalasawad ko Sowal no Kawas"
"Caay ko Mamalasawad ko Sowal no Kawas"
S.PHON: "ʦaaj ko~u mamaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u kawas"
S.TRANSL: "The Word of Our God Endures Forever"

S.FORM: mala widang no Kawas.
mala widang no Kawas.
S.PHON: maɾa wiɬ~ɮaŋ no~u kawas.
S.TRANSL: be reconciled to God.

S.FORM: Sapaca'of toniya salicay, wa nengnengen ita, tahalifa to kafalic ko finawlan no Kawas i, samaanay ci Yihofa mikayat cangranan.
Sapaca'of toniya salicay, wa nengnengen ita, tahalifa to kafalic ko finawlan no Kawas i, samaanay ci Yihofa mikayat cangranan.
S.PHON: sapaʦaʡo~uf to~unija saɾiʦaj, wa nəŋnəŋən ita, taħaɾifa to~u kafaɾiʦ ko~u finawɾan no~u kawas i, samaanaj ʦi jiħo~ufa mikajat ʦaŋranan.
S.TRANSL: Well, consider how Jehovah provided trustworthy leadership in the past during times of change.

S.FORM: Misamaan kita misa'icel midama to nika korac no likakawa no Kawas?
Misamaan kita misa'icel midama to nika korac no likakawa no Kawas?
S.PHON: misamaan kita misaʡiʦəɾ miɬ~ɮama to~u nika ko~uraʦ no~u ɾikakawa no~u kawas?
S.TRANSL: How can we do our part in keeping wickedness out of Jehovah's house?

S.FORM: Sapa'icel no Kawas ko hemek,
Sapa'icel no Kawas ko hemek,
S.PHON: sapaʡiʦəɾ no~u kawas ko~u ħəmək,
S.TRANSL: The joy of Jehovah is our stronghold.

S.FORM: Sapahecadaw ko malohemay malitengay to Kawas a masadafdaf ko pisawkit, wa mitiyawca to iraay ko 'intehay harateng no coko padetengay mipatay hokira.
Sapahecadaw ko malohemay malitengay to Kawas a masadafdaf ko pisawkit, wa mitiyawca to iraay ko 'intehay harateng no coko padetengay mipatay hokira.
S.PHON: sapaħəʦaɬ~ɮaw ko~u maɾo~uħəmaj maɾitəŋaj to~u kawas a masaɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮaf ko~u pisawkit, wa mitijawʦa to~u iraaj ko~u ʡintəħaj ħaratəŋ no~u ʦo~uko~u paɬ~ɮətəŋaj mipataj ħo~ukira.
S.TRANSL: To reflect divine justice, they had to determine whether the fugitive acted "out of hatred" and "with malicious intent."

S.FORM: Sapa'icel no Kawas ko hemek.
Sapa'icel no Kawas ko hemek.
S.PHON: sapaʡiʦəɾ no~u kawas ko~u ħəmək.
S.TRANSL: The joy of Jehovah is our stronghold.

S.FORM: Misinanot sanawsaw, wa nga'ay paihekal kita tano harateng no Kawas minengneng to 'orip.
Misinanot sanawsaw, wa nga'ay paihekal kita tano harateng no Kawas minengneng to 'orip.
S.PHON: misinano~ut sanawsaw, wa ŋaʡaj paiħəkaɾ kita tano~u ħaratəŋ no~u kawas minəŋnəŋ to~u ʡo~urip.
S.TRANSL: We also share Jehovah's view of life by cultivating a proper attitude toward safety.

S.FORM: Patinakoan ni Pawlo ko sapafeli ni Yihofa a fonos, to o Kimad no Kawas.
Patinakoan ni Pawlo ko sapafeli ni Yihofa a fonos, to o Kimad no Kawas.
S.PHON: patinako~uan ni pawɾo~u ko~u sapafəɾi ni jiħo~ufa a fo~uno~us, to~u o~u kimaɬ~ɮ no~u kawas.
S.TRANSL: Paul likens God's Word to a sword that Jehovah has given us.

S.FORM: Iti:yaho, o mihaydaan no Kawas a tamdaw ci Mosi.
Iti:yaho, o mihaydaan no Kawas a tamdaw ci Mosi.
S.PHON: iti:jaħo~u, o~u miħajɬ~ɮaan no~u kawas a tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi mo~usi.
S.TRANSL: Moses experienced such a blessing.

S.FORM: O ciraramodayto a Krisciyang mamisamaan a midopo to satadamaanay noka pikowan no Kawas hani?
O ciraramodayto a Krisciyang mamisamaan a midopo to satadamaanay noka pikowan no Kawas hani?
S.PHON: o~u ʦiraramo~uɬ~ɮajto~u a krisʦijaŋ mamisamaan a miɬ~ɮo~upo~u to~u sataɬ~ɮamaanaj no~uka piko~uwan no~u kawas ħani?
S.TRANSL: Consider an area wherein Christian married couples can support Jehovah's ways and thereby uphold his sovereignty.

S.FORM: to Kawas.
to Kawas.
S.PHON: to~u kawas.
S.TRANSL: We must tell.

S.FORM: Kitakit no Kawas
Kitakit no Kawas
S.PHON: kitakit no~u kawas
S.TRANSL: The Kingdom is in place.

S.FORM: Finawlan no Kawas, na patafangay to maanan a dafong?
Finawlan no Kawas, na patafangay to maanan a dafong?
S.PHON: finawɾan no~u kawas, na patafaŋaj to~u maanan a ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ?
S.TRANSL: What were some sources of contributions in times past?

S.FORM: Kinacecayay, o cecay Misawacayay Tamdaw ni Yihofa pasowalay ci Alonan, pakakadepen ko sepat no Hipray a ngangan no Kawas, nga'ayay 'osien to "Yihofa".
Kinacecayay, o cecay Misawacayay Tamdaw ni Yihofa pasowalay ci Alonan, pakakadepen ko sepat no Hipray a ngangan no Kawas, nga'ayay 'osien to "Yihofa".
S.PHON: kinaʦəʦajaj, o~u ʦəʦaj misawaʦajaj tamɬ~ɮaw ni jiħo~ufa paso~uwaɾaj ʦi aɾo~unan, pakakaɬ~ɮəpən ko~u səpat no~u ħipraj a ŋaŋan no~u kawas, ŋaʡajaj ʡo~usiən to~u "jiħo~ufa".
S.TRANSL: He was thrilled when a Witness showed him that by combining vowel points with the four Hebrew consonants of God's name, it could be pronounced "Jehovah."

S.FORM: Sasamaan ko demak no malohemay malitengay wa masongila'a madimokos ko siri no Kawas?
Sasamaan ko demak no malohemay malitengay wa masongila'a madimokos ko siri no Kawas?
S.PHON: sasamaan ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u maɾo~uħəmaj maɾitəŋaj wa maso~uŋiɾaʡa maɬ~ɮimo~uko~us ko~u siri no~u kawas?
S.TRANSL: What fine qualities will help elders to be effective shepherds of God's flock?

S.FORM: O cecay kaemangay fa'inayan salikaka ci Enli, miliyasay ko salawina ningra to likakawa no Kawas, cowa ka hatini aca, oya malo malohemay malitengay a wama ningra cowa to pihodop ci Yihofaan, tada masomaday ci Enli tonini.

O cecay kaemangay fa'inayan salikaka ci Enli, miliyasay ko salawina ningra to likakawa no Kawas, cowa ka hatini aca, oya malo malohemay malitengay a wama ningra cowa to pihodop ci Yihofaan, tada masomaday ci Enli tonini.
S.PHON: o~u ʦəʦaj kaəmaŋaj faʡinajan saɾikaka ʦi ənɾi, miɾijasaj ko~u saɾawina niŋra to~u ɾikakawa no~u kawas, ʦo~uwa ka ħatini aʦa, o~uja maɾo~u maɾo~uħəmaj maɾitəŋaj a wama niŋra ʦo~uwa to~u piħo~uɬ~ɮo~up ʦi jiħo~ufaan, taɬ~ɮa maso~umaɬ~ɮaj ʦi ənɾi to~unini.
S.TRANSL: Henri, a young brother, was greatly distressed when his close relatives, including his father, who had been a respected elder, left the truth.

S.FORM: Hongti Kitakit no Kawas.
Hongti Kitakit no Kawas.
S.PHON: ħo~uŋti kitakit no~u kawas.
S.TRANSL: Proclaiming the Kingdom of God.

S.FORM: O sowal no Kawas padamaay ci Yopuan mifalic to kapinengneng ningra.
O sowal no Kawas padamaay ci Yopuan mifalic to kapinengneng ningra.
S.PHON: o~u so~uwaɾ no~u kawas paɬ~ɮamaaj ʦi jo~upo~u~uan mifaɾiʦ to~u kapinəŋnəŋ niŋra.
S.TRANSL: This helped Job regain the proper perspective.

S.FORM: Mananamay nangra ci Apraham, Yopu, aci Taniil, pakaso'linay to papatikolen no Kawas pa'orip ko mapatayay noikor.
Mananamay nangra ci Apraham, Yopu, aci Taniil, pakaso'linay to papatikolen no Kawas pa'orip ko mapatayay noikor.
S.PHON: mananamaj naŋra ʦi apraħam, jo~upo~u~u, aʦi taniiɾ, pakaso~uʡɾinaj to~u papatiko~uɾən no~u kawas paʡo~urip ko~u mapatajaj no~uiko~ur.
S.TRANSL: And they learn that Abraham, Job, and Daniel were confident that in the future the dead would live again.

S.FORM: Anini, o roma tamdaw mahaenay nisowalan ni Solomon, o hafay no niyah ko miti'eran ao cowa ko Kawas.
Anini, o roma tamdaw mahaenay nisowalan ni Solomon, o hafay no niyah ko miti'eran ao cowa ko Kawas.
S.PHON: anini, o~u ro~uma tamɬ~ɮaw maħaənaj niso~uwaɾan ni so~uɾo~umo~un, o~u ħafaj no~u nijaħ ko~u mitiʡəran ao~u ʦo~uwa ko~u kawas.
S.TRANSL: Likely you can think of people who trust in their wealth rather than in God.

S.FORM: Yihofa Kawas 'icel no mita,
Yihofa Kawas 'icel no mita,
S.PHON: jiħo~ufa kawas ʡiʦəɾ no~u mita,
S.TRANSL: Jehovah, our Rock, Our strength and our might,

S.FORM: So'lin na mararaway kako, kawra cowa ka toled a makesem kako, miharatengan koniya sifana' padotoc a matayal i Kawas.
So'lin na mararaway kako, kawra cowa ka toled a makesem kako, miharatengan koniya sifana' padotoc a matayal i Kawas.
S.PHON: so~uʡɾin na mararawaj kako~u, kawra ʦo~uwa ka to~uɾəɬ~ɮ a makəsəm kako~u, miħaratəŋan ko~unija sifanaʡ paɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ a matajaɾ i kawas.
S.TRANSL: But I have experienced that instead of letting the hands drop, it is best to learn a lesson from a mistake and remember that lesson as you move on.

S.FORM: Itiya, itiniay i Yirusalim cingra pasayra i "kakerikeridan no finawlan ato mato'asay, ato pasifana'ay to rikec a tamdaw," no Yutaya a pasowal: 'Oya Nacali tamdaw ci Yis Kristo, na mipacekan namo i hecek, patikolanto no Kawas pa'orip cingra nai patay.'

Itiya, itiniay i Yirusalim cingra pasayra i "kakerikeridan no finawlan ato mato'asay, ato pasifana'ay to rikec a tamdaw," no Yutaya a pasowal: 'Oya Nacali tamdaw ci Yis Kristo, na mipacekan namo i hecek, patikolanto no Kawas pa'orip cingra nai patay.'
S.PHON: itija, itiniaj i jiro~u~usaɾim ʦiŋra pasajra i "kakərikəriɬ~ɮan no~u finawɾan ato~u mato~uʡasaj, ato~u pasifanaʡaj to~u rikəʦ a tamɬ~ɮaw," no~u jo~u~utaja a paso~uwaɾ: ʡo~uja naʦaɾi tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi jis kristo~u, na mipaʦəkan namo~u i ħəʦək, patiko~uɾanto~u no~u kawas paʡo~urip ʦiŋra nai pataj.ʡ
S.TRANSL: He spoke of "Jesus Christ the Nazarene, whom you executed on a stake but whom God raised up from the dead."

S.FORM: Masalofto mihongyak tora asier ikor, ora nisowalan a sapalemed i saka 12 tangasa 14 sinael, oyaanto moecelay tamdaw ko mitoro'an, cangra mingitangitay to pilidong no Kawas, mitokel to sapiliyasaw to pikari'ang no tatiihay tamdaw saka 11 sinael.

Masalofto mihongyak tora asier ikor, ora nisowalan a sapalemed i saka 12 tangasa 14 sinael, oyaanto moecelay tamdaw ko mitoro'an, cangra mingitangitay to pilidong no Kawas, mitokel to sapiliyasaw to pikari'ang no tatiihay tamdaw saka 11 sinael.
S.PHON: masaɾo~ufto~u miħo~uŋjak to~ura asiər iko~ur, o~ura niso~uwaɾan a sapaɾəməɬ~ɮ i saka ** taŋasa ** sinaəɾ, o~ujaanto~u mo~uəʦəɾaj tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u mito~uro~uʡan, ʦaŋra miŋitaŋitaj to~u piɾiɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u kawas, mito~ukəɾ to~u sapiɾijasaw to~u pikariʡaŋ no~u tatiiħaj tamɬ~ɮaw saka ** sinaəɾ.
S.TRANSL: The use of "then" in verse 12 means that the blessings that follow in verses 12 to 14 are understood as applying to the righteous, those who ask to be 'rescued and saved' from the wicked verse 11.

S.FORM: O sowal ni Yis paihkalay to, o limasmas no raramod mikitiniay i Kawas, o tahada'ocay ko kalala'ed no raramod.
O sowal ni Yis paihkalay to, o limasmas no raramod mikitiniay i Kawas, o tahada'ocay ko kalala'ed no raramod.
S.PHON: o~u so~uwaɾ ni jis paiħkaɾaj to~u, o~u ɾimasmas no~u raramo~uɬ~ɮ mikitiniaj i kawas, o~u taħaɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦaj ko~u kaɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮ no~u raramo~uɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: Jesus thus agreed that marriage is of divine origin and stressed its permanence.

S.FORM: Ingiden ita ko Kawas, mingitangit to sapadama Ningra.
Ingiden ita ko Kawas, mingitangit to sapadama Ningra.
S.PHON: iŋiɬ~ɮən ita ko~u kawas, miŋitaŋit to~u sapaɬ~ɮama niŋra.
S.TRANSL: Rather, we must approach Jehovah, begging for his help.

S.FORM: So'li'lin, o romaroma nangra cato ka adihay ko demak saki Kawas, kawra nga'ayay patahekal to timolo cangra, padama to kasakopang.
So'li'lin, o romaroma nangra cato ka adihay ko demak saki Kawas, kawra nga'ayay patahekal to timolo cangra, padama to kasakopang.
S.PHON: so~uʡɾiʡɾin, o~u ro~umaro~uma naŋra ʦato~u ka aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak saki kawas, kawra ŋaʡajaj pataħəkaɾ to~u timo~uɾo~u ʦaŋra, paɬ~ɮama to~u kasako~upaŋ.
S.TRANSL: Some may not be able to do as much as they once did in God's service, but they can still show courage and go to work.

S.FORM: Salakat, o limasmas no Kawas to raramod i Itin, cecay ko fa'inay cecay ko fafahi, oniya "tatosaay" wa tahada'oc a malacafay.
Salakat, o limasmas no Kawas to raramod i Itin, cecay ko fa'inay cecay ko fafahi, oniya "tatosaay" wa tahada'oc a malacafay.
S.PHON: saɾakat, o~u ɾimasmas no~u kawas to~u raramo~uɬ~ɮ i itin, ʦəʦaj ko~u faʡinaj ʦəʦaj ko~u fafaħi, o~unija "tato~usaaj" wa taħaɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ a maɾaʦafaj.
S.TRANSL: The standard set in that Edenic marriage was monogamy, "the two" being joined together in a lasting union.

S.FORM: Nga'ay kita midoko to misanga'ay kitanan a Kawas, mitodong to capeling Ningra, halo picangacang to sadipot ningra, tada ta'angayay sakaliko konini!
Nga'ay kita midoko to misanga'ay kitanan a Kawas, mitodong to capeling Ningra, halo picangacang to sadipot ningra, tada ta'angayay sakaliko konini!
S.PHON: ŋaʡaj kita miɬ~ɮo~uko~u to~u misaŋaʡaj kitanan a kawas, mito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u ʦapəɾiŋ niŋra, ħaɾo~u piʦaŋaʦaŋ to~u saɬ~ɮipo~ut niŋra, taɬ~ɮa taʡaŋajaj sakaɾiko~u ko~unini!
S.TRANSL: What a privilege to worship a God in whose image we are made, whose qualities we can imitate, and in whom we can take refuge!

S.FORM: O sapafeli no Kawas a pasalat padamaay kitanan miliyas to pipalit no raraw ato patay, pahecaden ita ci Pawloan, cowa ko sasaloya'en ko sapafeli no Kawas a pasalat.
O sapafeli no Kawas a pasalat padamaay kitanan miliyas to pipalit no raraw ato patay, pahecaden ita ci Pawloan, cowa ko sasaloya'en ko sapafeli no Kawas a pasalat.
S.PHON: o~u sapafəɾi no~u kawas a pasaɾat paɬ~ɮamaaj kitanan miɾijas to~u pipaɾit no~u raraw ato~u pataj, paħəʦaɬ~ɮən ita ʦi pawɾo~uan, ʦo~uwa ko~u sasaɾo~ujaʡən ko~u sapafəɾi no~u kawas a pasaɾat.
S.TRANSL: Following Paul's example, we too should never take for granted that Jehovah liberated us from the bondage of sin and of death.

S.FORM: Cipinang toniya demak padamaay cingraanan misa'osi to faloco' mitafo to madimadi i Kawas, makahi a patado kitaanan a kinafalah to 'orip.
Cipinang toniya demak padamaay cingraanan misa'osi to faloco' mitafo to madimadi i Kawas, makahi a patado kitaanan a kinafalah to 'orip.
S.PHON: ʦipinaŋ to~unija ɬ~ɮəmak paɬ~ɮamaaj ʦiŋraanan misaʡo~usi to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ mitafo~u to~u maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮi i kawas, makaħi a pataɬ~ɮo~u kitaanan a kinafaɾaħ to~u ʡo~urip.
S.TRANSL: This knowledge strengthened his decision to maintain his faithful, self-sacrificing course without wavering.

S.FORM: So'li'lin masasi romaay ko pinangan ni Pawlo aci Parnapas, kawra makakapotayho a matayal saki Kawas.
So'li'lin masasi romaay ko pinangan ni Pawlo aci Parnapas, kawra makakapotayho a matayal saki Kawas.
S.PHON: so~uʡɾiʡɾin masasi ro~umaaj ko~u pinaŋan ni pawɾo~u aʦi parnapas, kawra makakapo~utajħo~u a matajaɾ saki kawas.
S.TRANSL: Despite the different personalities of Paul and Barnabas, they had been able to serve together before that event.

S.FORM: Cowa picangacang ci Pawlo to pasalat pasayra i milikecay, misa'icelay ato romaroma Krisciyang padama to tamdaw mitapal to pafeliay to pasalat a Kawas.
Cowa picangacang ci Pawlo to pasalat pasayra i milikecay, misa'icelay ato romaroma Krisciyang padama to tamdaw mitapal to pafeliay to pasalat a Kawas.
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa piʦaŋaʦaŋ ʦi pawɾo~u to~u pasaɾat pasajra i miɾikəʦaj, misaʡiʦəɾaj ato~u ro~umaro~uma krisʦijaŋ paɬ~ɮama to~u tamɬ~ɮaw mitapaɾ to~u pafəɾiaj to~u pasaɾat a kawas.
S.TRANSL: Rather than looking to any human ruler or agency for freedom, Paul and his fellow Christians worked hard to help others learn the good news of God's Kingdom and the incomparable value of the ransom sacrifice of Christ Jesus.

S.FORM: Milicayay ci Matiyas: "O cima ko Kawas?
Milicayay ci Matiyas: "O cima ko Kawas?
S.PHON: miɾiʦajaj ʦi matijas: "o~u ʦima ko~u kawas?
S.TRANSL: Mattias would ask: "Who is God?

S.FORM: MISAKA DADEMAK kita to Kimad no Kawas, hano o sapalifet konini?
MISAKA DADEMAK kita to Kimad no Kawas, hano o sapalifet konini?
S.PHON: misaka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak kita to~u kimaɬ~ɮ no~u kawas, ħano~u o~u sapaɾifət ko~unini?
S.TRANSL: WHY is it a challenge to apply what we learn from God's Word?

S.FORM: Pakayni to Hongti Kitakit no Kawas, ci Cakay tangsol sa mimaan to demak?
Pakayni to Hongti Kitakit no Kawas, ci Cakay tangsol sa mimaan to demak?
S.PHON: pakajni to~u ħo~uŋti kitakit no~u kawas, ʦi ʦakaj taŋso~uɾ sa mimaan to~u ɬ~ɮəmak?
S.TRANSL: How did Zacchaeus show his determination to gain God's Kingdom?

S.FORM: Romadiway ci Pawlo aci Silas pahemek to Kawas, tatootoor sanay mafekad ko demak.
Romadiway ci Pawlo aci Silas pahemek to Kawas, tatootoor sanay mafekad ko demak.
S.PHON: ro~umaɬ~ɮiwaj ʦi pawɾo~u aʦi siɾas paħəmək to~u kawas, tato~uo~uto~uo~ur sanaj mafəkaɬ~ɮ ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: As Paul and Silas sing songs of praise, a series of totally unexpected events occurs.

S.FORM: Pa'ayawan ni Yis ko nisawawaan: "O saki Kawas a tayal ita konini, o sasaan cangra to nipipatay nangra i tamowanan."
Pa'ayawan ni Yis ko nisawawaan: "O saki Kawas a tayal ita konini, o sasaan cangra to nipipatay nangra i tamowanan."
S.PHON: paʡajawan ni jis ko~u nisawawaan: "o~u saki kawas a tajaɾ ita ko~unini, o~u sasaan ʦaŋra to~u nipipataj naŋra i tamo~uwanan."
S.TRANSL: Jesus warned his followers: "The hour is coming when everyone who kills you will think he has offered a sacred service to God."

S.FORM: Sarocoden miti'er ko Kawas,
Sarocoden miti'er ko Kawas,
S.PHON: saro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮən mitiʡər ko~u kawas,
S.TRANSL: Our trust in Jehovah helps us endure;

S.FORM: Manaokaniw, o tokel ita i, mamitamorong ko wama wina tora sapatorod no Kawas a 'inorong, songila'en a pasifana' ko wawa.
Manaokaniw, o tokel ita i, mamitamorong ko wama wina tora sapatorod no Kawas a 'inorong, songila'en a pasifana' ko wawa.
S.PHON: manao~ukaniw, o~u to~ukəɾ ita i, mamitamo~uro~uŋ ko~u wama wina to~ura sapato~uro~uɬ~ɮ no~u kawas a ʡino~uro~uŋ, so~uŋiɾaʡən a pasifanaʡ ko~u wawa.
S.TRANSL: It is to be hoped that the parents will, in time, fulfill their God-given responsibility to care spiritually for their children.

S.FORM: O Kawas niyam ci Yihofa sanay a kitakit tada malemeday!
O Kawas niyam ci Yihofa sanay a kitakit tada malemeday!
S.PHON: o~u kawas nijam ʦi jiħo~ufa sanaj a kitakit taɬ~ɮa maɾəməɬ~ɮaj!
S.TRANSL: "Happy is the nation whose God is Jehovah, the people he has chosen as his own possession."

S.FORM: Mikitini i nalifetan no 'alomanay ma'araway ita, tada sini'adaay to tamdaw ko Kawas.
Mikitini i nalifetan no 'alomanay ma'araway ita, tada sini'adaay to tamdaw ko Kawas.
S.PHON: mikitini i naɾifətan no~u ʡaɾo~umanaj maʡarawaj ita, taɬ~ɮa siniʡaɬ~ɮaaj to~u tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u kawas.
S.TRANSL: Many experiences could be used to illustrate God's acts of compassion.

S.FORM: 'Olic saka 147 fedengan, pakalalokay to tamdaw no Kawas a pahemek ci Yihofaan.
'Olic saka 147 fedengan, pakalalokay to tamdaw no Kawas a pahemek ci Yihofaan.
S.PHON: ʡo~uɾiʦ saka *** fəɬ~ɮəŋan, pakaɾaɾo~ukaj to~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kawas a paħəmək ʦi jiħo~ufaan.
S.TRANSL: Psalm 147 repeatedly encourages God's people to praise Jehovah.

S.FORM: Hano nganga'ay kita mahemek a mihodop to lipahakay a Kawas hani?
Hano nganga'ay kita mahemek a mihodop to lipahakay a Kawas hani?
S.PHON: ħano~u ŋaŋaʡaj kita maħəmək a miħo~uɬ~ɮo~up to~u ɾipaħakaj a kawas ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why are we happy to serve "the happy God"?

S.FORM: Tikolen ni Cilisi miharateng koya romi'ad i, sanay ko sowal: "Marariday kako pasowal ci Matiyasan, tada maolahay kami tisowanan, fanekfekay patado cingranan mitolon to Kawas, micangacang ci Yihofaan padama cingranan cipinang to so'linay kimad."

Tikolen ni Cilisi miharateng koya romi'ad i, sanay ko sowal: "Marariday kako pasowal ci Matiyasan, tada maolahay kami tisowanan, fanekfekay patado cingranan mitolon to Kawas, micangacang ci Yihofaan padama cingranan cipinang to so'linay kimad."
S.PHON: tiko~uɾən ni ʦiɾisi miħaratəŋ ko~uja ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i, sanaj ko~u so~uwaɾ: "marariɬ~ɮaj kako~u paso~uwaɾ ʦi matijasan, taɬ~ɮa mao~uɾaħaj kami tiso~uwanan, fanəkfəkaj pataɬ~ɮo~u ʦiŋranan mito~uɾo~un to~u kawas, miʦaŋaʦaŋ ʦi jiħo~ufaan paɬ~ɮama ʦiŋranan ʦipinaŋ to~u so~uʡɾinaj kimaɬ~ɮ."
S.TRANSL: Looking back, Gillis says: "I often told Mattias that our deep love for him moved his mother and me to pray even more intensely that Jehovah would help him to understand."

S.FORM: Kalimelaan i, minanam to samaan pa'dil to pafeliay to pasalat a Kawas ci Yihofa.
Kalimelaan i, minanam to samaan pa'dil to pafeliay to pasalat a Kawas ci Yihofa.
S.PHON: kaɾiməɾaan i, minanam to~u samaan paʡɬ~ɮiɾ to~u pafəɾiaj to~u pasaɾat a kawas ʦi jiħo~ufa.
S.TRANSL: Above all, we will learn how to honor Jehovah, the God of true freedom.

S.FORM: Oni tosa lalakaw papadama kitanan cipinang to satadamaanay noka pikowan ni Yihofa, to hakowaay ko nika masaka limlaan, ato samaanen ita midopo ko satadamaanay noka pikowan no Kawas.
Oni tosa lalakaw papadama kitanan cipinang to satadamaanay noka pikowan ni Yihofa, to hakowaay ko nika masaka limlaan, ato samaanen ita midopo ko satadamaanay noka pikowan no Kawas.
S.PHON: o~uni to~usa ɾaɾakaw papaɬ~ɮama kitanan ʦipinaŋ to~u sataɬ~ɮamaanaj no~uka piko~uwan ni jiħo~ufa, to~u ħako~uwaaj ko~u nika masaka ɾimɾaan, ato~u samaanən ita miɬ~ɮo~upo~u ko~u sataɬ~ɮamaanaj no~uka piko~uwan no~u kawas.
S.TRANSL: These articles will help us to appreciate the importance of Jehovah's sovereignty and to understand how we can uphold it.

S.FORM: O sapafeli no Kawas a rihaday, samaan padama kitaanan misi'ayaw to kafalic no pakayraane?
O sapafeli no Kawas a rihaday, samaan padama kitaanan misi'ayaw to kafalic no pakayraane?
S.PHON: o~u sapafəɾi no~u kawas a riħaɬ~ɮaj, samaan paɬ~ɮama kitaanan misiʡajaw to~u kafaɾiʦ no~u pakajraanə?
S.TRANSL: How can "the peace of God" help us in times of change?

S.FORM: Saka 2, simsimen miharateng, samaanen mitodong ko ta'arawan no Kawas, ato mamisamaan to demak nga' ira ko nga'ayay minaro'an.
Saka 2, simsimen miharateng, samaanen mitodong ko ta'arawan no Kawas, ato mamisamaan to demak nga' ira ko nga'ayay minaro'an.
S.PHON: saka *, simsimən miħaratəŋ, samaanən mito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ko~u taʡarawan no~u kawas, ato~u mamisamaan to~u ɬ~ɮəmak ŋaʡ ira ko~u ŋaʡajaj minaro~uʡan.
S.TRANSL: Second, consider how you can imitate God's example and how your doing so is truly beneficial.

S.FORM: Yihofa a Kawas,
Yihofa a Kawas,
S.PHON: jiħo~ufa a kawas,
S.TRANSL: You cause us to become

S.FORM: Maolah ko Kawas kitaanan.
Maolah ko Kawas kitaanan.
S.PHON: mao~uɾaħ ko~u kawas kitaanan.
S.TRANSL: And then God's favor we'll know day by day.

S.FORM: Nohatini, malo finawlan no Kawas, o masakalikoan sanay ko harateng no salikaka.
Nohatini, malo finawlan no Kawas, o masakalikoan sanay ko harateng no salikaka.
S.PHON: no~uħatini, maɾo~u finawɾan no~u kawas, o~u masakaɾiko~uan sanaj ko~u ħaratəŋ no~u saɾikaka.
S.TRANSL: Now they are prouder than ever to be part of God's organization."

S.FORM: O finawlan no Kawas wa nga'ay samaan milifok to safaelohay a matatodongay a lihaf hani?
O finawlan no Kawas wa nga'ay samaan milifok to safaelohay a matatodongay a lihaf hani?
S.PHON: o~u finawɾan no~u kawas wa ŋaʡaj samaan miɾifo~uk to~u safaəɾo~uħaj a matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a ɾiħaf ħani?
S.TRANSL: What provisions have been made to keep God's people up-to-date with accurate information?

S.FORM: O sarikec no Kawas pairaay to maanan a sadama kitaanan hani?
O sarikec no Kawas pairaay to maanan a sadama kitaanan hani?
S.PHON: o~u sarikəʦ no~u kawas pairaaj to~u maanan a saɬ~ɮama kitaanan ħani?
S.TRANSL: How do we benefit from following God's laws?

S.FORM: So'lin midokoay kami ci Yihofaan saan cangra, kawra cowa pisacecay a maolah to Kawas.
So'lin midokoay kami ci Yihofaan saan cangra, kawra cowa pisacecay a maolah to Kawas.
S.PHON: so~uʡɾin miɬ~ɮo~uko~uaj kami ʦi jiħo~ufaan saan ʦaŋra, kawra ʦo~uwa pisaʦəʦaj a mao~uɾaħ to~u kawas.
S.TRANSL: All of them professed to worship Jehovah, but their devotion to him was far from exclusive.

S.FORM: Lalitengan a finawlan no Kawas, samaanay pakayni i patafang to dafong midama to so'linay a pidoyongan?
Lalitengan a finawlan no Kawas, samaanay pakayni i patafang to dafong midama to so'linay a pidoyongan?
S.PHON: ɾaɾitəŋan a finawɾan no~u kawas, samaanaj pakajni i patafaŋ to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ miɬ~ɮama to~u so~uʡɾinaj a piɬ~ɮo~ujo~uŋan?
S.TRANSL: How did faithful ones in the past support the activities of Jehovah's representatives financially?

S.FORM: Awaay ko sasa, o papadamaen no Kawas koya mipadangay to wawa a wama wina.
Awaay ko sasa, o papadamaen no Kawas koya mipadangay to wawa a wama wina.
S.PHON: awaaj ko~u sasa, o~u papaɬ~ɮamaən no~u kawas ko~uja mipaɬ~ɮaŋaj to~u wawa a wama wina.
S.TRANSL: You can be sure that God will bless parents who help their children to set and reach spiritual goals.

S.FORM: Kapah tamdaw, salimlaen ko sapafeli no Kawas kisowanan a pasalat.
Kapah tamdaw, salimlaen ko sapafeli no Kawas kisowanan a pasalat.
S.PHON: kapaħ tamɬ~ɮaw, saɾimɾaən ko~u sapafəɾi no~u kawas kiso~uwanan a pasaɾat.
S.TRANSL: Young ones, cherish the freedom God has given you.

S.FORM: O olah to Kawas mikowaday to romaroma tamdaw makahi mifalah to sakacihafayaw, misarocod to faloco' a midoko ci Yihofaan.
O olah to Kawas mikowaday to romaroma tamdaw makahi mifalah to sakacihafayaw, misarocod to faloco' a midoko ci Yihofaan.
S.PHON: o~u o~uɾaħ to~u kawas miko~uwaɬ~ɮaj to~u ro~umaro~uma tamɬ~ɮaw makaħi mifaɾaħ to~u sakaʦiħafajaw, misaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ a miɬ~ɮo~uko~u ʦi jiħo~ufaan.
S.TRANSL: Love of God has moved some to give up potentially lucrative careers to serve Jehovah more fully.

S.FORM: Kawra o sapalemed no Kawas, wa nga'ay ko pakayraan.
Kawra o sapalemed no Kawas, wa nga'ay ko pakayraan.
S.PHON: kawra o~u sapaɾəməɬ~ɮ no~u kawas, wa ŋaʡaj ko~u pakajraan.
S.TRANSL: But that would change as God blessed them.

S.FORM: Pairaen ko matatodongay a harateng, maolah to Kawas ato maolah to tao nga', kodait a midemak to patorodan no Kawas a demak.
Pairaen ko matatodongay a harateng, maolah to Kawas ato maolah to tao nga', kodait a midemak to patorodan no Kawas a demak.
S.PHON: pairaən ko~u matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a ħaratəŋ, mao~uɾaħ to~u kawas ato~u mao~uɾaħ to~u tao~u ŋaʡ, ko~uɬ~ɮait a miɬ~ɮəmak to~u pato~uro~uɬ~ɮan no~u kawas a ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: We can endure in this work only if we have the right motivation, love for God and love for our neighbor.

S.FORM: Ilaenoay lalakaw mamilengo, misamaan kita misanga'ay a kalasaka dademak to pasalat, honga' tahada'oc a pa'odingar toya pasalatay kitaanan a Kawas Yihofa.
Ilaenoay lalakaw mamilengo, misamaan kita misanga'ay a kalasaka dademak to pasalat, honga' tahada'oc a pa'odingar toya pasalatay kitaanan a Kawas Yihofa.
S.PHON: iɾaəno~uaj ɾaɾakaw mamiɾəŋo~u, misamaan kita misaŋaʡaj a kaɾasaka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak to~u pasaɾat, ħo~uŋaʡ taħaɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ a paʡo~uɬ~ɮiŋar to~uja pasaɾataj kitaanan a kawas jiħo~ufa.
S.TRANSL: The following article will consider how we can wisely use the freedom we now have, so that we can honor Jehovah, the God of true freedom, forever.

S.FORM: O maanan ko kasasiromaan no mihodopay to Kawas a tamdaw ato cowa pihodop to Kawas a tamdaw hani?
O maanan ko kasasiromaan no mihodopay to Kawas a tamdaw ato cowa pihodop to Kawas a tamdaw hani?
S.PHON: o~u maanan ko~u kasasiro~umaan no~u miħo~uɬ~ɮo~upaj to~u kawas a tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u ʦo~uwa piħo~uɬ~ɮo~up to~u kawas a tamɬ~ɮaw ħani?
S.TRANSL: What clear distinction must exist between those who serve Jehovah and those who do not?

S.FORM: Misamaanay hano pakaso'lin kita, ci'icelay ko Sowal no Kawas?
Misamaanay hano pakaso'lin kita, ci'icelay ko Sowal no Kawas?
S.PHON: misamaanaj ħano~u pakaso~uʡɾin kita, ʦiʡiʦəɾaj ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u kawas?
S.TRANSL: Why can there be no doubt that God's Word exerts power?

S.FORM: Mafana' toninian, papa'icel to nika paso'lin ita to Kawas, mihadidi a mitala Cingranan mifohat to kasadakan lalan.
Mafana' toninian, papa'icel to nika paso'lin ita to Kawas, mihadidi a mitala Cingranan mifohat to kasadakan lalan.
S.PHON: mafanaʡ to~uninian, papaʡiʦəɾ to~u nika paso~uʡɾin ita to~u kawas, miħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮi a mitaɾa ʦiŋranan mifo~uħat to~u kasaɬ~ɮakan ɾaɾan.
S.TRANSL: This will strengthen our trust in him as we wait patiently for him to act in our behalf.

S.FORM: Pasowalan no Paino'ay a Yohani cangra: "Maedeng ko Kawas a misanga' to maloteloc ni Apraham" tonini a fakelokeloh.
Pasowalan no Paino'ay a Yohani cangra: "Maedeng ko Kawas a misanga' to maloteloc ni Apraham" tonini a fakelokeloh.
S.PHON: paso~uwaɾan no~u paino~uʡaj a jo~uħani ʦaŋra: "maəɬ~ɮəŋ ko~u kawas a misaŋaʡ to~u maɾo~utəɾo~uʦ ni apraħam" to~unini a fakəɾo~ukəɾo~uħ.
S.TRANSL: But John the Baptist told them: "God is able to raise up children for Abraham from these stones."

S.FORM: O papala'osien no Kawas ko miki'okan Ningra, hano mamihinom to faloco' ita aki?
O papala'osien no Kawas ko miki'okan Ningra, hano mamihinom to faloco' ita aki?
S.PHON: o~u papaɾaʡo~usiən no~u kawas ko~u mikiʡo~ukan niŋra, ħano~u mamiħino~um to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ita aki?
S.TRANSL: Why are Jehovah's promises a source of great comfort?

S.FORM: O romasa i, pasifana'an kita, too manan ko sanga'ayay a noka'orip, mihaenay ciharateng ko Kawas kitanan.
O romasa i, pasifana'an kita, too manan ko sanga'ayay a noka'orip, mihaenay ciharateng ko Kawas kitanan.
S.PHON: o~u ro~umasa i, pasifanaʡan kita, to~uo~u manan ko~u saŋaʡajaj a no~ukaʡo~urip, miħaənaj ʦiħaratəŋ ko~u kawas kitanan.
S.TRANSL: Consider, too, how he cares for us and teaches us the best way of life.

S.FORM: Pa'ayaway ko 'Olic 40:8 maolahay ci Yis to sarikec no Kawas, sanay ko sowal: "Kawasaw ako, tada maolah kako a midoedo to nafaloco'an Iso.
Pa'ayaway ko 'Olic 40:8 maolahay ci Yis to sarikec no Kawas, sanay ko sowal: "Kawasaw ako, tada maolah kako a midoedo to nafaloco'an Iso.
S.PHON: paʡajawaj ko~u ʡo~uɾiʦ **:* mao~uɾaħaj ʦi jis to~u sarikəʦ no~u kawas, sanaj ko~u so~uwaɾ: "kawasaw ako~u, taɬ~ɮa mao~uɾaħ kako~u a miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u nafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan iso~u.
S.TRANSL: Jesus' deep affection for the law of God was prophetically expressed at Psalm 40:8: "To do your will, O my God, is my delight, and your law is deep within me."

S.FORM: Nolatekay, finawlan no Kawas pakayniay i mikiriwi'ay a araaw ko pipatafang.
Nolatekay, finawlan no Kawas pakayniay i mikiriwi'ay a araaw ko pipatafang.
S.PHON: no~uɾatəkaj, finawɾan no~u kawas pakajniaj i mikiriwiʡaj a araaw ko~u pipatafaŋ.
S.TRANSL: In some cases, Jehovah's people contributed for specific projects.

S.FORM: Na Nganga'ay Cingra Milifok to Olah no Kawas
Na Nganga'ay Cingra Milifok to Olah no Kawas
S.PHON: na ŋaŋaʡaj ʦiŋra miɾifo~uk to~u o~uɾaħ no~u kawas
S.TRANSL: He Could Have Had God's Favor

S.FORM: Lipahak, O Naitiniay i Kawas a Capeling
Lipahak, O Naitiniay i Kawas a Capeling
S.PHON: ɾipaħak, o~u naitiniaj i kawas a ʦapəɾiŋ
S.TRANSL: Joy, A Quality We Acquire From God

S.FORM: Dotoc wa milengo kita to tolo kalimelaan a salicay: 1. Mikitini pirikec no Kawas samaan a mahapinang ita to maolahay Cingra kitaanan?
Dotoc wa milengo kita to tolo kalimelaan a salicay: 1. Mikitini pirikec no Kawas samaan a mahapinang ita to maolahay Cingra kitaanan?
S.PHON: ɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ wa miɾəŋo~u kita to~u to~uɾo~u kaɾiməɾaan a saɾiʦaj: *. mikitini pirikəʦ no~u kawas samaan a maħapinaŋ ita to~u mao~uɾaħaj ʦiŋra kitaanan?
S.TRANSL: Let us now consider the answers to three important questions: 1. How does God's discipline reflect his love for us?

S.FORM: Hano mikikakaay ko harateng no Kawas to harateng no hekal hani?
Hano mikikakaay ko harateng no Kawas to harateng no hekal hani?
S.PHON: ħano~u mikikakaaj ko~u ħaratəŋ no~u kawas to~u ħaratəŋ no~u ħəkaɾ ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why is Jehovah's thinking superior to the ideas and values of this world?; How has Jehovah's thinking proved superior to that of the world?

S.FORM: O mangodoay to Kawas a tamdaw, cowa ko mamicerid micawma' to mamifasaw to paso'linay faloco' no niyah a tamdaw.
O mangodoay to Kawas a tamdaw, cowa ko mamicerid micawma' to mamifasaw to paso'linay faloco' no niyah a tamdaw.
S.PHON: o~u maŋo~uɬ~ɮo~uaj to~u kawas a tamɬ~ɮaw, ʦo~uwa ko~u mamiʦəriɬ~ɮ miʦawmaʡ to~u mamifasaw to~u paso~uʡɾinaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u nijaħ a tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: A godly person will not mix with those who could endanger his spirituality.

S.FORM: Nawhani mahaento a makari'ang ko i'ayaway namo a pali'ayaway to sowal no Kawas a tamdaw.
Nawhani mahaento a makari'ang ko i'ayaway namo a pali'ayaway to sowal no Kawas a tamdaw.
S.PHON: nawħani maħaənto~u a makariʡaŋ ko~u iʡajawaj namo~u a paɾiʡajawaj to~u so~uwaɾ no~u kawas a tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: Rejoice and be overjoyed, since your reward is great in the heavens, for in that way they persecuted the prophets prior to you."

S.FORM: Mafana'ay ko Kawas to pisadak aca ni Hapakuk to nano roray ato somad no niyah.
Mafana'ay ko Kawas to pisadak aca ni Hapakuk to nano roray ato somad no niyah.
S.PHON: mafanaʡaj ko~u kawas to~u pisaɬ~ɮak aʦa ni ħapako~u~uk to~u nano~u ro~uraj ato~u so~umaɬ~ɮ no~u nijaħ.
S.TRANSL: In words really aimed at the wayward Jews, Jehovah informed Habakkuk of what would happen in the near future.

S.FORM: Alatek caka sapitamorongaw to midipot to fafahi ato paro no loma' a 'inorong, miconged to fafahi mihodop to Kawas.
Alatek caka sapitamorongaw to midipot to fafahi ato paro no loma' a 'inorong, miconged to fafahi mihodop to Kawas.
S.PHON: aɾatək ʦaka sapitamo~uro~uŋaw to~u miɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u fafaħi ato~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ a ʡino~uro~uŋ, miʦo~uŋəɬ~ɮ to~u fafaħi miħo~uɬ~ɮo~up to~u kawas.
S.TRANSL: He might refuse to support her and the family or severely endanger her spirituality.

S.FORM: Toha sapicadaaw to sida'it no Kawas, mamifalah to manan ko Krisciyang hani?
Toha sapicadaaw to sida'it no Kawas, mamifalah to manan ko Krisciyang hani?
S.PHON: to~uħa sapiʦaɬ~ɮaaw to~u siɬ~ɮaʡit no~u kawas, mamifaɾaħ to~u manan ko~u krisʦijaŋ ħani?
S.TRANSL: A Christian may need to give up what in order to continue to receive divine mercy?

S.FORM: Sadaken ko tinakoan, misamaanay kalasaka dademak ko roma salikaka to dafong no hekal, paihekal to madimadi no niyah to Kawas.
Sadaken ko tinakoan, misamaanay kalasaka dademak ko roma salikaka to dafong no hekal, paihekal to madimadi no niyah to Kawas.
S.PHON: saɬ~ɮakən ko~u tinako~uan, misamaanaj kaɾasaka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak ko~u ro~uma saɾikaka to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ no~u ħəkaɾ, paiħəkaɾ to~u maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮi no~u nijaħ to~u kawas.
S.TRANSL: Give examples of how some are showing faithfulness in their use of unrighteous riches.

S.FORM: Ikorto i, songila'en a misahalaka ko noka'orip iso, palipahak to faloco' no Kawas.
Ikorto i, songila'en a misahalaka ko noka'orip iso, palipahak to faloco' no Kawas.
S.PHON: iko~urto~u i, so~uŋiɾaʡən a misaħaɾaka ko~u no~ukaʡo~urip iso~u, paɾipaħak to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u kawas.
S.TRANSL: Then plan to do what is pleasing to him.

S.FORM: O piratoh paihekalay to kaciharateng ato pipakahemek ita to roma tamdaw, hanaca micowatay to makelecay i kalala'ed no sikawdan no Kawas, mitongal to kalawidang no salikaka.
O piratoh paihekalay to kaciharateng ato pipakahemek ita to roma tamdaw, hanaca micowatay to makelecay i kalala'ed no sikawdan no Kawas, mitongal to kalawidang no salikaka.
S.PHON: o~u pirato~uħ paiħəkaɾaj to~u kaʦiħaratəŋ ato~u pipakaħəmək ita to~u ro~uma tamɬ~ɮaw, ħanaʦa miʦo~uwataj to~u makəɾəʦaj i kaɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮ no~u sikawɬ~ɮan no~u kawas, mito~uŋaɾ to~u kaɾawiɬ~ɮaŋ no~u saɾikaka.
S.TRANSL: Yes, greetings that express genuine personal interest and commendation fortify friendships and unite loyal servants of God.

S.FORM: Paihekalay koni to mangataayto mikowan ko Hongti Kitakit no Kawas, kakalikito mapalemed koni cikiw.
Paihekalay koni to mangataayto mikowan ko Hongti Kitakit no Kawas, kakalikito mapalemed koni cikiw.
S.PHON: paiħəkaɾaj ko~uni to~u maŋataajto~u miko~uwan ko~u ħo~uŋti kitakit no~u kawas, kakaɾikito~u mapaɾəməɬ~ɮ ko~uni ʦikiw.
S.TRANSL: This is evidence that God's Kingdom reigns and will soon bring to earth unimaginable blessings.

S.FORM: O roma Krisciyang miharateng to nano karetengay a raraw no niyah, cowa ko sasododen no Kawas cangra sanay.
O roma Krisciyang miharateng to nano karetengay a raraw no niyah, cowa ko sasododen no Kawas cangra sanay.
S.PHON: o~u ro~uma krisʦijaŋ miħaratəŋ to~u nano~u karətəŋaj a raraw no~u nijaħ, ʦo~uwa ko~u saso~uɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮən no~u kawas ʦaŋra sanaj.
S.TRANSL: Some Christians who have committed a serious sin have even felt that they are beyond God's forgiveness.

S.FORM: Samaan kiso nganga'ay mirina'to sowal no Kawas i faloco'no wawa?
Samaan kiso nganga'ay mirina'to sowal no Kawas i faloco'no wawa?
S.PHON: samaan kiso~u ŋaŋaʡaj mirinaʡto~u so~uwaɾ no~u kawas i faɾo~uʦo~uʡno~u wawa?
S.TRANSL: How can you inculcate God's Word in your children?

S.FORM: Naitini i 'Olic 34:22, o sikawdan no Kawas hano caka marawraw to mamapaekel no matoleday a faloco'?
Naitini i 'Olic 34:22, o sikawdan no Kawas hano caka marawraw to mamapaekel no matoleday a faloco'?
S.PHON: naitini i ʡo~uɾiʦ **:**, o~u sikawɬ~ɮan no~u kawas ħano~u ʦaka marawraw to~u mamapaəkəɾ no~u mato~uɾəɬ~ɮaj a faɾo~uʦo~uʡ?
S.TRANSL: How does Psalm 34:22 indicate that God's servants need not be overwhelmed by guilt?

S.FORM: Misa'icel a micekiw to kimad no Kawas, misimsim to ma'osiay a lalakaw
Misa'icel a micekiw to kimad no Kawas, misimsim to ma'osiay a lalakaw
S.PHON: misaʡiʦəɾ a miʦəkiw to~u kimaɬ~ɮ no~u kawas, misimsim to~u maʡo~usiaj a ɾaɾakaw
S.TRANSL: Study God's Word diligently, and meditate on what you read

S.FORM: Samaanay padama ko Sowal no Kawas to isaka cecayay hahekalan a mapasimalay a Krisciyang?
Samaanay padama ko Sowal no Kawas to isaka cecayay hahekalan a mapasimalay a Krisciyang?
S.PHON: samaanaj paɬ~ɮama ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u kawas to~u isaka ʦəʦajaj ħaħəkaɾan a mapasimaɾaj a krisʦijaŋ?
S.TRANSL: How did God's Word exert power in the first century?

S.FORM: Paliding no Efa ato Tamohong Mamidipot to Finawlan no Kawas
Paliding no Efa ato Tamohong Mamidipot to Finawlan no Kawas
S.PHON: paɾiɬ~ɮiŋ no~u əfa ato~u tamo~uħo~uŋ mamiɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u finawɾan no~u kawas
S.TRANSL: Chariots and a Crown Safeguard You

S.FORM: Kawra, saan ko roma tamdaw milicay: "Miki'ok ko Kawas miliyaw pa'orip to tamdaw, o halafinayto a demak, hano pakaso'lin kiso to mamatoor Ningra koniya sowal hani?
Kawra, saan ko roma tamdaw milicay: "Miki'ok ko Kawas miliyaw pa'orip to tamdaw, o halafinayto a demak, hano pakaso'lin kiso to mamatoor Ningra koniya sowal hani?
S.PHON: kawra, saan ko~u ro~uma tamɬ~ɮaw miɾiʦaj: "mikiʡo~uk ko~u kawas miɾijaw paʡo~urip to~u tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u ħaɾafinajto~u a ɬ~ɮəmak, ħano~u pakaso~uʡɾin kiso~u to~u mamato~uo~ur niŋra ko~unija so~uwaɾ ħani?
S.TRANSL: Still, how would you respond if asked for evidence that resurrection promises are valid many years or even centuries after they were made?

S.FORM: Mipalal ko Kawas
Mipalal ko Kawas
S.PHON: mipaɾaɾ ko~u kawas
S.TRANSL: He Will Call

S.FORM: O matemeray no Kawas ko faloco' nangra, saka makahi a misawad to singdi, miliyas to loma' nangra.
O matemeray no Kawas ko faloco' nangra, saka makahi a misawad to singdi, miliyas to loma' nangra.
S.PHON: o~u matəməraj no~u kawas ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ naŋra, saka makaħi a misawaɬ~ɮ to~u siŋɬ~ɮi, miɾijas to~u ɾo~umaʡ naŋra.
S.TRANSL: They were the ones "whose spirit the true God had stirred" to leave behind the security of their homes and businesses.

S.FORM: Mihodop ci Yihofaan, Oya Pafeliay to Pasalat a Kawas
Mihodop ci Yihofaan, Oya Pafeliay to Pasalat a Kawas
S.PHON: miħo~uɬ~ɮo~up ʦi jiħo~ufaan, o~uja pafəɾiaj to~u pasaɾat a kawas
S.TRANSL: Serve Jehovah, the God of Freedom

S.FORM: Kawra, misadak kita to 'icel, nga' matongal ko kalawidang to Kawas ato malaheci ko sakalidong no niyah a tayal.
Kawra, misadak kita to 'icel, nga' matongal ko kalawidang to Kawas ato malaheci ko sakalidong no niyah a tayal.
S.PHON: kawra, misaɬ~ɮak kita to~u ʡiʦəɾ, ŋaʡ mato~uŋaɾ ko~u kaɾawiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u kawas ato~u maɾaħəʦi ko~u sakaɾiɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u nijaħ a tajaɾ.
S.TRANSL: But maintaining that friendship and working out your own salvation will require effort.

S.FORM: Pahatatanamen cangra mitoor to sakayat no Kimad no Kawas ato kasakopang a matayal.
Pahatatanamen cangra mitoor to sakayat no Kimad no Kawas ato kasakopang a matayal.
S.PHON: paħatatanamən ʦaŋra mito~uo~ur to~u sakajat no~u kimaɬ~ɮ no~u kawas ato~u kasako~upaŋ a matajaɾ.
S.TRANSL: Train them to rely primarily on God's Word and on direction given through Jehovah's congregation.

S.FORM: Isaka 1919 miheca, midemakay to patirengay demak ci Yis, mitedal to mala koliay i Ta'angayay Papilon a tamdaw no Kawas, palowad to kasakopang no Krisciyang.
Isaka 1919 miheca, midemakay to patirengay demak ci Yis, mitedal to mala koliay i Ta'angayay Papilon a tamdaw no Kawas, palowad to kasakopang no Krisciyang.
S.PHON: isaka **** miħəʦa, miɬ~ɮəmakaj to~u patirəŋaj ɬ~ɮəmak ʦi jis, mitəɬ~ɮaɾ to~u maɾa ko~uɾiaj i taʡaŋajaj papiɾo~un a tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kawas, paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u kasako~upaŋ no~u krisʦijaŋ.
S.TRANSL: In modern times, Jesus' building work involved liberating true worshippers from Babylon the Great and restoring the Christian congregation in 1919.

S.FORM: Hato kimad no Kawas,
Hato kimad no Kawas,
S.PHON: ħato~u kimaɬ~ɮ no~u kawas,
S.TRANSL: Ours is a message so bright.

S.FORM: Sakairaaw kono Kawas a harateng, hano cowa ko madoloay hani?
Sakairaaw kono Kawas a harateng, hano cowa ko madoloay hani?
S.PHON: sakairaaw ko~uno~u kawas a ħaratəŋ, ħano~u ʦo~uwa ko~u maɬ~ɮo~uɾo~uaj ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why is it challenging to reject the world's thinking in favor of Jehovah's?

S.FORM: Ako'iden ita, Kawas Yihofa,
Ako'iden ita, Kawas Yihofa,
S.PHON: ako~uʡiɬ~ɮən ita, kawas jiħo~ufa,
S.TRANSL: How can I repay you, what gift can I give

S.FORM: Saparihaday no Kawas Ikakaay no Niharatengan no Tamdaw
Saparihaday no Kawas Ikakaay no Niharatengan no Tamdaw
S.PHON: sapariħaɬ~ɮaj no~u kawas ikakaaj no~u niħaratəŋan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw
S.TRANSL: "The Peace of God... Surpasses All Understanding"

S.FORM: Tadi'ecen ko Kawas, O Nono', O 'Icel
Tadi'ecen ko Kawas, O Nono', O 'Icel
S.PHON: taɬ~ɮiʡəʦən ko~u kawas, o~u no~uno~uʡ, o~u ʡiʦəɾ
S.TRANSL: Our Strength, Our Hope, Our Confidence

S.FORM: O Kimad no Kawas nga'ayay patinakoen to epah.
O Kimad no Kawas nga'ayay patinakoen to epah.
S.PHON: o~u kimaɬ~ɮ no~u kawas ŋaʡajaj patinako~uən to~u əpaħ.
S.TRANSL: Further, Jehovah's words are also like wine. In what way?

S.FORM: Ci'icelay Kawas.
Ci'icelay Kawas.
S.PHON: ʦiʡiʦəɾaj kawas.
S.TRANSL: And this all men must know.

S.FORM: Mafana'ay ko Kawas to roray ita, masayalayto ko faloco'.
Mafana'ay ko Kawas to roray ita, masayalayto ko faloco'.
S.PHON: mafanaʡaj ko~u kawas to~u ro~uraj ita, masajaɾajto~u ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ.
S.TRANSL: Comfort from knowing that God feels for us when we suffer.

S.FORM: Miemin to toki ko kaemangay tamdaw to demak no Kawas mamananam ko manan?
Miemin to toki ko kaemangay tamdaw to demak no Kawas mamananam ko manan?
S.PHON: miəmin to~u to~uki ko~u kaəmaŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw to~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u kawas mamananam ko~u manan?
S.TRANSL: What does sharing in full-time service teach a young person?

S.FORM: Nolitengan a finawlan no Kawas iraay ko maanan a toki patafang to niyah padama to tao hani?
Nolitengan a finawlan no Kawas iraay ko maanan a toki patafang to niyah padama to tao hani?
S.PHON: no~uɾitəŋan a finawɾan no~u kawas iraaj ko~u maanan a to~uki patafaŋ to~u nijaħ paɬ~ɮama to~u tao~u ħani?
S.TRANSL: What are some of the needs that are generally cared for by willing men in the congregation today?

S.FORM: Mahecad o hacol pahaleday to tamdaw, palahad to 'engaenga, o Kimad no Kawas patanektekay to no'adingoan no mita.
Mahecad o hacol pahaleday to tamdaw, palahad to 'engaenga, o Kimad no Kawas patanektekay to no'adingoan no mita.
S.PHON: maħəʦaɬ~ɮ o~u ħaʦo~uɾ paħaɾəɬ~ɮaj to~u tamɬ~ɮaw, paɾaħaɬ~ɮ to~u ʡəŋaəŋa, o~u kimaɬ~ɮ no~u kawas patanəktəkaj to~u no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan no~u mita.
S.TRANSL: Also, just as milk strengthens us and helps children to grow, Jehovah's nourishing words strengthen us and help us to grow spiritually.

S.FORM: Ci Yihofa o lipahakay a Kawas, mitokelay cingra mahemek ko midokoay Cingranan a tamdaw.
Ci Yihofa o lipahakay a Kawas, mitokelay cingra mahemek ko midokoay Cingranan a tamdaw.
S.PHON: ʦi jiħo~ufa o~u ɾipaħakaj a kawas, mito~ukəɾaj ʦiŋra maħəmək ko~u miɬ~ɮo~uko~uaj ʦiŋranan a tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: Jehovah is a happy God who wants his servants to be happy.

S.FORM: Ti'eren ita ko 'icel no Kawas.
Ti'eren ita ko 'icel no Kawas.
S.PHON: tiʡərən ita ko~u ʡiʦəɾ no~u kawas.
S.TRANSL: With Jehovah, they take their stand against him.

S.FORM: Palahaden ko olah to kimad no Kawas hano o masakalimelaan aki?
Palahaden ko olah to kimad no Kawas hano o masakalimelaan aki?
S.PHON: paɾaħaɬ~ɮən ko~u o~uɾaħ to~u kimaɬ~ɮ no~u kawas ħano~u o~u masakaɾiməɾaan aki?
S.TRANSL: Why is it important that we grow to love God's laws?

S.FORM: Samaan ko demak iso, nga' mahecad ci Tafitian makayat no Kimad no Kawas?
Samaan ko demak iso, nga' mahecad ci Tafitian makayat no Kimad no Kawas?
S.PHON: samaan ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak iso~u, ŋaʡ maħəʦaɬ~ɮ ʦi tafitian makajat no~u kimaɬ~ɮ no~u kawas?
S.TRANSL: How can you allow God's Word to mold you, as it did David?

S.FORM: O kapot no Kawas matayal paihkalay to hinalafangay.
O kapot no Kawas matayal paihkalay to hinalafangay.
S.PHON: o~u kapo~ut no~u kawas matajaɾ paiħkaɾaj to~u ħinaɾafaŋaj.
S.TRANSL: God's fellow workers are noted for practicing hospitality.

S.FORM: O sowal no mirienangay a salikaka: "O sata'angayay a sapalemed no Kawas a taykay koninian."
O sowal no mirienangay a salikaka: "O sata'angayay a sapalemed no Kawas a taykay koninian."
S.PHON: o~u so~uwaɾ no~u miriənaŋaj a saɾikaka: "o~u sataʡaŋajaj a sapaɾəməɬ~ɮ no~u kawas a tajkaj ko~uninian."
S.TRANSL: Many brothers who were present called this meeting "the most blessed convention they had ever attended."

S.FORM: Samanen "mikapotay to Kawas" ci Nowa, caay picawma' to cowa kangodo to Kawas a tamdaw.
Samanen "mikapotay to Kawas" ci Nowa, caay picawma' to cowa kangodo to Kawas a tamdaw.
S.PHON: samanən "mikapo~utaj to~u kawas" ʦi no~uwa, ʦaaj piʦawmaʡ to~u ʦo~uwa kaŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u to~u kawas a tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: For instance, because Noah "walked with the true God," he did not walk, or associate, with the ungodly.

S.FORM: Tada cecayay a Kawas.
Tada cecayay a Kawas.
S.PHON: taɬ~ɮa ʦəʦajaj a kawas.
S.TRANSL: We have no other God but you.

S.FORM: Hano pakihater sa ko Kawas to roray i hekal hani?
Hano pakihater sa ko Kawas to roray i hekal hani?
S.PHON: ħano~u pakiħatər sa ko~u kawas to~u ro~uraj i ħəkaɾ ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why does God allow suffering?

S.FORM: O sapafeli no Kawas a sapatefoc, misamaanay hano o sakalimelaan a sapatelong hani?
O sapafeli no Kawas a sapatefoc, misamaanay hano o sakalimelaan a sapatelong hani?
S.PHON: o~u sapafəɾi no~u kawas a sapatəfo~uʦ, misamaanaj ħano~u o~u sakaɾiməɾaan a sapatəɾo~uŋ ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why is God's gift of the ransom through Jesus the best gift we could receive?

S.FORM: Anini sikawdan no Kawas misi'ayaway to manan a pasangaray a pakayraan?
Anini sikawdan no Kawas misi'ayaway to manan a pasangaray a pakayraan?
S.PHON: anini sikawɬ~ɮan no~u kawas misiʡajawaj to~u manan a pasaŋaraj a pakajraan?
S.TRANSL: What challenge faces God's people today?

S.FORM: O maolahay to payso a tamdaw, cowa pakahemek to Kawas.
O maolahay to payso a tamdaw, cowa pakahemek to Kawas.
S.PHON: o~u mao~uɾaħaj to~u pajso~u a tamɬ~ɮaw, ʦo~uwa pakaħəmək to~u kawas.
S.TRANSL: Those who love money cannot please God.

S.FORM: Mikitiniay i olah no Kawas a pirikec, o sapisalof Ningra kitaanan a pakayraan, mihaenay mahecad kita o konayi'ay a dita', micada to pisalof no Kawas.
Mikitiniay i olah no Kawas a pirikec, o sapisalof Ningra kitaanan a pakayraan, mihaenay mahecad kita o konayi'ay a dita', micada to pisalof no Kawas.
S.PHON: mikitiniaj i o~uɾaħ no~u kawas a pirikəʦ, o~u sapisaɾo~uf niŋra kitaanan a pakajraan, miħaənaj maħəʦaɬ~ɮ kita o~u ko~unajiʡaj a ɬ~ɮitaʡ, miʦaɬ~ɮa to~u pisaɾo~uf no~u kawas.
S.TRANSL: Loving discipline can be God's way of molding us, so let us remain malleable in his hands.

S.FORM: Nengnengen ko "Salicay no Mi'osiay Tamdaw".
Nengnengen ko "Salicay no Mi'osiay Tamdaw".
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋən ko~u "saɾiʦaj no~u miʡo~usiaj tamɬ~ɮaw".
S.TRANSL: See "Questions From Readers" in this issue.

S.FORM: Awaay ko pakariniay to karenec no faloco' i padama to tamdaw cipinang to so'linay kimad
Awaay ko pakariniay to karenec no faloco' i padama to tamdaw cipinang to so'linay kimad
S.PHON: awaaj ko~u pakariniaj to~u karənəʦ no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ i paɬ~ɮama to~u tamɬ~ɮaw ʦipinaŋ to~u so~uʡɾinaj kimaɬ~ɮ
S.TRANSL: Few things are more gratifying than helping appreciative individuals to grasp spiritual truths

S.FORM: O so'linay a kimad ko safaked to tatelecan
O so'linay a kimad ko safaked to tatelecan
S.PHON: o~u so~uʡɾinaj a kimaɬ~ɮ ko~u safakəɬ~ɮ to~u tatəɾəʦan

S.FORM: Midotim to ta'arawan ni Yis, wa pakalalok kitanan ciharateng to tao
Midotim to ta'arawan ni Yis, wa pakalalok kitanan ciharateng to tao
S.PHON: miɬ~ɮo~utim to~u taʡarawan ni jis, wa pakaɾaɾo~uk kitanan ʦiħaratəŋ to~u tao~u
S.TRANSL: Studying Jesus' example can motivate you

S.FORM: Kita o cecacecay tamdaw wa nga'ay mapakalalok
Kita o cecacecay tamdaw wa nga'ay mapakalalok
S.PHON: kita o~u ʦəʦaʦəʦaj tamɬ~ɮaw wa ŋaʡaj mapakaɾaɾo~uk
S.TRANSL: All of us can build up and encourage one another

Ciharatengay ci satan mikayhid kitaana malafoay a waywayan misatakalaway a waywayan misakawasay a 'icel

S.TRANSL: Satan tries to bait us with immorality, unhealthy pride, and the occult

S.FORM: Nengnengen ita ko tinakoan no cecay wama.
Nengnengen ita ko tinakoan no cecay wama.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋən ita ko~u tinako~uan no~u ʦəʦaj wama.

Misodod kita to tao o micowatay to sakarihaday
S.PHON: miso~uɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮ kita to~u tao~u o~u miʦo~uwataj to~u sakariħaɬ~ɮaj
S.TRANSL: When we are forgiving, we promote unity

S.FORM: Nengnengen ko cecay tinakoan.
Nengnengen ko cecay tinakoan.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋən ko~u ʦəʦaj tinako~uan.

S.FORM: Tala'ayaw a paihkal to sini'ada i tamdaw, wa paira to lipahak no mita
Tala'ayaw a paihkal to sini'ada i tamdaw, wa paira to lipahak no mita
S.PHON: taɾaʡajaw a paiħkaɾ to~u siniʡaɬ~ɮa i tamɬ~ɮaw, wa paira to~u ɾipaħak no~u mita
S.TRANSL: Take the initiative to display mercy, and see how much happiness results

Pakayni ci Cares Fiker salikaka, o nalifetan ningra nengnengen ko Mikecolay 1969.9.15, "Padadotoc a Mitosil Wa Ira ko Hemek."

S.FORM: Dipotan ni Yihofa ko so'linay pidoyongan caka manahol
Dipotan ni Yihofa ko so'linay pidoyongan caka manahol
S.PHON: ɬ~ɮipo~utan ni jiħo~ufa ko~u so~uʡɾinaj piɬ~ɮo~ujo~uŋan ʦaka manaħo~uɾ
S.TRANSL: Jehovah made every effort to keep pure worship clean

Nengnengen ita ko pina tinakoan.

Ci Apraham pinaay miheca a mitala ikor nga' mahofocay ko fofo ci Isau aci Yakop

Mitosil kita to kahacecay loma' i kilac, wa ira ko toki nangra tahatengil to nga'ayay lihaf no Hongti Kitakit

Hofoc han ko wawa, cowaho ka fana' to nga'ayay anca tatiihay, pasifana'en cangra

Nengnengen ita samanen ni Yihofa palahedaw toniya pades.

S.FORM: Ihkal mahapinang ita ko pikerid ni Kristo i saka 1 hahekalan a kasakopang
Ihkal mahapinang ita ko pikerid ni Kristo i saka 1 hahekalan a kasakopang
S.PHON: iħkaɾ maħapinaŋ ita ko~u pikəriɬ~ɮ ni kristo~u i saka * ħaħəkaɾan a kasako~upaŋ

Nengnengen haca ita ko cecay tinakoan, o fafahiyan wawa no kakitaan ci Yifta, o misaaliay to sapakalalok cingra.

O parihadayay a nga'ayay ratoh ko hacokap

Nengnengen ko 4 to 8 fatac

Nengnengen ko satapangan coka.

Mameten ko toki pasifana'en ko wawa to kimad
S.PHON: mamətən ko~u to~uki pasifanaʡən ko~u wawa to~u kimaɬ~ɮ

2. Misamaanay hano cowa ka lecad ko cengel no efa?

Nengnengen ko tinakoan no cecay mararamoday, ci Filip aci Mari maedeng 25 a miheca matayalay i Pitil.

Makahi kita a mirienang to tayal no likakawa no Kawas, wa adihay ko faelohay a widang
S.PHON: makaħi kita a miriənaŋ to~u tajaɾ no~u ɾikakawa no~u kawas, wa aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u faəɾo~uħaj a wiɬ~ɮaŋ

Wa nga'ay kita mikitini masanga'ay a maamaan mafana' to capeling no Kawas a mapa'icel ko paso'linay a faloco'

Dotoc, nengnengen ita misamaan a mitafo to lipahak, honga' matongal ko hemek.

Nengnengen ko 1988 Miheca a Ningkang no Misawacayay Tamdaw ni Yihofa, 101 to 102 fiedac.

Milengo toniya cecacecay a pakayraan i, wa nengnengen ita ko maanan a sapaini, nga'ay padama kitaanan mitoor to limo'ot ni Yis a midemak.

S.TRANSL: It would be good if the elders also verified that your medical directive card is updated.

S.FORM: O sasasinanoten no mararamoday i, o sa'osi nangra mamahemek ko Kawas hokira, hanaca ira ko tingalaway a faloco' ika'ayaw no Kawas.
O sasasinanoten no mararamoday i, o sa'osi nangra mamahemek ko Kawas hokira, hanaca ira ko tingalaway a faloco' ika'ayaw no Kawas.
S.PHON: o~u sasasinano~utən no~u mararamo~uɬ~ɮaj i, o~u saʡo~usi naŋra mamaħəmək ko~u kawas ħo~ukira, ħanaʦa ira ko~u tiŋaɾawaj a faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ikaʡajaw no~u kawas.
S.TRANSL: They should make their decision as a couple interested in pleasing God and maintaining a clean conscience before him.

S.FORM: Ano nengnengen hato o Kawas ko mipadesay ci Yopuan.

S.TRANSL: Satan accomplished this in a way that made it appear as if God himself had been the cause of Job's troubles.

S.TRANSL: Like Martha, you can be confident about the resurrection

O CECAY kaemangay fafahiyan ci Maliya, nengnengen no wama wina cingra malacafay to mamicada to ino' a tomireng.

O cecay pakayraan a patahekal to olah ato hinapalada'ay i, ano ira ko saali no salikaka padangen cangra

S.TRANSL: To illustrate, consider a lesson we can learn from the Israelites' conquest of the Promised Land and from David's encounter with Goliath.

Ci Yihofa O 'Icel no Mita

Cowa ka fana' kami to faloco' iso, kawra o dadamaen ni Yihofa kiso.
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa ka fanaʡ kami to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ iso~u, kawra o~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮamaən ni jiħo~ufa kiso~u.
S.TRANSL: We can't understand exactly how you feel, but Jehovah does and will keep raising you up.

S.FORM: Mata'lifto kora pades i, ciepocayho ci Yopuan koya sapalimo'ot ni Yihofa han?
Mata'lifto kora pades i, ciepocayho ci Yopuan koya sapalimo'ot ni Yihofa han?

S.TRANSL: Jehovah's counsel would continue to benefit Job even after his trials were over.; How would Jehovah's counsel benefit Job long after his trials?

S.FORM: Midemakay ci Yihofa to maanan parihaday to finawlan Ningra hani?
Midemakay ci Yihofa to maanan parihaday to finawlan Ningra hani?
S.PHON: miɬ~ɮəmakaj ʦi jiħo~ufa to~u maanan pariħaɬ~ɮaj to~u finawɾan niŋra ħani?
S.TRANSL: How did Jehovah make his people feel safe and secure?

S.FORM: Pakayni i demak ni Mosi, samanay ko harateng ni Yihofa hani?
Pakayni i demak ni Mosi, samanay ko harateng ni Yihofa hani?
S.PHON: pakajni i ɬ~ɮəmak ni mo~usi, samanaj ko~u ħaratəŋ ni jiħo~ufa ħani?
S.TRANSL: How did Jehovah react to Moses' actions?

S.FORM: Misamaanay hano pakaso'lin kita, mafana'ay ci Yihofa to misaaliay to sahinom ko mararomay a tamdaw?
Misamaanay hano pakaso'lin kita, mafana'ay ci Yihofa to misaaliay to sahinom ko mararomay a tamdaw?
S.PHON: misamaanaj ħano~u pakaso~uʡɾin kita, mafanaʡaj ʦi jiħo~ufa to~u misaaɾiaj to~u saħino~um ko~u mararo~umaj a tamɬ~ɮaw?

S.FORM: Samaan ko demak ita nga' "cipinang" to sapakahemek to faloco' ni Yihofa a pakayraan?
Samaan ko demak ita nga' "cipinang" to sapakahemek to faloco' ni Yihofa a pakayraan?

S.TRANSL: What will enable us to "understand everything" we need to know to please our heavenly Father?

S.FORM: Caho ka masanga' ci Atam aci Ifa i, patahekalayto ci Yihofa to olah i tamdamdaw.
Caho ka masanga' ci Atam aci Ifa i, patahekalayto ci Yihofa to olah i tamdamdaw.
S.PHON: ʦaħo~u ka masaŋaʡ ʦi atam aʦi ifa i, pataħəkaɾajto~u ʦi jiħo~ufa to~u o~uɾaħ i tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: Jehovah showed love for humans even before he created Adam and Eve.

S.FORM: Miki'okan ni Yihofa ci Mosi, wa mitengil ko malohemay malitengay no Israil to sowal ningra.
Miki'okan ni Yihofa ci Mosi, wa mitengil ko malohemay malitengay no Israil to sowal ningra.
S.PHON: mikiʡo~ukan ni jiħo~ufa ʦi mo~usi, wa mitəŋiɾ ko~u maɾo~uħəmaj maɾitəŋaj no~u israiɾ to~u so~uwaɾ niŋra.
S.TRANSL: He also promised: The elders of Israel "will certainly listen to your voice."

S.TRANSL: Keep close in mind that Jehovah always gives recognition to his faithful servants and that he often rewards them in unexpected ways.

Tengilen ita ko limo'ot, wa nga'ay paso'lin tatano sida'itay ko sapicada ni Yihofa kitaanan.

Anini, o finawlan ni Yihofa mahemekay pakayni i ngangan ni Yis mihadidi to sapalak anca sapalifet.

S.TRANSL: In our time, Jehovah's people also endure with joy when they suffer in behalf of Jesus' name or when they face difficult trials.

Caka halafin, o wina ato safa ako malo Misawacayay Tamdaw ni Yihofa, tada kahemekanto.

Itiniay i paro no kakarayan a Misawacayay Tamdaw ni Yihofa, mitodongay ci Yisan patahekal to so'linay a olah.

S.FORM: Malawidang ni Yihofa.
Malawidang ni Yihofa.
S.PHON: maɾawiɬ~ɮaŋ ni jiħo~ufa.
S.TRANSL: Are joining us in all the earth.

S.FORM: Hay, mihinoman ni Yihofa ko adadaay anca mararomay ko faloco' a tamdaw.
Hay, mihinoman ni Yihofa ko adadaay anca mararomay ko faloco' a tamdaw.

S.TRANSL: Yes, Jehovah cares for those who are having problems, whether physical or emotional.

S.FORM: Samaan a malo 'hafay' iso ci Yihofa?
Samaan a malo 'hafay' iso ci Yihofa?
S.PHON: samaan a maɾo~u ʡħafajʡ iso~u ʦi jiħo~ufa?
S.TRANSL: make Jehovah your "portion"?

S.FORM: Wa nga'ayho kita misamocek i sapalifon ni Yihofa, miki'okay Cingra to papafelien Ningra ko padotocay makorac ato madimadiay a tamdaw.
Wa nga'ayho kita misamocek i sapalifon ni Yihofa, miki'okay Cingra to papafelien Ningra ko padotocay makorac ato madimadiay a tamdaw.
S.PHON: wa ŋaʡajħo~u kita misamo~uʦək i sapaɾifo~un ni jiħo~ufa, mikiʡo~ukaj ʦiŋra to~u papafəɾiən niŋra ko~u paɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦaj mako~uraʦ ato~u maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮiaj a tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: They also focus 'their eyes of the heart' on the wonderful blessings that God holds out for those who strive to remain pure and to serve him loyally.

S.FORM: O ciraramodayto a Krisciyang mamisamaan a midopo to satadamaanay noka pikowan ni Yihofa hani?
O ciraramodayto a Krisciyang mamisamaan a midopo to satadamaanay noka pikowan ni Yihofa hani?
S.PHON: o~u ʦiraramo~uɬ~ɮajto~u a krisʦijaŋ mamisamaan a miɬ~ɮo~upo~u to~u sataɬ~ɮamaanaj no~uka piko~uwan ni jiħo~ufa ħani?
S.TRANSL: What are some ways in which married couples can show that they uphold Jehovah's sovereignty?

S.FORM: Samaanay ko pinengneng ni Yihofa to mitakaway?
Samaanay ko pinengneng ni Yihofa to mitakaway?
S.PHON: samaanaj ko~u pinəŋnəŋ ni jiħo~ufa to~u mitakawaj?
S.TRANSL: How does Jehovah view any kind of stealing?

S.FORM: Misamaanay hano mitokel ci Yihofa kitaanan, patafang to kalimelaan a dafong no niyah hani?
Misamaanay hano mitokel ci Yihofa kitaanan, patafang to kalimelaan a dafong no niyah hani?
S.PHON: misamaanaj ħano~u mito~ukəɾ ʦi jiħo~ufa kitaanan, patafaŋ to~u kaɾiməɾaan a ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ no~u nijaħ ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why does Jehovah expect us to use our valuable things to give back to him?

S.FORM: Pakaynian ni Yihofa to madimadiay citanengay koli mikayat kita, malifokay no mita ko manan a epoc hani?
Pakaynian ni Yihofa to madimadiay citanengay koli mikayat kita, malifokay no mita ko manan a epoc hani?
S.PHON: pakajnian ni jiħo~ufa to~u maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮiaj ʦitanəŋaj ko~uɾi mikajat kita, maɾifo~ukaj no~u mita ko~u manan a əpo~uʦ ħani?
S.TRANSL: How do we benefit from Jehovah's instruction provided by means of "the faithful steward"?

S.FORM: Miocor ci Yihofa
Miocor ci Yihofa
S.PHON: mio~uʦo~ur ʦi jiħo~ufa
S.TRANSL: Faithful to their commission,

S.FORM: Pafelian ni Yihofa ko Israil tamdaw to pasalat, kawra samaanay ko waywayan nangra hani?
Pafelian ni Yihofa ko Israil tamdaw to pasalat, kawra samaanay ko waywayan nangra hani?
S.PHON: pafəɾian ni jiħo~ufa ko~u israiɾ tamɬ~ɮaw to~u pasaɾat, kawra samaanaj ko~u wajwajan naŋra ħani?
S.TRANSL: How did the Israelites show a lack of appreciation for the freedom that Jehovah gave them?

S.FORM: Pakalalokan ni Yihofa ko nolitengan a finawlan to maanan hani?
Pakalalokan ni Yihofa ko nolitengan a finawlan to maanan hani?
S.PHON: pakaɾaɾo~ukan ni jiħo~ufa ko~u no~uɾitəŋan a finawɾan to~u maanan ħani?
S.TRANSL: What encouragement did Jehovah give to his ancient people?

S.FORM: Matira ci Solomonan, o mamisaali kita to sapadama ni Yihofa nganga'ay a patahekal to timolo, milaheci to demak.
Matira ci Solomonan, o mamisaali kita to sapadama ni Yihofa nganga'ay a patahekal to timolo, milaheci to demak.
S.PHON: matira ʦi so~uɾo~umo~unan, o~u mamisaaɾi kita to~u sapaɬ~ɮama ni jiħo~ufa ŋaŋaʡaj a pataħəkaɾ to~u timo~uɾo~u, miɾaħəʦi to~u ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: Like Solomon, we need help from Jehovah to be courageous and complete the work.

S.FORM: Ci Yihofa!
Ci Yihofa!
S.PHON: ʦi jiħo~ufa!
S.TRANSL: He satisfies.

S.FORM: Samaanay a padama ci Yihofa to matoleday a finawlan Ningra?
Samaanay a padama ci Yihofa to matoleday a finawlan Ningra?
S.PHON: samaanaj a paɬ~ɮama ʦi jiħo~ufa to~u mato~uɾəɬ~ɮaj a finawɾan niŋra?
S.TRANSL: How did Jehovah respond to the inactivity of his people?

S.FORM: Samaanen ita paihkal to iraay ko ni Yihofa a harateng no niyah, caka midemak to pakapolinay to tao a demak hani?
Samaanen ita paihkal to iraay ko ni Yihofa a harateng no niyah, caka midemak to pakapolinay to tao a demak hani?
S.PHON: samaanən ita paiħkaɾ to~u iraaj ko~u ni jiħo~ufa a ħaratəŋ no~u nijaħ, ʦaka miɬ~ɮəmak to~u pakapo~uɾinaj to~u tao~u a ɬ~ɮəmak ħani?
S.TRANSL: How might we show that we share Jehovah's view of stumbling others?

S.FORM: Mikitini picada ni Yihofa ci Ataman aci Ifaan a pakayraan, wa mananam ita to sasamaan sini'ada to tamdaw.
Mikitini picada ni Yihofa ci Ataman aci Ifaan a pakayraan, wa mananam ita to sasamaan sini'ada to tamdaw.
S.PHON: mikitini piʦaɬ~ɮa ni jiħo~ufa ʦi ataman aʦi ifaan a pakajraan, wa mananam ita to~u sasamaan siniʡaɬ~ɮa to~u tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: We find an outstanding example of kindness in what Jehovah did for Adam and Eve.

S.FORM: Iraay ko manan demakan to ikakaay ko nika masaka limelaan to kalala'ed iso aci Yihofa han?
Iraay ko manan demakan to ikakaay ko nika masaka limelaan to kalala'ed iso aci Yihofa han?
S.PHON: iraaj ko~u manan ɬ~ɮəmakan to~u ikakaaj ko~u nika masaka ɾiməɾaan to~u kaɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮ iso~u aʦi jiħo~ufa ħan?
S.TRANSL: Is there anything to which you give more importance than your relationship with Jehovah?

S.FORM: Misamaanay hano saalien ni Yihofa ko finawlan pasasiyor pasayra Cingranan?
Misamaanay hano saalien ni Yihofa ko finawlan pasasiyor pasayra Cingranan?
S.PHON: misamaanaj ħano~u saaɾiən ni jiħo~ufa ko~u finawɾan pasasijo~ur pasajra ʦiŋranan?
S.TRANSL: Why did Jehovah ask his people to 'return to him'?

S.FORM: O roma i, nolitengan a finawlan ni Yihofa, tano dafong ato payci midama to ci'inorongay i pidoyongan a tamdaw.
O roma i, nolitengan a finawlan ni Yihofa, tano dafong ato payci midama to ci'inorongay i pidoyongan a tamdaw.
S.PHON: o~u ro~uma i, no~uɾitəŋan a finawɾan ni jiħo~ufa, tano~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ ato~u pajʦi miɬ~ɮama to~u ʦiʡino~uro~uŋaj i piɬ~ɮo~ujo~uŋan a tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: In other cases, Jehovah's people gave financial support to those taking the lead in the work.

S.FORM: Anini, cowa ko mamitala kita ci Yisan ato Wama ningra ci Yihofa, patado kitanan midemak to kafaheka'an.
Anini, cowa ko mamitala kita ci Yisan ato Wama ningra ci Yihofa, patado kitanan midemak to kafaheka'an.
S.PHON: anini, ʦo~uwa ko~u mamitaɾa kita ʦi jisan ato~u wama niŋra ʦi jiħo~ufa, pataɬ~ɮo~u kitanan miɬ~ɮəmak to~u kafaħəkaʡan.
S.TRANSL: We have no basis to expect that Jesus or his Father will now perform such a miracle for us.

S.FORM: Oniya tatosaay fa'inayan pasowalay tamiyanan, o Misawacayay Tamdaw ni Yihofa wa ira ko taykay i Winnipe, itiraay ko fafahiyan kaka ako ci Aersi.
Oniya tatosaay fa'inayan pasowalay tamiyanan, o Misawacayay Tamdaw ni Yihofa wa ira ko taykay i Winnipe, itiraay ko fafahiyan kaka ako ci Aersi.
S.PHON: o~unija tato~usaaj faʡinajan paso~uwaɾaj tamijanan, o~u misawaʦajaj tamɬ~ɮaw ni jiħo~ufa wa ira ko~u tajkaj i winnipə, itiraaj ko~u fafaħijan kaka ako~u ʦi aərsi.
S.TRANSL: The two men also told us that the Witnesses would soon have a convention in Winnipeg, the city where my sister Elsie lived.

S.FORM: Ci Yihofa O Piki'adingan no Mita
Ci Yihofa O Piki'adingan no Mita
S.PHON: ʦi jiħo~ufa o~u pikiʡaɬ~ɮiŋan no~u mita
S.TRANSL: Jehovah Is Our Refuge

S.FORM: Ikor tono 4,000 miheca nga', mapatayto ko edengan Wawa ni Yihofa saki tamdamdaw.
Ikor tono 4,000 miheca nga', mapatayto ko edengan Wawa ni Yihofa saki tamdamdaw.
S.PHON: iko~ur to~uno~u *,*** miħəʦa ŋaʡ, mapatajto~u ko~u əɬ~ɮəŋan wawa ni jiħo~ufa saki tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: Then, some 4,000 years later, Jehovah at great personal cost sacrificed his only-begotten Son for the world of mankind.

S.FORM: O sikawdan ni Yihofa ci Nowa itiniay i ciraraway a hekal ma'orip, itiya ci Nowa aca ato paro no loma' ko midokoay ci Yihofaan.
O sikawdan ni Yihofa ci Nowa itiniay i ciraraway a hekal ma'orip, itiya ci Nowa aca ato paro no loma' ko midokoay ci Yihofaan.
S.PHON: o~u sikawɬ~ɮan ni jiħo~ufa ʦi no~uwa itiniaj i ʦirarawaj a ħəkaɾ maʡo~urip, itija ʦi no~uwa aʦa ato~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ ko~u miɬ~ɮo~uko~uaj ʦi jiħo~ufaan.
S.TRANSL: Jehovah's servant Noah lived in an ungodly world where the only people who worshipped Jehovah were members of his family.

S.FORM: Micada to ino' wa milayap to lemed ni Yihofa, kawra wa mitamorong kiso to 'inorong, o manan aki?
Micada to ino' wa milayap to lemed ni Yihofa, kawra wa mitamorong kiso to 'inorong, o manan aki?
S.PHON: miʦaɬ~ɮa to~u ino~uʡ wa miɾajap to~u ɾəməɬ~ɮ ni jiħo~ufa, kawra wa mitamo~uro~uŋ kiso~u to~u ʡino~uro~uŋ, o~u manan aki?
S.TRANSL: Although baptism opens the door to many blessings, it also involves responsibility.

S.FORM: Samaanay ci Yihofa pakalalok to tamdaw?
Samaanay ci Yihofa pakalalok to tamdaw?
S.PHON: samaanaj ʦi jiħo~ufa pakaɾaɾo~uk to~u tamɬ~ɮaw?
S.TRANSL: How has Jehovah proved to be a God who gives encouragement?

S.FORM: Todongen ko Sida'itay Patadoay Miharateng a Yihofa
Todongen ko Sida'itay Patadoay Miharateng a Yihofa
S.PHON: to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋən ko~u siɬ~ɮaʡitaj pataɬ~ɮo~uaj miħaratəŋ a jiħo~ufa
S.TRANSL: Be Considerate and Kind in Imitation of Jehovah

S.FORM: Padamaay kiso to paro no loma' ato salikaka mikelec a mikotod to likakawa ni Yihofa han?
Padamaay kiso to paro no loma' ato salikaka mikelec a mikotod to likakawa ni Yihofa han?
S.PHON: paɬ~ɮamaaj kiso~u to~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ ato~u saɾikaka mikəɾəʦ a miko~uto~uɬ~ɮ to~u ɾikakawa ni jiħo~ufa ħan?
S.TRANSL: Are you helping your family and others to keep pace with Jehovah's organization?

S.FORM: Misamaanay hano padamaen ni Yihofa kita mihepol to raraw ato patay?
Misamaanay hano padamaen ni Yihofa kita mihepol to raraw ato patay?
S.PHON: misamaanaj ħano~u paɬ~ɮamaən ni jiħo~ufa kita miħəpo~uɾ to~u raraw ato~u pataj?
S.TRANSL: For what purpose have we been set free?

S.FORM: Pakaso'linay kita, cowa ko pisalimla aca ni Yihofa to mihodopay Cingranan a tamdaw, hanaca maolahay cangranan.
Pakaso'linay kita, cowa ko pisalimla aca ni Yihofa to mihodopay Cingranan a tamdaw, hanaca maolahay cangranan.
S.PHON: pakaso~uʡɾinaj kita, ʦo~uwa ko~u pisaɾimɾa aʦa ni jiħo~ufa to~u miħo~uɬ~ɮo~upaj ʦiŋranan a tamɬ~ɮaw, ħanaʦa mao~uɾaħaj ʦaŋranan.
S.TRANSL: * God's Word promises concerning those pursuing pure worship: "As a mighty One, he will save.

S.FORM: Pahemeken ita ci Yihofa!
Pahemeken ita ci Yihofa!
S.PHON: paħəməkən ita ʦi jiħo~ufa!
S.TRANSL: Come let us praise him with joy and with zeal!

S.FORM: O pirikec ni Yihofa samaan padama kitanan ma'orip i lakoing?
O pirikec ni Yihofa samaan padama kitanan ma'orip i lakoing?
S.PHON: o~u pirikəʦ ni jiħo~ufa samaan paɬ~ɮama kitanan maʡo~urip i ɾako~uiŋ?
S.TRANSL: We can view discipline as preparing us for what?

S.FORM: Cowa ka hecad ko hinapalada'ay, ira ko cowa pisateked a capeling paihkalay to pakaso'linay kita to sanga'ayay ko demak ni Yihofa.
Cowa ka hecad ko hinapalada'ay, ira ko cowa pisateked a capeling paihkalay to pakaso'linay kita to sanga'ayay ko demak ni Yihofa.
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa ka ħəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u ħinapaɾaɬ~ɮaʡaj, ira ko~u ʦo~uwa pisatəkəɬ~ɮ a ʦapəɾiŋ paiħkaɾaj to~u pakaso~uʡɾinaj kita to~u saŋaʡajaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak ni jiħo~ufa.
S.TRANSL: By being generous, we demonstrate our conviction that God's way of doing things is the best.

S.FORM: Miki'okay ci Yihofa wa pa'oripen Ningra koya pakaso'linay ko faloco' a moecelay tamdaw.
Miki'okay ci Yihofa wa pa'oripen Ningra koya pakaso'linay ko faloco' a moecelay tamdaw.
S.PHON: mikiʡo~ukaj ʦi jiħo~ufa wa paʡo~uripən niŋra ko~uja pakaso~uʡɾinaj ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ a mo~uəʦəɾaj tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: Jehovah extends his promise of life to any righteous person who displays faith and trust in Him.

S.FORM: Milongocay ci Yihofa to sasamaan ko demak no wama wina hani?
Milongocay ci Yihofa to sasamaan ko demak no wama wina hani?
S.PHON: miɾo~uŋo~uʦaj ʦi jiħo~ufa to~u sasamaan ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u wama wina ħani?
S.TRANSL: How does God help parents fulfill their responsibilities?

S.FORM: Samaanay ci Yihofa i lintad ni Yosuwa mikerid to finawlan Ningra?
Samaanay ci Yihofa i lintad ni Yosuwa mikerid to finawlan Ningra?
S.PHON: samaanaj ʦi jiħo~ufa i ɾintaɬ~ɮ ni jo~uso~u~uwa mikəriɬ~ɮ to~u finawɾan niŋra?
S.TRANSL: What trustworthy leadership was given to God's people in Joshua's day?

S.FORM: Nalifetan No Tamdaw, Palemeday ci Yihofa Tamiyanan
Nalifetan No Tamdaw, Palemeday ci Yihofa Tamiyanan
S.PHON: naɾifətan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, paɾəməɬ~ɮaj ʦi jiħo~ufa tamijanan
S.TRANSL: Life Story, "Jehovah Has Dealt Kindly" With Us

S.FORM: Maketer ci Yihofa ci Mosian aci Aronan iraay ko roma lalangian halatek.
Maketer ci Yihofa ci Mosian aci Aronan iraay ko roma lalangian halatek.
S.PHON: makətər ʦi jiħo~ufa ʦi mo~usian aʦi aro~unan iraaj ko~u ro~uma ɾaɾaŋian ħaɾatək.
S.TRANSL: There is another plausible explanation for Jehovah's anger with Moses as well as Aaron.

S.FORM: Samaanay ci Yihofa paca'of to satolon nangra hani?
Samaanay ci Yihofa paca'of to satolon nangra hani?
S.PHON: samaanaj ʦi jiħo~ufa paʦaʡo~uf to~u sato~uɾo~un naŋra ħani?
S.TRANSL: How did Jehovah respond to their prayer?

S.FORM: Wa kalikito ci Yihofa pakayni i Kitakit Ningra a mitedal to roray ita.
Wa kalikito ci Yihofa pakayni i Kitakit Ningra a mitedal to roray ita.
S.PHON: wa kaɾikito~u ʦi jiħo~ufa pakajni i kitakit niŋra a mitəɬ~ɮaɾ to~u ro~uraj ita.
S.TRANSL: Through his Kingdom, Jehovah will soon end the suffering of each individual.

S.FORM: Pakayni i Sarikec ni Mosi, samaanay mahapinang ita to salimlaan ni Yihofa ko finawlan Ningra hani?
Pakayni i Sarikec ni Mosi, samaanay mahapinang ita to salimlaan ni Yihofa ko finawlan Ningra hani?
S.PHON: pakajni i sarikəʦ ni mo~usi, samaanaj maħapinaŋ ita to~u saɾimɾaan ni jiħo~ufa ko~u finawɾan niŋra ħani?
S.TRANSL: What example from the Mosaic Law illustrates Jehovah's feelings toward his people?

S.FORM: Sasamaan kita pa'icel a micangacang to pihayda ni Yihofa a misa'osian hani?
Sasamaan kita pa'icel a micangacang to pihayda ni Yihofa a misa'osian hani?
S.PHON: sasamaan kita paʡiʦəɾ a miʦaŋaʦaŋ to~u piħajɬ~ɮa ni jiħo~ufa a misaʡo~usian ħani?
S.TRANSL: What will strengthen our resolve to seek Jehovah's recognition?

S.FORM: Wa nga'ay pakaso'linen ita ci Yihofa, o papadama Cingra kitanan.
Wa nga'ay pakaso'linen ita ci Yihofa, o papadama Cingra kitanan.
S.PHON: wa ŋaʡaj pakaso~uʡɾinən ita ʦi jiħo~ufa, o~u papaɬ~ɮama ʦiŋra kitanan.
S.TRANSL: We can have unwavering confidence that Jehovah will act in our behalf.

S.FORM: Hano mahapinang iso too sanga'ayay ko pikowan ni Yihofa?
Hano mahapinang iso too sanga'ayay ko pikowan ni Yihofa?
S.PHON: ħano~u maħapinaŋ iso~u to~uo~u saŋaʡajaj ko~u piko~uwan ni jiħo~ufa?
S.TRANSL: What touches your heart about Jehovah's way of ruling?

S.FORM: Hatini ko nika olah ni Yihofa kitanan, o kakaolahen ita Cingra, dofdofen ko limo'ot Ningra.
Hatini ko nika olah ni Yihofa kitanan, o kakaolahen ita Cingra, dofdofen ko limo'ot Ningra.
S.PHON: ħatini ko~u nika o~uɾaħ ni jiħo~ufa kitanan, o~u kakao~uɾaħən ita ʦiŋra, ɬ~ɮo~ufɬ~ɮo~ufən ko~u ɾimo~uʡo~ut niŋra.
S.TRANSL: Naturally, it is fitting that we respond to Jehovah's love by loving him in return and by obeying his commandments.

S.FORM: MISAWACAYAY Tamdaw ni Yihofa o lipahakay a tamdaw.
MISAWACAYAY Tamdaw ni Yihofa o lipahakay a tamdaw.
S.PHON: misawaʦajaj tamɬ~ɮaw ni jiħo~ufa o~u ɾipaħakaj a tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: JEHOVAH'S WITNESSES certainly are a happy people.

S.FORM: Licayen ko niyah: "O ka'orip ako paihekalay to so'linay kako mafana' ci Yihofa han?
Licayen ko niyah: "O ka'orip ako paihekalay to so'linay kako mafana' ci Yihofa han?
S.PHON: ɾiʦajən ko~u nijaħ: "o~u kaʡo~urip ako~u paiħəkaɾaj to~u so~uʡɾinaj kako~u mafanaʡ ʦi jiħo~ufa ħan?
S.TRANSL: Ask yourself: 'Does my way of life indicate that I truly know Jehovah?

S.FORM: Samaan ci Yihofa padama to mararaway a tamdaw hani?
Samaan ci Yihofa padama to mararaway a tamdaw hani?
S.PHON: samaan ʦi jiħo~ufa paɬ~ɮama to~u mararawaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ħani?
S.TRANSL: Even after we take a false step, how can Jehovah help us?

S.FORM: So'lin cowa ko malefotay kita, kawra makahiay ci Yihofa aci Yis micada kitaanan, mihaenay, cowa ko nganga'ay kita mapili' to tao.
So'lin cowa ko malefotay kita, kawra makahiay ci Yihofa aci Yis micada kitaanan, mihaenay, cowa ko nganga'ay kita mapili' to tao.
S.PHON: so~uʡɾin ʦo~uwa ko~u maɾəfo~utaj kita, kawra makaħiaj ʦi jiħo~ufa aʦi jis miʦaɬ~ɮa kitaanan, miħaənaj, ʦo~uwa ko~u ŋaŋaʡaj kita mapiɾiʡ to~u tao~u.
S.TRANSL: Since Jesus has kindly accepted us, as imperfect as we are, it should be unthinkable for us to reject anyone else!

S.FORM: O olah ni Yihofa i takowanan koni, sapadama no malohemay malitengay wa haen minengneng kiso han?
O olah ni Yihofa i takowanan koni, sapadama no malohemay malitengay wa haen minengneng kiso han?
S.PHON: o~u o~uɾaħ ni jiħo~ufa i tako~uwanan ko~uni, sapaɬ~ɮama no~u maɾo~uħəmaj maɾitəŋaj wa ħaən minəŋnəŋ kiso~u ħan?
S.TRANSL: Do you view such help as an expression of Jehovah's love for you?

S.FORM: Micada to ino'palifokay to sapalemed ni Yihofa tisowanan, kawra oha mamitamorong kiso to 'inorong.
Micada to ino'palifokay to sapalemed ni Yihofa tisowanan, kawra oha mamitamorong kiso to 'inorong.
S.PHON: miʦaɬ~ɮa to~u ino~uʡpaɾifo~ukaj to~u sapaɾəməɬ~ɮ ni jiħo~ufa tiso~uwanan, kawra o~uħa mamitamo~uro~uŋ kiso~u to~u ʡino~uro~uŋ.
S.TRANSL: Baptism opens the door to many blessings; it also involves responsibility.

S.FORM: Papitatiwan ni Yihofa ci Mosi to cokor, miseti' to fakeloh no Horip a lotok, powal sanayto ko nanom nai fakeloh.
Papitatiwan ni Yihofa ci Mosi to cokor, miseti' to fakeloh no Horip a lotok, powal sanayto ko nanom nai fakeloh.
