S.PHON: papitatiwan ni jiħo~ufa ʦi mo~usi to~u ʦo~uko~ur, misətiʡ to~u fakəɾo~uħ no~u ħo~urip a ɾo~uto~uk, po~uwaɾ sanajto~u ko~u nano~um nai fakəɾo~uħ.
S.TRANSL: He was to take his rod and strike the rock in Horeb, and then water would come gushing out.

S.FORM: To ngangan ni Yihofa.
To ngangan ni Yihofa.
S.PHON: to~u ŋaŋan ni jiħo~ufa.
S.TRANSL: Bearing witness to his fame.; Lifts therefrom reproach and shame.

S.FORM: Itiniay i kapalitan pacekiw ko Misawacayay Tamdaw ni Yihofa to mapalitay a tamdaw. O sapa'araw koniya coka
Itiniay i kapalitan pacekiw ko Misawacayay Tamdaw ni Yihofa to mapalitay a tamdaw. O sapa'araw koniya coka
S.PHON: itiniaj i kapaɾitan paʦəkiw ko~u misawaʦajaj tamɬ~ɮaw ni jiħo~ufa to~u mapaɾitaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u sapaʡaraw ko~unija ʦo~uka
S.TRANSL: This reenactment shows the circumstances under which a Bible study is conducted in Bulgarian prisons with interested inmates

S.FORM: Sapafeli ni Yihofa a Hemek
Sapafeli ni Yihofa a Hemek
S.PHON: sapafəɾi ni jiħo~ufa a ħəmək
S.TRANSL: "The Joy of Jehovah"

S.FORM: Samaanay pasifana' ci Yihofa to tamdaw Ningra sini'ada to tao?
Samaanay pasifana' ci Yihofa to tamdaw Ningra sini'ada to tao?
S.PHON: samaanaj pasifanaʡ ʦi jiħo~ufa to~u tamɬ~ɮaw niŋra siniʡaɬ~ɮa to~u tao~u?
S.TRANSL: How does Jehovah teach his people to manifest compassion?

S.FORM: Mikitini pihofoc ci Yisan a ma'oningay, wa nga'ay mananam ita ko harateng ni Yihofa to dafong ato hafay.
Mikitini pihofoc ci Yisan a ma'oningay, wa nga'ay mananam ita ko harateng ni Yihofa to dafong ato hafay.
S.PHON: mikitini piħo~ufo~uʦ ʦi jisan a maʡo~uniŋaj, wa ŋaʡaj mananam ita ko~u ħaratəŋ ni jiħo~ufa to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ ato~u ħafaj.
S.TRANSL: From this Bible account about Jesus' birth, we can appreciate Jehovah's view of material things.

S.FORM: Saka 1, palaken ko toki misimsim to samaanay ci Yihofa ato romaroma madimadiay sikawdan sini'ada to tao.
Saka 1, palaken ko toki misimsim to samaanay ci Yihofa ato romaroma madimadiay sikawdan sini'ada to tao.
S.PHON: saka *, paɾakən ko~u to~uki misimsim to~u samaanaj ʦi jiħo~ufa ato~u ro~umaro~uma maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮiaj sikawɬ~ɮan siniʡaɬ~ɮa to~u tao~u.
S.TRANSL: First, take time to examine how Jehovah has shown compassion and how others have shown it.

S.FORM: Talacowa o Misawacayay Tamdaw ni Yihofa!'"
Talacowa o Misawacayay Tamdaw ni Yihofa!'"
S.PHON: taɾaʦo~uwa o~u misawaʦajaj tamɬ~ɮaw ni jiħo~ufa!ʡ"
S.TRANSL: We see Jehovah's Witnesses everywhere!'"

S.FORM: Pafeli ci Yihofa kitaanan to pasalat, nga'ay midemak to maanan?
Pafeli ci Yihofa kitaanan to pasalat, nga'ay midemak to maanan?
S.PHON: pafəɾi ʦi jiħo~ufa kitaanan to~u pasaɾat, ŋaʡaj miɬ~ɮəmak to~u maanan?
S.TRANSL: What freedom does Jehovah allow us?

S.FORM: O manan ko mamananam ita to nika pisaysay ni Yihofa to pisafelit ni Satan?
O manan ko mamananam ita to nika pisaysay ni Yihofa to pisafelit ni Satan?
S.PHON: o~u manan ko~u mamananam ita to~u nika pisajsaj ni jiħo~ufa to~u pisafəɾit ni satan?
S.TRANSL: What should we learn from God's reaction to rebellion?

S.FORM: Lalomiheca, mata'lifay ko 1,000 'ofad ko pacekiwan no Misawacayay Tamdaw ni Yihofa.
Lalomiheca, mata'lifay ko 1,000 'ofad ko pacekiwan no Misawacayay Tamdaw ni Yihofa.
S.PHON: ɾaɾo~umiħəʦa, mataʡɾifaj ko~u *,*** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ ko~u paʦəkiwan no~u misawaʦajaj tamɬ~ɮaw ni jiħo~ufa.
S.TRANSL: Last year we regularly conducted over 10,000,000 Bible studies.

S.FORM: JW TILIFI: Oniya wangcan no tilifi mihadakay to demak no Misawacayay Tamdaw ni Yihofa icowacowa a pala a ika.
JW TILIFI: Oniya wangcan no tilifi mihadakay to demak no Misawacayay Tamdaw ni Yihofa icowacowa a pala a ika.
S.PHON: *w tiɾifi: o~unija waŋʦan no~u tiɾifi miħaɬ~ɮakaj to~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u misawaʦajaj tamɬ~ɮaw ni jiħo~ufa iʦo~uwaʦo~uwa a paɾa a ika.
S.TRANSL: JW BROADCASTING: This Internet television station provides video updates on the activities of Jehovah's Witnesses worldwide.

S.FORM: Mihaenay paifaloco'en ita ko saki'ok ni Yihofa, hamaan papi'afasen ko kalo demak to halifon iso!
Mihaenay paifaloco'en ita ko saki'ok ni Yihofa, hamaan papi'afasen ko kalo demak to halifon iso!
S.PHON: miħaənaj paifaɾo~uʦo~uʡən ita ko~u sakiʡo~uk ni jiħo~ufa, ħamaan papiʡafasən ko~u kaɾo~u ɬ~ɮəmak to~u ħaɾifo~un iso~u!
S.TRANSL: So keep your mind on what Jehovah has promised, and let nothing deprive you of the prize!

S.FORM: Masakalimlaan i, wa tahada'oc maharateng ni Yihofa kiso.
Masakalimlaan i, wa tahada'oc maharateng ni Yihofa kiso.
S.PHON: masakaɾimɾaan i, wa taħaɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ maħaratəŋ ni jiħo~ufa kiso~u.
S.TRANSL: More important, you have made a permanent impression on Jehovah's heart.

S.FORM: Pasifana'an ni Yihofa ci Hapakuk to sasamaan ko hateloc no cowa ka madimadi a Yutaya tamdaw, hanaca o saka cecay ci Hapakuk a mafana' to mangataayto ko sapisawkitaw ni Yihofa.
Pasifana'an ni Yihofa ci Hapakuk to sasamaan ko hateloc no cowa ka madimadi a Yutaya tamdaw, hanaca o saka cecay ci Hapakuk a mafana' to mangataayto ko sapisawkitaw ni Yihofa.
S.PHON: pasifanaʡan ni jiħo~ufa ʦi ħapako~u~uk to~u sasamaan ko~u ħatəɾo~uʦ no~u ʦo~uwa ka maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮi a jo~u~utaja tamɬ~ɮaw, ħanaʦa o~u saka ʦəʦaj ʦi ħapako~u~uk a mafanaʡ to~u maŋataajto~u ko~u sapisawkitaw ni jiħo~ufa.
S.TRANSL: It could well be that Habakkuk was the first to whom Jehovah revealed that the end of that violent era was very near.

S.FORM: O cima ko kalimlaan ni Yihofa a finawlan nohatini hani?
O cima ko kalimlaan ni Yihofa a finawlan nohatini hani?
S.PHON: o~u ʦima ko~u kaɾimɾaan ni jiħo~ufa a finawɾan no~uħatini ħani?
S.TRANSL: Who enjoy a favored relationship with Jehovah today?

S.FORM: Mihaenay, saalien no wama wina ci Yihofa to sakayat, tada kalimelaan.
Mihaenay, saalien no wama wina ci Yihofa to sakayat, tada kalimelaan.
S.PHON: miħaənaj, saaɾiən no~u wama wina ʦi jiħo~ufa to~u sakajat, taɬ~ɮa kaɾiməɾaan.
S.TRANSL: How important, then, that Christian parents look to Jehovah for guidance.

S.FORM: Saka tosa lalakaw patalipa'elalay kitanan samaan miliyas to mararaway waywayan, ho eca ka lahedaw ko miki'okan ni Yihofa a sapalifon.
Saka tosa lalakaw patalipa'elalay kitanan samaan miliyas to mararaway waywayan, ho eca ka lahedaw ko miki'okan ni Yihofa a sapalifon.
S.PHON: saka to~usa ɾaɾakaw pataɾipaʡəɾaɾaj kitanan samaan miɾijas to~u mararawaj wajwajan, ħo~u əʦa ka ɾaħəɬ~ɮaw ko~u mikiʡo~ukan ni jiħo~ufa a sapaɾifo~un.
S.TRANSL: The second article reminds us of how to avoid attitudes that could deprive us of the blessings that Jehovah has promised.

S.FORM: Pakayni to 'icel ni Yihofa a miadah to doka' no faloco', o manan ko sowal no 'Olic?
Pakayni to 'icel ni Yihofa a miadah to doka' no faloco', o manan ko sowal no 'Olic?
S.PHON: pakajni to~u ʡiʦəɾ ni jiħo~ufa a miaɬ~ɮaħ to~u ɬ~ɮo~ukaʡ no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ, o~u manan ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡo~uɾiʦ?
S.TRANSL: What does the psalmist observe about Jehovah's healing power?

S.FORM: Samaanay ko demak ni Yihofa paihkal to misinanotay Cingra to harateng ni Mosi?
Samaanay ko demak ni Yihofa paihkal to misinanotay Cingra to harateng ni Mosi?
S.PHON: samaanaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak ni jiħo~ufa paiħkaɾ to~u misinano~utaj ʦiŋra to~u ħaratəŋ ni mo~usi?
S.TRANSL: How did Jehovah show extraordinary consideration for Moses?

S.FORM: Haratengen, adihayay ko patirengan no tamdaw a sa'osi, pacieciayho to tao a midofdof, kawra cecayay aca ko salimo'ot ni Yihofa ci Ataman aci Ifaan!
Haratengen, adihayay ko patirengan no tamdaw a sa'osi, pacieciayho to tao a midofdof, kawra cecayay aca ko salimo'ot ni Yihofa ci Ataman aci Ifaan!
S.PHON: ħaratəŋən, aɬ~ɮiħajaj ko~u patirəŋan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw a saʡo~usi, paʦiəʦiajħo~u to~u tao~u a miɬ~ɮo~ufɬ~ɮo~uf, kawra ʦəʦajaj aʦa ko~u saɾimo~uʡo~ut ni jiħo~ufa ʦi ataman aʦi ifaan!
S.TRANSL: Compare it with the countless man-made laws that men have been forced to learn and obey.

S.FORM: Tikoren a minengneng ko noka'orip ako, mahapinangay ako to samaanay palemed ci Yihofa to mitosilay demak i Aielan!
Tikoren a minengneng ko noka'orip ako, mahapinangay ako to samaanay palemed ci Yihofa to mitosilay demak i Aielan!
S.PHON: tiko~urən a minəŋnəŋ ko~u no~ukaʡo~urip ako~u, maħapinaŋaj ako~u to~u samaanaj paɾəməɬ~ɮ ʦi jiħo~ufa to~u mito~usiɾaj ɬ~ɮəmak i aiəɾan!
S.TRANSL: Looking back on our lives, I can see how Jehovah has guided and blessed the work in Ireland!

S.FORM: Palimo'otan ni Yihofa ko kapah tamdaw misamaan to demak?
Palimo'otan ni Yihofa ko kapah tamdaw misamaan to demak?
S.PHON: paɾimo~uʡo~utan ni jiħo~ufa ko~u kapaħ tamɬ~ɮaw misamaan to~u ɬ~ɮəmak?
S.TRANSL: What course does Jehovah recommend for young ones?

S.FORM: Isaka 1950 a miheca, mitosilan no cecay Misawacayay Tamdaw ni Yihofa ko wina ako.
Isaka 1950 a miheca, mitosilan no cecay Misawacayay Tamdaw ni Yihofa ko wina ako.
S.PHON: isaka **** a miħəʦa, mito~usiɾan no~u ʦəʦaj misawaʦajaj tamɬ~ɮaw ni jiħo~ufa ko~u wina ako~u.
S.TRANSL: In 1950, one of Jehovah's Witnesses began sharing the Bible's message with my mother.

S.FORM: Patireng to no'adingoan a patosokan wa samaan milingat to kalala'ed iso aci Yihofa hani?
Patireng to no'adingoan a patosokan wa samaan milingat to kalala'ed iso aci Yihofa hani?
S.PHON: patirəŋ to~u no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan a pato~uso~ukan wa samaan miɾiŋat to~u kaɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮ iso~u aʦi jiħo~ufa ħani?
S.TRANSL: What effect do spiritual goals have on our relationship with Jehovah?

S.FORM: Misamaan to demak kita honga' milifok to sida'it ato sasodod ni Yihofa hani?
Misamaan to demak kita honga' milifok to sida'it ato sasodod ni Yihofa hani?
S.PHON: misamaan to~u ɬ~ɮəmak kita ħo~uŋaʡ miɾifo~uk to~u siɬ~ɮaʡit ato~u saso~uɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮ ni jiħo~ufa ħani?
S.TRANSL: What steps must we take in order to receive Jehovah's mercy and forgiveness?

S.FORM: O harateng ni Yihofa hano o saka ciepoc ita?
O harateng ni Yihofa hano o saka ciepoc ita?
S.PHON: o~u ħaratəŋ ni jiħo~ufa ħano~u o~u saka ʦiəpo~uʦ ita?
S.TRANSL: Why is Jehovah's thinking beneficial for us?

S.FORM: Misakafahay to 20 miheca a fafahiyan salikaka ci Matireta, sanay cingra: "Mafana' to papalifonen ni Yihofa ko pisa'icel ako, tada pakahemekay takowanan konini."
Misakafahay to 20 miheca a fafahiyan salikaka ci Matireta, sanay cingra: "Mafana' to papalifonen ni Yihofa ko pisa'icel ako, tada pakahemekay takowanan konini."
S.PHON: misakafaħaj to~u ** miħəʦa a fafaħijan saɾikaka ʦi matirəta, sanaj ʦiŋra: "mafanaʡ to~u papaɾifo~unən ni jiħo~ufa ko~u pisaʡiʦəɾ ako~u, taɬ~ɮa pakaħəməkaj tako~uwanan ko~unini."
S.TRANSL: Says Matilda, a pioneer for 20 years: "It gives me joy to know that Jehovah rewards our efforts."

S.FORM: Toni pinamiheca matayal saki ci Yihofaan, mananamay ako sapitafoaw to madimadiay kalimelaan ko kinafalahay, Kawra o sapafeli ni Yihofa a rihaday awaay ko pakafiloay.
Toni pinamiheca matayal saki ci Yihofaan, mananamay ako sapitafoaw to madimadiay kalimelaan ko kinafalahay, Kawra o sapafeli ni Yihofa a rihaday awaay ko pakafiloay.
S.PHON: to~uni pinamiħəʦa matajaɾ saki ʦi jiħo~ufaan, mananamaj ako~u sapitafo~uaw to~u maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮiaj kaɾiməɾaan ko~u kinafaɾaħaj, kawra o~u sapafəɾi ni jiħo~ufa a riħaɬ~ɮaj awaaj ko~u pakafiɾo~uaj.
S.TRANSL: My years of service to Jehovah have taught me that keeping integrity comes at a cost but the inner peace that Jehovah gives in return is a treasure of surpassing value.

S.FORM: Cowa ko cipinang aca to so'linay kimad, kalimelaan i patirengay to nga'ayay kala widang ako aci Yihofa."
Cowa ko cipinang aca to so'linay kimad, kalimelaan i patirengay to nga'ayay kala widang ako aci Yihofa."
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa ko~u ʦipinaŋ aʦa to~u so~uʡɾinaj kimaɬ~ɮ, kaɾiməɾaan i patirəŋaj to~u ŋaʡajaj kaɾa wiɬ~ɮaŋ ako~u aʦi jiħo~ufa."
S.TRANSL: I got understanding and, most important, developed a close relationship with Jehovah."

S.FORM: Ikorto, palidlid sa macakat kita i no'adingoan, matongalay ko kacipinang to harateng ni Yihofa, cipinang to o manan ko kaolahan Ningra, o manan ko kapili'an Ningra, ato pinengneng Ningra to demak.
Ikorto, palidlid sa macakat kita i no'adingoan, matongalay ko kacipinang to harateng ni Yihofa, cipinang to o manan ko kaolahan Ningra, o manan ko kapili'an Ningra, ato pinengneng Ningra to demak.
S.PHON: iko~urto~u, paɾiɬ~ɮɾiɬ~ɮ sa maʦakat kita i no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan, mato~uŋaɾaj ko~u kaʦipinaŋ to~u ħaratəŋ ni jiħo~ufa, ʦipinaŋ to~u o~u manan ko~u kao~uɾaħan niŋra, o~u manan ko~u kapiɾiʡan niŋra, ato~u pinəŋnəŋ niŋra to~u ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: But as we continue to grow spiritually, we learn more about Jehovah's thinking, his likes, his dislikes, and his way of viewing various matters.

S.FORM: Ci Yihofa cowa ko nika sini'ada aca to tamdaw, pasifana'ayho to tamdaw Ningra, papipatahekal to sini'adaay a capeling.
Ci Yihofa cowa ko nika sini'ada aca to tamdaw, pasifana'ayho to tamdaw Ningra, papipatahekal to sini'adaay a capeling.
S.PHON: ʦi jiħo~ufa ʦo~uwa ko~u nika siniʡaɬ~ɮa aʦa to~u tamɬ~ɮaw, pasifanaʡajħo~u to~u tamɬ~ɮaw niŋra, papipataħəkaɾ to~u siniʡaɬ~ɮaaj a ʦapəɾiŋ.
S.TRANSL: Not only has Jehovah shown compassion but he has also taught his people the need to display that quality.

S.FORM: Sanay cingra: "Paso'linay kako to dadipoten ni Yihofa kako!"
Sanay cingra: "Paso'linay kako to dadipoten ni Yihofa kako!"
S.PHON: sanaj ʦiŋra: "paso~uʡɾinaj kako~u to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮipo~utən ni jiħo~ufa kako~u!"
S.TRANSL: She says: "I know for sure that Jehovah will take care of me!"

S.FORM: Pairasolay ci Hosiya wa ira ko 'alafang a tamdaw malo finawlan ni Yihofa.
Pairasolay ci Hosiya wa ira ko 'alafang a tamdaw malo finawlan ni Yihofa.
S.PHON: pairaso~uɾaj ʦi ħo~usija wa ira ko~u ʡaɾafaŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw maɾo~u finawɾan ni jiħo~ufa.
S.TRANSL: Also, the book of Hosea foretold that some non-Israelites would become Jehovah's people.

S.FORM: O picada ni Yihofa to tamdaw samaanay caka lecad to cifadangalay a tamdaw?
O picada ni Yihofa to tamdaw samaanay caka lecad to cifadangalay a tamdaw?
S.PHON: o~u piʦaɬ~ɮa ni jiħo~ufa to~u tamɬ~ɮaw samaanaj ʦaka ɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u ʦifaɬ~ɮaŋaɾaj a tamɬ~ɮaw?
S.TRANSL: In contrast with powerful humans, how does Jehovah treat people?

S.FORM: Sasamaan kita pa'icel to misa'osian, micangacang to pihayda ni Yihofa hani?
Sasamaan kita pa'icel to misa'osian, micangacang to pihayda ni Yihofa hani?
S.PHON: sasamaan kita paʡiʦəɾ to~u misaʡo~usian, miʦaŋaʦaŋ to~u piħajɬ~ɮa ni jiħo~ufa ħani?
S.TRANSL: How can we strengthen our resolve to seek Jehovah's recognition and not that of the world?

S.FORM: Anini, misa'icelay ko roma wama wina, ira ko adihayay a dafong no wawa, so'lin o pihaen to demak wa malingat ko kalala'ed no wawa aci Yihofa.
Anini, misa'icelay ko roma wama wina, ira ko adihayay a dafong no wawa, so'lin o pihaen to demak wa malingat ko kalala'ed no wawa aci Yihofa.
S.PHON: anini, misaʡiʦəɾaj ko~u ro~uma wama wina, ira ko~u aɬ~ɮiħajaj a ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ no~u wawa, so~uʡɾin o~u piħaən to~u ɬ~ɮəmak wa maɾiŋat ko~u kaɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮ no~u wawa aʦi jiħo~ufa.
S.TRANSL: Some parents insist on the best for their children materially, even at the expense of their children's spiritual health.

S.FORM: Sida'itay ci Yihofa, misaday to Mitosilay ato Nika'orip a Sa'opo, padama kitaanan macakat i mitosilay a demak.
Sida'itay ci Yihofa, misaday to Mitosilay ato Nika'orip a Sa'opo, padama kitaanan macakat i mitosilay a demak.
S.PHON: siɬ~ɮaʡitaj ʦi jiħo~ufa, misaɬ~ɮaj to~u mito~usiɾaj ato~u nikaʡo~urip a saʡo~upo~u, paɬ~ɮama kitaanan maʦakat i mito~usiɾaj a ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: Jehovah lovingly provides the Life and Ministry Meeting so that we can become more effective in the field ministry.

S.FORM: Mahecaday kita ci Yihofaan, makalimay micada ko tamdaw to so'linay kimad a 'ma'orip'.
Mahecaday kita ci Yihofaan, makalimay micada ko tamdaw to so'linay kimad a 'ma'orip'.
S.PHON: maħəʦaɬ~ɮaj kita ʦi jiħo~ufaan, makaɾimaj miʦaɬ~ɮa ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~u so~uʡɾinaj kimaɬ~ɮ a ʡmaʡo~uripʡ.
S.TRANSL: Like Jehovah, we dearly wish that people would respond to the message and "keep living."

S.FORM: Miti'er ci Yihofaan a milimek sa i, o manan ko tatodong hani?
Miti'er ci Yihofaan a milimek sa i, o manan ko tatodong hani?
S.PHON: mitiʡər ʦi jiħo~ufaan a miɾimək sa i, o~u manan ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ħani?
S.TRANSL: What does taking refuge in Jehovah involve?

S.FORM: Mica'edong kita to faelohay pinangan, samanen sapa'odingaraw ci Yihofaan, ao cowa ko sapaka hemekaw no tamdaw kitanan.
Mica'edong kita to faelohay pinangan, samanen sapa'odingaraw ci Yihofaan, ao cowa ko sapaka hemekaw no tamdaw kitanan.
S.PHON: miʦaʡəɬ~ɮo~uŋ kita to~u faəɾo~uħaj pinaŋan, samanən sapaʡo~uɬ~ɮiŋaraw ʦi jiħo~ufaan, ao~u ʦo~uwa ko~u sapaka ħəməkaw no~u tamɬ~ɮaw kitanan.
S.TRANSL: Our motive for clothing ourselves with the new personality must be to honor Jehovah, not to win praise from men.

S.FORM: Oniya sa'osi padamaay takowanan misarocod to faloco' mihodop ci Yihofaan.
Oniya sa'osi padamaay takowanan misarocod to faloco' mihodop ci Yihofaan.
S.PHON: o~unija saʡo~usi paɬ~ɮamaaj tako~uwanan misaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ miħo~uɬ~ɮo~up ʦi jiħo~ufaan.
S.TRANSL: In a short time, my application was approved, and I was invited to begin Bethel service on March 10, 1952.

S.FORM: Sata'angay sa to ngiha ci Mosi a pasowal: 'Cima ko midopoay ci Yihofaan?
Sata'angay sa to ngiha ci Mosi a pasowal: 'Cima ko midopoay ci Yihofaan?
S.PHON: sataʡaŋaj sa to~u ŋiħa ʦi mo~usi a paso~uwaɾ: ʡʦima ko~u miɬ~ɮo~upo~uaj ʦi jiħo~ufaan?
S.TRANSL: He then proclaimed: "Who is on Jehovah's side?

S.FORM: PAKAYNIEN i midokoay ci Yihofaan a tamdaw, madimadi ci Yihofaan o 'inorong nangra.
PAKAYNIEN i midokoay ci Yihofaan a tamdaw, madimadi ci Yihofaan o 'inorong nangra.
S.PHON: pakajniən i miɬ~ɮo~uko~uaj ʦi jiħo~ufaan a tamɬ~ɮaw, maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮi ʦi jiħo~ufaan o~u ʡino~uro~uŋ naŋra.
S.TRANSL: IT MAKES sense to cling to Jehovah.

S.FORM: O manan ko padamaay to nolitengan madimadiay a sikawdan makahi a mitala ci Yihofaan?
O manan ko padamaay to nolitengan madimadiay a sikawdan makahi a mitala ci Yihofaan?
S.PHON: o~u manan ko~u paɬ~ɮamaaj to~u no~uɾitəŋan maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮiaj a sikawɬ~ɮan makaħi a mitaɾa ʦi jiħo~ufaan?
S.TRANSL: What helped men and women of old to be willing to wait on Jehovah?

S.FORM: Samaan kita mi'aca ci Yihofaan to so'linay kimad?
Samaan kita mi'aca ci Yihofaan to so'linay kimad?
S.PHON: samaan kita miʡaʦa ʦi jiħo~ufaan to~u so~uʡɾinaj kimaɬ~ɮ?
S.TRANSL: How can we buy truth from Jehovah?

S.FORM: Kawra, tahanini nga'naifaloco'kako a pasowal to tada maolahay kako ci Yihofaan.'
Kawra, tahanini nga'naifaloco'kako a pasowal to tada maolahay kako ci Yihofaan.'
S.PHON: kawra, taħanini ŋaʡnaifaɾo~uʦo~uʡkako~u a paso~uwaɾ to~u taɬ~ɮa mao~uɾaħaj kako~u ʦi jiħo~ufaan.ʡ
S.TRANSL: But only now can I honestly say that I love Jehovah.'

S.FORM: Patireng kita to tangongolay kalawidang ci Yihofaan, nga'ay milifok to tahada'ocay a lipahak.
Patireng kita to tangongolay kalawidang ci Yihofaan, nga'ay milifok to tahada'ocay a lipahak.
S.PHON: patirəŋ kita to~u taŋo~uŋo~uɾaj kaɾawiɬ~ɮaŋ ʦi jiħo~ufaan, ŋaʡaj miɾifo~uk to~u taħaɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦaj a ɾipaħak.
S.TRANSL: Building a strong relationship with Jehovah is a vital part of finding lasting happiness.

S.FORM: Hano nga'ay kita pasowal ci Yihofaan to na faloco'an a harateng hani?
Hano nga'ay kita pasowal ci Yihofaan to na faloco'an a harateng hani?
S.PHON: ħano~u ŋaʡaj kita paso~uwaɾ ʦi jiħo~ufaan to~u na faɾo~uʦo~uʡan a ħaratəŋ ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why can we tell Jehovah our concerns?

S.FORM: Karomadiw a Pahemek ci Yihofaan!, Misamaanay Hani?
Karomadiw a Pahemek ci Yihofaan!, Misamaanay Hani?
S.PHON: karo~umaɬ~ɮiw a paħəmək ʦi jiħo~ufaan!, misamaanaj ħani?
S.TRANSL: "Praise Jah!", Why?

S.FORM: Sarocoden ko faloco' a miti'er ci Yihofaan.
Sarocoden ko faloco' a miti'er ci Yihofaan.
S.PHON: saro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮən ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ a mitiʡər ʦi jiħo~ufaan.
S.TRANSL: "Trust in Jehovah with all your heart, and do not rely on your own understanding."

S.FORM: Wa nga'ay kita tano maanan a pakayraan a malacafay ci Yihofaan a matayal hani?
Wa nga'ay kita tano maanan a pakayraan a malacafay ci Yihofaan a matayal hani?
S.PHON: wa ŋaʡaj kita tano~u maanan a pakajraan a maɾaʦafaj ʦi jiħo~ufaan a matajaɾ ħani?
S.TRANSL: In what ways can we work with Jehovah?

S.FORM: Mitosil kita o sakakaay lalangian, o papa'dil ci Yihofaan ato patahekal to ngangan Ningra.
Mitosil kita o sakakaay lalangian, o papa'dil ci Yihofaan ato patahekal to ngangan Ningra.
S.PHON: mito~usiɾ kita o~u sakakaaj ɾaɾaŋian, o~u papaʡɬ~ɮiɾ ʦi jiħo~ufaan ato~u pataħəkaɾ to~u ŋaŋan niŋra.
S.TRANSL: The foremost reason why we share in the preaching work is to glorify Jehovah and sanctify his name before mankind.

S.FORM: Tada mahemekay kita mafana' ci Yihofaan, hanaca milifok to pairaan no matatodongay pidoko a pasalat.
Tada mahemekay kita mafana' ci Yihofaan, hanaca milifok to pairaan no matatodongay pidoko a pasalat.
S.PHON: taɬ~ɮa maħəməkaj kita mafanaʡ ʦi jiħo~ufaan, ħanaʦa miɾifo~uk to~u pairaan no~u matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj piɬ~ɮo~uko~u a pasaɾat.
S.TRANSL: We are grateful that we have come to know Jehovah and can enjoy the freedom that true worship brings.

S.FORM: O maanan a demak ko saka ecato padotoc ita misamocek a minengneng ci Yihofaan hani?
O maanan a demak ko saka ecato padotoc ita misamocek a minengneng ci Yihofaan hani?
S.PHON: o~u maanan a ɬ~ɮəmak ko~u saka əʦato~u paɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ ita misamo~uʦək a minəŋnəŋ ʦi jiħo~ufaan ħani?
S.TRANSL: What can distract us from keeping our eyes fixed on Jehovah?

S.FORM: Sasamaan kita miako'id ci Yihofaan nga'ay malo finawlan Ningra kita hani?
Sasamaan kita miako'id ci Yihofaan nga'ay malo finawlan Ningra kita hani?
S.PHON: sasamaan kita miako~uʡiɬ~ɮ ʦi jiħo~ufaan ŋaʡaj maɾo~u finawɾan niŋra kita ħani?
S.TRANSL: How can we show appreciation for the honor of being Jehovah's people?

S.FORM: Pataengaden ko Likat Namo, Pa'dil ci Yihofaan
Pataengaden ko Likat Namo, Pa'dil ci Yihofaan
S.PHON: pataəŋaɬ~ɮən ko~u ɾikat namo~u, paʡɬ~ɮiɾ ʦi jiħo~ufaan
S.TRANSL: "Let Your Light Shine" to Glorify Jehovah

S.FORM: Fafahiyan salikaka ci Silefana mangataayto ko 30 miheca misakafah, sanay ko sowal: "'Ayaw no mingata kako to cecay loma' a mitosil i, milongoc kako ci Yihofaan padama takowanan, ira ko tawlikay a haratengan."

Fafahiyan salikaka ci Silefana mangataayto ko 30 miheca misakafah, sanay ko sowal: "'Ayaw no mingata kako to cecay loma' a mitosil i, milongoc kako ci Yihofaan padama takowanan, ira ko tawlikay a haratengan."
S.PHON: fafaħijan saɾikaka ʦi siɾəfana maŋataajto~u ko~u ** miħəʦa misakafaħ, sanaj ko~u so~uwaɾ: "ʡajaw no~u miŋata kako~u to~u ʦəʦaj ɾo~umaʡ a mito~usiɾ i, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ kako~u ʦi jiħo~ufaan paɬ~ɮama tako~uwanan, ira ko~u tawɾikaj a ħaratəŋan."
S.TRANSL: Silvana, a pioneer for nearly 30 years, says, "Before I go to a house in my territory, I pray to Jehovah, asking him to give me a positive attitude."

S.FORM: So'li'lin cowa ka hecahecad ko lalengawan no salikaka, kawra makedecay a midoko ci Yihofaan.
So'li'lin cowa ka hecahecad ko lalengawan no salikaka, kawra makedecay a midoko ci Yihofaan.
S.PHON: so~uʡɾiʡɾin ʦo~uwa ka ħəʦaħəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u ɾaɾəŋawan no~u saɾikaka, kawra makəɬ~ɮəʦaj a miɬ~ɮo~uko~u ʦi jiħo~ufaan.
S.TRANSL: All these dear brothers and sisters from different backgrounds serve Jehovah unitedly.

S.FORM: Anini, itiraayho ci Riana i cisowalay to Tantelo a kilac, mitenak to lihaf no Hongti Kitakit, padama cangranan mafana' ci Yihofaan.
Anini, itiraayho ci Riana i cisowalay to Tantelo a kilac, mitenak to lihaf no Hongti Kitakit, padama cangranan mafana' ci Yihofaan.
S.PHON: anini, itiraajħo~u ʦi riana i ʦiso~uwaɾaj to~u tantəɾo~u a kiɾaʦ, mitənak to~u ɾiħaf no~u ħo~uŋti kitakit, paɬ~ɮama ʦaŋranan mafanaʡ ʦi jiħo~ufaan.
S.TRANSL: Today, Riana is still sharing the Kingdom message with the many Tandroy-speaking people who want to learn about Jehovah.

S.FORM: Samaanen ita pakayni i sasowalen ato waywayan padama to tao, mafana' ci Yihofaan hani?
Samaanen ita pakayni i sasowalen ato waywayan padama to tao, mafana' ci Yihofaan hani?
S.PHON: samaanən ita pakajni i saso~uwaɾən ato~u wajwajan paɬ~ɮama to~u tao~u, mafanaʡ ʦi jiħo~ufaan ħani?
S.TRANSL: How may our speech and conduct benefit others spiritually?

S.FORM: Mahecad kita ci Tafitian aci Yonatanan, mararid a micawma' to maolahay ato mitadi'ecay ci Yihofaan a tamdaw, wa milifok to saka raheker.
Mahecad kita ci Tafitian aci Yonatanan, mararid a micawma' to maolahay ato mitadi'ecay ci Yihofaan a tamdaw, wa milifok to saka raheker.
S.PHON: maħəʦaɬ~ɮ kita ʦi tafitian aʦi jo~unatanan, marariɬ~ɮ a miʦawmaʡ to~u mao~uɾaħaj ato~u mitaɬ~ɮiʡəʦaj ʦi jiħo~ufaan a tamɬ~ɮaw, wa miɾifo~uk to~u saka raħəkər.
S.TRANSL: Like David and Jonathan, we too find "great delight" in loving those who love Jehovah and who show their faith in him.

S.FORM: Makahiyay mitala ci Apraham, samanen miti'eray cingra ci Yihofaan.
Makahiyay mitala ci Apraham, samanen miti'eray cingra ci Yihofaan.
S.PHON: makaħijaj mitaɾa ʦi apraħam, samanən mitiʡəraj ʦiŋra ʦi jiħo~ufaan.
S.TRANSL: Abraham was willing to wait, because his patience was based on his faith in Jehovah.

S.FORM: Mapolong midoko ci Yihofaan,
Mapolong midoko ci Yihofaan,
S.PHON: mapo~uɾo~uŋ miɬ~ɮo~uko~u ʦi jiħo~ufaan,
S.TRANSL: With constant devotion to our God and King,

S.FORM: Mitala ci Yihofaan hano kalimlaan hani?
Mitala ci Yihofaan hano kalimlaan hani?
S.PHON: mitaɾa ʦi jiħo~ufaan ħano~u kaɾimɾaan ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why is waiting on Jehovah so important?

S.FORM: Cowa ko pihaen aca no mita to demak, micangacangho ci Yihofaan padama kitaanan, micowat to kalacecay i kalala'ed.
Cowa ko pihaen aca no mita to demak, micangacangho ci Yihofaan padama kitaanan, micowat to kalacecay i kalala'ed.
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa ko~u piħaən aʦa no~u mita to~u ɬ~ɮəmak, miʦaŋaʦaŋħo~u ʦi jiħo~ufaan paɬ~ɮama kitaanan, miʦo~uwat to~u kaɾaʦəʦaj i kaɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: And let us ask Jehovah to help us keep contributing to the unity of his people!

S.FORM: Maolahay ci Yihofaan tamdaw,
Maolahay ci Yihofaan tamdaw,
S.PHON: mao~uɾaħaj ʦi jiħo~ufaan tamɬ~ɮaw,
S.TRANSL: Look to our God, you lovers of Jehovah.

S.FORM: Malacafay ci Yihofaan a Matayal to Romi'ami'ad
Malacafay ci Yihofaan a Matayal to Romi'ami'ad
S.PHON: maɾaʦafaj ʦi jiħo~ufaan a matajaɾ to~u ro~umiʡamiʡaɬ~ɮ
S.TRANSL: Work With Jehovah Each Day

S.FORM: Maharatengayho iso ko roma pakayraan alatek, oniya pakayraan fahar sa a palifet to madimadi ita ci Yihofaan alatek.
Maharatengayho iso ko roma pakayraan alatek, oniya pakayraan fahar sa a palifet to madimadi ita ci Yihofaan alatek.
S.PHON: maħaratəŋajħo~u iso~u ko~u ro~uma pakajraan aɾatək, o~unija pakajraan faħar sa a paɾifət to~u maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮi ita ʦi jiħo~ufaan aɾatək.
S.TRANSL: You can probably think of other situations that could arise suddenly, unexpectedly.

S.FORM: Kalimelaan ko 'kafana' ita' ci Yihofaan ato 'paso'lin a miti'er' to wawa Ningra ci Yisan, nganga'ay milifok to tahada'ocay 'orip.
Kalimelaan ko 'kafana' ita' ci Yihofaan ato 'paso'lin a miti'er' to wawa Ningra ci Yisan, nganga'ay milifok to tahada'ocay 'orip.
S.PHON: kaɾiməɾaan ko~u ʡkafanaʡ itaʡ ʦi jiħo~ufaan ato~u ʡpaso~uʡɾin a mitiʡərʡ to~u wawa niŋra ʦi jisan, ŋaŋaʡaj miɾifo~uk to~u taħaɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦaj ʡo~urip.
S.TRANSL: The only path to everlasting life involves "coming to know" Jehovah and "exercising faith" in Jesus, His only-begotten Son.

S.FORM: Miti'eray Kiso ci Yihofaan a Milimek Han?
Miti'eray Kiso ci Yihofaan a Milimek Han?
S.PHON: mitiʡəraj kiso~u ʦi jiħo~ufaan a miɾimək ħan?
S.TRANSL: Are You Taking Refuge in Jehovah?

S.FORM: 'Arawhan, midoko ci Yihofaan mamilifok to adihayay a hemek ato raheker."
'Arawhan, midoko ci Yihofaan mamilifok to adihayay a hemek ato raheker."
S.PHON: ʡarawħan, miɬ~ɮo~uko~u ʦi jiħo~ufaan mamiɾifo~uk to~u aɬ~ɮiħajaj a ħəmək ato~u raħəkər."
S.TRANSL: Serving Jehovah, though, has brought me the greatest happiness and sense of accomplishment."

S.FORM: O sanga'ayay sapatelong to wawa i, pasifana'en cangra maolah ci Yihofaan, misakareteng to fadangalan ato palinian Ningra.
O sanga'ayay sapatelong to wawa i, pasifana'en cangra maolah ci Yihofaan, misakareteng to fadangalan ato palinian Ningra.
S.PHON: o~u saŋaʡajaj sapatəɾo~uŋ to~u wawa i, pasifanaʡən ʦaŋra mao~uɾaħ ʦi jiħo~ufaan, misakarətəŋ to~u faɬ~ɮaŋaɾan ato~u paɾinian niŋra.
S.TRANSL: Love for God's authority and respect for his standards are among the most precious things that you can cultivate in your children.

S.FORM: Ikor cowato ka lefot ko tamdaw, kawra o madimadiay tamdaw wa nga'ayho malacafay ci Yihofaan a matayal.
Ikor cowato ka lefot ko tamdaw, kawra o madimadiay tamdaw wa nga'ayho malacafay ci Yihofaan a matayal.
S.PHON: iko~ur ʦo~uwato~u ka ɾəfo~ut ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, kawra o~u maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮiaj tamɬ~ɮaw wa ŋaʡajħo~u maɾaʦafaj ʦi jiħo~ufaan a matajaɾ.
S.TRANSL: Despite mankind's current imperfect state, faithful people can still work with Jehovah each day.

S.FORM: O manan a lalangian alatek matalaw kita misata'angay to ngiha' a romadiw pahemek ci Yihofaan hani?
O manan a lalangian alatek matalaw kita misata'angay to ngiha' a romadiw pahemek ci Yihofaan hani?
S.PHON: o~u manan a ɾaɾaŋian aɾatək mataɾaw kita misataʡaŋaj to~u ŋiħaʡ a ro~umaɬ~ɮiw paħəmək ʦi jiħo~ufaan ħani?
S.TRANSL: What might prevent some from singing out joyfully at our meetings and assemblies?

S.FORM: Mirienang kita to Sa'opo no Piharatengan to Kapatay ni Yis, paihekalay to kangodo' ita ci Yihofaan aci Yisan, mihaen to demak tada fangcalayto!
Mirienang kita to Sa'opo no Piharatengan to Kapatay ni Yis, paihekalay to kangodo' ita ci Yihofaan aci Yisan, mihaen to demak tada fangcalayto!
S.PHON: miriənaŋ kita to~u saʡo~upo~u no~u piħaratəŋan to~u kapataj ni jis, paiħəkaɾaj to~u kaŋo~uɬ~ɮo~uʡ ita ʦi jiħo~ufaan aʦi jisan, miħaən to~u ɬ~ɮəmak taɬ~ɮa faŋʦaɾajto~u!
S.TRANSL: How wonderful that Jehovah and Jesus are honored in this way by means of the annual Memorial observance!

S.FORM: Mihadidi a mitala kita ci Yihofaan, o matatodongay a demak, samanen paihekalay Cingra to kodaitay a capeling
Mihadidi a mitala kita ci Yihofaan, o matatodongay a demak, samanen paihekalay Cingra to kodaitay a capeling
S.PHON: miħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮi a mitaɾa kita ʦi jiħo~ufaan, o~u matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, samanən paiħəkaɾaj ʦiŋra to~u ko~uɬ~ɮaitaj a ʦapəɾiŋ
S.TRANSL: With regard to exercising patience, Jehovah does not expect us to do something that he is not willing to do himself

S.FORM: Ohatiniay a demak misaaliay to adihayay toki, halo mihadidiay, ikor ci Matiyas palidlid sanay matongal ko olah ci Yihofaan.
Ohatiniay a demak misaaliay to adihayay toki, halo mihadidiay, ikor ci Matiyas palidlid sanay matongal ko olah ci Yihofaan.
S.PHON: o~uħatiniaj a ɬ~ɮəmak misaaɾiaj to~u aɬ~ɮiħajaj to~uki, ħaɾo~u miħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮiaj, iko~ur ʦi matijas paɾiɬ~ɮɾiɬ~ɮ sanaj mato~uŋaɾ ko~u o~uɾaħ ʦi jiħo~ufaan.
S.TRANSL: It took time, and it was often difficult, but slowly, love for Jehovah grew in his heart.

S.FORM: Saka cecay i, "Maherekayto kiso pakayni kinafalah ni Yis Kristo, pasasiyor to raraw no niyah a pafatang to tireng ci Yihofaan, midofdof to araaw Ningra han?"
Saka cecay i, "Maherekayto kiso pakayni kinafalah ni Yis Kristo, pasasiyor to raraw no niyah a pafatang to tireng ci Yihofaan, midofdof to araaw Ningra han?"
S.PHON: saka ʦəʦaj i, "maħərəkajto~u kiso~u pakajni kinafaɾaħ ni jis kristo~u, pasasijo~ur to~u raraw no~u nijaħ a pafataŋ to~u tirəŋ ʦi jiħo~ufaan, miɬ~ɮo~ufɬ~ɮo~uf to~u araaw niŋra ħan?"
S.TRANSL: The first question is, "On the basis of the sacrifice of Jesus Christ, have you repented of your sins and dedicated yourself to Jehovah to do his will?"

S.FORM: Sapa kahemekaw ko kapah ci Yihofaan, wa misa'icel mitosil i tamdaw.
Sapa kahemekaw ko kapah ci Yihofaan, wa misa'icel mitosil i tamdaw.
S.PHON: sapa kaħəməkaw ko~u kapaħ ʦi jiħo~ufaan, wa misaʡiʦəɾ mito~usiɾ i tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: A young person who focuses his life on the desire to please Jehovah gives special attention to the ministry.

S.FORM: Misamaanay hano cowa ko hakatalawan iso mipatafang to tireng ci Yihofaan?
Misamaanay hano cowa ko hakatalawan iso mipatafang to tireng ci Yihofaan?
S.PHON: misamaanaj ħano~u ʦo~uwa ko~u ħakataɾawan iso~u mipatafaŋ to~u tirəŋ ʦi jiħo~ufaan?
S.TRANSL: Why is the step of dedication not to be feared or avoided?

S.FORM: Saka tosa lalakaw, wa milengo to sasamaan kita miako'id ci Yihofaan, ira ko sakaliko a malafinawlan Ningra.
Saka tosa lalakaw, wa milengo to sasamaan kita miako'id ci Yihofaan, ira ko sakaliko a malafinawlan Ningra.
S.PHON: saka to~usa ɾaɾakaw, wa miɾəŋo~u to~u sasamaan kita miako~uʡiɬ~ɮ ʦi jiħo~ufaan, ira ko~u sakaɾiko~u a maɾafinawɾan niŋra.
S.TRANSL: In the second article, we will consider various ways that we can show appreciation for the privilege of belonging to Jehovah as his people.

S.FORM: Misadolo to ka'orip misamaanay padama kitaanan midoko ci Yihofaan?
Misadolo to ka'orip misamaanay padama kitaanan midoko ci Yihofaan?
S.PHON: misaɬ~ɮo~uɾo~u to~u kaʡo~urip misamaanaj paɬ~ɮama kitaanan miɬ~ɮo~uko~u ʦi jiħo~ufaan?
S.TRANSL: How may a simple life make it easier to serve God?

S.FORM: Wa Nga'ay Kita Pafeli ci Yihofaan to Maanan a Sapatelong Hani?
Wa Nga'ay Kita Pafeli ci Yihofaan to Maanan a Sapatelong Hani?
S.PHON: wa ŋaʡaj kita pafəɾi ʦi jiħo~ufaan to~u maanan a sapatəɾo~uŋ ħani?
S.TRANSL: What Gift Can We Give to Jehovah?

S.FORM: Haenen ita ci Mikaan, mihadidi a mitala ci Yihofaan.
Haenen ita ci Mikaan, mihadidi a mitala ci Yihofaan.
S.PHON: ħaənən ita ʦi mikaan, miħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮi a mitaɾa ʦi jiħo~ufaan.
S.TRANSL: Like Micah, we too need to have "a waiting attitude."

S.FORM: Wa samaan kita a mitodong ci Yihofaan a mikangodo to tao hani?
Wa samaan kita a mitodong ci Yihofaan a mikangodo to tao hani?
S.PHON: wa samaan kita a mito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ʦi jiħo~ufaan a mikaŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u to~u tao~u ħani?
S.TRANSL: How might we imitate Jehovah in honoring others?

S.FORM: Samaan ko demak ita ho eca ka pawan pato'aya to dafong ci Yihofaan hani?
Samaan ko demak ita ho eca ka pawan pato'aya to dafong ci Yihofaan hani?
S.PHON: samaan ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak ita ħo~u əʦa ka pawan pato~uʡaja to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ ʦi jiħo~ufaan ħani?
S.TRANSL: When it comes to our material resources, what will help us not to overlook giving our gift to Jehovah?

S.FORM: Mihalamhan ci Yihofaan o manan ko tatodong hani?
Mihalamhan ci Yihofaan o manan ko tatodong hani?
S.PHON: miħaɾamħan ʦi jiħo~ufaan o~u manan ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ħani?
S.TRANSL: In what sense should our eyes look to Jehovah?

S.FORM: Nohatini mahemekayto cangra mala cafay a midoko ci Yihofaan.
Nohatini mahemekayto cangra mala cafay a midoko ci Yihofaan.
S.PHON: no~uħatini maħəməkajto~u ʦaŋra maɾa ʦafaj a miɬ~ɮo~uko~u ʦi jiħo~ufaan.
S.TRANSL: Now they enjoy serving Jehovah together.

S.FORM: So'linay i, matengil koniya lihaf a papacem i, tolon sanayho kako ci Yihofaan, misaali to kaemangay a salikaka malo misatenokay no Iing no Fenpo."
So'linay i, matengil koniya lihaf a papacem i, tolon sanayho kako ci Yihofaan, misaali to kaemangay a salikaka malo misatenokay no Iing no Fenpo."
S.PHON: so~uʡɾinaj i, matəŋiɾ ko~unija ɾiħaf a papaʦəm i, to~uɾo~un sanajħo~u kako~u ʦi jiħo~ufaan, misaaɾi to~u kaəmaŋaj a saɾikaka maɾo~u misatəno~ukaj no~u iiŋ no~u fənpo~u."
S.TRANSL: "In fact, on the very morning I found out, I had prayed to Jehovah, expressing the need for a younger brother to serve as the coordinator."

S.FORM: Pakayni ci Yihofaan, mikitini toniya ma'oningay mahapinangay ita ko maanan hani?
Pakayni ci Yihofaan, mikitini toniya ma'oningay mahapinangay ita ko maanan hani?
S.PHON: pakajni ʦi jiħo~ufaan, mikitini to~unija maʡo~uniŋaj maħapinaŋaj ita ko~u maanan ħani?
S.TRANSL: What does this account teach us about Jehovah?

S.FORM: Tala'ayaway ci Hapakuk a miingid ci Yihofaan, pakaso'linay cingra to kakarayan Wama, kalawidang to kakarayan a Wama.
Tala'ayaway ci Hapakuk a miingid ci Yihofaan, pakaso'linay cingra to kakarayan Wama, kalawidang to kakarayan a Wama.
S.PHON: taɾaʡajawaj ʦi ħapako~u~uk a miiŋiɬ~ɮ ʦi jiħo~ufaan, pakaso~uʡɾinaj ʦiŋra to~u kakarajan wama, kaɾawiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u kakarajan a wama.
S.TRANSL: Habakkuk took the initiative to draw close to Jehovah, his trusted Friend and Father.

S.FORM: Mihaenay, sapidofdofaw ko pacekiwan to polong a sapasifana' ni Yis, falahen kono tireng a harateng, haeminen a patafang ko niyah ci Yihofaan.
Mihaenay, sapidofdofaw ko pacekiwan to polong a sapasifana' ni Yis, falahen kono tireng a harateng, haeminen a patafang ko niyah ci Yihofaan.
S.PHON: miħaənaj, sapiɬ~ɮo~ufɬ~ɮo~ufaw ko~u paʦəkiwan to~u po~uɾo~uŋ a sapasifanaʡ ni jis, faɾaħən ko~uno~u tirəŋ a ħaratəŋ, ħaəminən a patafaŋ ko~u nijaħ ʦi jiħo~ufaan.
S.TRANSL: Thus, Bible students who wish to observe all the things that Jesus commanded must disown themselves, dedicating themselves unreservedly to Jehovah.

S.FORM: Iraay ko nga'ayay a kasasowal iso ci Yihofaan han?
Iraay ko nga'ayay a kasasowal iso ci Yihofaan han?
S.PHON: iraaj ko~u ŋaʡajaj a kasaso~uwaɾ iso~u ʦi jiħo~ufaan ħan?
S.TRANSL: How well are you communicating with Jehovah?

S.FORM: Samaanay cangra so'li'lin a mafana' ci Yihofaan a mitafo to madimadi hani?
Samaanay cangra so'li'lin a mafana' ci Yihofaan a mitafo to madimadi hani?
S.PHON: samaanaj ʦaŋra so~uʡɾiʡɾin a mafanaʡ ʦi jiħo~ufaan a mitafo~u to~u maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮi ħani?
S.TRANSL: How did they come to know Jehovah so well that nothing could break their integrity?

S.FORM: Mihaenay, wa padotoc kita a pakalalok cangranan minanam to pakayniay ci Yihofaan a so'linay kimad, ato araaw Ningra to tamdaw.
Mihaenay, wa padotoc kita a pakalalok cangranan minanam to pakayniay ci Yihofaan a so'linay kimad, ato araaw Ningra to tamdaw.
S.PHON: miħaənaj, wa paɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ kita a pakaɾaɾo~uk ʦaŋranan minanam to~u pakajniaj ʦi jiħo~ufaan a so~uʡɾinaj kimaɬ~ɮ, ato~u araaw niŋra to~u tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: Therefore, we keep encouraging them to learn the truth about Jehovah and his purpose for mankind.

S.FORM: Mamakahi kako pakayni to sapidokoaw ci Yihofaan a mifalah ko kaolahan a demak ako han?
Mamakahi kako pakayni to sapidokoaw ci Yihofaan a mifalah ko kaolahan a demak ako han?
S.PHON: mamakaħi kako~u pakajni to~u sapiɬ~ɮo~uko~uaw ʦi jiħo~ufaan a mifaɾaħ ko~u kao~uɾaħan a ɬ~ɮəmak ako~u ħan?
S.TRANSL: Am I willing to practice self-denial because I want to serve God?

S.FORM: Wa nga'ay kita pafeli ci Yihofaan to maanan a sapatelong hani?
Wa nga'ay kita pafeli ci Yihofaan to maanan a sapatelong hani?
S.PHON: wa ŋaʡaj kita pafəɾi ʦi jiħo~ufaan to~u maanan a sapatəɾo~uŋ ħani?
S.TRANSL: What gift can we give to Jehovah?

S.FORM: Kahacecay a tamdaw no kasakopang, wa nga'ay misamaan midoko ci Yihofaan?
Kahacecay a tamdaw no kasakopang, wa nga'ay misamaan midoko ci Yihofaan?
S.PHON: kaħaʦəʦaj a tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasako~upaŋ, wa ŋaʡaj misamaan miɬ~ɮo~uko~u ʦi jiħo~ufaan?
S.TRANSL: How can all in the congregation directly share in worshipping Jehovah?

S.FORM: Misamaanay hano mahemek kita patafang to dafong ci Yihofaan hani?
Misamaanay hano mahemek kita patafang to dafong ci Yihofaan hani?
S.PHON: misamaanaj ħano~u maħəmək kita patafaŋ to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ ʦi jiħo~ufaan ħani?
S.TRANSL: What do we show Jehovah when we support his work?

S.FORM: 'O Moecelay Tamdaw, Pakayniay ci Yihofaan a Lipahak'
'O Moecelay Tamdaw, Pakayniay ci Yihofaan a Lipahak'
S.PHON: ʡo~u mo~uəʦəɾaj tamɬ~ɮaw, pakajniaj ʦi jiħo~ufaan a ɾipaħakʡ
S.TRANSL: "The Righteous One Will Rejoice in Jehovah"

S.FORM: Mihaen ko demak hato mingataay ko harateng no niyah ci Yihofaan."
Mihaen ko demak hato mingataay ko harateng no niyah ci Yihofaan."
S.PHON: miħaən ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak ħato~u miŋataaj ko~u ħaratəŋ no~u nijaħ ʦi jiħo~ufaan."
S.TRANSL: That way, I feel more in tune with Jehovah's thinking."

S.FORM: O mitiliday to 'Olic 147 fedengan, makalimay pahemek ci Yihofaan.
O mitiliday to 'Olic 147 fedengan, makalimay pahemek ci Yihofaan.
S.PHON: o~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj to~u ʡo~uɾiʦ *** fəɬ~ɮəŋan, makaɾimaj paħəmək ʦi jiħo~ufaan.
S.TRANSL: The writer of the 147th Psalm was moved to praise Jehovah.

S.FORM: Maharek ci Hapakuk pasowal ci Yihofaan to hinapec ato kacalemceman i, wa miharateng cingra to sasamaan ci Yihofa a midemak alatek.
Maharek ci Hapakuk pasowal ci Yihofaan to hinapec ato kacalemceman i, wa miharateng cingra to sasamaan ci Yihofa a midemak alatek.
S.PHON: maħarək ʦi ħapako~u~uk paso~uwaɾ ʦi jiħo~ufaan to~u ħinapəʦ ato~u kaʦaɾəmʦəman i, wa miħaratəŋ ʦiŋra to~u sasamaan ʦi jiħo~ufa a miɬ~ɮəmak aɾatək.
S.TRANSL: After leaving his worries and concerns in Jehovah's hands, Habakkuk may have wondered how Jehovah would react.

S.FORM: Oniya ma'oningay mahaopay ko kalimlaan a limo'ot, nga'ay padama kitanan padotoc a misarocod to faloco'a madimadi ci Yihofaan.
Oniya ma'oningay mahaopay ko kalimlaan a limo'ot, nga'ay padama kitanan padotoc a misarocod to faloco'a madimadi ci Yihofaan.
S.PHON: o~unija maʡo~uniŋaj maħao~upaj ko~u kaɾimɾaan a ɾimo~uʡo~ut, ŋaʡaj paɬ~ɮama kitanan paɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ a misaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡa maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮi ʦi jiħo~ufaan.
S.TRANSL: These accounts contain vital lessons that can help us remain fully loyal to Jehovah.

S.FORM: Toniya pina miheca, o misakafahay demak malifetay ako ko lipahak a dademak ci Yihofaan."
Toniya pina miheca, o misakafahay demak malifetay ako ko lipahak a dademak ci Yihofaan."
S.PHON: to~unija pina miħəʦa, o~u misakafaħaj ɬ~ɮəmak maɾifətaj ako~u ko~u ɾipaħak a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak ʦi jiħo~ufaan."
S.TRANSL: My decision to pioneer helped me sidestep frustration in a secular career and opened the way for years of joy in Jehovah's service."

S.FORM: Kawra, kamayan mipalak cangra to kalala'ed no niyah aci Yihofa, mangalef malahdaway ko kalawidang ci Yihofaan.
Kawra, kamayan mipalak cangra to kalala'ed no niyah aci Yihofa, mangalef malahdaway ko kalawidang ci Yihofaan.
S.PHON: kawra, kamajan mipaɾak ʦaŋra to~u kaɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮ no~u nijaħ aʦi jiħo~ufa, maŋaɾəf maɾaħɬ~ɮawaj ko~u kaɾawiɬ~ɮaŋ ʦi jiħo~ufaan.
S.TRANSL: However, such a person strains his relationship with Jehovah and is in danger of losing it.

S.FORM: Samaan kiso mitodong ci Yihofaan?
Samaan kiso mitodong ci Yihofaan?
S.PHON: samaan kiso~u mito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ʦi jiħo~ufaan?
S.TRANSL: How can you benefit from God's example?

S.FORM: Micada kita to sarikec ni Yihofa anca mitodong ci Yihofaan aci Yisan a mirikec, wa milifok to adihayay sapalemed.
Micada kita to sarikec ni Yihofa anca mitodong ci Yihofaan aci Yisan a mirikec, wa milifok to adihayay sapalemed.
S.PHON: miʦaɬ~ɮa kita to~u sarikəʦ ni jiħo~ufa anʦa mito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ʦi jiħo~ufaan aʦi jisan a mirikəʦ, wa miɾifo~uk to~u aɬ~ɮiħajaj sapaɾəməɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: It would be difficult to enumerate all the blessings that result from accepting divine discipline and from imitating Jehovah and Jesus when disciplining others.

S.FORM: Mihaenay, miliyawan ako misalof ko patosokan, misamacay a mihodop ci Yihofaan."
Mihaenay, miliyawan ako misalof ko patosokan, misamacay a mihodop ci Yihofaan."
S.PHON: miħaənaj, miɾijawan ako~u misaɾo~uf ko~u pato~uso~ukan, misamaʦaj a miħo~uɬ~ɮo~up ʦi jiħo~ufaan."
S.TRANSL: As a result, I redirected my focus to serving Jehovah."

S.FORM: Kaemangho ci Timoti misa'osiayto faloco'mihodop ci Yihofaan, malo Krisciyang.
Kaemangho ci Timoti misa'osiayto faloco'mihodop ci Yihofaan, malo Krisciyang.
S.PHON: kaəmaŋħo~u ʦi timo~uti misaʡo~usiajto~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡmiħo~uɬ~ɮo~up ʦi jiħo~ufaan, maɾo~u krisʦijaŋ.
S.TRANSL: Timothy was a disciple who made the truth his own at a young age.

S.FORM: Tayra kami i dimeng i, mahemekay kako iraay ko timoloay ato maolahay ci Yihofaan a fafahi.
Tayra kami i dimeng i, mahemekay kako iraay ko timoloay ato maolahay ci Yihofaan a fafahi.
S.PHON: tajra kami i ɬ~ɮiməŋ i, maħəməkaj kako~u iraaj ko~u timo~uɾo~uaj ato~u mao~uɾaħaj ʦi jiħo~ufaan a fafaħi.
S.TRANSL: As we were escorted to the police station, I reflected on how fortunate I was to have such a bold and spiritual wife.

S.FORM: Sowal ni Atewa: "Misarocoday ko faloco' noniya mararamoday patafang to niyah ci Yihofaan, nga'ayay ko kacakat i no'adingoan."
Sowal ni Atewa: "Misarocoday ko faloco' noniya mararamoday patafang to niyah ci Yihofaan, nga'ayay ko kacakat i no'adingoan."
S.PHON: so~uwaɾ ni atəwa: "misaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮaj ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~unija mararamo~uɬ~ɮaj patafaŋ to~u nijaħ ʦi jiħo~ufaan, ŋaʡajaj ko~u kaʦakat i no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan."
S.TRANSL: He said: "Both husband and wife are fully consecrated and are showing wonderful progress."

S.FORM: Iraay ko toki ni Kain midopo ci Yihofaan, kawra samaanay ko demak ningra hani?
Iraay ko toki ni Kain midopo ci Yihofaan, kawra samaanay ko demak ningra hani?
S.PHON: iraaj ko~u to~uki ni kain miɬ~ɮo~upo~u ʦi jiħo~ufaan, kawra samaanaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak niŋra ħani?
S.TRANSL: Given the opportunity to be on Jehovah's side, what did Cain do?

S.FORM: Malecad ci Yihofaan aci Yisan Makelec a Malacecay
Malecad ci Yihofaan aci Yisan Makelec a Malacecay
S.PHON: maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ʦi jiħo~ufaan aʦi jisan makəɾəʦ a maɾaʦəʦaj
S.TRANSL: May We All Be One as Jehovah and Jesus Are One

S.FORM: Saka dademakayho ci Satan to pakidemay sapalak pacieci kitaanan ecato ka madimadi ci Yihofaan.
Saka dademakayho ci Satan to pakidemay sapalak pacieci kitaanan ecato ka madimadi ci Yihofaan.
S.PHON: saka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakajħo~u ʦi satan to~u pakiɬ~ɮəmaj sapaɾak paʦiəʦi kitaanan əʦato~u ka maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮi ʦi jiħo~ufaan.
S.TRANSL: In addition to offering bait, Satan tries to bully us into compromising our loyalty to Jehovah.

S.FORM: So'li'lin a mafana' kita ci Yihofaan ato palinian Ningra, wa mipili' to samaanay a widang ato lawla?
So'li'lin a mafana' kita ci Yihofaan ato palinian Ningra, wa mipili' to samaanay a widang ato lawla?
S.PHON: so~uʡɾiʡɾin a mafanaʡ kita ʦi jiħo~ufaan ato~u paɾinian niŋra, wa mipiɾiʡ to~u samaanaj a wiɬ~ɮaŋ ato~u ɾawɾa?
S.TRANSL: How does accurate knowledge of Jehovah and of his standards help us in choosing good associates and wholesome entertainment?

S.FORM: Kawra, matatodongay ko demak ni Mosi, samanen mihalamhamay cingra ci Yihofaan, misongila' a midoedo to sakayat.
Kawra, matatodongay ko demak ni Mosi, samanen mihalamhamay cingra ci Yihofaan, misongila' a midoedo to sakayat.
S.PHON: kawra, matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak ni mo~usi, samanən miħaɾamħamaj ʦiŋra ʦi jiħo~ufaan, miso~uŋiɾaʡ a miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u sakajat.
S.TRANSL: On that occasion, Moses reacted correctly by looking to Jehovah and then carefully following his direction.

S.FORM: Hano pahapinangen ita ko tao to misacecayay kita maolah ci Yihofaan hani?
Hano pahapinangen ita ko tao to misacecayay kita maolah ci Yihofaan hani?
S.PHON: ħano~u paħapinaŋən ita ko~u tao~u to~u misaʦəʦajaj kita mao~uɾaħ ʦi jiħo~ufaan ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why should it be obvious to others that we are exclusively devoted to Jehovah?

S.FORM: Hano mafana' kita o mamicada to ino' a tamdaw, maherekayto a miemin patafang to tireng ci Yihofaan hani?
Hano mafana' kita o mamicada to ino' a tamdaw, maherekayto a miemin patafang to tireng ci Yihofaan hani?
S.PHON: ħano~u mafanaʡ kita o~u mamiʦaɬ~ɮa to~u ino~uʡ a tamɬ~ɮaw, maħərəkajto~u a miəmin patafaŋ to~u tirəŋ ʦi jiħo~ufaan ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why is it reasonable to conclude that individuals who present themselves for baptism have already made an unreserved dedication to Jehovah?

S.FORM: Misamaanay hano mamicerid kiso miako'id ci Yihofaan hani?
Misamaanay hano mamicerid kiso miako'id ci Yihofaan hani?
S.PHON: misamaanaj ħano~u mamiʦəriɬ~ɮ kiso~u miako~uʡiɬ~ɮ ʦi jiħo~ufaan ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why should you always give thanks to Jehovah?

S.FORM: O tawki no paro no loma' ato malohemay malitengay misamaan a mitodong ci Yihofaan?
O tawki no paro no loma' ato malohemay malitengay misamaan a mitodong ci Yihofaan?
S.PHON: o~u tawki no~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ ato~u maɾo~uħəmaj maɾitəŋaj misamaan a mito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ʦi jiħo~ufaan?
S.TRANSL: How can elders and family heads imitate Jehovah?

S.FORM: Sapihaenaw to demak so'li'lin a mafana' ci Yihofaan nga'.
Sapihaenaw to demak so'li'lin a mafana' ci Yihofaan nga'.
S.PHON: sapiħaənaw to~u ɬ~ɮəmak so~uʡɾiʡɾin a mafanaʡ ʦi jiħo~ufaan ŋaʡ.
S.TRANSL: The key is to have accurate knowledge of him.

S.FORM: O limasmas noni pilimekan niyaro', hano matongal ko kafana' ita ci Yihofaan hani?
O limasmas noni pilimekan niyaro', hano matongal ko kafana' ita ci Yihofaan hani?
S.PHON: o~u ɾimasmas no~uni piɾiməkan nijaro~uʡ, ħano~u mato~uŋaɾ ko~u kafanaʡ ita ʦi jiħo~ufaan ħani?
S.TRANSL: How can the arrangement of the cities of refuge help us to understand Jehovah better?

S.FORM: Tada miako'iday kami ci Yihofaan aci Yisan padotoc pafeli to dipayal tamiyanan!
Tada miako'iday kami ci Yihofaan aci Yisan padotoc pafeli to dipayal tamiyanan!
S.PHON: taɬ~ɮa miako~uʡiɬ~ɮaj kami ʦi jiħo~ufaan aʦi jisan paɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ pafəɾi to~u ɬ~ɮipajaɾ tamijanan!
S.TRANSL: How thankful we are to be blessed with lasting inner peace!

S.FORM: Mihodop ci Yihofaan tada pakahemekay kitaanan.
Mihodop ci Yihofaan tada pakahemekay kitaanan.
S.PHON: miħo~uɬ~ɮo~up ʦi jiħo~ufaan taɬ~ɮa pakaħəməkaj kitaanan.
S.TRANSL: Jesus said to his disciples: "Take my yoke upon you."

S.FORM: Tada maketeray cangra, ngaliwngiwayho ci Mosian, mansa pasayra ci Mosi ci Yihofaan a micangacang: "Samaanen ako konini a finawlan?
Tada maketeray cangra, ngaliwngiwayho ci Mosian, mansa pasayra ci Mosi ci Yihofaan a micangacang: "Samaanen ako konini a finawlan?
S.PHON: taɬ~ɮa makətəraj ʦaŋra, ŋaɾiwŋiwajħo~u ʦi mo~usian, mansa pasajra ʦi mo~usi ʦi jiħo~ufaan a miʦaŋaʦaŋ: "samaanən ako~u ko~unini a finawɾan?
S.TRANSL: They began to murmur against Moses, and the situation became so serious that Moses cried out to Jehovah: "What should I do with this people?

S.FORM: Hano pakafana'en ko tao to o madimadiay ci Yihofaan kita hani?
Hano pakafana'en ko tao to o madimadiay ci Yihofaan kita hani?
S.PHON: ħano~u pakafanaʡən ko~u tao~u to~u o~u maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮiaj ʦi jiħo~ufaan kita ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why should it be obvious to others that we are devoted to Jehovah exclusively?

S.FORM: Ano maolahay kita ci Yihofaan ato salikaka i, o mamikiemel a eca pakihater han mirepat ko rihaday no tamdaw no Kawas.
Ano maolahay kita ci Yihofaan ato salikaka i, o mamikiemel a eca pakihater han mirepat ko rihaday no tamdaw no Kawas.
S.PHON: ano~u mao~uɾaħaj kita ʦi jiħo~ufaan ato~u saɾikaka i, o~u mamikiəməɾ a əʦa pakiħatər ħan mirəpat ko~u riħaɬ~ɮaj no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kawas.
S.TRANSL: If we love Jehovah and our brothers, we will do all we can to keep personal differences from disturbing or diminishing the peace of God's people.

S.FORM: Ano miliyas ko paro no loma' ci Yihofaan i, o manan ko papadama tisowanan miremo to somad?
Ano miliyas ko paro no loma' ci Yihofaan i, o manan ko papadama tisowanan miremo to somad?
S.PHON: ano~u miɾijas ko~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ ʦi jiħo~ufaan i, o~u manan ko~u papaɬ~ɮama tiso~uwanan mirəmo~u to~u so~umaɬ~ɮ?
S.TRANSL: What can help you to cope if a family member leaves Jehovah?

S.FORM: Ci Stifen, naitiniay i Tenmak, sanay: "To romi'ami'ad, mitosil to cowaho pakatengil ci Yihofaan tamdaw, so'linay kako pa'odingar to ngangan ni Yihofa."
Ci Stifen, naitiniay i Tenmak, sanay: "To romi'ami'ad, mitosil to cowaho pakatengil ci Yihofaan tamdaw, so'linay kako pa'odingar to ngangan ni Yihofa."
S.PHON: ʦi stifən, naitiniaj i tənmak, sanaj: "to~u ro~umiʡamiʡaɬ~ɮ, mito~usiɾ to~u ʦo~uwaħo~u pakatəŋiɾ ʦi jiħo~ufaan tamɬ~ɮaw, so~uʡɾinaj kako~u paʡo~uɬ~ɮiŋar to~u ŋaŋan ni jiħo~ufa."
S.TRANSL: Steffen, who is from Denmark, said: "Every day, I was able to preach to people who had never heard about Jehovah.

S.FORM: Ano malacafay kiso to tao i, mitodongay ci Yihofaan han?
Ano malacafay kiso to tao i, mitodongay ci Yihofaan han?
S.PHON: ano~u maɾaʦafaj kiso~u to~u tao~u i, mito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj ʦi jiħo~ufaan ħan?
S.TRANSL: Do you imitate Jehovah when dealing with others?

S.FORM: Hatiraay, halamham ci Yihofaan macapiday ko maanan hani?
Hatiraay, halamham ci Yihofaan macapiday ko maanan hani?
S.PHON: ħatiraaj, ħaɾamħam ʦi jiħo~ufaan maʦapiɬ~ɮaj ko~u maanan ħani?
S.TRANSL: What is involved in looking to Jehovah?

S.FORM: Makalimay kiso mitongal to tayal ci Yihofaan han?
Makalimay kiso mitongal to tayal ci Yihofaan han?
S.PHON: makaɾimaj kiso~u mito~uŋaɾ to~u tajaɾ ʦi jiħo~ufaan ħan?
S.TRANSL: Would you like to work with Jehovah more fully?

S.FORM: Oniya madimadiay tamdaw miliyasay to misafelitay a tamdaw, paihkal to kalacafayay ko niyah ci Yihofaan.
Oniya madimadiay tamdaw miliyasay to misafelitay a tamdaw, paihkal to kalacafayay ko niyah ci Yihofaan.
S.PHON: o~unija maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮiaj tamɬ~ɮaw miɾijasaj to~u misafəɾitaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, paiħkaɾ to~u kaɾaʦafajaj ko~u nijaħ ʦi jiħo~ufaan.
S.TRANSL: These loyal ones were not just taking sides with Jehovah but were at the same time separating themselves from the wrongdoers.

S.FORM: Ci Asiperatio padotocay madimadi ci Yihofaan, ta'angayay ko nika padama to kasakopang.
Ci Asiperatio padotocay madimadi ci Yihofaan, ta'angayay ko nika padama to kasakopang.
S.PHON: ʦi asipəratio~u paɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦaj maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮi ʦi jiħo~ufaan, taʡaŋajaj ko~u nika paɬ~ɮama to~u kasako~upaŋ.
S.TRANSL: As we might expect, Esperandio continues to serve Jehovah faithfully and to be a blessing to his congregation.

S.FORM: Wa samaan ko demak ita nga' misamacay ko minengnengan ci Yihofaan hani?
Wa samaan ko demak ita nga' misamacay ko minengnengan ci Yihofaan hani?
S.PHON: wa samaan ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak ita ŋaʡ misamaʦaj ko~u minəŋnəŋan ʦi jiħo~ufaan ħani?
S.TRANSL: What is involved in fixing our eyes on Jehovah?

S.FORM: Ano malacafay kita ci Yihofaan a matayal to romi'ami'ad, wa malifok ko maanan a sapalemed hani?
Ano malacafay kita ci Yihofaan a matayal to romi'ami'ad, wa malifok ko maanan a sapalemed hani?
S.PHON: ano~u maɾaʦafaj kita ʦi jiħo~ufaan a matajaɾ to~u ro~umiʡamiʡaɬ~ɮ, wa maɾifo~uk ko~u maanan a sapaɾəməɬ~ɮ ħani?
S.TRANSL: What do you stand to gain by working with Jehovah each day?

S.FORM: Samaanay ci Mosi aci Aron paihkal to midopoay ci Yihofaan ko niyah hani?
Samaanay ci Mosi aci Aron paihkal to midopoay ci Yihofaan ko niyah hani?
S.PHON: samaanaj ʦi mo~usi aʦi aro~un paiħkaɾ to~u miɬ~ɮo~upo~uaj ʦi jiħo~ufaan ko~u nijaħ ħani?
S.TRANSL: How did Moses and Aaron show that they were firmly on Jehovah's side?

S.FORM: Nohatini, nga'ayayto kako mifowah to faloco' ci Yihofaan."
Nohatini, nga'ayayto kako mifowah to faloco' ci Yihofaan."
S.PHON: no~uħatini, ŋaʡajajto~u kako~u mifo~uwaħ to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ʦi jiħo~ufaan."
S.TRANSL: Now, I feel that I can approach Jehovah without anything being in the way."

S.FORM: Hato misamacayay ci Mosi to harateng no niyah, mapawanto a pa'dil ci Yihofaan hokira?
Hato misamacayay ci Mosi to harateng no niyah, mapawanto a pa'dil ci Yihofaan hokira?
S.PHON: ħato~u misamaʦajaj ʦi mo~usi to~u ħaratəŋ no~u nijaħ, mapawanto~u a paʡɬ~ɮiɾ ʦi jiħo~ufaan ħo~ukira?
S.TRANSL: Was Moses thinking mainly of his own feelings instead of how he could glorify Jehovah?

S.FORM: Misamanay hano 'o misa'adaay ci Yihofaan, awaay ko taneng' hani?
Misamanay hano 'o misa'adaay ci Yihofaan, awaay ko taneng' hani?
S.PHON: misamanaj ħano~u ʡo~u misaʡaɬ~ɮaaj ʦi jiħo~ufaan, awaaj ko~u tanəŋʡ ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why is there "no wisdom... in opposition to Jehovah"?

S.FORM: Tanektek kiso a mihodop ci Yihofaan, pakalalokay to 'alomanay tamdaw, ano o adihayay ko milifetan a mitosilay micadaay to sapakalalok.
Tanektek kiso a mihodop ci Yihofaan, pakalalokay to 'alomanay tamdaw, ano o adihayay ko milifetan a mitosilay micadaay to sapakalalok.
S.PHON: tanəktək kiso~u a miħo~uɬ~ɮo~up ʦi jiħo~ufaan, pakaɾaɾo~ukaj to~u ʡaɾo~umanaj tamɬ~ɮaw, ano~u o~u aɬ~ɮiħajaj ko~u miɾifətan a mito~usiɾaj miʦaɬ~ɮaaj to~u sapakaɾaɾo~uk.
S.TRANSL: * Your steadfastness in serving Jehovah is a source of encouragement for many, even for experienced fellow believers.

S.FORM: MIDOKO KITA ci Yihofaan, mitokelay to sapilifokaw to olah Ningra, cowa ka hatira han?
MIDOKO KITA ci Yihofaan, mitokelay to sapilifokaw to olah Ningra, cowa ka hatira han?
S.PHON: miɬ~ɮo~uko~u kita ʦi jiħo~ufaan, mito~ukəɾaj to~u sapiɾifo~ukaw to~u o~uɾaħ niŋra, ʦo~uwa ka ħatira ħan?
S.TRANSL: WE SERVE Jehovah and want his favor, do we not?

S.FORM: Hano ciharateng kiso to sapasayraaw ci Yihofaan a mikilim to sadipot hani?
Hano ciharateng kiso to sapasayraaw ci Yihofaan a mikilim to sadipot hani?
S.PHON: ħano~u ʦiħaratəŋ kiso~u to~u sapasajraaw ʦi jiħo~ufaan a mikiɾim to~u saɬ~ɮipo~ut ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why do you want to take refuge in Jehovah?

S.FORM: Naitiniay i Frans a Stifani, sanay ko sowal: "Mikitini toni mikiriwi'ay demak mananamay niyam, cowa ko serangawan anca sasowalen ko palacecayay tamiyanan, ao nika olah niyam ci Yihofaan."
Naitiniay i Frans a Stifani, sanay ko sowal: "Mikitini toni mikiriwi'ay demak mananamay niyam, cowa ko serangawan anca sasowalen ko palacecayay tamiyanan, ao nika olah niyam ci Yihofaan."
S.PHON: naitiniaj i frans a stifani, sanaj ko~u so~uwaɾ: "mikitini to~uni mikiriwiʡaj ɬ~ɮəmak mananamaj nijam, ʦo~uwa ko~u səraŋawan anʦa saso~uwaɾən ko~u paɾaʦəʦajaj tamijanan, ao~u nika o~uɾaħ nijam ʦi jiħo~ufaan."
S.TRANSL: Stéphanie from France added: "The special campaign taught us that what unites us is not the culture or language but the love for Jehovah that we have in common."

S.FORM: Paihkalay cangra to madimadi ci Yihofaan ato likakawa Ningra.
Paihkalay cangra to madimadi ci Yihofaan ato likakawa Ningra.
S.PHON: paiħkaɾaj ʦaŋra to~u maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮi ʦi jiħo~ufaan ato~u ɾikakawa niŋra.
S.TRANSL: They have shown loyalty to Jehovah and to his organization!

S.FORM: Midimokos to paro no loma' hano mahecaday o malacafayay ci Yihofaan a matayal hani?
Midimokos to paro no loma' hano mahecaday o malacafayay ci Yihofaan a matayal hani?
S.PHON: miɬ~ɮimo~uko~us to~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ ħano~u maħəʦaɬ~ɮaj o~u maɾaʦafajaj ʦi jiħo~ufaan a matajaɾ ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why can it be said that everyone who cares for his family is cooperating with God?

S.FORM: Pakayni palahad to wawa, mitengil a mihakelong ci Yihofaan ko wama wina, hano masaka limelaan hani?
Pakayni palahad to wawa, mitengil a mihakelong ci Yihofaan ko wama wina, hano masaka limelaan hani?
S.PHON: pakajni paɾaħaɬ~ɮ to~u wawa, mitəŋiɾ a miħakəɾo~uŋ ʦi jiħo~ufaan ko~u wama wina, ħano~u masaka ɾiməɾaan ħani?
S.TRANSL: How important is parental example in training children?

S.FORM: Ano tano niyah a pakayraan ko pisaysay to demak eca ka halamham ci Yihofaan, mihaen o cowato kangodo ci Yihofaan.
Ano tano niyah a pakayraan ko pisaysay to demak eca ka halamham ci Yihofaan, mihaen o cowato kangodo ci Yihofaan.
S.PHON: ano~u tano~u nijaħ a pakajraan ko~u pisajsaj to~u ɬ~ɮəmak əʦa ka ħaɾamħam ʦi jiħo~ufaan, miħaən o~u ʦo~uwato~u kaŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u ʦi jiħo~ufaan.
S.TRANSL: To do otherwise and avenge ourselves in some way would be tantamount to disrespecting Jehovah.

S.FORM: Patafang kita to tireng ci Yihofaan micada to ino', paihkalay to maanan?
Patafang kita to tireng ci Yihofaan micada to ino', paihkalay to maanan?
S.PHON: patafaŋ kita to~u tirəŋ ʦi jiħo~ufaan miʦaɬ~ɮa to~u ino~uʡ, paiħkaɾaj to~u maanan?
S.TRANSL: What are some of the things we accomplish through dedication and baptism?

S.FORM: Misodod kita to pakararaway kitaanan a tamdaw, paihekalay to miako'iday kita ci Yihofaan, pakayni i sapatefoc ni Kristo a misodod to raraw no mita.
Misodod kita to pakararaway kitaanan a tamdaw, paihekalay to miako'iday kita ci Yihofaan, pakayni i sapatefoc ni Kristo a misodod to raraw no mita.
S.PHON: miso~uɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮ kita to~u pakararawaj kitaanan a tamɬ~ɮaw, paiħəkaɾaj to~u miako~uʡiɬ~ɮaj kita ʦi jiħo~ufaan, pakajni i sapatəfo~uʦ ni kristo~u a miso~uɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮ to~u raraw no~u mita.
S.TRANSL: When we forgive those who have offended us, we show that we appreciate the forgiveness of our own sins made possible by Christ's ransom sacrifice.

S.FORM: Ano padotoc kita halamham ci Yihofaan, cato ka pakayni i waywayan no tao a maketer, hato mapalak ko kalala'ed no niyah aci Yihofa.
Ano padotoc kita halamham ci Yihofaan, cato ka pakayni i waywayan no tao a maketer, hato mapalak ko kalala'ed no niyah aci Yihofa.
S.PHON: ano~u paɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ kita ħaɾamħam ʦi jiħo~ufaan, ʦato~u ka pakajni i wajwajan no~u tao~u a makətər, ħato~u mapaɾak ko~u kaɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮ no~u nijaħ aʦi jiħo~ufa.
S.TRANSL: If we keep our figurative eyes focused on Jehovah, we will not allow the actions of others to embitter us or damage our relationship with him.

S.FORM: Harateng iso, sapadotocaw mahemek a mihodop ci Yihofaan, cowa ko madoloay hokira?
Harateng iso, sapadotocaw mahemek a mihodop ci Yihofaan, cowa ko madoloay hokira?
S.PHON: ħaratəŋ iso~u, sapaɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦaw maħəmək a miħo~uɬ~ɮo~up ʦi jiħo~ufaan, ʦo~uwa ko~u maɬ~ɮo~uɾo~uaj ħo~ukira?
S.TRANSL: Do you at times find it hard to maintain your joy in Jehovah's service?

S.FORM: Misarocod kita a mitosil, micowat to kakelec, padotoc a mikecol, wa nga'ay pa'dil ci Yihofaan.
Misarocod kita a mitosil, micowat to kakelec, padotoc a mikecol, wa nga'ay pa'dil ci Yihofaan.
S.PHON: misaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ kita a mito~usiɾ, miʦo~uwat to~u kakəɾəʦ, paɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ a mikəʦo~uɾ, wa ŋaʡaj paʡɬ~ɮiɾ ʦi jiħo~ufaan.
S.TRANSL: The increase we observe, the unity we enjoy, and the watchful attitude that we strive to maintain all contribute to our bringing glory to Jehovah.

S.FORM: Mahemekay kita patafang to sapatelong ci Yihofaan, samanen maolahay ato miako'iday kita Cingranan.
Mahemekay kita patafang to sapatelong ci Yihofaan, samanen maolahay ato miako'iday kita Cingranan.
S.PHON: maħəməkaj kita patafaŋ to~u sapatəɾo~uŋ ʦi jiħo~ufaan, samanən mao~uɾaħaj ato~u miako~uʡiɬ~ɮaj kita ʦiŋranan.
S.TRANSL: We give to Jehovah because of our love and appreciation for him.

S.FORM: Patafang to dafong ci Yihofaan, milingatay to pidoko Cingranan.
Patafang to dafong ci Yihofaan, milingatay to pidoko Cingranan.
S.PHON: patafaŋ to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ ʦi jiħo~ufaan, miɾiŋataj to~u piɬ~ɮo~uko~u ʦiŋranan.
S.TRANSL: Giving is also an expression of our worship of Jehovah.

S.FORM: Miako'iday kita ci Yihofaan nga'ay malo finawlan Ningra kita.
Miako'iday kita ci Yihofaan nga'ay malo finawlan Ningra kita.
S.PHON: miako~uʡiɬ~ɮaj kita ʦi jiħo~ufaan ŋaʡaj maɾo~u finawɾan niŋra kita.
S.TRANSL: Surely we are eager to show our appreciation to Jehovah for the honor of being his people.

S.FORM: O Krisciyang alatek pakayni to maanan a lalangian, malahdaw ko kalawidang ci Yihofaan hani?
O Krisciyang alatek pakayni to maanan a lalangian, malahdaw ko kalawidang ci Yihofaan hani?
S.PHON: o~u krisʦijaŋ aɾatək pakajni to~u maanan a ɾaɾaŋian, maɾaħɬ~ɮaw ko~u kaɾawiɬ~ɮaŋ ʦi jiħo~ufaan ħani?
S.TRANSL: What could cause us to lose our relationship with Jehovah?

S.FORM: O malinahay tayra i Tureky a roma kitakit a salikaka, to romi'ami'ad malitemohay ko cowaho pakatengil ci Yihofaan a tamdaw.
O malinahay tayra i Tureky a roma kitakit a salikaka, to romi'ami'ad malitemohay ko cowaho pakatengil ci Yihofaan a tamdaw.
S.PHON: o~u maɾinaħaj tajra i to~u~urəkj a ro~uma kitakit a saɾikaka, to~u ro~umiʡamiʡaɬ~ɮ maɾitəmo~uħaj ko~u ʦo~uwaħo~u pakatəŋiɾ ʦi jiħo~ufaan a tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: Every day, need-greaters who moved to Turkey meet people who have never heard about Jehovah.

S.FORM: Roma i, ano saka madimadiaw kita ci Yihofaan, misi'ayaw to macalohay no paisingay a demak, wa isalakat midotim to harateng ni Yihofa.
Roma i, ano saka madimadiaw kita ci Yihofaan, misi'ayaw to macalohay no paisingay a demak, wa isalakat midotim to harateng ni Yihofa.
S.PHON: ro~uma i, ano~u saka maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮiaw kita ʦi jiħo~ufaan, misiʡajaw to~u maʦaɾo~uħaj no~u paisiŋaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, wa isaɾakat miɬ~ɮo~utim to~u ħaratəŋ ni jiħo~ufa.
S.TRANSL: Giving advance thought to the need to remain loyal can also prove helpful in the event of a medical emergency.

S.FORM: Midofdof ci Yihofaan so'lina mamikinafalah to maanan, saikor o mamalifok ko ta'angayay hemek.
Midofdof ci Yihofaan so'lina mamikinafalah to maanan, saikor o mamalifok ko ta'angayay hemek.
S.PHON: miɬ~ɮo~ufɬ~ɮo~uf ʦi jiħo~ufaan so~uʡɾina mamikinafaɾaħ to~u maanan, saiko~ur o~u mamaɾifo~uk ko~u taʡaŋajaj ħəmək.
S.TRANSL: That is so even if his requirements involve our making some sacrifices.

S.FORM: Mihaen a tosa ko palinian o milipalaway to wama wina, kasakopang, milipalawayho ci Yihofaan.
Mihaen a tosa ko palinian o milipalaway to wama wina, kasakopang, milipalawayho ci Yihofaan.
S.PHON: miħaən a to~usa ko~u paɾinian o~u miɾipaɾawaj to~u wama wina, kasako~upaŋ, miɾipaɾawajħo~u ʦi jiħo~ufaan.
S.TRANSL: They may use bad language, wear immodest clothes, listen to debased music, abuse alcohol or drugs, date secretly, and worse.

S.FORM: Saka cecay hahekalan a Krisciyang patirengay to ta'arawan, mapolong a romadiw pahemek ci Yihofaan.
Saka cecay hahekalan a Krisciyang patirengay to ta'arawan, mapolong a romadiw pahemek ci Yihofaan.
S.PHON: saka ʦəʦaj ħaħəkaɾan a krisʦijaŋ patirəŋaj to~u taʡarawan, mapo~uɾo~uŋ a ro~umaɬ~ɮiw paħəmək ʦi jiħo~ufaan.
S.TRANSL: First-century Christians set a pattern of praising God together in song.

S.FORM: O ciraramoday Krisciyang ano maolahay ci Yihofaan tatodongen Cingra.
O ciraramoday Krisciyang ano maolahay ci Yihofaan tatodongen Cingra.
S.PHON: o~u ʦiraramo~uɬ~ɮaj krisʦijaŋ ano~u mao~uɾaħaj ʦi jiħo~ufaan tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋən ʦiŋra.
S.TRANSL: Accordingly, married couples who love Jehovah's ways imitate him.

S.FORM: Ano sakacakataw i pihodop ci Yihofaan, makahi kiso micada to adihayay a sapahatatanam han?
Ano sakacakataw i pihodop ci Yihofaan, makahi kiso micada to adihayay a sapahatatanam han?
S.PHON: ano~u sakaʦakataw i piħo~uɬ~ɮo~up ʦi jiħo~ufaan, makaħi kiso~u miʦaɬ~ɮa to~u aɬ~ɮiħajaj a sapaħatatanam ħan?
S.TRANSL: Do you desire to receive further training so as to be better equipped to carry out your sacred service?

S.FORM: Sasamaan kita miremo to ci'angiay, mahemek a romadiw pakahemek ci Yihofaan hani?
Sasamaan kita miremo to ci'angiay, mahemek a romadiw pakahemek ci Yihofaan hani?
S.PHON: sasamaan kita mirəmo~u to~u ʦiʡaŋiaj, maħəmək a ro~umaɬ~ɮiw pakaħəmək ʦi jiħo~ufaan ħani?
S.TRANSL: How can we overcome the fear of using our voice to sing praises to Jehovah?

S.FORM: Samaanay kita padama cangranan mafana' ci Yihofaan ato araaw Ningra hani?
Samaanay kita padama cangranan mafana' ci Yihofaan ato araaw Ningra hani?
S.PHON: samaanaj kita paɬ~ɮama ʦaŋranan mafanaʡ ʦi jiħo~ufaan ato~u araaw niŋra ħani?
S.TRANSL: What can you do to help such ones come to know Jehovah and his purpose?

S.FORM: Ano misi'ayaw kita to pasangaray a sapalifet i noka'orip i, sasamaan misamacay ko minengnengan ci Yihofaan hani?
Ano misi'ayaw kita to pasangaray a sapalifet i noka'orip i, sasamaan misamacay ko minengnengan ci Yihofaan hani?
S.PHON: ano~u misiʡajaw kita to~u pasaŋaraj a sapaɾifət i no~ukaʡo~urip i, sasamaan misamaʦaj ko~u minəŋnəŋan ʦi jiħo~ufaan ħani?
S.TRANSL: And how can we make sure that our eyes remain fixed on him as we face life's complex challenges?

S.FORM: O micadaayto kiso to ino'a kaemangay, anca sapicadaaw to ino'a tamdaw, ano sapitongalaw to kalawidang ci Yihofaan, wa misamaan kiso to demak hani?
O micadaayto kiso to ino'a kaemangay, anca sapicadaaw to ino'a tamdaw, ano sapitongalaw to kalawidang ci Yihofaan, wa misamaan kiso to demak hani?
S.PHON: o~u miʦaɬ~ɮaajto~u kiso~u to~u ino~uʡa kaəmaŋaj, anʦa sapiʦaɬ~ɮaaw to~u ino~uʡa tamɬ~ɮaw, ano~u sapito~uŋaɾaw to~u kaɾawiɬ~ɮaŋ ʦi jiħo~ufaan, wa misamaan kiso~u to~u ɬ~ɮəmak ħani?
S.TRANSL: Baptized young ones and those who are contemplating baptism, how can you strengthen your relationship with Jehovah?

S.FORM: So'lin mapaci'ci malaliyas to fafahi ato wawa, kawra maharateng to padotocay madimadiay kako aci Mariya ci Yihofaan, masayaray ko faloco' ako.
So'lin mapaci'ci malaliyas to fafahi ato wawa, kawra maharateng to padotocay madimadiay kako aci Mariya ci Yihofaan, masayaray ko faloco' ako.
S.PHON: so~uʡɾin mapaʦiʡʦi maɾaɾijas to~u fafaħi ato~u wawa, kawra maħaratəŋ to~u paɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦaj maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮiaj kako~u aʦi marija ʦi jiħo~ufaan, masajaraj ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ako~u.
S.TRANSL: Although my wife and daughters were far away, I drew comfort from knowing that Maria and I had remained loyal to Jehovah.

S.FORM: Ano sakacaaw ka palak no kalawidang ci Yihofaan i, wa samaan ko hademak ita hani?
Ano sakacaaw ka palak no kalawidang ci Yihofaan i, wa samaan ko hademak ita hani?
S.PHON: ano~u sakaʦaaw ka paɾak no~u kaɾawiɬ~ɮaŋ ʦi jiħo~ufaan i, wa samaan ko~u ħaɬ~ɮəmak ita ħani?
S.TRANSL: What course of action is vital if we are to protect our special friendship with Jehovah?

S.FORM: Ci Filip aci Mari padotoc a misamacay mihodop ci Yihofaan, malifokay nangra ko sapafeli ni Yihofa a sapalemed.
Ci Filip aci Mari padotoc a misamacay mihodop ci Yihofaan, malifokay nangra ko sapafeli ni Yihofa a sapalemed.
S.PHON: ʦi fiɾip aʦi mari paɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ a misamaʦaj miħo~uɬ~ɮo~up ʦi jiħo~ufaan, maɾifo~ukaj naŋra ko~u sapafəɾi ni jiħo~ufa a sapaɾəməɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: In response to their efforts to maintain a spiritual outlook on their situation, Jehovah blessed Philip and Mary in many ways.

S.FORM: Ci Mosi aci Aron samaanay paihkal to midopoay ko niyah ci Yihofaan?
Ci Mosi aci Aron samaanay paihkal to midopoay ko niyah ci Yihofaan?
S.PHON: ʦi mo~usi aʦi aro~un samaanaj paiħkaɾ to~u miɬ~ɮo~upo~uaj ko~u nijaħ ʦi jiħo~ufaan?
S.TRANSL: How did Moses and Aaron seize opportunities to show that they were on Jehovah's side?

S.FORM: O cecacecay midokoay to Kawas a tamdaw, makalimay cangra pakayni ci Yihofaan a ci'icel, tanoktok a mihodop ci Yihofa.
O cecacecay midokoay to Kawas a tamdaw, makalimay cangra pakayni ci Yihofaan a ci'icel, tanoktok a mihodop ci Yihofa.
S.PHON: o~u ʦəʦaʦəʦaj miɬ~ɮo~uko~uaj to~u kawas a tamɬ~ɮaw, makaɾimaj ʦaŋra pakajni ʦi jiħo~ufaan a ʦiʡiʦəɾ, tano~ukto~uk a miħo~uɬ~ɮo~up ʦi jiħo~ufa.
S.TRANSL: All of us desire to be made strong by Jehovah and to remain firm in our worship.

S.FORM: Mafiyoray no waywayan no tao ci Mosi, telocto cowa ka padotoc mihalamham ci Yihofaan.
Mafiyoray no waywayan no tao ci Mosi, telocto cowa ka padotoc mihalamham ci Yihofaan.
S.PHON: mafijo~uraj no~u wajwajan no~u tao~u ʦi mo~usi, təɾo~uʦto~u ʦo~uwa ka paɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ miħaɾamħam ʦi jiħo~ufaan.
S.TRANSL: Moses allowed the actions of others to distract him from keeping his eyes fixed on Jehovah.

S.FORM: Samaan kita miliyas to pakayni i raraw no tao a mapalak ko kalala'ed ci Yihofaan hani?
Samaan kita miliyas to pakayni i raraw no tao a mapalak ko kalala'ed ci Yihofaan hani?
S.PHON: samaan kita miɾijas to~u pakajni i raraw no~u tao~u a mapaɾak ko~u kaɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮ ʦi jiħo~ufaan ħani?
S.TRANSL: How can we avoid damaging our relationship with Jehovah even though we may be dealing with the mistakes of others?

S.FORM: Tada mahemekay ci Aan mipadang ci Paulaan padadotoc a midoko ci Yihofaan.
Tada mahemekay ci Aan mipadang ci Paulaan padadotoc a midoko ci Yihofaan.
S.PHON: taɬ~ɮa maħəməkaj ʦi aan mipaɬ~ɮaŋ ʦi pao~u~uɾaan paɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ a miɬ~ɮo~uko~u ʦi jiħo~ufaan.
S.TRANSL: Ann too is happy, for she has been like a spiritual mother to Paula.

S.FORM: Tahiraay i patay ko kamadimadi no wama wina ako a mihodop ci Yihofaan, mitokelay kako militemoh cangranan i faelohay hekal.
Tahiraay i patay ko kamadimadi no wama wina ako a mihodop ci Yihofaan, mitokelay kako militemoh cangranan i faelohay hekal.
S.PHON: taħiraaj i pataj ko~u kamaɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮi no~u wama wina ako~u a miħo~uɬ~ɮo~up ʦi jiħo~ufaan, mito~ukəɾaj kako~u miɾitəmo~uħ ʦaŋranan i faəɾo~uħaj ħəkaɾ.
S.TRANSL: My parents both died faithful to Jehovah, and I look forward to welcoming them back in a much better world.

S.FORM: Ikor, misafelitay ci Yihofaan ko Israil tamdaw, cowato pidama to matatodongay a pihakelongan.
Ikor, misafelitay ci Yihofaan ko Israil tamdaw, cowato pidama to matatodongay a pihakelongan.
S.PHON: iko~ur, misafəɾitaj ʦi jiħo~ufaan ko~u israiɾ tamɬ~ɮaw, ʦo~uwato~u piɬ~ɮama to~u matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a piħakəɾo~uŋan.
S.TRANSL: Over time, most Israelites claiming to serve Jehovah turned their backs on him and on true worship.

S.FORM: Ci Solomon midemakay to maanan a pakararaway ci Yihofaan a demak hani?
Ci Solomon midemakay to maanan a pakararaway ci Yihofaan a demak hani?
S.PHON: ʦi so~uɾo~umo~un miɬ~ɮəmakaj to~u maanan a pakararawaj ʦi jiħo~ufaan a ɬ~ɮəmak ħani?
S.TRANSL: To what extreme did Solomon offend Jehovah?

S.FORM: O micawma'an iso a tamdaw wa samaan ko pilingat to kalawidang iso aci Yihofaan?
O micawma'an iso a tamdaw wa samaan ko pilingat to kalawidang iso aci Yihofaan?
S.PHON: o~u miʦawmaʡan iso~u a tamɬ~ɮaw wa samaan ko~u piɾiŋat to~u kaɾawiɬ~ɮaŋ iso~u aʦi jiħo~ufaan?
S.TRANSL: What effect are your associates having on your relationship with Jehovah?

S.FORM: Ano midoko kiso ci Yihofaan wa ira ko 'alomanay nga'ayay a widang, naitiniay icowacowa pala cangra, o roma cowaho ka so'araw iso!
Ano midoko kiso ci Yihofaan wa ira ko 'alomanay nga'ayay a widang, naitiniay icowacowa pala cangra, o roma cowaho ka so'araw iso!
S.PHON: ano~u miɬ~ɮo~uko~u kiso~u ʦi jiħo~ufaan wa ira ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj ŋaʡajaj a wiɬ~ɮaŋ, naitiniaj iʦo~uwaʦo~uwa paɾa ʦaŋra, o~u ro~uma ʦo~uwaħo~u ka so~uʡaraw iso~u!
S.TRANSL: It is no exaggeration to say that as a worshipper of Jehovah, you have the very best kind of friends, and they are all around the world.

S.FORM: O kapah no kasakopang misa'icel pakahemek ci Yihofaan, wa nga'ay milifok to haepoc no niyah.
O kapah no kasakopang misa'icel pakahemek ci Yihofaan, wa nga'ay milifok to haepoc no niyah.
S.PHON: o~u kapaħ no~u kasako~upaŋ misaʡiʦəɾ pakaħəmək ʦi jiħo~ufaan, wa ŋaʡaj miɾifo~uk to~u ħaəpo~uʦ no~u nijaħ.
S.TRANSL: Young people in the congregation benefit themselves if they focus on pleasing Jehovah.

S.FORM: Wa nga'ay kita misamaan mitodong ci Yihofaan, miliyas to waywayan no pasifana'ay to Rikec ato Farisay tamdaw hani?
Wa nga'ay kita misamaan mitodong ci Yihofaan, miliyas to waywayan no pasifana'ay to Rikec ato Farisay tamdaw hani?
S.PHON: wa ŋaʡaj kita misamaan mito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ʦi jiħo~ufaan, miɾijas to~u wajwajan no~u pasifanaʡaj to~u rikəʦ ato~u farisaj tamɬ~ɮaw ħani?
S.TRANSL: How can we avoid the attitude of the scribes and Pharisees and imitate Jehovah?

S.FORM: Malecaday toya mitiliday to 'Olic a tamdaw kita, adihayay ko lalangian milekal "pahemek ci Yihofaan" halo pakalalok to romaroma tamdaw pakahemek i Cingranan!
Malecaday toya mitiliday to 'Olic a tamdaw kita, adihayay ko lalangian milekal "pahemek ci Yihofaan" halo pakalalok to romaroma tamdaw pakahemek i Cingranan!
S.PHON: maɾəʦaɬ~ɮaj to~uja mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj to~u ʡo~uɾiʦ a tamɬ~ɮaw kita, aɬ~ɮiħajaj ko~u ɾaɾaŋian miɾəkaɾ "paħəmək ʦi jiħo~ufaan" ħaɾo~u pakaɾaɾo~uk to~u ro~umaro~uma tamɬ~ɮaw pakaħəmək i ʦiŋranan!
S.TRANSL: Like the writer of Psalm 147, do you not have many good reasons to cry out "Praise Jah!"

S.FORM: Ano samanayto ko tatodong ni Mosi, ora sowal ningra paihkalay to cowa ka ngodo ko niyah ci Yihofaan, samanen cowa panokayen ningra ci Yihofaan koniya sapidemak to kafahka'an a 'icel.
Ano samanayto ko tatodong ni Mosi, ora sowal ningra paihkalay to cowa ka ngodo ko niyah ci Yihofaan, samanen cowa panokayen ningra ci Yihofaan koniya sapidemak to kafahka'an a 'icel.
S.PHON: ano~u samanajto~u ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ni mo~usi, o~ura so~uwaɾ niŋra paiħkaɾaj to~u ʦo~uwa ka ŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u ko~u nijaħ ʦi jiħo~ufaan, samanən ʦo~uwa pano~ukajən niŋra ʦi jiħo~ufaan ko~unija sapiɬ~ɮəmak to~u kafaħkaʡan a ʡiʦəɾ.
S.TRANSL: Those words indicated a gross lack of respect for Jehovah as the true Source of that miracle.

S.FORM: Onini lalakaw wa milengo to samaanay hano patafang kita to kalimelaan a dafong a pa'odingar ci Yihofaan, ato mihaen ko demak ita wa milifok to manan sapalemed.
Onini lalakaw wa milengo to samaanay hano patafang kita to kalimelaan a dafong a pa'odingar ci Yihofaan, ato mihaen ko demak ita wa milifok to manan sapalemed.
S.PHON: o~unini ɾaɾakaw wa miɾəŋo~u to~u samaanaj ħano~u patafaŋ kita to~u kaɾiməɾaan a ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ a paʡo~uɬ~ɮiŋar ʦi jiħo~ufaan, ato~u miħaən ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak ita wa miɾifo~uk to~u manan sapaɾəməɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: This article will consider why and how we benefit from honoring Jehovah with our valuable things.

S.FORM: So'lin wa awa ko tolas no toki ita noikor, pakayniay ci Yihofaan a sifana' cowa ko mamaemin ita a minanam.
So'lin wa awa ko tolas no toki ita noikor, pakayniay ci Yihofaan a sifana' cowa ko mamaemin ita a minanam.
S.PHON: so~uʡɾin wa awa ko~u to~uɾas no~u to~uki ita no~uiko~ur, pakajniaj ʦi jiħo~ufaan a sifanaʡ ʦo~uwa ko~u mamaəmin ita a minanam.
S.TRANSL: Even with an eternity of time, we can always learn more about Jehovah.

S.FORM: 'Alomanay kapah i kasakopang pakaremoay to pasangaray, misarocod to faloco' mihodop ci Yihofaan, citodongay to papakahemeken no mita.
'Alomanay kapah i kasakopang pakaremoay to pasangaray, misarocod to faloco' mihodop ci Yihofaan, citodongay to papakahemeken no mita.
S.PHON: ʡaɾo~umanaj kapaħ i kasako~upaŋ pakarəmo~uaj to~u pasaŋaraj, misaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ miħo~uɬ~ɮo~up ʦi jiħo~ufaan, ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u papakaħəməkən no~u mita.
S.TRANSL: Young people in the congregation deserve warm commendation for the way they meet these challenges and for being determined to focus their lives on serving Jehovah.

S.FORM: Iraay ko samaanay a hrateng ni Tafiti ci Yihofaan hani?
Iraay ko samaanay a hrateng ni Tafiti ci Yihofaan hani?
S.PHON: iraaj ko~u samaanaj a ħratəŋ ni tafiti ʦi jiħo~ufaan ħani?
S.TRANSL: How did David feel toward Jehovah?

S.FORM: Mahaen o masowalay i fafekang a tinakoan, ano misa'icel kita a midemak, ira ko pakaso'lin no faloco' mitala ci Yihofaan, wa nga'ayto kita mitafo to rihadayay faloco'.
Mahaen o masowalay i fafekang a tinakoan, ano misa'icel kita a midemak, ira ko pakaso'lin no faloco' mitala ci Yihofaan, wa nga'ayto kita mitafo to rihadayay faloco'.
S.PHON: maħaən o~u maso~uwaɾaj i fafəkaŋ a tinako~uan, ano~u misaʡiʦəɾ kita a miɬ~ɮəmak, ira ko~u pakaso~uʡɾin no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ mitaɾa ʦi jiħo~ufaan, wa ŋaʡajto~u kita mitafo~u to~u riħaɬ~ɮajaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ.
S.TRANSL: As these examples show, if we make the best of our circumstances and wait confidently on Jehovah, we will maintain our inner peace.

S.FORM: Kaemangho ci Yis milifetayto to patay no salawina.
Kaemangho ci Yis milifetayto to patay no salawina.
S.PHON: kaəmaŋħo~u ʦi jis miɾifətajto~u to~u pataj no~u saɾawina.
S.TRANSL: In his younger years, Jesus no doubt had to deal with the deaths of family members and acquaintances.

S.FORM: Pakayni to noka'orip no kaemanganho ni Yis, o matiliday ni Matay aci Luka hano caka hahecad?
Pakayni to noka'orip no kaemanganho ni Yis, o matiliday ni Matay aci Luka hano caka hahecad?
S.PHON: pakajni to~u no~ukaʡo~urip no~u kaəmaŋanħo~u ni jis, o~u matiɾiɬ~ɮaj ni mataj aʦi ɾo~u~uka ħano~u ʦaka ħaħəʦaɬ~ɮ?
S.TRANSL: Why do Matthew's and Luke's accounts differ as to Jesus' early life?

S.FORM: Somowalay ci Yis to cecay tinakoan, milengo to cecay sida'itay a Samariya tamdaw samanay paihkal to adayayay.
Somowalay ci Yis to cecay tinakoan, milengo to cecay sida'itay a Samariya tamdaw samanay paihkal to adayayay.
S.PHON: so~umo~uwaɾaj ʦi jis to~u ʦəʦaj tinako~uan, miɾəŋo~u to~u ʦəʦaj siɬ~ɮaʡitaj a samarija tamɬ~ɮaw samanaj paiħkaɾ to~u aɬ~ɮajajaj.
S.TRANSL: Jesus' illustration of the neighborly Samaritan vividly portrays what it means to show mercy.

S.FORM: Mihaenay, palahad kita to harateng ni Yis ato waywayan, tada o kalimelaan.
Mihaenay, palahad kita to harateng ni Yis ato waywayan, tada o kalimelaan.
S.PHON: miħaənaj, paɾaħaɬ~ɮ kita to~u ħaratəŋ ni jis ato~u wajwajan, taɬ~ɮa o~u kaɾiməɾaan.
S.TRANSL: For these reasons, it becomes clear how important it is to learn to think as Jesus does.

S.FORM: Sanay kora sinael: "Nengneng sa ci Yis to finawlan i, saadayay sa cingra, nawhani marawraw cangra a matiya o malafelay a siri to awaay ko pakaenay."
Sanay kora sinael: "Nengneng sa ci Yis to finawlan i, saadayay sa cingra, nawhani marawraw cangra a matiya o malafelay a siri to awaay ko pakaenay."
S.PHON: sanaj ko~ura sinaəɾ: "nəŋnəŋ sa ʦi jis to~u finawɾan i, saaɬ~ɮajaj sa ʦiŋra, nawħani marawraw ʦaŋra a matija o~u maɾafəɾaj a siri to~u awaaj ko~u pakaənaj."
S.TRANSL: That verse says: "On seeing the crowds, Jesus felt pity for them, because they were skinned and thrown about like sheep without a shepherd."

S.FORM: Nikawrira, cowa ka ciharateng ci Yosif, mihaen to tireng ni Yis.
Nikawrira, cowa ka ciharateng ci Yosif, mihaen to tireng ni Yis.
S.PHON: nikawrira, ʦo~uwa ka ʦiħaratəŋ ʦi jo~usif, miħaən to~u tirəŋ ni jis.
S.TRANSL: But that is not what Joseph had in mind for Jesus.

S.FORM: Kalimelaan i padamaan ningra ko 'alomanay, cipinang to mala'osiay ko piliyaw ni Yis ma'orip to 'Olic 16:10.
Kalimelaan i padamaan ningra ko 'alomanay, cipinang to mala'osiay ko piliyaw ni Yis ma'orip to 'Olic 16:10.
