S.PHON: kaɾiməɾaan i paɬ~ɮamaan niŋra ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj, ʦipinaŋ to~u maɾaʡo~usiaj ko~u piɾijaw ni jis maʡo~urip to~u ʡo~uɾiʦ **:**.
S.TRANSL: More to the point, the people acknowledged that Psalm 16:10 was fulfilled when Jesus was resurrected from the dead.

S.FORM: Samaanay ci Yis misi'ayaw to misakakinihay?
Samaanay ci Yis misi'ayaw to misakakinihay?
S.PHON: samaanaj ʦi jis misiʡajaw to~u misakakiniħaj?
S.TRANSL: How did Jesus deal with prejudice?

S.FORM: Pakayni i matatodongay a pirikec ato ciepocay a pasifana', mikitini ta'arawan ni Yis mananamay ita ko maanan?
Pakayni i matatodongay a pirikec ato ciepocay a pasifana', mikitini ta'arawan ni Yis mananamay ita ko maanan?
S.PHON: pakajni i matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a pirikəʦ ato~u ʦiəpo~uʦaj a pasifanaʡ, mikitini taʡarawan ni jis mananamaj ita ko~u maanan?
S.TRANSL: What are some lessons about appropriate discipline and effective teaching that we can learn from Jesus?

S.FORM: O roma sapicowat to kalacecay a pakayraan i, dotimen ko tatodong no tahapinangan a dafong i Piharatengan to Kapatay ni Yis a Sa'opo.
O roma sapicowat to kalacecay a pakayraan i, dotimen ko tatodong no tahapinangan a dafong i Piharatengan to Kapatay ni Yis a Sa'opo.
S.PHON: o~u ro~uma sapiʦo~uwat to~u kaɾaʦəʦaj a pakajraan i, ɬ~ɮo~utimən ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u taħapinaŋan a ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ i piħaratəŋan to~u kapataj ni jis a saʡo~upo~u.
S.TRANSL: A second way we can promote unity is by reflecting on the meaning of the emblems used at the Memorial.

S.FORM: Iraayho ko maanan a wacay paihkal to sowal ni Yis i, "so'linen ako pasowal kiso anini" hani?
Iraayho ko maanan a wacay paihkal to sowal ni Yis i, "so'linen ako pasowal kiso anini" hani?
S.PHON: iraajħo~u ko~u maanan a waʦaj paiħkaɾ to~u so~uwaɾ ni jis i, "so~uʡɾinən ako~u paso~uwaɾ kiso~u anini" ħani?
S.TRANSL: What supports our understanding of what Jesus said?

S.FORM: 'Olic 118:22, iraay ko maanan kalaliting to piliyaw ni Yis a ma'orip?
'Olic 118:22, iraay ko maanan kalaliting to piliyaw ni Yis a ma'orip?
S.PHON: ʡo~uɾiʦ ***:**, iraaj ko~u maanan kaɾaɾitiŋ to~u piɾijaw ni jis a maʡo~urip?
S.TRANSL: How did Psalm 118:22 point to Jesus' resurrection?

S.FORM: Pakayni i raramod pasowalay ci Yis to maanan a limo'ot hani?
Pakayni i raramod pasowalay ci Yis to maanan a limo'ot hani?
S.PHON: pakajni i raramo~uɬ~ɮ paso~uwaɾaj ʦi jis to~u maanan a ɾimo~uʡo~ut ħani?
S.TRANSL: What important advice about marriage did Jesus give?

S.FORM: Isaka 2017 miheca, oni tolo a naniyaro'an, makalitosaay ko tamdaw, mirienangay to Piharatengan to Kapatay ni Yis a Sa'opo, ora mirienangay tosaay tingroh ko ka'aloman to mitosilay salikaka.
Isaka 2017 miheca, oni tolo a naniyaro'an, makalitosaay ko tamdaw, mirienangay to Piharatengan to Kapatay ni Yis a Sa'opo, ora mirienangay tosaay tingroh ko ka'aloman to mitosilay salikaka.
S.PHON: isaka **** miħəʦa, o~uni to~uɾo~u a nanijaro~uʡan, makaɾito~usaaj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, miriənaŋaj to~u piħaratəŋan to~u kapataj ni jis a saʡo~upo~u, o~ura miriənaŋaj to~usaaj tiŋro~uħ ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman to~u mito~usiɾaj saɾikaka.
S.TRANSL: As a result, in 2017, these three towns had a combined Memorial attendance of almost double the number of publishers, or half the entire population.

S.FORM: Misamaanay hano ira ko hatiniay a harateng ni Yis hani?
Misamaanay hano ira ko hatiniay a harateng ni Yis hani?
S.PHON: misamaanaj ħano~u ira ko~u ħatiniaj a ħaratəŋ ni jis ħani?
S.TRANSL: b. Why did Jesus respond in that way?

S.FORM: Sanay ko ca'of ni Yis: 'Cowa ko noni hekal ko Hongti Kitakit ako.'
Sanay ko ca'of ni Yis: 'Cowa ko noni hekal ko Hongti Kitakit ako.'
S.PHON: sanaj ko~u ʦaʡo~uf ni jis: ʡʦo~uwa ko~u no~uni ħəkaɾ ko~u ħo~uŋti kitakit ako~u.ʡ
S.TRANSL: Jesus answered: "My Kingdom is no part of this world."

S.FORM: Iraay ko timolo iso mihayi to o hongti iso ci Yis han?
Iraay ko timolo iso mihayi to o hongti iso ci Yis han?
S.PHON: iraaj ko~u timo~uɾo~u iso~u miħaji to~u o~u ħo~uŋti iso~u ʦi jis ħan?
S.TRANSL: Do you have the courage to acknowledge Jesus as your King?

S.FORM: Mikitini i sowal ni Yis wa nga'ay micada kita to sapakalalok.
Mikitini i sowal ni Yis wa nga'ay micada kita to sapakalalok.
S.PHON: mikitini i so~uwaɾ ni jis wa ŋaʡaj miʦaɬ~ɮa kita to~u sapakaɾaɾo~uk.
S.TRANSL: We should all be encouraged by that promise.

S.FORM: Kawra, ci Yis palimo'ot to nisawawaan: "Pina'on to tamod no Farisay a tamdaw ato tamod ni Hiroti," sanay.
Kawra, ci Yis palimo'ot to nisawawaan: "Pina'on to tamod no Farisay a tamdaw ato tamod ni Hiroti," sanay.
S.PHON: kawra, ʦi jis paɾimo~uʡo~ut to~u nisawawaan: "pinaʡo~un to~u tamo~uɬ~ɮ no~u farisaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u tamo~uɬ~ɮ ni ħiro~uti," sanaj.
S.TRANSL: So Jesus warned his disciples: "Keep your eyes open; look out for the leaven of the Pharisees and the leaven of Herod."

S.FORM: Tahirato mapolong ko tamdaw mahemek a mitengil to sowal ni Yis: "Katayni kamo o mapalemeday no Wama ako a tamdaw a micomod to nikowanan no Wama ako a kitakit oya nipatalaan to saki tamowanan nai satapangan no nipisanga' to hekal a kamaro'an."

Tahirato mapolong ko tamdaw mahemek a mitengil to sowal ni Yis: "Katayni kamo o mapalemeday no Wama ako a tamdaw a micomod to nikowanan no Wama ako a kitakit oya nipatalaan to saki tamowanan nai satapangan no nipisanga' to hekal a kamaro'an."
S.PHON: taħirato~u mapo~uɾo~uŋ ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw maħəmək a mitəŋiɾ to~u so~uwaɾ ni jis: "katajni kamo~u o~u mapaɾəməɬ~ɮaj no~u wama ako~u a tamɬ~ɮaw a miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u niko~uwanan no~u wama ako~u a kitakit o~uja nipataɾaan to~u saki tamo~uwanan nai satapaŋan no~u nipisaŋaʡ to~u ħəkaɾ a kamaro~uʡan."
S.TRANSL: The rejoicing of Jehovah's earthly worshippers will know no bounds when they hear Jesus' words: "Come, you who have been blessed by my Father, inherit the Kingdom prepared for you from the founding of the world."

S.FORM: O lipahak ni Yis samaanay malo lipahak no mita hani?
O lipahak ni Yis samaanay malo lipahak no mita hani?
S.PHON: o~u ɾipaħak ni jis samaanaj maɾo~u ɾipaħak no~u mita ħani?
S.TRANSL: How will Jesus' joy become ours?

S.FORM: Ci Yis mihadidiay a mitala.
Ci Yis mihadidiay a mitala.
S.PHON: ʦi jis miħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮiaj a mitaɾa.
S.TRANSL: Jesus likewise has been willing to wait.

S.FORM: Toni tosa lalakaw, wa ma'araw ita to samaanay ci Yis, pasifana' to mikotoday cingranan a makelec, halo piremo to masakakinihay a harateng.
Toni tosa lalakaw, wa ma'araw ita to samaanay ci Yis, pasifana' to mikotoday cingranan a makelec, halo piremo to masakakinihay a harateng.
S.PHON: to~uni to~usa ɾaɾakaw, wa maʡaraw ita to~u samaanaj ʦi jis, pasifanaʡ to~u miko~uto~uɬ~ɮaj ʦiŋranan a makəɾəʦ, ħaɾo~u pirəmo~u to~u masakakiniħaj a ħaratəŋ.
S.TRANSL: In these two articles, we will see how Christ taught his followers to become united and to overcome the prejudices that tend to divide.

S.FORM: Samaanay micada ci Yis to mihakelongay cingranan a tamdaw?
Samaanay micada ci Yis to mihakelongay cingranan a tamdaw?
S.PHON: samaanaj miʦaɬ~ɮa ʦi jis to~u miħakəɾo~uŋaj ʦiŋranan a tamɬ~ɮaw?
S.TRANSL: How did Jesus respond to the condition of the crowds who followed him?

S.FORM: Aninito anca noikor, o sakayat no Hongti ci Yis Kristo wa nga'ay padama kitaanan.
Aninito anca noikor, o sakayat no Hongti ci Yis Kristo wa nga'ay padama kitaanan.
S.PHON: aninito~u anʦa no~uiko~ur, o~u sakajat no~u ħo~uŋti ʦi jis kristo~u wa ŋaʡaj paɬ~ɮama kitaanan.
S.TRANSL: As shown by his active direction, our enthroned King, Jesus Christ, is definitely looking to the future.

S.FORM: O olah ni Yis pafeliay kitaanan to ha'icel a tanektek, so'lin tahalifa to pades, sapalak anca matoled, macariraw, cowa ko raranikay a misawad.
O olah ni Yis pafeliay kitaanan to ha'icel a tanektek, so'lin tahalifa to pades, sapalak anca matoled, macariraw, cowa ko raranikay a misawad.
S.PHON: o~u o~uɾaħ ni jis pafəɾiaj kitaanan to~u ħaʡiʦəɾ a tanəktək, so~uʡɾin taħaɾifa to~u paɬ~ɮəs, sapaɾak anʦa mato~uɾəɬ~ɮ, maʦariraw, ʦo~uwa ko~u raranikaj a misawaɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: Jesus' love has the power to sustain us and to motivate us not to give up, even in the face of such trials as disasters, persecution, personal disappointments, or gnawing anxiety.

S.FORM: Nga'ayay pikayat ni Yis,
Nga'ayay pikayat ni Yis,
S.PHON: ŋaʡajaj pikajat ni jis,
S.TRANSL: We obey Christ Jesus' clear command;

S.FORM: Pasowalan ni Pawlo aci Silas cingra: "Paso'linen ko tapang a Yis ta mapa'orip kiso," sanay.
Pasowalan ni Pawlo aci Silas cingra: "Paso'linen ko tapang a Yis ta mapa'orip kiso," sanay.
S.PHON: paso~uwaɾan ni pawɾo~u aʦi siɾas ʦiŋra: "paso~uʡɾinən ko~u tapaŋ a jis ta mapaʡo~urip kiso~u," sanaj.
S.TRANSL: They told him: "Believe in the Lord Jesus, and you will get saved."

S.FORM: O olah ni Yis samaanay mifiyor kitaanan?
O olah ni Yis samaanay mifiyor kitaanan?
S.PHON: o~u o~uɾaħ ni jis samaanaj mifijo~ur kitaanan?
S.TRANSL: How can Jesus' love fortify us?

S.FORM: Kawra, palimo'otay ci Yis, o pakayniay i cowa pisateked a lalangian kita, misawidang to ikakarayanay a widang.
Kawra, palimo'otay ci Yis, o pakayniay i cowa pisateked a lalangian kita, misawidang to ikakarayanay a widang.
S.PHON: kawra, paɾimo~uʡo~utaj ʦi jis, o~u pakajniaj i ʦo~uwa pisatəkəɬ~ɮ a ɾaɾaŋian kita, misawiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u ikakarajanaj a wiɬ~ɮaŋ.
S.TRANSL: However, Jesus urged his followers to make friends in heaven for unselfish purposes.

S.FORM: So'linay mahapinangay ci Yis, kawra cowa ka haen o milongocan ni Mariya ko mifekaday a demak.
So'linay mahapinangay ci Yis, kawra cowa ka haen o milongocan ni Mariya ko mifekaday a demak.
S.PHON: so~uʡɾinaj maħapinaŋaj ʦi jis, kawra ʦo~uwa ka ħaən o~u miɾo~uŋo~uʦan ni marija ko~u mifəkaɬ~ɮaj a ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: Recognition did come, but not in the way Mary may have expected.

S.FORM: Samaanay ci Yis mitodong to Wama ningra ciharateng to tao hani?
Samaanay ci Yis mitodong to Wama ningra ciharateng to tao hani?
S.PHON: samaanaj ʦi jis mito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u wama niŋra ʦiħaratəŋ to~u tao~u ħani?
S.TRANSL: How did Jesus show godlike love?

S.FORM: Miocoran ci Yis
Miocoran ci Yis
S.PHON: mio~uʦo~uran ʦi jis
S.TRANSL: It was a willing sacrifice

S.FORM: 'Ayaw no somowal ci Yis to kilang no fadisoso'a sapatinako pasowalay to tarokos: 'Pafelien ako kamo to dipayal no mako.'
'Ayaw no somowal ci Yis to kilang no fadisoso'a sapatinako pasowalay to tarokos: 'Pafelien ako kamo to dipayal no mako.'
S.PHON: ʡajaw no~u so~umo~uwaɾ ʦi jis to~u kiɾaŋ no~u faɬ~ɮiso~uso~uʡa sapatinako~u paso~uwaɾaj to~u taro~uko~us: ʡpafəɾiən ako~u kamo~u to~u ɬ~ɮipajaɾ no~u mako~u.ʡ
S.TRANSL: Earlier on that last evening before his death, Jesus told his apostles: "I give you my peace."

S.FORM: Somowalay ci Yis to salikoray lintad noni hekal, patinakoay to linkim, pakalalokay to madimadiay a Krisciyang.
Somowalay ci Yis to salikoray lintad noni hekal, patinakoay to linkim, pakalalokay to madimadiay a Krisciyang.
S.PHON: so~umo~uwaɾaj ʦi jis to~u saɾiko~uraj ɾintaɬ~ɮ no~uni ħəkaɾ, patinako~uaj to~u ɾinkim, pakaɾaɾo~ukaj to~u maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮiaj a krisʦijaŋ.
S.TRANSL: The parable of the talents, given in Jesus' prophecy about the conclusion of the system of things, encourages faithfulness.

S.FORM: O pinengneng ni Yis ato Farisay tamdaw to ciraraway tamdaw samanay caka hecad? Tadtaden.
O pinengneng ni Yis ato Farisay tamdaw to ciraraway tamdaw samanay caka hecad? Tadtaden.
S.PHON: o~u pinəŋnəŋ ni jis ato~u farisaj tamɬ~ɮaw to~u ʦirarawaj tamɬ~ɮaw samanaj ʦaka ħəʦaɬ~ɮ? taɬ~ɮtaɬ~ɮən.
S.TRANSL: Contrast the way Jesus and the Pharisees viewed sinners.

S.FORM: So'linay o tarokos mikitini ta'arawan ni Yis, minanam to mamaolah to "masakenaay tamdaw."
So'linay o tarokos mikitini ta'arawan ni Yis, minanam to mamaolah to "masakenaay tamdaw."
S.PHON: so~uʡɾinaj o~u taro~uko~us mikitini taʡarawan ni jis, minanam to~u mamao~uɾaħ to~u "masakənaaj tamɬ~ɮaw."
S.TRANSL: Clearly, the apostles did learn from Jesus' example to love "all sorts of men."

S.FORM: Kawra, o sapietan to payci a lalosidan no pidoyongan, sanay ko harateng ningra, marariday pakatawa cingra: "Sakafana'aw kako to hakowaay ko lifon ni Yis a mitosil."
Kawra, o sapietan to payci a lalosidan no pidoyongan, sanay ko harateng ningra, marariday pakatawa cingra: "Sakafana'aw kako to hakowaay ko lifon ni Yis a mitosil."
S.PHON: kawra, o~u sapiətan to~u pajʦi a ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan no~u piɬ~ɮo~ujo~uŋan, sanaj ko~u ħaratəŋ niŋra, marariɬ~ɮaj pakatawa ʦiŋra: "sakafanaʡaw kako~u to~u ħako~uwaaj ko~u ɾifo~un ni jis a mito~usiɾ."
S.TRANSL: Father loved the Bible and read it to us on Sunday mornings, but he viewed religion as a money-making scheme and often jokingly asked, "I wonder who paid Jesus for his preaching and teaching?"

S.FORM: O nisawawaan ni Yis wa ciheci to maanan a heci hani?
O nisawawaan ni Yis wa ciheci to maanan a heci hani?
S.PHON: o~u nisawawaan ni jis wa ʦiħəʦi to~u maanan a ħəʦi ħani?
S.TRANSL: * What, then, is the fruitage that Christ's followers need to bear?

S.FORM: Samanay ci Yis paihekal to caka olah ko niyah mikapot to mirikecay?
Samanay ci Yis paihekal to caka olah ko niyah mikapot to mirikecay?
S.PHON: samanaj ʦi jis paiħəkaɾ to~u ʦaka o~uɾaħ ko~u nijaħ mikapo~ut to~u mirikəʦaj?
S.TRANSL: How did Jesus show that he had no interest in political movements?

S.FORM: Cowa ka cecay aca ko Samariya fafahiyan mitosilan ni Yis, materekayho i niyaro' no Samariya to tosa romi'ad cingra, samanen saka cipinangaw ko itiraay tamdaw to mitenakan ni Yis a lihaf.
Cowa ka cecay aca ko Samariya fafahiyan mitosilan ni Yis, materekayho i niyaro' no Samariya to tosa romi'ad cingra, samanen saka cipinangaw ko itiraay tamdaw to mitenakan ni Yis a lihaf.
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa ka ʦəʦaj aʦa ko~u samarija fafaħijan mito~usiɾan ni jis, matərəkajħo~u i nijaro~uʡ no~u samarija to~u to~usa ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ʦiŋra, samanən saka ʦipinaŋaw ko~u itiraaj tamɬ~ɮaw to~u mitənakan ni jis a ɾiħaf.
S.TRANSL: And Jesus not only preached to a Samaritan woman but he spent two days in a Samaritan town because of the people's interest in his message.

S.FORM: Ci Yis mala hongti.
Ci Yis mala hongti.
S.PHON: ʦi jis maɾa ħo~uŋti.
S.TRANSL: He rules by your decree.

S.FORM: Masowal ni Yis ko Wama ningra i, sanay ko sowal: "O caay ka ciheci a ca'ang ako a maemin i, ketonen no Wama a mifalah."
Masowal ni Yis ko Wama ningra i, sanay ko sowal: "O caay ka ciheci a ca'ang ako a maemin i, ketonen no Wama a mifalah."
S.PHON: maso~uwaɾ ni jis ko~u wama niŋra i, sanaj ko~u so~uwaɾ: "o~u ʦaaj ka ʦiħəʦi a ʦaʡaŋ ako~u a maəmin i, kəto~unən no~u wama a mifaɾaħ."
S.TRANSL: Speaking about his Father, Jesus stated: "He takes away every branch in me not bearing fruit."

S.FORM: Samaanay ci Yis pakalalok to tarokos hani? Samaanayho cingra pakalalok ci Pitiroan hani?
Samaanay ci Yis pakalalok to tarokos hani? Samaanayho cingra pakalalok ci Pitiroan hani?
S.PHON: samaanaj ʦi jis pakaɾaɾo~uk to~u taro~uko~us ħani? samaanajħo~u ʦiŋra pakaɾaɾo~uk ʦi pitiro~uan ħani?
S.TRANSL: What encouragement did Jesus give to his apostles and to Peter in particular?

S.FORM: O miki'okan ni Yis a pasalat, o sanga'ayay a pasalat, mikikakaay to micangacangan no 'alomanay to saka pasalataw i mikowanay demak.
O miki'okan ni Yis a pasalat, o sanga'ayay a pasalat, mikikakaay to micangacangan no 'alomanay to saka pasalataw i mikowanay demak.
S.PHON: o~u mikiʡo~ukan ni jis a pasaɾat, o~u saŋaʡajaj a pasaɾat, mikikakaaj to~u miʦaŋaʦaŋan no~u ʡaɾo~umanaj to~u saka pasaɾataw i miko~uwanaj ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: Clearly, the freedom that Jesus promised his disciples is far superior to the social or political freedom that most people yearn for today.

S.FORM: Ci Yosif, Rahap, ci Yis ato tarokos, patahekalay to timolo, onini ilalinikay a 'icel, mansa matatodong ko demak nangra.
Ci Yosif, Rahap, ci Yis ato tarokos, patahekalay to timolo, onini ilalinikay a 'icel, mansa matatodong ko demak nangra.
S.PHON: ʦi jo~usif, raħap, ʦi jis ato~u taro~uko~us, pataħəkaɾaj to~u timo~uɾo~u, o~unini iɾaɾinikaj a ʡiʦəɾ, mansa matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak naŋra.
S.TRANSL: Joseph, Rahab, Jesus, and the apostles displayed an inner strength that motivated them to perform good works.

S.FORM: Misaheciay ci Yis patahekal to olah no Wama ningra.
Misaheciay ci Yis patahekal to olah no Wama ningra.
S.PHON: misaħəʦiaj ʦi jis pataħəkaɾ to~u o~uɾaħ no~u wama niŋra.
S.TRANSL: Jesus' love perfectly reflected the love his Father shows.

S.FORM: Ikor no patay ni Yis, patikolay ci Pitiro to mifotingay a tayal.
Ikor no patay ni Yis, patikolay ci Pitiro to mifotingay a tayal.
S.PHON: iko~ur no~u pataj ni jis, patiko~uɾaj ʦi pitiro~u to~u mifo~utiŋaj a tajaɾ.
S.TRANSL: After Jesus' death, Peter returned to his former occupation, fishing.

S.FORM: Makahiyay ci Yis midemak to salaenoay a tayal, misakareteng to tao, patireng to ta'arawan ita.
Makahiyay ci Yis midemak to salaenoay a tayal, misakareteng to tao, patireng to ta'arawan ita.
S.PHON: makaħijaj ʦi jis miɬ~ɮəmak to~u saɾaəno~uaj a tajaɾ, misakarətəŋ to~u tao~u, patirəŋ to~u taʡarawan ita.
S.TRANSL: Jesus set the pattern in honoring others by performing the lowliest of tasks.

S.FORM: Sowal ni Yis, o makoracay tamdaw, iraay ko tatodong a mipili' to milikong, ikor miliyaw a ciraramod.
Sowal ni Yis, o makoracay tamdaw, iraay ko tatodong a mipili' to milikong, ikor miliyaw a ciraramod.
S.PHON: so~uwaɾ ni jis, o~u mako~uraʦaj tamɬ~ɮaw, iraaj ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ a mipiɾiʡ to~u miɾiko~uŋ, iko~ur miɾijaw a ʦiraramo~uɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: Jesus said that the innocent one would have a basis for getting a divorce and then be free to remarry.

S.FORM: Samanay ci Yis a misi'ayaw to masakakinihay harateng hani?
Samanay ci Yis a misi'ayaw to masakakinihay harateng hani?
S.PHON: samanaj ʦi jis a misiʡajaw to~u masakakiniħaj ħaratəŋ ħani?
S.TRANSL: How did Jesus deal with them?

S.FORM: Ci Yis patahekalay to so'linay olah i tamdaw.
Ci Yis patahekalay to so'linay olah i tamdaw.
S.PHON: ʦi jis pataħəkaɾaj to~u so~uʡɾinaj o~uɾaħ i tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: Jesus showed great love for others.

S.FORM: Samanay ci Yis malo 'ta'enengan a fakeloh no loma'' hani?
Samanay ci Yis malo 'ta'enengan a fakeloh no loma'' hani?
S.PHON: samanaj ʦi jis maɾo~u ʡtaʡənəŋan a fakəɾo~uħ no~u ɾo~umaʡʡ ħani?
S.TRANSL: How could Jesus become "the chief cornerstone"?

S.FORM: Samanay a mahapinang ita to paca'ofan ni Yihofa ko satolon ni Yis?
Samanay a mahapinang ita to paca'ofan ni Yihofa ko satolon ni Yis?
S.PHON: samanaj a maħapinaŋ ita to~u paʦaʡo~ufan ni jiħo~ufa ko~u sato~uɾo~un ni jis?
S.TRANSL: What shows that Jehovah has answered Jesus' prayer?

S.FORM: Ya mapatay ci Lacarus i, samaanay paihekal ci Yis to sini'ada to tamdaw?
Ya mapatay ci Lacarus i, samaanay paihekal ci Yis to sini'ada to tamdaw?
S.PHON: ja mapataj ʦi ɾaʦaro~u~us i, samaanaj paiħəkaɾ ʦi jis to~u siniʡaɬ~ɮa to~u tamɬ~ɮaw?
S.TRANSL: How did Jesus show empathy when Lazarus died?

S.FORM: Dotimen ako ko ta'arawan ni Yis ikor, cowato ka sikoren ako koni demak.
Dotimen ako ko ta'arawan ni Yis ikor, cowato ka sikoren ako koni demak.
S.PHON: ɬ~ɮo~utimən ako~u ko~u taʡarawan ni jis iko~ur, ʦo~uwato~u ka siko~urən ako~u ko~uni ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: After reflecting on what Jesus would have done, I decided to let the matter go and not make an issue of it.

S.FORM: Itiniho i fafekang no sera ci Yis mitosil i, pasifana'ay to nisawawaan to ta'enengan a kimad, padama cangranan cipinang to maanan a waywayan ato demakan, wa ira ko masamanay a minaro'an.
Itiniho i fafekang no sera ci Yis mitosil i, pasifana'ay to nisawawaan to ta'enengan a kimad, padama cangranan cipinang to maanan a waywayan ato demakan, wa ira ko masamanay a minaro'an.
S.PHON: itiniħo~u i fafəkaŋ no~u səra ʦi jis mito~usiɾ i, pasifanaʡaj to~u nisawawaan to~u taʡənəŋan a kimaɬ~ɮ, paɬ~ɮama ʦaŋranan ʦipinaŋ to~u maanan a wajwajan ato~u ɬ~ɮəmakan, wa ira ko~u masamanaj a minaro~uʡan.
S.TRANSL: Throughout his ministry, Jesus taught basic truths to help his disciples recognize the consequences of certain attitudes or actions.

S.FORM: 'Ayaw no kinafalah ci Yis to 'orip, na pasowalay to nisawawaan, o wawa no tamdaw "tolo a romi'ad, tolo a dadaya i laloma' no sera."
'Ayaw no kinafalah ci Yis to 'orip, na pasowalay to nisawawaan, o wawa no tamdaw "tolo a romi'ad, tolo a dadaya i laloma' no sera."
S.PHON: ʡajaw no~u kinafaɾaħ ʦi jis to~u ʡo~urip, na paso~uwaɾaj to~u nisawawaan, o~u wawa no~u tamɬ~ɮaw "to~uɾo~u a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, to~uɾo~u a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja i ɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u səra."
S.TRANSL: However, recall that Jesus had earlier told his followers: "The Son of man will be in the heart of the earth for three days and three nights."

S.FORM: Anini, o misakakinihay harateng no 'alomanay tamdaw pasangarayto a salofen, mahecaday i romi'aday ni Yis.
Anini, o misakakinihay harateng no 'alomanay tamdaw pasangarayto a salofen, mahecaday i romi'aday ni Yis.
S.PHON: anini, o~u misakakiniħaj ħaratəŋ no~u ʡaɾo~umanaj tamɬ~ɮaw pasaŋarajto~u a saɾo~ufən, maħəʦaɬ~ɮaj i ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮaj ni jis.
S.TRANSL: Feelings of prejudice in our time can be deeply ingrained, just as they were in Jesus' day.

S.FORM: Mihaenay, i'ayaw no "tayni" ci Yis misa'opo to mapasimalay a Krisciyang tayra i kakarayan a Piharatengan to Kapatay ni Yis a Sa'opo, o salikorayto koniya Piharatengan a Sa'opo.
Mihaenay, i'ayaw no "tayni" ci Yis misa'opo to mapasimalay a Krisciyang tayra i kakarayan a Piharatengan to Kapatay ni Yis a Sa'opo, o salikorayto koniya Piharatengan a Sa'opo.
S.PHON: miħaənaj, iʡajaw no~u "tajni" ʦi jis misaʡo~upo~u to~u mapasimaɾaj a krisʦijaŋ tajra i kakarajan a piħaratəŋan to~u kapataj ni jis a saʡo~upo~u, o~u saɾiko~urajto~u ko~unija piħaratəŋan a saʡo~upo~u.
S.TRANSL: The last Memorial that is observed prior to this gathering of the anointed to heaven will be the final one, for Jesus will have 'come.'

S.FORM: Licayan ni Yis ko tarokos wa mahecad to roma tamdaw a miliyas cingraanan hokira, tangsolay paca'of ci Pitiro: "Tapangaw, i cimaanan kami a palawina saw?
Licayan ni Yis ko tarokos wa mahecad to roma tamdaw a miliyas cingraanan hokira, tangsolay paca'of ci Pitiro: "Tapangaw, i cimaanan kami a palawina saw?
S.PHON: ɾiʦajan ni jis ko~u taro~uko~us wa maħəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u ro~uma tamɬ~ɮaw a miɾijas ʦiŋraanan ħo~ukira, taŋso~uɾaj paʦaʡo~uf ʦi pitiro~u: "tapaŋaw, i ʦimaanan kami a paɾawina saw?
S.TRANSL: When Jesus asked the apostles if they wanted to leave, Peter immediately replied: "Lord, whom shall we go away to?

S.FORM: Mahecaday ci Yis to Wamaan ningra makalimay mipadang to marorayay a tamdaw.
Mahecaday ci Yis to Wamaan ningra makalimay mipadang to marorayay a tamdaw.
S.PHON: maħəʦaɬ~ɮaj ʦi jis to~u wamaan niŋra makaɾimaj mipaɬ~ɮaŋ to~u maro~urajaj a tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: Jesus perfectly reflected his Father's personality by his desire to help those in need.

S.FORM: Ya mitosil ci Yis i hekal i, cipinangay to faloco' no tamdaw, sini'ada i cangranan.
Ya mitosil ci Yis i hekal i, cipinangay to faloco' no tamdaw, sini'ada i cangranan.
S.PHON: ja mito~usiɾ ʦi jis i ħəkaɾ i, ʦipinaŋaj to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, siniʡaɬ~ɮa i ʦaŋranan.
S.TRANSL: When Jesus embarked on his ministry, it was with a remarkable depth of insight and fellow feeling.

S.FORM: Nikawrira, cowa ko lawla aca ko kaciharatengan ni Yis.
Nikawrira, cowa ko lawla aca ko kaciharatengan ni Yis.
S.PHON: nikawrira, ʦo~uwa ko~u ɾawɾa aʦa ko~u kaʦiħaratəŋan ni jis.
S.TRANSL: Yet, Jesus did not immerse himself in a life of pleasure.

S.FORM: Pasowalan ako cingra: "Sowal ni Yis o nga'ayay lihaf no Hongti Kitakit wa mapaedef i polong no hekal, awaay ko papakaconged a tamdaw."
Pasowalan ako cingra: "Sowal ni Yis o nga'ayay lihaf no Hongti Kitakit wa mapaedef i polong no hekal, awaay ko papakaconged a tamdaw."
S.PHON: paso~uwaɾan ako~u ʦiŋra: "so~uwaɾ ni jis o~u ŋaʡajaj ɾiħaf no~u ħo~uŋti kitakit wa mapaəɬ~ɮəf i po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ħəkaɾ, awaaj ko~u papakaʦo~uŋəɬ~ɮ a tamɬ~ɮaw."
S.TRANSL: I replied, "Jesus said that the good news of the Kingdom WILL be preached in all the nations, and no one can stop it."

S.FORM: Itiniho i hekal ci Yis i, cowa ka ciharateng to sapihaydaaw no 'a'ideman no pihakelongan ato tapang no mirikecay.
Itiniho i hekal ci Yis i, cowa ka ciharateng to sapihaydaaw no 'a'ideman no pihakelongan ato tapang no mirikecay.
S.PHON: itiniħo~u i ħəkaɾ ʦi jis i, ʦo~uwa ka ʦiħaratəŋ to~u sapiħajɬ~ɮaaw no~u ʡaʡiɬ~ɮəman no~u piħakəɾo~uŋan ato~u tapaŋ no~u mirikəʦaj.
S.TRANSL: Jesus did not crave to be honored by the religious or political leaders of his day.

S.FORM: Sanay ko sowal ni Yis cangraanan: "O cacilafo kamo o misamangahay ko demak a pasifana'ay to Rikec ato Farisay a tamdaw.
Sanay ko sowal ni Yis cangraanan: "O cacilafo kamo o misamangahay ko demak a pasifana'ay to Rikec ato Farisay a tamdaw.
S.PHON: sanaj ko~u so~uwaɾ ni jis ʦaŋraanan: "o~u ʦaʦiɾafo~u kamo~u o~u misamaŋaħaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak a pasifanaʡaj to~u rikəʦ ato~u farisaj a tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: He told them to their face: "Woe to you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites!

S.FORM: Kawra, mikitini kita i sapatinako ni Yis, mahapinangay to mitokelay ci Yihofa kitaanan mihaen to demak.
Kawra, mikitini kita i sapatinako ni Yis, mahapinangay to mitokelay ci Yihofa kitaanan mihaen to demak.
S.PHON: kawra, mikitini kita i sapatinako~u ni jis, maħapinaŋaj to~u mito~ukəɾaj ʦi jiħo~ufa kitaanan miħaən to~u ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: Yet, this illustration teaches us what Jehovah expects.

S.FORM: Samanay paihekal ci Yis, cowa ko mamicangacang cingra to mirikecay a fadangalan i hekal hani?
Samanay paihekal ci Yis, cowa ko mamicangacang cingra to mirikecay a fadangalan i hekal hani?
S.PHON: samanaj paiħəkaɾ ʦi jis, ʦo~uwa ko~u mamiʦaŋaʦaŋ ʦiŋra to~u mirikəʦaj a faɬ~ɮaŋaɾan i ħəkaɾ ħani?
S.TRANSL: How did Jesus make clear that he did not seek political power on earth?

S.FORM: Ci Yihofa, ci Yis ato madimadiay a coyoh wa padama kitaanan.
Ci Yihofa, ci Yis ato madimadiay a coyoh wa padama kitaanan.
S.PHON: ʦi jiħo~ufa, ʦi jis ato~u maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮiaj a ʦo~ujo~uħ wa paɬ~ɮama kitaanan.
S.TRANSL: We are backed by Jehovah, Jesus, and the faithful angels.

S.FORM: Itiniho i hekal ci Yis i, samaanan ni Yihofa mihayda cingra hani?
Itiniho i hekal ci Yis i, samaanan ni Yihofa mihayda cingra hani?
S.PHON: itiniħo~u i ħəkaɾ ʦi jis i, samaanan ni jiħo~ufa miħajɬ~ɮa ʦiŋra ħani?
S.TRANSL: While Jesus was on earth, how did Jehovah show his approval of his Son?

S.FORM: Mikayatan no coyoh ci Filipan, tayra i 'a'ayaw noniya Iciyopiya tamdaw, 'milasil to nga'ayay ratoh ni Yis cingranan.'
Mikayatan no coyoh ci Filipan, tayra i 'a'ayaw noniya Iciyopiya tamdaw, 'milasil to nga'ayay ratoh ni Yis cingranan.'
S.PHON: mikajatan no~u ʦo~ujo~uħ ʦi fiɾipan, tajra i ʡaʡajaw no~unija iʦijo~upija tamɬ~ɮaw, ʡmiɾasiɾ to~u ŋaʡajaj rato~uħ ni jis ʦiŋranan.ʡ
S.TRANSL: Prompted by Jehovah's angel, Philip approached the Ethiopian and "declared to him the good news about Jesus."

S.FORM: Mitosilan ni Yis ko 'alomanay a Yutaya tamdaw, tokel nangra sapiliyasaw to pikowan no Loma.
Mitosilan ni Yis ko 'alomanay a Yutaya tamdaw, tokel nangra sapiliyasaw to pikowan no Loma.
S.PHON: mito~usiɾan ni jis ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj a jo~u~utaja tamɬ~ɮaw, to~ukəɾ naŋra sapiɾijasaw to~u piko~uwan no~u ɾo~uma.
S.TRANSL: Many Jews to whom Jesus preached longed for independence from Rome.

S.FORM: Misamaanay hano pakaso'lin kita, mamihinom kitanan ci Yis?
Misamaanay hano pakaso'lin kita, mamihinom kitanan ci Yis?
S.PHON: misamaanaj ħano~u pakaso~uʡɾin kita, mamiħino~um kitanan ʦi jis?
S.TRANSL: Why can we be confident that Jesus will provide comfort?

S.FORM: Samaanay ci Yis patahekal to olah i tamdaw hani?
Samaanay ci Yis patahekal to olah i tamdaw hani?
S.PHON: samaanaj ʦi jis pataħəkaɾ to~u o~uɾaħ i tamɬ~ɮaw ħani?
S.TRANSL: How did Jesus show love for others?

S.FORM: Samaanay ci Yis padama to tamdaw milowid to misakakinihay a harateng?
Samaanay ci Yis padama to tamdaw milowid to misakakinihay a harateng?
S.PHON: samaanaj ʦi jis paɬ~ɮama to~u tamɬ~ɮaw miɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ to~u misakakiniħaj a ħaratəŋ?
S.TRANSL: How did Jesus teach a lesson in overcoming racial prejudice?

S.FORM: Micadaay ko nisawawaan ni Yis to maanan a pisakahemaw hani?
Micadaay ko nisawawaan ni Yis to maanan a pisakahemaw hani?
S.PHON: miʦaɬ~ɮaaj ko~u nisawawaan ni jis to~u maanan a pisakaħəmaw ħani?
S.TRANSL: What prejudice did Jesus' followers experience?

S.FORM: Maharek somowal ci Yis toniya sapatinako, dotoc misaka dademakay to sapairasol no 'Olic 118:22.
Maharek somowal ci Yis toniya sapatinako, dotoc misaka dademakay to sapairasol no 'Olic 118:22.
S.PHON: maħarək so~umo~uwaɾ ʦi jis to~unija sapatinako~u, ɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ misaka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakaj to~u sapairaso~uɾ no~u ʡo~uɾiʦ ***:**.
S.TRANSL: Jesus followed that illustration with a reference to the prophetic statement at Psalm 118:22, which he quoted.

S.FORM: Hofocento ci Yis, cowa ka pasayra i 'a'ideman no Yirusalim ato Piclihim ci Yihofa a milasil toniya demak, tano kafahka'an a pakayraan mifana' to tamdaw to mihofocanto ci Yis.
Hofocento ci Yis, cowa ka pasayra i 'a'ideman no Yirusalim ato Piclihim ci Yihofa a milasil toniya demak, tano kafahka'an a pakayraan mifana' to tamdaw to mihofocanto ci Yis.
S.PHON: ħo~ufo~uʦənto~u ʦi jis, ʦo~uwa ka pasajra i ʡaʡiɬ~ɮəman no~u jiro~u~usaɾim ato~u piʦɾiħim ʦi jiħo~ufa a miɾasiɾ to~unija ɬ~ɮəmak, tano~u kafaħkaʡan a pakajraan mifanaʡ to~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~u miħo~ufo~uʦanto~u ʦi jis.
S.TRANSL: When Mary eventually gave birth to Jesus, Jehovah did not honor any of the prominent officials or rulers in Jerusalem and Bethlehem by letting them know what had happened.

S.FORM: O misowalan ni Yis a Lakoing toya mararaway, sasamaan mala'osi hani?
O misowalan ni Yis a Lakoing toya mararaway, sasamaan mala'osi hani?
S.PHON: o~u miso~uwaɾan ni jis a ɾako~uiŋ to~uja mararawaj, sasamaan maɾaʡo~usi ħani?
S.TRANSL: How would the promise that Jesus made about Paradise be fulfilled?

S.FORM: Samaanay ko pipaca'of ni Yihofa to picada ni Yis to ino' hani?
Samaanay ko pipaca'of ni Yihofa to picada ni Yis to ino' hani?
S.PHON: samaanaj ko~u pipaʦaʡo~uf ni jiħo~ufa to~u piʦaɬ~ɮa ni jis to~u ino~uʡ ħani?
S.TRANSL: How did Jehovah respond to Jesus' baptism?

S.FORM: Sowal ni Yis, "O sapafeliaw no Wama to ningitangitan namo Cingraan a maamaan pakayni i ngangan ako."
Sowal ni Yis, "O sapafeliaw no Wama to ningitangitan namo Cingraan a maamaan pakayni i ngangan ako."
S.PHON: so~uwaɾ ni jis, "o~u sapafəɾiaw no~u wama to~u niŋitaŋitan namo~u ʦiŋraan a maamaan pakajni i ŋaŋan ako~u."
S.TRANSL: Jesus stated: "No matter what you ask the Father in my name, he will give it to you."

S.FORM: Samanay ko pinengneng ni Yis to pasataay?
Samanay ko pinengneng ni Yis to pasataay?
S.PHON: samanaj ko~u pinəŋnəŋ ni jis to~u pasataaj?
S.TRANSL: What balanced position on taxation did Jesus recommend?

S.FORM: Cowa pasowal ci Yis to mala'osiay kora sapakokot hokira.
Cowa pasowal ci Yis to mala'osiay kora sapakokot hokira.
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa paso~uwaɾ ʦi jis to~u maɾaʡo~usiaj ko~ura sapako~uko~ut ħo~ukira.
S.TRANSL: Jesus does not indicate whether the accusation was valid.

S.FORM: Makelec a malacecay ko nisawawaan wa nga'ay misawacay, o na miocoran ni Yihofa ci Yis tayni i hekal.
Makelec a malacecay ko nisawawaan wa nga'ay misawacay, o na miocoran ni Yihofa ci Yis tayni i hekal.
S.PHON: makəɾəʦ a maɾaʦəʦaj ko~u nisawawaan wa ŋaʡaj misawaʦaj, o~u na mio~uʦo~uran ni jiħo~ufa ʦi jis tajni i ħəkaɾ.
S.TRANSL: Their unity would give a powerful witness, offering clear evidence that Jehovah had sent Jesus to the earth to do God's will.

S.FORM: TIYA malacafay ci Yis to tarokos a komaen to saikoray a lafi i, ciharatengayto wa nga'ay cangra mitafo to makelecay hakiya.
TIYA malacafay ci Yis to tarokos a komaen to saikoray a lafi i, ciharatengayto wa nga'ay cangra mitafo to makelecay hakiya.
S.PHON: tija maɾaʦafaj ʦi jis to~u taro~uko~us a ko~umaən to~u saiko~uraj a ɾafi i, ʦiħaratəŋajto~u wa ŋaʡaj ʦaŋra mitafo~u to~u makəɾəʦaj ħakija.
S.TRANSL: JESUS was concerned about unity during his final supper with his apostles.

S.FORM: Mihaenay, mafana'ay kita to ciharatengay ko Kawas ci Yihofa aci Yis sapadamaaw kitaanan, pakahemek to ka'orip no mita noikor!
Mihaenay, mafana'ay kita to ciharatengay ko Kawas ci Yihofa aci Yis sapadamaaw kitaanan, pakahemek to ka'orip no mita noikor!
S.PHON: miħaənaj, mafanaʡaj kita to~u ʦiħaratəŋaj ko~u kawas ʦi jiħo~ufa aʦi jis sapaɬ~ɮamaaw kitaanan, pakaħəmək to~u kaʡo~urip no~u mita no~uiko~ur!
S.TRANSL: So we can be sure that both Jehovah and Jesus want to help us to enjoy a happy future!

S.FORM: Itiya mitosil ci Yis i, paino'ay ko nisawawaan to tamdaw.
Itiya mitosil ci Yis i, paino'ay ko nisawawaan to tamdaw.
S.PHON: itija mito~usiɾ ʦi jis i, paino~uʡaj ko~u nisawawaan to~u tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: During the course of Jesus' earthly ministry, his disciples also performed baptisms.

S.FORM: Cowa ka ihekel ci Yis mitadtad to o maanan ko mitoro'an noniya heci, kawra mikitini nano sowal ni Yis, wa padama kitaanan mikilim to ca'of.
Cowa ka ihekel ci Yis mitadtad to o maanan ko mitoro'an noniya heci, kawra mikitini nano sowal ni Yis, wa padama kitaanan mikilim to ca'of.
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa ka iħəkəɾ ʦi jis mitaɬ~ɮtaɬ~ɮ to~u o~u maanan ko~u mito~uro~uʡan no~unija ħəʦi, kawra mikitini nano~u so~uwaɾ ni jis, wa paɬ~ɮama kitaanan mikiɾim to~u ʦaʡo~uf.
S.TRANSL: In this illustration, Jesus did not directly say what that fruitage is, but he did mention a significant detail that helps us to determine the answer.

S.FORM: Ma'araw nangra makahi ci Yis pasifana' to Samariya fafahiyan, faheka'an nanay.
Ma'araw nangra makahi ci Yis pasifana' to Samariya fafahiyan, faheka'an nanay.
S.PHON: maʡaraw naŋra makaħi ʦi jis pasifanaʡ to~u samarija fafaħijan, faħəkaʡan nanaj.
S.TRANSL: They were surprised to see that Jesus was willing to teach a Samaritan woman.

S.FORM: Mafana'ay ci Yis, o 'alomanay a sikawdan, oha mamisi'ayaw toni cowa ka sadafdaf a lekakawa no misasingdiay, mikilim to saka'orip, o nika pasangar mahecaday to malifaay nora sapatinako a matayalay.
Mafana'ay ci Yis, o 'alomanay a sikawdan, oha mamisi'ayaw toni cowa ka sadafdaf a lekakawa no misasingdiay, mikilim to saka'orip, o nika pasangar mahecaday to malifaay nora sapatinako a matayalay.
S.PHON: mafanaʡaj ʦi jis, o~u ʡaɾo~umanaj a sikawɬ~ɮan, o~uħa mamisiʡajaw to~uni ʦo~uwa ka saɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮaf a ɾəkakawa no~u misasiŋɬ~ɮiaj, mikiɾim to~u sakaʡo~urip, o~u nika pasaŋar maħəʦaɬ~ɮaj to~u maɾifaaj no~ura sapatinako~u a matajaɾaj.
S.TRANSL: Jesus knew that like the steward who found himself in a difficult situation, most of Jesus' followers would need to make a living in this unjust commercial world.

S.FORM: Palimo'otay ci Yis to nisawawaan padama to tamdaw 'malo Krisciyang..., mipaino' cangranan,' sanay.
Palimo'otay ci Yis to nisawawaan padama to tamdaw 'malo Krisciyang..., mipaino' cangranan,' sanay.
S.PHON: paɾimo~uʡo~utaj ʦi jis to~u nisawawaan paɬ~ɮama to~u tamɬ~ɮaw ʡmaɾo~u krisʦijaŋ..., mipaino~uʡ ʦaŋranan,ʡ sanaj.
S.TRANSL: Just about a year before Jesus gave the commission to "make disciples..., baptizing them," he provided insight into what would be required of his followers.

S.FORM: Samanay ci Yis paihekal to kalimelaan ko pisatenok no sikawdan no Kawas i mirikecay hani?
Samanay ci Yis paihekal to kalimelaan ko pisatenok no sikawdan no Kawas i mirikecay hani?
S.PHON: samanaj ʦi jis paiħəkaɾ to~u kaɾiməɾaan ko~u pisatəno~uk no~u sikawɬ~ɮan no~u kawas i mirikəʦaj ħani?
S.TRANSL: How did he demonstrate the need for God's servants to avoid taking sides on political issues?

S.FORM: Salakatay a nisawawaan ni Yis miremoay to maanan misakakinihay a harateng?
Salakatay a nisawawaan ni Yis miremoay to maanan misakakinihay a harateng?
S.PHON: saɾakataj a nisawawaan ni jis mirəmo~uaj to~u maanan misakakiniħaj a ħaratəŋ?
S.TRANSL: What sort of prejudices did Jesus' early disciples have to overcome?

S.FORM: Samaan ko pasifana' ni Yihofa aci Yis kitaanan, ho nga'ay milifok to pasalat?
Samaan ko pasifana' ni Yihofa aci Yis kitaanan, ho nga'ay milifok to pasalat?
S.PHON: samaan ko~u pasifanaʡ ni jiħo~ufa aʦi jis kitaanan, ħo~u ŋaʡaj miɾifo~uk to~u pasaɾat?
S.TRANSL: In what ways are we being taught to become a free people?

S.FORM: Pakayni i mirikecay a demak, o 'ada ni Yis samanay a sapipalafoaw ci Yisan?
Pakayni i mirikecay a demak, o 'ada ni Yis samanay a sapipalafoaw ci Yisan?
S.PHON: pakajni i mirikəʦaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, o~u ʡaɬ~ɮa ni jis samanaj a sapipaɾafo~uaw ʦi jisan?
S.TRANSL: How did Jesus' enemies try to get him involved in a political issue?

S.FORM: Ya pasifana' ci Yis to cecay fafahiyan ikor, hananay ko nisawawaan: "O nipidoedo to nafaloco'an no miocoray i takowanan ato nipilaheci to tayal Ningra ko malo kakaenen Ako."
Ya pasifana' ci Yis to cecay fafahiyan ikor, hananay ko nisawawaan: "O nipidoedo to nafaloco'an no miocoray i takowanan ato nipilaheci to tayal Ningra ko malo kakaenen Ako."
S.PHON: ja pasifanaʡ ʦi jis to~u ʦəʦaj fafaħijan iko~ur, ħananaj ko~u nisawawaan: "o~u nipiɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u nafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan no~u mio~uʦo~uraj i tako~uwanan ato~u nipiɾaħəʦi to~u tajaɾ niŋra ko~u maɾo~u kakaənən ako~u."
S.TRANSL: Once, after teaching a woman about true worship, Jesus said to his disciples: "My food is to do the will of him who sent me and to finish his work."

S.FORM: Midoedo to limo'ot ni Yis a mitosil, o karetengay a 'inorong han?
Midoedo to limo'ot ni Yis a mitosil, o karetengay a 'inorong han?
S.PHON: miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u ɾimo~uʡo~ut ni jis a mito~usiɾ, o~u karətəŋaj a ʡino~uro~uŋ ħan?
S.TRANSL: Will obeying Jesus' command to preach become burdensome?

S.FORM: Tada o haharateng no mita koniya sowal ni Yis!
Tada o haharateng no mita koniya sowal ni Yis!
S.PHON: taɬ~ɮa o~u ħaħaratəŋ no~u mita ko~unija so~uwaɾ ni jis!
S.TRANSL: What a sobering thought!

S.FORM: Sowal ni Yis ci Akoma Satan 'miliyangay to so'linay kimad, samanen awaay ko so'linay kimad ilaloma' ningra.'
Sowal ni Yis ci Akoma Satan 'miliyangay to so'linay kimad, samanen awaay ko so'linay kimad ilaloma' ningra.'
S.PHON: so~uwaɾ ni jis ʦi ako~uma satan ʡmiɾijaŋaj to~u so~uʡɾinaj kimaɬ~ɮ, samanən awaaj ko~u so~uʡɾinaj kimaɬ~ɮ iɾaɾo~umaʡ niŋra.ʡ
S.TRANSL: In explaining the Devil's actions, Jesus stated: "He did not stand fast in the truth, because truth is not in him."

S.FORM: Pakayni ciolahay a Samariya tamdaw a tinakoan, paihkalay ci Yis mitokelay cingra to nisawawaan misa'icel padama to tao, so'lin cowa ka hecad ko serangawan i, padotocen a mihaen ko demak.
Pakayni ciolahay a Samariya tamdaw a tinakoan, paihkalay ci Yis mitokelay cingra to nisawawaan misa'icel padama to tao, so'lin cowa ka hecad ko serangawan i, padotocen a mihaen ko demak.
S.PHON: pakajni ʦio~uɾaħaj a samarija tamɬ~ɮaw a tinako~uan, paiħkaɾaj ʦi jis mito~ukəɾaj ʦiŋra to~u nisawawaan misaʡiʦəɾ paɬ~ɮama to~u tao~u, so~uʡɾin ʦo~uwa ka ħəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u səraŋawan i, paɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦən a miħaən ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: Indeed, in the parable of the neighborly Samaritan, Jesus made clear that he expected his followers to go out of their way to help others, even those of a different background.

S.FORM: Ano cihafayayto manikawayto, o Farisay tamdaw anca o Samariya tamdaw, halo milisataay tamdaw ato mararaway a tamdaw, pahecadan ni Yis ko pinengneng mitosil cangranan.
Ano cihafayayto manikawayto, o Farisay tamdaw anca o Samariya tamdaw, halo milisataay tamdaw ato mararaway a tamdaw, pahecadan ni Yis ko pinengneng mitosil cangranan.
S.PHON: ano~u ʦiħafajajto~u manikawajto~u, o~u farisaj tamɬ~ɮaw anʦa o~u samarija tamɬ~ɮaw, ħaɾo~u miɾisataaj tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u mararawaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, paħəʦaɬ~ɮan ni jis ko~u pinəŋnəŋ mito~usiɾ ʦaŋranan.
S.TRANSL: He preached to rich and poor, Pharisees and Samaritans, even tax collectors and sinners.

S.FORM: Ano marengrengay ko namal, pisemseman no tamdaw ko cikok, wa misamaan a tayra ci Yis hani?
Ano marengrengay ko namal, pisemseman no tamdaw ko cikok, wa misamaan a tayra ci Yis hani?
S.PHON: ano~u marəŋrəŋaj ko~u namaɾ, pisəmsəman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u ʦiko~uk, wa misamaan a tajra ʦi jis ħani?
S.TRANSL: So she wondered, 'If hell is a fiery place where the wicked are tormented, why did Jesus go there?'

S.FORM: Pakayni i lawla, patirengay ci Yis to manan a nga'ayay a ta'arawan?
Pakayni i lawla, patirengay ci Yis to manan a nga'ayay a ta'arawan?
S.PHON: pakajni i ɾawɾa, patirəŋaj ʦi jis to~u manan a ŋaʡajaj a taʡarawan?
S.TRANSL: What example did Jesus set in the matter of pleasures?

S.FORM: Patalipa'elalay ci Yis to nisawawaan to maanan a "tamod"?
Patalipa'elalay ci Yis to nisawawaan to maanan a "tamod"?
S.PHON: pataɾipaʡəɾaɾaj ʦi jis to~u nisawawaan to~u maanan a "tamo~uɬ~ɮ"?
S.TRANSL: What kind of "leaven" did Jesus tell his disciples to avoid?

S.FORM: Misamaanay hano misa'osi ko faloco' iso, wa mirienang to Sa'opo no Piharatengan to Kapatay ni Yis aniniay miheca?
Misamaanay hano misa'osi ko faloco' iso, wa mirienang to Sa'opo no Piharatengan to Kapatay ni Yis aniniay miheca?
S.PHON: misamaanaj ħano~u misaʡo~usi ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ iso~u, wa miriənaŋ to~u saʡo~upo~u no~u piħaratəŋan to~u kapataj ni jis aniniaj miħəʦa?
S.TRANSL: Why are you determined to be present at this year's Memorial?

S.FORM: Cowa ko pasowal aca ni Yis to nisawawaan mamidemak to maanan, pasowalayho to misamaanay hano mihaen to demak.
Cowa ko pasowal aca ni Yis to nisawawaan mamidemak to maanan, pasowalayho to misamaanay hano mihaen to demak.
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa ko~u paso~uwaɾ aʦa ni jis to~u nisawawaan mamiɬ~ɮəmak to~u maanan, paso~uwaɾajħo~u to~u misamaanaj ħano~u miħaən to~u ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: However, Jesus told his disciples not only what they needed to do but also why they should do so.

S.FORM: Samaanay paihekal ci Yis to kalimelaan ko mihadidiay?
Samaanay paihekal ci Yis to kalimelaan ko mihadidiay?
S.PHON: samaanaj paiħəkaɾ ʦi jis to~u kaɾiməɾaan ko~u miħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮiaj?
S.TRANSL: How did Jesus emphasize the need for endurance?

S.FORM: 'Ayaw no miliyaw ma'orip ci Yis to pina hahekalan, pa'ayawayto ko 'Olic 118:22 to mamifekad koniya demak.
'Ayaw no miliyaw ma'orip ci Yis to pina hahekalan, pa'ayawayto ko 'Olic 118:22 to mamifekad koniya demak.
S.PHON: ʡajaw no~u miɾijaw maʡo~urip ʦi jis to~u pina ħaħəkaɾan, paʡajawajto~u ko~u ʡo~uɾiʦ ***:** to~u mamifəkaɬ~ɮ ko~unija ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: Yes, hundreds of years in advance, the prophetic statement at Psalm 118:22 indicated that a resurrection would occur.

S.FORM: Maharatengay no wina ko sowal no kiyokay, tayraay ci Yis i cikok, saka tolo romi'ad miliyaway ma'orip.
Maharatengay no wina ko sowal no kiyokay, tayraay ci Yis i cikok, saka tolo romi'ad miliyaway ma'orip.
S.PHON: maħaratəŋaj no~u wina ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u kijo~ukaj, tajraaj ʦi jis i ʦiko~uk, saka to~uɾo~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ miɾijawaj maʡo~urip.
S.TRANSL: Mother recalled the church creed, which in its original form stated that Jesus descended into hell and was raised on the third day.

S.FORM: O nitilidan ni Matay pakayni no kaemanganho ni Yis, caka hahecad toni Luka, samanen mikitiniay i masasi romaay a noka pinengneng cangra a mitilid.
O nitilidan ni Matay pakayni no kaemanganho ni Yis, caka hahecad toni Luka, samanen mikitiniay i masasi romaay a noka pinengneng cangra a mitilid.
S.PHON: o~u nitiɾiɬ~ɮan ni mataj pakajni no~u kaəmaŋanħo~u ni jis, ʦaka ħaħəʦaɬ~ɮ to~uni ɾo~u~uka, samanən mikitiniaj i masasi ro~umaaj a no~uka pinəŋnəŋ ʦaŋra a mitiɾiɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: Matthew's account about the events related to Jesus' birth and early life differs somewhat from Luke's account because the Gospel writers told the events from different perspectives.

S.FORM: Ci Yihofa aci Yis misamaanay mihadidi a mitala?
Ci Yihofa aci Yis misamaanay mihadidi a mitala?
S.PHON: ʦi jiħo~ufa aʦi jis misamaanaj miħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮi a mitaɾa?
S.TRANSL: How have both Jehovah and Jesus shown a willingness to wait?

S.FORM: Tada kalimelaan ko sapatalipa'elal ni Yis, oniya sapatalipa'elal mahecaday o satolon ni Yis isalakat, cowa ka nga'ay mikapot ko nisawawaan toni hekal.
Tada kalimelaan ko sapatalipa'elal ni Yis, oniya sapatalipa'elal mahecaday o satolon ni Yis isalakat, cowa ka nga'ay mikapot ko nisawawaan toni hekal.
S.PHON: taɬ~ɮa kaɾiməɾaan ko~u sapataɾipaʡəɾaɾ ni jis, o~unija sapataɾipaʡəɾaɾ maħəʦaɬ~ɮaj o~u sato~uɾo~un ni jis isaɾakat, ʦo~uwa ka ŋaʡaj mikapo~ut ko~u nisawawaan to~uni ħəkaɾ.
S.TRANSL: This powerful lesson was in harmony with what Jesus prayed about earlier that night, they must be no part of the world.

S.FORM: Pakayni to finawlan ni Yihofa, 'ayaw ni Yis to saka 537 a miheca, o kalipahakan a mihecaan.
Pakayni to finawlan ni Yihofa, 'ayaw ni Yis to saka 537 a miheca, o kalipahakan a mihecaan.
S.PHON: pakajni to~u finawɾan ni jiħo~ufa, ʡajaw ni jis to~u saka *** a miħəʦa, o~u kaɾipaħakan a miħəʦaan.
S.TRANSL: The year 537 B.C.E. was one of rejoicing for Jehovah's dedicated people.

S.FORM: Mihaenay, o misowalan ni Yis toya mararaway, o itiniay i sera a lakoing.
Mihaenay, o misowalan ni Yis toya mararaway, o itiniay i sera a lakoing.
S.PHON: miħaənaj, o~u miso~uwaɾan ni jis to~uja mararawaj, o~u itiniaj i səra a ɾako~uiŋ.
S.TRANSL: We can thus understand that what Jesus promised must be an earthly paradise.

S.FORM: Pasowalan ni Yis ko nisawawan: "Ano masasiolaholah kamo i, pakayni tonini ko sakafana' no tamdamdaw to nika o nisawawaan ako kamo," sanay.
Pasowalan ni Yis ko nisawawan: "Ano masasiolaholah kamo i, pakayni tonini ko sakafana' no tamdamdaw to nika o nisawawaan ako kamo," sanay.
S.PHON: paso~uwaɾan ni jis ko~u nisawawan: "ano~u masasio~uɾaħo~uɾaħ kamo~u i, pakajni to~unini ko~u sakafanaʡ no~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw to~u nika o~u nisawawaan ako~u kamo~u," sanaj.
S.TRANSL: Jesus told his disciples: "By this all will know that you are my disciples, if you have love among yourselves."

S.FORM: Tooren ko sapasifana' ni Yis a misodod to tao, wa nga'ayto malacecay ko salikaka.
Tooren ko sapasifana' ni Yis a misodod to tao, wa nga'ayto malacecay ko salikaka.
S.PHON: to~uo~urən ko~u sapasifanaʡ ni jis a miso~uɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮ to~u tao~u, wa ŋaʡajto~u maɾaʦəʦaj ko~u saɾikaka.
S.TRANSL: We protect and preserve our precious unity when we forgive others as Jesus taught us to do.

S.FORM: Marariday a malacafay a caciyaw kami, palidlid sato micada ci Matiyas to so'linay kimad, mahaopay ko sapatefoc ni Yis, sa'akawangay a sapikowan a fadangalan no Kawas ato olah ni Yihofa to tamdamdaw.
Marariday a malacafay a caciyaw kami, palidlid sato micada ci Matiyas to so'linay kimad, mahaopay ko sapatefoc ni Yis, sa'akawangay a sapikowan a fadangalan no Kawas ato olah ni Yihofa to tamdamdaw.
S.PHON: marariɬ~ɮaj a maɾaʦafaj a ʦaʦijaw kami, paɾiɬ~ɮɾiɬ~ɮ sato~u miʦaɬ~ɮa ʦi matijas to~u so~uʡɾinaj kimaɬ~ɮ, maħao~upaj ko~u sapatəfo~uʦ ni jis, saʡakawaŋaj a sapiko~uwan a faɬ~ɮaŋaɾan no~u kawas ato~u o~uɾaħ ni jiħo~ufa to~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: By means of these regular conversations, Mattias slowly progressed in his understanding and acceptance of such teachings as the ransom, God's sovereignty, and Jehovah's love.

S.FORM: Mafana'ay ci Satan to mamikowan ci Yis to polong a tamdaw noikor.
Mafana'ay ci Satan to mamikowan ci Yis to polong a tamdaw noikor.
S.PHON: mafanaʡaj ʦi satan to~u mamiko~uwan ʦi jis to~u po~uɾo~uŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw no~uiko~ur.
S.TRANSL: Satan surely knew that Jesus had the hope of eventually ruling mankind.

S.FORM: Mihaen ci Yis o sapipasifana'aw cangranan, so'linto tahasi'ayaw to cifonosay tamdaw, cowa ko nganga'ay tano fonos misaysay to demak.
Mihaen ci Yis o sapipasifana'aw cangranan, so'linto tahasi'ayaw to cifonosay tamdaw, cowa ko nganga'ay tano fonos misaysay to demak.
S.PHON: miħaən ʦi jis o~u sapipasifanaʡaw ʦaŋranan, so~uʡɾinto~u taħasiʡajaw to~u ʦifo~uno~usaj tamɬ~ɮaw, ʦo~uwa ko~u ŋaŋaʡaj tano~u fo~uno~us misajsaj to~u ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: Rather, Jesus had them bring a sword for an object lesson to teach them not to resort to violence, even when confronted by an armed crowd.

S.FORM: Cowa konini aca, misarocoday ci Yis mirienang to mitosilay ato pasifana' to tamdaw to nga'ayay ratoh a demak.
Cowa konini aca, misarocoday ci Yis mirienang to mitosilay ato pasifana' to tamdaw to nga'ayay ratoh a demak.
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa ko~unini aʦa, misaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮaj ʦi jis miriənaŋ to~u mito~usiɾaj ato~u pasifanaʡ to~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~u ŋaʡajaj rato~uħ a ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: In addition, Jesus devoted himself to the work of preaching and teaching the good news.

S.FORM: Sanay ci Yis palimo'ot: "Kao dafong no hekal caay ka moecel a hafay ko sapisawidang namo ta ano awaayto koya dafong i, oya widang ci Yihofa aci Yis ko mamihamham tamowanan a pacomod i mida'ocay a kamaro'an."

Sanay ci Yis palimo'ot: "Kao dafong no hekal caay ka moecel a hafay ko sapisawidang namo ta ano awaayto koya dafong i, oya widang ci Yihofa aci Yis ko mamihamham tamowanan a pacomod i mida'ocay a kamaro'an."
S.PHON: sanaj ʦi jis paɾimo~uʡo~ut: "kao~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ no~u ħəkaɾ ʦaaj ka mo~uəʦəɾ a ħafaj ko~u sapisawiɬ~ɮaŋ namo~u ta ano~u awaajto~u ko~uja ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ i, o~uja wiɬ~ɮaŋ ʦi jiħo~ufa aʦi jis ko~u mamiħamħam tamo~uwanan a paʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i miɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦaj a kamaro~uʡan."
S.TRANSL: So he urges them: "Make friends for yourselves by means of the unrighteous riches, so that when such fail, they Jehovah and Jesus may receive you into the everlasting dwelling places."

S.FORM: Ilaloma' no "pasifana'an i lotok", mihadakay ci Yis to sapaini padama kitanan padotoc a lipahak.
Ilaloma' no "pasifana'an i lotok", mihadakay ci Yis to sapaini padama kitanan padotoc a lipahak.
S.PHON: iɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u "pasifanaʡan i ɾo~uto~uk", miħaɬ~ɮakaj ʦi jis to~u sapaini paɬ~ɮama kitanan paɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ a ɾipaħak.
S.TRANSL: In the Sermon on the Mount, Jesus gave very practical advice that can help us to be lastingly happy.

S.FORM: O misowalan ni Yis a Midipotay Tapang, o cima?
O misowalan ni Yis a Midipotay Tapang, o cima?
S.PHON: o~u miso~uwaɾan ni jis a miɬ~ɮipo~utaj tapaŋ, o~u ʦima?
S.TRANSL: Who were the Benefactors to whom Jesus referred?

S.FORM: Mikitini i sakayat no 'madimadiay inanengay a koli', wa samaan mahapinang ita to ciharatengay ci Yis to no'adingoan a pakayraan ita hani?
Mikitini i sakayat no 'madimadiay inanengay a koli', wa samaan mahapinang ita to ciharatengay ci Yis to no'adingoan a pakayraan ita hani?
S.PHON: mikitini i sakajat no~u ʡmaɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮiaj inanəŋaj a ko~uɾiʡ, wa samaan maħapinaŋ ita to~u ʦiħaratəŋaj ʦi jis to~u no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan a pakajraan ita ħani?
S.TRANSL: How is Christ's concern for our spiritual welfare clearly reflected in the direction given by "the faithful and discreet slave"?

S.FORM: Nga'ayay minanam kita to ta'arawan ni Yis.
Nga'ayay minanam kita to ta'arawan ni Yis.
S.PHON: ŋaʡajaj minanam kita to~u taʡarawan ni jis.
S.TRANSL: We can learn a lesson from Jesus.

S.FORM: 'Ayaw no pina lipay no Piharatengan to Kapatay ni Yis a Sa'opo, nga'ayay palaken ita ko toki a mitolon, hanaca haharatengen ko kalala'ed no niyah aci Yihofa.
'Ayaw no pina lipay no Piharatengan to Kapatay ni Yis a Sa'opo, nga'ayay palaken ita ko toki a mitolon, hanaca haharatengen ko kalala'ed no niyah aci Yihofa.
S.PHON: ʡajaw no~u pina ɾipaj no~u piħaratəŋan to~u kapataj ni jis a saʡo~upo~u, ŋaʡajaj paɾakən ita ko~u to~uki a mito~uɾo~un, ħanaʦa ħaħaratəŋən ko~u kaɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮ no~u nijaħ aʦi jiħo~ufa.
S.TRANSL: In the days leading up to the Memorial, we can set aside time to examine prayerfully and carefully our personal relationship with Jehovah.

S.FORM: Misahecian ni Yis mitodong ci Yihofa, mansa, o sowal o demak ningra patahekalay to sini'adaay.
Misahecian ni Yis mitodong ci Yihofa, mansa, o sowal o demak ningra patahekalay to sini'adaay.
S.PHON: misaħəʦian ni jis mito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ʦi jiħo~ufa, mansa, o~u so~uwaɾ o~u ɬ~ɮəmak niŋra pataħəkaɾaj to~u siniʡaɬ~ɮaaj.
S.TRANSL: Jehovah's tender empathy was perfectly expressed in the words and actions of his compassionate Son, Jesus, when he was on earth.

S.FORM: Patahekal to timolo ci Yis, samaanay a mifiyor to tarokos?
Patahekal to timolo ci Yis, samaanay a mifiyor to tarokos?
S.PHON: pataħəkaɾ to~u timo~uɾo~u ʦi jis, samaanaj a mifijo~ur to~u taro~uko~us?
S.TRANSL: How did Jesus' courage affect the apostles?

S.FORM: Misamaanay ci Yis misakareteng to masaka limelaan ko saaro'an no romadiway demak?
Misamaanay ci Yis misakareteng to masaka limelaan ko saaro'an no romadiway demak?
S.PHON: misamaanaj ʦi jis misakarətəŋ to~u masaka ɾiməɾaan ko~u saaro~uʡan no~u ro~umaɬ~ɮiwaj ɬ~ɮəmak?
S.TRANSL: How did Jesus emphasize the need for singing in Christian worship?

S.FORM: O maanan ko kalimlaan no ka'orip ni Yis hani? Misamaanay hani?
O maanan ko kalimlaan no ka'orip ni Yis hani? Misamaanay hani?
S.PHON: o~u maanan ko~u kaɾimɾaan no~u kaʡo~urip ni jis ħani? misamaanaj ħani?
S.TRANSL: What work did Jesus make the primary focus of his life, and why?

S.TRANSL: Even so, we are assisted by God's spirit to present the good news to them in a peaceful and respectful manner.

Nikawrira, oniya pakahemekay a demak alatek cecay aca a liyad.

S.TRANSL: However, some causes for joy can be temporary.

S.FORM: Cowa i tingsokiw kilac mitosil aca, citinsiyaho cingra tayra i inaka a miliso' to tamdaw, tada timoloayto cingra.
Cowa i tingsokiw kilac mitosil aca, citinsiyaho cingra tayra i inaka a miliso' to tamdaw, tada timoloayto cingra.
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa i tiŋso~ukiw kiɾaʦ mito~usiɾ aʦa, ʦitinsijaħo~u ʦiŋra tajra i inaka a miɾiso~uʡ to~u tamɬ~ɮaw, taɬ~ɮa timo~uɾo~uajto~u ʦiŋra.
S.TRANSL: She needed courage to preach in that Catholic region and to travel by bicycle to rural territories.

S.FORM: O Farisay tamdaw o demak aca no mararaway tamdaw ko misinanotan, cowa pisinanot to nafaloco'an ningra.
O Farisay tamdaw o demak aca no mararaway tamdaw ko misinanotan, cowa pisinanot to nafaloco'an ningra.
S.PHON: o~u farisaj tamɬ~ɮaw o~u ɬ~ɮəmak aʦa no~u mararawaj tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u misinano~utan, ʦo~uwa pisinano~ut to~u nafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan niŋra.
S.TRANSL: The Pharisees focused solely on what a sinner had done rather than on who a sinner was at heart.

S.FORM: Cowa ko pisadak aca to no'adingoan a sadama, o roma Krisciyang wa midimokos to halafinay adada a paro no loma' anca salawina, misaaliay to olah ato mihadidiay.
Cowa ko pisadak aca to no'adingoan a sadama, o roma Krisciyang wa midimokos to halafinay adada a paro no loma' anca salawina, misaaliay to olah ato mihadidiay.
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa ko~u pisaɬ~ɮak aʦa to~u no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan a saɬ~ɮama, o~u ro~uma krisʦijaŋ wa miɬ~ɮimo~uko~us to~u ħaɾafinaj aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa a paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ anʦa saɾawina, misaaɾiaj to~u o~uɾaħ ato~u miħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮiaj.
S.TRANSL: In addition to providing spiritual help, true Christians must cultivate loving patience when providing care for chronically ill family members or friends.

S.FORM: Cowa ko pisinanot aca ni Kristo to saali ita, i no'adingoan, padamaayho kitaanan misamacayto kalimlaan a demak i fafekang no sera.
Cowa ko pisinanot aca ni Kristo to saali ita, i no'adingoan, padamaayho kitaanan misamacayto kalimlaan a demak i fafekang no sera.
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa ko~u pisinano~ut aʦa ni kristo~u to~u saaɾi ita, i no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan, paɬ~ɮamaajħo~u kitaanan misamaʦajto~u kaɾimɾaan a ɬ~ɮəmak i fafəkaŋ no~u səra.
S.TRANSL: In addition to caring for our spiritual needs, Christ helps us to keep our focus on the most important work being done on earth today.

S.FORM: Cowa ko pitadtad aca ni Lika to pihakelongan i cafay micudad, pa'arawayho cangranan to jw.org a wangcan.
Cowa ko pitadtad aca ni Lika to pihakelongan i cafay micudad, pa'arawayho cangranan to jw.org a wangcan.
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa ko~u pitaɬ~ɮtaɬ~ɮ aʦa ni ɾika to~u piħakəɾo~uŋan i ʦafaj miʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, paʡarawajħo~u ʦaŋranan to~u jw.o~ur* a waŋʦan.
S.TRANSL: Not only did Luca explain his beliefs but he also showed our website to the whole class.

S.FORM: Cowa konini aca, wa nga'ayho kiso misamaan padama to faelohay salikaka hani?
Cowa konini aca, wa nga'ayho kiso misamaan padama to faelohay salikaka hani?
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa ko~unini aʦa, wa ŋaʡajħo~u kiso~u misamaan paɬ~ɮama to~u faəɾo~uħaj saɾikaka ħani?
S.TRANSL: What further practical help can you give to newcomers?

S.FORM: O miharatengan aca ko "Lakoing" sanay ko tamdaw.
O miharatengan aca ko "Lakoing" sanay ko tamdaw.
S.PHON: o~u miħaratəŋan aʦa ko~u "ɾako~uiŋ" sanaj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: Some say that paradise is a fantasy.

S.FORM: Mitolon kita cowa ko picangacang aca to sadama ni Yihofa, nga'ayayho pala'osi to roma a araaw.
Mitolon kita cowa ko picangacang aca to sadama ni Yihofa, nga'ayayho pala'osi to roma a araaw.
S.PHON: mito~uɾo~un kita ʦo~uwa ko~u piʦaŋaʦaŋ aʦa to~u saɬ~ɮama ni jiħo~ufa, ŋaʡajajħo~u paɾaʡo~usi to~u ro~uma a araaw.
S.TRANSL: Prayer offers you the opportunity to do more than simply ask Jehovah for help.

S.FORM: Kawrira, maolahay cangra padama to salikaka, tiya misatapang aca, mararomay ko faloco' nangra.
Kawrira, maolahay cangra padama to salikaka, tiya misatapang aca, mararomay ko faloco' nangra.
S.PHON: kawrira, mao~uɾaħaj ʦaŋra paɬ~ɮama to~u saɾikaka, tija misatapaŋ aʦa, mararo~umaj ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ naŋra.
S.TRANSL: Of course, since they loved serving their brothers, there was some initial disappointment.

S.FORM: Hano kinacecay aca mirienang to sa'opo, wa ira ko ta'akayay a pilingat hani?
Hano kinacecay aca mirienang to sa'opo, wa ira ko ta'akayay a pilingat hani?
S.PHON: ħano~u kinaʦəʦaj aʦa miriənaŋ to~u saʡo~upo~u, wa ira ko~u taʡakajaj a piɾiŋat ħani?
S.TRANSL: How important is it for people to come to at least one of our meetings?

S.FORM: Maocoray no paso'linay faloco' kako, cowa ko pidoedo aca to moecelay palinian no Kawas a ma'orip, o mamilasilayho to palinian no Kawas i tamdaw han?"
Maocoray no paso'linay faloco' kako, cowa ko pidoedo aca to moecelay palinian no Kawas a ma'orip, o mamilasilayho to palinian no Kawas i tamdaw han?"
S.PHON: mao~uʦo~uraj no~u paso~uʡɾinaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ kako~u, ʦo~uwa ko~u piɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u aʦa to~u mo~uəʦəɾaj paɾinian no~u kawas a maʡo~urip, o~u mamiɾasiɾajħo~u to~u paɾinian no~u kawas i tamɬ~ɮaw ħan?"
S.TRANSL: Does my faith impel me not only to live in harmony with God's righteous standards but also to proclaim them?'

S.FORM: Cowa ko tekedan aca a sikawdan ko pakalalokan ni Yihofa, pakalalokay to polong a finawlan.
Cowa ko tekedan aca a sikawdan ko pakalalokan ni Yihofa, pakalalokay to polong a finawlan.
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa ko~u təkəɬ~ɮan aʦa a sikawɬ~ɮan ko~u pakaɾaɾo~ukan ni jiħo~ufa, pakaɾaɾo~ukaj to~u po~uɾo~uŋ a finawɾan.
S.TRANSL: Not only did Jehovah encourage individuals but he also gave words of encouragement to his people as a group.

S.FORM: Isaka 1993 miheca, mirienangay to sano Rowasiyaay sowal a kapot i Niwyok, itiya 20 aca ko mitosilay.
Isaka 1993 miheca, mirienangay to sano Rowasiyaay sowal a kapot i Niwyok, itiya 20 aca ko mitosilay.
S.PHON: isaka **** miħəʦa, miriənaŋaj to~u sano~u ro~uwasijaaj so~uwaɾ a kapo~ut i niwjo~uk, itija ** aʦa ko~u mito~usiɾaj.
S.TRANSL: When she began doing so in 1993, there were only about 20 publishers in the Russian-language group in New York City.

S.FORM: Haratengen ita, o madangaray ni Yihofa demak, cowa ko misaalian aca, misahalakaan anca mitokelan ita a demak.
Haratengen ita, o madangaray ni Yihofa demak, cowa ko misaalian aca, misahalakaan anca mitokelan ita a demak.
S.PHON: ħaratəŋən ita, o~u maɬ~ɮaŋaraj ni jiħo~ufa ɬ~ɮəmak, ʦo~uwa ko~u misaaɾian aʦa, misaħaɾakaan anʦa mito~ukəɾan ita a ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: But at the same time, we need to realize that Jehovah is not limited by our requests, plans, and expectations.

S.FORM: Cowa ko pilengo aca no Taneng 23:23 to mi'aca to so'linay kimad, pasowalayho to mami'aca kita to 'taneng, sapirikec, saka cipinang.'
Cowa ko pilengo aca no Taneng 23:23 to mi'aca to so'linay kimad, pasowalayho to mami'aca kita to 'taneng, sapirikec, saka cipinang.'
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa ko~u piɾəŋo~u aʦa no~u tanəŋ **:** to~u miʡaʦa to~u so~uʡɾinaj kimaɬ~ɮ, paso~uwaɾajħo~u to~u mamiʡaʦa kita to~u ʡtanəŋ, sapirikəʦ, saka ʦipinaŋ.ʡ
S.TRANSL: In addition to buying truth, Proverbs 23:23 says that we should also buy "wisdom and discipline and understanding."

S.FORM: Cowa ko mitosilay aca, wa nga'ayho kita misamaan pataengad to likat no niyah hani?
Cowa ko mitosilay aca, wa nga'ayho kita misamaan pataengad to likat no niyah hani?
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa ko~u mito~usiɾaj aʦa, wa ŋaʡajħo~u kita misamaan pataəŋaɬ~ɮ to~u ɾikat no~u nijaħ ħani?
S.TRANSL: In addition to engaging in the ministry, in what other ways can we let our light shine?

S.FORM: O waywayan no Israil tamdaw cowa ko palifet aca to sapikayat a fadangalan ni Mosi, o misafelitay to Kawas a waywayan koni.
O waywayan no Israil tamdaw cowa ko palifet aca to sapikayat a fadangalan ni Mosi, o misafelitay to Kawas a waywayan koni.
S.PHON: o~u wajwajan no~u israiɾ tamɬ~ɮaw ʦo~uwa ko~u paɾifət aʦa to~u sapikajat a faɬ~ɮaŋaɾan ni mo~usi, o~u misafəɾitaj to~u kawas a wajwajan ko~uni.
S.TRANSL: He viewed the actions of the Israelites as a challenge to his Godship, not just a rebellion against Moses.

S.FORM: O widang ni Tafiti cowa ko kapah aca.
O widang ni Tafiti cowa ko kapah aca.
S.PHON: o~u wiɬ~ɮaŋ ni tafiti ʦo~uwa ko~u kapaħ aʦa.
S.TRANSL: The psalmist David did not limit his circle of friends to just his peers.

S.FORM: Itiya tosaay aca kasakopang itira, o cecay o kohecalay tamdaw a kasakopang, ora roma o "kohetingay tamdaw" a kasakopang.
Itiya tosaay aca kasakopang itira, o cecay o kohecalay tamdaw a kasakopang, ora roma o "kohetingay tamdaw" a kasakopang.
S.PHON: itija to~usaaj aʦa kasako~upaŋ itira, o~u ʦəʦaj o~u ko~uħəʦaɾaj tamɬ~ɮaw a kasako~upaŋ, o~ura ro~uma o~u "ko~uħətiŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw" a kasako~upaŋ.
S.TRANSL: In those days, there were two congregations in Pine Bluff, one white and one "colored," or black.

S.FORM: Nikawrira, mata'lif ko 40 miheca, tahirato salikoray no kalafel no Israil i kohkoh i, mifekaday aca ko maanan a demak hani?
Nikawrira, mata'lif ko 40 miheca, tahirato salikoray no kalafel no Israil i kohkoh i, mifekaday aca ko maanan a demak hani?
S.PHON: nikawrira, mataʡɾif ko~u ** miħəʦa, taħirato~u saɾiko~uraj no~u kaɾafəɾ no~u israiɾ i ko~uħko~uħ i, mifəkaɬ~ɮaj aʦa ko~u maanan a ɬ~ɮəmak ħani?
S.TRANSL: What happened, though, when a similar event occurred some 40 years later, toward the end of the journey through the wilderness?

S.FORM: Nikawrira, cowa ko aitini aca i mikiriwi'ay a romi'ad, nga' misaaliay to sahinom ko tamdaw.
Nikawrira, cowa ko aitini aca i mikiriwi'ay a romi'ad, nga' misaaliay to sahinom ko tamdaw.
S.PHON: nikawrira, ʦo~uwa ko~u aitini aʦa i mikiriwiʡaj a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ŋaʡ misaaɾiaj to~u saħino~um ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: Bear in mind, though, that bereaved ones need encouragement not only on special occasions.

S.FORM: Mahecaday ko pinanam ita to so'linay kimad, isatapang aca, mahapinangay ita to kalimlaan ko pidofdof to saali ni Yihofa.
Mahecaday ko pinanam ita to so'linay kimad, isatapang aca, mahapinangay ita to kalimlaan ko pidofdof to saali ni Yihofa.
S.PHON: maħəʦaɬ~ɮaj ko~u pinanam ita to~u so~uʡɾinaj kimaɬ~ɮ, isatapaŋ aʦa, maħapinaŋaj ita to~u kaɾimɾaan ko~u piɬ~ɮo~ufɬ~ɮo~uf to~u saaɾi ni jiħo~ufa.
S.TRANSL: Similarly, when we first came to a knowledge of the truth, we learned the importance of obedience to Jehovah's basic requirements.

S.FORM: Cowa ko manan koni, mimingay aca demak wa saan kiso alatek, kawra midoka'ay to faloco' ato no'adingoan nangra, latek mamirepat to rihaday no kasakopang.
Cowa ko manan koni, mimingay aca demak wa saan kiso alatek, kawra midoka'ay to faloco' ato no'adingoan nangra, latek mamirepat to rihaday no kasakopang.
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa ko~u manan ko~uni, mimiŋaj aʦa ɬ~ɮəmak wa saan kiso~u aɾatək, kawra miɬ~ɮo~ukaʡaj to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ato~u no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan naŋra, ɾatək mamirəpat to~u riħaɬ~ɮaj no~u kasako~upaŋ.
S.TRANSL: You might feel that those incidents appear minor. Still, each had the potential for causing lasting emotional and spiritual injury to those involved.

S.FORM: Kawra, ono litengan aca a sowal no Yutaya tamdaw konini.
Kawra, ono litengan aca a sowal no Yutaya tamdaw konini.
S.PHON: kawra, o~uno~u ɾitəŋan aʦa a so~uwaɾ no~u jo~u~utaja tamɬ~ɮaw ko~unini.
S.TRANSL: This is, of course, only a tradition.

S.FORM: Cowa ko ci Yis aca, o roma tamdaw mirikecay to patelasay miketon to sowal.
Cowa ko ci Yis aca, o roma tamdaw mirikecay to patelasay miketon to sowal.
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa ko~u ʦi jis aʦa, o~u ro~uma tamɬ~ɮaw mirikəʦaj to~u patəɾasaj mikəto~un to~u so~uwaɾ.
S.TRANSL: Jesus was not alone in condemning these abuses.

S.FORM: Coko ci Yis aca, pakatengilay ko paino'ay a Yohani toniya sowal.
Coko ci Yis aca, pakatengilay ko paino'ay a Yohani toniya sowal.
S.PHON: ʦo~uko~u ʦi jis aʦa, pakatəŋiɾaj ko~u paino~uʡaj a jo~uħani to~unija so~uwaɾ.
S.TRANSL: Evidently, John the Baptist was the only other person who heard those words.

S.FORM: Cowa konini aca, no'adingoan a tamdaw ato midoedoay to tireng a tamdaw, iraayho ko manan a kasasiromaan hani?
Cowa konini aca, no'adingoan a tamdaw ato midoedoay to tireng a tamdaw, iraayho ko manan a kasasiromaan hani?
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa ko~unini aʦa, no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan a tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uaj to~u tirəŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw, iraajħo~u ko~u manan a kasasiro~umaan ħani?
S.TRANSL: In what other ways do physical and spiritual individuals differ?

S.FORM: Sanay ko sowal no cecay salikaka: "Ano cicafayay kiso ci Yihofaan paka lomaloma'an a mitosil i, wa kiso aca ko sacaciyaw saan, caka papipasowalen iso ci Yihofa han?"
Sanay ko sowal no cecay salikaka: "Ano cicafayay kiso ci Yihofaan paka lomaloma'an a mitosil i, wa kiso aca ko sacaciyaw saan, caka papipasowalen iso ci Yihofa han?"
S.PHON: sanaj ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʦəʦaj saɾikaka: "ano~u ʦiʦafajaj kiso~u ʦi jiħo~ufaan paka ɾo~umaɾo~umaʡan a mito~usiɾ i, wa kiso~u aʦa ko~u saʦaʦijaw saan, ʦaka papipaso~uwaɾən iso~u ʦi jiħo~ufa ħan?"
S.TRANSL: One brother expressed the matter this way, "If you were preaching from house to house with Jehovah himself, would you do all the talking or would you let him speak?"

S.FORM: O malohemay malitengay cowa ko tano sowal aca a pakalalok to tamdaw, wa nga'ayayho misamaan to demak?
O malohemay malitengay cowa ko tano sowal aca a pakalalok to tamdaw, wa nga'ayayho misamaan to demak?
S.PHON: o~u maɾo~uħəmaj maɾitəŋaj ʦo~uwa ko~u tano~u so~uwaɾ aʦa a pakaɾaɾo~uk to~u tamɬ~ɮaw, wa ŋaʡajajħo~u misamaan to~u ɬ~ɮəmak?
S.TRANSL: In addition to sharing words of encouragement, how can the elders build others up?

S.FORM: Pakayni to mitosilay demak o matekesay ko 'aca a odo' to sapafeli ni Yihofa ano saan a minengneng kita i, cowa ko sapisa'osiaw aca to toki a mitosil kita.
Pakayni to mitosilay demak o matekesay ko 'aca a odo' to sapafeli ni Yihofa ano saan a minengneng kita i, cowa ko sapisa'osiaw aca to toki a mitosil kita.
S.PHON: pakajni to~u mito~usiɾaj ɬ~ɮəmak o~u matəkəsaj ko~u ʡaʦa a o~uɬ~ɮo~uʡ to~u sapafəɾi ni jiħo~ufa ano~u saan a minəŋnəŋ kita i, ʦo~uwa ko~u sapisaʡo~usiaw aʦa to~u to~uki a mito~usiɾ kita.
S.TRANSL: When we view the ministry as a priceless treasure from Jehovah, we will never be content with simply "counting time."

S.FORM: Oniya sinael patalipa'elalay takowanan, o lipahak, cowa ko pakayraan aca, ao pakayniay i sakayat no fangcalay saocor no Kawas i noka'orip."
Oniya sinael patalipa'elalay takowanan, o lipahak, cowa ko pakayraan aca, ao pakayniay i sakayat no fangcalay saocor no Kawas i noka'orip."
S.PHON: o~unija sinaəɾ pataɾipaʡəɾaɾaj tako~uwanan, o~u ɾipaħak, ʦo~uwa ko~u pakajraan aʦa, ao~u pakajniaj i sakajat no~u faŋʦaɾaj sao~uʦo~ur no~u kawas i no~ukaʡo~urip."
S.TRANSL: This verse reminded me that my joy in life is dependent, not on my circumstances, but on the effect that God's spirit has in my life."

S.FORM: Misamaanay pi'osi aca to sinael i pitosilan hano cowaho ka edeng?
Misamaanay pi'osi aca to sinael i pitosilan hano cowaho ka edeng?
S.PHON: misamaanaj piʡo~usi aʦa to~u sinaəɾ i pito~usiɾan ħano~u ʦo~uwaħo~u ka əɬ~ɮəŋ?
S.TRANSL: Why do we need to do more than merely read scriptures when preaching?

S.FORM: Tahira ci Yohani i loma' no salikaka i, o fafahi aca i loma'ay.
Tahira ci Yohani i loma' no salikaka i, o fafahi aca i loma'ay.
S.PHON: taħira ʦi jo~uħani i ɾo~umaʡ no~u saɾikaka i, o~u fafaħi aʦa i ɾo~umaʡaj.
S.TRANSL: When John arrived at the address, the recipient's wife, who was one of Jehovah's Witnesses, accepted the envelope.

S.FORM: O roma i, pi'osi aca to adihayay sinael a ecaka pitadtad, cowa ko nga'ayay a mipasifana'ay koni.
O roma i, pi'osi aca to adihayay sinael a ecaka pitadtad, cowa ko nga'ayay a mipasifana'ay koni.
S.PHON: o~u ro~uma i, piʡo~usi aʦa to~u aɬ~ɮiħajaj sinaəɾ a əʦaka pitaɬ~ɮtaɬ~ɮ, ʦo~uwa ko~u ŋaʡajaj a mipasifanaʡaj ko~uni.
S.TRANSL: Also, remember that simply reading a number of scriptures does not in itself constitute teaching from the Bible.

S.FORM: Cowa ko pitadi'ec aca nangra to Kawas, misadayayho a milood, mahecad o pahatatanaman a sofitay, mica'edongay cangra to 'sapafeli no Kawas polong a sapilood a riko'.'
Cowa ko pitadi'ec aca nangra to Kawas, misadayayho a milood, mahecad o pahatatanaman a sofitay, mica'edongay cangra to 'sapafeli no Kawas polong a sapilood a riko'.'
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa ko~u pitaɬ~ɮiʡəʦ aʦa naŋra to~u kawas, misaɬ~ɮajajħo~u a miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, maħəʦaɬ~ɮ o~u paħatatanaman a so~ufitaj, miʦaʡəɬ~ɮo~uŋaj ʦaŋra to~u ʡsapafəɾi no~u kawas po~uɾo~uŋ a sapiɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ a riko~uʡ.ʡ
S.TRANSL: Like well-trained soldiers, they have "put on the complete suit of armor from God."

S.FORM: Cowa ko nika patireng aca to fangcalay sefi, oha papatirengho to niyaro'.
Cowa ko nika patireng aca to fangcalay sefi, oha papatirengho to niyaro'.
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa ko~u nika patirəŋ aʦa to~u faŋʦaɾaj səfi, o~uħa papatirəŋħo~u to~u nijaro~uʡ.
S.TRANSL: In addition to the temple work, the Israelites had to rebuild their cities.

S.FORM: Kawraan, o saka eca ka makelec ko nisawawaan, cowa ko sapita'lifaw aca nangra to tao, iraayho ko roma lalangian.
Kawraan, o saka eca ka makelec ko nisawawaan, cowa ko sapita'lifaw aca nangra to tao, iraayho ko roma lalangian.
S.PHON: kawraan, o~u saka əʦa ka makəɾəʦ ko~u nisawawaan, ʦo~uwa ko~u sapitaʡɾifaw aʦa naŋra to~u tao~u, iraajħo~u ko~u ro~uma ɾaɾaŋian.
S.TRANSL: Desire for prominence, however, was not the only potential cause of disunity among Christ's disciples.

S.FORM: Cowa ka cecay aca ko pakayraan.
Cowa ka cecay aca ko pakayraan.
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa ka ʦəʦaj aʦa ko~u pakajraan.
S.TRANSL: There was not just one way.

S.FORM: Cowa ko pirienang aca to taykay, oniya taypiyaw tayraay i Lipanon ato Yortan mirienang to mikiriwi'ay piliwko, tayra i masowalay no Fangcalay Cudad a pala.
Cowa ko pirienang aca to taykay, oniya taypiyaw tayraay i Lipanon ato Yortan mirienang to mikiriwi'ay piliwko, tayra i masowalay no Fangcalay Cudad a pala.
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa ko~u piriənaŋ aʦa to~u tajkaj, o~unija tajpijaw tajraaj i ɾipano~un ato~u jo~urtan miriənaŋ to~u mikiriwiʡaj piɾiwko~u, tajra i maso~uwaɾaj no~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ a paɾa.
S.TRANSL: Besides scheduling flights and hotel stays, our Bethel department obtained all the visas needed for stops in several countries.

S.FORM: Tinakoen, o cecay a kasakopang, 134 ko mitosilay a salikaka, 'arawhan i kilac nangra 50 aca ko laloma'an.
Tinakoen, o cecay a kasakopang, 134 ko mitosilay a salikaka, 'arawhan i kilac nangra 50 aca ko laloma'an.
S.PHON: tinako~uən, o~u ʦəʦaj a kasako~upaŋ, *** ko~u mito~usiɾaj a saɾikaka, ʡarawħan i kiɾaʦ naŋra ** aʦa ko~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan.
S.TRANSL: For example, one congregation has 134 publishers but only 50 private homes in its territory!

S.FORM: Cowa ko nika ciharateng aca ni Yihofa kitanan, hanaca mafana'ayho to tatirengan no mita, iraay ko 'icel padama kitanan miremo to pasangar.
Cowa ko nika ciharateng aca ni Yihofa kitanan, hanaca mafana'ayho to tatirengan no mita, iraay ko 'icel padama kitanan miremo to pasangar.
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa ko~u nika ʦiħaratəŋ aʦa ni jiħo~ufa kitanan, ħanaʦa mafanaʡajħo~u to~u tatirəŋan no~u mita, iraaj ko~u ʡiʦəɾ paɬ~ɮama kitanan mirəmo~u to~u pasaŋar.
S.TRANSL: Not only is Jehovah interested in you as a person but he also has the power and empathy needed to help you with life's problems.

S.FORM: Micekiw to Fangcalay Cudad, cowa ko kaliki a minengneng to lalakaw ato pikonis aca ilaenoay to sapaca'of.
Micekiw to Fangcalay Cudad, cowa ko kaliki a minengneng to lalakaw ato pikonis aca ilaenoay to sapaca'of.
S.PHON: miʦəkiw to~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, ʦo~uwa ko~u kaɾiki a minəŋnəŋ to~u ɾaɾakaw ato~u piko~unis aʦa iɾaəno~uaj to~u sapaʦaʡo~uf.
S.TRANSL: Study is more than superficial reading and involves much more than merely highlighting the answers to study questions.

S.FORM: Mitafo to mihadidiay o malifokay ako aci Mariya a sapalemed mata'lifay ko maharatengay.
Mitafo to mihadidiay o malifokay ako aci Mariya a sapalemed mata'lifay ko maharatengay.
S.PHON: mitafo~u to~u miħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮiaj o~u maɾifo~ukaj ako~u aʦi marija a sapaɾəməɬ~ɮ mataʡɾifaj ko~u maħaratəŋaj.
S.TRANSL: The blessings Maria and I received for remaining steadfast have been greater than I could ever have imagined.

S.FORM: Misamaanay hano tangongolay ko kalawidang ni Tafiti aci Yonatan?
Misamaanay hano tangongolay ko kalawidang ni Tafiti aci Yonatan?
S.PHON: misamaanaj ħano~u taŋo~uŋo~uɾaj ko~u kaɾawiɬ~ɮaŋ ni tafiti aʦi jo~unatan?
S.TRANSL: What was the basis for the friendship between David and Jonathan?

S.FORM: Misamaanay ci Atam aci Ifa o caciharateng to sakanga'ay no teloteloc hani?
Misamaanay ci Atam aci Ifa o caciharateng to sakanga'ay no teloteloc hani?
S.PHON: misamaanaj ʦi atam aʦi ifa o~u ʦaʦiħaratəŋ to~u sakaŋaʡaj no~u təɾo~utəɾo~uʦ ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why should the first human couple have been interested in giving?

S.FORM: Tahalifaay to manan ci Pawlo aci Silas i Filipi?
Tahalifaay to manan ci Pawlo aci Silas i Filipi?
S.PHON: taħaɾifaaj to~u manan ʦi pawɾo~u aʦi siɾas i fiɾipi?
S.TRANSL: What events in Philippi led to the imprisonment of Paul and Silas?

S.FORM: Kako aci Stan Nikelson itiniay i Solis no Manitopa a misakafah.
Kako aci Stan Nikelson itiniay i Solis no Manitopa a misakafah.
S.PHON: kako~u aʦi stan nikəɾso~un itiniaj i so~uɾis no~u manito~upa a misakafaħ.
S.TRANSL: Together with Stan Nicolson, I began pioneer service in Souris, a town in the province of Manitoba.

S.FORM: So'li'lin ci Nowa Taniil aci Yopu coka hecad ko ka'oripan nangra a lintad ato pakayraan, kawra tahasi'ayaw cangra to sapalifet kamayan a tanoktok a mihadidi.
So'li'lin ci Nowa Taniil aci Yopu coka hecad ko ka'oripan nangra a lintad ato pakayraan, kawra tahasi'ayaw cangra to sapalifet kamayan a tanoktok a mihadidi.
S.PHON: so~uʡɾiʡɾin ʦi no~uwa taniiɾ aʦi jo~upo~u~u ʦo~uka ħəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u kaʡo~uripan naŋra a ɾintaɬ~ɮ ato~u pakajraan, kawra taħasiʡajaw ʦaŋra to~u sapaɾifət kamajan a tano~ukto~uk a miħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮi.
S.TRANSL: Although Noah, Daniel, and Job lived at different times and under very different circumstances, they endured the challenges they faced.

S.FORM: Mihaenay, sa'osien ita ko faloco' mitodong ci Nowaan, Taniil aci Yopuan, paihekal to paso'linay faloco' ato midoedoay!
Mihaenay, sa'osien ita ko faloco' mitodong ci Nowaan, Taniil aci Yopuan, paihekal to paso'linay faloco' ato midoedoay!
S.PHON: miħaənaj, saʡo~usiən ita ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ mito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ʦi no~uwaan, taniiɾ aʦi jo~upo~u~uan, paiħəkaɾ to~u paso~uʡɾinaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ato~u miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uaj!
S.TRANSL: Therefore, we want to imitate the faith and obedience of Noah, Daniel, and Job!

S.FORM: Mikitini i ta'arawan ni Yakop aci Mariya mananam ita ko manan?
Mikitini i ta'arawan ni Yakop aci Mariya mananam ita ko manan?
S.PHON: mikitini i taʡarawan ni jako~up aʦi marija mananam ita ko~u manan?
S.TRANSL: What can we learn from the example of Mary?

S.FORM: O pitadtad ningra mitemeray to faloco' ni Martin Luter aci Tintele aci Kawen.
O pitadtad ningra mitemeray to faloco' ni Martin Luter aci Tintele aci Kawen.
S.PHON: o~u pitaɬ~ɮtaɬ~ɮ niŋra mitəməraj to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ni martin ɾo~u~utər aʦi tintəɾə aʦi kawən.
S.TRANSL: His explanation of Bible passages influenced Martin Luther, William Tyndale, and John Calvin.

S.FORM: Ci Coping aci Nao samaanay misaysay cangra to kacango'ot no payci hani?
Ci Coping aci Nao samaanay misaysay cangra to kacango'ot no payci hani?
S.PHON: ʦi ʦo~upiŋ aʦi nao~u samaanaj misajsaj ʦaŋra to~u kaʦaŋo~uʡo~ut no~u pajʦi ħani?
S.TRANSL: How have Jumpei and Nao coped financially?

S.FORM: Itiyaho ci Atam aci Ifa malifokay ko masamaanay a pasalat?
Itiyaho ci Atam aci Ifa malifokay ko masamaanay a pasalat?

S.TRANSL: What freedom did Adam and Eve enjoy?

S.FORM: Ci Silewiyana aci Silewian itiniay picadaan to ino' ni Toratin
Ci Silewiyana aci Silewian itiniay picadaan to ino' ni Toratin
S.PHON: ʦi siɾəwijana aʦi siɾəwian itiniaj piʦaɬ~ɮaan to~u ino~uʡ ni to~uratin

S.FORM: Tiya pasowal ci Mosi to "niyam" i, o niyah aci Yihofa anca o niyah aci Aron ko mitoro'an ningra.
Tiya pasowal ci Mosi to "niyam" i, o niyah aci Yihofa anca o niyah aci Aron ko mitoro'an ningra.
S.PHON: tija paso~uwaɾ ʦi mo~usi to~u "nijam" i, o~u nijaħ aʦi jiħo~ufa anʦa o~u nijaħ aʦi aro~un ko~u mito~uro~uʡan niŋra.
S.TRANSL: By using the word "we," Moses was likely referring to himself and Aaron.

S.FORM: O malifetay ni Nowa, Taniil aci Yopu, iraay ko manan a kalaliting to 1 Pitiro 5:10?
O malifetay ni Nowa, Taniil aci Yopu, iraay ko manan a kalaliting to 1 Pitiro 5:10?
S.PHON: o~u maɾifətaj ni no~uwa, taniiɾ aʦi jo~upo~u~u, iraaj ko~u manan a kaɾaɾitiŋ to~u * pitiro~u *:**?
S.TRANSL: How do the words at 1 Peter 5:10 reflect what occurred in the lives of Noah, Daniel, and Job?

S.FORM: Caka halafin, masaso'arawayto kako aci Walte Polayte, o saka 30 liyad no Kiliyat a milakowitay to riyar cingra.
Caka halafin, masaso'arawayto kako aci Walte Polayte, o saka 30 liyad no Kiliyat a milakowitay to riyar cingra.
S.PHON: ʦaka ħaɾafin, masaso~uʡarawajto~u kako~u aʦi waɾtə po~uɾajtə, o~u saka ** ɾijaɬ~ɮ no~u kiɾijat a miɾako~uwitaj to~u rijar ʦiŋra.

S.FORM: Kalala'ed aci Yihofa 28 to 40
Kalala'ed aci Yihofa 28 to 40

S.TRANSL: Relationship With Jehovah 28-40

S.FORM: Nikawrira, ma'kakto ko potalay no Itin a sera, "papalengawen no sera ko ceka a semot ato talod," ma'orip ci Atam aci Ifa i potal no Itin, misaaliay to matatodongay a riko'.
Nikawrira, ma'kakto ko potalay no Itin a sera, "papalengawen no sera ko ceka a semot ato talod," ma'orip ci Atam aci Ifa i potal no Itin, misaaliay to matatodongay a riko'.
S.PHON: nikawrira, maʡkakto~u ko~u po~utaɾaj no~u itin a səra, "papaɾəŋawən no~u səra ko~u ʦəka a səmo~ut ato~u taɾo~uɬ~ɮ," maʡo~urip ʦi atam aʦi ifa i po~utaɾ no~u itin, misaaɾiaj to~u matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a riko~uʡ.
S.TRANSL: However, Jehovah knew that they would need suitable clothing in order to live outside of Eden, where the ground was now cursed with "thorns and thistles."

S.FORM: Hamaan pakayni i raraw no tao a mapalak ko kalala'ed no niyah aci Yihofa.
Hamaan pakayni i raraw no tao a mapalak ko kalala'ed no niyah aci Yihofa.

S.TRANSL: Do not allow the mistakes of others to damage your relationship with Jehovah.

S.FORM: Mitengilan ni Atam aci Ifa ko mararaway a sapaini, samaanay ko pifiyor cangraanan ato teloteloc nangra hani?
Mitengilan ni Atam aci Ifa ko mararaway a sapaini, samaanay ko pifiyor cangraanan ato teloteloc nangra hani?
S.PHON: mitəŋiɾan ni atam aʦi ifa ko~u mararawaj a sapaini, samaanaj ko~u pifijo~ur ʦaŋraanan ato~u təɾo~utəɾo~uʦ naŋra ħani?
S.TRANSL: How did heeding bad advice affect Adam and Eve and their descendants?

S.FORM: Caka tolo folad, misawadayto ci Tewien aci Ciyasmin a komaen to epah, ikor mitingkiay to raramod nangra.
Caka tolo folad, misawadayto ci Tewien aci Ciyasmin a komaen to epah, ikor mitingkiay to raramod nangra.
S.PHON: ʦaka to~uɾo~u fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, misawaɬ~ɮajto~u ʦi təwiən aʦi ʦijasmin a ko~umaən to~u əpaħ, iko~ur mitiŋkiaj to~u raramo~uɬ~ɮ naŋra.
S.TRANSL: Within three months, they decided to give up alcohol and later legalized their marriage.

S.FORM: Ci Rian aci Culiya malo mikiriwi'ay misakafahay to cecay liyad, ikor macadaay to mamaharek ko tayal nangra, itiya tada masomaday cangra.
Ci Rian aci Culiya malo mikiriwi'ay misakafahay to cecay liyad, ikor macadaay to mamaharek ko tayal nangra, itiya tada masomaday cangra.
S.PHON: ʦi rian aʦi ʦo~u~uɾija maɾo~u mikiriwiʡaj misakafaħaj to~u ʦəʦaj ɾijaɬ~ɮ, iko~ur maʦaɬ~ɮaaj to~u mamaħarək ko~u tajaɾ naŋra, itija taɬ~ɮa maso~umaɬ~ɮaj ʦaŋra.
S.TRANSL: When Ryan and Juliette were informed that their assignment as temporary special pioneers had come to an end, they felt dejected.

S.FORM: 1979 miheca, o sakalima a wawa ako aci Rayna ci Taniil mahofocayto.
1979 miheca, o sakalima a wawa ako aci Rayna ci Taniil mahofocayto.
