S.TRANSL: In 1979, Lene and I welcomed the arrival of our fifth child, Daniel.

S.FORM: 1965 Miheca, Mariya ato fafahiyan wawa ci Oleka aci Irina
1965 Miheca, Mariya ato fafahiyan wawa ci Oleka aci Irina
S.PHON: **** miħəʦa, marija ato~u fafaħijan wawa ʦi o~uɾəka aʦi irina
S.TRANSL: Maria and our daughters, Olga and Irina, in 1965

S.FORM: Mikitini i milifetan ni Ananiyas aci Sapfira, o maanan ko mananamay ita hani?
Mikitini i milifetan ni Ananiyas aci Sapfira, o maanan ko mananamay ita hani?
S.PHON: mikitini i miɾifətan ni ananijas aʦi sapfira, o~u maanan ko~u mananamaj ita ħani?
S.TRANSL: What does the bad example of Ananias and Sapphira teach us?

S.FORM: Mihadidiay ca Lowis aci Perin, palemedan ni Yihofa cangra han?
Mihadidiay ca Lowis aci Perin, palemedan ni Yihofa cangra han?
S.PHON: miħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮiaj ʦa ɾo~uwis aʦi pərin, paɾəməɬ~ɮan ni jiħo~ufa ʦaŋra ħan?
S.TRANSL: Jehovah richly rewarded the endurance shown by Louis and Perrine.

S.FORM: Ikorto patikolay kako tayni i Karaci, itira malacafayay to tatosa salikaka micudiyapay i Kiliyat Picudadan a matayal, ci Henri aci Hali.
Ikorto patikolay kako tayni i Karaci, itira malacafayay to tatosa salikaka micudiyapay i Kiliyat Picudadan a matayal, ci Henri aci Hali.
S.PHON: iko~urto~u patiko~uɾaj kako~u tajni i karaʦi, itira maɾaʦafajaj to~u tato~usa saɾikaka miʦo~u~uɬ~ɮijapaj i kiɾijat piʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan a matajaɾ, ʦi ħənri aʦi ħaɾi.
S.TRANSL: Later, I returned to Karachi and served with Henry Finch and Harry Forrest, newly arrived missionaries from Gilead School.

S.FORM: Samanay ci Yihofa paihkal to pihayda ci Mariyaan aci Yisan hani?
Samanay ci Yihofa paihkal to pihayda ci Mariyaan aci Yisan hani?
S.PHON: samanaj ʦi jiħo~ufa paiħkaɾ to~u piħajɬ~ɮa ʦi marijaan aʦi jisan ħani?
S.TRANSL: How did Jehovah show recognition to both Mary and Jesus?

S.FORM: Tiya mi'osi ko Filipi salikaka toya tikami ni Pawlo i, maedeng maharatengay nangra ko nalifetan ni Pawlo aci Silas, to samaanay ci Yihofa tano caay ka harateng a pakayraan a padama cangranan.
Tiya mi'osi ko Filipi salikaka toya tikami ni Pawlo i, maedeng maharatengay nangra ko nalifetan ni Pawlo aci Silas, to samaanay ci Yihofa tano caay ka harateng a pakayraan a padama cangranan.
S.PHON: tija miʡo~usi ko~u fiɾipi saɾikaka to~uja tikami ni pawɾo~u i, maəɬ~ɮəŋ maħaratəŋaj naŋra ko~u naɾifətan ni pawɾo~u aʦi siɾas, to~u samaanaj ʦi jiħo~ufa tano~u ʦaaj ka ħaratəŋ a pakajraan a paɬ~ɮama ʦaŋranan.
S.TRANSL: No doubt when the brothers in Philippi read Paul's letter to them, they remembered what had happened to him and how none of them had expected Jehovah to take action in the way that he did.

S.FORM: Matira ci Aprahaman, tarokos ci Pawlo aci Silas samacayan ko faloco' i saki'ok ni Yihofa.
Matira ci Aprahaman, tarokos ci Pawlo aci Silas samacayan ko faloco' i saki'ok ni Yihofa.
S.PHON: matira ʦi apraħaman, taro~uko~us ʦi pawɾo~u aʦi siɾas samaʦajan ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ i sakiʡo~uk ni jiħo~ufa.
S.TRANSL: Like Abraham, the apostle Paul and his companion Silas were focused on God's promises.

S.FORM: Kawrira, ci Yakop aci Yohani cowaho ka fana' masadafdaf ko picada to tamdaw.
Kawrira, ci Yakop aci Yohani cowaho ka fana' masadafdaf ko picada to tamdaw.
S.PHON: kawrira, ʦi jako~up aʦi jo~uħani ʦo~uwaħo~u ka fanaʡ masaɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮaf ko~u piʦaɬ~ɮa to~u tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: James and John did not grasp this lesson.

S.FORM: Ikor no mitowakang ci Atam aci Ifa, paihekalay ci Yihofa to maanan a demak pakayni toniya 'ada hani?
Ikor no mitowakang ci Atam aci Ifa, paihekalay ci Yihofa to maanan a demak pakayni toniya 'ada hani?
S.PHON: iko~ur no~u mito~uwakaŋ ʦi atam aʦi ifa, paiħəkaɾaj ʦi jiħo~ufa to~u maanan a ɬ~ɮəmak pakajni to~unija ʡaɬ~ɮa ħani?
S.TRANSL: In Eden, what did Jehovah reveal about our enemy?

S.FORM: Mikitini toni lalakaw mamananam ita 1. ci Nowa, Taniil aci Yopu samanay a mafana' to Kawas, ato 2. mafana' to Kawas iraay ko maanan a epoc nangra, 3. samaan kita mahecad cangranan palahad to tanoktokay paso'lin no faloco'.

Mikitini toni lalakaw mamananam ita 1. ci Nowa, Taniil aci Yopu samanay a mafana' to Kawas, ato 2. mafana' to Kawas iraay ko maanan a epoc nangra, 3. samaan kita mahecad cangranan palahad to tanoktokay paso'lin no faloco'.
S.PHON: mikitini to~uni ɾaɾakaw mamananam ita *. ʦi no~uwa, taniiɾ aʦi jo~upo~u~u samanaj a mafanaʡ to~u kawas, ato~u *. mafanaʡ to~u kawas iraaj ko~u maanan a əpo~uʦ naŋra, *. samaan kita maħəʦaɬ~ɮ ʦaŋranan paɾaħaɬ~ɮ to~u tano~ukto~ukaj paso~uʡɾin no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ.
S.TRANSL: With that in mind, let us consider 1. how Noah, Daniel, and Job came to know God, 2. how that knowledge benefited them, and 3. how we can develop a faith like theirs.

S.FORM: Pakayni ci Hapakukan, nga'ayay kita mikitini kasasowal noniya masomaday a pairasolay aci Yihofa a mafana' cingraanan.
Pakayni ci Hapakukan, nga'ayay kita mikitini kasasowal noniya masomaday a pairasolay aci Yihofa a mafana' cingraanan.
S.PHON: pakajni ʦi ħapako~u~ukan, ŋaʡajaj kita mikitini kasaso~uwaɾ no~unija maso~umaɬ~ɮaj a pairaso~uɾaj aʦi jiħo~ufa a mafanaʡ ʦiŋraanan.
S.TRANSL: This intimate dialogue between the distraught man of God and Jehovah is all the Scriptures reveal about the prophet.

S.FORM: Ci Atam aci Ifa maedeng mahaenay ko faloco'.
Ci Atam aci Ifa maedeng mahaenay ko faloco'.
S.PHON: ʦi atam aʦi ifa maəɬ~ɮəŋ maħaənaj ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ.
S.TRANSL: Adam and Eve no doubt felt the same.

S.FORM: Mipili'ay ci Atam aci Ifa misafelit to Kawas.
Mipili'ay ci Atam aci Ifa misafelit to Kawas.
S.PHON: mipiɾiʡaj ʦi atam aʦi ifa misafəɾit to~u kawas.
S.TRANSL: As it turned out, our first parents chose to disobey.

S.FORM: Patinakoen, pekpeken no tao miseti', paliten i pirofoan, 'arawhan "tenok no lafii, mitolon, romadiw ci Pawlo aci Silas," pakahemek to Kawas.
Patinakoen, pekpeken no tao miseti', paliten i pirofoan, 'arawhan "tenok no lafii, mitolon, romadiw ci Pawlo aci Silas," pakahemek to Kawas.
S.PHON: patinako~uən, pəkpəkən no~u tao~u misətiʡ, paɾitən i piro~ufo~uan, ʡarawħan "təno~uk no~u ɾafii, mito~uɾo~un, ro~umaɬ~ɮiw ʦi pawɾo~u aʦi siɾas," pakaħəmək to~u kawas.
S.TRANSL: For example, after they had endured a dreadful beating and were thrown into prison, in "the middle of the night, they were praying and praising God with song."

S.FORM: Mikitini pilowid no Israil tamdaw to Miki'okan a Pala ato kalalood ni Tafiti aci Koliyat, o mananam ita ko maanan?
Mikitini pilowid no Israil tamdaw to Miki'okan a Pala ato kalalood ni Tafiti aci Koliyat, o mananam ita ko maanan?
S.PHON: mikitini piɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ no~u israiɾ tamɬ~ɮaw to~u mikiʡo~ukan a paɾa ato~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ni tafiti aʦi ko~uɾijat, o~u mananam ita ko~u maanan?
S.TRANSL: What valuable lesson can we learn from the Israelites' conquest of Canaan and from David's encounter with Goliath?

S.FORM: O ta'arawan ni Nowa, Taniil aci Yopu Misamanay hano pafeli kitaanan to timoloay hani?
O ta'arawan ni Nowa, Taniil aci Yopu Misamanay hano pafeli kitaanan to timoloay hani?
S.PHON: o~u taʡarawan ni no~uwa, taniiɾ aʦi jo~upo~u~u misamanaj ħano~u pafəɾi kitaanan to~u timo~uɾo~uaj ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why can we take courage from the examples of Noah, Daniel, and Job?

S.FORM: Ta misanga' ci Yihofa ci Ataman aci Ifaan i, pafelian cangra to matiniay a sa'osi.
Ta misanga' ci Yihofa ci Ataman aci Ifaan i, pafelian cangra to matiniay a sa'osi.
S.PHON: ta misaŋaʡ ʦi jiħo~ufa ʦi ataman aʦi ifaan i, pafəɾian ʦaŋra to~u matiniaj a saʡo~usi.
S.TRANSL: That, in fact, was what Jehovah God did with his human creation right from the beginning.

S.FORM: Ci Nowa, Taniil aci Yopu misi'ayaway to mahecaday no mita a pasangaray.
Ci Nowa, Taniil aci Yopu misi'ayaway to mahecaday no mita a pasangaray.
S.PHON: ʦi no~uwa, taniiɾ aʦi jo~upo~u~u misiʡajawaj to~u maħəʦaɬ~ɮaj no~u mita a pasaŋaraj.
S.TRANSL: Noah, Daniel, and Job experienced many of the same kinds of problems we face today.

S.FORM: Todongen ci Nowa, Taniil aci Yopu, Paihekal to Paso'linay Faloco' ato Midoedoay
Todongen ci Nowa, Taniil aci Yopu, Paihekal to Paso'linay Faloco' ato Midoedoay
S.PHON: to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋən ʦi no~uwa, taniiɾ aʦi jo~upo~u~u, paiħəkaɾ to~u paso~uʡɾinaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ato~u miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uaj
S.TRANSL: Imitate the Faith and Obedience of Noah, Daniel, and Job

S.FORM: Pakayni ka'inap Ci Kora, Tatan aci Apiram micoliay ci Mosian.
Pakayni ka'inap Ci Kora, Tatan aci Apiram micoliay ci Mosian.
S.PHON: pakajni kaʡinap ʦi ko~ura, tatan aʦi apiram miʦo~uɾiaj ʦi mo~usian.
S.TRANSL: Korah, Dathan, and Abiram became jealous of Moses and opposed him.

S.FORM: Mafana'ayto kita to lalangian, hano padotoc mahemek ci Tayanna aci Yohani!
Mafana'ayto kita to lalangian, hano padotoc mahemek ci Tayanna aci Yohani!
S.PHON: mafanaʡajto~u kita to~u ɾaɾaŋian, ħano~u paɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ maħəmək ʦi tajanna aʦi jo~uħani!
S.TRANSL: This explains why Diana and John, mentioned earlier, could maintain lasting joy when they dealt with difficult circumstances.

S.FORM: Toniya hekal 'alomanay ko madimadiay a salikaka, mahecaday ci Saresiaw aci Alintaan, so'lin cowa ka olah to so'linay kimad ko tamdaw i kilac, kamayan cangra padotoc a mitosil.
Toniya hekal 'alomanay ko madimadiay a salikaka, mahecaday ci Saresiaw aci Alintaan, so'lin cowa ka olah to so'linay kimad ko tamdaw i kilac, kamayan cangra padotoc a mitosil.
S.PHON: to~unija ħəkaɾ ʡaɾo~umanaj ko~u maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮiaj a saɾikaka, maħəʦaɬ~ɮaj ʦi sarəsiaw aʦi aɾintaan, so~uʡɾin ʦo~uwa ka o~uɾaħ to~u so~uʡɾinaj kimaɬ~ɮ ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw i kiɾaʦ, kamajan ʦaŋra paɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ a mito~usiɾ.
S.TRANSL: Like Sergio and Olinda, many faithful brothers and sisters around the world have been preaching for decades in unresponsive home territories.

S.FORM: Ci Yihofa aci Yis ihekalay mafana' to nai faloco'ay a harateng no tamdaw, kawra cowa kafana' ko malohemay malitengay.
Ci Yihofa aci Yis ihekalay mafana' to nai faloco'ay a harateng no tamdaw, kawra cowa kafana' ko malohemay malitengay.
S.PHON: ʦi jiħo~ufa aʦi jis iħəkaɾaj mafanaʡ to~u nai faɾo~uʦo~uʡaj a ħaratəŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, kawra ʦo~uwa kafanaʡ ko~u maɾo~uħəmaj maɾitəŋaj.
S.TRANSL: Unlike Jehovah and Jesus, elders cannot read hearts.

S.FORM: Isaka 2014 miheca, ci Silewiyana aci Silewian, malacafayay cangra malinah tayra i 85 kongli ko raay a niyaro'.
Isaka 2014 miheca, ci Silewiyana aci Silewian, malacafayay cangra malinah tayra i 85 kongli ko raay a niyaro'.
S.PHON: isaka **** miħəʦa, ʦi siɾəwijana aʦi siɾəwian, maɾaʦafajaj ʦaŋra maɾinaħ tajra i ** ko~uŋɾi ko~u raaj a nijaro~uʡ.
S.TRANSL: In 2014, Sylviana nevertheless teamed up with Sylvie Ann, a young pioneer sister in her congregation, and they moved to a small village 53 miles 85 km from their hometown.

S.FORM: Tangsolay ci Pawlo aci Parnapas paihkal to cowa pihai cangra to harateng no 'alomanay, micicih han nangra ko riko', tayra ilaloma'no tamdamdaw, ta'angay ko piowaw: "Nawiro matini ko demak namo saw?
Tangsolay ci Pawlo aci Parnapas paihkal to cowa pihai cangra to harateng no 'alomanay, micicih han nangra ko riko', tayra ilaloma'no tamdamdaw, ta'angay ko piowaw: "Nawiro matini ko demak namo saw?
S.PHON: taŋso~uɾaj ʦi pawɾo~u aʦi parnapas paiħkaɾ to~u ʦo~uwa piħai ʦaŋra to~u ħaratəŋ no~u ʡaɾo~umanaj, miʦiʦiħ ħan naŋra ko~u riko~uʡ, tajra iɾaɾo~umaʡno~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw, taʡaŋaj ko~u pio~uwaw: "nawiro~u matini ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak namo~u saw?
S.TRANSL: They immediately protested by ripping their garments and leaping into the crowd, crying out: "Why are you doing these things?

S.FORM: Anini, mitodongan no Krisciyang ci Hana aci Samuil, hakelong no 'orip dademak saki misanga'ay a Tatapangan.
Anini, mitodongan no Krisciyang ci Hana aci Samuil, hakelong no 'orip dademak saki misanga'ay a Tatapangan.
S.PHON: anini, mito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan no~u krisʦijaŋ ʦi ħana aʦi samo~u~uiɾ, ħakəɾo~uŋ no~u ʡo~urip ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak saki misaŋaʡaj a tatapaŋan.
S.TRANSL: Like Hannah and Samuel, Christians today have the privilege of using their lives in dedicated service to their Creator.

S.FORM: Itiniay kako aci Hapi i Fenpo no Pining a matayal
Itiniay kako aci Hapi i Fenpo no Pining a matayal
S.PHON: itiniaj kako~u aʦi ħapi i fənpo~u no~u piniŋ a matajaɾ
S.TRANSL: With Happy, while serving at the Benin branch

S.FORM: Tadtaden to samaanay ci Pawlo aci Silas i Filipi a padama to milaocay to kapalitan a tamdaw.
Tadtaden to samaanay ci Pawlo aci Silas i Filipi a padama to milaocay to kapalitan a tamdaw.
S.PHON: taɬ~ɮtaɬ~ɮən to~u samaanaj ʦi pawɾo~u aʦi siɾas i fiɾipi a paɬ~ɮama to~u miɾao~uʦaj to~u kapaɾitan a tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: Relate how Paul and Silas helped a jailer in Philippi.

S.FORM: Wa samaan kita a mitodong to misapoeneray a ta'arawan ni Pawlo aci Parnapas hani?
Wa samaan kita a mitodong to misapoeneray a ta'arawan ni Pawlo aci Parnapas hani?
S.PHON: wa samaan kita a mito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u misapo~uənəraj a taʡarawan ni pawɾo~u aʦi parnapas ħani?
S.TRANSL: How might we imitate Paul's exemplary humility?

S.FORM: Na milifokay ci Atam aci Ifa to hatiniay a pasalat.
Na milifokay ci Atam aci Ifa to hatiniay a pasalat.
S.PHON: na miɾifo~ukaj ʦi atam aʦi ifa to~u ħatiniaj a pasaɾat.
S.TRANSL: Adam and Eve had a taste of that freedom.

S.FORM: Caka halafin a mararaw ci Atam aci Ifa, "dapic han nangra a misolsol ko papah no sokon a kilang a misatalip to satahpo nangra to tireng."
Caka halafin a mararaw ci Atam aci Ifa, "dapic han nangra a misolsol ko papah no sokon a kilang a misatalip to satahpo nangra to tireng."
S.PHON: ʦaka ħaɾafin a mararaw ʦi atam aʦi ifa, "ɬ~ɮapiʦ ħan naŋra a miso~uɾso~uɾ ko~u papaħ no~u so~uko~un a kiɾaŋ a misataɾip to~u sataħpo~u naŋra to~u tirəŋ."
S.TRANSL: Shortly after they sinned, Adam and Eve "sewed fig leaves together and made loin coverings for themselves."

S.FORM: Masowalay i 'ayaw ci Liyote aci Alisantera sanay milengo, mafalic ko pakayraan micadaay ko pakaso'lin no faloco' to sapalifet.
Masowalay i 'ayaw ci Liyote aci Alisantera sanay milengo, mafalic ko pakayraan micadaay ko pakaso'lin no faloco' to sapalifet.
S.PHON: maso~uwaɾaj i ʡajaw ʦi ɾijo~utə aʦi aɾisantəra sanaj miɾəŋo~u, mafaɾiʦ ko~u pakajraan miʦaɬ~ɮaaj ko~u pakaso~uʡɾin no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ to~u sapaɾifət.
S.TRANSL: Lloyd and Alexandra, mentioned at the outset, admit that their change of circumstances tested their faith in ways they had not anticipated.

S.FORM: Cowa pihai ko Kawas ci Atam aci Ifa malalikong.
Cowa pihai ko Kawas ci Atam aci Ifa malalikong.
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa piħai ko~u kawas ʦi atam aʦi ifa maɾaɾiko~uŋ.
S.TRANSL: God did not tell Adam and Eve that marriage could be ended by divorce.

S.FORM: Ano minokay kako miliso' to wama wina i, mifanaway to kaysing kako aci Aser.
Ano minokay kako miliso' to wama wina i, mifanaway to kaysing kako aci Aser.
S.PHON: ano~u mino~ukaj kako~u miɾiso~uʡ to~u wama wina i, mifanawaj to~u kajsiŋ kako~u aʦi asər.
S.TRANSL: When I visited, Arthur and I would volunteer to wash the dishes after meals.

S.FORM: Kinacecayay, kako aci Henri malacafayay tayra i ka'amis a Pakistan mitosil.
Kinacecayay, kako aci Henri malacafayay tayra i ka'amis a Pakistan mitosil.
S.PHON: kinaʦəʦajaj, kako~u aʦi ħənri maɾaʦafajaj tajra i kaʡamis a pakistan mito~usiɾ.
S.TRANSL: Once I accompanied Brother Finch on a preaching trip to northern Pakistan.

S.FORM: Ci Tewien aci Ciyasmin halafinay ko haliepahay a nanaman.
Ci Tewien aci Ciyasmin halafinay ko haliepahay a nanaman.
S.PHON: ʦi təwiən aʦi ʦijasmin ħaɾafinaj ko~u ħaɾiəpaħaj a nanaman.
S.TRANSL: For many years, Devynn and Jasmine were drunkards.

S.FORM: Ikor no misafelit ci Atam aci Ifa, pafelian ni Yihofa ko tamdaw to maanan a hatokel?
Ikor no misafelit ci Atam aci Ifa, pafelian ni Yihofa ko tamdaw to maanan a hatokel?
S.PHON: iko~ur no~u misafəɾit ʦi atam aʦi ifa, pafəɾian ni jiħo~ufa ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~u maanan a ħato~ukəɾ?
S.TRANSL: What encouragement did Jehovah give at the time of the rebellion in Eden?

S.FORM: Tinakoen o cecay mararamoday i Nanfi ci Aspen aci Porite, miliyas cangra i Pitil ikor, na kaliki makilim ko kiloma'an ato katayalan sanay ko harateng nangra.
Tinakoen o cecay mararamoday i Nanfi ci Aspen aci Porite, miliyas cangra i Pitil ikor, na kaliki makilim ko kiloma'an ato katayalan sanay ko harateng nangra.
S.PHON: tinako~uən o~u ʦəʦaj mararamo~uɬ~ɮaj i nanfi ʦi aspən aʦi po~uritə, miɾijas ʦaŋra i pitiɾ iko~ur, na kaɾiki makiɾim ko~u kiɾo~umaʡan ato~u katajaɾan sanaj ko~u ħaratəŋ naŋra.
S.TRANSL: When Osborne and Polite, a South African couple, left Bethel, they thought they would soon have part-time work and a place to live.

S.FORM: CI SARESIAW aci Alinta o mararamoday a misakafahay, mata'lifayto ko 80 mihecaan nangra, itiniay i Padaka ko kitiraan.
CI SARESIAW aci Alinta o mararamoday a misakafahay, mata'lifayto ko 80 mihecaan nangra, itiniay i Padaka ko kitiraan.
S.PHON: ʦi sarəsiaw aʦi aɾinta o~u mararamo~uɬ~ɮaj a misakafaħaj, mataʡɾifajto~u ko~u ** miħəʦaan naŋra, itiniaj i paɬ~ɮaka ko~u kitiraan.
S.TRANSL: SERGIO AND OLINDA are a pioneer couple in their 80's who live in the United States.

S.FORM: Pakayni i mihadidiay a mitala, patirengay ci Yihofa aci Yis to manan nga'ayay a ta'arawan?
Pakayni i mihadidiay a mitala, patirengay ci Yihofa aci Yis to manan nga'ayay a ta'arawan?
S.PHON: pakajni i miħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮiaj a mitaɾa, patirəŋaj ʦi jiħo~ufa aʦi jis to~u manan ŋaʡajaj a taʡarawan?
S.TRANSL: How have both Jehovah God and Jesus Christ set excellent examples with regard to being willing to wait?

S.FORM: Ci Pawlo aci Parnapas hano pasowal to mahecaday ko niyah to Likaoniya tamdaw hani?
Ci Pawlo aci Parnapas hano pasowal to mahecaday ko niyah to Likaoniya tamdaw hani?
S.PHON: ʦi pawɾo~u aʦi parnapas ħano~u paso~uwaɾ to~u maħəʦaɬ~ɮaj ko~u nijaħ to~u ɾikao~unija tamɬ~ɮaw ħani?
S.TRANSL: In what sense could Paul and Barnabas consider themselves the equals of the Lycaonian people?

S.FORM: Hano kamayanay ci Tayanna aci Yohani a mahemek hani?
Hano kamayanay ci Tayanna aci Yohani a mahemek hani?
S.PHON: ħano~u kamajanaj ʦi tajanna aʦi jo~uħani a maħəmək ħani?
S.TRANSL: How is it possible for Diana and John to have joy?

S.FORM: Pakayni i dafong ikakaayho to nika lala'ed aci Yihofa ato nika lala'ed ato romaroma tamdaw han?
Pakayni i dafong ikakaayho to nika lala'ed aci Yihofa ato nika lala'ed ato romaroma tamdaw han?
S.PHON: pakajni i ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ ikakaajħo~u to~u nika ɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮ aʦi jiħo~ufa ato~u nika ɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮ ato~u ro~umaro~uma tamɬ~ɮaw ħan?
S.TRANSL: Do I value material things more than my relationship with Jehovah and with people?

S.FORM: Mifana'ay ko Fangcalay Cudad kitaanan, ira ko nga'ayay kalala'ed no tamdaw aci Yihofa nga' so'li'lin ko lipahak.
Mifana'ay ko Fangcalay Cudad kitaanan, ira ko nga'ayay kalala'ed no tamdaw aci Yihofa nga' so'li'lin ko lipahak.
S.PHON: mifanaʡaj ko~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ kitaanan, ira ko~u ŋaʡajaj kaɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw aʦi jiħo~ufa ŋaʡ so~uʡɾiʡɾin ko~u ɾipaħak.
S.TRANSL: The Bible shows that true happiness refers to the condition of one who is blessed by Jehovah.

S.FORM: So'lin cowa ka lefet ko tamdaw, o Krisciyang wa misa'icel a misaareteng to raramod, papahecad ci Yihofaan aci Yisan.
So'lin cowa ka lefet ko tamdaw, o Krisciyang wa misa'icel a misaareteng to raramod, papahecad ci Yihofaan aci Yisan.
S.PHON: so~uʡɾin ʦo~uwa ka ɾəfət ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u krisʦijaŋ wa misaʡiʦəɾ a misaarətəŋ to~u raramo~uɬ~ɮ, papaħəʦaɬ~ɮ ʦi jiħo~ufaan aʦi jisan.
S.TRANSL: All Christians should strive to show regard for marriage, even as Jesus and Jehovah do.

S.FORM: Samaanay ko kalala'ed ningra aci Yis hani?
Samaanay ko kalala'ed ningra aci Yis hani?
S.PHON: samaanaj ko~u kaɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮ niŋra aʦi jis ħani?
S.TRANSL: What connection did he have with Jesus?

S.FORM: Matongalay ko kanga'ay no kalala'ed no niyah aci Yihofa sanay cingra, masaloay ko faloco'.
Matongalay ko kanga'ay no kalala'ed no niyah aci Yihofa sanay cingra, masaloay ko faloco'.
S.PHON: mato~uŋaɾaj ko~u kaŋaʡaj no~u kaɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮ no~u nijaħ aʦi jiħo~ufa sanaj ʦiŋra, masaɾo~uaj ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ.
S.TRANSL: * Emma now enjoys spending more time in spiritual activities and with her Christian family and friends.

S.FORM: Ci Yihofa aci Yis samaanay tano olah a pa'icel kitaanan?
Ci Yihofa aci Yis samaanay tano olah a pa'icel kitaanan?
S.PHON: ʦi jiħo~ufa aʦi jis samaanaj tano~u o~uɾaħ a paʡiʦəɾ kitaanan?
S.TRANSL: How do Jehovah and Jesus build us up in love?

S.FORM: Matira ci Pawloan aci Silasan, alatek fahekaay kita to pakayraan noka pipadama ni Yihofa kitanan.
Matira ci Pawloan aci Silasan, alatek fahekaay kita to pakayraan noka pipadama ni Yihofa kitanan.
S.PHON: matira ʦi pawɾo~uan aʦi siɾasan, aɾatək faħəkaaj kita to~u pakajraan no~uka pipaɬ~ɮama ni jiħo~ufa kitanan.
S.TRANSL: As in the case of Paul and Silas in Philippi, we may be surprised by what Jehovah does for us personally.

S.FORM: Ti:yaay madimadiay sikawdan, ci Iliya, ci Yis aci Pitiro, paka'araway to midemakan ni Yihofa kafaheka'an miliyaw pa'orip to mapatayay.
Ti:yaay madimadiay sikawdan, ci Iliya, ci Yis aci Pitiro, paka'araway to midemakan ni Yihofa kafaheka'an miliyaw pa'orip to mapatayay.
S.PHON: ti:jaaj maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮiaj sikawɬ~ɮan, ʦi iɾija, ʦi jis aʦi pitiro~u, pakaʡarawaj to~u miɬ~ɮəmakan ni jiħo~ufa kafaħəkaʡan miɾijaw paʡo~urip to~u mapatajaj.
S.TRANSL: It is interesting, though, that a faithful servant of God, such as Elijah, Jesus, or Peter, was present on each of those occasions, during the time when Jehovah was performing miracles.

S.FORM: Ano kalasaka dademaken ita ko safalod no Fangcalay Cudad, mingitangit to fangcalay saocor no Kawas a padama kitanan, mamalifok ko rihaday, matira ci Tafongan aci Miciyangan.
Ano kalasaka dademaken ita ko safalod no Fangcalay Cudad, mingitangit to fangcalay saocor no Kawas a padama kitanan, mamalifok ko rihaday, matira ci Tafongan aci Miciyangan.
S.PHON: ano~u kaɾasaka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən ita ko~u safaɾo~uɬ~ɮ no~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, miŋitaŋit to~u faŋʦaɾaj sao~uʦo~ur no~u kawas a paɬ~ɮama kitanan, mamaɾifo~uk ko~u riħaɬ~ɮaj, matira ʦi tafo~uŋan aʦi miʦijaŋan.
S.TRANSL: David and Rachel are just two examples of the peaceful fruitage that results when we apply inspired Scriptural principles and rely on God's spirit to help us.

S.FORM: Mahecaday ko harateng ita ci Yihofaan aci Yisan han?
Mahecaday ko harateng ita ci Yihofaan aci Yisan han?
S.PHON: maħəʦaɬ~ɮaj ko~u ħaratəŋ ita ʦi jiħo~ufaan aʦi jisan ħan?
S.TRANSL: Do we share the view of Jehovah and Jesus?

S.FORM: Ikorto, ci Coping aci Nao mirienangay to SKE.
Ikorto, ci Coping aci Nao mirienangay to SKE.
S.PHON: iko~urto~u, ʦi ʦo~upiŋ aʦi nao~u miriənaŋaj to~u skə.
S.TRANSL: Recently, Jumpei and Nao also attended the School for Kingdom Evangelizers.

S.TRANSL: It is only when the shackles of sin are thrown off that we can hope to have the true freedom that our first human parents once enjoyed.

S.TRANSL: One of them, an army officer named Sadiq Masih, helped George and me to translate some Bible literature into Urdu, the national language of Pakistan.

S.TRANSL: In striving for self-determination, they lost the true freedom they had been given.

S.TRANSL: Even though I am now over 84 years of age, I can still enjoy meaningful work, helping in the handling of branch correspondence.

S.FORM: Ano mahaen 'o sasafaay' ko demak ako, wa mikangodo ko tao takowanan han?"
Ano mahaen 'o sasafaay' ko demak ako, wa mikangodo ko tao takowanan han?"
S.PHON: ano~u maħaən ʡo~u sasafaajʡ ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak ako~u, wa mikaŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u ko~u tao~u tako~uwanan ħan?"
S.TRANSL: If I conduct myself "as a lesser one," might people lose respect for me?'

S.FORM: Sanay ko sowal ni Pawlo: "O nano nipa'arawan no Tapang ko sakatayra ako."
Sanay ko sowal ni Pawlo: "O nano nipa'arawan no Tapang ko sakatayra ako."
S.PHON: sanaj ko~u so~uwaɾ ni pawɾo~u: "o~u nano~u nipaʡarawan no~u tapaŋ ko~u sakatajra ako~u."
S.TRANSL: Paul stated: "I went up as a result of a revelation."

S.FORM: Cowa ko Noni Hekal ko Hongti Kitakit Ako
Cowa ko Noni Hekal ko Hongti Kitakit Ako
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa ko~u no~uni ħəkaɾ ko~u ħo~uŋti kitakit ako~u
S.TRANSL: "My Kingdom Is No Part of This World"

S.FORM: O Materekay a Tokel Ako i Kawas
O Materekay a Tokel Ako i Kawas
S.PHON: o~u matərəkaj a to~ukəɾ ako~u i kawas
S.TRANSL: "I Have Hope Toward God"

S.FORM: Hemek ako ci Yihofa,
Hemek ako ci Yihofa,
S.PHON: ħəmək ako~u ʦi jiħo~ufa,
S.TRANSL: Jehovah our God is our joy,

S.FORM: Latekay mitadtadan ako ko roma demak i cingranan, pairaen ko romi'ad a misaharaterateng, ikor padotoc kami a malalengo.
Latekay mitadtadan ako ko roma demak i cingranan, pairaen ko romi'ad a misaharaterateng, ikor padotoc kami a malalengo.
S.PHON: ɾatəkaj mitaɬ~ɮtaɬ~ɮan ako~u ko~u ro~uma ɬ~ɮəmak i ʦiŋranan, pairaən ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a misaħaratəratəŋ, iko~ur paɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ kami a maɾaɾəŋo~u.
S.TRANSL: Sometimes I gave him an explanation to think about for a day or so before we resumed our discussion.

S.FORM: Wa nga'ay haratengen no mita: "Ano mahecaday ko pakayraan ako tora mitosilan a tamdaw, wa samaan ko harateng ako to lihaf no Hongti Kitakit hani?"
Wa nga'ay haratengen no mita: "Ano mahecaday ko pakayraan ako tora mitosilan a tamdaw, wa samaan ko harateng ako to lihaf no Hongti Kitakit hani?"
S.PHON: wa ŋaʡaj ħaratəŋən no~u mita: "ano~u maħəʦaɬ~ɮaj ko~u pakajraan ako~u to~ura mito~usiɾan a tamɬ~ɮaw, wa samaan ko~u ħaratəŋ ako~u to~u ɾiħaf no~u ħo~uŋti kitakit ħani?"
S.TRANSL: We might ask ourselves, 'How would I respond to the Kingdom message if I were in the position of those to whom we preach?'

S.FORM: Damaen Ako kiso.
Damaen Ako kiso.
S.PHON: ɬ~ɮamaən ako~u kiso~u.
S.TRANSL: I will bring you to your goal!

S.FORM: Iraayho ko roma cowa ko mamatawal ako.
Iraayho ko roma cowa ko mamatawal ako.
S.PHON: iraajħo~u ko~u ro~uma ʦo~uwa ko~u mamatawaɾ ako~u.
S.TRANSL: Another act of kindness made a lasting impression on me.

S.FORM: Mi'osi kako tora ma'oningay i, matemeray ko faloco' ako, sapikotodaw ci Yisan.
Mi'osi kako tora ma'oningay i, matemeray ko faloco' ako, sapikotodaw ci Yisan.
S.PHON: miʡo~usi kako~u to~ura maʡo~uniŋaj i, matəməraj ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ako~u, sapiko~uto~uɬ~ɮaw ʦi jisan.
S.TRANSL: Doing so made me want to follow Jesus' example.

S.FORM: Wa padama to wawa ako, tano harateng ni Yihofa a minengneng to demak, ho eca ka mafiyor no harateng no hekal han?
Wa padama to wawa ako, tano harateng ni Yihofa a minengneng to demak, ho eca ka mafiyor no harateng no hekal han?
S.PHON: wa paɬ~ɮama to~u wawa ako~u, tano~u ħaratəŋ ni jiħo~ufa a minəŋnəŋ to~u ɬ~ɮəmak, ħo~u əʦa ka mafijo~ur no~u ħaratəŋ no~u ħəkaɾ ħan?
S.TRANSL: Do we counteract worldly ideas heard or seen by our children with Jehovah's view of matters?'

S.FORM: Ikor mahapinang ako malahedaway ko mikikakaay to tayal a kalimelaan a dafong i ka'orip no niyah.
Ikor mahapinang ako malahedaway ko mikikakaay to tayal a kalimelaan a dafong i ka'orip no niyah.
S.PHON: iko~ur maħapinaŋ ako~u maɾaħəɬ~ɮawaj ko~u mikikakaaj to~u tajaɾ a kaɾiməɾaan a ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ i kaʡo~urip no~u nijaħ.
S.TRANSL: But I began to realize that something was missing in my life, something far more important than my job.

S.FORM: Hano ira ko hatiniay a harateng ako hani?
Hano ira ko hatiniay a harateng ako hani?
S.PHON: ħano~u ira ko~u ħatiniaj a ħaratəŋ ako~u ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why does it make me feel that way?

S.FORM: Tala'ayaway ko demak ako, paihkal to adayayay i tahapadesay tamdaw hokira?
Tala'ayaway ko demak ako, paihkal to adayayay i tahapadesay tamdaw hokira?
S.PHON: taɾaʡajawaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak ako~u, paiħkaɾ to~u aɬ~ɮajajaj i taħapaɬ~ɮəsaj tamɬ~ɮaw ħo~ukira?
S.TRANSL: Am I doing what the compassionate Samaritan did?

S.FORM: Hacowa mifekad koya mitalaan ako to miliyaway ma'orip a demak hani?"
Hacowa mifekad koya mitalaan ako to miliyaway ma'orip a demak hani?"
S.PHON: ħaʦo~uwa mifəkaɬ~ɮ ko~uja mitaɾaan ako~u to~u miɾijawaj maʡo~urip a ɬ~ɮəmak ħani?"
S.TRANSL: When will the resurrection that I am hoping for occur?'

S.FORM: O CECAY fafahiyan ci Susi, sanay cingra: "Mangataayto cecay miheca mapatay ko wawa ako, mararomayho kako."
O CECAY fafahiyan ci Susi, sanay cingra: "Mangataayto cecay miheca mapatay ko wawa ako, mararomayho kako."
S.PHON: o~u ʦəʦaj fafaħijan ʦi so~u~usi, sanaj ʦiŋra: "maŋataajto~u ʦəʦaj miħəʦa mapataj ko~u wawa ako~u, mararo~umajħo~u kako~u."
S.TRANSL: "FOR almost a year after the death of our son, we felt deep and excruciating pain," said Susi.

S.FORM: O Misawacayay Tamdaw ni Yihofa cangra, o safa no fa'inay no kaka ako.
O Misawacayay Tamdaw ni Yihofa cangra, o safa no fa'inay no kaka ako.
S.PHON: o~u misawaʦajaj tamɬ~ɮaw ni jiħo~ufa ʦaŋra, o~u safa no~u faʡinaj no~u kaka ako~u.
S.TRANSL: I knew them, they were the younger sisters of the man who had married my older sister.

S.FORM: Hano pasowalen ni Apraham ko fafahi to safa ako kiso han a pasowal cangra hani?
Hano pasowalen ni Apraham ko fafahi to safa ako kiso han a pasowal cangra hani?
S.PHON: ħano~u paso~uwaɾən ni apraħam ko~u fafaħi to~u safa ako~u kiso~u ħan a paso~uwaɾ ʦaŋra ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why did Abraham ask his wife to say that she was his sister?

S.FORM: Nanay lipahak kiso malo Misawacayay Tamdaw Ako."
Nanay lipahak kiso malo Misawacayay Tamdaw Ako."
S.PHON: nanaj ɾipaħak kiso~u maɾo~u misawaʦajaj tamɬ~ɮaw ako~u."
S.TRANSL: I want you to enjoy your life as one of my Witnesses!"

S.FORM: Misatapang miharateng kako, cowa ka lecad ko nika pinengneng ako ato Kawas.
Misatapang miharateng kako, cowa ka lecad ko nika pinengneng ako ato Kawas.
S.PHON: misatapaŋ miħaratəŋ kako~u, ʦo~uwa ka ɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u nika pinəŋnəŋ ako~u ato~u kawas.
S.TRANSL: I began to wonder if what I saw in myself was different from what Jehovah saw.

S.FORM: 'Wa misawacay kako to so'linay a kimad, onini ko sakatayni ako i hekal.'
'Wa misawacay kako to so'linay a kimad, onini ko sakatayni ako i hekal.'
S.PHON: ʡwa misawaʦaj kako~u to~u so~uʡɾinaj a kimaɬ~ɮ, o~unini ko~u sakatajni ako~u i ħəkaɾ.ʡ
S.TRANSL: "For this I have come into the world, that I should bear witness to the truth."

S.FORM: Tolonan ako ci Yihofa a pasowal, cowa ko mamisawad kako a mihodop Cingraanan tahada'oc."
Tolonan ako ci Yihofa a pasowal, cowa ko mamisawad kako a mihodop Cingraanan tahada'oc."
S.PHON: to~uɾo~unan ako~u ʦi jiħo~ufa a paso~uwaɾ, ʦo~uwa ko~u mamisawaɬ~ɮ kako~u a miħo~uɬ~ɮo~up ʦiŋraanan taħaɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ."
S.TRANSL: I pray that I will never let him go."

S.FORM: Toya mihecaan, saka 9 folad 19 romi'ad, matahidangay kako tayra i Prokelin a Pitil matayal, 17 ko mihecaan ako itiya.
Toya mihecaan, saka 9 folad 19 romi'ad, matahidangay kako tayra i Prokelin a Pitil matayal, 17 ko mihecaan ako itiya.
S.PHON: to~uja miħəʦaan, saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, mataħiɬ~ɮaŋaj kako~u tajra i pro~ukəɾin a pitiɾ matajaɾ, ** ko~u miħəʦaan ako~u itija.
S.TRANSL: Not long thereafter, when I was 17 years old, I received an invitation to start serving at Brooklyn Bethel on September 19, 1955.

S.FORM: "O nipidoedo to araaw no miocoray i takowanan ato nipilaheci to tayal Ningra ko malo kakaenen ako."
"O nipidoedo to araaw no miocoray i takowanan ato nipilaheci to tayal Ningra ko malo kakaenen ako."
S.PHON: "o~u nipiɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u araaw no~u mio~uʦo~uraj i tako~uwanan ato~u nipiɾaħəʦi to~u tajaɾ niŋra ko~u maɾo~u kakaənən ako~u."
S.TRANSL: "My food is to do the will of him who sent me and to finish his work."

S.FORM: Kaemangho kako itiya, cowa ka ciharateng to tatodong noka'orip, ato noikoran ako.
Kaemangho kako itiya, cowa ka ciharateng to tatodong noka'orip, ato noikoran ako.
S.PHON: kaəmaŋħo~u kako~u itija, ʦo~uwa ka ʦiħaratəŋ to~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~ukaʡo~urip, ato~u no~uiko~uran ako~u.
S.TRANSL: As a young man, I gave little thought to the purpose of life or to the future.

S.FORM: Pasowalan ni Yis ko nisawawaan: 'Ano micerid kamo midofdof to sowal ako, o so'linayto a nisawawaan ako. Wa mafana' kamo to so'linay kimad, wa pasalaten no so'linay kimad kamo.'
Pasowalan ni Yis ko nisawawaan: 'Ano micerid kamo midofdof to sowal ako, o so'linayto a nisawawaan ako. Wa mafana' kamo to so'linay kimad, wa pasalaten no so'linay kimad kamo.'
S.PHON: paso~uwaɾan ni jis ko~u nisawawaan: ʡano~u miʦəriɬ~ɮ kamo~u miɬ~ɮo~ufɬ~ɮo~uf to~u so~uwaɾ ako~u, o~u so~uʡɾinajto~u a nisawawaan ako~u. wa mafanaʡ kamo~u to~u so~uʡɾinaj kimaɬ~ɮ, wa pasaɾatən no~u so~uʡɾinaj kimaɬ~ɮ kamo~u.ʡ
S.TRANSL: Jesus said to his followers: "If you remain in my word, you are really my disciples, and you will know the truth, and the truth will set you free."

S.FORM: Misa'osian ako wa papadama takowanan micangacang to patosokan no 'adingoan han?
Misa'osian ako wa papadama takowanan micangacang to patosokan no 'adingoan han?
S.PHON: misaʡo~usian ako~u wa papaɬ~ɮama tako~uwanan miʦaŋaʦaŋ to~u pato~uso~ukan no~u ʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan ħan?
S.TRANSL: Will my decisions help me to set spiritual goals?

S.FORM: Misa'osian ako wa papadama takowanan macakat i no'adingoan han?
Misa'osian ako wa papadama takowanan macakat i no'adingoan han?
S.PHON: misaʡo~usian ako~u wa papaɬ~ɮama tako~uwanan maʦakat i no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan ħan?
S.TRANSL: Will my decisions help me to grow spiritually?

S.FORM: O maan ko raraw ako?"
O maan ko raraw ako?"
S.PHON: o~u maan ko~u raraw ako~u?"
S.TRANSL: And for what?"

S.FORM: Caay ka harateng to mamifalic to ka'orip ako ci Yihofa ato kimad Ningra.
Caay ka harateng to mamifalic to ka'orip ako ci Yihofa ato kimad Ningra.
S.PHON: ʦaaj ka ħaratəŋ to~u mamifaɾiʦ to~u kaʡo~urip ako~u ʦi jiħo~ufa ato~u kimaɬ~ɮ niŋra.
S.TRANSL: I never imagined that the wonderful truths about Jehovah God and his purpose would transform my life.

S.FORM: O fafahi ako o miceriday a misakafahay, marariday a lipahak cingra.
O fafahi ako o miceriday a misakafahay, marariday a lipahak cingra.
S.PHON: o~u fafaħi ako~u o~u miʦəriɬ~ɮaj a misakafaħaj, marariɬ~ɮaj a ɾipaħak ʦiŋra.
S.TRANSL: My wife, a regular pioneer, was always so happy.

S.FORM: Sanay cingra: "Mitongalay to paso'lin no faloco' ako ko sa'opo.
Sanay cingra: "Mitongalay to paso'lin no faloco' ako ko sa'opo.
S.PHON: sanaj ʦiŋra: "mito~uŋaɾaj to~u paso~uʡɾin no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ako~u ko~u saʡo~upo~u.
S.TRANSL: She says, "I have often felt that Jehovah isn't close to me and that he doesn't want to be my Friend."

S.FORM: Sanay pasowal ko fafahi takowanan: "Matengilay ako ko mikiriwi'ay a demak!
Sanay pasowal ko fafahi takowanan: "Matengilay ako ko mikiriwi'ay a demak!
S.PHON: sanaj paso~uwaɾ ko~u fafaħi tako~uwanan: "matəŋiɾaj ako~u ko~u mikiriwiʡaj a ɬ~ɮəmak!
S.TRANSL: "I heard wonderful things," said Mairambubu.

S.FORM: O safa ako kiso, kawra pasifana'en iso kako to kalimlaan a demak.'
O safa ako kiso, kawra pasifana'en iso kako to kalimlaan a demak.'
S.PHON: o~u safa ako~u kiso~u, kawra pasifanaʡən iso~u kako~u to~u kaɾimɾaan a ɬ~ɮəmak.ʡ
S.TRANSL: You are a whole lifetime younger than I am, but you have taught me the most important thing I could ever learn.'

S.FORM: Sanay cingra patikami: "Mikitini tonini demak, mahapinangay ako to ciharatengay ci Yihofa ato romaroma salikaka tamiyanan.
Sanay cingra patikami: "Mikitini tonini demak, mahapinangay ako to ciharatengay ci Yihofa ato romaroma salikaka tamiyanan.
S.PHON: sanaj ʦiŋra patikami: "mikitini to~unini ɬ~ɮəmak, maħapinaŋaj ako~u to~u ʦiħaratəŋaj ʦi jiħo~ufa ato~u ro~umaro~uma saɾikaka tamijanan.
S.TRANSL: She writes: "This experience helped me to realize that Jehovah cares. And fellow Witnesses care about one another.

S.FORM: Wawa Ako mala Hongti,
Wawa Ako mala Hongti,
S.PHON: wawa ako~u maɾa ħo~uŋti,
S.TRANSL: That my reigning Son, Christ Jesus,

S.FORM: Samanen 1961 miheca iraay ko koksay taykay, mansa itini 1960 miheca, matongalay ko tayal ako milimasmas to nai Padaka tangasa i Iwropa a hikoki.
Samanen 1961 miheca iraay ko koksay taykay, mansa itini 1960 miheca, matongalay ko tayal ako milimasmas to nai Padaka tangasa i Iwropa a hikoki.
S.PHON: samanən **** miħəʦa iraaj ko~u ko~uksaj tajkaj, mansa itini **** miħəʦa, mato~uŋaɾaj ko~u tajaɾ ako~u miɾimasmas to~u nai paɬ~ɮaka taŋasa i iwro~upa a ħiko~uki.
S.TRANSL: My work expanded in 1960 with the arranging of charter flights from the United States to Europe for the 1961 international conventions.

S.FORM: Ikor to tosa miheca, tiya 16 ko mihecaan ako, misatapangay kako misakafah.
Ikor to tosa miheca, tiya 16 ko mihecaan ako, misatapangay kako misakafah.
S.PHON: iko~ur to~u to~usa miħəʦa, tija ** ko~u miħəʦaan ako~u, misatapaŋaj kako~u misakafaħ.
S.TRANSL: Two years later, when I was 16, I was appointed as a pioneer.

S.FORM: Mahecad o malifetay ako, o fanekfekay a kaemangay salikaka mahecaday ko raraw, telocto matoleday ko niyah.
Mahecad o malifetay ako, o fanekfekay a kaemangay salikaka mahecaday ko raraw, telocto matoleday ko niyah.
S.PHON: maħəʦaɬ~ɮ o~u maɾifətaj ako~u, o~u fanəkfəkaj a kaəmaŋaj saɾikaka maħəʦaɬ~ɮaj ko~u raraw, təɾo~uʦto~u mato~uɾəɬ~ɮaj ko~u nijaħ.
S.TRANSL: As was the case with me, energetic young brothers can easily make slips like that and then feel disappointed with themselves.

S.FORM: Maharek mitengil tomangicay kako, rarawto ako hananay ako cingra a pasowal.
Maharek mitengil tomangicay kako, rarawto ako hananay ako cingra a pasowal.
S.PHON: maħarək mitəŋiɾ to~umaŋiʦaj kako~u, rarawto~u ako~u ħananaj ako~u ʦiŋra a paso~uwaɾ.
S.TRANSL: Then it was my turn to cry, and I apologized to her.

S.FORM: Licayen ko niyah: "Ano mitosil kako to nga'ayay ratoh i, mimametan ako ko toki mi'osi ko Sowal no Kawas i tamdaw han?"
Licayen ko niyah: "Ano mitosil kako to nga'ayay ratoh i, mimametan ako ko toki mi'osi ko Sowal no Kawas i tamdaw han?"
S.PHON: ɾiʦajən ko~u nijaħ: "ano~u mito~usiɾ kako~u to~u ŋaʡajaj rato~uħ i, mimamətan ako~u ko~u to~uki miʡo~usi ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u kawas i tamɬ~ɮaw ħan?"
S.TRANSL: Ask yourself, 'Do I look for every opportunity to share a portion of God's Word with those to whom I bring the good news?'

S.FORM: Itiya 16 ko mihecaan ako, mamilaheciho to picudadan, kawra ikor no micada to ino' sakatosa miheca misatapangayto kako a misakafah.
Itiya 16 ko mihecaan ako, mamilaheciho to picudadan, kawra ikor no micada to ino' sakatosa miheca misatapangayto kako a misakafah.
S.PHON: itija ** ko~u miħəʦaan ako~u, mamiɾaħəʦiħo~u to~u piʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan, kawra iko~ur no~u miʦaɬ~ɮa to~u ino~uʡ sakato~usa miħəʦa misatapaŋajto~u kako~u a misakafaħ.
S.TRANSL: I was 16 years old and had to return to school, but the following year I too became a regular pioneer.

S.FORM: Mahapinangay ako ora minanaman ako o so'linay kimad, mansa kalikiay a macakat kako.
Mahapinangay ako ora minanaman ako o so'linay kimad, mansa kalikiay a macakat kako.
S.PHON: maħapinaŋaj ako~u o~ura minanaman ako~u o~u so~uʡɾinaj kimaɬ~ɮ, mansa kaɾikiaj a maʦakat kako~u.
S.TRANSL: I made rapid progress, for I knew that I had found the truth.

S.FORM: Sanay cingra: "Pakayniay i pitolon, micekiw to Fangcalay Cudad ato midotim to mananamay a kimad, matongal matongal ko olah to capeling no Kawas, o olah ako ci Yihofaan, saka mapadik ko sapinengnengaw to makakalonaay a lalakaw a faloco'."

Sanay cingra: "Pakayniay i pitolon, micekiw to Fangcalay Cudad ato midotim to mananamay a kimad, matongal matongal ko olah to capeling no Kawas, o olah ako ci Yihofaan, saka mapadik ko sapinengnengaw to makakalonaay a lalakaw a faloco'."
S.PHON: sanaj ʦiŋra: "pakajniaj i pito~uɾo~un, miʦəkiw to~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ ato~u miɬ~ɮo~utim to~u mananamaj a kimaɬ~ɮ, mato~uŋaɾ mato~uŋaɾ ko~u o~uɾaħ to~u ʦapəɾiŋ no~u kawas, o~u o~uɾaħ ako~u ʦi jiħo~ufaan, saka mapaɬ~ɮik ko~u sapinəŋnəŋaw to~u makakaɾo~unaaj a ɾaɾakaw a faɾo~uʦo~uʡ."
S.TRANSL: He explains: "Through prayer, Bible study, and meditation on what I learned, my appreciation of God's qualities increased until my love for Jehovah became stronger than my desire for pornography."

S.PHON: kako~u, wina ato~u safa ʦi kəriko~uri itiniaj ŋata no~u to~u~uɾo~u~uan a mito~usiɾ, wa misinano~ut kami.
S.TRANSL: My mother, Grigory, and I preached in the settlements around Tulun, but we had to be resourceful.

S.FORM: O pasifana'ay to Rikec ato Farisay tamdaw hano cowa ka ciharateng to 'orip no roma tamdaw hanko sowal?
O pasifana'ay to Rikec ato Farisay tamdaw hano cowa ka ciharateng to 'orip no roma tamdaw hanko sowal?
S.PHON: o~u pasifanaʡaj to~u rikəʦ ato~u farisaj tamɬ~ɮaw ħano~u ʦo~uwa ka ʦiħaratəŋ to~u ʡo~urip no~u ro~uma tamɬ~ɮaw ħanko~u so~uwaɾ?
S.TRANSL: According to Jesus, how did the scribes and Pharisees show a careless disregard for life?

S.FORM: Kapah tamdaw, samanay ko pinengneng iso to pirikec no wama ato wina?
Kapah tamdaw, samanay ko pinengneng iso to pirikec no wama ato wina?
S.PHON: kapaħ tamɬ~ɮaw, samanaj ko~u pinəŋnəŋ iso~u to~u pirikəʦ no~u wama ato~u wina?
S.TRANSL: As a youth, how can you avoid becoming overly frustrated with your parents?

S.FORM: Mikimaday i taykay ato micoyak sano Sipuano a sowal
Mikimaday i taykay ato micoyak sano Sipuano a sowal
S.PHON: mikimaɬ~ɮaj i tajkaj ato~u miʦo~ujak sano~u sipo~u~uano~u a so~uwaɾ
S.TRANSL: Delivering a talk at a convention with a Cebuano interpreter

S.FORM: Mihaen, wa matongal ko pisinanot ita to pakayraan ato saali nangra, paihkal to sini'ada cangraanan.
Mihaen, wa matongal ko pisinanot ita to pakayraan ato saali nangra, paihkal to sini'ada cangraanan.
S.PHON: miħaən, wa mato~uŋaɾ ko~u pisinano~ut ita to~u pakajraan ato~u saaɾi naŋra, paiħkaɾ to~u siniʡaɬ~ɮa ʦaŋraanan.
S.TRANSL: In this way we can become alert to their circumstances and their needs.

S.FORM: Maolahay kako miliso' to icowacowaay a fenpo, pakalalok to matayalay i Pitil ato milakowitay to riyar a mitosilay.
Maolahay kako miliso' to icowacowaay a fenpo, pakalalok to matayalay i Pitil ato milakowitay to riyar a mitosilay.
S.PHON: mao~uɾaħaj kako~u miɾiso~uʡ to~u iʦo~uwaʦo~uwaaj a fənpo~u, pakaɾaɾo~uk to~u matajaɾaj i pitiɾ ato~u miɾako~uwitaj to~u rijar a mito~usiɾaj.
S.TRANSL: Visiting branch offices around the world to build up and encourage the Bethel families and the missionaries has been a very enjoyable privilege for me.

S.FORM: Cingra ato fafahi nohatini 15 ko pacekiwan, padamaayho to papina tomerepayto mitosil a tamdaw miliyaw a mirienang to sa'opo.
Cingra ato fafahi nohatini 15 ko pacekiwan, padamaayho to papina tomerepayto mitosil a tamdaw miliyaw a mirienang to sa'opo.
S.PHON: ʦiŋra ato~u fafaħi no~uħatini ** ko~u paʦəkiwan, paɬ~ɮamaajħo~u to~u papina to~umərəpajto~u mito~usiɾ a tamɬ~ɮaw miɾijaw a miriənaŋ to~u saʡo~upo~u.
S.TRANSL: He reports that he and his wife thus far are conducting 15 Bible studies and that a good number of inactive ones are now attending meetings.

S.FORM: "Kao So'linay a Faloco' ato Nga'ayay a Demak ko Piolah"
"Kao So'linay a Faloco' ato Nga'ayay a Demak ko Piolah"
S.PHON: "kao~u so~uʡɾinaj a faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ato~u ŋaʡajaj a ɬ~ɮəmak ko~u pio~uɾaħ"
S.TRANSL: "Love... in Deed and Truth"

S.FORM: Miliyaway ci Isaya pasowal to patikolay i nalacolan a Israil tamdaw, hamaan matalaw to 'a'adopen ato mari'angay a tamdaw.
Miliyaway ci Isaya pasowal to patikolay i nalacolan a Israil tamdaw, hamaan matalaw to 'a'adopen ato mari'angay a tamdaw.
S.PHON: miɾijawaj ʦi isaja paso~uwaɾ to~u patiko~uɾaj i naɾaʦo~uɾan a israiɾ tamɬ~ɮaw, ħamaan mataɾaw to~u ʡaʡaɬ~ɮo~upən ato~u mariʡaŋaj a tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: Isaiah further emphasized that the returnees would not be threatened by animals or humans.

S.FORM: O misatekeday kita hokira ato mifekadan ni Satan a lacongis, iraay ko manan a kalaliting hani?
O misatekeday kita hokira ato mifekadan ni Satan a lacongis, iraay ko manan a kalaliting hani?
S.PHON: o~u misatəkəɬ~ɮaj kita ħo~ukira ato~u mifəkaɬ~ɮan ni satan a ɾaʦo~uŋis, iraaj ko~u manan a kaɾaɾitiŋ ħani?
S.TRANSL: How is our being selfish or unselfish connected with the universal issue?

S.FORM: Misamaanay hano masawad ni Stifen ko keter, ato kaacekan a sowal hani?
Misamaanay hano masawad ni Stifen ko keter, ato kaacekan a sowal hani?
S.PHON: misamaanaj ħano~u masawaɬ~ɮ ni stifən ko~u kətər, ato~u kaaʦəkan a so~uwaɾ ħani?
S.TRANSL: What helped Stephen to put away anger and abusive speech?

S.FORM: Ikor no cecay lipay, mirienang kami to miliwkoay i polong no hekal a taykay, tatayra i Sila, Icip ato Lipanon.
Ikor no cecay lipay, mirienang kami to miliwkoay i polong no hekal a taykay, tatayra i Sila, Icip ato Lipanon.

S.TRANSL: A week after our wedding, Lila and I joined the around-the-world tour and visited Greece, Egypt, and Lebanon.

S.FORM: 1962 miheca 1 folad 23 romi'ad, ikor no kasapala taykay caka halafin, kako ato roma milakowitay to riyar a mitosilay ci Antero Tamike itiniay i Fenpo a marepet, o 1962 miheca 1 folad 8 romi'ad Katalipa'elal!

S.FORM: Mikitini kita i tinakoan ato sapalimo'ot ni Pitiro wa mananam ko maanan?
Mikitini kita i tinakoan ato sapalimo'ot ni Pitiro wa mananam ko maanan?
S.PHON: mikitini kita i tinako~uan ato~u sapaɾimo~uʡo~ut ni pitiro~u wa mananam ko~u maanan?
S.TRANSL: How can the apostle Peter's example and counsel help us?

S.FORM: O cecay Sri Lanka a salikaka, itiniay ko 'aro i roma kitakit, pasadakan ningra ko iniyaro'ay a sera ato loma', malo kasa'opoan, pitaykayan ato pikiloma'an no mieminay to toki a sikawdan.
O cecay Sri Lanka a salikaka, itiniay ko 'aro i roma kitakit, pasadakan ningra ko iniyaro'ay a sera ato loma', malo kasa'opoan, pitaykayan ato pikiloma'an no mieminay to toki a sikawdan.
S.PHON: o~u ʦəʦaj sri ɾanka a saɾikaka, itiniaj ko~u ʡaro~u i ro~uma kitakit, pasaɬ~ɮakan niŋra ko~u inijaro~uʡaj a səra ato~u ɾo~umaʡ, maɾo~u kasaʡo~upo~uan, pitajkajan ato~u pikiɾo~umaʡan no~u miəminaj to~u to~uki a sikawɬ~ɮan.
S.TRANSL: A brother from Sri Lanka, now living abroad, has made his property back home available for meetings and assemblies and for housing full-time servants.

S.FORM: Tada maolahay kako malacafay to wama ato kaka ci Cili tano hatiniay a pakayraan a mitosil.
Tada maolahay kako malacafay to wama ato kaka ci Cili tano hatiniay a pakayraan a mitosil.
S.PHON: taɬ~ɮa mao~uɾaħaj kako~u maɾaʦafaj to~u wama ato~u kaka ʦi ʦiɾi tano~u ħatiniaj a pakajraan a mito~usiɾ.
S.TRANSL: It was always exciting to be with Dad and my older brother, Jerry, on those occasions.

S.FORM: Pakayni sapi'acaaw to so'linay kimad, o mamifalic ko tamdaw to maanan a harateng ato waywayan?
Pakayni sapi'acaaw to so'linay kimad, o mamifalic ko tamdaw to maanan a harateng ato waywayan?
S.PHON: pakajni sapiʡaʦaaw to~u so~uʡɾinaj kimaɬ~ɮ, o~u mamifaɾiʦ ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~u maanan a ħaratəŋ ato~u wajwajan?
S.TRANSL: What changes in our thinking and conduct are needed in order to buy truth?

S.FORM: O manan ko patosokan ita a micekiw ato midotim hani?
O manan ko patosokan ita a micekiw ato midotim hani?
S.PHON: o~u manan ko~u pato~uso~ukan ita a miʦəkiw ato~u miɬ~ɮo~utim ħani?
S.TRANSL: What is our goal when we study and meditate?

S.FORM: O ngiha' noka romadiw ato ngiha' noka caciyaw palecaden a ta'angay, latek ikaka ko nika ta'angay.
O ngiha' noka romadiw ato ngiha' noka caciyaw palecaden a ta'angay, latek ikaka ko nika ta'angay.
S.PHON: o~u ŋiħaʡ no~uka ro~umaɬ~ɮiw ato~u ŋiħaʡ no~uka ʦaʦijaw paɾəʦaɬ~ɮən a taʡaŋaj, ɾatək ikaka ko~u nika taʡaŋaj.
S.TRANSL: You should sing as loud as you speak or even louder than that.

S.FORM: Mirenecay ko sapatefoc to tokel ita to saka tahada'ocaw a ma'orip, padamaay kitaanan miliyas to raraw ato patay.
Mirenecay ko sapatefoc to tokel ita to saka tahada'ocaw a ma'orip, padamaay kitaanan miliyas to raraw ato patay.
S.PHON: mirənəʦaj ko~u sapatəfo~uʦ to~u to~ukəɾ ita to~u saka taħaɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦaw a maʡo~urip, paɬ~ɮamaaj kitaanan miɾijas to~u raraw ato~u pataj.
S.TRANSL: It satisfies our desire to keep living, and it fills our need to be freed from sin and death.

S.FORM: Haratengen, oniya demak na papaira to ta'angayay a losiyang ato hemek no tamdaw.
Haratengen, oniya demak na papaira to ta'angayay a losiyang ato hemek no tamdaw.
S.PHON: ħaratəŋən, o~unija ɬ~ɮəmak na papaira to~u taʡaŋajaj a ɾo~usijaŋ ato~u ħəmək no~u tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: Imagine how fulfilling and rewarding that project would have been!

S.FORM: Samaan patado miharateng ato cipinang ko fa'inay to fafahi hani?
Samaan patado miharateng ato cipinang ko fa'inay to fafahi hani?
S.PHON: samaan pataɬ~ɮo~u miħaratəŋ ato~u ʦipinaŋ ko~u faʡinaj to~u fafaħi ħani?
S.TRANSL: For a husband, how should understanding and consideration go hand in hand?

S.FORM: O kaemangay tamdaw ato wama wina nangra oha mamisinanot to maanan hani?
O kaemangay tamdaw ato wama wina nangra oha mamisinanot to maanan hani?
S.PHON: o~u kaəmaŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u wama wina naŋra o~uħa mamisinano~ut to~u maanan ħani?
S.TRANSL: What should they and their parents bear in mind?

S.FORM: To mihecahecaan pinaay polo''ofad ko micadaay to 'ino a tamdaw, ilaloma'nangra 'alomanay kapah ato kaemangay.
To mihecahecaan pinaay polo''ofad ko micadaay to 'ino a tamdaw, ilaloma'nangra 'alomanay kapah ato kaemangay.
S.PHON: to~u miħəʦaħəʦaan pinaaj po~uɾo~uʡʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ ko~u miʦaɬ~ɮaaj to~u ʡino~u a tamɬ~ɮaw, iɾaɾo~umaʡnaŋra ʡaɾo~umanaj kapaħ ato~u kaəmaŋaj.
S.TRANSL: Among the thousands who get baptized each year are young ones, teenagers and preteens.

S.FORM: Misamacayay mitengil toya kohecalay ko ngisngis ato fokes, ciriko'ay to kohetingay kafafang a mikimaday.
Misamacayay mitengil toya kohecalay ko ngisngis ato fokes, ciriko'ay to kohetingay kafafang a mikimaday.
S.PHON: misamaʦajaj mitəŋiɾ to~uja ko~uħəʦaɾaj ko~u ŋisŋis ato~u fo~ukəs, ʦiriko~uʡaj to~u ko~uħətiŋaj kafafaŋ a mikimaɬ~ɮaj.
S.TRANSL: The man pays rapt attention to the white-haired, bearded speaker wearing a long black coat.

S.FORM: O Ikok ato kasakapot no kalodoyongan mirikecay to salikaka ci Yangkean, pasowal to aadihay ko misafelitay cingranan.
O Ikok ato kasakapot no kalodoyongan mirikecay to salikaka ci Yangkean, pasowal to aadihay ko misafelitay cingranan.
S.PHON: o~u iko~uk ato~u kasakapo~ut no~u kaɾo~uɬ~ɮo~ujo~uŋan mirikəʦaj to~u saɾikaka ʦi jaŋkəan, paso~uwaɾ to~u aaɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u misafəɾitaj ʦiŋranan.
S.TRANSL: The secretary of the British and Foreign Bible Society warned Brother Young that he surely would meet much opposition.

S.FORM: Somowalay ko tarokos ci Yohani, o olah ita, "kao so'linay a faloco' ato nga'ayay a demak ko nipiolah."
Somowalay ko tarokos ci Yohani, o olah ita, "kao so'linay a faloco' ato nga'ayay a demak ko nipiolah."
S.PHON: so~umo~uwaɾaj ko~u taro~uko~us ʦi jo~uħani, o~u o~uɾaħ ita, "kao~u so~uʡɾinaj a faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ato~u ŋaʡajaj a ɬ~ɮəmak ko~u nipio~uɾaħ."
S.TRANSL: The apostle John wrote that we must love "in deed and truth."

S.FORM: Laloma' no sepat a folad, mapatayay ko wina nangra ato cecay salawina, hanaca ci Mari misatapangho a midipot to caka fana' to tamdaw a wama.
Laloma' no sepat a folad, mapatayay ko wina nangra ato cecay salawina, hanaca ci Mari misatapangho a midipot to caka fana' to tamdaw a wama.
S.PHON: ɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u səpat a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, mapatajaj ko~u wina naŋra ato~u ʦəʦaj saɾawina, ħanaʦa ʦi mari misatapaŋħo~u a miɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u ʦaka fanaʡ to~u tamɬ~ɮaw a wama.
S.TRANSL: Within four months, both lost their mothers and another relative in death and began caring for Mary's father, who has dementia.

S.FORM: Maolahay kiso tano tingnaw anca tano soci a patikami to kafana'an a tamdaw ato widang han?
Maolahay kiso tano tingnaw anca tano soci a patikami to kafana'an a tamdaw ato widang han?
S.PHON: mao~uɾaħaj kiso~u tano~u tiŋnaw anʦa tano~u so~uʦi a patikami to~u kafanaʡan a tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u wiɬ~ɮaŋ ħan?
S.TRANSL: Are you the kind of person who enjoys sending e-mails and text messages to your friends and acquaintances?

S.FORM: Manaokaniw, cowa ko mamasaheci a maliyas ko nika sasongtol ato caay pihakelong a salawina.
Manaokaniw, cowa ko mamasaheci a maliyas ko nika sasongtol ato caay pihakelong a salawina.
S.PHON: manao~ukaniw, ʦo~uwa ko~u mamasaħəʦi a maɾijas ko~u nika saso~uŋto~uɾ ato~u ʦaaj piħakəɾo~uŋ a saɾawina.
S.TRANSL: Of course, you cannot expect to avoid all disagreements with your unbelieving relatives.

S.FORM: Ya misalofan a pihongyak mitooray to lalekoan no tilid ato sowal no Hipay.
Ya misalofan a pihongyak mitooray to lalekoan no tilid ato sowal no Hipay.
S.PHON: ja misaɾo~ufan a piħo~uŋjak mito~uo~uraj to~u ɾaɾəko~uan no~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ ato~u so~uwaɾ no~u ħipaj.
S.TRANSL: The revised wording has lexical and grammatical support.

S.FORM: Isaka 1982 miheca ka pitoan a romi'ad, ya micada kako ato fafahi to ino' i, misana'ona'onay kami to demak.
Isaka 1982 miheca ka pitoan a romi'ad, ya micada kako ato fafahi to ino' i, misana'ona'onay kami to demak.
S.PHON: isaka **** miħəʦa ka pito~uan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ja miʦaɬ~ɮa kako~u ato~u fafaħi to~u ino~uʡ i, misanaʡo~unaʡo~unaj kami to~u ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: When Mairambubu and I got baptized in July 1982 in the Chüy River, we had to be cautious.

S.FORM: O kalala'ed to salawina ato widang.
O kalala'ed to salawina ato widang.
S.PHON: o~u kaɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮ to~u saɾawina ato~u wiɬ~ɮaŋ.
S.TRANSL: Personal relationships.

S.FORM: O howaliyaw ato roma sapiadah a pakayraan mieminay to 'icel ningra, cowato ka nga'ay a romakat.
O howaliyaw ato roma sapiadah a pakayraan mieminay to 'icel ningra, cowato ka nga'ay a romakat.
S.PHON: o~u ħo~uwaɾijaw ato~u ro~uma sapiaɬ~ɮaħ a pakajraan miəminaj to~u ʡiʦəɾ niŋra, ʦo~uwato~u ka ŋaʡaj a ro~umakat.
S.TRANSL: Sessions of chemotherapy and radiotherapy took such a toll on her strength that at times she could barely walk.

S.FORM: Mahemekay ko salikaka tayra kako mipadang cangranan milimasmas to sa'opo ato mitosilay demak, ira ko minaro'an no demak.
Mahemekay ko salikaka tayra kako mipadang cangranan milimasmas to sa'opo ato mitosilay demak, ira ko minaro'an no demak.
S.PHON: maħəməkaj ko~u saɾikaka tajra kako~u mipaɬ~ɮaŋ ʦaŋranan miɾimasmas to~u saʡo~upo~u ato~u mito~usiɾaj ɬ~ɮəmak, ira ko~u minaro~uʡan no~u ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: So the brothers appreciated it when I helped them organize meetings and field service more efficiently.

S.FORM: Mihaenay kaemangho kako, o wama ko mihimaway takowanan i pahanhanan a romi'ad, malingaday ko wina misa'opo ato mitosil.
Mihaenay kaemangho kako, o wama ko mihimaway takowanan i pahanhanan a romi'ad, malingaday ko wina misa'opo ato mitosil.
S.PHON: miħaənaj kaəmaŋħo~u kako~u, o~u wama ko~u miħimawaj tako~uwanan i paħanħanan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj ko~u wina misaʡo~upo~u ato~u mito~usiɾ.
S.TRANSL: When I was a toddler, my father would care for me while my mother attended meetings and shared in the witnessing work on weekends.

S.FORM: Makahi kita misadak to toki ato 'icel mitosil pasifana' to tamdaw, wa ta'angay ko hemek.
Makahi kita misadak to toki ato 'icel mitosil pasifana' to tamdaw, wa ta'angay ko hemek.
S.PHON: makaħi kita misaɬ~ɮak to~u to~uki ato~u ʡiʦəɾ mito~usiɾ pasifanaʡ to~u tamɬ~ɮaw, wa taʡaŋaj ko~u ħəmək.
S.TRANSL: Being generous with our time and energy in the preaching and disciple-making work brings great joy.

S.FORM: Sowal no roma tamdaw, nga'ay ko niyah misa'osi to nga'ayay ato tatiihay, samaan kita padama cangranan misaharaterateng?
Sowal no roma tamdaw, nga'ay ko niyah misa'osi to nga'ayay ato tatiihay, samaan kita padama cangranan misaharaterateng?
S.PHON: so~uwaɾ no~u ro~uma tamɬ~ɮaw, ŋaʡaj ko~u nijaħ misaʡo~usi to~u ŋaʡajaj ato~u tatiiħaj, samaan kita paɬ~ɮama ʦaŋranan misaħaratəratəŋ?
S.TRANSL: What can we say about the notion that an individual can determine what is good without believing in God?

S.FORM: Pakayni saka siemelaw noka'orip, misamacayay cingra to 'akawangay picudadan ato adihayay ko lifon a tayal.
Pakayni saka siemelaw noka'orip, misamacayay cingra to 'akawangay picudadan ato adihayay ko lifon a tayal.
S.PHON: pakajni saka siəməɾaw no~ukaʡo~urip, misamaʦajaj ʦiŋra to~u ʡakawaŋaj piʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan ato~u aɬ~ɮiħajaj ko~u ɾifo~un a tajaɾ.
S.TRANSL: She focused on pursuing higher education and good employment in order to get ahead in life.

S.FORM: Pakidem ko adada ningra i, minanamay kako misawsaw to kaysing, mifaca' to riko', ato misaday to kantangay kakaenen.
Pakidem ko adada ningra i, minanamay kako misawsaw to kaysing, mifaca' to riko', ato misaday to kantangay kakaenen.
