S.FORM: Isalakatay a somowal ci Pawlo to 'micoliay micongangah to wama wina', aikor somowalay to caay ka fana' a miahowid ko tamdaw, o matiniay tamdaw cowa piako'id to nano demak no tao i cangranan.
Isalakatay a somowal ci Pawlo to 'micoliay micongangah to wama wina', aikor somowalay to caay ka fana' a miahowid ko tamdaw, o matiniay tamdaw cowa piako'id to nano demak no tao i cangranan.
S.PHON: isaɾakataj a so~umo~uwaɾ ʦi pawɾo~u to~u ʡmiʦo~uɾiaj miʦo~uŋaŋaħ to~u wama winaʡ, aiko~ur so~umo~uwaɾaj to~u ʦaaj ka fanaʡ a miaħo~uwiɬ~ɮ ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u matiniaj tamɬ~ɮaw ʦo~uwa piako~uʡiɬ~ɮ to~u nano~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u tao~u i ʦaŋranan.
S.TRANSL: Fittingly, unthankful follows "disobedient to parents" because it describes the attitude of those who lack appreciation for the kindnesses shown to them by others.

S.FORM: Kawraan, cowa ka fana' ko 'alomanay tamdaw to tatodong noka'orip.
Kawraan, cowa ka fana' ko 'alomanay tamdaw to tatodong noka'orip.
S.PHON: kawraan, ʦo~uwa ka fanaʡ ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj tamɬ~ɮaw to~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~ukaʡo~urip.
S.TRANSL: On the other hand, the majority of mankind have no clear concept of life's purpose.

S.FORM: Maolah to payso hano cowa pilifok to so'linay a lipahak hani?
Maolah to payso hano cowa pilifok to so'linay a lipahak hani?
S.PHON: mao~uɾaħ to~u pajso~u ħano~u ʦo~uwa piɾifo~uk to~u so~uʡɾinaj a ɾipaħak ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why are lovers of money not truly happy?

S.FORM: Patahekalay to cowa pisateked a olah to teloteloc ni Atam, ira ko hatokel ma'orip i lakoing tangasa i da'oc.
Patahekalay to cowa pisateked a olah to teloteloc ni Atam, ira ko hatokel ma'orip i lakoing tangasa i da'oc.
S.PHON: pataħəkaɾaj to~u ʦo~uwa pisatəkəɬ~ɮ a o~uɾaħ to~u təɾo~utəɾo~uʦ ni atam, ira ko~u ħato~ukəɾ maʡo~urip i ɾako~uiŋ taŋasa i ɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ.
S.TRANSL: He further showed unselfish love by blessing his children on earth with the prospect of living forever in the Paradise that he had prepared for them.

S.FORM: Patireng toni pilimekan niyaro' cowa ko harateng no Israil tamdaw, ao ni Yihofa a limasmas.
Patireng toni pilimekan niyaro' cowa ko harateng no Israil tamdaw, ao ni Yihofa a limasmas.
S.PHON: patirəŋ to~uni piɾiməkan nijaro~uʡ ʦo~uwa ko~u ħaratəŋ no~u israiɾ tamɬ~ɮaw, ao~u ni jiħo~ufa a ɾimasmas.
S.TRANSL: Designating these cities as cities of refuge was not a human idea.

S.FORM: Pakaso'linay ci Yopu, cowa ko mamapawan ci Yihofa cingranan.
Pakaso'linay ci Yopu, cowa ko mamapawan ci Yihofa cingranan.
S.PHON: pakaso~uʡɾinaj ʦi jo~upo~u~u, ʦo~uwa ko~u mamapawan ʦi jiħo~ufa ʦiŋranan.
S.TRANSL: In fact, Job believed that Jehovah would set a time to remember him.

S.FORM: Nikawrira, pakatengil to lihaf no Hongti Kitakit ko tamdaw, cowa ka saheto saan manga'ay ko kapicada.
Nikawrira, pakatengil to lihaf no Hongti Kitakit ko tamdaw, cowa ka saheto saan manga'ay ko kapicada.
S.PHON: nikawrira, pakatəŋiɾ to~u ɾiħaf no~u ħo~uŋti kitakit ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, ʦo~uwa ka saħəto~u saan maŋaʡaj ko~u kapiʦaɬ~ɮa.
S.TRANSL: Not all, however, respond favorably to our message, at least not initially.

S.FORM: Cowa, ora heci, o faelohay a sapaloma, lomahad ko sapaloma malo emi.
Cowa, ora heci, o faelohay a sapaloma, lomahad ko sapaloma malo emi.
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa, o~ura ħəʦi, o~u faəɾo~uħaj a sapaɾo~uma, ɾo~umaħaɬ~ɮ ko~u sapaɾo~uma maɾo~u əmi.
S.TRANSL: No, it produces new seed, which may eventually grow into stalks.

S.FORM: Cowa ko mamapawan a milifetan konini!
Cowa ko mamapawan a milifetan konini!
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa ko~u mamapawan a miɾifətan ko~unini!
S.TRANSL: What an unforgettable event that was!

S.FORM: 'Alomanay Yutaya tamdaw cowa ka olah to so'linay kimad, samaanay ko harateng ni Pawlo hani?
'Alomanay Yutaya tamdaw cowa ka olah to so'linay kimad, samaanay ko harateng ni Pawlo hani?
S.PHON: ʡaɾo~umanaj jo~u~utaja tamɬ~ɮaw ʦo~uwa ka o~uɾaħ to~u so~uʡɾinaj kimaɬ~ɮ, samaanaj ko~u ħaratəŋ ni pawɾo~u ħani?
S.TRANSL: How did the negative reaction from most Jews affect Paul?

S.FORM: Cowa ko madoloay ci Nowa midipot to paro no loma'.
Cowa ko madoloay ci Nowa midipot to paro no loma'.
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa ko~u maɬ~ɮo~uɾo~uaj ʦi no~uwa miɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ.
S.TRANSL: Another challenge for Noah was that of providing materially for his wife and children.

S.FORM: Misilsilay ci Pawlo to cowa ko mamilayap to Hongti Kitakit a waywayan, ikor sanay ko sowal: "Hatiraay ko romaroma namo iti:yaho."
Misilsilay ci Pawlo to cowa ko mamilayap to Hongti Kitakit a waywayan, ikor sanay ko sowal: "Hatiraay ko romaroma namo iti:yaho."
S.PHON: misiɾsiɾaj ʦi pawɾo~u to~u ʦo~uwa ko~u mamiɾajap to~u ħo~uŋti kitakit a wajwajan, iko~ur sanaj ko~u so~uwaɾ: "ħatiraaj ko~u ro~umaro~uma namo~u iti:jaħo~u."
S.TRANSL: After listing a number of types of people who will not inherit God's Kingdom, the apostle Paul added: "That is what some of you were."

S.FORM: Cowa ka pifana' ci Yihofa kitanan to manan ko ngangan noniya mitowakangay a coyoh.
Cowa ka pifana' ci Yihofa kitanan to manan ko ngangan noniya mitowakangay a coyoh.
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa ka pifanaʡ ʦi jiħo~ufa kitanan to~u manan ko~u ŋaŋan no~unija mito~uwakaŋaj a ʦo~ujo~uħ.
S.TRANSL: In his wisdom, Jehovah has never told us the personal name of the angelic son who rebelled against him.

S.FORM: 'Alomanay cowa ko Krisciyang a tamdaw hato nga'ayay ko waywayan nangra, cowa ka pidemak to mararaway a demak.
'Alomanay cowa ko Krisciyang a tamdaw hato nga'ayay ko waywayan nangra, cowa ka pidemak to mararaway a demak.
S.PHON: ʡaɾo~umanaj ʦo~uwa ko~u krisʦijaŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw ħato~u ŋaʡajaj ko~u wajwajan naŋra, ʦo~uwa ka piɬ~ɮəmak to~u mararawaj a ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: Most people have some good qualities, and many outside the congregation do not engage in blatant misconduct.

S.FORM: Pasangaray ko paya no hikoki itiya, cowa ka hakowa ko micudiyapay nga'ay mikalic to hikoki tayra i kilac.
Pasangaray ko paya no hikoki itiya, cowa ka hakowa ko micudiyapay nga'ay mikalic to hikoki tayra i kilac.
S.PHON: pasaŋaraj ko~u paja no~u ħiko~uki itija, ʦo~uwa ka ħako~uwa ko~u miʦo~u~uɬ~ɮijapaj ŋaʡaj mikaɾiʦ to~u ħiko~uki tajra i kiɾaʦ.
S.TRANSL: Air travel was extremely costly in those years, so only a few of the graduates would travel by air.

S.FORM: O romaroma wama wina cowa kaolah kahenay ko wawa micada to ino', misamaanay hani?
O romaroma wama wina cowa kaolah kahenay ko wawa micada to ino', misamaanay hani?
S.PHON: o~u ro~umaro~uma wama wina ʦo~uwa kao~uɾaħ kaħənaj ko~u wawa miʦaɬ~ɮa to~u ino~uʡ, misamaanaj ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why have some parents wanted their child to postpone baptism?

S.FORM: So'lin tahacada to sapalifet cowa ko kahemekan a demak, kawra cowa ko mami'afas ko sapalifet to lipahakay a faloco' no tamdaw.
So'lin tahacada to sapalifet cowa ko kahemekan a demak, kawra cowa ko mami'afas ko sapalifet to lipahakay a faloco' no tamdaw.
S.PHON: so~uʡɾin taħaʦaɬ~ɮa to~u sapaɾifət ʦo~uwa ko~u kaħəməkan a ɬ~ɮəmak, kawra ʦo~uwa ko~u mamiʡafas ko~u sapaɾifət to~u ɾipaħakaj a faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: Trials, though not enjoyable in themselves, do not change this awareness.

S.FORM: Misamaanay palahad to harateng ni Yihofa, cowa ko pakidemay a mipalit kitaanan hani?
Misamaanay palahad to harateng ni Yihofa, cowa ko pakidemay a mipalit kitaanan hani?
S.PHON: misamaanaj paɾaħaɬ~ɮ to~u ħaratəŋ ni jiħo~ufa, ʦo~uwa ko~u pakiɬ~ɮəmaj a mipaɾit kitaanan ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why will cultivating Jehovah's view of matters not be overly restrictive?

S.FORM: Alatek, o romaroma wama wina pasalatay to wawa nangra, mirienang to manan a demak, kawra, cowa ko mamakahi kiso papirienang to wawa iso.
Alatek, o romaroma wama wina pasalatay to wawa nangra, mirienang to manan a demak, kawra, cowa ko mamakahi kiso papirienang to wawa iso.
S.PHON: aɾatək, o~u ro~umaro~uma wama wina pasaɾataj to~u wawa naŋra, miriənaŋ to~u manan a ɬ~ɮəmak, kawra, ʦo~uwa ko~u mamakaħi kiso~u papiriənaŋ to~u wawa iso~u.
S.TRANSL: Or perhaps a few parents in the congregation allow their children to do things that you do not want your child to do.

S.FORM: Sikawdan cowa ka talaw,
Sikawdan cowa ka talaw,
S.PHON: sikawɬ~ɮan ʦo~uwa ka taɾaw,
S.TRANSL: Though living in times of distress,

S.FORM: Hano cowa ko mamahidepec ita a cipinang ko faloco' no tao?
Hano cowa ko mamahidepec ita a cipinang ko faloco' no tao?
S.PHON: ħano~u ʦo~uwa ko~u mamaħiɬ~ɮəpəʦ ita a ʦipinaŋ ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u tao~u?
S.TRANSL: What do we need to remember about grief?

S.FORM: Haratengen, tiya milicay ko tapang no Loma ci Yisan i, cowa paca'of to kihcod a demak.
Haratengen, tiya milicay ko tapang no Loma ci Yisan i, cowa paca'of to kihcod a demak.
S.PHON: ħaratəŋən, tija miɾiʦaj ko~u tapaŋ no~u ɾo~uma ʦi jisan i, ʦo~uwa paʦaʡo~uf to~u kiħʦo~uɬ~ɮ a ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: What did Jesus do when he was interrogated by the Roman governor?

S.FORM: Somowalay kora lalakaw, itiya a tamdaw, cowa ka tada mafana' ko IUD, sanay.
Somowalay kora lalakaw, itiya a tamdaw, cowa ka tada mafana' ko IUD, sanay.
S.PHON: so~umo~uwaɾaj ko~ura ɾaɾakaw, itija a tamɬ~ɮaw, ʦo~uwa ka taɬ~ɮa mafanaʡ ko~u io~u~uɬ~ɮ, sanaj.
S.TRANSL: The article noted that it was not fully known how such IUDs functioned.

S.FORM: Hemek cowa ka malowan.
Hemek cowa ka malowan.
S.PHON: ħəmək ʦo~uwa ka maɾo~uwan.
S.TRANSL: With roots reaching deep in God's Word.

S.FORM: Tano tinakoen a mitadtad, hano cowa ko tatano payci kita a mi'aca to so'linay kimad.
Tano tinakoen a mitadtad, hano cowa ko tatano payci kita a mi'aca to so'linay kimad.
S.PHON: tano~u tinako~uən a mitaɬ~ɮtaɬ~ɮ, ħano~u ʦo~uwa ko~u tatano~u pajʦi kita a miʡaʦa to~u so~uʡɾinaj kimaɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: How can we buy truth without money?

S.FORM: Ira ko ciepocay a tayal, cowa ka lakisaw ko nano rorayan a demak.
Ira ko ciepocay a tayal, cowa ka lakisaw ko nano rorayan a demak.
S.PHON: ira ko~u ʦiəpo~uʦaj a tajaɾ, ʦo~uwa ka ɾakisaw ko~u nano~u ro~urajan a ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: Meaningful and satisfying work.

S.FORM: Manga'ayay ko pinengneng no citodongay tora ontociw a tamdaw, teloc cowa ito papayci kami micaliw tora ontociw.
Manga'ayay ko pinengneng no citodongay tora ontociw a tamdaw, teloc cowa ito papayci kami micaliw tora ontociw.
S.PHON: maŋaʡajaj ko~u pinəŋnəŋ no~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~ura o~unto~uʦiw a tamɬ~ɮaw, təɾo~uʦ ʦo~uwa ito~u papajʦi kami miʦaɾiw to~ura o~unto~uʦiw.
S.TRANSL: The director was so impressed that he allowed us to use the facilities without cost.

S.FORM: Cowa ka harateng niyam ikor no pina miheca, wa malo kitiraan niyam ko Posinafaso.
Cowa ka harateng niyam ikor no pina miheca, wa malo kitiraan niyam ko Posinafaso.
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa ka ħaratəŋ nijam iko~ur no~u pina miħəʦa, wa maɾo~u kitiraan nijam ko~u po~usinafaso~u.
S.TRANSL: Never could I have imagined that years later, Burkina would become our home for a time.

S.FORM: Cowa ko mamaolah ci Yihofa takowanan sa kako.
Cowa ko mamaolah ci Yihofa takowanan sa kako.
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa ko~u mamao~uɾaħ ʦi jiħo~ufa tako~uwanan sa kako~u.
S.TRANSL: I still felt that loving me was too much to expect of Jehovah.

S.FORM: Sapadamaaw to wama wina pakalalok to wawa macakat i no'adingoan, sasamaan ko demak no malohemay malitengay?
Sapadamaaw to wama wina pakalalok to wawa macakat i no'adingoan, sasamaan ko demak no malohemay malitengay?
S.PHON: sapaɬ~ɮamaaw to~u wama wina pakaɾaɾo~uk to~u wawa maʦakat i no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan, sasamaan ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u maɾo~uħəmaj maɾitəŋaj?
S.TRANSL: How can the elders reinforce the efforts of parents who are helping their children progress to baptism?

S.FORM: Dotoc a lalakaw wa milengo to maanan a kalimlaan demak hani?
Dotoc a lalakaw wa milengo to maanan a kalimlaan demak hani?
S.PHON: ɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ a ɾaɾakaw wa miɾəŋo~u to~u maanan a kaɾimɾaan ɬ~ɮəmak ħani?
S.TRANSL: What vital aspect will be discussed in the next article?

S.FORM: Samaan ko demak ita nga', nga'ay midama to pikayat ni Kristo hani?
Samaan ko demak ita nga', nga'ay midama to pikayat ni Kristo hani?
S.PHON: samaan ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak ita ŋaʡ, ŋaʡaj miɬ~ɮama to~u pikajat ni kristo~u ħani?
S.TRANSL: What can help us to appreciate Christ's leadership today?

S.FORM: Maolahay kiso toni demak han?
Maolahay kiso toni demak han?
S.PHON: mao~uɾaħaj kiso~u to~uni ɬ~ɮəmak ħan?
S.TRANSL: Is that your desire?

S.FORM: Pa'ayaway ko 'Olic 118:22 to manan a kalimelaan a demak hani?
Pa'ayaway ko 'Olic 118:22 to manan a kalimelaan a demak hani?
S.PHON: paʡajawaj ko~u ʡo~uɾiʦ ***:** to~u manan a kaɾiməɾaan a ɬ~ɮəmak ħani?
S.TRANSL: Psalm 118:22 pointed to what outstanding event?

S.FORM: Wa misamaan to demak hani?
Wa misamaan to demak hani?
S.PHON: wa misamaan to~u ɬ~ɮəmak ħani?
S.TRANSL: How can we do that?

S.FORM: O roma Krisciyang miceriday pakiyaho padama to mitosilay a demak.
O roma Krisciyang miceriday pakiyaho padama to mitosilay a demak.
S.PHON: o~u ro~uma krisʦijaŋ miʦəriɬ~ɮaj pakijaħo~u paɬ~ɮama to~u mito~usiɾaj a ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: Others set aside money and gave regular donations to support the work.

S.FORM: Samaan ko demak iso nga' misakahemaw a milengo to pidoyongan i tao?
Samaan ko demak iso nga' misakahemaw a milengo to pidoyongan i tao?
S.PHON: samaan ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak iso~u ŋaʡ misakaħəmaw a miɾəŋo~u to~u piɬ~ɮo~ujo~uŋan i tao~u?
S.TRANSL: What might help you overcome hesitancy to speak up about your beliefs?

S.FORM: O misowalan no 'Olic 3:1, 2 sinael oyaan matiliday i saka 16 fedengan no saka 2 Samuil a demak.
O misowalan no 'Olic 3:1, 2 sinael oyaan matiliday i saka 16 fedengan no saka 2 Samuil a demak.
S.PHON: o~u miso~uwaɾan no~u ʡo~uɾiʦ *:*, * sinaəɾ o~ujaan matiɾiɬ~ɮaj i saka ** fəɬ~ɮəŋan no~u saka * samo~u~uiɾ a ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: Verses 1 and 2 fit events described in chapter 16 of Second Samuel.

S.FORM: O malonayay a demak ko damsayay mihadidiay sanay ko 'alomanay tamdaw miharateng.
O malonayay a demak ko damsayay mihadidiay sanay ko 'alomanay tamdaw miharateng.
S.PHON: o~u maɾo~unajaj a ɬ~ɮəmak ko~u ɬ~ɮamsajaj miħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮiaj sanaj ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj tamɬ~ɮaw miħaratəŋ.
S.TRANSL: In today's world, people who are mild and patient are often considered weak.

S.FORM: Satapang kita minanam tano harateng Ningra a minengneng to demak, ikorto, mikitini faloco' micada to harateng Ningra.
Satapang kita minanam tano harateng Ningra a minengneng to demak, ikorto, mikitini faloco' micada to harateng Ningra.
S.PHON: satapaŋ kita minanam tano~u ħaratəŋ niŋra a minəŋnəŋ to~u ɬ~ɮəmak, iko~urto~u, mikitini faɾo~uʦo~uʡ miʦaɬ~ɮa to~u ħaratəŋ niŋra.
S.TRANSL: We begin to see things from his point of view, and we come to agree with that viewpoint.

S.FORM: Pakayni i mitosilay a demak, wa ira ko maanan a salicay ita halatek?
Pakayni i mitosilay a demak, wa ira ko maanan a salicay ita halatek?
S.PHON: pakajni i mito~usiɾaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, wa ira ko~u maanan a saɾiʦaj ita ħaɾatək?
S.TRANSL: What question will we consider, and how will we do so?

S.FORM: Malaheciay Demak no Mita
Malaheciay Demak no Mita
S.PHON: maɾaħəʦiaj ɬ~ɮəmak no~u mita
S.TRANSL: From Our Archives

S.FORM: O 'Olic 118, samanay paihekal to mamala'osi ko miliyaway ma'orip a demak?
O 'Olic 118, samanay paihekal to mamala'osi ko miliyaway ma'orip a demak?
S.PHON: o~u ʡo~uɾiʦ ***, samanaj paiħəkaɾ to~u mamaɾaʡo~usi ko~u miɾijawaj maʡo~urip a ɬ~ɮəmak?
S.TRANSL: How does Psalm 118 bear out that a resurrection can occur long after being foretold?

S.FORM: Haratengen ko Rikec no Israil, pakayni to patampoay to riko' a demak.
Haratengen ko Rikec no Israil, pakayni to patampoay to riko' a demak.
S.PHON: ħaratəŋən ko~u rikəʦ no~u israiɾ, pakajni to~u patampo~uaj to~u riko~uʡ a ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: Consider the law given to Israel regarding the seizing of a man's garment as security for a loan.

S.FORM: Wa nga'ay kiso samaan mitongal to saka ciepoc no mitosilay demak hani?
Wa nga'ay kiso samaan mitongal to saka ciepoc no mitosilay demak hani?
S.PHON: wa ŋaʡaj kiso~u samaan mito~uŋaɾ to~u saka ʦiəpo~uʦ no~u mito~usiɾaj ɬ~ɮəmak ħani?
S.TRANSL: And how can you be more effective at giving a witness?

S.FORM: To dafak pakaloma loma'ay kami mitosil, ikor pasifana'ay pacekiw to tamdaw, nolatekay tangasaay 11 ko toki to dadaya nga' malaheci ko demak.
To dafak pakaloma loma'ay kami mitosil, ikor pasifana'ay pacekiw to tamdaw, nolatekay tangasaay 11 ko toki to dadaya nga' malaheci ko demak.
S.PHON: to~u ɬ~ɮafak pakaɾo~uma ɾo~umaʡaj kami mito~usiɾ, iko~ur pasifanaʡaj paʦəkiw to~u tamɬ~ɮaw, no~uɾatəkaj taŋasaaj ** ko~u to~uki to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja ŋaʡ maɾaħəʦi ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: So we would go in the house-to-house work in the morning and then conduct Bible studies the rest of the day, sometimes until 11 o'clock at night.

S.FORM: Tada maolahay kako to demak no niyah i kasakopang, misalimela toniya kalimelaan a toki dademak!"
Tada maolahay kako to demak no niyah i kasakopang, misalimela toniya kalimelaan a toki dademak!"
S.PHON: taɬ~ɮa mao~uɾaħaj kako~u to~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u nijaħ i kasako~upaŋ, misaɾiməɾa to~unija kaɾiməɾaan a to~uki ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak!"
S.TRANSL: Now I really enjoy my assignment and view it as a wonderful privilege!"

S.FORM: 'Ifowaay ko 'alomanay kaemangay tamdaw mirienang to mieminay to toki a demak.
'Ifowaay ko 'alomanay kaemangay tamdaw mirienang to mieminay to toki a demak.
S.PHON: ʡifo~uwaaj ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj kaəmaŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw miriənaŋ to~u miəminaj to~u to~uki a ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: Many young brothers and sisters are zealously entering the full-time service.

S.FORM: Ho caka ira ko manan tatiihay demak a mafekad.
Ho caka ira ko manan tatiihay demak a mafekad.
S.PHON: ħo~u ʦaka ira ko~u manan tatiiħaj ɬ~ɮəmak a mafəkaɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: Thus no one would have a basis to misconstrue what is occurring.

S.FORM: Samaanay ko demak noniya Iciyopiya tamdaw hani?
Samaanay ko demak noniya Iciyopiya tamdaw hani?
S.PHON: samaanaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~unija iʦijo~upija tamɬ~ɮaw ħani?
S.TRANSL: What was the Ethiopian's response?

S.FORM: O mitosilay demak ita, hano iraay ko epoc to tamdaw hani?
O mitosilay demak ita, hano iraay ko epoc to tamdaw hani?
S.PHON: o~u mito~usiɾaj ɬ~ɮəmak ita, ħano~u iraaj ko~u əpo~uʦ to~u tamɬ~ɮaw ħani?
S.TRANSL: What important opportunities does our preaching work offer?

S.FORM: Misamaan to demak kita, ho ecaka mala misatekeday a maolah to niyahan hani?
Misamaan to demak kita, ho ecaka mala misatekeday a maolah to niyahan hani?
S.PHON: misamaan to~u ɬ~ɮəmak kita, ħo~u əʦaka maɾa misatəkəɬ~ɮaj a mao~uɾaħ to~u nijaħan ħani?
S.TRANSL: How can we avoid loving ourselves excessively?

S.FORM: Itiya 150 a tamdaw ko mirienangay tora taykay, hano falawfaw ko 'alomanay tamdaw a minengneng toni demak hani?
Itiya 150 a tamdaw ko mirienangay tora taykay, hano falawfaw ko 'alomanay tamdaw a minengneng toni demak hani?
S.PHON: itija *** a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u miriənaŋaj to~ura tajkaj, ħano~u faɾawfaw ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj tamɬ~ɮaw a minəŋnəŋ to~uni ɬ~ɮəmak ħani?
S.TRANSL: But what made this convention, attended by only about 150 people, so noteworthy?

S.FORM: Sarocoden ko Faloco' to Masaka Limlaan a Demak
Sarocoden ko Faloco' to Masaka Limlaan a Demak
S.PHON: saro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮən ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ to~u masaka ɾimɾaan a ɬ~ɮəmak
S.TRANSL: Keep Your Eyes on the Big Issue

S.FORM: Samaan ko demak ita nga' eca ka fiyor no mararaway a coos?
Samaan ko demak ita nga' eca ka fiyor no mararaway a coos?
S.PHON: samaan ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak ita ŋaʡ əʦa ka fijo~ur no~u mararawaj a ʦo~uo~us?
S.TRANSL: How can we protect ourselves against the enticement of immoral desires?

S.FORM: Kalimelaan ko sapihapinang a 'icel no malohemay malitengay, o hatiniay a 'icel nga'ay padama cangranan mihapinang to polong no demak.
Kalimelaan ko sapihapinang a 'icel no malohemay malitengay, o hatiniay a 'icel nga'ay padama cangranan mihapinang to polong no demak.
S.PHON: kaɾiməɾaan ko~u sapiħapinaŋ a ʡiʦəɾ no~u maɾo~uħəmaj maɾitəŋaj, o~u ħatiniaj a ʡiʦəɾ ŋaʡaj paɬ~ɮama ʦaŋranan miħapinaŋ to~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: Above all, they needed Jehovah's holy spirit, which would enable them to reflect his insight, mercy, and justice.

S.FORM: So'linay i, awaay ko pakayraan ita pa'ayaw a misaday to mamifekad a demak.
So'linay i, awaay ko pakayraan ita pa'ayaw a misaday to mamifekad a demak.
S.PHON: so~uʡɾinaj i, awaaj ko~u pakajraan ita paʡajaw a misaɬ~ɮaj to~u mamifəkaɬ~ɮ a ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: Of course, we cannot prepare for every conceivable possibility.

S.FORM: Wa misetek kiso to faloco' misamaan to demak?
Wa misetek kiso to faloco' misamaan to demak?
S.PHON: wa misətək kiso~u to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ misamaan to~u ɬ~ɮəmak?
S.TRANSL: What reasons do you have for wanting to be generous?

S.FORM: MALAHECIAY DEMAK NO MITA
MALAHECIAY DEMAK NO MITA
S.PHON: maɾaħəʦiaj ɬ~ɮəmak no~u mita
S.TRANSL: FROM OUR ARCHIVES

S.FORM: Salakat, kakilimen no malohemay malitengay ko so'linay mifekaday a demak.
Salakat, kakilimen no malohemay malitengay ko so'linay mifekaday a demak.
S.PHON: saɾakat, kakiɾimən no~u maɾo~uħəmaj maɾitəŋaj ko~u so~uʡɾinaj mifəkaɬ~ɮaj a ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: First, the elders needed to establish the facts.

S.FORM: Misaka dademakan iso ko pasalat micowat to demak no Hongti Kitakit anca micangacang to patosokan no niyah?
Misaka dademakan iso ko pasalat micowat to demak no Hongti Kitakit anca micangacang to patosokan no niyah?
S.PHON: misaka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakan iso~u ko~u pasaɾat miʦo~uwat to~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u ħo~uŋti kitakit anʦa miʦaŋaʦaŋ to~u pato~uso~ukan no~u nijaħ?
S.TRANSL: Are you using your freedom of choice to advance the Kingdom work or your own interests?

S.FORM: Tahira i romi'ad ni Nowa, 'adihayay miedefay ko mari'angay a demak icowacowa.'
Tahira i romi'ad ni Nowa, 'adihayay miedefay ko mari'angay a demak icowacowa.'
S.PHON: taħira i ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ni no~uwa, ʡaɬ~ɮiħajaj miəɬ~ɮəfaj ko~u mariʡaŋaj a ɬ~ɮəmak iʦo~uwaʦo~uwa.ʡ
S.TRANSL: In fact, in Noah's day, "the earth was filled with violence."

S.FORM: O manan ko araaw noni mitosilay demak hani?
O manan ko araaw noni mitosilay demak hani?
S.PHON: o~u manan ko~u araaw no~uni mito~usiɾaj ɬ~ɮəmak ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why was the campaign organized?

S.FORM: Kalo a tamdaw pasangaran a cipinang, hano nga'ay kita pakayni i kiyaho a milahecito adihayay demak.
Kalo a tamdaw pasangaran a cipinang, hano nga'ay kita pakayni i kiyaho a milahecito adihayay demak.
S.PHON: kaɾo~u a tamɬ~ɮaw pasaŋaran a ʦipinaŋ, ħano~u ŋaʡaj kita pakajni i kijaħo~u a miɾaħəʦito~u aɬ~ɮiħajaj ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: Onlookers cannot understand how it is possible for us to do all this work using only voluntary donations.

S.FORM: Micangacang to hafay hano mamikayhid to tamdaw misilikor to no'adingoan a demak?
Micangacang to hafay hano mamikayhid to tamdaw misilikor to no'adingoan a demak?
S.PHON: miʦaŋaʦaŋ to~u ħafaj ħano~u mamikajħiɬ~ɮ to~u tamɬ~ɮaw misiɾiko~ur to~u no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan a ɬ~ɮəmak?
S.TRANSL: How could seeking material advantages cause some to put aside spiritual pursuits?

S.FORM: Faheka'ay kako milomal ko salikaka ci Polayse toniya demak i, matawaay ko pising.
Faheka'ay kako milomal ko salikaka ci Polayse toniya demak i, matawaay ko pising.
S.PHON: faħəkaʡaj kako~u miɾo~umaɾ ko~u saɾikaka ʦi po~uɾajsə to~unija ɬ~ɮəmak i, matawaaj ko~u pisiŋ.
S.TRANSL: I was surprised to see Brother Hughes smile at the memory.

S.FORM: Matongal matongal mafana' tano harateng Ningra a minengneng to demak.
Matongal matongal mafana' tano harateng Ningra a minengneng to demak.
S.PHON: mato~uŋaɾ mato~uŋaɾ mafanaʡ tano~u ħaratəŋ niŋra a minəŋnəŋ to~u ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: Progressively, we make Jehovah's thoughts our own.

S.FORM: Pakayni toniya demak pasowalay ci Pitiro: "Naniti:yaho kamo a midemak to kaolahan no roma a finacadan a demak a ma'otit, ma'anof, malasang, haliacang tono hekal. Malaliepah kamo. O ka'osian ko demak namo a mita'ong to samiyay.

Pakayni toniya demak pasowalay ci Pitiro: "Naniti:yaho kamo a midemak to kaolahan no roma a finacadan a demak a ma'otit, ma'anof, malasang, haliacang tono hekal. Malaliepah kamo. O ka'osian ko demak namo a mita'ong to samiyay.
S.PHON: pakajni to~unija ɬ~ɮəmak paso~uwaɾaj ʦi pitiro~u: "naniti:jaħo~u kamo~u a miɬ~ɮəmak to~u kao~uɾaħan no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan a ɬ~ɮəmak a maʡo~utit, maʡano~uf, maɾasaŋ, ħaɾiaʦaŋ to~uno~u ħəkaɾ. maɾaɾiəpaħ kamo~u. o~u kaʡo~usian ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak namo~u a mitaʡo~uŋ to~u samijaj.
S.TRANSL: Peter further reminded Christians in his day: "The time that has passed by is sufficient for you to have done the will of the nations when you carried on in acts of brazen conduct, unbridled passions, overdrinking, wild parties, drinking bouts, and lawless idolatries.", 1 Pet.

S.FORM: Tada o nga'ayay a toki koni a micowat to mitosilay a demak itira.
Tada o nga'ayay a toki koni a micowat to mitosilay a demak itira.
S.PHON: taɬ~ɮa o~u ŋaʡajaj a to~uki ko~uni a miʦo~uwat to~u mito~usiɾaj a ɬ~ɮəmak itira.
S.TRANSL: This was clearly an opportunity to expand our ministry.

S.FORM: O faelohay kasakopang ni Loci 1,600 kongli ko raay to kitiraan i salakat, sanay, "saka nanamaw to faelohay kasakopang, misa'icel mirienang to mitosilay demak.
O faelohay kasakopang ni Loci 1,600 kongli ko raay to kitiraan i salakat, sanay, "saka nanamaw to faelohay kasakopang, misa'icel mirienang to mitosilay demak.
S.PHON: o~u faəɾo~uħaj kasako~upaŋ ni ɾo~uʦi *,*** ko~uŋɾi ko~u raaj to~u kitiraan i saɾakat, sanaj, "saka nanamaw to~u faəɾo~uħaj kasako~upaŋ, misaʡiʦəɾ miriənaŋ to~u mito~usiɾaj ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: Roger, who moved to an area over 1,000 miles over 1,600 km away from where he lived, says: "The best way to adapt to a new congregation is to go in field service as often as possible.

S.FORM: Pasifana' ko tarokos ci Pawlo to Krisciyang mapakalalok i, hano pasowal cangranan to 'tongalen ko pihaen to demak' hani?
Pasifana' ko tarokos ci Pawlo to Krisciyang mapakalalok i, hano pasowal cangranan to 'tongalen ko pihaen to demak' hani?
S.PHON: pasifanaʡ ko~u taro~uko~us ʦi pawɾo~u to~u krisʦijaŋ mapakaɾaɾo~uk i, ħano~u paso~uwaɾ ʦaŋranan to~u ʡto~uŋaɾən ko~u piħaən to~u ɬ~ɮəmakʡ ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why did the apostle Paul use the expression "all the more so" when he instructed Christians to encourage one another?

S.FORM: O manan ko demak noni misasingdiay tamdaw toha sapicakayaw tora matekesay ko 'aca a cinco?
O manan ko demak noni misasingdiay tamdaw toha sapicakayaw tora matekesay ko 'aca a cinco?
S.PHON: o~u manan ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~uni misasiŋɬ~ɮiaj tamɬ~ɮaw to~uħa sapiʦakajaw to~ura matəkəsaj ko~u ʡaʦa a ʦinʦo~u?
S.TRANSL: What was the merchant in Jesus' illustration willing to do to gain the priceless pearl?

S.FORM: Oniya Piharatengan a Sa'opo palacecayay kitaanan, awaay ko roma demak to nganga'ay a pakarini!
Oniya Piharatengan a Sa'opo palacecayay kitaanan, awaay ko roma demak to nganga'ay a pakarini!
S.PHON: o~unija piħaratəŋan a saʡo~upo~u paɾaʦəʦajaj kitaanan, awaaj ko~u ro~uma ɬ~ɮəmak to~u ŋaŋaʡaj a pakarini!
S.TRANSL: Each year, this observance is the most amazing unifying event that takes place on planet Earth!

S.FORM: Hamaan Papi'afasen ko Kalo Demak to Halifon Iso
Hamaan Papi'afasen ko Kalo Demak to Halifon Iso
S.PHON: ħamaan papiʡafasən ko~u kaɾo~u ɬ~ɮəmak to~u ħaɾifo~un iso~u
S.TRANSL: Let Nothing Deprive You of the Prize

S.FORM: Patalipa'elalay ci Pawlo to Krisciyang, wa sinanoten ko manan a demak?
Patalipa'elalay ci Pawlo to Krisciyang, wa sinanoten ko manan a demak?
S.PHON: pataɾipaʡəɾaɾaj ʦi pawɾo~u to~u krisʦijaŋ, wa sinano~utən ko~u manan a ɬ~ɮəmak?
S.TRANSL: Paul alerted fellow Christians about what dangers?

S.FORM: O lipahak samaanay padama kitaanan i mitosilay demak?
O lipahak samaanay padama kitaanan i mitosilay demak?
S.PHON: o~u ɾipaħak samaanaj paɬ~ɮama kitaanan i mito~usiɾaj ɬ~ɮəmak?
S.TRANSL: How does joy affect our ministry?

S.FORM: Kawra, mapacakay tayra i Icip to ikor no 13 miheca, mafalicayto ko demak.
Kawra, mapacakay tayra i Icip to ikor no 13 miheca, mafalicayto ko demak.
S.PHON: kawra, mapaʦakaj tajra i iʦip to~u iko~ur no~u ** miħəʦa, mafaɾiʦajto~u ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: But after 13 years, everything changed very quickly.

S.FORM: Micalepay mihapinang to demak
Micalepay mihapinang to demak
S.PHON: miʦaɾəpaj miħapinaŋ to~u ɬ~ɮəmak
S.TRANSL: It gave him wisdom and knowledge and insight.

S.FORM: Kasapaan demak Iso,
Kasapaan demak Iso,
S.PHON: kasapaan ɬ~ɮəmak iso~u,
S.TRANSL: There's no other in the heavens

S.FORM: Pakayni i pakalalok to salikaka a demak, patirengay ko tarokos ci Pawlo to nga'ayay a ta'arawan.
Pakayni i pakalalok to salikaka a demak, patirengay ko tarokos ci Pawlo to nga'ayay a ta'arawan.
S.PHON: pakajni i pakaɾaɾo~uk to~u saɾikaka a ɬ~ɮəmak, patirəŋaj ko~u taro~uko~us ʦi pawɾo~u to~u ŋaʡajaj a taʡarawan.
S.TRANSL: In the first century, perhaps the apostle who did the most to encourage his brothers was the apostle Paul.

S.FORM: Wa hapinangen no malohemay malitengay ko mifekaday a demak, wa milimasmas to miiingay alatek.
Wa hapinangen no malohemay malitengay ko mifekaday a demak, wa milimasmas to miiingay alatek.
S.PHON: wa ħapinaŋən no~u maɾo~uħəmaj maɾitəŋaj ko~u mifəkaɬ~ɮaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, wa miɾimasmas to~u miiiŋaj aɾatək.
S.TRANSL: Depending on the particulars, it may warrant judicial action.

S.FORM: Misakafahay demak misamaanay mifiyor to noka'orip iso?
Misakafahay demak misamaanay mifiyor to noka'orip iso?
S.PHON: misakafaħaj ɬ~ɮəmak misamaanaj mifijo~ur to~u no~ukaʡo~urip iso~u?
S.TRANSL: What could a life in the pioneer service lead to?

S.FORM: Kawraan, 'ayaw no mamalinah ko salikaka tayra i Miyanmar samaanay ko demak hani?
Kawraan, 'ayaw no mamalinah ko salikaka tayra i Miyanmar samaanay ko demak hani?
S.PHON: kawraan, ʡajaw no~u mamaɾinaħ ko~u saɾikaka tajra i mijanmar samaanaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak ħani?
S.TRANSL: But what about the practical steps involved in making the decision to move to Myanmar?

S.FORM: Sasamaan ko demak ita nga', eca ka lahedaw ko epoc no makapahay faloco' hani?
Sasamaan ko demak ita nga', eca ka lahedaw ko epoc no makapahay faloco' hani?
S.PHON: sasamaan ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak ita ŋaʡ, əʦa ka ɾaħəɬ~ɮaw ko~u əpo~uʦ no~u makapaħaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ħani?
S.TRANSL: How can we prevent our conscience from becoming ineffective?

S.FORM: Misamaanay a padama to mitosilay demak hani?
Misamaanay a padama to mitosilay demak hani?
S.PHON: misamaanaj a paɬ~ɮama to~u mito~usiɾaj ɬ~ɮəmak ħani?
S.TRANSL: How can this help us as public instructors of the good news?

S.FORM: Misahalaka to demak i, hano sinanoten ko faloco' iso?
Misahalaka to demak i, hano sinanoten ko faloco' iso?
S.PHON: misaħaɾaka to~u ɬ~ɮəmak i, ħano~u sinano~utən ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ iso~u?
S.TRANSL: How does making plans involve your heart?

S.FORM: Mihaen to demak kita, o nganga'ayto a pakaliyas to raraw ato patay, milifok to so'linay pasalat.
Mihaen to demak kita, o nganga'ayto a pakaliyas to raraw ato patay, milifok to so'linay pasalat.
S.PHON: miħaən to~u ɬ~ɮəmak kita, o~u ŋaŋaʡajto~u a pakaɾijas to~u raraw ato~u pataj, miɾifo~uk to~u so~uʡɾinaj pasaɾat.
S.TRANSL: This, in turn, opens up the prospect of being completely liberated from enslavement to sin and death.

S.FORM: ' Ikorto padotoc to milengoan a demak.
' Ikorto padotoc to milengoan a demak.
S.PHON: ʡ iko~urto~u paɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u miɾəŋo~uan a ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: Then I continue with the point of my story.

S.FORM: Oniya saparadiw o paparihaday to faloco' ita, misaday a mitengil to kamok no taykay.
Oniya saparadiw o paparihaday to faloco' ita, misaday a mitengil to kamok no taykay.
S.PHON: o~unija saparaɬ~ɮiw o~u papariħaɬ~ɮaj to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ita, misaɬ~ɮaj a mitəŋiɾ to~u kamo~uk no~u tajkaj.
S.TRANSL: These orchestral arrangements are composed in such a way that they will prepare our heart and mind for the program to follow.

S.FORM: Mafana'ay Kako tisowanan, mafana'ay to manan ko raraw iso, kawra mafana'ay Kako to faloco' iso, maolahay Kako tisowanan.'
Mafana'ay Kako tisowanan, mafana'ay to manan ko raraw iso, kawra mafana'ay Kako to faloco' iso, maolahay Kako tisowanan.'
S.PHON: mafanaʡaj kako~u tiso~uwanan, mafanaʡaj to~u manan ko~u raraw iso~u, kawra mafanaʡaj kako~u to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ iso~u, mao~uɾaħaj kako~u tiso~uwanan.ʡ
S.TRANSL: I know you, I know your sins, I know your heart, and I love you.'

S.FORM: Samaan kita paihkal to olah, pakalalok to matoleday ko faloco' a salikaka hani?
Samaan kita paihkal to olah, pakalalok to matoleday ko faloco' a salikaka hani?
S.PHON: samaan kita paiħkaɾ to~u o~uɾaħ, pakaɾaɾo~uk to~u mato~uɾəɬ~ɮaj ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ a saɾikaka ħani?
S.TRANSL: How can our love build up those who experience painful emotions?

S.FORM: Toni pina miheca, marariday kako masomad matoled ko faloco'.
Toni pina miheca, marariday kako masomad matoled ko faloco'.
S.PHON: to~uni pina miħəʦa, marariɬ~ɮaj kako~u maso~umaɬ~ɮ mato~uɾəɬ~ɮ ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ.
S.TRANSL: In the last few years, I have felt heartbreak, depression, and grief.

S.FORM: Harateng niyam nohatini matongalayto ko pakaso'linay faloco'."
Harateng niyam nohatini matongalayto ko pakaso'linay faloco'."
S.PHON: ħaratəŋ nijam no~uħatini mato~uŋaɾajto~u ko~u pakaso~uʡɾinaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ."
S.TRANSL: We come out better people."

S.FORM: Wa nga'ay pakaso'lin kita "o sini'adaay ko faloco' a tamdaw, o mamalemed."
Wa nga'ay pakaso'lin kita "o sini'adaay ko faloco' a tamdaw, o mamalemed."
S.PHON: wa ŋaʡaj pakaso~uʡɾin kita "o~u siniʡaɬ~ɮaaj ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u mamaɾəməɬ~ɮ."
S.TRANSL: We can be assured that "the generous person will be blessed."

S.FORM: Misamaanay hano pa'icel ko tokel to paso'linay faloco' ni Nowa?
Misamaanay hano pa'icel ko tokel to paso'linay faloco' ni Nowa?
S.PHON: misamaanaj ħano~u paʡiʦəɾ ko~u to~ukəɾ to~u paso~uʡɾinaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ni no~uwa?
S.TRANSL: How did hope reinforce Noah's faith?

S.FORM: Milengo i tamdaw to pidoyongan iso, wa samaan pa'icel to paso'linay faloco' no miso?
Milengo i tamdaw to pidoyongan iso, wa samaan pa'icel to paso'linay faloco' no miso?
S.PHON: miɾəŋo~u i tamɬ~ɮaw to~u piɬ~ɮo~ujo~uŋan iso~u, wa samaan paʡiʦəɾ to~u paso~uʡɾinaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u miso~u?
S.TRANSL: How can the ministry help you to strengthen your faith?

S.FORM: O maanan a tolo pakayraan ko papa'icel to faloco' ita, midoedo to so'linay kimad a midemak?
O maanan a tolo pakayraan ko papa'icel to faloco' ita, midoedo to so'linay kimad a midemak?
S.PHON: o~u maanan a to~uɾo~u pakajraan ko~u papaʡiʦəɾ to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ita, miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u so~uʡɾinaj kimaɬ~ɮ a miɬ~ɮəmak?
S.TRANSL: What are three ways that we can strengthen our resolve to walk in the truth?

S.FORM: Saka tosa, seteken ita ko faloco' to romi'ami'ad midoedo to so'linay kimad a midemak.
Saka tosa, seteken ita ko faloco' to romi'ami'ad midoedo to so'linay kimad a midemak.
S.PHON: saka to~usa, sətəkən ita ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ to~u ro~umiʡamiʡaɬ~ɮ miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u so~uʡɾinaj kimaɬ~ɮ a miɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: Second, be firmly resolved to live in harmony with the truth day by day.

S.FORM: O makapahay faloco' samaanen misaka dademek hani?
O makapahay faloco' samaanen misaka dademek hani?
S.PHON: o~u makapaħaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ samaanən misaka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmək ħani?
S.TRANSL: How do Jehovah's principles and our conscience interact?

S.FORM: O fafahiyan Krisciyang misamaan nga' malifok ko faloco' no fa'inay hani?
O fafahiyan Krisciyang misamaan nga' malifok ko faloco' no fa'inay hani?
S.PHON: o~u fafaħijan krisʦijaŋ misamaan ŋaʡ maɾifo~uk ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u faʡinaj ħani?
S.TRANSL: How could a Christian sister win over her unbelieving husband?

S.FORM: O mitolonay misamaanay mihinom to faloco' ita?
O mitolonay misamaanay mihinom to faloco' ita?
S.PHON: o~u mito~uɾo~unaj misamaanaj miħino~um to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ita?
S.TRANSL: How can prayer provide us with comfort?

S.FORM: Samaanen iso miremo ko hatiraay a adada no faloco' hani?
Samaanen iso miremo ko hatiraay a adada no faloco' hani?
S.PHON: samaanən iso~u mirəmo~u ko~u ħatiraaj a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ħani?
S.TRANSL: How can you cope with the pain that this brings?

S.FORM: Nolatek, edengan ora citirengay a tamdaw ko mamafana' to hakowaay ko nika adada no faloco', latek pasangaran nanay tano sowal a patahekal to kemod no faloco'.
Nolatek, edengan ora citirengay a tamdaw ko mamafana' to hakowaay ko nika adada no faloco', latek pasangaran nanay tano sowal a patahekal to kemod no faloco'.
S.PHON: no~uɾatək, əɬ~ɮəŋan o~ura ʦitirəŋaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u mamafanaʡ to~u ħako~uwaaj ko~u nika aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ, ɾatək pasaŋaran nanaj tano~u so~uwaɾ a pataħəkaɾ to~u kəmo~uɬ~ɮ no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ.
S.TRANSL: At times, only a person's own heart grasps the full depth of the emotional pain, and it may be difficult for him to voice his innermost feelings.

S.FORM: Misamaanay hano mafana' patahekal ko tamdaw to sini'adaay a faloco'?
Misamaanay hano mafana' patahekal ko tamdaw to sini'adaay a faloco'?
S.PHON: misamaanaj ħano~u mafanaʡ pataħəkaɾ ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~u siniʡaɬ~ɮaaj a faɾo~uʦo~uʡ?
S.TRANSL: What shows that compassion is part of human nature?

S.FORM: "Safa'ina'inayan Sa'icelen ko Faloco', Pisatapangto Kiso Imatini a Matayal"
"Safa'ina'inayan Sa'icelen ko Faloco', Pisatapangto Kiso Imatini a Matayal"
S.PHON: "safaʡinaʡinajan saʡiʦəɾən ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ, pisatapaŋto~u kiso~u imatini a matajaɾ"
S.TRANSL: "Be Courageous... and Go to Work"

S.FORM: Tingalawayto ko faloco' ni Taniil nohatini, mapanilnilay malo padamaay a sikawdan.
Tingalawayto ko faloco' ni Taniil nohatini, mapanilnilay malo padamaay a sikawdan.
S.PHON: tiŋaɾawajto~u ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ni taniiɾ no~uħatini, mapaniɾniɾaj maɾo~u paɬ~ɮamaaj a sikawɬ~ɮan.
S.TRANSL: Today, Daniel has a clean conscience, and he was recently appointed as a ministerial servant.

S.FORM: Pakayni 'Olic 32:8, palahad to pakaso'linay faloco' iraay ko maanan a epoc hani?
Pakayni 'Olic 32:8, palahad to pakaso'linay faloco' iraay ko maanan a epoc hani?
S.PHON: pakajni ʡo~uɾiʦ **:*, paɾaħaɬ~ɮ to~u pakaso~uʡɾinaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ iraaj ko~u maanan a əpo~uʦ ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why is faith important, and what are its benefits, as mentioned at Psalm 32:8?

S.FORM: Nolitengan a madimadiay sikawdan misamaanay pakayni pitolon a mahinom ko faloco'?
Nolitengan a madimadiay sikawdan misamaanay pakayni pitolon a mahinom ko faloco'?
S.PHON: no~uɾitəŋan a maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮiaj sikawɬ~ɮan misamaanaj pakajni pito~uɾo~un a maħino~um ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ?
S.TRANSL: How did prayer prove to be of comfort to some mentioned in the Bible?

S.FORM: Haratengen hena, ta miliyas ko Israil to Papilon i, samaanay ko faloco' nangra.
Haratengen hena, ta miliyas ko Israil to Papilon i, samaanay ko faloco' nangra.
S.PHON: ħaratəŋən ħəna, ta miɾijas ko~u israiɾ to~u papiɾo~un i, samaanaj ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ naŋra.
S.TRANSL: Imagine how the exiled Israelites must have felt in Babylon.

S.FORM: Mahawpay ko sida'itay anca sini'adaay a faloco'.
Mahawpay ko sida'itay anca sini'adaay a faloco'.
S.PHON: maħawpaj ko~u siɬ~ɮaʡitaj anʦa siniʡaɬ~ɮaaj a faɾo~uʦo~uʡ.
S.TRANSL: It can include affection and warmth.

S.FORM: Taharoray ci Hana samaanay mahinom ko faloco' ningra?
Taharoray ci Hana samaanay mahinom ko faloco' ningra?
S.PHON: taħaro~uraj ʦi ħana samaanaj maħino~um ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ niŋra?
S.TRANSL: How did Hannah find relief from distress?

S.FORM: Hano caka nga'ay mahofoc to wawa matoled ko faloco'?
Hano caka nga'ay mahofoc to wawa matoled ko faloco'?
S.PHON: ħano~u ʦaka ŋaʡaj maħo~ufo~uʦ to~u wawa mato~uɾəɬ~ɮ ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ?
S.TRANSL: How can an unfulfilled desire to have children cause distress?

S.FORM: Tiya matoled ko faloco' ni Marte, macadaay ningra ko maanan a sapadama?
Tiya matoled ko faloco' ni Marte, macadaay ningra ko maanan a sapadama?
S.PHON: tija mato~uɾəɬ~ɮ ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ni martə, maʦaɬ~ɮaaj niŋra ko~u maanan a sapaɬ~ɮama?
S.TRANSL: How was Marthe helped during a period of depression?

S.FORM: Misamaanay miketon kiso to faloco' a misarocod to halifon?
Misamaanay miketon kiso to faloco' a misarocod to halifon?
S.PHON: misamaanaj mikəto~un kiso~u to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ a misaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ħaɾifo~un?
S.TRANSL: Why are you resolved to keep your eyes on the prize?

S.FORM: Maherek miasip toni lalakaw, wa samaanto ko sa'osi no faloco' iso?
Maherek miasip toni lalakaw, wa samaanto ko sa'osi no faloco' iso?
S.PHON: maħərək miasip to~uni ɾaɾakaw, wa samaanto~u ko~u saʡo~usi no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ iso~u?
S.TRANSL: How has this article encouraged you?

S.FORM: Samaan kita mahecad ci Nowaan palahad to tanoktokay a paso'lin no faloco'?
Samaan kita mahecad ci Nowaan palahad to tanoktokay a paso'lin no faloco'?
S.PHON: samaan kita maħəʦaɬ~ɮ ʦi no~uwaan paɾaħaɬ~ɮ to~u tano~ukto~ukaj a paso~uʡɾin no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ?
S.TRANSL: How can we imitate Noah's faith?

S.FORM: O roma Krisciyang marorayay ko faloco' to nano raraw isa'ayaw, o milifetan ni Pawlo wa nga'ay misamaan pakalalok cangranan?
O roma Krisciyang marorayay ko faloco' to nano raraw isa'ayaw, o milifetan ni Pawlo wa nga'ay misamaan pakalalok cangranan?
S.PHON: o~u ro~uma krisʦijaŋ maro~urajaj ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ to~u nano~u raraw isaʡajaw, o~u miɾifətan ni pawɾo~u wa ŋaʡaj misamaan pakaɾaɾo~uk ʦaŋranan?
S.TRANSL: How can Paul's example help those who struggle with feelings of unworthiness?

S.FORM: Mafana'ay ci Tomas pasifana'to wawa kalimelaan ko mahadidiay faloco'.
Mafana'ay ci Tomas pasifana'to wawa kalimelaan ko mahadidiay faloco'.
S.PHON: mafanaʡaj ʦi to~umas pasifanaʡto~u wawa kaɾiməɾaan ko~u maħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮiaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ.
S.TRANSL: As Thomas knows, teaching takes patience.

S.FORM: Cariraway ko faloco',
Cariraway ko faloco',
S.PHON: ʦarirawaj ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ,
S.TRANSL: When worries weigh upon my mind

S.FORM: O cango'otay to maolahay faloco' a tamdaw patahekalay to manan tatiihay a pinangan?
O cango'otay to maolahay faloco' a tamdaw patahekalay to manan tatiihay a pinangan?
S.PHON: o~u ʦaŋo~uʡo~utaj to~u mao~uɾaħaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ a tamɬ~ɮaw pataħəkaɾaj to~u manan tatiiħaj a pinaŋan?
S.TRANSL: To what extent do true Christians love their fellow man?

S.FORM: Wa nga'ay kita misamaan mitodong ci Nowaan, paihekal to paso'linay faloco' ato midoedoay?
Wa nga'ay kita misamaan mitodong ci Nowaan, paihekal to paso'linay faloco' ato midoedoay?
S.PHON: wa ŋaʡaj kita misamaan mito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ʦi no~uwaan, paiħəkaɾ to~u paso~uʡɾinaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ato~u miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uaj?
S.TRANSL: How can we imitate Noah's faith and obedience?

S.FORM: Hano misetek ko faloco' iso 'mihadidi a ciheci' hani?
Hano misetek ko faloco' iso 'mihadidi a ciheci' hani?
S.PHON: ħano~u misətək ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ iso~u ʡmiħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮi a ʦiħəʦiʡ ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why are you determined to "bear fruit with endurance"?

S.FORM: Tano Sarikec ato Safalod no Kawas Pahatatanam to Makapahay Faloco'
Tano Sarikec ato Safalod no Kawas Pahatatanam to Makapahay Faloco'
S.PHON: tano~u sarikəʦ ato~u safaɾo~uɬ~ɮ no~u kawas paħatatanam to~u makapaħaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ
S.TRANSL: Let God's Laws and Principles Train Your Conscience

S.FORM: Misarocod kita midopo to sakayat ni Kristo, wa nga'ay pa'icel to pakaso'linay faloco' no tao, wa nga'ayho micowat to kakelec i kalala'ed.
Misarocod kita midopo to sakayat ni Kristo, wa nga'ay pa'icel to pakaso'linay faloco' no tao, wa nga'ayho micowat to kakelec i kalala'ed.
S.PHON: misaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ kita miɬ~ɮo~upo~u to~u sakajat ni kristo~u, wa ŋaʡaj paʡiʦəɾ to~u pakaso~uʡɾinaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u tao~u, wa ŋaʡajħo~u miʦo~uwat to~u kakəɾəʦ i kaɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: When we earnestly uphold Christ's direction, we strengthen the faith of others and contribute to unity.

S.FORM: Misapoener to faloco' hano masaka limlaan?
Misapoener to faloco' hano masaka limlaan?
S.PHON: misapo~uənər to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ħano~u masaka ɾimɾaan?
S.TRANSL: Why is modesty still important?

S.FORM: Samaan kita mahecad ci Yopuan palahad to tanoktokay a paso'lin no faloco'?
Samaan kita mahecad ci Yopuan palahad to tanoktokay a paso'lin no faloco'?
S.PHON: samaan kita maħəʦaɬ~ɮ ʦi jo~upo~u~uan paɾaħaɬ~ɮ to~u tano~ukto~ukaj a paso~uʡɾin no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ?
S.TRANSL: How we cultivate faith like Job's.

S.FORM: O manan ko papadama to mapatayay ko salawina, miadah to adada no faloco' hani?
O manan ko papadama to mapatayay ko salawina, miadah to adada no faloco' hani?
S.PHON: o~u manan ko~u papaɬ~ɮama to~u mapatajaj ko~u saɾawina, miaɬ~ɮaħ to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ħani?
S.TRANSL: What, specifically, can help bereaved individuals heal their painful emotional wounds?

S.FORM: Cowa ka ciharateng ci Taniayer to mamalo miadaay to faloco' no tao, misaka dademakan ningra ko nalifetan no niyah a padama ko ciekangay a salikaka.
Cowa ka ciharateng ci Taniayer to mamalo miadaay to faloco' no tao, misaka dademakan ningra ko nalifetan no niyah a padama ko ciekangay a salikaka.
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa ka ʦiħaratəŋ ʦi taniajər to~u mamaɾo~u miaɬ~ɮaaj to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u tao~u, misaka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakan niŋra ko~u naɾifətan no~u nijaħ a paɬ~ɮama ko~u ʦiəkaŋaj a saɾikaka.
S.TRANSL: Danièle never claimed to be a counselor; yet, she used her experience to help many sisters not to fear cancer.

S.FORM: Tadtaden, samaan a fanekfeken ko faloco' to ngiha' no niyah.
Tadtaden, samaan a fanekfeken ko faloco' to ngiha' no niyah.
S.PHON: taɬ~ɮtaɬ~ɮən, samaan a fanəkfəkən ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ to~u ŋiħaʡ no~u nijaħ.
S.TRANSL: Explain how we can increase our confidence in our singing.

S.FORM: Nawhani ano icowa ko dafong odo' namo i, itira ko faloco' namo."
Nawhani ano icowa ko dafong odo' namo i, itira ko faloco' namo."
S.PHON: nawħani ano~u iʦo~uwa ko~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ o~uɬ~ɮo~uʡ namo~u i, itira ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ namo~u."
S.TRANSL: For where your treasure is, there your hearts will be also."

S.FORM: Mankora, "safa'ina'inayan sa'icelen ko faloco'... a matayal."
Mankora, "safa'ina'inayan sa'icelen ko faloco'... a matayal."
S.PHON: manko~ura, "safaʡinaʡinajan saʡiʦəɾən ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ... a matajaɾ."
S.TRANSL: Therefore, "be courageous... and go to work."

S.FORM: O manan ko papadama kitanan fanekfek ko faloco' misi'ayaw to noikoran?
O manan ko papadama kitanan fanekfek ko faloco' misi'ayaw to noikoran?
S.PHON: o~u manan ko~u papaɬ~ɮama kitanan fanəkfək ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ misiʡajaw to~u no~uiko~uran?
S.TRANSL: What will help us to face the future with full confidence?

S.FORM: Mitoor ko tamdaw to makapahay faloco', wa mahecad ko misa'osian han? Patinakoen.
Mitoor ko tamdaw to makapahay faloco', wa mahecad ko misa'osian han? Patinakoen.
S.PHON: mito~uo~ur ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~u makapaħaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ, wa maħəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u misaʡo~usian ħan? patinako~uən.
S.TRANSL: How may consciences differ?

S.FORM: Midotiman no Faloco'
Midotiman no Faloco'
S.PHON: miɬ~ɮo~utiman no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ
S.TRANSL: The Meditation of My Heart

S.FORM: Mihaen ko picalep a micekiw, wa padama kitaanan tanektek ko pakaso'linay faloco'.
Mihaen ko picalep a micekiw, wa padama kitaanan tanektek ko pakaso'linay faloco'.
S.PHON: miħaən ko~u piʦaɾəp a miʦəkiw, wa paɬ~ɮama kitaanan tanəktək ko~u pakaso~uʡɾinaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ.
S.TRANSL: This kind of study is an essential part of our spiritual feeding.

S.FORM: O kaemangay tamdaw mamisamaan misahalaka to noka'orip no niyah? Kawra hano cowa ko papakidem a calemcem ko faloco' nangra.
O kaemangay tamdaw mamisamaan misahalaka to noka'orip no niyah? Kawra hano cowa ko papakidem a calemcem ko faloco' nangra.
S.PHON: o~u kaəmaŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw mamisamaan misaħaɾaka to~u no~ukaʡo~urip no~u nijaħ? kawra ħano~u ʦo~uwa ko~u papakiɬ~ɮəm a ʦaɾəmʦəm ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ naŋra.
S.TRANSL: What must a young person decide about the future, but why is there no need to be overly anxious?

S.FORM: Misatapang ano caka olah ko tamdaw, hamaan matoled ko faloco' no mita
Misatapang ano caka olah ko tamdaw, hamaan matoled ko faloco' no mita
S.PHON: misatapaŋ ano~u ʦaka o~uɾaħ ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, ħamaan mato~uɾəɬ~ɮ ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u mita
S.TRANSL: Do not be frustrated if a person does not initially show interest

S.FORM: Kapalal ko Faloco' a Tanektek
Kapalal ko Faloco' a Tanektek
S.PHON: kapaɾaɾ ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ a tanəktək
S.TRANSL: Stay Awake, Stand Firm, Grow Mighty

S.FORM: O makapahay faloco' hano mahecad to lasingfang hani?
O makapahay faloco' hano mahecad to lasingfang hani?
S.PHON: o~u makapaħaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ħano~u maħəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u ɾasiŋfaŋ ħani?
S.TRANSL: How can your conscience serve as a moral compass?

S.FORM: Sarocoden ko Faloco' Micangacang to No'adingoan a Odo'
Sarocoden ko Faloco' Micangacang to No'adingoan a Odo'
S.PHON: saro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮən ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ miʦaŋaʦaŋ to~u no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan a o~uɬ~ɮo~uʡ
S.TRANSL: Set Your Heart on Spiritual Treasures

S.FORM: Dotoc wa minengneng kita, o maanan pakayraan pasangaray paihkal to misapoeneray faloco', o litengan a madimadiay sikawdan, samaanay misi'ayaw tohatiniay a pakayraan.
Dotoc wa minengneng kita, o maanan pakayraan pasangaray paihkal to misapoeneray faloco', o litengan a madimadiay sikawdan, samaanay misi'ayaw tohatiniay a pakayraan.
S.PHON: ɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ wa minəŋnəŋ kita, o~u maanan pakajraan pasaŋaraj paiħkaɾ to~u misapo~uənəraj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ, o~u ɾitəŋan a maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮiaj sikawɬ~ɮan, samaanaj misiʡajaw to~uħatiniaj a pakajraan.
S.TRANSL: Let us consider some different situations in which our humility might be put to the test and see how similar challenges were met by faithful ones of old.

S.FORM: Mamilayap to manan a sapalemed ko misapoeneray to faloco' a tamdaw?
Mamilayap to manan a sapalemed ko misapoeneray to faloco' a tamdaw?
S.PHON: mamiɾajap to~u manan a sapaɾəməɬ~ɮ ko~u misapo~uənəraj to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ a tamɬ~ɮaw?
S.TRANSL: What are the rewards for being humble?

S.FORM: Miki'okay to sowal ci Yihofa o papakowaden koya matoleday ko faloco' a tamdaw.
Miki'okay to sowal ci Yihofa o papakowaden koya matoleday ko faloco' a tamdaw.
S.PHON: mikiʡo~ukaj to~u so~uwaɾ ʦi jiħo~ufa o~u papako~uwaɬ~ɮən ko~uja mato~uɾəɬ~ɮaj ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ a tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: His assurance that the temple would be built must have brought hope to their tired hearts.

S.FORM: Samaan kita mitodong to Kawas, paihekal to sini'adaay faloco' i tamdaw?
Samaan kita mitodong to Kawas, paihekal to sini'adaay faloco' i tamdaw?
S.PHON: samaan kita mito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u kawas, paiħəkaɾ to~u siniʡaɬ~ɮaaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ i tamɬ~ɮaw?
S.TRANSL: In our dealings with others, how can we reflect God's compassion?

S.FORM: Wa samaan kita pitodong ci Taniilan, paihekal to paso'linay faloco' ato midoedoay hani?
Wa samaan kita pitodong ci Taniilan, paihekal to paso'linay faloco' ato midoedoay hani?
S.PHON: wa samaan kita pito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ʦi taniiɾan, paiħəkaɾ to~u paso~uʡɾinaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ato~u miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uaj ħani?
S.TRANSL: How we can imitate Daniel's faith and obedience.

S.FORM: Mansa mahererekto ko lalood i, matoleday ko faloco' niyam to mikowanay no kitakit ato kiyokay.
Mansa mahererekto ko lalood i, matoleday ko faloco' niyam to mikowanay no kitakit ato kiyokay.
S.PHON: mansa maħərərəkto~u ko~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i, mato~uɾəɬ~ɮaj ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ nijam to~u miko~uwanaj no~u kitakit ato~u kijo~ukaj.
S.TRANSL: By war's end, it seemed that both the church and the government had failed us.

S.FORM: Todongen ci Yihofa Patahekal to Sini'adaay Faloco'
Todongen ci Yihofa Patahekal to Sini'adaay Faloco'
S.PHON: to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋən ʦi jiħo~ufa pataħəkaɾ to~u siniʡaɬ~ɮaaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ
S.TRANSL: Imitate Jehovah's Compassion

S.FORM: Ano tahalifa kita to sapalifet, wa misa'osi to faloco' misamaan ko demak?
Ano tahalifa kita to sapalifet, wa misa'osi to faloco' misamaan ko demak?
S.PHON: ano~u taħaɾifa kita to~u sapaɾifət, wa misaʡo~usi to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ misamaan ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak?
S.TRANSL: What should be our resolve in times of trouble?

S.FORM: O manan ko padamaay cangranan paihekal to paso'linay faloco' ato midofdofay?
O manan ko padamaay cangranan paihekal to paso'linay faloco' ato midofdofay?
S.PHON: o~u manan ko~u paɬ~ɮamaaj ʦaŋranan paiħəkaɾ to~u paso~uʡɾinaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ato~u miɬ~ɮo~ufɬ~ɮo~ufaj?
S.TRANSL: What enabled them to remain faithful and obedient?

S.FORM: Nolatekay hano cowa ko madoloay patahekal to sini'adaay faloco'?
Nolatekay hano cowa ko madoloay patahekal to sini'adaay faloco'?
S.PHON: no~uɾatəkaj ħano~u ʦo~uwa ko~u maɬ~ɮo~uɾo~uaj pataħəkaɾ to~u siniʡaɬ~ɮaaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ?
S.TRANSL: Why can it sometimes be a challenge to show compassion?

S.FORM: Samanen so'linay ci Nowa mafana' to Kawas mansa ira ko paso'lin no faloco' ato taneng, midipotay koni cingranan, mangalef madipot i no'adingoan.
Samanen so'linay ci Nowa mafana' to Kawas mansa ira ko paso'lin no faloco' ato taneng, midipotay koni cingranan, mangalef madipot i no'adingoan.
S.PHON: samanən so~uʡɾinaj ʦi no~uwa mafanaʡ to~u kawas mansa ira ko~u paso~uʡɾin no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ato~u tanəŋ, miɬ~ɮipo~utaj ko~uni ʦiŋranan, maŋaɾəf maɬ~ɮipo~ut i no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan.
S.TRANSL: Accurate knowledge gave Noah faith and godly wisdom, which protected him from harm, especially spiritual harm.

S.FORM: Mihaen to demak papadama kitanan milalat to hakowaay ko olah no niyah to Kawas. Paira to so'linay lipahak ato marenec ko faloco'.
Mihaen to demak papadama kitanan milalat to hakowaay ko olah no niyah to Kawas. Paira to so'linay lipahak ato marenec ko faloco'.
S.PHON: miħaən to~u ɬ~ɮəmak papaɬ~ɮama kitanan miɾaɾat to~u ħako~uwaaj ko~u o~uɾaħ no~u nijaħ to~u kawas. paira to~u so~uʡɾinaj ɾipaħak ato~u marənəʦ ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ.
S.TRANSL: Doing so will help us evaluate and refine the love that we should show, the kind of love that brings true satisfaction and happiness.

S.FORM: Mahaen o masowalay i'ayaway a fatac, ci Pawlo pakayni caka olah no Yutaya tamdaw to lihaf no Kitakit no Kawas matoleday ko faloco'.
Mahaen o masowalay i'ayaway a fatac, ci Pawlo pakayni caka olah no Yutaya tamdaw to lihaf no Kitakit no Kawas matoleday ko faloco'.
S.PHON: maħaən o~u maso~uwaɾaj iʡajawaj a fataʦ, ʦi pawɾo~u pakajni ʦaka o~uɾaħ no~u jo~u~utaja tamɬ~ɮaw to~u ɾiħaf no~u kitakit no~u kawas mato~uɾəɬ~ɮaj ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ.
S.TRANSL: As considered, Paul felt discouraged by the Jews' negative reaction to the Kingdom message.

S.FORM: O Sini'adaay ko Faloco' a Tamdaw, O Mamalemed
O Sini'adaay ko Faloco' a Tamdaw, O Mamalemed
S.PHON: o~u siniʡaɬ~ɮaaj ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u mamaɾəməɬ~ɮ
S.TRANSL: "The Generous Person Will Be Blessed"

S.FORM: Ya tayra ko kaka ni Yosif i Icip micakay to kakaenen i, to sapihapinangaw to faloco' no kaka, misimedan ni Yosif ko tatirengan no niyah.
Ya tayra ko kaka ni Yosif i Icip micakay to kakaenen i, to sapihapinangaw to faloco' no kaka, misimedan ni Yosif ko tatirengan no niyah.
S.PHON: ja tajra ko~u kaka ni jo~usif i iʦip miʦakaj to~u kakaənən i, to~u sapiħapinaŋaw to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u kaka, misiməɬ~ɮan ni jo~usif ko~u tatirəŋan no~u nijaħ.
S.TRANSL: To understand what was in his brothers' hearts, Joseph concealed his identity when they appeared before him in Egypt to buy food.

S.FORM: Ano pasayra kiso i no'adingoan a patosokan tala'ayaw, o mamasalo ko faloco', samanen o nano demak iso, cowa ko mamalahorac.
Ano pasayra kiso i no'adingoan a patosokan tala'ayaw, o mamasalo ko faloco', samanen o nano demak iso, cowa ko mamalahorac.
S.PHON: ano~u pasajra kiso~u i no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan a pato~uso~ukan taɾaʡajaw, o~u mamasaɾo~u ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ, samanən o~u nano~u ɬ~ɮəmak iso~u, ʦo~uwa ko~u mamaɾaħo~uraʦ.
S.TRANSL: By focusing on spiritual pursuits, you are also doing a work that is truly satisfying because it is not in the least futile.

S.FORM: Sasamaan ko kapah tamdaw hoeca ka makalisanga ko faloco'?
Sasamaan ko kapah tamdaw hoeca ka makalisanga ko faloco'?
S.PHON: sasamaan ko~u kapaħ tamɬ~ɮaw ħo~uəʦa ka makaɾisaŋa ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ?
S.TRANSL: What will help youths not to be distracted?

S.FORM: Papifalicen ita ko olah to faloco' ato harateng no niyah, wa ira ko masamaanay minaro'an hani?
Papifalicen ita ko olah to faloco' ato harateng no niyah, wa ira ko masamaanay minaro'an hani?
S.PHON: papifaɾiʦən ita ko~u o~uɾaħ to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ato~u ħaratəŋ no~u nijaħ, wa ira ko~u masamaanaj minaro~uʡan ħani?
S.TRANSL: What happens when love molds our minds and hearts?

S.FORM: Ano micekiw ato midotim kita i, haratengen o patosokan ita o palahad to midofdofay to Kawas a faloco', pakahemek Cingranan.
Ano micekiw ato midotim kita i, haratengen o patosokan ita o palahad to midofdofay to Kawas a faloco', pakahemek Cingranan.
S.PHON: ano~u miʦəkiw ato~u miɬ~ɮo~utim kita i, ħaratəŋən o~u pato~uso~ukan ita o~u paɾaħaɬ~ɮ to~u miɬ~ɮo~ufɬ~ɮo~ufaj to~u kawas a faɾo~uʦo~uʡ, pakaħəmək ʦiŋranan.
S.TRANSL: Keep in mind that as we study and meditate, we should do so with the goal of developing a heartfelt desire to please Jehovah and obey his laws.

S.FORM: Samaanto ko sa'osi no faloco' iso?
Samaanto ko sa'osi no faloco' iso?
S.PHON: samaanto~u ko~u saʡo~usi no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ iso~u?
S.TRANSL: What should be our determination?

S.FORM: Caka halafin mamalo Lakoing koniya cikiw, polong miliyaway ma'orip a tamdaw wa micada to sini'adaay, maedeng o lalipahak a matemer ko faloco' nangra.
Caka halafin mamalo Lakoing koniya cikiw, polong miliyaway ma'orip a tamdaw wa micada to sini'adaay, maedeng o lalipahak a matemer ko faloco' nangra.
S.PHON: ʦaka ħaɾafin mamaɾo~u ɾako~uiŋ ko~unija ʦikiw, po~uɾo~uŋ miɾijawaj maʡo~urip a tamɬ~ɮaw wa miʦaɬ~ɮa to~u siniʡaɬ~ɮaaj, maəɬ~ɮəŋ o~u ɾaɾipaħak a matəmər ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ naŋra.
S.TRANSL: In the earthly Paradise to come, countless resurrected ones will no doubt be thrilled to experience true kindness, perhaps for the first time.

S.FORM: Hano misetek to faloco' kiso a micangacang to no'adingoan a hafay?
Hano misetek to faloco' kiso a micangacang to no'adingoan a hafay?
S.PHON: ħano~u misətək to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ kiso~u a miʦaŋaʦaŋ to~u no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan a ħafaj?
S.TRANSL: Why are you determined to seek spiritual riches?

S.FORM: Haratengen no i Filipiay kasakopang ko mafekaday toni moetep a miheca, to misamaanay ci Yihofa misimaw cangranan i, maedeng mapa'icelay ko faloco' nangra.
Haratengen no i Filipiay kasakopang ko mafekaday toni moetep a miheca, to misamaanay ci Yihofa misimaw cangranan i, maedeng mapa'icelay ko faloco' nangra.
S.PHON: ħaratəŋən no~u i fiɾipiaj kasako~upaŋ ko~u mafəkaɬ~ɮaj to~uni mo~uətəp a miħəʦa, to~u misamaanaj ʦi jiħo~ufa misimaw ʦaŋranan i, maəɬ~ɮəŋ mapaʡiʦəɾaj ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ naŋra.
S.TRANSL: As the brothers in Philippi thought over what had happened in the ten years since those events, they would have been strengthened.

S.FORM: O manan ko papadama kitanan patahekal to misapoeneray a faloco'?
O manan ko papadama kitanan patahekal to misapoeneray a faloco'?
S.PHON: o~u manan ko~u papaɬ~ɮama kitanan pataħəkaɾ to~u misapo~uənəraj a faɾo~uʦo~uʡ?
S.TRANSL: What will help us to show humility?

S.FORM: Ci Timoti o paso'linay ko faloco' a tamdaw.
Ci Timoti o paso'linay ko faloco' a tamdaw.
S.PHON: ʦi timo~uti o~u paso~uʡɾinaj ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ a tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: Timothy was a man of faith.

S.FORM: Ano mihamham to lafang i, samaanen a milowan to rawraw no faloco'?
Ano mihamham to lafang i, samaanen a milowan to rawraw no faloco'?
S.PHON: ano~u miħamħam to~u ɾafaŋ i, samaanən a miɾo~uwan to~u rawraw no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ?
S.TRANSL: What may alleviate worries about having guests?

S.FORM: Sasamaan ko demak ita nga' misakakahad to faloco'?
Sasamaan ko demak ita nga' misakakahad to faloco'?
S.PHON: sasamaan ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak ita ŋaʡ misakakaħaɬ~ɮ to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ?
S.TRANSL: How can we demonstrate that we are opening our heart wide?

S.FORM: Misa'osiay ko faloco' ni Hapakuk misamaan ko demak?
Misa'osiay ko faloco' ni Hapakuk misamaan ko demak?
S.PHON: misaʡo~usiaj ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ni ħapako~u~uk misamaan ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak?
S.TRANSL: What did Habakkuk resolve to do after listening to Jehovah?

S.FORM: Sanay ko tarokos ci Pitiro: "Ca'edongen ko misapoeneray a faloco' a masasi padapadang.
Sanay ko tarokos ci Pitiro: "Ca'edongen ko misapoeneray a faloco' a masasi padapadang.
S.PHON: sanaj ko~u taro~uko~us ʦi pitiro~u: "ʦaʡəɬ~ɮo~uŋən ko~u misapo~uənəraj a faɾo~uʦo~uʡ a masasi paɬ~ɮapaɬ~ɮaŋ.
S.TRANSL: Developing and strengthening humility will also make us recipients of God's undeserved kindness.

S.FORM: Ano haratengen ita ko teloc no mararaway, wa nga'ay misa'osi ko faloco' 'ka'itehen ko tatiihay'.
Ano haratengen ita ko teloc no mararaway, wa nga'ay misa'osi ko faloco' 'ka'itehen ko tatiihay'.
S.PHON: ano~u ħaratəŋən ita ko~u təɾo~uʦ no~u mararawaj, wa ŋaʡaj misaʡo~usi ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ʡkaʡitəħən ko~u tatiiħajʡ.
S.TRANSL: By reflecting on the bad consequences of sin, we can strengthen our heart to "hate what is bad."

S.FORM: Harateng no roma tamdaw o notekedan a papili'en koniya demak, ano mihai ko tingalaway faloco', wa nga'ayto ko niyah a misa'osi to sasamaan ko demak sanay.
Harateng no roma tamdaw o notekedan a papili'en koniya demak, ano mihai ko tingalaway faloco', wa nga'ayto ko niyah a misa'osi to sasamaan ko demak sanay.
S.PHON: ħaratəŋ no~u ro~uma tamɬ~ɮaw o~u no~utəkəɬ~ɮan a papiɾiʡən ko~unija ɬ~ɮəmak, ano~u miħai ko~u tiŋaɾawaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ, wa ŋaʡajto~u ko~u nijaħ a misaʡo~usi to~u sasamaan ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak sanaj.
S.TRANSL: Some individuals may feel that since choices in these matters are personal, they should have the freedom to choose what they please as long as their conscience permits it.

S.FORM: Tiya keriden ni Yihofa ko Israil tamdaw miliyas to Icip i, midemakay to maanan misayar to faloco' no finawlan Ningra hani?
Tiya keriden ni Yihofa ko Israil tamdaw miliyas to Icip i, midemakay to maanan misayar to faloco' no finawlan Ningra hani?
S.PHON: tija kəriɬ~ɮən ni jiħo~ufa ko~u israiɾ tamɬ~ɮaw miɾijas to~u iʦip i, miɬ~ɮəmakaj to~u maanan misajar to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u finawɾan niŋra ħani?
S.TRANSL: As Jehovah led the Israelites out of Egypt, how did he make them feel safe and secure?

S.FORM: Pairaen ko Paso'linay Faloco'
Pairaen ko Paso'linay Faloco'
S.PHON: pairaən ko~u paso~uʡɾinaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ
S.TRANSL: We Must Have Faith

S.FORM: Ano, o pakayniay noka awa no wawa anca mapatay ko raramod a matoleden, wa nga'ay a mahinom ko faloco' ita han?
Ano, o pakayniay noka awa no wawa anca mapatay ko raramod a matoleden, wa nga'ay a mahinom ko faloco' ita han?
S.PHON: ano~u, o~u pakajniaj no~uka awa no~u wawa anʦa mapataj ko~u raramo~uɬ~ɮ a mato~uɾəɬ~ɮən, wa ŋaʡaj a maħino~um ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ita ħan?
S.TRANSL: Even if we feel a deep void in our life, whether from childlessness or from the death of a loved one, we can still gain comfort.

S.FORM: Ano tahalifaay kiso to matiniay a demak, wa nga'ay kiso misamaan miliyaw a lipahaken ko faloco' hani?
Ano tahalifaay kiso to matiniay a demak, wa nga'ay kiso misamaan miliyaw a lipahaken ko faloco' hani?
S.PHON: ano~u taħaɾifaaj kiso~u to~u matiniaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, wa ŋaʡaj kiso~u misamaan miɾijaw a ɾipaħakən ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ħani?
S.TRANSL: If this has happened to you, how can you regain your joy?

S.FORM: Kadayayan i, 'alomanay tamdaw tahalifaay to matiniay a somad no faloco'.
Kadayayan i, 'alomanay tamdaw tahalifaay to matiniay a somad no faloco'.
S.PHON: kaɬ~ɮajajan i, ʡaɾo~umanaj tamɬ~ɮaw taħaɾifaaj to~u matiniaj a so~umaɬ~ɮ no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ.
S.TRANSL: Sadly, countless others experience this kind of agony.

S.FORM: Lipahakay ko faloco'
Lipahakay ko faloco'
S.PHON: ɾipaħakaj ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ
S.TRANSL: His word we are glad to proclaim.

S.FORM: Patinakoen, haratengen ko faloco' ni Natan, ta mararaw ci Tafiti, mihimed to raraw no niyah i, o papatalasekalen ni Natan kora kihecod a demak, tada o pasangaray cingranan mihaen to demak!
Patinakoen, haratengen ko faloco' ni Natan, ta mararaw ci Tafiti, mihimed to raraw no niyah i, o papatalasekalen ni Natan kora kihecod a demak, tada o pasangaray cingranan mihaen to demak!
S.PHON: patinako~uən, ħaratəŋən ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ni natan, ta mararaw ʦi tafiti, miħiməɬ~ɮ to~u raraw no~u nijaħ i, o~u papataɾasəkaɾən ni natan ko~ura kiħəʦo~uɬ~ɮ a ɬ~ɮəmak, taɬ~ɮa o~u pasaŋaraj ʦiŋranan miħaən to~u ɬ~ɮəmak!
S.TRANSL: Imagine, for example, how difficult it must have been for the prophet Nathan to speak to David after the king tried to cover up his gross sin!

S.FORM: Rengreng saan i faloco'.
Rengreng saan i faloco'.
S.PHON: rəŋrəŋ saan i faɾo~uʦo~uʡ.
S.TRANSL: Like embers that burn in our hearts.

S.FORM: Nohatini matongalay ko Misawacayay Tamdaw ni Yihofa itira, mahemekay ko faloco' niyam.
Nohatini matongalay ko Misawacayay Tamdaw ni Yihofa itira, mahemekay ko faloco' niyam.
S.PHON: no~uħatini mato~uŋaɾaj ko~u misawaʦajaj tamɬ~ɮaw ni jiħo~ufa itira, maħəməkaj ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ nijam.
S.TRANSL: It is a great joy to know that there are now many Witnesses in that area.

S.FORM: Hano nga'ay a lipahak ko faloco' ni Yohani hani?
Hano nga'ay a lipahak ko faloco' ni Yohani hani?
S.PHON: ħano~u ŋaʡaj a ɾipaħak ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ni jo~uħani ħani?
S.TRANSL: What has helped John to continue to find deep joy?

S.FORM: 'Ayaw no tahalifa to pasangaray i, ano maharekayto kita a midotim to harateng ni Yihofa, hanaca misa'osi to faloco' tano harateng Ningra a misa'osi, wa kaliki kita matatodong ko demak.
'Ayaw no tahalifa to pasangaray i, ano maharekayto kita a midotim to harateng ni Yihofa, hanaca misa'osi to faloco' tano harateng Ningra a misa'osi, wa kaliki kita matatodong ko demak.
S.PHON: ʡajaw no~u taħaɾifa to~u pasaŋaraj i, ano~u maħarəkajto~u kita a miɬ~ɮo~utim to~u ħaratəŋ ni jiħo~ufa, ħanaʦa misaʡo~usi to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ tano~u ħaratəŋ niŋra a misaʡo~usi, wa kaɾiki kita matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: * It is far easier to take a stand if we have already sought out and adopted Jehovah's view on such matters and have determined in advance what we will do.

S.FORM: Finawlan no Miso
Finawlan no Miso
S.PHON: finawɾan no~u miso~u
S.TRANSL: A special possession,

S.FORM: O LALITENGAN a Krisciyang ma'orip i hekal no Loma, pakayni holic, misawkitay a lekakawa no Loma ato pasalat no finawlan malikoay ko 'alomanay tamdaw.
O LALITENGAN a Krisciyang ma'orip i hekal no Loma, pakayni holic, misawkitay a lekakawa no Loma ato pasalat no finawlan malikoay ko 'alomanay tamdaw.
S.PHON: o~u ɾaɾitən*an a krisʦijaŋ maʡo~urip i ħəkaɾ no~u ɾo~uma, pakajni ħo~uɾiʦ, misawkitaj a ɾəkakawa no~u ɾo~uma ato~u pasaɾat no~u finawɾan maɾiko~uaj ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: PEOPLE of the Roman world, among whom the early Christians lived, prided themselves on being champions of law, justice, and freedom.

S.FORM: Haratengen hena, wa samaan ko pinengneng no finawlan ci Rihopoaman, na somowalay koniya hongti wa tano "o rafirto ko sapisti'" to finawlan, 'arawhan pakiyadi han ko misafelitay a tamdaw!
Haratengen hena, wa samaan ko pinengneng no finawlan ci Rihopoaman, na somowalay koniya hongti wa tano "o rafirto ko sapisti'" to finawlan, 'arawhan pakiyadi han ko misafelitay a tamdaw!
S.PHON: ħaratəŋən ħəna, wa samaan ko~u pinəŋnəŋ no~u finawɾan ʦi riħo~upo~uaman, na so~umo~uwaɾaj ko~unija ħo~uŋti wa tano~u "o~u rafirto~u ko~u sapistiʡ" to~u finawɾan, ʡarawħan pakijaɬ~ɮi ħan ko~u misafəɾitaj a tamɬ~ɮaw!
S.TRANSL: What would people think of the king who threatened to punish his subjects "with scourges" yet soon yielded to this flagrant rebellion?

S.FORM: Ano samaanayto ko malifaay no finawlan no Kawas a pasangaray, wa padotoc ci Yihofa a midama ato misayar cangranan.
Ano samaanayto ko malifaay no finawlan no Kawas a pasangaray, wa padotoc ci Yihofa a midama ato misayar cangranan.
S.PHON: ano~u samaanajto~u ko~u maɾifaaj no~u finawɾan no~u kawas a pasaŋaraj, wa paɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ ʦi jiħo~ufa a miɬ~ɮama ato~u misajar ʦaŋranan.
S.TRANSL: No matter what trials his people may face, Jehovah promises to sustain and comfort them.

S.FORM: Mahecaday, o roma a finawlan no Kawas alatek tatiihay ko tireng, 'inorong no paro no loma', anca mafalic ko tayal i likakawa no Kawas.
Mahecaday, o roma a finawlan no Kawas alatek tatiihay ko tireng, 'inorong no paro no loma', anca mafalic ko tayal i likakawa no Kawas.
S.PHON: maħəʦaɬ~ɮaj, o~u ro~uma a finawɾan no~u kawas aɾatək tatiiħaj ko~u tirəŋ, ʡino~uro~uŋ no~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ, anʦa mafaɾiʦ ko~u tajaɾ i ɾikakawa no~u kawas.
S.TRANSL: Similarly, privileges of service among God's people can end, possibly because of poor health, family obligations, or theocratic adjustments.

S.FORM: MAHEMEKAY kita paka'araw to katongal no finawlan ni Yihofa.
MAHEMEKAY kita paka'araw to katongal no finawlan ni Yihofa.
S.PHON: maħəməkaj kita pakaʡaraw to~u kato~uŋaɾ no~u finawɾan ni jiħo~ufa.
S.TRANSL: HOW thrilling it is to hear of increases that Jehovah's people are experiencing!

S.FORM: Pakaynien finawlan ni Yihofa ko sowal, kalimelaan ko romadiway i matatodongay a pidoko to Kawas.
Pakaynien finawlan ni Yihofa ko sowal, kalimelaan ko romadiway i matatodongay a pidoko to Kawas.
S.PHON: pakajniən finawɾan ni jiħo~ufa ko~u so~uwaɾ, kaɾiməɾaan ko~u ro~umaɬ~ɮiwaj i matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a piɬ~ɮo~uko~u to~u kawas.
S.TRANSL: For Jehovah's people, singing has always been an integral part of worship.

S.FORM: Oniya Piharatengan a Sa'opo, wa samaan a palacecay to finawlan no Kawas?
Oniya Piharatengan a Sa'opo, wa samaan a palacecay to finawlan no Kawas?
S.PHON: o~unija piħaratəŋan a saʡo~upo~u, wa samaan a paɾaʦəʦaj to~u finawɾan no~u kawas?
S.TRANSL: influence the unity of God's people?

S.FORM: Saka falo mapolosi, cipinangay kita, misamaanay midipot ci Yihofa to finawlan Ningra, ato padama cangranan mirienang to so'linay a pihakelongan.
Saka falo mapolosi, cipinangay kita, misamaanay midipot ci Yihofa to finawlan Ningra, ato padama cangranan mirienang to so'linay a pihakelongan.
S.PHON: saka faɾo~u mapo~uɾo~usi, ʦipinaŋaj kita, misamaanaj miɬ~ɮipo~ut ʦi jiħo~ufa to~u finawɾan niŋra, ato~u paɬ~ɮama ʦaŋranan miriənaŋ to~u so~uʡɾinaj a piħakəɾo~uŋan.
S.TRANSL: The eighth vision will teach us how Jehovah provides secure protection in order for his worshippers to engage in true worship.

S.FORM: Tano maanan a pakayraan ko paihkal ni Yihofa to kafana' Ningra to finawlan no Niyah hani? Tinakoen.
Tano maanan a pakayraan ko paihkal ni Yihofa to kafana' Ningra to finawlan no Niyah hani? Tinakoen.
S.PHON: tano~u maanan a pakajraan ko~u paiħkaɾ ni jiħo~ufa to~u kafanaʡ niŋra to~u finawɾan no~u nijaħ ħani? tinako~uən.
S.TRANSL: Give examples of how Jehovah has shown his approval of his people.

S.FORM: Misamaan kita micowat to kakelec no finawlan no Kawas?
Misamaan kita micowat to kakelec no finawlan no Kawas?
S.PHON: misamaan kita miʦo~uwat to~u kakəɾəʦ no~u finawɾan no~u kawas?
S.TRANSL: What can we do to promote more unity among God's people today?

S.FORM: Mirienang to mipadamaay to mapadesay a demak ko finawlan ni Yihofa, ma'araway no tao ko manan a capeling nangra?
Mirienang to mipadamaay to mapadesay a demak ko finawlan ni Yihofa, ma'araway no tao ko manan a capeling nangra?
S.PHON: miriənaŋ to~u mipaɬ~ɮamaaj to~u mapaɬ~ɮəsaj a ɬ~ɮəmak ko~u finawɾan ni jiħo~ufa, maʡarawaj no~u tao~u ko~u manan a ʦapəɾiŋ naŋra?
S.TRANSL: What qualities of God's people become particularly evident in the aftermath of disasters?

S.FORM: Misamanay hano mamisinanot ko finawlan no Kawas to sanawsaw?
Misamanay hano mamisinanot ko finawlan no Kawas to sanawsaw?
S.PHON: misamanaj ħano~u mamisinano~ut ko~u finawɾan no~u kawas to~u sanawsaw?
S.TRANSL: Why is safety important to God's people?

S.FORM: Oniya Piharatengan a Sa'opo wa samaan palacecay to finawlan no Kawas?
Oniya Piharatengan a Sa'opo wa samaan palacecay to finawlan no Kawas?
S.PHON: o~unija piħaratəŋan a saʡo~upo~u wa samaan paɾaʦəʦaj to~u finawɾan no~u kawas?
S.TRANSL: In what ways does the Memorial influence the unity of God's people?

S.FORM: So'lin matawalayto nangra ko pipa'orip ni Yihofa, cowa ka tawal no Kawas ko finawlan Ningra.
So'lin matawalayto nangra ko pipa'orip ni Yihofa, cowa ka tawal no Kawas ko finawlan Ningra.
S.PHON: so~uʡɾin matawaɾajto~u naŋra ko~u pipaʡo~urip ni jiħo~ufa, ʦo~uwa ka tawaɾ no~u kawas ko~u finawɾan niŋra.
S.TRANSL: Though they had forgotten Jehovah's saving acts, God still remembered his people.

S.FORM: Samaanay ci Hicikiya pakalalok to 'a'ideman no sofitay ato finawlan hani?
Samaanay ci Hicikiya pakalalok to 'a'ideman no sofitay ato finawlan hani?
S.PHON: samaanaj ʦi ħiʦikija pakaɾaɾo~uk to~u ʡaʡiɬ~ɮəman no~u so~ufitaj ato~u finawɾan ħani?
S.TRANSL: How did Hezekiah encourage the military chiefs and the people of Judah?

S.FORM: O sapicowat kita to sakalacecay no finawlan no Kawas a pakayraan i palahad to misapoeneray a capeling.
O sapicowat kita to sakalacecay no finawlan no Kawas a pakayraan i palahad to misapoeneray a capeling.
S.PHON: o~u sapiʦo~uwat kita to~u sakaɾaʦəʦaj no~u finawɾan no~u kawas a pakajraan i paɾaħaɬ~ɮ to~u misapo~uənəraj a ʦapəɾiŋ.
S.TRANSL: One way we can promote the unity of God's people is by cultivating humility.

S.FORM: Samaanay masasiolah ko finawlan no Kawas hani?
Samaanay masasiolah ko finawlan no Kawas hani?
S.PHON: samaanaj masasio~uɾaħ ko~u finawɾan no~u kawas ħani?
S.TRANSL: How is love evident among God's people?

S.FORM: Samaanay ci Yihofa pa'icel to finawlan Ningra hani?
Samaanay ci Yihofa pa'icel to finawlan Ningra hani?
S.PHON: samaanaj ʦi jiħo~ufa paʡiʦəɾ to~u finawɾan niŋra ħani?
S.TRANSL: Jehovah builds up his worshippers by reassuring them of his unfailing love.

S.FORM: O sapidipotaw to nika korac no finawlan, halo mapadama kora coko padetengay a mipatayay tamdaw tahacada to sida'it ni Yihofa.
O sapidipotaw to nika korac no finawlan, halo mapadama kora coko padetengay a mipatayay tamdaw tahacada to sida'it ni Yihofa.
S.PHON: o~u sapiɬ~ɮipo~utaw to~u nika ko~uraʦ no~u finawɾan, ħaɾo~u mapaɬ~ɮama ko~ura ʦo~uko~u paɬ~ɮətəŋaj a mipatajaj tamɬ~ɮaw taħaʦaɬ~ɮa to~u siɬ~ɮaʡit ni jiħo~ufa.
S.TRANSL: They were to keep the congregation of Israel clean and to help the unintentional manslayer to benefit from Jehovah's mercy.

S.FORM: Ano samaanto ko piharateng no finawlan, ci Rihopoam ato sofitay ningra kamayan a 'mitengil to sowal ni Yihofa, mitoor to sowal ni Yihofa a minokay.'
Ano samaanto ko piharateng no finawlan, ci Rihopoam ato sofitay ningra kamayan a 'mitengil to sowal ni Yihofa, mitoor to sowal ni Yihofa a minokay.'
S.PHON: ano~u samaanto~u ko~u piħaratəŋ no~u finawɾan, ʦi riħo~upo~uam ato~u so~ufitaj niŋra kamajan a ʡmitəŋiɾ to~u so~uwaɾ ni jiħo~ufa, mito~uo~ur to~u so~uwaɾ ni jiħo~ufa a mino~ukaj.ʡ
S.TRANSL: Nevertheless, the king and his armies "obeyed the word of Jehovah and went back home, as Jehovah had told them."

S.FORM: Kawraan ano na'ayen ningra wa misafelit ko finawlan alatek.
Kawraan ano na'ayen ningra wa misafelit ko finawlan alatek.
S.PHON: kawraan ano~u naʡajən niŋra wa misafəɾit ko~u finawɾan aɾatək.
S.TRANSL: On the other hand, if he refused, the people might rebel.

S.FORM: Wa nga'ayho kita samaan miako'id ci Yihofaan to noka nga'ay ita malo finawlan Ningra hani?
Wa nga'ayho kita samaan miako'id ci Yihofaan to noka nga'ay ita malo finawlan Ningra hani?
S.PHON: wa ŋaʡajħo~u kita samaan miako~uʡiɬ~ɮ ʦi jiħo~ufaan to~u no~uka ŋaʡaj ita maɾo~u finawɾan niŋra ħani?
S.TRANSL: Here, then, is another way we can show appreciation to Jehovah for choosing us as his people.

S.FORM: O mafana'ay mikayat a madimadiay fa'inayan iti:yaho, wa salakat a miliyaw ma'orip, padama to finawlan no Kawas malikakawa i faelohay hekal han?
O mafana'ay mikayat a madimadiay fa'inayan iti:yaho, wa salakat a miliyaw ma'orip, padama to finawlan no Kawas malikakawa i faelohay hekal han?
S.PHON: o~u mafanaʡaj mikajat a maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮiaj faʡinajan iti:jaħo~u, wa saɾakat a miɾijaw maʡo~urip, paɬ~ɮama to~u finawɾan no~u kawas maɾikakawa i faəɾo~uħaj ħəkaɾ ħan?
S.TRANSL: Will faithful men of old with leadership abilities come back early to help organize God's people in the new world?

S.FORM: O polong a tamdaw o papasowal to demak no niyah i ka'ayaw no Kawas, mangalefay ko finawlan Ningra.
O polong a tamdaw o papasowal to demak no niyah i ka'ayaw no Kawas, mangalefay ko finawlan Ningra.
S.PHON: o~u po~uɾo~uŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw o~u papaso~uwaɾ to~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u nijaħ i kaʡajaw no~u kawas, maŋaɾəfaj ko~u finawɾan niŋra.
S.TRANSL: While all of mankind are accountable to Jehovah, his name people are even more so.

S.FORM: Ikor somowal ko Fangcalay Cudad ci Mosian, sanay: "Orasaka, Masa ano eca i, Miripa han koya pipasadakan to nanom a 'ongcoy. Nawhani ngaliwngiw ko finawlan no Israil a mipakaketer ci Yihofaan. 'Mikapotay ci Yihofa i titaanan saw?'

Ikor somowal ko Fangcalay Cudad ci Mosian, sanay: "Orasaka, Masa ano eca i, Miripa han koya pipasadakan to nanom a 'ongcoy. Nawhani ngaliwngiw ko finawlan no Israil a mipakaketer ci Yihofaan. 'Mikapotay ci Yihofa i titaanan saw?'
S.PHON: iko~ur so~umo~uwaɾ ko~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ ʦi mo~usian, sanaj: "o~urasaka, masa ano~u əʦa i, miripa ħan ko~uja pipasaɬ~ɮakan to~u nano~um a ʡo~uŋʦo~uj. nawħani ŋaɾiwŋiw ko~u finawɾan no~u israiɾ a mipakakətər ʦi jiħo~ufaan. ʡmikapo~utaj ʦi jiħo~ufa i titaanan saw?ʡ
S.TRANSL: The inspired record goes on to tell us that Moses "named the place Massah and Meribah because of the quarreling of the Israelites and because they put Jehovah to the test by saying: 'Is Jehovah in our midst or not?'"

S.FORM: Samaanay ci Yihofa a pa'icel to finawlan Ningra?
Samaanay ci Yihofa a pa'icel to finawlan Ningra?
S.PHON: samaanaj ʦi jiħo~ufa a paʡiʦəɾ to~u finawɾan niŋra?
S.TRANSL: How does Jehovah build up his servants in love?

S.FORM: Oniya lalakaw wa milengo, wa nga'ay kita misamaan miako'id ci Yihofaan ira ko sakaliko a malo finawlan Ningra.
Oniya lalakaw wa milengo, wa nga'ay kita misamaan miako'id ci Yihofaan ira ko sakaliko a malo finawlan Ningra.
S.PHON: o~unija ɾaɾakaw wa miɾəŋo~u, wa ŋaʡaj kita misamaan miako~uʡiɬ~ɮ ʦi jiħo~ufaan ira ko~u sakaɾiko~u a maɾo~u finawɾan niŋra.
S.TRANSL: This article will consider various ways in which we can show our gratitude to Jehovah for giving us that special honor.

S.FORM: Itini toniya masasifoday a hekal, maedeng mahemekay ci Yihofa kamayan a malacecay makelec ko finawlan Ningra.
Itini toniya masasifoday a hekal, maedeng mahemekay ci Yihofa kamayan a malacecay makelec ko finawlan Ningra.
S.PHON: itini to~unija masasifo~uɬ~ɮaj a ħəkaɾ, maəɬ~ɮəŋ maħəməkaj ʦi jiħo~ufa kamajan a maɾaʦəʦaj makəɾəʦ ko~u finawɾan niŋra.
S.TRANSL: And as Jehovah observes our divided world, it must warm his heart to see the unity that exists among his people.

S.FORM: Samaan kita pakayni sakalacecayaw no finawlan no Kawas a misadak to 'icel?
Samaan kita pakayni sakalacecayaw no finawlan no Kawas a misadak to 'icel?
S.PHON: samaan kita pakajni sakaɾaʦəʦajaw no~u finawɾan no~u kawas a misaɬ~ɮak to~u ʡiʦəɾ?
S.TRANSL: How can we personally contribute to that unity?

S.FORM: Maharatengayho iso koya tapang no sofitay no Assiriya, misamaanay a patalaw to finawlan no Kawas han?
Maharatengayho iso koya tapang no sofitay no Assiriya, misamaanay a patalaw to finawlan no Kawas han?
S.PHON: maħaratəŋajħo~u iso~u ko~uja tapaŋ no~u so~ufitaj no~u assirija, misamaanaj a pataɾaw to~u finawɾan no~u kawas ħan?
S.TRANSL: Do you remember the propaganda used by the Assyrian envoy, the Rabshakeh, against God's people?

S.FORM: Oniya lihaf pairasolay i salikoray romi'ad, wa malacecay ko finawlan no Kawas a mihodop Cingraanan."
Oniya lihaf pairasolay i salikoray romi'ad, wa malacecay ko finawlan no Kawas a mihodop Cingraanan."
S.PHON: o~unija ɾiħaf pairaso~uɾaj i saɾiko~uraj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, wa maɾaʦəʦaj ko~u finawɾan no~u kawas a miħo~uɬ~ɮo~up ʦiŋraanan."
S.TRANSL: That message also foretells the unification of God's people that started to take place during the last days."

S.FORM: Lalitengan a finawlan no Kawas, samaanay pakayni i patafang to dafong, midama to so'linay a pidoyongan?
Lalitengan a finawlan no Kawas, samaanay pakayni i patafang to dafong, midama to so'linay a pidoyongan?
S.PHON: ɾaɾitəŋan a finawɾan no~u kawas, samaanaj pakajni i patafaŋ to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ, miɬ~ɮama to~u so~uʡɾinaj a piɬ~ɮo~ujo~uŋan?
S.TRANSL: How did faithful ones in the past support the activities of Jehovah's representatives financially?

S.FORM: Tangsolay kako micada to sakayat han?"
Tangsolay kako micada to sakayat han?"
S.PHON: taŋso~uɾaj kako~u miʦaɬ~ɮa to~u sakajat ħan?"
S.TRANSL: Am I quick to accept and support the directions received?'

S.FORM: Anca nga'ayay saka dademaken koniya kacingangan a toki, patenak to nga'ayay lihaf sanay han?
Anca nga'ayay saka dademaken koniya kacingangan a toki, patenak to nga'ayay lihaf sanay han?
S.PHON: anʦa ŋaʡajaj saka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən ko~unija kaʦiŋaŋan a to~uki, patənak to~u ŋaʡajaj ɾiħaf sanaj ħan?
S.TRANSL: Did they imagine that the publicity could help to advance the good news?

S.FORM: Misongila'an iso mi'osi ko ingataay liyad no Mikecolay han?
Misongila'an iso mi'osi ko ingataay liyad no Mikecolay han?
S.PHON: miso~uŋiɾaʡan iso~u miʡo~usi ko~u iŋataaj ɾijaɬ~ɮ no~u mikəʦo~uɾaj ħan?
S.TRANSL: Have you carefully read the recent issues of The Watchtower?

S.FORM: Palilam kiso toniya casi iraay ko maanan nga'ayay milifetan han?
Palilam kiso toniya casi iraay ko maanan nga'ayay milifetan han?
