S.PHON: paɾiɾam kiso~u to~unija ʦasi iraaj ko~u maanan ŋaʡajaj miɾifətan ħan?
S.TRANSL: What success have you recently had with this tool?

S.FORM: Tiya miliyaw kami tayra kakahaday potal i, milicayay ko mita'lifay tamiyanan: 'Nga'ayayho kamo han?
Tiya miliyaw kami tayra kakahaday potal i, milicayay ko mita'lifay tamiyanan: 'Nga'ayayho kamo han?
S.PHON: tija miɾijaw kami tajra kakaħaɬ~ɮaj po~utaɾ i, miɾiʦajaj ko~u mitaʡɾifaj tamijanan: ʡŋaʡajajħo~u kamo~u ħan?
S.TRANSL: When we returned, passersby asked, 'What happened?

S.FORM: Misinsiay kako tayra a mirienang, licay han no fenpo no Austria kako to mamakahi a mirienang to saka 32 liyad a Kiliyat a picudadan hokira.
Misinsiay kako tayra a mirienang, licay han no fenpo no Austria kako to mamakahi a mirienang to saka 32 liyad a Kiliyat a picudadan hokira.
S.PHON: misinsiaj kako~u tajra a miriənaŋ, ɾiʦaj ħan no~u fənpo~u no~u ao~u~ustria kako~u to~u mamakaħi a miriənaŋ to~u saka ** ɾijaɬ~ɮ a kiɾijat a piʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan ħo~ukira.
S.TRANSL: I applied to attend, and the Austria branch asked whether I would be interested in attending the 32nd class of Gilead School.

S.FORM: Mikangodoay kiso to kaemangay a fa'inayan salikaka han?
Mikangodoay kiso to kaemangay a fa'inayan salikaka han?
S.PHON: mikaŋo~uɬ~ɮo~uaj kiso~u to~u kaəmaŋaj a faʡinajan saɾikaka ħan?
S.TRANSL: Do you show respect for younger brothers?

S.FORM: Mamisa'icel Kiso Misaysay to Lacongis Micowat to Rihaday Han?
Mamisa'icel Kiso Misaysay to Lacongis Micowat to Rihaday Han?
S.PHON: mamisaʡiʦəɾ kiso~u misajsaj to~u ɾaʦo~uŋis miʦo~uwat to~u riħaɬ~ɮaj ħan?
S.TRANSL: Will You Resolve Conflicts and Promote Peace?

S.FORM: Mihadidiay a Mitala Kiso Han?
Mihadidiay a Mitala Kiso Han?
S.PHON: miħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮiaj a mitaɾa kiso~u ħan?
S.TRANSL: Are You Willing to Wait Patiently?

S.FORM: Kawra maolah to niyah o mararaway han?
Kawra maolah to niyah o mararaway han?
S.PHON: kawra mao~uɾaħ to~u nijaħ o~u mararawaj ħan?
S.TRANSL: Is it wrong for us to love ourselves?

S.FORM: Wa nga'ay kako mirienang toni misasingdiay a halaka han?
Wa nga'ay kako mirienang toni misasingdiay a halaka han?
S.PHON: wa ŋaʡaj kako~u miriənaŋ to~uni misasiŋɬ~ɮiaj a ħaɾaka ħan?
S.TRANSL: Should I get involved in this money-making proposal?

S.FORM: So'linay kako makahi a misodod to pakararaway takowanan a tamdaw han?"
So'linay kako makahi a misodod to pakararaway takowanan a tamdaw han?"
S.PHON: so~uʡɾinaj kako~u makaħi a miso~uɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮ to~u pakararawaj tako~uwanan a tamɬ~ɮaw ħan?"
S.TRANSL: Am I ready to forgive those who sin against me personally?'

S.FORM: Nga'ayay licayen ita ko niyah: "Mitodongay kako toya sida'itay a Samariya tamdaw han?
Nga'ayay licayen ita ko niyah: "Mitodongay kako toya sida'itay a Samariya tamdaw han?
S.PHON: ŋaʡajaj ɾiʦajən ita ko~u nijaħ: "mito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj kako~u to~uja siɬ~ɮaʡitaj a samarija tamɬ~ɮaw ħan?
S.TRANSL: Hence, we might ask ourselves: 'Am I doing the same?

S.FORM: Maharatengayho Iso Han?
Maharatengayho Iso Han?
S.PHON: maħaratəŋajħo~u iso~u ħan?
S.TRANSL: Do You Remember?

S.FORM: Makahirahiraay ko no'adingoan a sapilood iso a riko' han?
Makahirahiraay ko no'adingoan a sapilood iso a riko' han?
S.PHON: makaħiraħiraaj ko~u no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan a sapiɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ iso~u a riko~uʡ ħan?
S.TRANSL: Is Your Suit of Armor Complete?

S.FORM: O wama wina papadama to wawa miliyas to tatiihay a lawla han?
O wama wina papadama to wawa miliyas to tatiihay a lawla han?
S.PHON: o~u wama wina papaɬ~ɮama to~u wawa miɾijas to~u tatiiħaj a ɾawɾa ħan?
S.TRANSL: Do we help our children to reject harmful entertainment?

S.FORM: O pakayraan iso a ma'orip mahapinangay no tao to Misawacayay Tamdaw ni Yihofa kiso han?
O pakayraan iso a ma'orip mahapinangay no tao to Misawacayay Tamdaw ni Yihofa kiso han?
S.PHON: o~u pakajraan iso~u a maʡo~urip maħapinaŋaj no~u tao~u to~u misawaʦajaj tamɬ~ɮaw ni jiħo~ufa kiso~u ħan?
S.TRANSL: Does your lifestyle clearly identify you as one of Jehovah's Witnesses?

S.FORM: Awa ko pihakelongan wa so'lin a mahemek han?
Awa ko pihakelongan wa so'lin a mahemek han?
S.PHON: awa ko~u piħakəɾo~uŋan wa so~uʡɾin a maħəmək ħan?
S.TRANSL: Is it really true that one can be happy without religion?

S.FORM: Iraay ko misimaway tisowanan a coyoh han?
Iraay ko misimaway tisowanan a coyoh han?
S.PHON: iraaj ko~u misimawaj tiso~uwanan a ʦo~ujo~uħ ħan?
S.TRANSL: Do we have a guardian angel?

S.FORM: Mafana'ay Kiso Samaanay ko So'linay Demak Han?
Mafana'ay Kiso Samaanay ko So'linay Demak Han?
S.PHON: mafanaʡaj kiso~u samaanaj ko~u so~uʡɾinaj ɬ~ɮəmak ħan?
S.TRANSL: Do You Have the Facts?

S.FORM: Wa fana'en iso ko "kihcod" a demak han?
Wa fana'en iso ko "kihcod" a demak han?
S.PHON: wa fanaʡən iso~u ko~u "kiħʦo~uɬ~ɮ" a ɬ~ɮəmak ħan?
S.TRANSL: Must you tell them everything you know?

S.FORM: MISI'AYAWAY kiso to adada, cango'ot no saka'orip anca saroero han?
MISI'AYAWAY kiso to adada, cango'ot no saka'orip anca saroero han?
S.PHON: misiʡajawaj kiso~u to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa, ʦaŋo~uʡo~ut no~u sakaʡo~urip anʦa saro~uəro~u ħan?
S.TRANSL: ARE you dealing with trials, such as ill health, financial problems, or persecution?

S.FORM: Nga'ayho kiso han?"
Nga'ayho kiso han?"
S.PHON: ŋaʡajħo~u kiso~u ħan?"
S.TRANSL: How are you today?"

S.FORM: O salimo'ot ni Pitiro coko papiharatengay kitanan to mifekaday a demak no Israil tamdaw i kohkoh han?
O salimo'ot ni Pitiro coko papiharatengay kitanan to mifekaday a demak no Israil tamdaw i kohkoh han?
S.PHON: o~u saɾimo~uʡo~ut ni pitiro~u ʦo~uko~u papiħaratəŋaj kitanan to~u mifəkaɬ~ɮaj a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u israiɾ tamɬ~ɮaw i ko~uħko~uħ ħan?
S.TRANSL: Does that warning not remind you of what befell the Israelites in the wilderness?

S.FORM: Mihadidiay kako micada to salikaka, a cipinangto pakayraan nangra han?
Mihadidiay kako micada to salikaka, a cipinangto pakayraan nangra han?
S.PHON: miħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮiaj kako~u miʦaɬ~ɮa to~u saɾikaka, a ʦipinaŋto~u pakajraan naŋra ħan?
S.TRANSL: Do I show patience and understanding to my fellow servants?

S.FORM: Padamaay Kiso to Wawa Tahira i Picadaan to Ino' Han?
Padamaay Kiso to Wawa Tahira i Picadaan to Ino' Han?
S.PHON: paɬ~ɮamaaj kiso~u to~u wawa taħira i piʦaɬ~ɮaan to~u ino~uʡ ħan?
S.TRANSL: Parents, Are You Helping Your Child Progress to Baptism?

S.FORM: O itiniay tamdaw tayraay i niyaro' iso mikilim to katayalan, coka fana' kiso han?"
O itiniay tamdaw tayraay i niyaro' iso mikilim to katayalan, coka fana' kiso han?"
S.PHON: o~u itiniaj tamɬ~ɮaw tajraaj i nijaro~uʡ iso~u mikiɾim to~u katajaɾan, ʦo~uka fanaʡ kiso~u ħan?"
S.TRANSL: To find jobs, people from this place go to where you came from!"

S.FORM: Alatek sanay ko harateng no roma tamdaw: 'Wa ira ko Lakoing i sera a noikoran han?'
Alatek sanay ko harateng no roma tamdaw: 'Wa ira ko Lakoing i sera a noikoran han?'
S.PHON: aɾatək sanaj ko~u ħaratəŋ no~u ro~uma tamɬ~ɮaw: ʡwa ira ko~u ɾako~uiŋ i səra a no~uiko~uran ħan?ʡ
S.TRANSL: Some may wonder, 'Will any man, woman, or child ever be able to enjoy Paradise on earth?'

S.FORM: Caka pihodop to Kawas wa nga'ay a mahemek sanay ko roma tamdaw, so'linay koniya sowal han?
Caka pihodop to Kawas wa nga'ay a mahemek sanay ko roma tamdaw, so'linay koniya sowal han?
S.PHON: ʦaka piħo~uɬ~ɮo~up to~u kawas wa ŋaʡaj a maħəmək sanaj ko~u ro~uma tamɬ~ɮaw, so~uʡɾinaj ko~unija so~uwaɾ ħan?
S.TRANSL: How can we analyze the worldly idea that one can be happy without serving God?

S.FORM: O hatiniay a pasalat, awaay ko tolas han?
O hatiniay a pasalat, awaay ko tolas han?
S.PHON: o~u ħatiniaj a pasaɾat, awaaj ko~u to~uɾas ħan?
S.TRANSL: Is this freedom absolute?

S.FORM: Anca tona caay ka lecad ko pinangan niyam han?"
Anca tona caay ka lecad ko pinangan niyam han?"
S.PHON: anʦa to~una ʦaaj ka ɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u pinaŋan nijam ħan?"
S.TRANSL: Or do we just have different personalities?'

S.FORM: Kapah Tamdaw, Micangacang to No'adingoan a Patosokan Han?
Kapah Tamdaw, Micangacang to No'adingoan a Patosokan Han?
S.PHON: kapaħ tamɬ~ɮaw, miʦaŋaʦaŋ to~u no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan a pato~uso~ukan ħan?
S.TRANSL: Young People, Are You Focused on Spiritual Goals?

S.FORM: a cowantan, nga'ayay pa'arawen iso to potal no cowantan a salicay, licayen ko ciloma'ay: "Na miharatengay kiso to sasamaan ko hano ikor han?
a cowantan, nga'ayay pa'arawen iso to potal no cowantan a salicay, licayen ko ciloma'ay: "Na miharatengay kiso to sasamaan ko hano ikor han?
S.PHON: a ʦo~uwantan, ŋaʡajaj paʡarawən iso~u to~u po~utaɾ no~u ʦo~uwantan a saɾiʦaj, ɾiʦajən ko~u ʦiɾo~umaʡaj: "na miħaratəŋaj kiso~u to~u sasamaan ko~u ħano~u iko~ur ħan?
S.TRANSL: Show the person the question on the front as you ask: "Have you ever wondered what the Kingdom of God is?

S.FORM: O tatodongen iso ko ta'arawan nangra han?
O tatodongen iso ko ta'arawan nangra han?
S.PHON: o~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋən iso~u ko~u taʡarawan naŋra ħan?
S.TRANSL: How might you imitate their good example?

S.FORM: O lipahakayto a Krisciyang o nganga'ayho a mitongal to lipahak han?
O lipahakayto a Krisciyang o nganga'ayho a mitongal to lipahak han?
S.PHON: o~u ɾipaħakajto~u a krisʦijaŋ o~u ŋaŋaʡajħo~u a mito~uŋaɾ to~u ɾipaħak ħan?
S.TRANSL: Can an already joyful Christian increase his joy?

S.FORM: Wa Ira ko Tolas no Roray Han?
Wa Ira ko Tolas no Roray Han?
S.PHON: wa ira ko~u to~uɾas no~u ro~uraj ħan?
S.TRANSL: Will Suffering Ever End?

S.FORM: Kawra, o kalimelaan a kimad ko mamiliyaw ma'orip, wa saan kiso a minengneng, halo patenak i tamdaw han?
Kawra, o kalimelaan a kimad ko mamiliyaw ma'orip, wa saan kiso a minengneng, halo patenak i tamdaw han?
S.PHON: kawra, o~u kaɾiməɾaan a kimaɬ~ɮ ko~u mamiɾijaw maʡo~urip, wa saan kiso~u a minəŋnəŋ, ħaɾo~u patənak i tamɬ~ɮaw ħan?
S.TRANSL: But would you mention the resurrection as one of your most cherished beliefs?

S.FORM: Mahecaday kiso cangranan han?
Mahecaday kiso cangranan han?
S.PHON: maħəʦaɬ~ɮaj kiso~u ʦaŋranan ħan?
S.TRANSL: Are you one of them?

S.FORM: Misa'icelay kita tano pinengneng ni Yihofa cangranan han?'
Misa'icelay kita tano pinengneng ni Yihofa cangranan han?'
S.PHON: misaʡiʦəɾaj kita tano~u pinəŋnəŋ ni jiħo~ufa ʦaŋranan ħan?ʡ
S.TRANSL: Do I strive to see others as Jehovah sees them?'

S.FORM: Wa saan kiso han?
Wa saan kiso han?
S.PHON: wa saan kiso~u ħan?
S.TRANSL: They are lying to you!'

S.FORM: O kadadoedo no tato'asan ni Misiya, sahetoay o cinganganay to fisac a wawa han?
O kadadoedo no tato'asan ni Misiya, sahetoay o cinganganay to fisac a wawa han?
S.PHON: o~u kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u no~u tato~uʡasan ni misija, saħəto~uaj o~u ʦiŋaŋanaj to~u fisaʦ a wawa ħan?
S.TRANSL: Was the line to the Messiah tied to the right of firstborn?

S.FORM: Ano so'lin mimimiming ko loma', wa makahi kiso misaday to pilafinan nangra han?
Ano so'lin mimimiming ko loma', wa makahi kiso misaday to pilafinan nangra han?
S.PHON: ano~u so~uʡɾin mimimimiŋ ko~u ɾo~umaʡ, wa makaħi kiso~u misaɬ~ɮaj to~u piɾafinan naŋra ħan?
S.TRANSL: Could you share in offering accommodations even if your circumstances are modest?

S.FORM: Onini a Rikec, o mamicoloh kitanan a sini'ada to tao han?
Onini a Rikec, o mamicoloh kitanan a sini'ada to tao han?
S.PHON: o~unini a rikəʦ, o~u mamiʦo~uɾo~uħ kitanan a siniʡaɬ~ɮa to~u tao~u ħan?
S.TRANSL: Does not the principle reflected in that particular law move us to action?

S.FORM: Mikilimay kiso to lalakaw, misaday to iraay ko eppoc no holic sapiadah a minkiw, masasowalho to ising to misa'osian iso han?
Mikilimay kiso to lalakaw, misaday to iraay ko eppoc no holic sapiadah a minkiw, masasowalho to ising to misa'osian iso han?
S.PHON: mikiɾimaj kiso~u to~u ɾaɾakaw, misaɬ~ɮaj to~u iraaj ko~u əppo~uʦ no~u ħo~uɾiʦ sapiaɬ~ɮaħ a minkiw, masaso~uwaɾħo~u to~u isiŋ to~u misaʡo~usian iso~u ħan?
S.TRANSL: Did you do research, complete a legal medical document, and speak with your doctor?

S.FORM: Ano maamaanan a pakayraan, sini'adaen ita ko tamdaw han?
Ano maamaanan a pakayraan, sini'adaen ita ko tamdaw han?
S.PHON: ano~u maamaanan a pakajraan, siniʡaɬ~ɮaən ita ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw ħan?
S.TRANSL: Is compassion always appropriate?

S.FORM: Sakoniya sowal, o micalilaway to tamdaw a pasangaray iraayto ko sapalahedaw han?
Sakoniya sowal, o micalilaway to tamdaw a pasangaray iraayto ko sapalahedaw han?
S.PHON: sako~unija so~uwaɾ, o~u miʦaɾiɾawaj to~u tamɬ~ɮaw a pasaŋaraj iraajto~u ko~u sapaɾaħəɬ~ɮaw ħan?
S.TRANSL: Does a comment like that indicate that man is coming to grips with the problems that have plagued him for so long?

S.FORM: O pitosilan a kilac no mato'asay, matatodongay han?
O pitosilan a kilac no mato'asay, matatodongay han?
S.PHON: o~u pito~usiɾan a kiɾaʦ no~u mato~uʡasaj, matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj ħan?
S.TRANSL: Do they have suitable territory?

S.FORM: Misaodo'an iso ko mitosilay demak, misa'icel mipalak to toki to lipalipay a mitosil han?
Misaodo'an iso ko mitosilay demak, misa'icel mipalak to toki to lipalipay a mitosil han?
S.PHON: misao~uɬ~ɮo~uʡan iso~u ko~u mito~usiɾaj ɬ~ɮəmak, misaʡiʦəɾ mipaɾak to~u to~uki to~u ɾipaɾipaj a mito~usiɾ ħan?
S.TRANSL: Do you view your ministry as a treasure and manifest that in your weekly schedule?

S.FORM: Tolatekay miharateng kiso, o miroeroay ato mi'afasay to pasalat iso ko moecelay a palinian ni Yihofa han?
Tolatekay miharateng kiso, o miroeroay ato mi'afasay to pasalat iso ko moecelay a palinian ni Yihofa han?
S.PHON: to~uɾatəkaj miħaratəŋ kiso~u, o~u miro~uəro~uaj ato~u miʡafasaj to~u pasaɾat iso~u ko~u mo~uəʦəɾaj a paɾinian ni jiħo~ufa ħan?
S.TRANSL: Do you sometimes feel that Jehovah's righteous standards weigh you down or restrict your freedom?

S.FORM: Na malifetayto iso ko kanga'ay ni Yihofa han?
Na malifetayto iso ko kanga'ay ni Yihofa han?
S.PHON: na maɾifətajto~u iso~u ko~u kaŋaʡaj ni jiħo~ufa ħan?
S.TRANSL: How have you personally tasted Jehovah's goodness?

S.FORM: Ano maharekto misa'osi ikor, nga'ayay falicen han?
Ano maharekto misa'osi ikor, nga'ayay falicen han?
S.PHON: ano~u maħarəkto~u misaʡo~usi iko~ur, ŋaʡajaj faɾiʦən ħan?
S.TRANSL: After deciding a matter, could a Christian change his mind?

S.FORM: Ano o kaemangay a tamdaw kiso, iraay ko patosokan iso i no'adingoan han?
Ano o kaemangay a tamdaw kiso, iraay ko patosokan iso i no'adingoan han?
S.PHON: ano~u o~u kaəmaŋaj a tamɬ~ɮaw kiso~u, iraaj ko~u pato~uso~ukan iso~u i no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan ħan?
S.TRANSL: If you are a youth, do you have clear spiritual goals?

S.FORM: Anca nga'ay ko foti' to dadaya, lomowad kiso coko ci'icelay nanay kiso han?
Anca nga'ay ko foti' to dadaya, lomowad kiso coko ci'icelay nanay kiso han?
S.PHON: anʦa ŋaʡaj ko~u fo~utiʡ to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja, ɾo~umo~uwaɬ~ɮ kiso~u ʦo~uko~u ʦiʡiʦəɾaj nanaj kiso~u ħan?
S.TRANSL: We happily do these necessary things without any feeling of constraint or burden.

S.FORM: Ano caka picada kiso to sakowan no Kawas mida'oc a ma'orip, mamahemek kiso han?
Ano caka picada kiso to sakowan no Kawas mida'oc a ma'orip, mamahemek kiso han?
S.PHON: ano~u ʦaka piʦaɬ~ɮa kiso~u to~u sako~uwan no~u kawas miɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ a maʡo~urip, mamaħəmək kiso~u ħan?
S.TRANSL: Would you be happier if you had absolute independence and everlasting life?

S.FORM: Pa'araw kiso to ika a mitosil, iraay ko maanan nga'ayay a milifetan han?
Pa'araw kiso to ika a mitosil, iraay ko maanan nga'ayay a milifetan han?
S.PHON: paʡaraw kiso~u to~u ika a mito~usiɾ, iraaj ko~u maanan ŋaʡajaj a miɾifətan ħan?
S.TRANSL: What success have you had in showing these videos?

S.FORM: Wa nga'ay kako midemak to maanan a padama to mato'asay anca malahdaway ko ramod a salikaka han?
Wa nga'ay kako midemak to maanan a padama to mato'asay anca malahdaway ko ramod a salikaka han?
S.PHON: wa ŋaʡaj kako~u miɬ~ɮəmak to~u maanan a paɬ~ɮama to~u mato~uʡasaj anʦa maɾaħɬ~ɮawaj ko~u ramo~uɬ~ɮ a saɾikaka ħan?
S.TRANSL: Could I more actively display mercy and engage in positive deeds of kindness toward those who are suffering?

S.FORM: Pakalalokay ci Fitiriko to salikaka tayra i ta'angayay ko saali a kilac mitosil han?
Pakalalokay ci Fitiriko to salikaka tayra i ta'angayay ko saali a kilac mitosil han?
S.PHON: pakaɾaɾo~ukaj ʦi fitiriko~u to~u saɾikaka tajra i taʡaŋajaj ko~u saaɾi a kiɾaʦ mito~usiɾ ħan?
S.TRANSL: Would he recommend this type of service?

S.FORM: Miemienay to 'icel kako a mitosil, pasifana' to nga'ayay ratoh no Hongti Kitakit to tamdaw han?
Miemienay to 'icel kako a mitosil, pasifana' to nga'ayay ratoh no Hongti Kitakit to tamdaw han?
S.PHON: miəmiənaj to~u ʡiʦəɾ kako~u a mito~usiɾ, pasifanaʡ to~u ŋaʡajaj rato~uħ no~u ħo~uŋti kitakit to~u tamɬ~ɮaw ħan?
S.TRANSL: Am I doing my utmost to preach and teach the good news of the Kingdom?

S.FORM: Anca mangodoay kiso han?
Anca mangodoay kiso han?
S.PHON: anʦa maŋo~uɬ~ɮo~uaj kiso~u ħan?
S.TRANSL: Do you find it embarrassing?

S.FORM: Tano Harateng ni Yihofa ko Pinengneng Iso to Demak Han?
Tano Harateng ni Yihofa ko Pinengneng Iso to Demak Han?
S.PHON: tano~u ħaratəŋ ni jiħo~ufa ko~u pinəŋnəŋ iso~u to~u ɬ~ɮəmak ħan?
S.TRANSL: Are You Making Jehovah's Thoughts Your Own?

S.FORM: Wa malingad ko kanga'ay han?
Wa malingad ko kanga'ay han?
S.PHON: wa maɾiŋaɬ~ɮ ko~u kaŋaʡaj ħan?
S.TRANSL: get better?

S.FORM: Itini i Matay 10:11 to 13, sanay ko sowal ni Yis: "Ano icowaay a loma' ko nicomodan namo a miliso' i, nga'ayho han koya loma'.
Itini i Matay 10:11 to 13, sanay ko sowal ni Yis: "Ano icowaay a loma' ko nicomodan namo a miliso' i, nga'ayho han koya loma'.
S.PHON: itini i mataj **:** to~u **, sanaj ko~u so~uwaɾ ni jis: "ano~u iʦo~uwaaj a ɾo~umaʡ ko~u niʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮan namo~u a miɾiso~uʡ i, ŋaʡajħo~u ħan ko~uja ɾo~umaʡ.
S.TRANSL: In this way, we follow Jesus' instructions for the ministry recorded at Matthew 10:11-13, where he advised: "When you enter the house, greet the household.

S.FORM: Misa'icelay kiso milaheci to no'adingoan a patosokan han?
Misa'icelay kiso milaheci to no'adingoan a patosokan han?
S.PHON: misaʡiʦəɾaj kiso~u miɾaħəʦi to~u no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan a pato~uso~ukan ħan?
S.TRANSL: Do you have one or more spiritual goals that you are working toward?

S.FORM: Oniya Piharatengan a Sa'opo a limasmas, wa mahererek han?
Oniya Piharatengan a Sa'opo a limasmas, wa mahererek han?
S.PHON: o~unija piħaratəŋan a saʡo~upo~u a ɾimasmas, wa maħərərək ħan?
S.TRANSL: Will there ever be a final Memorial?

S.FORM: Misetekay kiso to faloco' itini kihecod a noka 'orip patahekal to timolo han?
Misetekay kiso to faloco' itini kihecod a noka 'orip patahekal to timolo han?
S.PHON: misətəkaj kiso~u to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ itini kiħəʦo~uɬ~ɮ a no~uka ʡo~urip pataħəkaɾ to~u timo~uɾo~u ħan?
S.TRANSL: Are you resolved to be courageous in all aspects of your life?

S.FORM: O micadaay to sarikec a tamdaw hamaan maketer a ngaliwngiw, tooren ko pakayraan ato 'icel no niyah padotoc a mihodop to Kawas, oniya sarikec o wacay to maolahay ko Kawas tisowanan han ko pinengneng.
O micadaay to sarikec a tamdaw hamaan maketer a ngaliwngiw, tooren ko pakayraan ato 'icel no niyah padotoc a mihodop to Kawas, oniya sarikec o wacay to maolahay ko Kawas tisowanan han ko pinengneng.
S.PHON: o~u miʦaɬ~ɮaaj to~u sarikəʦ a tamɬ~ɮaw ħamaan makətər a ŋaɾiwŋiw, to~uo~urən ko~u pakajraan ato~u ʡiʦəɾ no~u nijaħ paɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ a miħo~uɬ~ɮo~up to~u kawas, o~unija sarikəʦ o~u waʦaj to~u mao~uɾaħaj ko~u kawas tiso~uwanan ħan ko~u pinəŋnəŋ.
S.TRANSL: Instead of being angry and resentful, may they continue to serve God to the best of their ability in their new situation, viewing the discipline as evidence of Jehovah's love.

S.FORM: O fafahi ni Apraham kako ano han ni Sara pasowal, wa patayen no tao ci Apraham alatek, ano mahaen wa cowa ito ko mamala'osi ko sapairasol pakayni i miki'okan a teloc.
O fafahi ni Apraham kako ano han ni Sara pasowal, wa patayen no tao ci Apraham alatek, ano mahaen wa cowa ito ko mamala'osi ko sapairasol pakayni i miki'okan a teloc.
S.PHON: o~u fafaħi ni apraħam kako~u ano~u ħan ni sara paso~uwaɾ, wa patajən no~u tao~u ʦi apraħam aɾatək, ano~u maħaən wa ʦo~uwa ito~u ko~u mamaɾaʡo~usi ko~u sapairaso~uɾ pakajni i mikiʡo~ukan a təɾo~uʦ.
S.TRANSL: If Sarah had said that she was his wife, Abraham might have been killed and thus could not have produced the offspring whom God had promised him.

S.FORM: Wa nga'ay kiso malacafay to Kawas a matayal, misalafang to tayniay i kasakopang mieminay to toki mitosil a tamdaw han?
Wa nga'ay kiso malacafay to Kawas a matayal, misalafang to tayniay i kasakopang mieminay to toki mitosil a tamdaw han?
S.PHON: wa ŋaʡaj kiso~u maɾaʦafaj to~u kawas a matajaɾ, misaɾafaŋ to~u tajniaj i kasako~upaŋ miəminaj to~u to~uki mito~usiɾ a tamɬ~ɮaw ħan?
S.TRANSL: Can you work with God by showing hospitality to visiting full-time servants?

S.FORM: Wa nga'ay ci Satan pacieci to tamdaw mitoor to harateng ningra a midemak han?
Wa nga'ay ci Satan pacieci to tamdaw mitoor to harateng ningra a midemak han?
S.PHON: wa ŋaʡaj ʦi satan paʦiəʦi to~u tamɬ~ɮaw mito~uo~ur to~u ħaratəŋ niŋra a miɬ~ɮəmak ħan?
S.TRANSL: Can Satan force us to act against our own will?

S.FORM: Mala'osi ko tayal, wa so'lin pairato hemek no tamdaw han?
Mala'osi ko tayal, wa so'lin pairato hemek no tamdaw han?
S.PHON: maɾaʡo~usi ko~u tajaɾ, wa so~uʡɾin pairato~u ħəmək no~u tamɬ~ɮaw ħan?
S.TRANSL: Is succeeding in a career the key to happiness?

S.FORM: Sakafana'aw to samaanay ko kapinengneng no mita to payso, saso'linen a milicay ko niyah: "Pakaso'linay kako to kapinengneng no Fangcalay Cudad pakayni to payso, mikalasaka dademak a mitoor han?
Sakafana'aw to samaanay ko kapinengneng no mita to payso, saso'linen a milicay ko niyah: "Pakaso'linay kako to kapinengneng no Fangcalay Cudad pakayni to payso, mikalasaka dademak a mitoor han?
S.PHON: sakafanaʡaw to~u samaanaj ko~u kapinəŋnəŋ no~u mita to~u pajso~u, saso~uʡɾinən a miɾiʦaj ko~u nijaħ: "pakaso~uʡɾinaj kako~u to~u kapinəŋnəŋ no~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ pakajni to~u pajso~u, mikaɾasaka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak a mito~uo~ur ħan?
S.TRANSL: To analyze our view of money, we might honestly consider how we would answer these questions: 'Do I really believe and live in harmony with what the Bible says about money?

S.FORM: Kita i, maolahay to niyahan a mikikaka ko nika olah to Kawas han?
Kita i, maolahay to niyahan a mikikaka ko nika olah to Kawas han?
S.PHON: kita i, mao~uɾaħaj to~u nijaħan a mikikaka ko~u nika o~uɾaħ to~u kawas ħan?
S.TRANSL: How can we determine if our love of God is being eclipsed by love of self?

S.FORM: Cowa ko mamafalic han?
Cowa ko mamafalic han?
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa ko~u mamafaɾiʦ ħan?
S.TRANSL: stay the same?

S.FORM: Mirienangayto kiso to patirengay a tayal no likakawa han?
Mirienangayto kiso to patirengay a tayal no likakawa han?
S.PHON: miriənaŋajto~u kiso~u to~u patirəŋaj a tajaɾ no~u ɾikakawa ħan?
S.TRANSL: Have you ever volunteered for such a construction project?

S.FORM: Wa mahecad kita ci Alonan mitoor to so'linay kimad a ma'orip, caka talaw malikaf no paro no loma' ato roma tamdaw han?
Wa mahecad kita ci Alonan mitoor to so'linay kimad a ma'orip, caka talaw malikaf no paro no loma' ato roma tamdaw han?
S.PHON: wa maħəʦaɬ~ɮ kita ʦi aɾo~unan mito~uo~ur to~u so~uʡɾinaj kimaɬ~ɮ a maʡo~urip, ʦaka taɾaw maɾikaf no~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ ato~u ro~uma tamɬ~ɮaw ħan?
S.TRANSL: Like Aaron, in order to walk in the truth, we are willing to pay the price of accepting whatever changes may occur in our social status or family relationships.

S.FORM: Ano ciraramodayto kiso, mikangodoay kiso ato misalimlaay to raramod han?
Ano ciraramodayto kiso, mikangodoay kiso ato misalimlaay to raramod han?
S.PHON: ano~u ʦiraramo~uɬ~ɮajto~u kiso~u, mikaŋo~uɬ~ɮo~uaj kiso~u ato~u misaɾimɾaaj to~u raramo~uɬ~ɮ ħan?
S.TRANSL: Is that your view of marriage in general and particularly of your own marriage if you have a mate?

S.FORM: Pafelian noniya mararamoday cingra to tosa kihpicay a cudad, Pipowalan no 'Orip, Sasimsimen a Lima Salicay ato Namisanga'an ko 'orip han?
Pafelian noniya mararamoday cingra to tosa kihpicay a cudad, Pipowalan no 'Orip, Sasimsimen a Lima Salicay ato Namisanga'an ko 'orip han?
S.PHON: pafəɾian no~unija mararamo~uɬ~ɮaj ʦiŋra to~u to~usa kiħpiʦaj a ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, pipo~uwaɾan no~u ʡo~urip, sasimsimən a ɾima saɾiʦaj ato~u namisaŋaʡan ko~u ʡo~urip ħan?
S.TRANSL: They gave him two brochures, The Origin of Life, Five Questions Worth Asking and Was Life Created?

S.FORM: Harek saho misemsem ci Yopu, patodicek han ni Yihofa mirikec cingra, tada pakinaliay kora han?
Harek saho misemsem ci Yopu, patodicek han ni Yihofa mirikec cingra, tada pakinaliay kora han?
S.PHON: ħarək saħo~u misəmsəm ʦi jo~upo~u~u, pato~uɬ~ɮiʦək ħan ni jiħo~ufa mirikəʦ ʦiŋra, taɬ~ɮa pakinaɾiaj ko~ura ħan?
S.TRANSL: Was Jehovah harsh in giving such straightforward counsel after Job had endured so severe a trial?

S.FORM: Wa makahi kiso tayra i misaaliay to sadama a pala matayal han?
Wa makahi kiso tayra i misaaliay to sadama a pala matayal han?
S.PHON: wa makaħi kiso~u tajra i misaaɾiaj to~u saɬ~ɮama a paɾa matajaɾ ħan?
S.TRANSL: Would you be willing to relocate to serve him where there is a greater need for workers in his organization?

S.FORM: Kawra, mahecad kiso ci Martaan, paso'lin to mamiliyaw a ma'orip ko mapatayay a salawina noikor han?
Kawra, mahecad kiso ci Martaan, paso'lin to mamiliyaw a ma'orip ko mapatayay a salawina noikor han?
S.PHON: kawra, maħəʦaɬ~ɮ kiso~u ʦi martaan, paso~uʡɾin to~u mamiɾijaw a maʡo~urip ko~u mapatajaj a saɾawina no~uiko~ur ħan?
S.TRANSL: Are you, though, just as sure as Martha was of a future resurrection for a loved one?

S.FORM: Ano tahasi'ayaw kako to mahecaday sakayhid i, wa ira ko 'icel a miconged han?
Ano tahasi'ayaw kako to mahecaday sakayhid i, wa ira ko 'icel a miconged han?
S.PHON: ano~u taħasiʡajaw kako~u to~u maħəʦaɬ~ɮaj sakajħiɬ~ɮ i, wa ira ko~u ʡiʦəɾ a miʦo~uŋəɬ~ɮ ħan?
S.TRANSL: If I faced a similar temptation, would I have the strength to turn away?

S.FORM: O waywayan no mako paihekalay to pakaso'lin to salikoray a romi'ad nohatini, mamahererek ko pikowan ni Satan han?
O waywayan no mako paihekalay to pakaso'lin to salikoray a romi'ad nohatini, mamahererek ko pikowan ni Satan han?
S.PHON: o~u wajwajan no~u mako~u paiħəkaɾaj to~u pakaso~uʡɾin to~u saɾiko~uraj a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ no~uħatini, mamaħərərək ko~u piko~uwan ni satan ħan?
S.TRANSL: Do my actions show that I truly believe that these are the last days and that the end of Satan's rule is near?

S.FORM: Ano kalacafay romadiw ato kasakopang i, mahemekay kiso han?
Ano kalacafay romadiw ato kasakopang i, mahemekay kiso han?
S.PHON: ano~u kaɾaʦafaj ro~umaɬ~ɮiw ato~u kasako~upaŋ i, maħəməkaj kiso~u ħan?
S.TRANSL: How, though, do you feel about singing aloud with the congregation?

S.FORM: Misa'osian ako wa papadama takowanan mala rihaday to tao han?
Misa'osian ako wa papadama takowanan mala rihaday to tao han?
S.PHON: misaʡo~usian ako~u wa papaɬ~ɮama tako~uwanan maɾa riħaɬ~ɮaj to~u tao~u ħan?
S.TRANSL: Will my decisions help me to "be peaceable"?

S.FORM: O roma kaemangay cowa ko Misawacayay Tamdaw ni Yihofa ko wama wina, wa nga'ay kako ciharateng cangranan han?
O roma kaemangay cowa ko Misawacayay Tamdaw ni Yihofa ko wama wina, wa nga'ay kako ciharateng cangranan han?
S.PHON: o~u ro~uma kaəmaŋaj ʦo~uwa ko~u misawaʦajaj tamɬ~ɮaw ni jiħo~ufa ko~u wama wina, wa ŋaʡaj kako~u ʦiħaratəŋ ʦaŋranan ħan?
S.TRANSL: For instance, could I offer practical help to older fellow Christians, widows, and those who are spiritually fatherless children?

S.FORM: Kaemangay tamdaw, sapirienangaw kiso to kapot no widang han?
Kaemangay tamdaw, sapirienangaw kiso to kapot no widang han?
S.PHON: kaəmaŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw, sapiriənaŋaw kiso~u to~u kapo~ut no~u wiɬ~ɮaŋ ħan?
S.TRANSL: What if you are a young person who wants to fit in with your peers?

S.FORM: Nga'ayay a widang hano o papaira to nga'ayay epoc kitaanan hani?
Nga'ayay a widang hano o papaira to nga'ayay epoc kitaanan hani?
S.PHON: ŋaʡajaj a wiɬ~ɮaŋ ħano~u o~u papaira to~u ŋaʡajaj əpo~uʦ kitaanan ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why can you be confident that good associations will prove to be a blessing?

S.FORM: Misamaanay hani?
Misamaanay hani?
S.PHON: misamaanaj ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why will we avoid telling lies?

S.FORM: So'lin caka nga'ay ko tamdaw kitaanan hano padotocho kita hinapalada' cingraanan hani?
So'lin caka nga'ay ko tamdaw kitaanan hano padotocho kita hinapalada' cingraanan hani?
S.PHON: so~uʡɾin ʦaka ŋaʡaj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw kitaanan ħano~u paɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦħo~u kita ħinapaɾaɬ~ɮaʡ ʦiŋraanan ħani?
S.TRANSL: What reasons do we have for showing kindness even if at first it does not seem to be appreciated?

S.FORM: Samaan ko fafahi patado a miharateng to fa'inay hani?
Samaan ko fafahi patado a miharateng to fa'inay hani?
S.PHON: samaan ko~u fafaħi pataɬ~ɮo~u a miħaratəŋ to~u faʡinaj ħani?
S.TRANSL: How can a wife show consideration for her husband?

S.FORM: Misamanay Hano 'Papadotoc a Ciheci' Kita Hani?
Misamanay Hano 'Papadotoc a Ciheci' Kita Hani?
S.PHON: misamanaj ħano~u ʡpapaɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ a ʦiħəʦiʡ kita ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why We "Keep Bearing Much Fruit"

S.FORM: 'Ayaw no mamicada to ino' ko pacekiwan wa isalakatho midemak to maanan hani?
'Ayaw no mamicada to ino' ko pacekiwan wa isalakatho midemak to maanan hani?
S.PHON: ʡajaw no~u mamiʦaɬ~ɮa to~u ino~uʡ ko~u paʦəkiwan wa isaɾakatħo~u miɬ~ɮəmak to~u maanan ħani?
S.TRANSL: What steps must a Bible student take before baptism?

S.FORM: O Krisciyang wa samaan ko pinengneng to pasalat hani?
O Krisciyang wa samaan ko pinengneng to pasalat hani?
S.PHON: o~u krisʦijaŋ wa samaan ko~u pinəŋnəŋ to~u pasaɾat ħani?
S.TRANSL: How should Christians view freedom?

S.FORM: Mikitini toniya ma'oningay wa mananam ita ko maanan hani?
Mikitini toniya ma'oningay wa mananam ita ko maanan hani?
S.PHON: mikitini to~unija maʡo~uniŋaj wa mananam ita ko~u maanan ħani?
S.TRANSL: There is a valuable lesson here that we do well to learn.

S.FORM: Mikitini toni sapalimo'ot mamananam ita ko manan hani?
Mikitini toni sapalimo'ot mamananam ita ko manan hani?
S.PHON: mikitini to~uni sapaɾimo~uʡo~ut mamananam ita ko~u manan ħani?
S.TRANSL: What can we learn from Jesus' counsel?

S.FORM: Samaan kita mafana' to o cima ko 'citatodongay milifok to tahada'ocay 'orip a tamdaw' hani?
Samaan kita mafana' to o cima ko 'citatodongay milifok to tahada'ocay 'orip a tamdaw' hani?
S.PHON: samaan kita mafanaʡ to~u o~u ʦima ko~u ʡʦitato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj miɾifo~uk to~u taħaɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦaj ʡo~urip a tamɬ~ɮawʡ ħani?
S.TRANSL: How can we know who are "rightly disposed for everlasting life"?

S.FORM: O maanan ko padamaay toniya salikaka nga'ay ko pisaka dademak to pasalat hani?
O maanan ko padamaay toniya salikaka nga'ay ko pisaka dademak to pasalat hani?
S.PHON: o~u maanan ko~u paɬ~ɮamaaj to~unija saɾikaka ŋaʡaj ko~u pisaka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak to~u pasaɾat ħani?
S.TRANSL: What helped these brothers and sisters to make wise use of their freedom?

S.FORM: Milengoay ko Isaya to maanan noikoran a lemed hani?
Milengoay ko Isaya to maanan noikoran a lemed hani?
S.PHON: miɾəŋo~uaj ko~u isaja to~u maanan no~uiko~uran a ɾəməɬ~ɮ ħani?
S.TRANSL: How would you summarize some of the blessings mentioned in the book of Isaiah?

S.FORM: Hano o fodawan koni tokos hani?

S.FORM: Hano malahedaw ko sapicomodaw ni Mosi i Miki'okan a Pala a sapalemed.

S.PHON: ħano~u maɾaħəɬ~ɮaw ko~u sapiʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮaw ni mo~usi i mikiʡo~ukan a paɾa a sapaɾəməɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: In this article, we will analyze why the faithful man Moses lost out on the privilege of entering the Promised Land.

S.FORM: Hano awaay ko cecacecay a mirikecay to nganga'ay mifalic to pakayraan, a mirenec to saali no tamdamdaw hani?
Hano awaay ko cecacecay a mirikecay to nganga'ay mifalic to pakayraan, a mirenec to saali no tamdamdaw hani?
S.PHON: ħano~u awaaj ko~u ʦəʦaʦəʦaj a mirikəʦaj to~u ŋaŋaʡaj mifaɾiʦ to~u pakajraan, a mirənəʦ to~u saaɾi no~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why can human governments not bring about the changes mankind needs most?

S.FORM: Hano makahi kami micada tora satahidang hani?
Hano makahi kami micada tora satahidang hani?
S.PHON: ħano~u makaħi kami miʦaɬ~ɮa to~ura sataħiɬ~ɮaŋ ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why did we accept it, and how did Jehovah bless us?

S.FORM: Misamaanay hano cowa ka lefot a tamdaw mamafana' patahekal to cowa pisateked a olah?
Misamaanay hano cowa ka lefot a tamdaw mamafana' patahekal to cowa pisateked a olah?
S.PHON: misamaanaj ħano~u ʦo~uwa ka ɾəfo~ut a tamɬ~ɮaw mamafanaʡ pataħəkaɾ to~u ʦo~uwa pisatəkəɬ~ɮ a o~uɾaħ?
S.TRANSL: What indicates that imperfect humans are able to show unselfish love?

S.FORM: Misamanay hano ca'edongen ko polong sapilood a riko'?
Misamanay hano ca'edongen ko polong sapilood a riko'?
S.PHON: misamanaj ħano~u ʦaʡəɬ~ɮo~uŋən ko~u po~uɾo~uŋ sapiɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ a riko~uʡ?
S.TRANSL: Why is it vital that we wear each piece?

S.FORM: Hano palahaden ita ko harateng ni Yihofa, samanen o harateng Ningra mikikakaay to harateng no hekal.
Hano palahaden ita ko harateng ni Yihofa, samanen o harateng Ningra mikikakaay to harateng no hekal.
S.PHON: ħano~u paɾaħaɬ~ɮən ita ko~u ħaratəŋ ni jiħo~ufa, samanən o~u ħaratəŋ niŋra mikikakaaj to~u ħaratəŋ no~u ħəkaɾ.
S.TRANSL: Another reason why Jehovah's worshippers desire to align their thinking with God's is that his thinking is far superior to that of this world.

S.FORM: Misamaanay hano o sanga'ayay ko pikowan ni Yihofa?
Misamaanay hano o sanga'ayay ko pikowan ni Yihofa?
S.PHON: misamaanaj ħano~u o~u saŋaʡajaj ko~u piko~uwan ni jiħo~ufa?
S.TRANSL: Why is Jehovah's rulership the best possible?

S.FORM: Patahekal to sini'adaay, hano ciepoc tisowanan hani?
Patahekal to sini'adaay, hano ciepoc tisowanan hani?
S.PHON: pataħəkaɾ to~u siniʡaɬ~ɮaaj, ħano~u ʦiəpo~uʦ tiso~uwanan ħani?
S.TRANSL: How does a compassionate person benefit himself?

S.FORM: Misawacay to satadamaanay noka pikowan ni Yihofa, hano o masaka limlaan?
Misawacay to satadamaanay noka pikowan ni Yihofa, hano o masaka limlaan?
S.PHON: misawaʦaj to~u sataɬ~ɮamaanaj no~uka piko~uwan ni jiħo~ufa, ħano~u o~u masaka ɾimɾaan?
S.TRANSL: Why is the vindication of Jehovah's sovereignty an important issue facing mankind?

S.FORM: Misamaanay hano saka dademaken ita ko safalod no Taneng 14:15 i noka'orip?
Misamaanay hano saka dademaken ita ko safalod no Taneng 14:15 i noka'orip?
S.PHON: misamaanaj ħano~u saka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən ita ko~u safaɾo~uɬ~ɮ no~u tanəŋ **:** i no~ukaʡo~urip?
S.TRANSL: Why do we need to apply the Bible principle found at Proverbs 14:15?

S.FORM: Hano cowa ka nga'ay kako mirienang to micoliay to mikowan no sifo a demak?"
Hano cowa ka nga'ay kako mirienang to micoliay to mikowan no sifo a demak?"
S.PHON: ħano~u ʦo~uwa ka ŋaʡaj kako~u miriənaŋ to~u miʦo~uɾiaj to~u miko~uwan no~u sifo~u a ɬ~ɮəmak?"
S.TRANSL: Why should I not join worldly reform movements?'

S.FORM: Misamaanay hano 'penecen' ita ko keter hani?
Misamaanay hano 'penecen' ita ko keter hani?
S.PHON: misamaanaj ħano~u ʡpənəʦənʡ ita ko~u kətər ħani?
S.TRANSL: What spiritual and physical benefits can we derive by 'letting go' of anger?

S.FORM: Hano mihai ko roma tamdaw to nganga'ay ko tamdaw palahedaw to pades no hekal?
Hano mihai ko roma tamdaw to nganga'ay ko tamdaw palahedaw to pades no hekal?
S.PHON: ħano~u miħai ko~u ro~uma tamɬ~ɮaw to~u ŋaŋaʡaj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw paɾaħəɬ~ɮaw to~u paɬ~ɮəs no~u ħəkaɾ?
S.TRANSL: Why may the idea that man can solve his own problems sound appealing?

S.FORM: Misamaanay hano ira ko hatiniay a sarikec hani?
Misamaanay hano ira ko hatiniay a sarikec hani?
S.PHON: misamaanaj ħano~u ira ko~u ħatiniaj a sarikəʦ ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why is such a restriction needed?

S.FORM: Misamaanay hano pakaso'lin ko paro no loma' ni Milan, to sini'adaay ci Yihofa cangranan?
Misamaanay hano pakaso'lin ko paro no loma' ni Milan, to sini'adaay ci Yihofa cangranan?
S.PHON: misamaanaj ħano~u pakaso~uʡɾin ko~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ ni miɾan, to~u siniʡaɬ~ɮaaj ʦi jiħo~ufa ʦaŋranan?
S.TRANSL: Why did one family believe that Jehovah had exercised compassion toward them?

S.FORM: Pakayni sapilifokaw to sakalidong o mihadakan iso a 'icel, misamaanay hano iraay ko epoc hani?
Pakayni sapilifokaw to sakalidong o mihadakan iso a 'icel, misamaanay hano iraay ko epoc hani?
S.PHON: pakajni sapiɾifo~ukaw to~u sakaɾiɬ~ɮo~uŋ o~u miħaɬ~ɮakan iso~u a ʡiʦəɾ, misamaanaj ħano~u iraaj ko~u əpo~uʦ ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why is the effort you put into your salvation worthwhile?

S.FORM: Misamaanay hano papalahad ko Krisciyang to paka'metay to tireng a capeling hani?
Misamaanay hano papalahad ko Krisciyang to paka'metay to tireng a capeling hani?
S.PHON: misamaanaj ħano~u papaɾaħaɬ~ɮ ko~u krisʦijaŋ to~u pakaʡmətaj to~u tirəŋ a ʦapəɾiŋ ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why should Christians want to cultivate self-control?

S.FORM: Iraay ko nai Kawasay a taneng ni Taniil, hano mihaen ko sowal hani?
Iraay ko nai Kawasay a taneng ni Taniil, hano mihaen ko sowal hani?
S.PHON: iraaj ko~u nai kawasaj a tanəŋ ni taniiɾ, ħano~u miħaən ko~u so~uwaɾ ħani?
S.TRANSL: In what ways did Daniel show godly wisdom?

S.FORM: Misamaanay hano masaka limelaan ko midotimay hani?
Misamaanay hano masaka limelaan ko midotimay hani?
S.PHON: misamaanaj ħano~u masaka ɾiməɾaan ko~u miɬ~ɮo~utimaj ħani?
S.TRANSL: How can we meditate effectively?

S.FORM: Hano papadotoc kita a mitosil i tamdaw?
Hano papadotoc kita a mitosil i tamdaw?
S.PHON: ħano~u papaɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ kita a mito~usiɾ i tamɬ~ɮaw?
S.TRANSL: We want to be available to do what?

S.FORM: Toha sapilowidaw to harateng, hapinangen ita o manan ko katalawan no sasinting, honga' madipot kiso caka mafiyor no sasinting
Toha sapilowidaw to harateng, hapinangen ita o manan ko katalawan no sasinting, honga' madipot kiso caka mafiyor no sasinting
S.PHON: to~uħa sapiɾo~uwiɬ~ɮaw to~u ħaratəŋ, ħapinaŋən ita o~u manan ko~u kataɾawan no~u sasintiŋ, ħo~uŋaʡ maɬ~ɮipo~ut kiso~u ʦaka mafijo~ur no~u sasintiŋ
S.TRANSL: To win the battle for your mind, you must recognize the danger that propaganda poses and protect yourself from it

S.FORM: Sowal i 1 Korinto 2:16 pairaen ita ko 'harateng ni kristo,' sanay.
Sowal i 1 Korinto 2:16 pairaen ita ko 'harateng ni kristo,' sanay.
S.PHON: so~uwaɾ i * ko~urinto~u *:** pairaən ita ko~u ʡħaratəŋ ni kristo~u,ʡ sanaj.
S.TRANSL: The Bible at 1 Corinthians 2:16 speaks of having "the mind of Christ."

S.FORM: Tano tinakoen a mitadtad samaan ko wawa a minanam hato mafana' mirikec to harateng no niyah.
Tano tinakoen a mitadtad samaan ko wawa a minanam hato mafana' mirikec to harateng no niyah.
S.PHON: tano~u tinako~uən a mitaɬ~ɮtaɬ~ɮ samaan ko~u wawa a minanam ħato~u mafanaʡ mirikəʦ to~u ħaratəŋ no~u nijaħ.
S.TRANSL: How does a child develop self-discipline? Illustrate.

S.FORM: Mihadidi kita a mitosil to tamdaw, salikor wa ira ko nga'ayay harateng no tamdaw halatek
Mihadidi kita a mitosil to tamdaw, salikor wa ira ko nga'ayay harateng no tamdaw halatek
S.PHON: miħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮi kita a mito~usiɾ to~u tamɬ~ɮaw, saɾiko~ur wa ira ko~u ŋaʡajaj ħaratəŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw ħaɾatək
S.TRANSL: Some respond to our patient efforts to help them spiritually

S.FORM: Samaan palahad kita to pakarikecay to harateng no niyah?
Samaan palahad kita to pakarikecay to harateng no niyah?
S.PHON: samaan paɾaħaɬ~ɮ kita to~u pakarikəʦaj to~u ħaratəŋ no~u nijaħ?

S.FORM: Masowalay a salikaka mihaiyay to iraay ko epoc no no'adingoan a harateng.
Masowalay a salikaka mihaiyay to iraay ko epoc no no'adingoan a harateng.
S.PHON: maso~uwaɾaj a saɾikaka miħaijaj to~u iraaj ko~u əpo~uʦ no~u no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan a ħaratəŋ.
S.TRANSL: Expressions like those portray spirituality in a favorable way.

S.FORM: So'linsa ira ko nika sasongtol, alatek tatiihen ko harateng iso, samanen maolahay kiso cangranan, sapahemekaw cangranan.
So'linsa ira ko nika sasongtol, alatek tatiihen ko harateng iso, samanen maolahay kiso cangranan, sapahemekaw cangranan.

S.TRANSL: Such conflict can make you feel guilty, especially because you love your relatives dearly and have always tried to please them.

Milowid to Harateng no Miso

S.TRANSL: Winning the Battle for Your Mind

Tiya pakangolawen ci Tafiti i, samaanay ko harateng ningra hani?
S.PHON: tija pakaŋo~uɾawən ʦi tafiti i, samaanaj ko~u ħaratəŋ niŋra ħani?

S.FORM: Isarakat, maliyangayho kako tora harateng.
Isarakat, maliyangayho kako tora harateng.
S.PHON: isarakat, maɾijaŋajħo~u kako~u to~ura ħaratəŋ.

S.FORM: Pakayni sapieminaw to toki a dademak, paihekalay to kinafalahay to niyah a harateng.
Pakayni sapieminaw to toki a dademak, paihekalay to kinafalahay to niyah a harateng.
S.PHON: pakajni sapiəminaw to~u to~uki a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak, paiħəkaɾaj to~u kinafaɾaħaj to~u nijaħ a ħaratəŋ.
S.TRANSL: Many have made great sacrifices in order to make room in their lives for the pioneer service.

S.FORM: Paihkal to hinalafangay a harateng
Paihkal to hinalafangay a harateng
S.PHON: paiħkaɾ to~u ħinaɾafaŋaj a ħaratəŋ
S.TRANSL: by being hospitable?

S.FORM: Sanay ci Rian: "Ikor no mitolon kami, o cariraw, o tatiihay a harateng, malahdaway maemin.
Sanay ci Rian: "Ikor no mitolon kami, o cariraw, o tatiihay a harateng, malahdaway maemin.

S.TRANSL: Ryan recalls: "Immediately after the prayer, the negative feelings and worries that we initially experienced disappeared.

S.FORM: Tona mirocokay to raraw ko tamdaw, o sikawdan no Kawas iraay ko samaanay harateng?
Tona mirocokay to raraw ko tamdaw, o sikawdan no Kawas iraay ko samaanay harateng?
S.PHON: to~una miro~uʦo~ukaj to~u raraw ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u sikawɬ~ɮan no~u kawas iraaj ko~u samaanaj ħaratəŋ?

Harateng no roma tamdaw mangodoay i ka'alomanan a romadiw.
S.PHON: ħaratəŋ no~u ro~uma tamɬ~ɮaw maŋo~uɬ~ɮo~uaj i kaʡaɾo~umanan a ro~umaɬ~ɮiw.
S.TRANSL: However, some may feel uncomfortable singing in public.

S.FORM: Ano samaanto, samacayen i nga'ayay nangra ko harateng, mahaen tisowanan mitokel to tao minengneng to nga'ayay iso.
Ano samaanto, samacayen i nga'ayay nangra ko harateng, mahaen tisowanan mitokel to tao minengneng to nga'ayay iso.
S.PHON: ano~u samaanto~u, samaʦajən i ŋaʡajaj naŋra ko~u ħaratəŋ, maħaən tiso~uwanan mito~ukəɾ to~u tao~u minəŋnəŋ to~u ŋaʡajaj iso~u.
S.TRANSL: Focus on their positive traits, just as you want them to focus on yours.

S.FORM: Alatek mihaen ko harateng no mita: "Tokel ni Yihofa, o masamaanay a tamdaw kita hani?"
Alatek mihaen ko harateng no mita: "Tokel ni Yihofa, o masamaanay a tamdaw kita hani?"

S.TRANSL: So we might ask, "What is Jehovah primarily looking for in each of us?"

S.FORM: Ikor no pisolap niyam, tatayra kami a malinah sanayto ko harateng niyam."
Ikor no pisolap niyam, tatayra kami a malinah sanayto ko harateng niyam."
S.PHON: iko~ur no~u piso~uɾap nijam, tatajra kami a maɾinaħ sanajto~u ko~u ħaratəŋ nijam."

S.TRANSL: Some parents have concluded that it would be best for their son or daughter to delay baptism in order first to obtain some advanced education and become secure in a career.

Mahaenay ko harateng no 'alomanay tamdaw.

Ira ko harateng ni Kristo i, wa ira ko maanan a epoc i ka'orip ita?

S.FORM: Ma'araw no salikaka ko kinafalahay a harateng ita, wa makalim misawidang kitanan.
Ma'araw no salikaka ko kinafalahay a harateng ita, wa makalim misawidang kitanan.
S.PHON: maʡaraw no~u saɾikaka ko~u kinafaɾaħaj a ħaratəŋ ita, wa makaɾim misawiɬ~ɮaŋ kitanan.
S.TRANSL: When the brothers and sisters see someone new with a self-sacrificing spirit, they take you in."

S.FORM: Kawra, masowalay ni Pawlo, sasinanoten ita a 'misafaeloh to harateng'.
Kawra, masowalay ni Pawlo, sasinanoten ita a 'misafaeloh to harateng'.
S.PHON: kawra, maso~uwaɾaj ni pawɾo~u, sasinano~utən ita a ʡmisafaəɾo~uħ to~u ħaratəŋʡ.
S.TRANSL: But Paul also mentioned the need for us to 'make our mind over.'

S.FORM: O Harateng Iso Mafiyoray no Nima?
O Harateng Iso Mafiyoray no Nima?
S.PHON: o~u ħaratəŋ iso~u mafijo~uraj no~u nima?
S.TRANSL: Who Molds Your Thinking?

S.FORM: Ma'araw ko pacekiwan micada to ino' iraay ko manan harateng no mita hani?
Ma'araw ko pacekiwan micada to ino' iraay ko manan harateng no mita hani?
S.PHON: maʡaraw ko~u paʦəkiwan miʦaɬ~ɮa to~u ino~uʡ iraaj ko~u manan ħaratəŋ no~u mita ħani?

S.FORM: Dotoc wa milengo to sepat pakayniay i sarikec a demak: 1. mafana' mirikec to harateng no niyah, 2. micada to sarikec no wama wina, 3. micada to sarikec no kasakopang, ato 4. teloc no mana'ayay to sarikec a demak.

Dotoc wa milengo to sepat pakayniay i sarikec a demak: 1. mafana' mirikec to harateng no niyah, 2. micada to sarikec no wama wina, 3. micada to sarikec no kasakopang, ato 4. teloc no mana'ayay to sarikec a demak.
S.PHON: ɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ wa miɾəŋo~u to~u səpat pakajniaj i sarikəʦ a ɬ~ɮəmak: *. mafanaʡ mirikəʦ to~u ħaratəŋ no~u nijaħ, *. miʦaɬ~ɮa to~u sarikəʦ no~u wama wina, *. miʦaɬ~ɮa to~u sarikəʦ no~u kasako~upaŋ, ato~u *. təɾo~uʦ no~u manaʡajaj to~u sarikəʦ a ɬ~ɮəmak.

S.FORM: Ano makalimay kita ira ko mahecaday ni Yihofa a harateng, nga'ayay misimsim to maanan?
Ano makalimay kita ira ko mahecaday ni Yihofa a harateng, nga'ayay misimsim to maanan?
S.PHON: ano~u makaɾimaj kita ira ko~u maħəʦaɬ~ɮaj ni jiħo~ufa a ħaratəŋ, ŋaʡajaj misimsim to~u maanan?
S.TRANSL: In order to think like Jehovah, on what must we meditate?

Samaanay ko harateng iso to nga'ayay a waywayan no kapah a Krisciyang?

S.FORM: Oniya tosa lalakaw wa milengo samaan kita miliyas to pifiyor no harateng no hekal, samaan a pahecad to harateng ni Yihofa.
Oniya tosa lalakaw wa milengo samaan kita miliyas to pifiyor no harateng no hekal, samaan a pahecad to harateng ni Yihofa.
S.PHON: o~unija to~usa ɾaɾakaw wa miɾəŋo~u samaan kita miɾijas to~u pifijo~ur no~u ħaratəŋ no~u ħəkaɾ, samaan a paħəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u ħaratəŋ ni jiħo~ufa.
S.TRANSL: These two articles explain how we can avoid being molded by the world's thoughts and instead align our thinking with Jehovah's.

S.FORM: Mihaen to demak padamaay takowanan hamaan misamacay to harateng no niyah, sasamacayen ko harateng i papadamaen a tamdaw."

S.PHON: o~unija safaɾo~uɬ~ɮ maħawpaj ko~u kaʦaʦawmaʡ no~u kasakitakit, miʡəsaɾ to~u sapiɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ a ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ, ato~u patirəŋ to~u ko~uksaj a kapo~ut, ħo~u maɾiŋaɬ~ɮ ko~u kaɾaʦəʦaj no~u kaɾo~u kitakit, miɾifo~uk to~u saɬ~ɮipo~ut.
S.TRANSL: He proposed open diplomacy between nations, a reduction of armaments, and the establishment of a "general association of nations" that would benefit "great and small states alike."

S.FORM: 'Ayaw no tatayra miliso' kami, mingitangitan ci Yihofa padama tamiyanan, ho caka masasongtol ko caciyaw ato wama.
'Ayaw no tatayra miliso' kami, mingitangitan ci Yihofa padama tamiyanan, ho caka masasongtol ko caciyaw ato wama.
S.PHON: ʡajaw no~u tatajra miɾiso~uʡ kami, miŋitaŋitan ʦi jiħo~ufa paɬ~ɮama tamijanan, ħo~u ʦaka masaso~uŋto~uɾ ko~u ʦaʦijaw ato~u wama.
S.TRANSL: Before calling to check on him, my husband and I would pray that Jehovah help us not to respond in kind to angry reactions.

S.FORM: Samaanen iso misaday ko niyah, ho pakaco'ay to sakayhid?

S.FORM: Sasamaan ko hademak ita ho mafana' ci Yihofa kitaanan hani?

S.FORM: Halo milengo to maanan a safalod no Fangcalay Cudad mamipadama kitanan, ho nga'ay pafafida' to lihaf o so'linay ha, anca o makaniway.
Halo milengo to maanan a safalod no Fangcalay Cudad mamipadama kitanan, ho nga'ay pafafida' to lihaf o so'linay ha, anca o makaniway.

S.TRANSL: It also discusses what Bible principles will help us to improve our ability to evaluate information accurately.

Oniya tosa lalakaw wa milengo to sasamaan kita padadotoc misakareteng to so'linay kimad, ho eca pifalah to sapafeli ni Yihofa kitaanan a so'linay kimad.

S.TRANSL: The articles also consider what we can do to ensure that we keep viewing the truth as a treasure and that we never give up or never compromise on even one aspect of the precious truth Jehovah has taught us.

S.FORM: Telocto, mi'orongay ko ising to sapicosiya a mitoor ci Mariyaan, mikilim to toki milipalaw a micosiya cingranan, ho mapatay kora wawa.
Telocto, mi'orongay ko ising to sapicosiya a mitoor ci Mariyaan, mikilim to toki milipalaw a micosiya cingranan, ho mapatay kora wawa.
S.PHON: təɾo~uʦto~u, miʡo~uro~uŋaj ko~u isiŋ to~u sapiʦo~usija a mito~uo~ur ʦi marijaan, mikiɾim to~u to~uki miɾipaɾaw a miʦo~usija ʦiŋranan, ħo~u mapataj ko~ura wawa.

Mahecaday ira ko tingki nga' malikatay ko dawdaw, helipen ko matatodong ko kaadihay no fali, caciyaw anca romadiw i, wa ira ko 'icel.

S.TRANSL: Much as electricity powers a light bulb, breathing energizes your voice when you speak or sing.

Pakayni i sowal ni Yihofa ato fangcalay saocor, ato misadakan iso a 'icel, wa nga'ay padama to wawa iso, 'ira ko taneng nga'ay malidong.'

Mahemekay ko Misawacayay Tamdaw ni Yihofa paka'araw to pacekiwan micada to so'linay kimad, ira ko tatodong a micada to ino'.

S.TRANSL: It makes so much more sense to expend effort and resources in helping our children reach goals that will help them to maintain a good standing with Jehovah.

S.FORM: Kapah tamdaw misamacay micangacang to no'adingoan a patosokan, wa ira ko maanan a epoc hani?

S.TRANSL: Summarize the benefits of being focused on spiritual goals early in life.

Ano ira ko nika sasongtol ato salawina i, alatek tatiihen ko harateng iso, samaanen iso miremo ko hatiraay a harateng hani?

S.FORM: O makapahay faloco' ano caka pahatatanamen, wa ira ko masamaanay a teloc hani?
O makapahay faloco' ano caka pahatatanamen, wa ira ko masamaanay a teloc hani?
S.PHON: o~u makapaħaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ano~u ʦaka paħatatanamən, wa ira ko~u masamaanaj a təɾo~uʦ ħani?
S.TRANSL: What can result when a conscience is not properly trained?

S.FORM: Iraayho ko maanan a wacay, nga'ay kita pakaso'lin to wa miliyaw ira ko Lakoing i sera hani?
Iraayho ko maanan a wacay, nga'ay kita pakaso'lin to wa miliyaw ira ko Lakoing i sera hani?
S.PHON: iraajħo~u ko~u maanan a waʦaj, ŋaʡaj kita pakaso~uʡɾin to~u wa miɾijaw ira ko~u ɾako~uiŋ i səra ħani?
S.TRANSL: What later promises provided a basis for expecting coming blessings?

S.FORM: Mihaenay haw i, ira ko mahongyakay a Fangcalay Cudad, wanga' cipinang to Kimad no Kawas.
Mihaenay haw i, ira ko mahongyakay a Fangcalay Cudad, wanga' cipinang to Kimad no Kawas.
S.PHON: miħaənaj ħaw i, ira ko~u maħo~uŋjakaj a faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, waŋaʡ ʦipinaŋ to~u kimaɬ~ɮ no~u kawas.
S.TRANSL: Modern Hebrew and Greek are quite different from those languages back in Bible times.

S.FORM: Minanam to harateng ni Kristo, wa ira ko maanan a haepoc no mita hani?
Minanam to harateng ni Kristo, wa ira ko maanan a haepoc no mita hani?
S.PHON: minanam to~u ħaratəŋ ni kristo~u, wa ira ko~u maanan a ħaəpo~uʦ no~u mita ħani?
S.TRANSL: How will learning to think like Christ help us?

S.FORM: Ano micada kiso to ino' malo Krisciyang, wa ira ko manan a lemed hani?
Ano micada kiso to ino' malo Krisciyang, wa ira ko manan a lemed hani?
S.PHON: ano~u miʦaɬ~ɮa kiso~u to~u ino~uʡ maɾo~u krisʦijaŋ, wa ira ko~u manan a ɾəməɬ~ɮ ħani?
S.TRANSL: What blessings come from dedicating yourself to Jehovah?

S.FORM: Oniya tosa lalakaw, wa milengo to caka hecad a pakayraan paihkal to hinapalada'ay, wa ira ko maanan a haepoc.
Oniya tosa lalakaw, wa milengo to caka hecad a pakayraan paihkal to hinapalada'ay, wa ira ko maanan a haepoc.
S.PHON: o~unija to~usa ɾaɾakaw, wa miɾəŋo~u to~u ʦaka ħəʦaɬ~ɮ a pakajraan paiħkaɾ to~u ħinapaɾaɬ~ɮaʡaj, wa ira ko~u maanan a ħaəpo~uʦ.
S.TRANSL: These study articles consider the benefits of being generous in various ways.

S.FORM: Mihaen ko harateng iso alatek: "Paratoh to tamdaw ira ko maanan a epoc hani?
Mihaen ko harateng iso alatek: "Paratoh to tamdaw ira ko maanan a epoc hani?
S.PHON: miħaən ko~u ħaratəŋ iso~u aɾatək: "parato~uħ to~u tamɬ~ɮaw ira ko~u maanan a əpo~uʦ ħani?
S.TRANSL: Ask yourself: 'What can a greeting accomplish?

S.FORM: Ano tooren ko sarikec ato safalod ni Yihofa a midemak, wa ira ko maanan sapalemed hani?
Ano tooren ko sarikec ato safalod ni Yihofa a midemak, wa ira ko maanan sapalemed hani?
S.PHON: ano~u to~uo~urən ko~u sarikəʦ ato~u safaɾo~uɬ~ɮ ni jiħo~ufa a miɬ~ɮəmak, wa ira ko~u maanan sapaɾəməɬ~ɮ ħani?
S.TRANSL: What blessings result when we act in harmony with Jehovah's laws and principles?

S.FORM: Nalifetan ni Yopu papadama kitanan ira ko matatodongay noka pinengneng halo malifok ko sasayar.
Nalifetan ni Yopu papadama kitanan ira ko matatodongay noka pinengneng halo malifok ko sasayar.
S.PHON: naɾifətan ni jo~upo~u~u papaɬ~ɮama kitanan ira ko~u matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~uka pinəŋnəŋ ħaɾo~u maɾifo~uk ko~u sasajar.
S.TRANSL: We too can acquire proper perspective and gain comfort from the account of Job.

S.FORM: Pakayni Isaya 26:3 ano ira ko no'adingoan a harateng wa paira to maanan a haepoc?
Pakayni Isaya 26:3 ano ira ko no'adingoan a harateng wa paira to maanan a haepoc?
S.PHON: pakajni isaja **:* ano~u ira ko~u no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan a ħaratəŋ wa paira to~u maanan a ħaəpo~uʦ?
S.TRANSL: As noted at Isaiah 26:3, a spiritual outlook on life has what advantages?

S.FORM: Ira ko matatodongay a noka pinengneng to lawla, pakayni tonini, patirengay ci Yis to nga'ayay a ta'arawan.
Ira ko matatodongay a noka pinengneng to lawla, pakayni tonini, patirengay ci Yis to nga'ayay a ta'arawan.
S.PHON: ira ko~u matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a no~uka pinəŋnəŋ to~u ɾawɾa, pakajni to~unini, patirəŋaj ʦi jis to~u ŋaʡajaj a taʡarawan.
S.TRANSL: Jesus displayed a perfectly balanced view of pleasures.

S.FORM: Miniwingay to tosa ira ko kalitosa a lipay, 80 ko toki a misawacay cingra.
Miniwingay to tosa ira ko kalitosa a lipay, 80 ko toki a misawacay cingra.
S.PHON: miniwiŋaj to~u to~usa ira ko~u kaɾito~usa a ɾipaj, ** ko~u to~uki a misawaʦaj ʦiŋra.
S.TRANSL: At one facility, she spent 80 hours witnessing in just two and a half weeks.

S.FORM: Ano mahecad kita ci Mosian, itini likakawa no Kawas ira ko kalimlaan a 'inorong, ngangalefen ko pisinanot tonini.
Ano mahecad kita ci Mosian, itini likakawa no Kawas ira ko kalimlaan a 'inorong, ngangalefen ko pisinanot tonini.
S.PHON: ano~u maħəʦaɬ~ɮ kita ʦi mo~usian, itini ɾikakawa no~u kawas ira ko~u kaɾimɾaan a ʡino~uro~uŋ, ŋaŋaɾəfən ko~u pisinano~ut to~unini.
S.TRANSL: This is especially important if, like Moses, we have a measure of responsibility in God's organization.

S.FORM: Mafana' kita to hakowaay ko 'icel ni Satan a mifiyor, wa ira ko maanan a haepoc no mita hani?
Mafana' kita to hakowaay ko 'icel ni Satan a mifiyor, wa ira ko maanan a haepoc no mita hani?
S.PHON: mafanaʡ kita to~u ħako~uwaaj ko~u ʡiʦəɾ ni satan a mifijo~ur, wa ira ko~u maanan a ħaəpo~uʦ no~u mita ħani?
S.TRANSL: What advantage do we gain from knowing the extent of Satan's influence?

S.FORM: Ono ka'orip ita wa ira ko epoc.
Ono ka'orip ita wa ira ko epoc.
S.PHON: o~uno~u kaʡo~urip ita wa ira ko~u əpo~uʦ.
S.TRANSL: They give meaning to our life.

S.FORM: Kawraan, cacipinang kita toni tosa casi pakayniay cimaanan ko pitilid, mihaen nga' ira ko epoc palilam i matatodongay a tamdaw toniya casi.
Kawraan, cacipinang kita toni tosa casi pakayniay cimaanan ko pitilid, mihaen nga' ira ko epoc palilam i matatodongay a tamdaw toniya casi.
S.PHON: kawraan, ʦaʦipinaŋ kita to~uni to~usa ʦasi pakajniaj ʦimaanan ko~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮ, miħaən ŋaʡ ira ko~u əpo~uʦ paɾiɾam i matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a tamɬ~ɮaw to~unija ʦasi.
S.TRANSL: So that we can put these magazines in the right hands, however, we need to know the intended audience for each journal.

S.FORM: Ano mafalic ko pakayraan no tamdaw, wa ira ko coka hecad a pinengneng to so'linay kimad alatek
Ano mafalic ko pakayraan no tamdaw, wa ira ko coka hecad a pinengneng to so'linay kimad alatek
S.PHON: ano~u mafaɾiʦ ko~u pakajraan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, wa ira ko~u ʦo~uka ħəʦaɬ~ɮ a pinəŋnəŋ to~u so~uʡɾinaj kimaɬ~ɮ aɾatək
S.TRANSL: Circumstances in life change, as may a person's attitude toward the truth

S.FORM: Hano nga'ay pakaso'lin kita, ano icowato kita a mitosil, wa ira ko nga'ayay minaro'an hani?
Hano nga'ay pakaso'lin kita, ano icowato kita a mitosil, wa ira ko nga'ayay minaro'an hani?
S.PHON: ħano~u ŋaʡaj pakaso~uʡɾin kita, ano~u iʦo~uwato~u kita a mito~usiɾ, wa ira ko~u ŋaʡajaj minaro~uʡan ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why can we be sure that regardless of where we preach, we can have a fruitful ministry?

S.FORM: O widang no Kawas wa ira ko manan a sapalemed noikor?
O widang no Kawas wa ira ko manan a sapalemed noikor?
S.PHON: o~u wiɬ~ɮaŋ no~u kawas wa ira ko~u manan a sapaɾəməɬ~ɮ no~uiko~ur?
S.TRANSL: What is in store for friends of God?

S.FORM: Tada mahemekay ci Lika ira ko nga'ayay a pisawacay no niyah.
Tada mahemekay ci Lika ira ko nga'ayay a pisawacay no niyah.
S.PHON: taɬ~ɮa maħəməkaj ʦi ɾika ira ko~u ŋaʡajaj a pisawaʦaj no~u nijaħ.
S.TRANSL: Luca was thrilled to be able to give a good witness.

S.FORM: Kawra sapilifokaw to olah ato sapalemed ni Yihofa, tatano kahemekan ni Yihofa a pakayraan ko sapidoko ita Cingranan, hanaca ira ko nga'ayay kalala'ed to Kawas.
Kawra sapilifokaw to olah ato sapalemed ni Yihofa, tatano kahemekan ni Yihofa a pakayraan ko sapidoko ita Cingranan, hanaca ira ko nga'ayay kalala'ed to Kawas.
S.PHON: kawra sapiɾifo~ukaw to~u o~uɾaħ ato~u sapaɾəməɬ~ɮ ni jiħo~ufa, tatano~u kaħəməkan ni jiħo~ufa a pakajraan ko~u sapiɬ~ɮo~uko~u ita ʦiŋranan, ħanaʦa ira ko~u ŋaʡajaj kaɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮ to~u kawas.
S.TRANSL: But to enjoy divine favor, we must first and foremost support true worship and stick to it.

S.FORM: Ano iraay ko hatiraay harateng iso, paso'linen ci Yihofa to papadama tisowanan ira ko timolo.
Ano iraay ko hatiraay harateng iso, paso'linen ci Yihofa to papadama tisowanan ira ko timolo.
S.PHON: ano~u iraaj ko~u ħatiraaj ħaratəŋ iso~u, paso~uʡɾinən ʦi jiħo~ufa to~u papaɬ~ɮama tiso~uwanan ira ko~u timo~uɾo~u.
S.TRANSL: If you feel that way, Jehovah can help you develop courage.

S.FORM: Ora matayalay mapakokotay to misaloyaay to payci no tawki, kawra matanengay cingra a "misawidang" to tamdaw, ano malahedawto ko tayal ningra i, wa ira ko mamipadang cingranan.
Ora matayalay mapakokotay to misaloyaay to payci no tawki, kawra matanengay cingra a "misawidang" to tamdaw, ano malahedawto ko tayal ningra i, wa ira ko mamipadang cingranan.
S.PHON: o~ura matajaɾaj mapako~uko~utaj to~u misaɾo~ujaaj to~u pajʦi no~u tawki, kawra matanəŋaj ʦiŋra a "misawiɬ~ɮaŋ" to~u tamɬ~ɮaw, ano~u maɾaħəɬ~ɮawto~u ko~u tajaɾ niŋra i, wa ira ko~u mamipaɬ~ɮaŋ ʦiŋranan.
S.TRANSL: After being accused of wastefulness, the steward acted with "practical wisdom" to "make friends" to help him when he lost his stewardship.

S.FORM: Ano sapirenecaw kita to saali no niyah i no'adingoan, hanaca ira ko so'linay a lipahak, wa misa'icel misaka dademak to so'linay kimad.
Ano sapirenecaw kita to saali no niyah i no'adingoan, hanaca ira ko so'linay a lipahak, wa misa'icel misaka dademak to so'linay kimad.
S.PHON: ano~u sapirənəʦaw kita to~u saaɾi no~u nijaħ i no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan, ħanaʦa ira ko~u so~uʡɾinaj a ɾipaħak, wa misaʡiʦəɾ misaka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak to~u so~uʡɾinaj kimaɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: This is the key to satisfying your spiritual need and being lastingly happy.

S.FORM: Pakaso'linen iso ci Yihofa, makalimay tisowanan a "pakaala to so'linay a 'orip", ira ko lipahakay a hanoikoran.
Pakaso'linen iso ci Yihofa, makalimay tisowanan a "pakaala to so'linay a 'orip", ira ko lipahakay a hanoikoran.
S.PHON: pakaso~uʡɾinən iso~u ʦi jiħo~ufa, makaɾimaj tiso~uwanan a "pakaaɾa to~u so~uʡɾinaj a ʡo~urip", ira ko~u ɾipaħakaj a ħano~uiko~uran.
S.TRANSL: You can be sure that Jehovah wants you to "get a firm hold" on a happy future.

S.FORM: Mihaen to demak wa ira ko nga'ayay pifiyor cangranan, wa matanam nangra, "Ikaka no nika lemed no milayapay ko nika lemed no mipafeliay."
Mihaen to demak wa ira ko nga'ayay pifiyor cangranan, wa matanam nangra, "Ikaka no nika lemed no milayapay ko nika lemed no mipafeliay."
S.PHON: miħaən to~u ɬ~ɮəmak wa ira ko~u ŋaʡajaj pifijo~ur ʦaŋranan, wa matanam naŋra, "ikaka no~u nika ɾəməɬ~ɮ no~u miɾajapaj ko~u nika ɾəməɬ~ɮ no~u mipafəɾiaj."
S.TRANSL: Doing so can have a good effect on the young one, impressing on his heart that "there is more happiness in giving than there is in receiving."

S.FORM: Fafahiyan salikaka ci Ramalis cipinangay tonini, itini moetep ira ko pina no mihecaan ningra wa midemak to kalimelaan a sasa'osien.
Fafahiyan salikaka ci Ramalis cipinangay tonini, itini moetep ira ko pina no mihecaan ningra wa midemak to kalimelaan a sasa'osien.
S.PHON: fafaħijan saɾikaka ʦi ramaɾis ʦipinaŋaj to~unini, itini mo~uətəp ira ko~u pina no~u miħəʦaan niŋra wa miɬ~ɮəmak to~u kaɾiməɾaan a sasaʡo~usiən.
S.TRANSL: That is what Damaris experienced when she faced an important decision as a teenager.

S.FORM: Ano itiniay i niyaro' no niyah anca tayra i roma a kitakit, ano ira ko kalim no faloco' ita, wa nga'ay misaday no niyah, itini i faelohay hekal a malaheci to tayal no Kawas.
Ano itiniay i niyaro' no niyah anca tayra i roma a kitakit, ano ira ko kalim no faloco' ita, wa nga'ay misaday no niyah, itini i faelohay hekal a malaheci to tayal no Kawas.
S.PHON: ano~u itiniaj i nijaro~uʡ no~u nijaħ anʦa tajra i ro~uma a kitakit, ano~u ira ko~u kaɾim no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ita, wa ŋaʡaj misaɬ~ɮaj no~u nijaħ, itini i faəɾo~uħaj ħəkaɾ a maɾaħəʦi to~u tajaɾ no~u kawas.
S.TRANSL: In addition, offering ourselves willingly, in the area where we live or in a foreign country, prepares us for the theocratic activities that are awaiting us in the new world.

S.FORM: Wa ira ko tolas no roray.
Wa ira ko tolas no roray.
S.PHON: wa ira ko~u to~uɾas no~u ro~uraj.
S.TRANSL: Hope that all suffering will end.

S.FORM: Nikawrira, tano harateng ni Yihofa minengneng to demak, cowato ka nga'ay ira kono niyah a harateng, cowa ka saan.
Nikawrira, tano harateng ni Yihofa minengneng to demak, cowato ka nga'ay ira kono niyah a harateng, cowa ka saan.
S.PHON: nikawrira, tano~u ħaratəŋ ni jiħo~ufa minəŋnəŋ to~u ɬ~ɮəmak, ʦo~uwato~u ka ŋaʡaj ira ko~uno~u nijaħ a ħaratəŋ, ʦo~uwa ka saan.
S.TRANSL: We can be assured, however, that bringing our thinking into harmony with Jehovah's does not mean giving up all individual thought or expression.

S.FORM: Midotim kita to Kimad no Kawas, wa ira ko maanan a nga'ayay minaro'an hani?
Midotim kita to Kimad no Kawas, wa ira ko maanan a nga'ayay minaro'an hani?
S.PHON: miɬ~ɮo~utim kita to~u kimaɬ~ɮ no~u kawas, wa ira ko~u maanan a ŋaʡajaj minaro~uʡan ħani?
S.TRANSL: What happens when we meditate on Jehovah's thoughts?

S.FORM: Ma'araw ko kanga'ay no wawa to kalakapahan, mikitini faloco' micada to so'linay kimad, tada mahemekay kami ira ko nga'ayay minaro'an a mihadidi."
Ma'araw ko kanga'ay no wawa to kalakapahan, mikitini faloco' micada to so'linay kimad, tada mahemekay kami ira ko nga'ayay minaro'an a mihadidi."
S.PHON: maʡaraw ko~u kaŋaʡaj no~u wawa to~u kaɾakapaħan, mikitini faɾo~uʦo~uʡ miʦaɬ~ɮa to~u so~uʡɾinaj kimaɬ~ɮ, taɬ~ɮa maħəməkaj kami ira ko~u ŋaʡajaj minaro~uʡan a miħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮi."
S.TRANSL: My wife and I are so happy that our patient efforts to help our son through his teenage years paid off and reached his heart."

S.FORM: Minanam to harateng ni Kristo, wa ira ko manan a haepoc no mita?
Minanam to harateng ni Kristo, wa ira ko manan a haepoc no mita?
S.PHON: minanam to~u ħaratəŋ ni kristo~u, wa ira ko~u manan a ħaəpo~uʦ no~u mita?
S.TRANSL: How will thinking like Christ help us?

S.FORM: O pinengneng iso to pidoyongan, wa samaan milingat to pitosil iso i tamdaw?
O pinengneng iso to pidoyongan, wa samaan milingat to pitosil iso i tamdaw?
S.PHON: o~u pinəŋnəŋ iso~u to~u piɬ~ɮo~ujo~uŋan, wa samaan miɾiŋat to~u pito~usiɾ iso~u i tamɬ~ɮaw?
S.TRANSL: How can your view of your faith help you to speak to others?

S.FORM: O Cima ko Mihalamhaman no Mata Iso?
O Cima ko Mihalamhaman no Mata Iso?
S.PHON: o~u ʦima ko~u miħaɾamħaman no~u mata iso~u?
S.TRANSL: Where Are Your Eyes Looking?

S.FORM: Palosiyang to ngangan Iso.
Palosiyang to ngangan Iso.
S.PHON: paɾo~usijaŋ to~u ŋaŋan iso~u.
S.TRANSL: As one they declare abroad your fame.

S.FORM: Wa malefot ko tireng iso, talifak to romi'ami'ad.
Wa malefot ko tireng iso, talifak to romi'ami'ad.
S.PHON: wa maɾəfo~ut ko~u tirəŋ iso~u, taɾifak to~u ro~umiʡamiʡaɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: No matter what deep emotional wounds there were in the past, painful memories of them will not remain.

S.FORM: Kapah Tamdaw, Wa Nga'ay Raheker ko Ka'orip Iso
Kapah Tamdaw, Wa Nga'ay Raheker ko Ka'orip Iso
S.PHON: kapaħ tamɬ~ɮaw, wa ŋaʡaj raħəkər ko~u kaʡo~urip iso~u
S.TRANSL: Young Ones, You Can Have a Satisfying Life

S.FORM: Mitadtad to pihakelongan i cafay micudad, songila'en iso misaka dademak ko misadayan no likakawa a pinanaman a lalakaw, wa mafana'to a paca'of to masakenaay a salicay.
Mitadtad to pihakelongan i cafay micudad, songila'en iso misaka dademak ko misadayan no likakawa a pinanaman a lalakaw, wa mafana'to a paca'of to masakenaay a salicay.
S.PHON: mitaɬ~ɮtaɬ~ɮ to~u piħakəɾo~uŋan i ʦafaj miʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, so~uŋiɾaʡən iso~u misaka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak ko~u misaɬ~ɮajan no~u ɾikakawa a pinanaman a ɾaɾakaw, wa mafanaʡto~u a paʦaʡo~uf to~u masakənaaj a saɾiʦaj.
S.TRANSL: Using these worksheets, you can prepare an answer to one question after another.

S.FORM: "Nanay Palahecien Ningra ko Nisahalakaan Iso Maemin"
"Nanay Palahecien Ningra ko Nisahalakaan Iso Maemin"
S.PHON: "nanaj paɾaħəʦiən niŋra ko~u nisaħaɾakaan iso~u maəmin"
S.TRANSL: "May He... Give Success to All Your Plans"; Give Success to All Your Plans"

S.FORM: Milosiyang ngangan Iso,
Milosiyang ngangan Iso,
S.PHON: miɾo~usijaŋ ŋaŋan iso~u,
S.TRANSL: In ev'ry tribe and nation,

S.FORM: Milasil to ngangan Iso.
Milasil to ngangan Iso.
S.PHON: miɾasiɾ to~u ŋaŋan iso~u.
S.TRANSL: As we boldly speak in your name.

S.FORM: Maharatengayho iso, o cima ko "tadamaan" a tamdaw malo widang ni Tafiti hani?
Maharatengayho iso, o cima ko "tadamaan" a tamdaw malo widang ni Tafiti hani?
S.PHON: maħaratəŋajħo~u iso~u, o~u ʦima ko~u "taɬ~ɮamaan" a tamɬ~ɮaw maɾo~u wiɬ~ɮaŋ ni tafiti ħani?
S.TRANSL: Can you recall the name of a "majestic" one who became his dear friend?

S.FORM: Misamacayan iso o pasangaray no hekal, anca o Hongti Kitakit hokira?
Misamacayan iso o pasangaray no hekal, anca o Hongti Kitakit hokira?
S.PHON: misamaʦajan iso~u o~u pasaŋaraj no~u ħəkaɾ, anʦa o~u ħo~uŋti kitakit ħo~ukira?
S.TRANSL: Is your focus on the world's problems or on God's Kingdom?

S.FORM: wa mahela iso.
wa mahela iso.
S.PHON: wa maħəɾa iso~u.
S.TRANSL: to reach an honest heart?

S.FORM: Romi'ami'ad mi'osi kimad Iso.
Romi'ami'ad mi'osi kimad Iso.
S.PHON: ro~umiʡamiʡaɬ~ɮ miʡo~usi kimaɬ~ɮ iso~u.

S.PHON: kawra samaanən iso~u paso~uwaɾ ħani?

S.FORM: O maanan ko misalimlaan iso hani?
O maanan ko misalimlaan iso hani?
S.PHON: o~u maanan ko~u misaɾimɾaan iso~u ħani?

S.FORM: Mihaenay, adihayay ko lalangian iso padotoc misa'icel, milaheci to sakalidong no niyah a tayal.
Mihaenay, adihayay ko lalangian iso padotoc misa'icel, milaheci to sakalidong no niyah a tayal.
S.PHON: miħaənaj, aɬ~ɮiħajaj ko~u ɾaɾaŋian iso~u paɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ misaʡiʦəɾ, miɾaħəʦi to~u sakaɾiɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u nijaħ a tajaɾ.
S.TRANSL: You have every reason, then, to keep working out your own salvation!

S.FORM: Mitokelay ci Yihofa tisowanan mamisamaan misahalaka to hanoikoran iso hani?
Mitokelay ci Yihofa tisowanan mamisamaan misahalaka to hanoikoran iso hani?

S.TRANSL: What does Jehovah recommend for you?

S.FORM: Sanay ko sowal ni Wili: "Tayraayto i cikok ko wama iso!"

S.PHON: sanaj ko~u so~uwaɾ ni wiɾi: "tajraajto~u i ʦiko~uk ko~u wama iso~u!"
S.TRANSL: Willie responded, "Your father is in hell!"

S.PHON: paɬ~ɮama to~u tamɬ~ɮaw maɾo~u krisʦijaŋ wa mananam iso~u ko~u manan?

S.FORM: Mihaenay haw i, sinanoten iso to mamisamaan kiso kalasaka dademak to hakelong no 'orip iso.
Mihaenay haw i, sinanoten iso to mamisamaan kiso kalasaka dademak to hakelong no 'orip iso.
S.PHON: miħaənaj ħaw i, sinano~utən iso~u to~u mamisamaan kiso~u kaɾasaka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak to~u ħakəɾo~uŋ no~u ʡo~urip iso~u.
S.TRANSL: So think about what you want to do with your life.

S.FORM: Ano samaanto ko teloc, o so'linay noka pisa'icel iso mala kanga'ay to salikaka, wa mahemek ci Yihofa.
Ano samaanto ko teloc, o so'linay noka pisa'icel iso mala kanga'ay to salikaka, wa mahemek ci Yihofa.

S.TRANSL: Whatever the outcome, you can be sure that Jehovah will be pleased with your sincere efforts to gain your brother, God's friend.

S.TRANSL: Older Christians, Jehovah Treasures Your Loyalty

S.FORM: Ano sakaciraraw iso ko kawanan a mata iso i, dicohen a mifalah."

S.PHON: aɾatək maʡaraw iso~u ko~u nika ʦakat a mafaɾiʦ ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u amis.

S.FORM: Tikoren miharateng 1952 mihecaan, 'a'ideman no KGB pasowal ci Mariyaan: "Sawaden ko pihakelongan iso, anoca i mapalit to 10 miheca.
Tikoren miharateng 1952 mihecaan, 'a'ideman no KGB pasowal ci Mariyaan: "Sawaden ko pihakelongan iso, anoca i mapalit to 10 miheca.

S.FORM: O kananaman a toki, ano sahalafin sa, wa misamaan ko demak iso hani?

Ano cikaditayto ko riko' iso, alatek 'antohayto, wa samaanen iso hani?

Toniya sapatinako, pasowalan no tapang ko kahacecay no madimadiay a koli: "O nga'ayay ko demak iso.

S.PHON: o~u manan ko~u taɬ~ɮa kao~uɾaħan no~u təkəɬ~ɮan iso~u a sinaəɾ?

Ano mitoro' ko tamdaw to mararaway ko sowal anca mararaway ko demak iso i, wa palifet kitaanan to iraay ko mihadidiay hokira.

S.FORM: wawa Iso,
wawa Iso,
S.PHON: wawa iso~u,
S.TRANSL: that we might live.

S.FORM: Tikolen iso miharateng hena.
Tikolen iso miharateng hena.
S.PHON: tiko~uɾən iso~u miħaratəŋ ħəna.
S.TRANSL: Consider your own experience.

SARI'ANGAY a 'ada iso ci Satan!

S.TRANSL: YOU are under attack!

Ano so'linto caka olah ko 'alomanay tamdaw to nga'ayay ratoh, hano kamayan a matanam iso ko lipahak to padamaay to tamdaw malo Krisciyang a demakan hani?

S.TRANSL: How can you share in the joy of making disciples even in a challenging territory?

S.FORM: O waywayan iso paihkalay to maanan hani?

S.PHON: o~u wajwajan iso~u paiħkaɾaj to~u maanan ħani?

S.PHON: pakajni ʦi ako~umaan o~u manan ko~u kafanaʡan iso~u?

S.PHON: o~u manan ko~u mamananam iso~u nai naɾifətan niŋra ħani?

S.FORM: Mihaenay, pakayra i cowaho pinanam to so'linay kimad a tamdaw, samaanay ko pinengneng iso hani?
Mihaenay, pakayra i cowaho pinanam to so'linay kimad a tamdaw, samaanay ko pinengneng iso hani?

Ano maharek a mi'osi toni cudad, wa mahapinang iso to sasamaan misaka dademak i ka'orip to safalod no Fangcalay Cudad.

Oniya tosa lalakaw padama tisowanan pa'icel to paso'lin iso to miliyaway ma'orip.

Ano mafana' kiso to midemakay ko salikaka to pakidemay misafelit to palinian no Fangcalay Cudad a demak, sasamaan ko demak iso hani?

S.FORM: Alatek matengilay iso ko hatiniay a sowal: "O toki, o sanga'ayay a sapiadah."
Alatek matengilay iso ko hatiniay a sowal: "O toki, o sanga'ayay a sapiadah."

S.FORM: Ano, o malohemay malitengay kiso, samaan nga' mahapinang iso to so'linay pasasiyor ko tamdaw hani?
Ano, o malohemay malitengay kiso, samaan nga' mahapinang iso to so'linay pasasiyor ko tamdaw hani?
S.PHON: ano~u, o~u maɾo~uħəmaj maɾitəŋaj kiso~u, samaan ŋaʡ maħapinaŋ iso~u to~u so~uʡɾinaj pasasijo~ur ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw ħani?
S.TRANSL: If you are an elder, then, how can you meet the challenge of discerning heartfelt repentance?

S.FORM: Paisalakaten iso miteli ko no'adingoan a demak i ka'orip, paihekalay to miako'iday kiso to kihecod a sapafeli no Kawas, mihaen to demak matongalayho ko piingid iso to Kawas.
Paisalakaten iso miteli ko no'adingoan a demak i ka'orip, paihekalay to miako'iday kiso to kihecod a sapafeli no Kawas, mihaen to demak matongalayho ko piingid iso to Kawas.
S.PHON: paisaɾakatən iso~u mitəɾi ko~u no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan a ɬ~ɮəmak i kaʡo~urip, paiħəkaɾaj to~u miako~uʡiɬ~ɮaj kiso~u to~u kiħəʦo~uɬ~ɮ a sapafəɾi no~u kawas, miħaən to~u ɬ~ɮəmak mato~uŋaɾajħo~u ko~u piiŋiɬ~ɮ iso~u to~u kawas.
S.TRANSL: Giving priority to spiritual matters is a way of showing gratitude to God for these blessings, and that brings you closer to him.

S.FORM: Madimadiay, madimadien Iso.
Madimadiay, madimadien Iso.

S.FORM: Ano mahaenay i, malahedaway iso ko toki a lipahaken ato salikaka, ato patireng to koedaway a noka lawidang cangranan.
Ano mahaenay i, malahedaway iso ko toki a lipahaken ato salikaka, ato patireng to koedaway a noka lawidang cangranan.

S.FORM: i ka'ayaw Iso,
i ka'ayaw Iso,
S.PHON: i kaʡajaw iso~u,
S.TRANSL: we stand before your throne,
