S.FORM: Rihaday, Misamaan Milifok Kiso Hani?
Rihaday, Misamaan Milifok Kiso Hani?
S.PHON: riħaɬ~ɮaj, misamaan miɾifo~uk kiso~u ħani?
S.TRANSL: Peace, How Can You Find It?

S.FORM: Wa Nga'ay Kiso Misamaan A Mananam I Faelohay Kasakopang?
Wa Nga'ay Kiso Misamaan A Mananam I Faelohay Kasakopang?
S.PHON: wa ŋaʡaj kiso~u misamaan a mananam i faəɾo~uħaj kasako~upaŋ?
S.TRANSL: How Can You Adjust to Your New Congregation?

S.FORM: Mamafana' kiso paca'of to laenoay a salicay:
Mamafana' kiso paca'of to laenoay a salicay:
S.PHON: mamafanaʡ kiso~u paʦaʡo~uf to~u ɾaəno~uaj a saɾiʦaj:
S.TRANSL: Well, see if you can answer the following questions:

S.FORM: Pakayni pasangar no paro no loma', samaan kiso miliyas to sakalahedaw no halifon?
Pakayni pasangar no paro no loma', samaan kiso miliyas to sakalahedaw no halifon?
S.PHON: pakajni pasaŋar no~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ, samaan kiso~u miɾijas to~u sakaɾaħəɬ~ɮaw no~u ħaɾifo~un?
S.TRANSL: How can we prevent family difficulties from depriving us of the prize?

S.FORM: Wa nga'ay kiso patireng to samaanay a patosokan i no'adingoan?
Wa nga'ay kiso patireng to samaanay a patosokan i no'adingoan?
S.PHON: wa ŋaʡaj kiso~u patirəŋ to~u samaanaj a pato~uso~ukan i no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan?
S.TRANSL: What fine spiritual goals can you set for yourself?

S.FORM: Pakayniay pilimekan niyaro' a ma'oningay, saka dademakaw kiso to maanan a safalod?
Pakayniay pilimekan niyaro' a ma'oningay, saka dademakaw kiso to maanan a safalod?
S.PHON: pakajniaj piɾiməkan nijaro~uʡ a maʡo~uniŋaj, saka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakaw kiso~u to~u maanan a safaɾo~uɬ~ɮ?
S.TRANSL: What lesson from the cities of refuge do you plan to apply?

S.FORM: Ano komaen kiso to no'adingoan a kakaenen, wa milifok to samaanay a epoc?
Ano komaen kiso to no'adingoan a kakaenen, wa milifok to samaanay a epoc?
S.PHON: ano~u ko~umaən kiso~u to~u no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan a kakaənən, wa miɾifo~uk to~u samaanaj a əpo~uʦ?
S.TRANSL: What are some benefits that come from absorbing the spiritual food that God provides?

S.FORM: Misamaanay hano sapisa'icelaw kiso macakat i no'adingoan?
Misamaanay hano sapisa'icelaw kiso macakat i no'adingoan?
S.PHON: misamaanaj ħano~u sapisaʡiʦəɾaw kiso~u maʦakat i no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan?
S.TRANSL: Why do you want to move forward spiritually?

S.FORM: Sapilifokaw Kiso to Pihayda no Nima Hani?
Sapilifokaw Kiso to Pihayda no Nima Hani?
S.PHON: sapiɾifo~ukaw kiso~u to~u piħajɬ~ɮa no~u nima ħani?
S.TRANSL: Whose Recognition Do You Seek?

S.FORM: Pakaso'lin to papa'oripen no Kawas kiso?
Pakaso'lin to papa'oripen no Kawas kiso?
S.PHON: pakaso~uʡɾin to~u papaʡo~uripən no~u kawas kiso~u?
S.TRANSL: have confidence that God will rescue you?

S.FORM: Ano misatapang kiso to faelohay a tayal i, pairaen ko tala'ayaway a waywayan.
Ano misatapang kiso to faelohay a tayal i, pairaen ko tala'ayaway a waywayan.
S.PHON: ano~u misatapaŋ kiso~u to~u faəɾo~uħaj a tajaɾ i, pairaən ko~u taɾaʡajawaj a wajwajan.
S.TRANSL: If you have recently entered a different form of service, remain positive.

S.FORM: Samaan kiso mihapinang to no'adingoan no niyah?
Samaan kiso mihapinang to no'adingoan no niyah?
S.PHON: samaan kiso~u miħapinaŋ to~u no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan no~u nijaħ?
S.TRANSL: What might we consider when analyzing our spirituality?

S.FORM: "Yihofaaw Kawas niyam, matatodongay Kiso a mapahemek a mapacakat ko ngangan a mapafeli to 'icel.
"Yihofaaw Kawas niyam, matatodongay Kiso a mapahemek a mapacakat ko ngangan a mapafeli to 'icel.
S.PHON: "jiħo~ufaaw kawas nijam, matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj kiso~u a mapaħəmək a mapaʦakat ko~u ŋaŋan a mapafəɾi to~u ʡiʦəɾ.
S.TRANSL: "You are worthy, Jehovah our God, to receive the glory and the honor and the power, because you created all things."

S.FORM: Ano tahasi'ayaway kiso tora matiraay pakayraan, haratengen ko ta'arawan ni Mosi.
Ano tahasi'ayaway kiso tora matiraay pakayraan, haratengen ko ta'arawan ni Mosi.
S.PHON: ano~u taħasiʡajawaj kiso~u to~ura matiraaj pakajraan, ħaratəŋən ko~u taʡarawan ni mo~usi.
S.TRANSL: If you find yourself in either situation, consider the example of Moses.

S.FORM: Mitokelay mala'osi kiso.
Mitokelay mala'osi kiso.
S.PHON: mito~ukəɾaj maɾaʡo~usi kiso~u.
S.TRANSL: On this account, He wants you to succeed.

S.FORM: Ano miliyaw kiso miliso' cingranan i, nga'ayay saka dademaken ko Naitiraay i Kawas a Nga'ayay Ratoh!, saka 7 fedengan misatapang malalengo to Fangcalay Cudad.
Ano miliyaw kiso miliso' cingranan i, nga'ayay saka dademaken ko Naitiraay i Kawas a Nga'ayay Ratoh!, saka 7 fedengan misatapang malalengo to Fangcalay Cudad.
S.PHON: ano~u miɾijaw kiso~u miɾiso~uʡ ʦiŋranan i, ŋaʡajaj saka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən ko~u naitiraaj i kawas a ŋaʡajaj rato~uħ!, saka * fəɬ~ɮəŋan misatapaŋ maɾaɾəŋo~u to~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: When you meet again, you can refer to lesson 7 of the brochure Good News From God!, which is one of our tools for starting Bible studies.

S.FORM: Na milicayan ni Pontius Pilato ci Yis: "O Hongti no Yutaya a tamdaw kiso saw?"
Na milicayan ni Pontius Pilato ci Yis: "O Hongti no Yutaya a tamdaw kiso saw?"
S.PHON: na miɾiʦajan ni po~untio~u~us piɾato~u ʦi jis: "o~u ħo~uŋti no~u jo~u~utaja a tamɬ~ɮaw kiso~u saw?"
S.TRANSL: Pontius Pilate asked Jesus: "Are you the King of the Jews?"

S.FORM: Cowa pisakakinih to tamdaw ko Kawas, coko mamasemer kiso to sapiingidaw Cingranan saw?
Cowa pisakakinih to tamdaw ko Kawas, coko mamasemer kiso to sapiingidaw Cingranan saw?
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa pisakakiniħ to~u tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u kawas, ʦo~uko~u mamasəmər kiso~u to~u sapiiŋiɬ~ɮaw ʦiŋranan saw?
S.TRANSL: Does that not draw you even closer to our loving and impartial God?

S.FORM: Samaan kiso midemak nga', mamalifok ko "so'linay a 'orip" hani?
Samaan kiso midemak nga', mamalifok ko "so'linay a 'orip" hani?
S.PHON: samaan kiso~u miɬ~ɮəmak ŋaʡ, mamaɾifo~uk ko~u "so~uʡɾinaj a ʡo~urip" ħani?
S.TRANSL: How can you remain on the path to "the real life"?

S.FORM: Misamaan kiso pataengad to likat no niyah i fiyafiyaw hani?
Misamaan kiso pataengad to likat no niyah i fiyafiyaw hani?
S.PHON: misamaan kiso~u pataəŋaɬ~ɮ to~u ɾikat no~u nijaħ i fijafijaw ħani?
S.TRANSL: What can you do to let your light shine in the neighborhood?

S.FORM: Ano mahemek a romadiw kiso, o mamikowad to tao a fanekfeken a mikihatiya a romadiw.
Ano mahemek a romadiw kiso, o mamikowad to tao a fanekfeken a mikihatiya a romadiw.
S.PHON: ano~u maħəmək a ro~umaɬ~ɮiw kiso~u, o~u mamiko~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u tao~u a fanəkfəkən a mikiħatija a ro~umaɬ~ɮiw.
S.TRANSL: When you sing out joyfully, you will also encourage others to sing with confidence.

S.FORM: Pakayni miliyaway ma'orip, hinatalaay kiso to maanan?
Pakayni miliyaway ma'orip, hinatalaay kiso to maanan?
S.PHON: pakajni miɾijawaj maʡo~urip, ħinataɾaaj kiso~u to~u maanan?
S.TRANSL: What is your hope about the resurrection?

S.FORM: Sakaenepaw kiso to maanan a lalosidan?
Sakaenepaw kiso to maanan a lalosidan?
S.PHON: sakaənəpaw kiso~u to~u maanan a ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan?
S.TRANSL: With which tool do you need to become more familiar?

S.FORM: Cowa pakahadidi koya simpo, mangolaway tano Fangcalay Cudad a mitekol cingranan, celi' sanay cingranan: "Ci Satan kiso!
Cowa pakahadidi koya simpo, mangolaway tano Fangcalay Cudad a mitekol cingranan, celi' sanay cingranan: "Ci Satan kiso!
S.PHON: ʦo~uwa pakaħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮi ko~uja simpo~u, maŋo~uɾawaj tano~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ a mitəko~uɾ ʦiŋranan, ʦəɾiʡ sanaj ʦiŋranan: "ʦi satan kiso~u!
S.TRANSL: The priest soon lost his temper and threw a Bible at him, shouting: "You've become Satan!

S.FORM: Misamaan kiso mihinom to tao?
Misamaan kiso mihinom to tao?
S.PHON: misamaan kiso~u miħino~um to~u tao~u?
S.TRANSL: What can you do to provide comfort to others?

S.FORM: Ikor, pasowalay ko salikaka i fenpo: "Misatapang kiso to miliso'ay a demak," sanay.
Ikor, pasowalay ko salikaka i fenpo: "Misatapang kiso to miliso'ay a demak," sanay.
S.PHON: iko~ur, paso~uwaɾaj ko~u saɾikaka i fənpo~u: "misatapaŋ kiso~u to~u miɾiso~uʡaj a ɬ~ɮəmak," sanaj.
S.TRANSL: The brothers at the branch office said, "Now you will go out in the circuit work."

S.FORM: Tahatengilay kiso to maanan mararaway a sasowalen hani?
Tahatengilay kiso to maanan mararaway a sasowalen hani?
S.PHON: taħatəŋiɾaj kiso~u to~u maanan mararawaj a saso~uwaɾən ħani?
S.TRANSL: What lies have you heard religious leaders tell?

S.FORM: Miketon kiso to faloco' wa midofdof to saali ni Yihofa, o manan ko tatodong hani?
Miketon kiso to faloco' wa midofdof to saali ni Yihofa, o manan ko tatodong hani?
S.PHON: mikəto~un kiso~u to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ wa miɬ~ɮo~ufɬ~ɮo~uf to~u saaɾi ni jiħo~ufa, o~u manan ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ħani?
S.TRANSL: In what way is your dedication to Jehovah unconditional?

S.FORM: Paihekal kiso to misapoeneray faloco', wa makahi mitengil to sapaini no wama wina ato matenesay a Krisciyang.
Paihekal kiso to misapoeneray faloco', wa makahi mitengil to sapaini no wama wina ato matenesay a Krisciyang.
S.PHON: paiħəkaɾ kiso~u to~u misapo~uənəraj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ, wa makaħi mitəŋiɾ to~u sapaini no~u wama wina ato~u matənəsaj a krisʦijaŋ.
S.TRANSL: Humility will allow you to be open to suggestions from your parents and spiritually mature ones in the congregation.

S.FORM: Salicay i, wa pasicowa kiso a romakat hani?
Salicay i, wa pasicowa kiso a romakat hani?
S.PHON: saɾiʦaj i, wa pasiʦo~uwa kiso~u a ro~umakat ħani?
S.TRANSL: Where should you be headed?

S.FORM: Halatek cowa kananam kiso to pakayraan no salikaka a somowal nohatini, tinakoen cowa ka hecad to telangay a kasakopang a samadah anca samoecel sanay a somowal.
Halatek cowa kananam kiso to pakayraan no salikaka a somowal nohatini, tinakoen cowa ka hecad to telangay a kasakopang a samadah anca samoecel sanay a somowal.
S.PHON: ħaɾatək ʦo~uwa kananam kiso~u to~u pakajraan no~u saɾikaka a so~umo~uwaɾ no~uħatini, tinako~uən ʦo~uwa ka ħəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u təɾaŋaj a kasako~upaŋ a samaɬ~ɮaħ anʦa samo~uəʦəɾ sanaj a so~umo~uwaɾ.
S.TRANSL: For example, the brothers in your new congregation may be more reserved or more outspoken than you are used to.

S.FORM: Samaan kiso pakaso'lin to, o Kawas ko micorcoray kitaanan midemak tonini anca midemak toraan hani?"
Samaan kiso pakaso'lin to, o Kawas ko micorcoray kitaanan midemak tonini anca midemak toraan hani?"
S.PHON: samaan kiso~u pakaso~uʡɾin to~u, o~u kawas ko~u miʦo~urʦo~uraj kitaanan miɬ~ɮəmak to~unini anʦa miɬ~ɮəmak to~uraan ħani?"
S.TRANSL: How do we know that it is actually God who wants this or that from us?"

S.FORM: Ano ciwawaay kiso, ngitangiten ko Kawas to fangcalay saocor, padama tisowanan maolah a mirikec to wawa, ao cowa ka maketer a miseti' to wawa.
Ano ciwawaay kiso, ngitangiten ko Kawas to fangcalay saocor, padama tisowanan maolah a mirikec to wawa, ao cowa ka maketer a miseti' to wawa.
S.PHON: ano~u ʦiwawaaj kiso~u, ŋitaŋitən ko~u kawas to~u faŋʦaɾaj sao~uʦo~ur, paɬ~ɮama tiso~uwanan mao~uɾaħ a mirikəʦ to~u wawa, ao~u ʦo~uwa ka makətər a misətiʡ to~u wawa.
S.TRANSL: Or if you are a parent, you can request that God's spirit help you to discipline your children, not in anger, but in love.

S.FORM: O so'linay a malalokay a koli kiso.
O so'linay a malalokay a koli kiso.
S.PHON: o~u so~uʡɾinaj a maɾaɾo~ukaj a ko~uɾi kiso~u.
S.TRANSL: You were faithful over a few things.

S.FORM: Ano mihaen to demak kiso, wa maharateng ko kalimlaan i faloco', nga'ayho padama to tao.
Ano mihaen to demak kiso, wa maharateng ko kalimlaan i faloco', nga'ayho padama to tao.
S.PHON: ano~u miħaən to~u ɬ~ɮəmak kiso~u, wa maħaratəŋ ko~u kaɾimɾaan i faɾo~uʦo~uʡ, ŋaʡajħo~u paɬ~ɮama to~u tao~u.
S.TRANSL: In these ways, you not only fix the main points in your mind but also use what you have studied to benefit others.

S.FORM: Sasamaan a misa'osi to faloco' kiso misimaw tono niyah a no'adingoan a odo'?
Sasamaan a misa'osi to faloco' kiso misimaw tono niyah a no'adingoan a odo'?
S.PHON: sasamaan a misaʡo~usi to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ kiso~u misimaw to~uno~u nijaħ a no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan a o~uɬ~ɮo~uʡ?
S.TRANSL: What are you resolved to do to safeguard your spiritual riches?

S.FORM: Ano sapakatamaaw kiso toni hana misa'icel kiso wanga'....
Ano sapakatamaaw kiso toni hana misa'icel kiso wanga'....
S.PHON: ano~u sapakatamaaw kiso~u to~uni ħana misaʡiʦəɾ kiso~u waŋaʡ....
S.TRANSL: If you would find it you must be ever on the lookout....

S.FORM: Alatek mafana'ay kiso to cima salikaka, ikor no ino' kamayanay tahacada to 'icel nai Fangcalay Cudad, padadotoc a macakat.
Alatek mafana'ay kiso to cima salikaka, ikor no ino' kamayanay tahacada to 'icel nai Fangcalay Cudad, padadotoc a macakat.
S.PHON: aɾatək mafanaʡaj kiso~u to~u ʦima saɾikaka, iko~ur no~u ino~uʡ kamajanaj taħaʦaɬ~ɮa to~u ʡiʦəɾ nai faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, paɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ a maʦakat.
S.TRANSL: And you have seen that even after accepting the truth, Christians continue to make spiritual progress with the help of the Scriptures.

S.FORM: Mahecaday onini, ano mafana'ay kiso to o maanan ko patosokan no niyah, wa madolo matatodong ko misa'osian.
Mahecaday onini, ano mafana'ay kiso to o maanan ko patosokan no niyah, wa madolo matatodong ko misa'osian.
S.PHON: maħəʦaɬ~ɮaj o~unini, ano~u mafanaʡaj kiso~u to~u o~u maanan ko~u pato~uso~ukan no~u nijaħ, wa maɬ~ɮo~uɾo~u matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ko~u misaʡo~usian.
S.TRANSL: In the same way, if you know what your goals are, making good decisions becomes easier.

S.FORM: Ano kiso ko manilnilay misikay to 'ayaw mitosil a sa'opo, nga'ayay miharateng to sasamaan padama to mato'asay salikaka.
Ano kiso ko manilnilay misikay to 'ayaw mitosil a sa'opo, nga'ayay miharateng to sasamaan padama to mato'asay salikaka.
S.PHON: ano~u kiso~u ko~u maniɾniɾaj misikaj to~u ʡajaw mito~usiɾ a saʡo~upo~u, ŋaʡajaj miħaratəŋ to~u sasamaan paɬ~ɮama to~u mato~uʡasaj saɾikaka.
S.TRANSL: If you are assigned to handle a meeting for field service, you can do much to help older ones to have a share in the ministry.

S.FORM: Misarocod kita,
Misarocod kita,
S.PHON: misaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ kita,
S.TRANSL: May we be diligent,

S.FORM: Misamaan kita patahekal to so'linay olah?
Misamaan kita patahekal to so'linay olah?
S.PHON: misamaan kita pataħəkaɾ to~u so~uʡɾinaj o~uɾaħ?
S.TRANSL: How can we be sure that our love is genuine?

S.FORM: Samaan kita miliyas to sakarefongaw i sakayhid?
Samaan kita miliyas to sakarefongaw i sakayhid?
S.PHON: samaan kita miɾijas to~u sakarəfo~uŋaw i sakajħiɬ~ɮ?
S.TRANSL: How can we protect ourselves in dangerous situations?

S.FORM: Misamaan kita mihamham to tayniay mikimad a salikaka?
Misamaan kita mihamham to tayniay mikimad a salikaka?
S.PHON: misamaan kita miħamħam to~u tajniaj mikimaɬ~ɮ a saɾikaka?
S.TRANSL: How can we provide hospitality to visiting representatives of Jehovah's organization?

S.FORM: Tatodong i, misanga'an kita nga'ay paihkal to capeling Ningra.
Tatodong i, misanga'an kita nga'ay paihkal to capeling Ningra.
S.PHON: tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ i, misaŋaʡan kita ŋaʡaj paiħkaɾ to~u ʦapəɾiŋ niŋra.
S.TRANSL: That is, we were created to reflect his personality.

S.FORM: Rihaday kita.
Rihaday kita.
S.PHON: riħaɬ~ɮaj kita.
S.TRANSL: Comfort they will find.

S.FORM: Misa'icel kita
Misa'icel kita
S.PHON: misaʡiʦəɾ kita
S.TRANSL: That the day of his anger

S.FORM: Samaan kita o mikangodoay to raramod?
Samaan kita o mikangodoay to raramod?
S.PHON: samaan kita o~u mikaŋo~uɬ~ɮo~uaj to~u raramo~uɬ~ɮ?
S.TRANSL: How can we show that we honor marriage?

S.FORM: Mihaenay, wa nga'ay kita paira to epoc no kasakopang, wa nga'ayho misolot to adihayay tamdaw mirieneng to matatodongay a pidoko.
Mihaenay, wa nga'ay kita paira to epoc no kasakopang, wa nga'ayho misolot to adihayay tamdaw mirieneng to matatodongay a pidoko.
S.PHON: miħaənaj, wa ŋaʡaj kita paira to~u əpo~uʦ no~u kasako~upaŋ, wa ŋaʡajħo~u miso~uɾo~ut to~u aɬ~ɮiħajaj tamɬ~ɮaw miriənəŋ to~u matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a piɬ~ɮo~uko~u.
S.TRANSL: In turn, we strengthen our congregations and draw others to pure worship.

S.FORM: Sasamaan kita pakalalok to tamdaw?
Sasamaan kita pakalalok to tamdaw?
S.PHON: sasamaan kita pakaɾaɾo~uk to~u tamɬ~ɮaw?
S.TRANSL: What can be a source of encouragement?

S.FORM: Tinakoen, pakiyaho kita a padama cangranan.
Tinakoen, pakiyaho kita a padama cangranan.
S.PHON: tinako~uən, pakijaħo~u kita a paɬ~ɮama ʦaŋranan.
S.TRANSL: For example, they give financial support to those affected.

S.FORM: Mihaenay, oha mamisinanot kita mipili' to micadaan a lihaf.
Mihaenay, oha mamisinanot kita mipili' to micadaan a lihaf.
S.PHON: miħaənaj, o~uħa mamisinano~ut kita mipiɾiʡ to~u miʦaɬ~ɮaan a ɾiħaf.
S.TRANSL: Therefore, we need to be highly selective and to choose carefully what information we will read.

S.FORM: Haratengen, komaen kita to cihaleday kakaenen wa nga'ay patanoktok to tireng no niyah.
Haratengen, komaen kita to cihaleday kakaenen wa nga'ay patanoktok to tireng no niyah.
S.PHON: ħaratəŋən, ko~umaən kita to~u ʦiħaɾəɬ~ɮaj kakaənən wa ŋaʡaj patano~ukto~uk to~u tirəŋ no~u nijaħ.
S.TRANSL: Just as nourishing food strengthens the physical body, feeding our mind on Christ's thinking fortifies our spirituality.

S.FORM: Misamaan mafana' kita to pakinaliay ko niyah to lawla hokira?
Misamaan mafana' kita to pakinaliay ko niyah to lawla hokira?

S.FORM: Mikitini i Loma 14:21, mananamay ita ko maanan?
Mikitini i Loma 14:21, mananamay ita ko maanan?
S.PHON: mikitini i ɾo~uma **:**, mananamaj ita ko~u maanan?
S.TRANSL: How can the words found at Romans 14:21 move us to respect the conscience of others?

S.FORM: Malingad ko sofitay no Loma a milood i, salakatayho a cicokap.
Malingad ko sofitay no Loma a milood i, salakatayho a cicokap.
S.PHON: maɾiŋaɬ~ɮ ko~u so~ufitaj no~u ɾo~uma a miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i, saɾakatajħo~u a ʦiʦo~ukap.
S.TRANSL: A Roman soldier who was not wearing his boots was not ready to march into battle.

S.FORM: Pitilidan ni Pawlo to Ifiso cudad a lintad, misaka dademakan no sofitay no Loma a fonos, maedeng 50 kongfen ko ko'edaw, o sapilood to mangangataay a 'ada.
Pitilidan ni Pawlo to Ifiso cudad a lintad, misaka dademakan no sofitay no Loma a fonos, maedeng 50 kongfen ko ko'edaw, o sapilood to mangangataay a 'ada.
S.PHON: pitiɾiɬ~ɮan ni pawɾo~u to~u ifiso~u ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ a ɾintaɬ~ɮ, misaka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakan no~u so~ufitaj no~u ɾo~uma a fo~uno~us, maəɬ~ɮəŋ ** ko~uŋfən ko~u ko~uʡəɬ~ɮaw, o~u sapiɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u maŋaŋataaj a ʡaɬ~ɮa.
S.TRANSL: The sword used by Roman infantrymen at the time Paul wrote his letter was about 20 inches 50 cm long and was designed for hand-to-hand combat.

S.FORM: Itini romi'ad ni Yis, misaka dademakan no Yutaya tamdaw ko pakayraan no Krisiya ato Loma, kalisepatan pafafida' ko dadaya a toki.
Itini romi'ad ni Yis, misaka dademakan no Yutaya tamdaw ko pakayraan no Krisiya ato Loma, kalisepatan pafafida' ko dadaya a toki.
S.PHON: itini ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ni jis, misaka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakan no~u jo~u~utaja tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u pakajraan no~u krisija ato~u ɾo~uma, kaɾisəpatan pafafiɬ~ɮaʡ ko~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja a to~uki.
S.TRANSL: By Jesus' day, the Jews had adopted the Greek and Roman system of four watch periods during the night.

S.FORM: Ci Silas o Loma tamdaw ko kika ningra.
Ci Silas o Loma tamdaw ko kika ningra.
S.PHON: ʦi siɾas o~u ɾo~uma tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u kika niŋra.
S.TRANSL: Apparently, Silas too was a Roman citizen.

S.FORM: Kawraan, wa mitafo kita to misatenokay, eca ka pidama to yofayof anca 'a'ideman no mirikecay.
Kawraan, wa mitafo kita to misatenokay, eca ka pidama to yofayof anca 'a'ideman no mirikecay.
S.PHON: kawraan, wa mitafo~u kita to~u misatəno~ukaj, əʦa ka piɬ~ɮama to~u jo~ufajo~uf anʦa ʡaʡiɬ~ɮəman no~u mirikəʦaj.
S.TRANSL: But we realize that we must remain neutral, never favoring one political party or human leader over another.

S.FORM: Sanay ko ca'of no Fangcalay Cudad itini i: LOMA 5:12 ato 2 PITIRO 3:9.
Sanay ko ca'of no Fangcalay Cudad itini i: LOMA 5:12 ato 2 PITIRO 3:9.
S.PHON: sanaj ko~u ʦaʡo~uf no~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ itini i: ɾo~uma *:** ato~u * pitiro~u *:*.
S.TRANSL: The Bible answers that question at ROMANS 5:12 and 2 PETER 3:9.

S.FORM: Loma 8:6 somowalay to iraay ko manan a epoc no iraay ko no'adingoan harateng a tamdaw, sanay ko sinael: 'Midoedoay to tireng ko harateng, o mamapatay.
Loma 8:6 somowalay to iraay ko manan a epoc no iraay ko no'adingoan harateng a tamdaw, sanay ko sinael: 'Midoedoay to tireng ko harateng, o mamapatay.
S.PHON: ɾo~uma *:* so~umo~uwaɾaj to~u iraaj ko~u manan a əpo~uʦ no~u iraaj ko~u no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan ħaratəŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw, sanaj ko~u sinaəɾ: ʡmiɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uaj to~u tirəŋ ko~u ħaratəŋ, o~u mamapataj.
S.TRANSL: Romans 8:6 shows the advantage of being spiritually-minded, saying: "Setting the mind on the flesh means death, but setting the mind on the spirit means life and peace."

S.FORM: Itini tikami ni Pawlo mikiriwi'ay masowal ni Pawlo ko 'patanektekay' cingranan a salikaka.
Itini tikami ni Pawlo mikiriwi'ay masowal ni Pawlo ko 'patanektekay' cingranan a salikaka.
S.PHON: itini tikami ni pawɾo~u mikiriwiʡaj maso~uwaɾ ni pawɾo~u ko~u ʡpatanəktəkajʡ ʦiŋranan a saɾikaka.
S.TRANSL: Paul took special note of brothers who had proved to be "a strengthening aid" to him.

S.FORM: Misamaan a pakaremo to nika patay no paro no loma'?
Misamaan a pakaremo to nika patay no paro no loma'?
S.PHON: misamaan a pakarəmo~u to~u nika pataj no~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ?
S.TRANSL: How can a person cope with the loss of a loved one?

S.FORM: Irato ko mitaliyokay sikawdan kasakilac kantok pakafoti'an niyam i loma', mitahidangan ko ingataay a misakafahay tayra loma' komaen.
Irato ko mitaliyokay sikawdan kasakilac kantok pakafoti'an niyam i loma', mitahidangan ko ingataay a misakafahay tayra loma' komaen.
S.PHON: irato~u ko~u mitaɾijo~ukaj sikawɬ~ɮan kasakiɾaʦ kanto~uk pakafo~utiʡan nijam i ɾo~umaʡ, mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋan ko~u iŋataaj a misakafaħaj tajra ɾo~umaʡ ko~umaən.
S.TRANSL: Soon we were accommodating zone servants now known as circuit overseers and inviting nearby pioneers for meals.

S.FORM: Misamaanay a mihinom ko wawa to paro no loma'?
Misamaanay a mihinom ko wawa to paro no loma'?
S.PHON: misamaanaj a miħino~um ko~u wawa to~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ?
S.TRANSL: How can children become a source of comfort?

S.FORM: Patireng to loma' nangra, paloma to pinaloma, midimokos to paro no loma'.
Patireng to loma' nangra, paloma to pinaloma, midimokos to paro no loma'.
S.PHON: patirəŋ to~u ɾo~umaʡ naŋra, paɾo~uma to~u pinaɾo~uma, miɬ~ɮimo~uko~us to~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ.
S.TRANSL: They had houses to restore, fields to plant, and mouths to feed.

S.FORM: Iraay ko mitahidangay ci Pitiroan tayra i Kaysariya, o loma' no 'alafang tamdaw ci Kornilius, alatek adihayay ko maharatengay ningra.
Iraay ko mitahidangay ci Pitiroan tayra i Kaysariya, o loma' no 'alafang tamdaw ci Kornilius, alatek adihayay ko maharatengay ningra.
S.PHON: iraaj ko~u mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋaj ʦi pitiro~uan tajra i kajsarija, o~u ɾo~umaʡ no~u ʡaɾafaŋ tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi ko~urniɾio~u~us, aɾatək aɬ~ɮiħajaj ko~u maħaratəŋaj niŋra.
S.TRANSL: Imagine the thoughts that were going through the apostle Peter's mind when he was called to Caesarea to the home of the Gentile Cornelius.

S.FORM: Ikor, miocoran ci Yosif padama to tatosaay mapalitay, oniya tatosaay mapalitay nao 'akawangay ko saaro'an i loma' ni Falaw.
Ikor, miocoran ci Yosif padama to tatosaay mapalitay, oniya tatosaay mapalitay nao 'akawangay ko saaro'an i loma' ni Falaw.
S.PHON: iko~ur, mio~uʦo~uran ʦi jo~usif paɬ~ɮama to~u tato~usaaj mapaɾitaj, o~unija tato~usaaj mapaɾitaj nao~u ʡakawaŋaj ko~u saaro~uʡan i ɾo~umaʡ ni faɾaw.
S.TRANSL: One day, Joseph was entrusted with the care of two men who had formerly served in prominent positions in Pharaoh's court.

S.FORM: Itiniay i Krisiya a paro no loma' ingata no Atin mihatatanamay to Hongti Kitakit a radiw
Itiniay i Krisiya a paro no loma' ingata no Atin mihatatanamay to Hongti Kitakit a radiw
S.PHON: itiniaj i krisija a paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ iŋata no~u atin miħatatanamaj to~u ħo~uŋti kitakit a raɬ~ɮiw
S.TRANSL: Greek families in the Athens area practice Kingdom songs during a Christian gathering

S.FORM: Maedeng 1.6 kongli ko mirakatan nangra, saikor tayraay i loma' niyam.
Maedeng 1.6 kongli ko mirakatan nangra, saikor tayraay i loma' niyam.
S.PHON: maəɬ~ɮəŋ *.* ko~uŋɾi ko~u mirakatan naŋra, saiko~ur tajraaj i ɾo~umaʡ nijam.
S.TRANSL: They walked through town for about a mile 1.6 km and then returned to our home.

S.FORM: Itiniay i loma' no salikaka a milafin.
Itiniay i loma' no salikaka a milafin.
S.PHON: itiniaj i ɾo~umaʡ no~u saɾikaka a miɾafin.
S.TRANSL: On arriving, many stayed with local Witnesses, who lovingly opened their homes to their brothers.

S.FORM: O paro no loma' ni Nowa patirengay to masamaanay a ta'arawan no mita?
O paro no loma' ni Nowa patirengay to masamaanay a ta'arawan no mita?
S.PHON: o~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ ni no~uwa patirəŋaj to~u masamaanaj a taʡarawan no~u mita?
S.TRANSL: What example did Noah and his family set for us?

S.FORM: Telocto, marawraway ko kalala'ed ni Alon to paro no loma'.
Telocto, marawraway ko kalala'ed ni Alon to paro no loma'.
S.PHON: təɾo~uʦto~u, marawrawaj ko~u kaɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮ ni aɾo~un to~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ.
S.TRANSL: His family bonds became strained.

S.FORM: Ano irato ko Hongti Kitakit no Kawas i, cowato ko papateli tono loma', taykowan, sapaising a payci, cowato ko mamicakay to kakaenen anca calemcem to cacango'ot ko kakaenen.
Ano irato ko Hongti Kitakit no Kawas i, cowato ko papateli tono loma', taykowan, sapaising a payci, cowato ko mamicakay to kakaenen anca calemcem to cacango'ot ko kakaenen.
S.PHON: ano~u irato~u ko~u ħo~uŋti kitakit no~u kawas i, ʦo~uwato~u ko~u papatəɾi to~uno~u ɾo~umaʡ, tajko~uwan, sapaisiŋ a pajʦi, ʦo~uwato~u ko~u mamiʦakaj to~u kakaənən anʦa ʦaɾəmʦəm to~u ʦaʦaŋo~uʡo~ut ko~u kakaənən.
S.TRANSL: When God's Kingdom does come, rent and mortgages will cease, food will be free and plentiful, health-care costs will disappear.

S.FORM: Lengoen ita ko pina pakayraan, sasamaanen ita misi'ayaw ko picoli no paro no loma'.
Lengoen ita ko pina pakayraan, sasamaanen ita misi'ayaw ko picoli no paro no loma'.
S.PHON: ɾəŋo~uən ita ko~u pina pakajraan, sasamaanən ita misiʡajaw ko~u piʦo~uɾi no~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ.
S.TRANSL: Let us consider some situations involving family opposition and see how we can successfully face the challenges that these bring.

S.FORM: Dimokosen ko paro no loma' sanay ci Yihofa kitaanan.
Dimokosen ko paro no loma' sanay ci Yihofa kitaanan.
S.PHON: ɬ~ɮimo~uko~usən ko~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ sanaj ʦi jiħo~ufa kitaanan.
S.TRANSL: Jehovah expects his servants to care for their families.

S.FORM: O pakaloma'ay pidoko samaanay micowat to makelecay no paro no loma' hani?
O pakaloma'ay pidoko samaanay micowat to makelecay no paro no loma' hani?
S.PHON: o~u pakaɾo~umaʡaj piɬ~ɮo~uko~u samaanaj miʦo~uwat to~u makəɾəʦaj no~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ ħani?
S.TRANSL: What role does family worship play in promoting unity?

S.FORM: O Yutaya tamdaw cowa ka tayra i loma' no 'alafang a tamdaw.
O Yutaya tamdaw cowa ka tayra i loma' no 'alafang a tamdaw.
S.PHON: o~u jo~u~utaja tamɬ~ɮaw ʦo~uwa ka tajra i ɾo~umaʡ no~u ʡaɾafaŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: Jews simply did not enter the homes of Gentiles.

S.FORM: Misamaan ko demak ita nga' nga'ay padama to paro no loma' milifok to halifon?
Misamaan ko demak ita nga' nga'ay padama to paro no loma' milifok to halifon?
S.PHON: misamaan ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak ita ŋaʡ ŋaʡaj paɬ~ɮama to~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ miɾifo~uk to~u ħaɾifo~un?
S.TRANSL: How can we win the prize as a family?

S.FORM: Mapakalalokay ci Enli, pakahapinang ano papadama to paro no loma' patikol i likakawa no Kawas, edengan a pakayraan i, mitafo to madimadiay.
Mapakalalokay ci Enli, pakahapinang ano papadama to paro no loma' patikol i likakawa no Kawas, edengan a pakayraan i, mitafo to madimadiay.
S.PHON: mapakaɾaɾo~ukaj ʦi ənɾi, pakaħapinaŋ ano~u papaɬ~ɮama to~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ patiko~uɾ i ɾikakawa no~u kawas, əɬ~ɮəŋan a pakajraan i, mitafo~u to~u maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮiaj.
S.TRANSL: Henri realized that the only way to help his family come back to the truth was for him to persevere faithfully.

S.FORM: O mararamoday ato noka'orip no paro no loma' hano tataha cada to roray?
O mararamoday ato noka'orip no paro no loma' hano tataha cada to roray?
S.PHON: o~u mararamo~uɬ~ɮaj ato~u no~ukaʡo~urip no~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ ħano~u tataħa ʦaɬ~ɮa to~u ro~uraj?
S.TRANSL: Why can we expect that marriage and family life will involve some trials?

S.FORM: Ano sapadamaaw to paro no loma', milifok to halifon, tengilen ita ko maanan sapalimo'ot hani?
Ano sapadamaaw to paro no loma', milifok to halifon, tengilen ita ko maanan sapalimo'ot hani?
S.PHON: ano~u sapaɬ~ɮamaaw to~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ, miɾifo~uk to~u ħaɾifo~un, təŋiɾən ita ko~u maanan sapaɾimo~uʡo~ut ħani?
S.TRANSL: Heeding what Scriptural counsel will help us to attain the prize as a family?

S.FORM: Patikol ko Yutaya tamdaw i nalacolan, cowa ka tangsol a maro' i sinowayay a loma', awaay ko nga'ayay lidongen a omah ato fadiso'so'.
Patikol ko Yutaya tamdaw i nalacolan, cowa ka tangsol a maro' i sinowayay a loma', awaay ko nga'ayay lidongen a omah ato fadiso'so'.
S.PHON: patiko~uɾ ko~u jo~u~utaja tamɬ~ɮaw i naɾaʦo~uɾan, ʦo~uwa ka taŋso~uɾ a maro~uʡ i sino~uwajaj a ɾo~umaʡ, awaaj ko~u ŋaʡajaj ɾiɬ~ɮo~uŋən a o~umaħ ato~u faɬ~ɮiso~uʡso~uʡ.
S.TRANSL: The Jews did not return to comfortable houses; nor did they find cultivated fields and vineyards.

S.FORM: Teloc i, tahira i Yortan a hikociw, ma'araw niyam ko salikaka itini i tingloh no loma', iraay ko tatafing, matiliday to "Mahemekay a Militemoh to Misawacayay Tamdaw ni Yihofa!"
Teloc i, tahira i Yortan a hikociw, ma'araw niyam ko salikaka itini i tingloh no loma', iraay ko tatafing, matiliday to "Mahemekay a Militemoh to Misawacayay Tamdaw ni Yihofa!"
S.PHON: təɾo~uʦ i, taħira i jo~urtan a ħiko~uʦiw, maʡaraw nijam ko~u saɾikaka itini i tiŋɾo~uħ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, iraaj ko~u tatafiŋ, matiɾiɬ~ɮaj to~u "maħəməkaj a miɾitəmo~uħ to~u misawaʦajaj tamɬ~ɮaw ni jiħo~ufa!"
S.TRANSL: What a happy surprise when, on our arrival, we saw a crowd standing on top of the airport terminal with a banner that read "Welcome Jehovah's Witnesses"!

S.FORM: Anca, matalaway micada to pihakelongan no mita, a matawa ko paro no loma' ato fiyafiyaw?
Anca, matalaway micada to pihakelongan no mita, a matawa ko paro no loma' ato fiyafiyaw?
S.PHON: anʦa, mataɾawaj miʦaɬ~ɮa to~u piħakəɾo~uŋan no~u mita, a matawa ko~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ ato~u fijafijaw?
S.TRANSL: Still others may face the scorn of members of the community or of family members if they receive us favorably.

S.FORM: Mipohayay ko paro no loma' ni Kerus miteko cangranan i loma' nangra.
Mipohayay ko paro no loma' ni Kerus miteko cangranan i loma' nangra.
S.PHON: mipo~uħajaj ko~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ ni kəro~u~us mitəko~u ʦaŋranan i ɾo~umaʡ naŋra.
S.TRANSL: The Cruz family invited me to live with them in Angat.

S.FORM: Wa misa'icel kita patado miharateng i loma', kasakopang ato mitosilan a tamdaw.
Wa misa'icel kita patado miharateng i loma', kasakopang ato mitosilan a tamdaw.
S.PHON: wa misaʡiʦəɾ kita pataɬ~ɮo~u miħaratəŋ i ɾo~umaʡ, kasako~upaŋ ato~u mito~usiɾan a tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: So let us make every effort to be considerate of others, in the family, in the congregation, and in the field ministry.

S.FORM: Misamaan kita mipadang to paro no loma' no salikaka hani?
Misamaan kita mipadang to paro no loma' no salikaka hani?
S.PHON: misamaan kita mipaɬ~ɮaŋ to~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ no~u saɾikaka ħani?
S.TRANSL: One area that merits attention is the comfort and help we offer to families.

S.FORM: Pakayni waywayan, kalala'ed no paro no loma', katayalan ato romaroma, adihayay ko sapaini no hekal, nikawrira cowa ka hecad to harateng no Kawas.
Pakayni waywayan, kalala'ed no paro no loma', katayalan ato romaroma, adihayay ko sapaini no hekal, nikawrira cowa ka hecad to harateng no Kawas.
S.PHON: pakajni wajwajan, kaɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮ no~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ, katajaɾan ato~u ro~umaro~uma, aɬ~ɮiħajaj ko~u sapaini no~u ħəkaɾ, nikawrira ʦo~uwa ka ħəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u ħaratəŋ no~u kawas.
S.TRANSL: Segments of the world have offered advice on moral conduct, family relationships, job satisfaction, and other aspects of life.

S.FORM: O paro no loma' niyam miceriday mirienang to sa'opo ato mitosil.
O paro no loma' niyam miceriday mirienang to sa'opo ato mitosil.
S.PHON: o~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ nijam miʦəriɬ~ɮaj miriənaŋ to~u saʡo~upo~u ato~u mito~usiɾ.
S.TRANSL: Our family enjoyed a good routine of attending congregation meetings and preaching the truth of God's Word to others.

S.FORM: Pakayni to matiliday likisi no Yutaya tamdaw, o paro no loma' nora coko padetengay a mipatayay tamdaw o mamihakelong tayra i pilimekan a niyaro' sanay.
Pakayni to matiliday likisi no Yutaya tamdaw, o paro no loma' nora coko padetengay a mipatayay tamdaw o mamihakelong tayra i pilimekan a niyaro' sanay.
S.PHON: pakajni to~u matiɾiɬ~ɮaj ɾikisi no~u jo~u~utaja tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ no~ura ʦo~uko~u paɬ~ɮətəŋaj a mipatajaj tamɬ~ɮaw o~u mamiħakəɾo~uŋ tajra i piɾiməkan a nijaro~uʡ sanaj.
S.TRANSL: According to Jewish reference works, the unintentional manslayer's immediate family evidently joined him in the city of refuge.

S.FORM: To cila, iraay mahela ko tosaay ko kafoti'an a mitarohan no paliding a loma'.
To cila, iraay mahela ko tosaay ko kafoti'an a mitarohan no paliding a loma'.
S.PHON: to~u ʦiɾa, iraaj maħəɾa ko~u to~usaaj ko~u kafo~utiʡan a mitaro~uħan no~u paɾiɬ~ɮiŋ a ɾo~umaʡ.
S.TRANSL: The next day, all we could find was a little homemade trailer with two small bunk beds.

S.FORM: Paro no loma' ato wama ciriko'ay tono sofitay a riko'
Paro no loma' ato wama ciriko'ay tono sofitay a riko'
S.PHON: paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ ato~u wama ʦiriko~uʡaj to~uno~u so~ufitaj a riko~uʡ
S.TRANSL: Our family with Father in his military uniform

S.FORM: Ano midoedo to limasmas ni Yihofa ko wama wina i, papaira to manan a haepoc to paro no loma'? Patinakoen.
Ano midoedo to limasmas ni Yihofa ko wama wina i, papaira to manan a haepoc to paro no loma'? Patinakoen.
S.PHON: ano~u miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u ɾimasmas ni jiħo~ufa ko~u wama wina i, papaira to~u manan a ħaəpo~uʦ to~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ? patinako~uən.
S.TRANSL: How did one family benefit from the parents' obedience to Jehovah?

S.FORM: O cima ko tatahidangen ita tayni i loma' komaen hani?
O cima ko tatahidangen ita tayni i loma' komaen hani?
S.PHON: o~u ʦima ko~u tataħiɬ~ɮaŋən ita tajni i ɾo~umaʡ ko~umaən ħani?
S.TRANSL: Who should be among the primary guests in our homes?

S.FORM: Samaanen ita minengneng ko picoli no paro no loma' ato salawina hani?
Samaanen ita minengneng ko picoli no paro no loma' ato salawina hani?

S.TRANSL: How should we view family opposition?

S.FORM: O 'a'ideman no KGB tangsolay mikilim tamiyanan, miniknik to loma' niyam, sapikilimaw to cudad no Fangcalay Cudad.
O 'a'ideman no KGB tangsolay mikilim tamiyanan, miniknik to loma' niyam, sapikilimaw to cudad no Fangcalay Cudad.

S.TRANSL: It did not take long before KGB officers began to raid our home, looking for Bible literature.

S.FORM: Paro no loma', cafay matayal, cafay micudad, wa mitahidang kitaanan mirienang to misalisinay a demak alatek.
Paro no loma', cafay matayal, cafay micudad, wa mitahidang kitaanan mirienang to misalisinay a demak alatek.
S.PHON: paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ, ʦafaj matajaɾ, ʦafaj miʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, wa mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ kitaanan miriənaŋ to~u misaɾisinaj a ɬ~ɮəmak aɾatək.
S.TRANSL: Family members, workmates, and schoolmates may try to get us to join them in their celebrations.

S.FORM: So'li'lin matomesay ko mafirangay ato 'intehay itini toni hekal, nikawrira o nganga'ay milifok kita to rihaday, makala nga'ay ato paro no loma', ato Krisciyang a salikaka.
So'li'lin matomesay ko mafirangay ato 'intehay itini toni hekal, nikawrira o nganga'ay milifok kita to rihaday, makala nga'ay ato paro no loma', ato Krisciyang a salikaka.
S.PHON: so~uʡɾiʡɾin mato~uməsaj ko~u mafiraŋaj ato~u ʡintəħaj itini to~uni ħəkaɾ, nikawrira o~u ŋaŋaʡaj miɾifo~uk kita to~u riħaɬ~ɮaj, makaɾa ŋaʡaj ato~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ, ato~u krisʦijaŋ a saɾikaka.
S.TRANSL: Clearly, despite living in a hostile world, we can have inner peace that contributes to harmony within our families and with fellow Christians.

S.FORM: Padama to paro no loma' ato salikaka
Padama to paro no loma' ato salikaka
S.PHON: paɬ~ɮama to~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ ato~u saɾikaka
S.TRANSL: by assisting your family and fellow worshippers?

S.PHON: mito~ukəɾaj ko~u krisʦijaŋ a wama wina to~u maanan?

'Ayaw no mamicada to ino'ko wawa, o Krisciyang a wama wina pakaso'linayto to maanan a demak hani?

S.TRANSL: What do Christian parents want to be sure of before their children get baptized?

S.FORM: O mamicada to ino'a kaemangay tamdaw, wa miharateng to maanan a salicay?

S.PHON: o~u mamiʦaɬ~ɮa to~u ino~uʡa kaəmaŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw, wa miħaratəŋ to~u maanan a saɾiʦaj?

Patalipa'elalay ci Pitiro to Krisciyang pakayni misaka dademak to pasalat misinanot to maanan?

Niharatengan no mako,

Piki'adingan no mako.

S.FORM: O sowal ni Riana: "O tada nga'ayay a sa'osi no mako konini!"

Sa'osi no mako, maolah Tisowan.

S.TRANSL: My life I have promised in service to you,

S.FORM: O hahayien no mako, cowa ka tada maolah kako mifalic to faelohay a 'inorong miliso' to kasakopang, nikawrira cowa ka hatira ko piharateng ni Yihofa."
O hahayien no mako, cowa ka tada maolah kako mifalic to faelohay a 'inorong miliso' to kasakopang, nikawrira cowa ka hatira ko piharateng ni Yihofa."
S.PHON: o~u ħaħajiən no~u mako~u, ʦo~uwa ka taɬ~ɮa mao~uɾaħ kako~u mifaɾiʦ to~u faəɾo~uħaj a ʡino~uro~uŋ miɾiso~uʡ to~u kasako~upaŋ, nikawrira ʦo~uwa ka ħatira ko~u piħaratəŋ ni jiħo~ufa."

Iraay ko manan a tinakoan pakayni to misamangahay a olah?
S.PHON: iraaj ko~u manan a tinako~uan pakajni to~u misamaŋaħaj a o~uɾaħ?

O manan ko tatodong hani?
S.PHON: o~u manan ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ħani?
S.TRANSL: What does that mean?

S.FORM: Faelohay a mararamoday tataha si'ayaw to manan a roray?
Faelohay a mararamoday tataha si'ayaw to manan a roray?

S.TRANSL: What are some causes of 'tribulation in the flesh'?

S.FORM: Iraay ko manan a sinael nga'ayay mihinom tisowanan?

S.PHON: iraaj ko~u manan a sinaəɾ ŋaʡajaj miħino~um tiso~uwanan?
S.TRANSL: Which scriptures do you find particularly comforting?

S.FORM: O manan ko tatodong noni mapolosi hani?
O manan ko tatodong noni mapolosi hani?
S.PHON: o~u manan ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~uni mapo~uɾo~usi ħani?
S.TRANSL: What does this mean?

S.FORM: Matengilay ni Marta ko manan kafaheka'an a demak hani?
Matengilay ni Marta ko manan kafaheka'an a demak hani?
S.PHON: matəŋiɾaj ni marta ko~u manan kafaħəkaʡan a ɬ~ɮəmak ħani?

S.FORM: Toha sakafana'aw to pakinaliay ko niyah to lawla hokira, licayen ko niyah to manan?
Toha sakafana'aw to pakinaliay ko niyah to lawla hokira, licayen ko niyah to manan?
S.PHON: to~uħa sakafanaʡaw to~u pakinaɾiaj ko~u nijaħ to~u ɾawɾa ħo~ukira, ɾiʦajən ko~u nijaħ to~u manan?
S.TRANSL: What questions will help us to analyze how much we love pleasures?

S.FORM: Oya efa atoya midakaway tamdaw mitaypiyaway to manan hani?
Oya efa atoya midakaway tamdaw mitaypiyaway to manan hani?
S.PHON: o~uja əfa ato~uja miɬ~ɮakawaj tamɬ~ɮaw mitajpijawaj to~u manan ħani?
S.TRANSL: Now back to the chariots. What do they and their riders represent?

S.FORM: Pakayni to satadamaanay noka pikowan ni Yihofa, pakaso'linay kita to manan?
Pakayni to satadamaanay noka pikowan ni Yihofa, pakaso'linay kita to manan?
S.PHON: pakajni to~u sataɬ~ɮamaanaj no~uka piko~uwan ni jiħo~ufa, pakaso~uʡɾinaj kita to~u manan?
S.TRANSL: Of what must each of us be convinced?

S.FORM: Ano ciharateng kita a mihinom to tao mamalifok ko manan a sakalahekel?
Ano ciharateng kita a mihinom to tao mamalifok ko manan a sakalahekel?
S.PHON: ano~u ʦiħaratəŋ kita a miħino~um to~u tao~u mamaɾifo~uk ko~u manan a sakaɾaħəkəɾ?

S.FORM: Toha sapilifokaw to sida'it no Kawas, mamifalah to manan ko Krisciyang hani?
Toha sapilifokaw to sida'it no Kawas, mamifalah to manan ko Krisciyang hani?
S.PHON: to~uħa sapiɾifo~ukaw to~u siɬ~ɮaʡit no~u kawas, mamifaɾaħ to~u manan ko~u krisʦijaŋ ħani?

S.FORM: Ya misowalan no Kolosay 3:10 to 14 a faelohay pinangan, mahawpay ko manan a capeling hani?
Ya misowalan no Kolosay 3:10 to 14 a faelohay pinangan, mahawpay ko manan a capeling hani?
S.PHON: ja miso~uwaɾan no~u ko~uɾo~usaj *:** to~u ** a faəɾo~uħaj pinaŋan, maħawpaj ko~u manan a ʦapəɾiŋ ħani?
S.TRANSL: What aspects of the new personality are recorded at Colossians 3:10-14?

S.FORM: Iraayho ko manan a pakayraan, nga'ay padama kitaanan mihapinang to no'adingoan no niyah hani?
Iraayho ko manan a pakayraan, nga'ay padama kitaanan mihapinang to no'adingoan no niyah hani?
S.PHON: iraajħo~u ko~u manan a pakajraan, ŋaʡaj paɬ~ɮama kitaanan miħapinaŋ to~u no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan no~u nijaħ ħani?
S.TRANSL: To analyze the state of our spirituality, what else may be needed?

S.FORM: Pakaso'linay ci Yopu, iraay ko manan a hatokel no niyah?
Pakaso'linay ci Yopu, iraay ko manan a hatokel no niyah?
S.PHON: pakaso~uʡɾinaj ʦi jo~upo~u~u, iraaj ko~u manan a ħato~ukəɾ no~u nijaħ?

S.FORM: O manan ko lalangian no wama wina minayar to sapicadaaw no wawa to ino'?
O manan ko lalangian no wama wina minayar to sapicadaaw no wawa to ino'?
S.PHON: o~u manan ko~u ɾaɾaŋian no~u wama wina minajar to~u sapiʦaɬ~ɮaaw no~u wawa to~u ino~uʡ?
S.TRANSL: What has caused some Christian parents to encourage their children to postpone getting baptized?

S.FORM: Pakayni i pipadang ni Yihofa ci Hicikiyaan, o manan ko mamananam no mita?
Pakayni i pipadang ni Yihofa ci Hicikiyaan, o manan ko mamananam no mita?
S.PHON: pakajni i pipaɬ~ɮaŋ ni jiħo~ufa ʦi ħiʦikijaan, o~u manan ko~u mamananam no~u mita?

S.FORM: O manan a safalod padamaay to Krisciyang pararid a makelec hani?
O manan a safalod padamaay to Krisciyang pararid a makelec hani?
S.PHON: o~u manan a safaɾo~uɬ~ɮ paɬ~ɮamaaj to~u krisʦijaŋ parariɬ~ɮ a makəɾəʦ ħani?
S.TRANSL: What fundamental principle underlies Christian unity?

S.FORM: O manan ko papadama kitanan misalimla to sapatefoc ni Krsito?
O manan ko papadama kitanan misalimla to sapatefoc ni Krsito?
S.PHON: o~u manan ko~u papaɬ~ɮama kitanan misaɾimɾa to~u sapatəfo~uʦ ni krsito~u?

S.FORM: Mikitini i milifetan noya mihakelongay a Iciyopiya tamdaw ato tarokos ci Pawlo mananamay ita ko manan?
Mikitini i milifetan noya mihakelongay a Iciyopiya tamdaw ato tarokos ci Pawlo mananamay ita ko manan?
S.PHON: mikitini i miɾifətan no~uja miħakəɾo~uŋaj a iʦijo~upija tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u taro~uko~us ʦi pawɾo~u mananamaj ita ko~u manan?
S.TRANSL: What can we learn about baptism from the Ethiopian proselyte and from the apostle Paul?

S.FORM: Haharatengen no kaemangay ko manan padama cangranan madolo a midofdof to wama wina?
Haharatengen no kaemangay ko manan padama cangranan madolo a midofdof to wama wina?
S.PHON: ħaħaratəŋən no~u kaəmaŋaj ko~u manan paɬ~ɮama ʦaŋranan maɬ~ɮo~uɾo~u a miɬ~ɮo~ufɬ~ɮo~uf to~u wama wina?
S.TRANSL: What will help young ones to be obedient to their parents?

S.FORM: Iraay ko manan wacayan paihekalay to mikayatan no Kawas ko aniniay ato isaka cecayay hahekalan a Kasacefang no Mikayatay a Malohemay Malitengay?
Iraay ko manan wacayan paihekalay to mikayatan no Kawas ko aniniay ato isaka cecayay hahekalan a Kasacefang no Mikayatay a Malohemay Malitengay?

S.FORM: O haharatengen ita ko manan a salicay?
O haharatengen ita ko manan a salicay?
S.PHON: o~u ħaħaratəŋən ita ko~u manan a saɾiʦaj?

S.FORM: O manan ko sakakaay lalangian ita midopo to satadamaanay noka pikowan ni Yihofa hani?

Iraay ko manan nga'ayay kalasaka dademaken a sapadama pa'icel kitanan a paka'met to tireng?

S.FORM: Maolahay to Kawas a tamdaw, papalahad to manan a capeling?
Maolahay to Kawas a tamdaw, papalahad to manan a capeling?

O manan ko padamaay ci Annaan milifok to hemek hani?
S.PHON: o~u manan ko~u paɬ~ɮamaaj ʦi annaan miɾifo~uk to~u ħəmək ħani?

S.FORM: Iraay ko manan a sapasifana' misalof to ngiha' ita?

S.PHON: iraaj ko~u manan a sapasifanaʡ misaɾo~uf to~u ŋiħaʡ ita?
S.TRANSL: What are some suggestions for improving our singing?

S.FORM: Pakayni pihayda ni Yihofa, o manan ko haharatengen no mita hani?
Pakayni pihayda ni Yihofa, o manan ko haharatengen no mita hani?
S.PHON: pakajni piħajɬ~ɮa ni jiħo~ufa, o~u manan ko~u ħaħaratəŋən no~u mita ħani?

S.FORM: Pakayni i satadamaanay noka pikowan no Kawas, o manan ko misalalicayan ni Satan?
Pakayni i satadamaanay noka pikowan no Kawas, o manan ko misalalicayan ni Satan?
S.PHON: pakajni i sataɬ~ɮamaanaj no~uka piko~uwan no~u kawas, o~u manan ko~u misaɾaɾiʦajan ni satan?

S.FORM: O manan ko papadama kitanan caka pakinali a cariraw, matinako ko saparihaday no Kawas hani?
O manan ko papadama kitanan caka pakinali a cariraw, matinako ko saparihaday no Kawas hani?
S.PHON: o~u manan ko~u papaɬ~ɮama kitanan ʦaka pakinaɾi a ʦariraw, matinako~u ko~u sapariħaɬ~ɮaj no~u kawas ħani?

Oya saka 8 mapolosi isatapang ma'araway ni Cikariya ko manan?

S.FORM: Mararid ci Yihofa padama to Israil tamdaw pasasiyor, o manan ko mamananam ita?

Oya ma'araway a mapolosi ni Cikariya, patalipa'elalay kitanan to manan?
S.PHON: o~uja maʡarawaj a mapo~uɾo~usi ni ʦikarija, pataɾipaʡəɾaɾaj kitanan to~u manan?

S.FORM: Sowalen hena, ya keriden ni Nihimiya ko Israil patireng to 'adipel i, iraay ko manan a romadiway a limasmas?
Sowalen hena, ya keriden ni Nihimiya ko Israil patireng to 'adipel i, iraay ko manan a romadiway a limasmas?

S.FORM: O manan ko tatodong no taneng hani? O tamdaw o citanengay hokira, hano cowa ko mihecaan ko pi'arawan hani?
O manan ko tatodong no taneng hani? O tamdaw o citanengay hokira, hano cowa ko mihecaan ko pi'arawan hani?
S.PHON: o~u manan ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u tanəŋ ħani? o~u tamɬ~ɮaw o~u ʦitanəŋaj ħo~ukira, ħano~u ʦo~uwa ko~u miħəʦaan ko~u piʡarawan ħani?

S.FORM: Ano tahapades kita madimadi to Kawas, papala'osi to manan a patosokan hani?
Ano tahapades kita madimadi to Kawas, papala'osi to manan a patosokan hani?
S.PHON: ano~u taħapaɬ~ɮəs kita maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮi to~u kawas, papaɾaʡo~usi to~u manan a pato~uso~ukan ħani?

S.FORM: Misawacay to matatodongay ko satadamaanay noka pikowan no Kawas mikikakaay to manan?
Misawacay to matatodongay ko satadamaanay noka pikowan no Kawas mikikakaay to manan?
S.PHON: misawaʦaj to~u matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj ko~u sataɬ~ɮamaanaj no~uka piko~uwan no~u kawas mikikakaaj to~u manan?

S.PHON: mikitini miɾifətan ni mo~usi o~u mananam ita ko~u manan?

S.FORM: Mamananam ita ko manan naitini nolitengan a madimadiay sikawdan, patahekal to timolo?
Mamananam ita ko manan naitini nolitengan a madimadiay sikawdan, patahekal to timolo?
S.PHON: mamananam ita ko~u manan naitini no~uɾitəŋan a maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮiaj sikawɬ~ɮan, pataħəkaɾ to~u timo~uɾo~u?

S.FORM: Manan salicayan ko papaca'ofen hani?
Manan salicayan ko papaca'ofen hani?
S.PHON: manan saɾiʦajan ko~u papaʦaʡo~ufən ħani?
S.TRANSL: We want to find the answer to what question?

Wa milengo kita to manan milingatay to miliyaway ma'orip a salicay?

S.FORM: Ano pasifana' to wawa no tao to Fangcalay Cudad i, sasinanoten ko manan?

S.FORM: Oya salikoray a mapolosi ni Cikariya miki'okay ko Kawas to manan to tamdaw Ningra?
Oya salikoray a mapolosi ni Cikariya miki'okay ko Kawas to manan to tamdaw Ningra?

S.FORM: O manan a sepat sapaini nga'ay padama kitanan, misalof to ngiha no radiw?
O manan a sepat sapaini nga'ay padama kitanan, misalof to ngiha no radiw?
S.PHON: o~u manan a səpat sapaini ŋaʡaj paɬ~ɮama kitanan, misaɾo~uf to~u ŋiħa no~u raɬ~ɮiw?
S.TRANSL: What are four things we can do to improve our singing?

S.FORM: O manan ko sakakaay a olah hananay?
O manan ko sakakaay a olah hananay?

S.TRANSL: What is the highest form of love?

S.FORM: O manan ko 'tadamaanay a miliyaway ma'orip' hani?
O manan ko 'tadamaanay a miliyaway ma'orip' hani?

Toya picadaan to ino' a romi'ad, mamicada to ino' a tamdaw misongila' a misimsim to manan hani?

S.FORM: Micadaay ci Yis to manan a pisakahemaw hani?
Micadaay ci Yis to manan a pisakahemaw hani?
S.PHON: miʦaɬ~ɮaaj ʦi jis to~u manan a pisakaħəmaw ħani?

S.FORM: O manan ko mamananam ita to nalifetan ni Yopu?
O manan ko mamananam ita to nalifetan ni Yopu?
S.PHON: o~u manan ko~u mamananam ita to~u naɾifətan ni jo~upo~u~u?

S.FORM: O manan ko mamananam ita nai ci Pawloan to nalifetan ningra i Filipi?
O manan ko mamananam ita nai ci Pawloan to nalifetan ningra i Filipi?
S.PHON: o~u manan ko~u mamananam ita nai ʦi pawɾo~uan to~u naɾifətan niŋra i fiɾipi?
S.TRANSL: What lessons do we learn from what happened to the apostle Paul in Philippi?

S.FORM: Misadakay to manan a sapalimo'ot ko Luka 16:10 to 13?
Misadakay to manan a sapalimo'ot ko Luka 16:10 to 13?
S.PHON: misaɬ~ɮakaj to~u manan a sapaɾimo~uʡo~ut ko~u ɾo~u~uka **:** to~u **?

S.FORM: Misetek kita ko faloco' midemak to manan hani?
Misetek kita ko faloco' midemak to manan hani?

S.FORM: O manan nga'ayay pakayraan mamihinom to tao?

S.PHON: o~u manan ŋaʡajaj pakajraan mamiħino~um to~u tao~u?

S.FORM: Itini i sapatinako ni Yis, masi'ayaway nora matayalay ko manan pakayraan?
