S.FORM: Itiniay i misaaliay to mitosilay a kilac a tamdaw tahalifetay to 'icel no satolon.
Itiniay i misaaliay to mitosilay a kilac a tamdaw tahalifetay to 'icel no satolon.
S.PHON: itiniaj i misaaɾiaj to~u mito~usiɾaj a kiɾaʦ a tamɬ~ɮaw taħaɾifətaj to~u ʡiʦəɾ no~u sato~uɾo~un.
S.TRANSL: A number of need-greaters experienced the power of prayer.

S.FORM: Caka halafin, malo fanekfekay a mitosilay ci Satike.
Caka halafin, malo fanekfekay a mitosilay ci Satike.
S.PHON: ʦaka ħaɾafin, maɾo~u fanəkfəkaj a mito~usiɾaj ʦi satikə.
S.TRANSL: In time, Sadiq became a zealous publisher of the good news.

S.FORM: Pakayni i mitosilay a demak, samaanay ko demak ni Timoti hani?
Pakayni i mitosilay a demak, samaanay ko demak ni Timoti hani?
S.PHON: pakajni i mito~usiɾaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, samaanaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak ni timo~uti ħani?
S.TRANSL: How did Timothy set a good example in promoting Kingdom interests?

S.FORM: Pakayni toni mikiriwi'ay a mitosilay demak, tahatengilay ko 'alomanay a Tureky a tamdaw to nga'ayay ratoh.
Pakayni toni mikiriwi'ay a mitosilay demak, tahatengilay ko 'alomanay a Tureky a tamdaw to nga'ayay ratoh.
S.PHON: pakajni to~uni mikiriwiʡaj a mito~usiɾaj ɬ~ɮəmak, taħatəŋiɾaj ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj a to~u~urəkj a tamɬ~ɮaw to~u ŋaʡajaj rato~uħ.
S.TRANSL: By means of the special preaching campaign in Turkey, the good news reached many more people.

S.FORM: O Iing no Kasakopang wa kaleki misilsil tisowanan i kasakapot no mitosilay.
O Iing no Kasakopang wa kaleki misilsil tisowanan i kasakapot no mitosilay.
S.PHON: o~u iiŋ no~u kasako~upaŋ wa kaɾəki misiɾsiɾ tiso~uwanan i kasakapo~ut no~u mito~usiɾaj.
S.TRANSL: The Congregation Service Committee should promptly assign you to a field service group.

S.FORM: O roma i, mamilengo kita to sasamaanen patahekal i mitosilay a demak koni capeling.
O roma i, mamilengo kita to sasamaanen patahekal i mitosilay a demak koni capeling.
S.PHON: o~u ro~uma i, mamiɾəŋo~u kita to~u sasamaanən pataħəkaɾ i mito~usiɾaj a ɬ~ɮəmak ko~uni ʦapəɾiŋ.
S.TRANSL: We will also consider how we can demonstrate these aspects in our ministry.

S.FORM: Mirienangay to masakenaay a mitosilay a tayal
Mirienangay to masakenaay a mitosilay a tayal
S.PHON: miriənaŋaj to~u masakənaaj a mito~usiɾaj a tajaɾ
S.TRANSL: Expanding their ministry

S.FORM: Iraay ko 550 a mafana'ay tono Tureky sowal a salikaka, naitiraay i roma kitakit tayra i Tureky, pacafay to itiraay a mitosilay mitenak to nga'ayay ratoh.
Iraay ko 550 a mafana'ay tono Tureky sowal a salikaka, naitiraay i roma kitakit tayra i Tureky, pacafay to itiraay a mitosilay mitenak to nga'ayay ratoh.
S.PHON: iraaj ko~u *** a mafanaʡaj to~uno~u to~u~urəkj so~uwaɾ a saɾikaka, naitiraaj i ro~uma kitakit tajra i to~u~urəkj, paʦafaj to~u itiraaj a mito~usiɾaj mitənak to~u ŋaʡajaj rato~uħ.
S.TRANSL: About 550 Turkish-speaking brothers and sisters from other countries traveled to Turkey and preached alongside the local publishers during the campaign.

S.FORM: Misamaanay paihekal ci Pawlo to nika olah to mitosilay demak?
Misamaanay paihekal ci Pawlo to nika olah to mitosilay demak?
S.PHON: misamaanaj paiħəkaɾ ʦi pawɾo~u to~u nika o~uɾaħ to~u mito~usiɾaj ɬ~ɮəmak?
S.TRANSL: How did Paul demonstrate that he treasured his ministry?

S.FORM: O mitadtadan no sapatinako samaanay milingat to mitosilay a demak ita hani?
O mitadtadan no sapatinako samaanay milingat to mitosilay a demak ita hani?
S.PHON: o~u mitaɬ~ɮtaɬ~ɮan no~u sapatinako~u samaanaj miɾiŋat to~u mito~usiɾaj a ɬ~ɮəmak ita ħani?
S.TRANSL: How does that aspect of the illustration apply to our ministry?

S.FORM: Ikor no pina lipay, milaplapan ko milakowitay to riyar a mitosilay.
Ikor no pina lipay, milaplapan ko milakowitay to riyar a mitosilay.
S.PHON: iko~ur no~u pina ɾipaj, miɾapɾapan ko~u miɾako~uwitaj to~u rijar a mito~usiɾaj.
S.TRANSL: A few weeks later, the missionaries were deported.

S.FORM: Mikiemel kita miremo to pasangar, adihay ko mitosilay a demak i, o mamalayap ko sapalemed no Kawas.
Mikiemel kita miremo to pasangar, adihay ko mitosilay a demak i, o mamalayap ko sapalemed no Kawas.
S.PHON: mikiəməɾ kita mirəmo~u to~u pasaŋar, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u mito~usiɾaj a ɬ~ɮəmak i, o~u mamaɾajap ko~u sapaɾəməɬ~ɮ no~u kawas.
S.TRANSL: When we work hard to overcome obstacles to expand our ministry, we do experience Jehovah's blessing.

S.FORM: Samaan paihekal kita to nika olah to mitosilay a demak?
Samaan paihekal kita to nika olah to mitosilay a demak?
S.PHON: samaan paiħəkaɾ kita to~u nika o~uɾaħ to~u mito~usiɾaj a ɬ~ɮəmak?
S.TRANSL: What are some ways that we can demonstrate our appreciation for the ministry?

S.FORM: Pakaynien ci Yisan, o mitosilay a demak mahecaday o kakaenen ningra.
Pakaynien ci Yisan, o mitosilay a demak mahecaday o kakaenen ningra.
S.PHON: pakajniən ʦi jisan, o~u mito~usiɾaj a ɬ~ɮəmak maħəʦaɬ~ɮaj o~u kakaənən niŋra.
S.TRANSL: Preaching, even to a Samaritan woman, was the will of his Father, and it was like food for him.

S.FORM: O pakayniay i milaocay to kapalitan a ma'oningay iraay ko maanan a kalaliting to mitosilay a demak hani?
O pakayniay i milaocay to kapalitan a ma'oningay iraay ko maanan a kalaliting to mitosilay a demak hani?
S.PHON: o~u pakajniaj i miɾao~uʦaj to~u kapaɾitan a maʡo~uniŋaj iraaj ko~u maanan a kaɾaɾitiŋ to~u mito~usiɾaj a ɬ~ɮəmak ħani?
S.TRANSL: How does the account of the jailer relate to our preaching work?

S.FORM: Mikiriwi'ay misakafahay mararamoday mitosilay ingata no Pelaykeci
Mikiriwi'ay misakafahay mararamoday mitosilay ingata no Pelaykeci
S.PHON: mikiriwiʡaj misakafaħaj mararamo~uɬ~ɮaj mito~usiɾaj iŋata no~u pəɾajkəʦi
S.TRANSL: A special pioneer couple preach in a remote area near the city of Balykchy

S.FORM: Samaan ko demak ita nga' malaheci ko mitosilay ato pasifana'ay to tamdaw a demak?
Samaan ko demak ita nga' malaheci ko mitosilay ato pasifana'ay to tamdaw a demak?
S.PHON: samaan ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak ita ŋaʡ maɾaħəʦi ko~u mito~usiɾaj ato~u pasifanaʡaj to~u tamɬ~ɮaw a ɬ~ɮəmak?
S.TRANSL: How can we fulfill the commission to preach and make disciples?

S.FORM: Ano mafalic ko pakayraan i, misarocod to mitosilay a demak hano tata'angay ko sapadama kitaanan hani?
Ano mafalic ko pakayraan i, misarocod to mitosilay a demak hano tata'angay ko sapadama kitaanan hani?
S.PHON: ano~u mafaɾiʦ ko~u pakajraan i, misaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ to~u mito~usiɾaj a ɬ~ɮəmak ħano~u tataʡaŋaj ko~u sapaɬ~ɮama kitaanan ħani?
S.TRANSL: How can being focused on the ministry help us to maintain our balance in times of change?

S.FORM: Madimadi kita to mitosilay a demak, itini kaolahan no tao a mitengil i, nga'ay mihinom cangranan.
Madimadi kita to mitosilay a demak, itini kaolahan no tao a mitengil i, nga'ay mihinom cangranan.
S.PHON: maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮi kita to~u mito~usiɾaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, itini kao~uɾaħan no~u tao~u a mitəŋiɾ i, ŋaʡaj miħino~um ʦaŋranan.
S.TRANSL: Therefore, by faithfully continuing in our preaching work, we make sure that we will be available to give comfort to people at a time when they may be ready to accept it.

S.FORM: Ikor no taykay, faelohay a kantok no fenpo, misatapangay a mikayat to mitosilay demak, padamaan no Kawas ko 'ifowaay a mitosilay, hato ci'icelayto a milaheci to ika'ayaway a demak.
Ikor no taykay, faelohay a kantok no fenpo, misatapangay a mikayat to mitosilay demak, padamaan no Kawas ko 'ifowaay a mitosilay, hato ci'icelayto a milaheci to ika'ayaway a demak.
S.PHON: iko~ur no~u tajkaj, faəɾo~uħaj a kanto~uk no~u fənpo~u, misatapaŋaj a mikajat to~u mito~usiɾaj ɬ~ɮəmak, paɬ~ɮamaan no~u kawas ko~u ʡifo~uwaaj a mito~usiɾaj, ħato~u ʦiʡiʦəɾajto~u a miɾaħəʦi to~u ikaʡajawaj a ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: After the convention, a newly appointed branch overseer organized the work, and zealous Witnesses went ahead with renewed strength and with Jehovah's blessing.

S.FORM: Ano mafalic ko ka'orip i, paratohay a Filip misamaanay padadotoc misarocod to mitosilay a demak hani?
Ano mafalic ko ka'orip i, paratohay a Filip misamaanay padadotoc misarocod to mitosilay a demak hani?
S.PHON: ano~u mafaɾiʦ ko~u kaʡo~urip i, parato~uħaj a fiɾip misamaanaj paɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ misaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ to~u mito~usiɾaj a ɬ~ɮəmak ħani?
S.TRANSL: How did Philip the evangelizer stay focused on his ministry despite changing circumstances?

S.FORM: Kako ato fa'inay ci Walte, itiniay i Asenson no Parakoy, mala milakowitay to riyar a mitosilay
Kako ato fa'inay ci Walte, itiniay i Asenson no Parakoy, mala milakowitay to riyar a mitosilay
S.PHON: kako~u ato~u faʡinaj ʦi waɾtə, itiniaj i asənso~un no~u parako~uj, maɾa miɾako~uwitaj to~u rijar a mito~usiɾaj
S.TRANSL: With my husband, Walter, when we were serving as missionaries in Asunción, Paraguay

S.FORM: O milakowitay to riyar a mitosilay ano saka ciepocaw ko pipadama to salikaka, wa minanam tono itiraay a sowal.
O milakowitay to riyar a mitosilay ano saka ciepocaw ko pipadama to salikaka, wa minanam tono itiraay a sowal.
S.PHON: o~u miɾako~uwitaj to~u rijar a mito~usiɾaj ano~u saka ʦiəpo~uʦaw ko~u pipaɬ~ɮama to~u saɾikaka, wa minanam to~uno~u itiraaj a so~uwaɾ.
S.TRANSL: So if we missionaries were to be effective, we had to learn the local language.

S.FORM: Saseteken iso ko faloco' misamaan paihekal to nika olah to mitosilay a demak?
Saseteken iso ko faloco' misamaan paihekal to nika olah to mitosilay a demak?
S.PHON: sasətəkən iso~u ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ misamaan paiħəkaɾ to~u nika o~uɾaħ to~u mito~usiɾaj a ɬ~ɮəmak?
S.TRANSL: What are you determined to do to show your love for our lifesaving ministry?

S.FORM: Tahira to kairaan no kalo a hikoki, madoloayto ko paya, mihaen nga'ayayto ko 'alomanay milakowitay to riyar a mitosilay paka hikoki tayra i minilnilan a pala.
Tahira to kairaan no kalo a hikoki, madoloayto ko paya, mihaen nga'ayayto ko 'alomanay milakowitay to riyar a mitosilay paka hikoki tayra i minilnilan a pala.
S.PHON: taħira to~u kairaan no~u kaɾo~u a ħiko~uki, maɬ~ɮo~uɾo~uajto~u ko~u paja, miħaən ŋaʡajajto~u ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj miɾako~uwitaj to~u rijar a mito~usiɾaj paka ħiko~uki tajra i miniɾniɾan a paɾa.
S.TRANSL: When commercial jet service began, airfares became much lower and soon most of the missionaries were sent to their assignments by air.

S.FORM: Kinacecayay, maharek no 70 nisawawaan ko mitosilay 'inorong tayraay ci Yisan, pakayni ka nga'ay nangra midemak to kafahka'an, milaplap to palafoay, tada lipahakay.
Kinacecayay, maharek no 70 nisawawaan ko mitosilay 'inorong tayraay ci Yisan, pakayni ka nga'ay nangra midemak to kafahka'an, milaplap to palafoay, tada lipahakay.
S.PHON: kinaʦəʦajaj, maħarək no~u ** nisawawaan ko~u mito~usiɾaj ʡino~uro~uŋ tajraaj ʦi jisan, pakajni ka ŋaʡaj naŋra miɬ~ɮəmak to~u kafaħkaʡan, miɾapɾap to~u paɾafo~uaj, taɬ~ɮa ɾipaħakaj.
S.TRANSL: Once, 70 disciples returned to Jesus after a preaching assignment.

S.FORM: Ngaliwngiway ko Israil tamdaw to kaawa no nanom.
Ngaliwngiway ko Israil tamdaw to kaawa no nanom.
S.PHON: ŋaɾiwŋiwaj ko~u israiɾ tamɬ~ɮaw to~u kaawa no~u nano~um.
S.TRANSL: The people started to complain about a lack of water.

S.FORM: O Kimad no Kawas hato tingalaway makoracay a nanom, pa'icelay ato pasinoway to tireng.
O Kimad no Kawas hato tingalaway makoracay a nanom, pa'icelay ato pasinoway to tireng.
S.PHON: o~u kimaɬ~ɮ no~u kawas ħato~u tiŋaɾawaj mako~uraʦaj a nano~um, paʡiʦəɾaj ato~u pasino~uwaj to~u tirəŋ.
S.TRANSL: Like a drink of cool, clear water, God's words of truth are refreshing.

S.FORM: "Awa ko pihakelongan, wa nga'ay ko ka'orip."
"Awa ko pihakelongan, wa nga'ay ko ka'orip."
S.PHON: "awa ko~u piħakəɾo~uŋan, wa ŋaʡaj ko~u kaʡo~urip."
S.TRANSL: "You can be happy without religion."

S.FORM: Nga'ay lihaf patenaken,
Nga'ay lihaf patenaken,
S.PHON: ŋaʡaj ɾiħaf patənakən,
S.TRANSL: It means their life if they obey,

S.FORM: O cecacecay tamdaw i kasakopang wa nga'ay padama to wama wina.
O cecacecay tamdaw i kasakopang wa nga'ay padama to wama wina.
S.PHON: o~u ʦəʦaʦəʦaj tamɬ~ɮaw i kasako~upaŋ wa ŋaʡaj paɬ~ɮama to~u wama wina.
S.TRANSL: Of course, all in the congregation can support the parents.

S.FORM: Samaanay a pakayraan nga'ay kita patado miharateng to mitosilan hani?
Samaanay a pakayraan nga'ay kita patado miharateng to mitosilan hani?
S.PHON: samaanaj a pakajraan ŋaʡaj kita pataɬ~ɮo~u miħaratəŋ to~u mito~usiɾan ħani?
S.TRANSL: In what practical ways can we be considerate of the people to whom we witness?

S.FORM: Wa milicay ko roma tamdaw alatek: "Samaan ko pakayraan nga' nga'ay ko Krisciyang malalikong, miliyaw a ciraramod hani?"
Wa milicay ko roma tamdaw alatek: "Samaan ko pakayraan nga' nga'ay ko Krisciyang malalikong, miliyaw a ciraramod hani?"
S.PHON: wa miɾiʦaj ko~u ro~uma tamɬ~ɮaw aɾatək: "samaan ko~u pakajraan ŋaʡ ŋaʡaj ko~u krisʦijaŋ maɾaɾiko~uŋ, miɾijaw a ʦiraramo~uɬ~ɮ ħani?"
S.TRANSL: Someone might ask, 'Is there ever a basis for a Christian to divorce and remarry?'

S.FORM: Wa nga'ay kita mikitini i malifaay ni Hosiya, minanam to pinengneng ni Yihofa to raramod.
Wa nga'ay kita mikitini i malifaay ni Hosiya, minanam to pinengneng ni Yihofa to raramod.
S.PHON: wa ŋaʡaj kita mikitini i maɾifaaj ni ħo~usija, minanam to~u pinəŋnəŋ ni jiħo~ufa to~u raramo~uɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: The prophet Hosea's experience is enlightening.

S.FORM: O kaemangay tamdaw wa nga'ay misamaan micowat to makelecay no kasakopang, halo pakalalok to roma tamdaw pasadak to likat hani?
O kaemangay tamdaw wa nga'ay misamaan micowat to makelecay no kasakopang, halo pakalalok to roma tamdaw pasadak to likat hani?
S.PHON: o~u kaəmaŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw wa ŋaʡaj misamaan miʦo~uwat to~u makəɾəʦaj no~u kasako~upaŋ, ħaɾo~u pakaɾaɾo~uk to~u ro~uma tamɬ~ɮaw pasaɬ~ɮak to~u ɾikat ħani?
S.TRANSL: How can young ones promote unity in the congregation and thus encourage others to let their light shine?

S.FORM: Mihaen kita wa nga'ay 'materek i olah no Kawas... citokel mida'oc ko 'orip.'
Mihaen kita wa nga'ay 'materek i olah no Kawas... citokel mida'oc ko 'orip.'
S.PHON: miħaən kita wa ŋaʡaj ʡmatərək i o~uɾaħ no~u kawas... ʦito~ukəɾ miɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ ko~u ʡo~urip.ʡ
S.TRANSL: As a result, we "keep ourselves in God's love... with everlasting life in view."

S.FORM: Ca'edongen ita ko olah ato sini'adaay wa nga'ay masasodod.
Ca'edongen ita ko olah ato sini'adaay wa nga'ay masasodod.
S.PHON: ʦaʡəɬ~ɮo~uŋən ita ko~u o~uɾaħ ato~u siniʡaɬ~ɮaaj wa ŋaʡaj masaso~uɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: Love and kindness can help us to be forgiving toward one another.

S.FORM: Sowal no roma tamdaw, caka paso'lin to Kawas wa nga'ay ko niyah misa'osi to nga'ayay tatiihay, samaan kita padama to hatiniay tamdaw misaharaterateng hani?
Sowal no roma tamdaw, caka paso'lin to Kawas wa nga'ay ko niyah misa'osi to nga'ayay tatiihay, samaan kita padama to hatiniay tamdaw misaharaterateng hani?
S.PHON: so~uwaɾ no~u ro~uma tamɬ~ɮaw, ʦaka paso~uʡɾin to~u kawas wa ŋaʡaj ko~u nijaħ misaʡo~usi to~u ŋaʡajaj tatiiħaj, samaan kita paɬ~ɮama to~u ħatiniaj tamɬ~ɮaw misaħaratəratəŋ ħani?
S.TRANSL: How can we reason about the notion that a person can determine what is good without believing in God?

S.FORM: Samaan ko demak no kaemangay tamdaw wa nga'ay matongal a matenes i no'adingoan hani?
Samaan ko demak no kaemangay tamdaw wa nga'ay matongal a matenes i no'adingoan hani?
S.PHON: samaan ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u kaəmaŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw wa ŋaʡaj mato~uŋaɾ a matənəs i no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan ħani?
S.TRANSL: What can young people do to cultivate spirituality?

S.FORM: O tinakoan no hongti no Yutaya ci Rihopoam, wa nga'ay padama kitaanan mikilim to haca'of.
O tinakoan no hongti no Yutaya ci Rihopoam, wa nga'ay padama kitaanan mikilim to haca'of.
S.PHON: o~u tinako~uan no~u ħo~uŋti no~u jo~u~utaja ʦi riħo~upo~uam, wa ŋaʡaj paɬ~ɮama kitaanan mikiɾim to~u ħaʦaʡo~uf.
S.TRANSL: The example of Rehoboam, king of Judah, can help us find the answer.

S.FORM: Misi'ayaw to kafahalan a kafalic i, wa nga'ay kita misamaan mitodong ci Yosifan?
Misi'ayaw to kafahalan a kafalic i, wa nga'ay kita misamaan mitodong ci Yosifan?
S.PHON: misiʡajaw to~u kafaħaɾan a kafaɾiʦ i, wa ŋaʡaj kita misamaan mito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ʦi jo~usifan?
S.TRANSL: How can we imitate Joseph's example when our circumstances unexpectedly change?

S.FORM: Ano hatiraay i, wa nga'ay salakat i lalan misawacay, ka'alomanay misawacay anca miliso' to lomowadayto a tamdaw.
Ano hatiraay i, wa nga'ay salakat i lalan misawacay, ka'alomanay misawacay anca miliso' to lomowadayto a tamdaw.
S.PHON: ano~u ħatiraaj i, wa ŋaʡaj saɾakat i ɾaɾan misawaʦaj, kaʡaɾo~umanaj misawaʦaj anʦa miɾiso~uʡ to~u ɾo~umo~uwaɬ~ɮajto~u a tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: If so, you may be able to start your ministry by doing street work, public witnessing, or return visits on people you know will be up and about.

S.FORM: Iraay ko sadama ni Yihofa, so'lin o cowa ka lefot a tamdaw wa nga'ay pakalowid ci Satanan.
Iraay ko sadama ni Yihofa, so'lin o cowa ka lefot a tamdaw wa nga'ay pakalowid ci Satanan.
S.PHON: iraaj ko~u saɬ~ɮama ni jiħo~ufa, so~uʡɾin o~u ʦo~uwa ka ɾəfo~ut a tamɬ~ɮaw wa ŋaʡaj pakaɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ ʦi satanan.
S.TRANSL: With Jehovah's backing, even imperfect humans can conquer Satan.

S.FORM: Sasamaan kita micowat to kakelec no kasakopang, halo padama to tao nga' nga'ay pasadak to likat hani?
Sasamaan kita micowat to kakelec no kasakopang, halo padama to tao nga' nga'ay pasadak to likat hani?
S.PHON: sasamaan kita miʦo~uwat to~u kakəɾəʦ no~u kasako~upaŋ, ħaɾo~u paɬ~ɮama to~u tao~u ŋaʡ ŋaʡaj pasaɬ~ɮak to~u ɾikat ħani?
S.TRANSL: How can all promote unity in the congregation and help others to let their light shine?

S.FORM: Misa'icel a midemak kita i, wa nga'ay pakaso'lin to maanan hani?
Misa'icel a midemak kita i, wa nga'ay pakaso'lin to maanan hani?
S.PHON: misaʡiʦəɾ a miɬ~ɮəmak kita i, wa ŋaʡaj pakaso~uʡɾin to~u maanan ħani?
S.TRANSL: If we seek to make the best of our current circumstances, of what can we be assured?

S.FORM: Makakangodo ko wama wina, sida'it a macacada, nga'ay patireng to ta'arawan no wawa.
Makakangodo ko wama wina, sida'it a macacada, nga'ay patireng to ta'arawan no wawa.
S.PHON: makakaŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u ko~u wama wina, siɬ~ɮaʡit a maʦaʦaɬ~ɮa, ŋaʡaj patirəŋ to~u taʡarawan no~u wawa.
S.TRANSL: When parents show consideration for each other, they set a fine example for their children.

S.FORM: Samaan ko demak ita, nga'ay milifok to sida'it ato sasodod ni Yihofa?
Samaan ko demak ita, nga'ay milifok to sida'it ato sasodod ni Yihofa?
S.PHON: samaan ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak ita, ŋaʡaj miɾifo~uk to~u siɬ~ɮaʡit ato~u saso~uɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮ ni jiħo~ufa?
S.TRANSL: How can we fully benefit from Jehovah's mercy and forgiveness?

S.FORM: Padamaan ni Yihofa ko Israil tamdaw, mahererek ko pikerid ni Mosi cangraanan, ikor i, nga'ay mananam to faelohay a 'a'ideman ci Yosuwa.
Padamaan ni Yihofa ko Israil tamdaw, mahererek ko pikerid ni Mosi cangraanan, ikor i, nga'ay mananam to faelohay a 'a'ideman ci Yosuwa.
S.PHON: paɬ~ɮamaan ni jiħo~ufa ko~u israiɾ tamɬ~ɮaw, maħərərək ko~u pikəriɬ~ɮ ni mo~usi ʦaŋraanan, iko~ur i, ŋaʡaj mananam to~u faəɾo~uħaj a ʡaʡiɬ~ɮəman ʦi jo~uso~u~uwa.
S.TRANSL: With Jehovah's help, Israel successfully navigated the transition from Moses' leadership to that of Joshua.

S.FORM: Samaan ko demak ita wa nga'ay matongal a matenes i no'adingoan hani?
Samaan ko demak ita wa nga'ay matongal a matenes i no'adingoan hani?
S.PHON: samaan ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak ita wa ŋaʡaj mato~uŋaɾ a matənəs i no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan ħani?
S.TRANSL: What are some steps we can take to progress spiritually?

S.FORM: Hano nga'ay kita miti'er to 'a'ideman ci Kristoan hani?
Hano nga'ay kita miti'er to 'a'ideman ci Kristoan hani?
S.PHON: ħano~u ŋaʡaj kita mitiʡər to~u ʡaʡiɬ~ɮəman ʦi kristo~uan ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why can we trust in Christ, our Leader?

S.FORM: Oniya milifetan no salikaka nga'ay pakalalok tisowanan, miharateng to nganga'ay tayra i misaaliay a kilac mitosil hokira, padama to so'linay ko faloco'a tamdaw mafana'to Kawas.
Oniya milifetan no salikaka nga'ay pakalalok tisowanan, miharateng to nganga'ay tayra i misaaliay a kilac mitosil hokira, padama to so'linay ko faloco'a tamdaw mafana'to Kawas.
S.PHON: o~unija miɾifətan no~u saɾikaka ŋaʡaj pakaɾaɾo~uk tiso~uwanan, miħaratəŋ to~u ŋaŋaʡaj tajra i misaaɾiaj a kiɾaʦ mito~usiɾ ħo~ukira, paɬ~ɮama to~u so~uʡɾinaj ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡa tamɬ~ɮaw mafanaʡto~u kawas.
S.TRANSL: May these heartfelt words of need-greaters in Myanmar encourage you to consider helping honesthearted people in untouched territories.

S.FORM: Tano mari'angay a pakayraan, hano cowa ka nga'ay a misaysay to cowa ka sadafdaf a demak?
Tano mari'angay a pakayraan, hano cowa ka nga'ay a misaysay to cowa ka sadafdaf a demak?
S.PHON: tano~u mariʡaŋaj a pakajraan, ħano~u ʦo~uwa ka ŋaʡaj a misajsaj to~u ʦo~uwa ka saɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮaf a ɬ~ɮəmak?
S.TRANSL: Why does injustice not justify violence?

S.FORM: Wa nga'ay kita misamaan tano olah a masasodosodod?
Wa nga'ay kita misamaan tano olah a masasodosodod?
S.PHON: wa ŋaʡaj kita misamaan tano~u o~uɾaħ a masaso~uɬ~ɮo~uso~uɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮ?
S.TRANSL: How can we show that we are "putting up with one another in love"?

S.FORM: Hano nga'ay ci Tafiti paka'met to faloco'no niyah hani?
Hano nga'ay ci Tafiti paka'met to faloco'no niyah hani?
S.PHON: ħano~u ŋaʡaj ʦi tafiti pakaʡmət to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡno~u nijaħ ħani?
S.TRANSL: How did David muster up the strength to control his spirit?

S.FORM: Wa nga'ay kita misamaan mitodong ci Yihofaan paihekal to sida'it, misodod to tao?
Wa nga'ay kita misamaan mitodong ci Yihofaan paihekal to sida'it, misodod to tao?
S.PHON: wa ŋaʡaj kita misamaan mito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ʦi jiħo~ufaan paiħəkaɾ to~u siɬ~ɮaʡit, miso~uɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮ to~u tao~u?
S.TRANSL: How may we imitate Jehovah's mercy when others need our forgiveness?

S.FORM: Wa nga'ay kita misamaan mitodong ci Kristoan hani?
Wa nga'ay kita misamaan mitodong ci Kristoan hani?
S.PHON: wa ŋaʡaj kita misamaan mito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ʦi kristo~uan ħani?
S.TRANSL: How can we personally imitate Christ?

S.FORM: Hatiraay, wa hakowa ko mananamay a sifana'no tamdaw nga', nga'ay micada to ino'hani?
Hatiraay, wa hakowa ko mananamay a sifana'no tamdaw nga', nga'ay micada to ino'hani?
S.PHON: ħatiraaj, wa ħako~uwa ko~u mananamaj a sifanaʡno~u tamɬ~ɮaw ŋaʡ, ŋaʡaj miʦaɬ~ɮa to~u ino~uʡħani?
S.TRANSL: So how much knowledge is initially required?

S.FORM: Matatodongay ko pirikec ni Yihofa, mansa o mifalahay a limasmas wa papiharateng to mararaway tamdaw to karetengay ko raraw ningra, nga'ay micoroh cingranan a pasasiyor.
Matatodongay ko pirikec ni Yihofa, mansa o mifalahay a limasmas wa papiharateng to mararaway tamdaw to karetengay ko raraw ningra, nga'ay micoroh cingranan a pasasiyor.
S.PHON: matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj ko~u pirikəʦ ni jiħo~ufa, mansa o~u mifaɾaħaj a ɾimasmas wa papiħaratəŋ to~u mararawaj tamɬ~ɮaw to~u karətəŋaj ko~u raraw niŋra, ŋaʡaj miʦo~uro~uħ ʦiŋranan a pasasijo~ur.
S.TRANSL: And because God disciplines to the proper degree, disfellowshipping can impress on the wrongdoer the seriousness of his sin and move him to repentance.

S.FORM: O roma i, patireng to nga'ayay ta'arawan ko wama wina, wa nga'ay padama to wawa palahad to paso'linay a faloco'.
O roma i, patireng to nga'ayay ta'arawan ko wama wina, wa nga'ay padama to wawa palahad to paso'linay a faloco'.
S.PHON: o~u ro~uma i, patirəŋ to~u ŋaʡajaj taʡarawan ko~u wama wina, wa ŋaʡaj paɬ~ɮama to~u wawa paɾaħaɬ~ɮ to~u paso~uʡɾinaj a faɾo~uʦo~uʡ.
S.TRANSL: Of course, your example is also important when it comes to building conviction.

S.FORM: Mafana' mirikec to harateng wa nga'ay padama kitaanan mala'osi ko patosokan no'adingoan.
Mafana' mirikec to harateng wa nga'ay padama kitaanan mala'osi ko patosokan no'adingoan.
S.PHON: mafanaʡ mirikəʦ to~u ħaratəŋ wa ŋaʡaj paɬ~ɮama kitaanan maɾaʡo~usi ko~u pato~uso~ukan no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan.
S.TRANSL: Self-discipline helps us to reach spiritual goals.

S.FORM: Saka enem ato pito mapolosi, mama'araw ita, nga'ay matayal i makoracay a likakawa no Kawas, salimelaen koni toki.
Saka enem ato pito mapolosi, mama'araw ita, nga'ay matayal i makoracay a likakawa no Kawas, salimelaen koni toki.
S.PHON: saka ənəm ato~u pito~u mapo~uɾo~usi, mamaʡaraw ita, ŋaʡaj matajaɾ i mako~uraʦaj a ɾikakawa no~u kawas, saɾiməɾaən ko~uni to~uki.
S.TRANSL: The sixth and seventh visions will help us appreciate the privilege we have to serve in God's clean organization.

S.FORM: Latekay minanam to kafalic no pakayraan, wa nga'ay kita milifok to haepoc.
Latekay minanam to kafalic no pakayraan, wa nga'ay kita milifok to haepoc.
S.PHON: ɾatəkaj minanam to~u kafaɾiʦ no~u pakajraan, wa ŋaʡaj kita miɾifo~uk to~u ħaəpo~uʦ.
S.TRANSL: We may even realize that we have derived much spiritual benefit from adjusting to a new set of circumstances.

S.FORM: Nga'ayay lihaf no Kitakit,
Nga'ayay lihaf no Kitakit,
S.PHON: ŋaʡajaj ɾiħaf no~u kitakit,
S.TRANSL: The good news of God's coming Kingdom

S.FORM: Mihaenay, o sini'adaay a tamdaw iraay ko nga'ayay a widang, halafin ko kalawidang.
Mihaenay, o sini'adaay a tamdaw iraay ko nga'ayay a widang, halafin ko kalawidang.
S.PHON: miħaənaj, o~u siniʡaɬ~ɮaaj a tamɬ~ɮaw iraaj ko~u ŋaʡajaj a wiɬ~ɮaŋ, ħaɾafin ko~u kaɾawiɬ~ɮaŋ.
S.TRANSL: Thus, a kind person easily finds and keeps good friends.

S.FORM: Ikorto, irako 'a'ideman no KGB, pasowalan no mitiyawcaay nga'ayay ko macadaay nangra.
Ikorto, irako 'a'ideman no KGB, pasowalan no mitiyawcaay nga'ayay ko macadaay nangra.
S.PHON: iko~urto~u, irako~u ʡaʡiɬ~ɮəman no~u k*b~b~v, paso~uwaɾan no~u mitijawʦaaj ŋaʡajaj ko~u maʦaɬ~ɮaaj naŋra.
S.TRANSL: Later, when the KGB chief arrived, the officers told him about the kind treatment they had received.

S.FORM: NGA'AYAY
NGA'AYAY
S.PHON: n*aʡajaj
S.TRANSL: GOODNESS

S.FORM: Nga'ayay tano sapatinako a mitadtad tonini.
Nga'ayay tano sapatinako a mitadtad tonini.
S.PHON: ŋaʡajaj tano~u sapatinako~u a mitaɬ~ɮtaɬ~ɮ to~unini.
S.TRANSL: One day his little girl picks one of those flowers and offers it to him as a gift.

S.FORM: Patirengay ko tarokos to nga'ayay a ta'arawan.
Patirengay ko tarokos to nga'ayay a ta'arawan.
S.PHON: patirəŋaj ko~u taro~uko~us to~u ŋaʡajaj a taʡarawan.
S.TRANSL: The apostle Paul set an example to be imitated.

S.FORM: Naitini isaka 1990 a mamihecaan misatapang, iraayto ko pasalat niyam a mitenak to nga'ayay lihaf, hanaca nga'ayayto malisopsop a masa'opo.
Naitini isaka 1990 a mamihecaan misatapang, iraayto ko pasalat niyam a mitenak to nga'ayay lihaf, hanaca nga'ayayto malisopsop a masa'opo.
S.PHON: naitini isaka **** a mamiħəʦaan misatapaŋ, iraajto~u ko~u pasaɾat nijam a mitənak to~u ŋaʡajaj ɾiħaf, ħanaʦa ŋaʡajajto~u maɾiso~upso~up a masaʡo~upo~u.
S.TRANSL: For one thing, since the 1990's, we have enjoyed more freedom to preach the good news and to assemble together in large numbers.

S.FORM: Polong no taypiyaw 583 tamdaw, wa mirienang to "Tahada'oc Nga'ayay a Lihaf" a taykay, o madadoedoay a taykay icowacowa no kitakit konini.
Polong no taypiyaw 583 tamdaw, wa mirienang to "Tahada'oc Nga'ayay a Lihaf" a taykay, o madadoedoay a taykay icowacowa no kitakit konini.
S.PHON: po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tajpijaw *** tamɬ~ɮaw, wa miriənaŋ to~u "taħaɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ ŋaʡajaj a ɾiħaf" a tajkaj, o~u maɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uaj a tajkaj iʦo~uwaʦo~uwa no~u kitakit ko~unini.
S.TRANSL: Arrangements were made for 583 delegates to travel around the globe to attend conventions in Europe, Asia, and the South Pacific, finishing the tour in Honolulu, Hawaii, and Pasadena, California.

S.FORM: O mahecaday a safalod nga'ayay saka dademaken i mato'asay tamdaw.
O mahecaday a safalod nga'ayay saka dademaken i mato'asay tamdaw.
S.PHON: o~u maħəʦaɬ~ɮaj a safaɾo~uɬ~ɮ ŋaʡajaj saka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən i mato~uʡasaj tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: The same principles apply to those who come to know Jehovah as adults.

S.FORM: O mihadakan ni Pitiro a limo'ot nga'ayay saka dademaken i roma kalimelaan a demak i noka'orip, tinakoen o picudadan ato katayalan.
O mihadakan ni Pitiro a limo'ot nga'ayay saka dademaken i roma kalimelaan a demak i noka'orip, tinakoen o picudadan ato katayalan.
S.PHON: o~u miħaɬ~ɮakan ni pitiro~u a ɾimo~uʡo~ut ŋaʡajaj saka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən i ro~uma kaɾiməɾaan a ɬ~ɮəmak i no~ukaʡo~urip, tinako~uən o~u piʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan ato~u katajaɾan.
S.TRANSL: The counsel by Peter also applies to more serious aspects of life, such as a person's choice of education, employment, or career.

S.FORM: Samaan a micawma' to nga'ayay widang ato patireng to ciepocay patosokan?
Samaan a micawma' to nga'ayay widang ato patireng to ciepocay patosokan?
S.PHON: samaan a miʦawmaʡ to~u ŋaʡajaj wiɬ~ɮaŋ ato~u patirəŋ to~u ʦiəpo~uʦaj pato~uso~ukan?
S.TRANSL: choose good friends and set worthwhile goals?

S.FORM: Ano misapoener kita, mikiemel a micowat to rihaday, iraay ko nga'ayay a teloc
Ano misapoener kita, mikiemel a micowat to rihaday, iraay ko nga'ayay a teloc
S.PHON: ano~u misapo~uənər kita, mikiəməɾ a miʦo~uwat to~u riħaɬ~ɮaj, iraaj ko~u ŋaʡajaj a təɾo~uʦ
S.TRANSL: If you humble yourself and strive to make peace, you may obtain excellent results

S.FORM: Mapalosiyangay ko nga'ayay ratoh.
Mapalosiyangay ko nga'ayay ratoh.
S.PHON: mapaɾo~usijaŋaj ko~u ŋaʡajaj rato~uħ.
S.TRANSL: A widespread witness was given.

S.FORM: Tiya misanga' ci Yihofa to tamdaw i, cowa pafelien to 'icel ko tamdaw misa'osi to nga'ayay ato tatiihay.
Tiya misanga' ci Yihofa to tamdaw i, cowa pafelien to 'icel ko tamdaw misa'osi to nga'ayay ato tatiihay.
S.PHON: tija misaŋaʡ ʦi jiħo~ufa to~u tamɬ~ɮaw i, ʦo~uwa pafəɾiən to~u ʡiʦəɾ ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw misaʡo~usi to~u ŋaʡajaj ato~u tatiiħaj.
S.TRANSL: Simply because Jehovah did not give humans the freedom to determine for themselves what is good and what is bad.

S.FORM: Ma'orip i salikoray a romi'ad, nga'ayay kita mkitini Hapakuk minanam to kalimlaan a sifana'.
Ma'orip i salikoray a romi'ad, nga'ayay kita mkitini Hapakuk minanam to kalimlaan a sifana'.
S.PHON: maʡo~urip i saɾiko~uraj a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ŋaʡajaj kita mkitini ħapako~u~uk minanam to~u kaɾimɾaan a sifanaʡ.
S.TRANSL: The book of Habakkuk provides a powerful lesson for all of us living in these last days.

S.FORM: Nga'ayay mitosil!
Nga'ayay mitosil!
S.PHON: ŋaʡajaj mito~usiɾ!
S.TRANSL: How does it make you feel

S.FORM: O nga'ayay ta'arawan ci Ipafras.
O nga'ayay ta'arawan ci Ipafras.
S.PHON: o~u ŋaʡajaj taʡarawan ʦi ipafras.
S.TRANSL: Epaphras did so.

S.FORM: O maanan a waywayan mamipalak to nga'ayay kalala'ed ita ato Kawas hani?
O maanan a waywayan mamipalak to nga'ayay kalala'ed ita ato Kawas hani?
S.PHON: o~u maanan a wajwajan mamipaɾak to~u ŋaʡajaj kaɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮ ita ato~u kawas ħani?
S.TRANSL: What can threaten our good standing with Jehovah?

S.FORM: Nga'ayay patirengen ita ko patosokan, i'ayaw ato hererek no sa'opo masasowal to kaemangay, kifaloco'a ciharateng cangranan.
Nga'ayay patirengen ita ko patosokan, i'ayaw ato hererek no sa'opo masasowal to kaemangay, kifaloco'a ciharateng cangranan.
S.PHON: ŋaʡajaj patirəŋən ita ko~u pato~uso~ukan, iʡajaw ato~u ħərərək no~u saʡo~upo~u masaso~uwaɾ to~u kaəmaŋaj, kifaɾo~uʦo~uʡa ʦiħaratəŋ ʦaŋranan.
S.TRANSL: In these ways and others, young ones can be made to realize that they are part of "the great congregation."

S.FORM: Itini i Tongce a icifa, o tosa fafahiyan salikaka malitemohay ko 'alomanay, halo palada' cangranan to nga'ayay lihaf
Itini i Tongce a icifa, o tosa fafahiyan salikaka malitemohay ko 'alomanay, halo palada' cangranan to nga'ayay lihaf
S.PHON: itini i to~uŋʦə a iʦifa, o~u to~usa fafaħijan saɾikaka maɾitəmo~uħaj ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj, ħaɾo~u paɾaɬ~ɮaʡ ʦaŋranan to~u ŋaʡajaj ɾiħaf
S.TRANSL: Two sisters find many with whom they can share the good news at a market in Taunggyi

S.FORM: Ano samaanto, o mamapaedef i polong no hekal ko nga'ayay lihaf no Hongti Kitakit, cowa ko nano 'icel no nima i likakawa ni Yihofa konini.
Ano samaanto, o mamapaedef i polong no hekal ko nga'ayay lihaf no Hongti Kitakit, cowa ko nano 'icel no nima i likakawa ni Yihofa konini.
S.PHON: ano~u samaanto~u, o~u mamapaəɬ~ɮəf i po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ħəkaɾ ko~u ŋaʡajaj ɾiħaf no~u ħo~uŋti kitakit, ʦo~uwa ko~u nano~u ʡiʦəɾ no~u nima i ɾikakawa ni jiħo~ufa ko~unini.
S.TRANSL: No human is indispensable in Jehovah's organization, and the work of spreading Kingdom truths continues.

S.FORM: O ma'oningay pakayni ci Tafitian, o nga'ayay a tinakoan.
O ma'oningay pakayni ci Tafitian, o nga'ayay a tinakoan.
S.PHON: o~u maʡo~uniŋaj pakajni ʦi tafitian, o~u ŋaʡajaj a tinako~uan.
S.TRANSL: The Bible offers a notable example in King David.

S.FORM: Ci Yis o nga'ayay ta'arawan no kaemangay tamdaw.
Ci Yis o nga'ayay ta'arawan no kaemangay tamdaw.
S.PHON: ʦi jis o~u ŋaʡajaj taʡarawan no~u kaəmaŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: Jesus Christ set the perfect example for you young ones.

S.FORM: Roma fenpo, nga'ayay i jw.org a wangcan pakiyaho.
Roma fenpo, nga'ayay i jw.org a wangcan pakiyaho.
S.PHON: ro~uma fənpo~u, ŋaʡajaj i jw.o~ur* a waŋʦan pakijaħo~u.
S.TRANSL: In some branches this is also possible using jw.org or another designated website.

S.FORM: Matefaday i nga'ayay sera i, mihadidiay ko tamdaw a ciheci.
Matefaday i nga'ayay sera i, mihadidiay ko tamdaw a ciheci.
S.PHON: matəfaɬ~ɮaj i ŋaʡajaj səra i, miħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮiaj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw a ʦiħəʦi.
S.TRANSL: "As for that on the fine soil, these are the ones who... bear fruit with endurance."

S.FORM: Nga'ayay ko kahofoc ni Mariya ci Fitalian, tanoktokay cingra, cowa kahecad to nano sowal no ising.
Nga'ayay ko kahofoc ni Mariya ci Fitalian, tanoktokay cingra, cowa kahecad to nano sowal no ising.
S.PHON: ŋaʡajaj ko~u kaħo~ufo~uʦ ni marija ʦi fitaɾian, tano~ukto~ukaj ʦiŋra, ʦo~uwa kaħəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u nano~u so~uwaɾ no~u isiŋ.
S.TRANSL: In Tallinn, contrary to the doctors' prediction, Maria gave birth to a healthy son, Vitaly.

S.FORM: Mahapinang no wawa iraay ko tolas no pasalat, hanaca o misa'osian ato waywayan nangra papaira to, nga'ayay anca tatiihay a teloc.
Mahapinang no wawa iraay ko tolas no pasalat, hanaca o misa'osian ato waywayan nangra papaira to, nga'ayay anca tatiihay a teloc.
S.PHON: maħapinaŋ no~u wawa iraaj ko~u to~uɾas no~u pasaɾat, ħanaʦa o~u misaʡo~usian ato~u wajwajan naŋra papaira to~u, ŋaʡajaj anʦa tatiiħaj a təɾo~uʦ.

S.TRANSL: At first, I had an advantage because of having learned French in Quebec.

S.FORM: O ka ciharatengan ni Yis, o araaw no tamdaw midemak to nga'ayay.

Nga'ayay a lalosidan konini, nga'ayay saka dademaken a pakalalok to tamdaw minanam to Fangcalay Cudad ato mirienang to sa'opo.
S.PHON: ŋaʡajaj a ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan ko~unini, ŋaʡajaj saka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən a pakaɾaɾo~uk to~u tamɬ~ɮaw minanam to~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ ato~u miriənaŋ to~u saʡo~upo~u.
S.TRANSL: These wonderful tools can motivate people to study the Bible and attend our meetings.

S.TRANSL: We give hope and encouragement.

S.PHON: misamaan kita maɾo~u ŋaʡajaj a ɾafaŋ?

S.PHON: samaan ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak ita o~u paiħəkaɾaj to~u ŋaʡajaj ko~u pisaka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak to~u pasaɾat?
S.TRANSL: What can we do to make wise use of our freedom?

S.FORM: Makahi kita "milonok" a midemak to nga'ayay, makapah ko demak i salikaka.
Makahi kita "milonok" a midemak to nga'ayay, makapah ko demak i salikaka.
S.PHON: makaħi kita "miɾo~uno~uk" a miɬ~ɮəmak to~u ŋaʡajaj, makapaħ ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak i saɾikaka.
S.TRANSL: We should be willing to perform acts of love for our brothers "in secret," or out of the limelight, when this is possible.

Kao nga'ayay 'ayaw no mamilood i, miocoran nangra ko madimadiay tamdaw mitiyawca to samaanay ko demak.

S.TRANSL: Thankfully, before attacking, they sent a delegation of trustworthy men to get all the facts.

Ano mahaenay i, nga'ayay kalasaka dademaken ko sapasifana' a misalof to ngiha'.

S.TRANSL: Yet, we can improve our singing by applying some basic suggestions.

S.FORM: Nga'ayay lomalen ita ko milengoay toniya lisin i mitepangan a cudad.
Nga'ayay lomalen ita ko milengoay toniya lisin i mitepangan a cudad.
S.PHON: ŋaʡajaj ɾo~umaɾən ita ko~u miɾəŋo~uaj to~unija ɾisin i mitəpaŋan a ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ.

S.FORM: Papaso'linen ita o sakanga'ay ita ko miharatengan ni Yihofa, matira o nika ciharateng Ningra to nolitengan a madimadiay a sikawdan.
Papaso'linen ita o sakanga'ay ita ko miharatengan ni Yihofa, matira o nika ciharateng Ningra to nolitengan a madimadiay a sikawdan.

S.TRANSL: We can be sure that he wants the best for us, as he did for his servants in the past.

O masaka limelaan i, tolonen ci Yihofa padama tisowanan matatodong ko nika patenak to kalimelaan no Sowal Ningra.

S.FORM: Tahirato itiya, o nika halafin noka pitala ni Apraham iraayto ko minaro'an.
Tahirato itiya, o nika halafin noka pitala ni Apraham iraayto ko minaro'an.
S.PHON: taħirato~u itija, o~u nika ħaɾafin no~uka pitaɾa ni apraħam iraajto~u ko~u minaro~uʡan.

S.FORM: Hatini ko nika cowat no demak, edengan ci Yihofa ko papakafilo a midemak.

S.FORM: So'li'lin hatira, o malayapay ita ikakaay ko nika adihay to malahedaway ita.
So'li'lin hatira, o malayapay ita ikakaay ko nika adihay to malahedaway ita.
S.PHON: so~uʡɾiʡɾin ħatira, o~u maɾajapaj ita ikakaaj ko~u nika aɬ~ɮiħaj to~u maɾaħəɬ~ɮawaj ita.
S.TRANSL: Yet, they have gained far more than they have lost.

S.TRANSL: "Remembering that we are dust," he never asks more of us than we can give.

Malacafayay ci Yis cangranan a mitolon, sowal sa nanay malacecay ko nisawawaan, matiya o nika lacecay ningra ato Wama.

S.TRANSL: When praying with them, he spoke of his desire that all his disciples be one, just as he and his Father are one.

Samaanen ita miliyas ko nika pidenga no cowa ka ngodo to Kawas a tamdaw hani?

S.TRANSL: How may we avoid being influenced by those who display ungodly qualities?

Haratengen, o kahacecay tamdaw cowa ka hecahecad ko nika paihekal to rarom no faloco'.

S.TRANSL: Remember, too, that not everyone experiences and expresses grief in the same way.

S.FORM: O sowal ni Yis ano paikakaen ita cingranan ko nika pisakareteng to tao i, cowa ka tatodong kita i cingranan sanay.
O sowal ni Yis ano paikakaen ita cingranan ko nika pisakareteng to tao i, cowa ka tatodong kita i cingranan sanay.

S.TRANSL: Jesus said that if we were to put any human before him, we would not be worthy of him.

O romadiway samaanay ko nika masaka limelaan i so'linay pidoyongan?

S.FORM: Nikawrira, cowa ko nika ciepocay to niyahan saan a patahekal kita to sini'adaay.
Nikawrira, cowa ko nika ciepocay to niyahan saan a patahekal kita to sini'adaay.
S.PHON: nikawrira, ʦo~uwa ko~u nika ʦiəpo~uʦaj to~u nijaħan saan a pataħəkaɾ kita to~u siniʡaɬ~ɮaaj.
S.TRANSL: Knowing that compassion is good for you should not be your main reason for wanting to cultivate it.

S.FORM: Samanen cowa ko sapitadtadaw to misamaanay hano misemsem cingra, hato sapisawacayaw ko Kawas to nika o moecelay ko Niyah.
Samanen cowa ko sapitadtadaw to misamaanay hano misemsem cingra, hato sapisawacayaw ko Kawas to nika o moecelay ko Niyah.

S.TRANSL: The main point of Jehovah's words was not to explain to Job why he was suffering, as if God had to justify himself.

S.TRANSL: Mental-health experts say that practicing compassion can improve your health, well-being, and relationships.

S.FORM: Samaanen ita kalasaka dademak ko hafay ita, patanoktok to nika lala'ed ato Kawas?
Samaanen ita kalasaka dademak ko hafay ita, patanoktok to nika lala'ed ato Kawas?

S.TRANSL: How can material possessions be used to strengthen our friendship with God?

S.FORM: Itini midokoay a demak nolitengan a Israil tamdaw, hakowaay ko nika masaka limelaan no romadiway hani?
Itini midokoay a demak nolitengan a Israil tamdaw, hakowaay ko nika masaka limelaan no romadiway hani?

S.TRANSL: Why is more required of us than just waiting for Jehovah to fulfill his promises?

S.FORM: O "ma'odangay" hananay i Fangcalay Cudad, mahawpay ko nika maa'odang ato ipotalay no raramod a tamdaw.
O "ma'odangay" hananay i Fangcalay Cudad, mahawpay ko nika maa'odang ato ipotalay no raramod a tamdaw.
S.PHON: o~u "maʡo~uɬ~ɮaŋaj" ħananaj i faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, maħawpaj ko~u nika maaʡo~uɬ~ɮaŋ ato~u ipo~utaɾaj no~u raramo~uɬ~ɮ a tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: The meaning of the original Bible word translated "sexual immorality" includes sexual relations between individuals who are not legally married to each other and homosexuality.

S.FORM: Sanay ko sowal ni Yis: "O nika kinafalah no tamdaw to 'orip no tireng to saki widawidang i, o sakakaay a olah konini i hekal.
Sanay ko sowal ni Yis: "O nika kinafalah no tamdaw to 'orip no tireng to saki widawidang i, o sakakaay a olah konini i hekal.
S.PHON: sanaj ko~u so~uwaɾ ni jis: "o~u nika kinafaɾaħ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~u ʡo~urip no~u tirəŋ to~u saki wiɬ~ɮawiɬ~ɮaŋ i, o~u sakakaaj a o~uɾaħ ko~unini i ħəkaɾ.
S.TRANSL: He said: "No one has love greater than this, that someone should surrender his life in behalf of his friends.

S.FORM: Tona caka lecad to cafacafay, latek mato'olan nanay cingra, anca katawaan no cafacafay to nika awa no fa'inayan a widang cingra.
Tona caka lecad to cafacafay, latek mato'olan nanay cingra, anca katawaan no cafacafay to nika awa no fa'inayan a widang cingra.
S.PHON: to~una ʦaka ɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u ʦafaʦafaj, ɾatək mato~uʡo~uɾan nanaj ʦiŋra, anʦa katawaan no~u ʦafaʦafaj to~u nika awa no~u faʡinajan a wiɬ~ɮaŋ ʦiŋra.
S.TRANSL: She admits that being different at times made her feel "abandoned and alone" and that her peers considered her stupid because she did not date.

S.FORM: O nika sini'ada ni Yis a mihinom to tamdaw, samaanay padama to aniniay a tamdaw hani?
O nika sini'ada ni Yis a mihinom to tamdaw, samaanay padama to aniniay a tamdaw hani?
S.PHON: o~u nika siniʡaɬ~ɮa ni jis a miħino~um to~u tamɬ~ɮaw, samaanaj paɬ~ɮama to~u aniniaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ħani?
S.TRANSL: How can Jesus' expressions of sympathy and consolation help us today?

S.FORM: O nika tayal to sakaci'orip to mida'ocay ko nga'ay."
O nika tayal to sakaci'orip to mida'ocay ko nga'ay."
S.PHON: o~u nika tajaɾ to~u sakaʦiʡo~urip to~u miɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦaj ko~u ŋaʡaj."
S.TRANSL: "Work, not for the food that perishes, but for the food that remains for everlasting life," he told them.

S.FORM: Oni fafahiyan mipihpihay to ci'icelay a sapikpik nira, mitatoy talafekang toya i cinaway a "tatiihay a raraw".
Oni fafahiyan mipihpihay to ci'icelay a sapikpik nira, mitatoy talafekang toya i cinaway a "tatiihay a raraw".
S.PHON: o~uni fafaħijan mipiħpiħaj to~u ʦiʡiʦəɾaj a sapikpik nira, mitato~uj taɾafəkaŋ to~uja i ʦinawaj a "tatiiħaj a raraw".
S.TRANSL: These women use their powerful wings to swoop in and lift up the container containing "Wickedness."

S.FORM: Misatakalaw ko tamdaw to finacadan no niyah, wa mifekad ko pasangaray.
Misatakalaw ko tamdaw to finacadan no niyah, wa mifekad ko pasangaray.
S.PHON: misatakaɾaw ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u nijaħ, wa mifəkaɬ~ɮ ko~u pasaŋaraj.
S.TRANSL: And pride of race could also have been a problem.

S.FORM: Pafelien ko niyah to adihayay toki mananam to faelohay kitiraan.
Pafelien ko niyah to adihayay toki mananam to faelohay kitiraan.
S.PHON: pafəɾiən ko~u nijaħ to~u aɬ~ɮiħajaj to~uki mananam to~u faəɾo~uħaj kitiraan.
S.TRANSL: Allow more time to adjust than you originally expected.

S.FORM: Padotoc a pahatatanam to niyah.
Padotoc a pahatatanam to niyah.
S.PHON: paɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ a paħatatanam to~u nijaħ.
S.TRANSL: He kept training himself.

S.FORM: Misamaan kita miliyas to misatekeday a maolah to niyah, maolah to payso, maolah to lawla?
Misamaan kita miliyas to misatekeday a maolah to niyah, maolah to payso, maolah to lawla?
S.PHON: misamaan kita miɾijas to~u misatəkəɬ~ɮaj a mao~uɾaħ to~u nijaħ, mao~uɾaħ to~u pajso~u, mao~uɾaħ to~u ɾawɾa?
S.TRANSL: How can we avoid becoming lovers of pleasures?; How can we avoid becoming lovers of money?

S.FORM: Miharateng ko tayraay ta'angayay ko saali a kilac mitosil a tamdaw, tada ciepocayto ko demak no niyah sanay."
Miharateng ko tayraay ta'angayay ko saali a kilac mitosil a tamdaw, tada ciepocayto ko demak no niyah sanay."
S.PHON: miħaratəŋ ko~u tajraaj taʡaŋajaj ko~u saaɾi a kiɾaʦ mito~usiɾ a tamɬ~ɮaw, taɬ~ɮa ʦiəpo~uʦajto~u ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u nijaħ sanaj."
S.TRANSL: Experiences such as this one make serving where the need is greater a very satisfying life."

S.FORM: Malecaday, o ta'arawan no wama wina, o papadama to wawa mafana' mi'met to niyah.
Malecaday, o ta'arawan no wama wina, o papadama to wawa mafana' mi'met to niyah.
S.PHON: maɾəʦaɬ~ɮaj, o~u taʡarawan no~u wama wina, o~u papaɬ~ɮama to~u wawa mafanaʡ miʡmət to~u nijaħ.
S.TRANSL: Similarly, parental discipline and example have the goal of teaching children self-control.

S.FORM: ko tao ato niyah.
ko tao ato niyah.
S.PHON: ko~u tao~u ato~u nijaħ.
S.TRANSL: It means our own life as well.

S.FORM: Ano makalimay kita matilid ko ngangan no niyah i powa ni Yihofa, wa mitoor to pina palinian.
Ano makalimay kita matilid ko ngangan no niyah i powa ni Yihofa, wa mitoor to pina palinian.
S.PHON: ano~u makaɾimaj kita matiɾiɬ~ɮ ko~u ŋaŋan no~u nijaħ i po~uwa ni jiħo~ufa, wa mito~uo~ur to~u pina paɾinian.
S.TRANSL: Having our name inscribed in Jehovah's "book of remembrance" as his people comes with certain obligations.

S.FORM: Ano maan ko demak nangra, lipahakay a midemak, misawacay to mikelecay ko niyah a mikotod to sapilood a paliding ni Yihofa.
Ano maan ko demak nangra, lipahakay a midemak, misawacay to mikelecay ko niyah a mikotod to sapilood a paliding ni Yihofa.
S.PHON: ano~u maan ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak naŋra, ɾipaħakaj a miɬ~ɮəmak, misawaʦaj to~u mikəɾəʦaj ko~u nijaħ a miko~uto~uɬ~ɮ to~u sapiɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ a paɾiɬ~ɮiŋ ni jiħo~ufa.
S.TRANSL: They keep pace with Jehovah's chariot by finding joy in any assignment they are given."

S.FORM: Samaan kita paihekal to makalimay ko niyah mararid i olah ni Kristo hani?
Samaan kita paihekal to makalimay ko niyah mararid i olah ni Kristo hani?
S.PHON: samaan kita paiħəkaɾ to~u makaɾimaj ko~u nijaħ marariɬ~ɮ i o~uɾaħ ni kristo~u ħani?
S.TRANSL: How do we show that we want to remain in Christ's love?

S.FORM: Tano sowal ato waywayan ci Pawlo pasifana' kitanan to sasamaan kinafalah to toki no niyah, 'icel, ciharateng ato maolah to tamdaw.
Tano sowal ato waywayan ci Pawlo pasifana' kitanan to sasamaan kinafalah to toki no niyah, 'icel, ciharateng ato maolah to tamdaw.
S.PHON: tano~u so~uwaɾ ato~u wajwajan ʦi pawɾo~u pasifanaʡ kitanan to~u sasamaan kinafaɾaħ to~u to~uki no~u nijaħ, ʡiʦəɾ, ʦiħaratəŋ ato~u mao~uɾaħ to~u tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: By word and example, the apostle taught us to give of ourselves, our time, our energy, our attention, our love.

S.FORM: O midoedoay to tireng a tamdaw misamacayay to saaro'an, micangacang to pakadafongay hafay anca misaareteng to sakanga'ay no niyah a demak.
O midoedoay to tireng a tamdaw misamacayay to saaro'an, micangacang to pakadafongay hafay anca misaareteng to sakanga'ay no niyah a demak.
S.PHON: o~u miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uaj to~u tirəŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw misamaʦajaj to~u saaro~uʡan, miʦaŋaʦaŋ to~u pakaɬ~ɮafo~uŋaj ħafaj anʦa misaarətəŋ to~u sakaŋaʡaj no~u nijaħ a ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: A physical, or fleshly-minded, person is often excessively concerned about prestige and material pursuits or about defending what he feels are his rights.

S.FORM: Haratengen ita ko sowal ni Pawlo: 'Kahacecay a tamdaw tiyawcaen ko tayal no niyah.
Haratengen ita ko sowal ni Pawlo: 'Kahacecay a tamdaw tiyawcaen ko tayal no niyah.
S.PHON: ħaratəŋən ita ko~u so~uwaɾ ni pawɾo~u: ʡkaħaʦəʦaj a tamɬ~ɮaw tijawʦaən ko~u tajaɾ no~u nijaħ.
S.TRANSL: Remember that age, health, circumstances, and abilities vary from one person to another.

S.FORM: Misamaanay hano patalipa'elalen ko niyah, midopo to satadamaanay noka pikowan ni Yihofa o masaka limlaan hani?
Misamaanay hano patalipa'elalen ko niyah, midopo to satadamaanay noka pikowan ni Yihofa o masaka limlaan hani?
S.PHON: misamaanaj ħano~u pataɾipaʡəɾaɾən ko~u nijaħ, miɬ~ɮo~upo~u to~u sataɬ~ɮamaanaj no~uka piko~uwan ni jiħo~ufa o~u masaka ɾimɾaan ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why must we remind ourselves of the importance of the vindication of Jehovah's sovereignty?

S.FORM: Misamaanay hano mitokel ci Yihofa kitaanan patafang to kalimelaan a dafong no niyah hani?
Misamaanay hano mitokel ci Yihofa kitaanan patafang to kalimelaan a dafong no niyah hani?
S.PHON: misamaanaj ħano~u mito~ukəɾ ʦi jiħo~ufa kitaanan patafaŋ to~u kaɾiməɾaan a ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ no~u nijaħ ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why does Jehovah expect us to use our valuable things to give back to him?

S.FORM: Sasamaan kita mifalic to pinangan no niyah hani?
Sasamaan kita mifalic to pinangan no niyah hani?
S.PHON: sasamaan kita mifaɾiʦ to~u pinaŋan no~u nijaħ ħani?
S.TRANSL: the way we strive to improve our personality?

S.FORM: Misamaanay hano simawen ko no'adingoan a odo' no niyah?
Misamaanay hano simawen ko no'adingoan a odo' no niyah?
S.PHON: misamaanaj ħano~u simawən ko~u no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan a o~uɬ~ɮo~uʡ no~u nijaħ?
S.TRANSL: Why must we safeguard our spiritual treasures?

S.FORM: Samaan kita miliyas pakayni ka'inteh to tamdaw a malahedaw ko halifon no niyah hani?
Samaan kita miliyas pakayni ka'inteh to tamdaw a malahedaw ko halifon no niyah hani?
S.PHON: samaan kita miɾijas pakajni kaʡintəħ to~u tamɬ~ɮaw a maɾaħəɬ~ɮaw ko~u ħaɾifo~un no~u nijaħ ħani?
S.TRANSL: How can we prevent resentment from depriving us of the prize?

S.FORM: 'Misatekeday maolah to niyah ko tamdaw,' sanay ko sowal ni Pawlo.
'Misatekeday maolah to niyah ko tamdaw,' sanay ko sowal ni Pawlo.
S.PHON: ʡmisatəkəɬ~ɮaj mao~uɾaħ to~u nijaħ ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw,ʡ sanaj ko~u so~uwaɾ ni pawɾo~u.
S.TRANSL: "Men will be lovers of themselves," wrote the inspired apostle.

S.FORM: 'Alomanay a wama wina maedeng mahecaday ci Cilisian, mahemek a paihkal ko niyah to kodaitay a kalimlaan capeling!
'Alomanay a wama wina maedeng mahecaday ci Cilisian, mahemek a paihkal ko niyah to kodaitay a kalimlaan capeling!
S.PHON: ʡaɾo~umanaj a wama wina maəɬ~ɮəŋ maħəʦaɬ~ɮaj ʦi ʦiɾisian, maħəmək a paiħkaɾ ko~u nijaħ to~u ko~uɬ~ɮaitaj a kaɾimɾaan ʦapəɾiŋ!
S.TRANSL: How thankful those parents are that they exercised the vital quality of patience!

S.FORM: Maolahay to tireng no niyah a midipot, hano o matatodongay a demak hani?
Maolahay to tireng no niyah a midipot, hano o matatodongay a demak hani?
S.PHON: mao~uɾaħaj to~u tirəŋ no~u nijaħ a miɬ~ɮipo~ut, ħano~u o~u matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a ɬ~ɮəmak ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why is it not wrong to have a balanced love of self?

S.FORM: Ano makalimay kita matilid ko ngangan no niyah i powa ni Yihofa, wa mitoor to maanan a palinian hani?
Ano makalimay kita matilid ko ngangan no niyah i powa ni Yihofa, wa mitoor to maanan a palinian hani?
S.PHON: ano~u makaɾimaj kita matiɾiɬ~ɮ ko~u ŋaŋan no~u nijaħ i po~uwa ni jiħo~ufa, wa mito~uo~ur to~u maanan a paɾinian ħani?
S.TRANSL: What does Jehovah require from those whose names are inscribed in his "book of remembrance"?

S.FORM: Maolah to niyah hano coko mararaway hani?
Maolah to niyah hano coko mararaway hani?
S.PHON: mao~uɾaħ to~u nijaħ ħano~u ʦo~uko~u mararawaj ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why is a measure of self-love fitting for a Christian?

S.FORM: Licayen ko niyah: "Minengneng ko fiyaw takowanan, o masamaanay a tamdaw hani?
Licayen ko niyah: "Minengneng ko fiyaw takowanan, o masamaanay a tamdaw hani?
S.PHON: ɾiʦajən ko~u nijaħ: "minəŋnəŋ ko~u fijaw tako~uwanan, o~u masamaanaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ħani?
S.TRANSL: Ask yourself: 'How do my neighbors view me?

S.FORM: Mahecad o pipaino' ni Yohani, o pipaino' no nisawawaan mitaypiyaway to mihaiyay to misafelitay ko niyah to Sarikec ni Mosi, pasasiyor to raraw no niyah.
Mahecad o pipaino' ni Yohani, o pipaino' no nisawawaan mitaypiyaway to mihaiyay to misafelitay ko niyah to Sarikec ni Mosi, pasasiyor to raraw no niyah.
S.PHON: maħəʦaɬ~ɮ o~u pipaino~uʡ ni jo~uħani, o~u pipaino~uʡ no~u nisawawaan mitajpijawaj to~u miħaijaj to~u misafəɾitaj ko~u nijaħ to~u sarikəʦ ni mo~usi, pasasijo~ur to~u raraw no~u nijaħ.
S.TRANSL: Like those performed by John, these baptisms symbolized the individuals' repentance over sins against the Mosaic Law.

S.FORM: Pakayni saka tanoktokaw i no'adingoan, kifaloco'en a mihapinang ko niyah.
Pakayni saka tanoktokaw i no'adingoan, kifaloco'en a mihapinang ko niyah.
S.PHON: pakajni saka tano~ukto~ukaw i no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan, kifaɾo~uʦo~uʡən a miħapinaŋ ko~u nijaħ.
S.TRANSL: To improve and maintain our spirituality, we need to analyze ourselves honestly.

S.FORM: Ano mi'osi kita to Fangcalay Cudad i, wa haenen pinengneng no Kawas a minengneng to niyah.
Ano mi'osi kita to Fangcalay Cudad i, wa haenen pinengneng no Kawas a minengneng to niyah.
S.PHON: ano~u miʡo~usi kita to~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ i, wa ħaənən pinəŋnəŋ no~u kawas a minəŋnəŋ to~u nijaħ.
S.TRANSL: Those verses liken God's Word to a mirror in which we can see ourselves the way Jehovah sees us.

S.FORM: Ci Yosif itiniay i roma a pakayraan patahekal to paka'metay to niyah.
Ci Yosif itiniay i roma a pakayraan patahekal to paka'metay to niyah.
S.PHON: ʦi jo~usif itiniaj i ro~uma a pakajraan pataħəkaɾ to~u pakaʡmətaj to~u nijaħ.
S.TRANSL: On another occasion, Joseph again set a fine example of self-control.

S.FORM: Ano mamaketer kita i, sasamaan nga' mitafo to paka'met to niyah hani?
Ano mamaketer kita i, sasamaan nga' mitafo to paka'met to niyah hani?
S.PHON: ano~u mamakətər kita i, sasamaan ŋaʡ mitafo~u to~u pakaʡmət to~u nijaħ ħani?
S.TRANSL: What will help us not to give in to frustration?

S.FORM: Pakaynian ni Yihofa i sowal ni Pitiro a pahapinang kita, paso'linay Cingra to patanoktok a ci'icel ko sikawdan no niyah.
Pakaynian ni Yihofa i sowal ni Pitiro a pahapinang kita, paso'linay Cingra to patanoktok a ci'icel ko sikawdan no niyah.
S.PHON: pakajnian ni jiħo~ufa i so~uwaɾ ni pitiro~u a paħapinaŋ kita, paso~uʡɾinaj ʦiŋra to~u patano~ukto~uk a ʦiʡiʦəɾ ko~u sikawɬ~ɮan no~u nijaħ.
S.TRANSL: Through Peter's inspired words, Jehovah assures us that he will make his servants firm and strong.

S.FORM: Samanay ci Yakop paihekal to o no'adingoan a tamdaw ko niyah?
Samanay ci Yakop paihekal to o no'adingoan a tamdaw ko niyah?
S.PHON: samanaj ʦi jako~up paiħəkaɾ to~u o~u no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u nijaħ?
S.TRANSL: As is true of most of us today, Jacob did not have an easy life.

S.FORM: Miti'er to taneng no niyah hano mamifekad ko pasangaray hani?
Miti'er to taneng no niyah hano mamifekad ko pasangaray hani?
S.PHON: mitiʡər to~u tanəŋ no~u nijaħ ħano~u mamifəkaɬ~ɮ ko~u pasaŋaraj ħani?
S.TRANSL: How can leaning on our own understanding become a snare?

S.FORM: Hatiraay, misamaan ko demak ita nga' malaheci ko sakalidong no niyah a tayal hani?
Hatiraay, misamaan ko demak ita nga' malaheci ko sakalidong no niyah a tayal hani?
S.PHON: ħatiraaj, misamaan ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak ita ŋaʡ maɾaħəʦi ko~u sakaɾiɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u nijaħ a tajaɾ ħani?
S.TRANSL: Hence, what steps can you take to work out your own salvation?

S.FORM: Itiya, cowa pisa'icel ko likakawa, mamalalengo ko wama wina to wawa no niyah to Fangcalay Cudad.
Itiya, cowa pisa'icel ko likakawa, mamalalengo ko wama wina to wawa no niyah to Fangcalay Cudad.
S.PHON: itija, ʦo~uwa pisaʡiʦəɾ ko~u ɾikakawa, mamaɾaɾəŋo~u ko~u wama wina to~u wawa no~u nijaħ to~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: At that time, Christian parents were given no special encouragement to study the Bible with their children.

S.FORM: Kawraan, wa samaan kita paihekal to misalimelaay ko niyah to sapafeli no Kawas a pasalat hani?
Kawraan, wa samaan kita paihekal to misalimelaay ko niyah to sapafeli no Kawas a pasalat hani?
S.PHON: kawraan, wa samaan kita paiħəkaɾ to~u misaɾiməɾaaj ko~u nijaħ to~u sapafəɾi no~u kawas a pasaɾat ħani?
S.TRANSL: We need to consider, though, how can we show that we treasure our freedom?

S.FORM: Mirikecay to tamdaw ko Fangcalay Cudad, mikalasaka dademak to kowang a midipot to niyah caka doka' no tao.
Mirikecay to tamdaw ko Fangcalay Cudad, mikalasaka dademak to kowang a midipot to niyah caka doka' no tao.
S.PHON: mirikəʦaj to~u tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, mikaɾasaka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak to~u ko~uwaŋ a miɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u nijaħ ʦaka ɬ~ɮo~ukaʡ no~u tao~u.
S.TRANSL: These advise against the use of carnal weapons, such as handguns, rifles, or other firearms, for protection against other humans.

S.FORM: Patafang to niyah, mitoor to kimad.
Patafang to niyah, mitoor to kimad.
S.PHON: patafaŋ to~u nijaħ, mito~uo~ur to~u kimaɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: But not from mere duty will I do what I do.

S.FORM: Ano misakafah kiso i, o mamatayal to saka'orip no niyah.
Ano misakafah kiso i, o mamatayal to saka'orip no niyah.
S.PHON: ano~u misakafaħ kiso~u i, o~u mamatajaɾ to~u sakaʡo~urip no~u nijaħ.
S.TRANSL: Full-time ministers generally need to earn a living.

S.FORM: Mankora, ano tahalifa kita to pades i, patalipa'elalen ko niyah, midopo to satadamaanay noka pikowan ni Yihofa ko sakalimlaan a demak.
Mankora, ano tahalifa kita to pades i, patalipa'elalen ko niyah, midopo to satadamaanay noka pikowan ni Yihofa ko sakalimlaan a demak.
S.PHON: manko~ura, ano~u taħaɾifa kita to~u paɬ~ɮəs i, pataɾipaʡəɾaɾən ko~u nijaħ, miɬ~ɮo~upo~u to~u sataɬ~ɮamaanaj no~uka piko~uwan ni jiħo~ufa ko~u sakaɾimɾaan a ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: Therefore, we do well to remind ourselves regularly of the importance of supporting God's sovereignty when we face difficult circumstances.

S.FORM: Cipinangay ci Pawlo, ano awa ko sadama no Kawas to niyah, citolasay ko mamademak.
Cipinangay ci Pawlo, ano awa ko sadama no Kawas to niyah, citolasay ko mamademak.
S.PHON: ʦipinaŋaj ʦi pawɾo~u, ano~u awa ko~u saɬ~ɮama no~u kawas to~u nijaħ, ʦito~uɾasaj ko~u mamaɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: Paul realized that there was only so much he could do without help from a higher source.

S.FORM: Milengoay ci Pawlo mapalit no raraw ato patay ko niyah, tahalifaay to roray ato cariraw no tingalaway faloco'.
Milengoay ci Pawlo mapalit no raraw ato patay ko niyah, tahalifaay to roray ato cariraw no tingalaway faloco'.
S.PHON: miɾəŋo~uaj ʦi pawɾo~u mapaɾit no~u raraw ato~u pataj ko~u nijaħ, taħaɾifaaj to~u ro~uraj ato~u ʦariraw no~u tiŋaɾawaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ.
S.TRANSL: Recall the misery and pain of conscience that Paul suffered because of feeling captive to sin and death.

S.FORM: Miako'iday kita ci Yihofaan, mansa patafang to niyah Cingranan.
Miako'iday kita ci Yihofaan, mansa patafang to niyah Cingranan.
S.PHON: miako~uʡiɬ~ɮaj kita ʦi jiħo~ufaan, mansa patafaŋ to~u nijaħ ʦiŋranan.
S.TRANSL: We show appreciation to Jehovah by wholeheartedly dedicating ourselves to him.

S.FORM: Misamaan a mafana' kita to pakinaliay a maolah to lawla ko niyah hani?
Misamaan a mafana' kita to pakinaliay a maolah to lawla ko niyah hani?
S.PHON: misamaan a mafanaʡ kita to~u pakinaɾiaj a mao~uɾaħ to~u ɾawɾa ko~u nijaħ ħani?
S.TRANSL: How might we evaluate our pursuit of pleasure?

S.FORM: Itiniay kaetip no Yortan 'Alo a Israil tamdaw, maedeng mahemekay a mahapinang no niyah ko so'linay demak, eca ka pitoor to cidangocay a lihaf mipala'afo to salikaka nangra.
Itiniay kaetip no Yortan 'Alo a Israil tamdaw, maedeng mahemekay a mahapinang no niyah ko so'linay demak, eca ka pitoor to cidangocay a lihaf mipala'afo to salikaka nangra.
S.PHON: itiniaj kaətip no~u jo~urtan ʡaɾo~u a israiɾ tamɬ~ɮaw, maəɬ~ɮəŋ maħəməkaj a maħapinaŋ no~u nijaħ ko~u so~uʡɾinaj ɬ~ɮəmak, əʦa ka pito~uo~ur to~u ʦiɬ~ɮaŋo~uʦaj a ɾiħaf mipaɾaʡafo~u to~u saɾikaka naŋra.
S.TRANSL: How thankful those Israelites must have been that they did not massacre their brothers based on incomplete information but took the time to get the facts!

S.FORM: Misamaanay hano sasinanoten iso ko saali no niyah i no'adingoan hani?
Misamaanay hano sasinanoten iso ko saali no niyah i no'adingoan hani?
S.PHON: misamaanaj ħano~u sasinano~utən iso~u ko~u saaɾi no~u nijaħ i no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why should you recognize your spiritual need?

S.FORM: Nolatekay, misaaliay kita to sadama no tao, nga' cipinang to pakayraan no niyah i no'adingoan.
Nolatekay, misaaliay kita to sadama no tao, nga' cipinang to pakayraan no niyah i no'adingoan.
S.PHON: no~uɾatəkaj, misaaɾiaj kita to~u saɬ~ɮama no~u tao~u, ŋaʡ ʦipinaŋ to~u pakajraan no~u nijaħ i no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan.
S.TRANSL: To analyze the state of our spirituality, we may at times need help from others.

S.FORM: Patafangan nangra ko niyah ci Yihofaan, misarocod ko faloco' micangacang to no'adingoan a patosokan.
Patafangan nangra ko niyah ci Yihofaan, misarocod ko faloco' micangacang to no'adingoan a patosokan.
S.PHON: patafaŋan naŋra ko~u nijaħ ʦi jiħo~ufaan, misaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ miʦaŋaʦaŋ to~u no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan a pato~uso~ukan.
S.TRANSL: They commit themselves to Jehovah and focus their lives on theocratic goals.

S.FORM: pasalat to 'orip niyam.
pasalat to 'orip niyam.
S.PHON: pasaɾat to~u ʡo~urip nijam.
S.TRANSL: His precious blood provides the key.

S.FORM: Salikoray miliso'an niyam a Fenpo o Koriya, itiya iraay ko toki niyam minengneng to mapalitay a 50 salikaka i kapalitan.
Salikoray miliso'an niyam a Fenpo o Koriya, itiya iraay ko toki niyam minengneng to mapalitay a 50 salikaka i kapalitan.
S.PHON: saɾiko~uraj miɾiso~uʡan nijam a fənpo~u o~u ko~urija, itija iraaj ko~u to~uki nijam minəŋnəŋ to~u mapaɾitaj a ** saɾikaka i kapaɾitan.
S.TRANSL: On our last branch visit to South Korea, we were able to meet with 50 of our brothers at a prison in Suwon.

S.FORM: Iraay ko faelohay a widang niyam.
Iraay ko faelohay a widang niyam.
S.PHON: iraaj ko~u faəɾo~uħaj a wiɬ~ɮaŋ nijam.
S.TRANSL: We have also found precious new friends.

S.FORM: Iraay ko toki niyam pakalalok to itiniay i Koekaniske a salikaka.
Iraay ko toki niyam pakalalok to itiniay i Koekaniske a salikaka.
S.PHON: iraaj ko~u to~uki nijam pakaɾaɾo~uk to~u itiniaj i ko~uəkaniskə a saɾikaka.
S.TRANSL: We also helped to strengthen a small group of publishers in the nearby town of Kurganinsk.

S.FORM: Pakayni sapilasilaw to Hongti Kitakit, pakafitan niyam i tireng ko mitilidan a paya, masalayalay romakat i niyaro'.
Pakayni sapilasilaw to Hongti Kitakit, pakafitan niyam i tireng ko mitilidan a paya, masalayalay romakat i niyaro'.
S.PHON: pakajni sapiɾasiɾaw to~u ħo~uŋti kitakit, pakafitan nijam i tirəŋ ko~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮan a paja, masaɾajaɾaj ro~umakat i nijaro~uʡ.
S.TRANSL: To advertise the Kingdom, we donned placards and marched in line through a city.

S.FORM: Pohayan no wama wina ko salikaka ci Atkinsen malafi to romi'ami'ad, paca'of to salicay niyam to Fangcalay Cudad.
Pohayan no wama wina ko salikaka ci Atkinsen malafi to romi'ami'ad, paca'of to salicay niyam to Fangcalay Cudad.
S.PHON: po~uħajan no~u wama wina ko~u saɾikaka ʦi atkinsən maɾafi to~u ro~umiʡamiʡaɬ~ɮ, paʦaʡo~uf to~u saɾiʦaj nijam to~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: My parents suggested that Brother Atkinson have his evening meal with us every night and answer our many Bible questions.

S.FORM: Wama wina ato kako tomirengay i'a'ayaw no palosiyangay a tosiya niyam
Wama wina ato kako tomirengay i'a'ayaw no palosiyangay a tosiya niyam
S.PHON: wama wina ato~u kako~u to~umirəŋaj iʡaʡajaw no~u paɾo~usijaŋaj a to~usija nijam
S.TRANSL: With my father and mother in front of our sound car

S.FORM: Pakalaloken niyam ko micadaayto to ino' a fa'inayan salikaka, patahekal to timolo, mikiemel a matayal saki kasakopang.
Pakalaloken niyam ko micadaayto to ino' a fa'inayan salikaka, patahekal to timolo, mikiemel a matayal saki kasakopang.
S.PHON: pakaɾaɾo~ukən nijam ko~u miʦaɬ~ɮaajto~u to~u ino~uʡ a faʡinajan saɾikaka, pataħəkaɾ to~u timo~uɾo~u, mikiəməɾ a matajaɾ saki kasako~upaŋ.
S.TRANSL: We urge all baptized brothers to be courageous and work hard for the congregation!

S.FORM: Mahapinangay niyam palemeday ci Yihofa tamiyanan, ato mitengilay to satolon niyam, tada palipahakay koni tamiyanan."
Mahapinangay niyam palemeday ci Yihofa tamiyanan, ato mitengilay to satolon niyam, tada palipahakay koni tamiyanan."
S.PHON: maħapinaŋaj nijam paɾəməɬ~ɮaj ʦi jiħo~ufa tamijanan, ato~u mitəŋiɾaj to~u sato~uɾo~un nijam, taɬ~ɮa paɾipaħakaj ko~uni tamijanan."
S.TRANSL: Soon after we arrived, others in the congregation started pioneering, and we were blessed with two progressive Bible studies."

S.FORM: Kasemeran no tamdamdaw,
Kasemeran no tamdamdaw,
S.PHON: kasəməran no~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw,
S.TRANSL: You alone are God Almighty,

S.FORM: Tatodong no makeroay i cepi' i, "o wacay sanay a makeroay maro'ay i cepi' no lafang a mi'iwa'iw to tireng."
Tatodong no makeroay i cepi' i, "o wacay sanay a makeroay maro'ay i cepi' no lafang a mi'iwa'iw to tireng."

S.TRANSL: Lap dancing is defined as "an activity in which a usually seminude performer sits and gyrates on the lap of a customer."

S.FORM: I laloma' nangra o roma tamdaw sakinacecay mitanam to olah no tao alatek.
I laloma' nangra o roma tamdaw sakinacecay mitanam to olah no tao alatek.
S.PHON: i ɾaɾo~umaʡ naŋra o~u ro~uma tamɬ~ɮaw sakinaʦəʦaj mitanam to~u o~uɾaħ no~u tao~u aɾatək.
S.TRANSL: Out of gratitude, they in turn will be moved to show kindness to others.

S.FORM: O pipalomaan to tefi' no kekeya ko Kote Tiwa a kitakit.
O pipalomaan to tefi' no kekeya ko Kote Tiwa a kitakit.
S.PHON: o~u pipaɾo~umaan to~u təfiʡ no~u kəkəja ko~u ko~utə tiwa a kitakit.
S.TRANSL: Côte d'Ivoire formerly Ivory Coast is a major producer of cocoa beans, which are used to make chocolate.

S.FORM: Mitooran no tamdaw ko tolo potalay a lalangian misawkit to tamdaw, finacadan, hafay, mihecaan.
Mitooran no tamdaw ko tolo potalay a lalangian misawkit to tamdaw, finacadan, hafay, mihecaan.

S.TRANSL: There are three areas in which many are influenced by outward appearances: race or ethnicity, economic situation, and age.

S.FORM: Ano mafana' kita tora lalangian nora roray ato pades ita i, o mamadolo a misi'ayaw tora demak.
Ano mafana' kita tora lalangian nora roray ato pades ita i, o mamadolo a misi'ayaw tora demak.
S.PHON: ano~u mafanaʡ kita to~ura ɾaɾaŋian no~ura ro~uraj ato~u paɬ~ɮəs ita i, o~u mamaɬ~ɮo~uɾo~u a misiʡajaw to~ura ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: Understandably, we are in a better position to cope if we can identify the causes of our problems or tribulations.

Padama to cowaho ko mihakelongay a ramod no salikaka

S.TRANSL: Reaching out to unbelieving mates

Padama takowan pahemek Tisowan.

O roma kaemangay tamdaw misamaanay padama to tamdaw malo Krisciyang?

Padama to kaemangay a Samuil.

S.TRANSL: helped young Samuel?

S.FORM: Nohatini ci Rasier ato fafahi ningra misaka dademakan nangra ko mihatatanaman ato nalifetan itiya, padama to kasakopang a salikaka, mahemakay ko salikaka cangraanan.
Nohatini ci Rasier ato fafahi ningra misaka dademakan nangra ko mihatatanaman ato nalifetan itiya, padama to kasakopang a salikaka, mahemakay ko salikaka cangraanan.

S.TRANSL: Russell and his wife are using their training and experience in the local congregation, to the joy of the publishers who serve with them.

S.FORM: O so'linay ciepocay a patosokan i, tahada'ocay mihodop to Kawas, misa'icel a padama to tamdaw macakat i no'adingoan," sanay.
O so'linay ciepocay a patosokan i, tahada'ocay mihodop to Kawas, misa'icel a padama to tamdaw macakat i no'adingoan," sanay.
S.PHON: o~u so~uʡɾinaj ʦiəpo~uʦaj a pato~uso~ukan i, taħaɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦaj miħo~uɬ~ɮo~up to~u kawas, misaʡiʦəɾ a paɬ~ɮama to~u tamɬ~ɮaw maʦakat i no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan," sanaj.
S.TRANSL: Serving God and trying to contribute in some small way to helping people spiritually are truly noble and lasting goals."

S.FORM: Filipi 2:13 ato 2 Korinto 4:7, samaanay padama to fa'inayan salikaka patahekal to timolo?
Filipi 2:13 ato 2 Korinto 4:7, samaanay padama to fa'inayan salikaka patahekal to timolo?
S.PHON: fiɾipi *:** ato~u * ko~urinto~u *:*, samaanaj paɬ~ɮama to~u faʡinajan saɾikaka pataħəkaɾ to~u timo~uɾo~u?

S.FORM: Patadoen ko wawa milimasmas to ciepocay a lawla, padama cangranan micawma'to faelohay widang.
Patadoen ko wawa milimasmas to ciepocay a lawla, padama cangranan micawma'to faelohay widang.
S.PHON: pataɬ~ɮo~uən ko~u wawa miɾimasmas to~u ʦiəpo~uʦaj a ɾawɾa, paɬ~ɮama ʦaŋranan miʦawmaʡto~u faəɾo~uħaj wiɬ~ɮaŋ.
S.TRANSL: Help them to make new friends by arranging opportunities for upbuilding association.

S.FORM: Ihkalay ko safana' no coyoh ci Yosuwaan, padama cingranan sasamaan a milood to Yiriko a niyaro'.
Ihkalay ko safana' no coyoh ci Yosuwaan, padama cingranan sasamaan a milood to Yiriko a niyaro'.
S.PHON: iħkaɾaj ko~u safanaʡ no~u ʦo~ujo~uħ ʦi jo~uso~u~uwaan, paɬ~ɮama ʦiŋranan sasamaan a miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u jiriko~u a nijaro~uʡ.
S.TRANSL: Joshua received clear instructions from the angelic Leader on how to take the city of Jericho.

S.FORM: O roma pakayraan malacafay to Kawas a matayal i, ikor no mapades, padama to tahapadesay a salikaka.
O roma pakayraan malacafay to Kawas a matayal i, ikor no mapades, padama to tahapadesay a salikaka.
S.PHON: o~u ro~uma pakajraan maɾaʦafaj to~u kawas a matajaɾ i, iko~ur no~u mapaɬ~ɮəs, paɬ~ɮama to~u taħapaɬ~ɮəsaj a saɾikaka.
S.TRANSL: When disasters strike, God's people have opportunities to work with God by helping their brothers in practical ways.

S.FORM: O sapafeli no Kawas a rihaday wa samaan padama kitaanan?
O sapafeli no Kawas a rihaday wa samaan padama kitaanan?
S.PHON: o~u sapafəɾi no~u kawas a riħaɬ~ɮaj wa samaan paɬ~ɮama kitaanan?
S.TRANSL: What effect can "the peace of God" have on our desire to pursue spiritual goals?

S.FORM: O wama wina samaan padama to wawa, mala'osi ko patosokan a patafang to tireng micada to ino'?
O wama wina samaan padama to wawa, mala'osi ko patosokan a patafang to tireng micada to ino'?
S.PHON: o~u wama wina samaan paɬ~ɮama to~u wawa, maɾaʡo~usi ko~u pato~uso~ukan a patafaŋ to~u tirəŋ miʦaɬ~ɮa to~u ino~uʡ?
S.TRANSL: Parents, how can you help your children reach out for the goal of baptism?

S.FORM: Pakaynian ni Yihofa ci Yisan padama kita a mihepol to raraw ato patay, pakayniay sakanga'ayaw ita misaka dademak to 'orip a mihodop Cingraanan.
Pakaynian ni Yihofa ci Yisan padama kita a mihepol to raraw ato patay, pakayniay sakanga'ayaw ita misaka dademak to 'orip a mihodop Cingraanan.
S.PHON: pakajnian ni jiħo~ufa ʦi jisan paɬ~ɮama kita a miħəpo~uɾ to~u raraw ato~u pataj, pakajniaj sakaŋaʡajaw ita misaka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak to~u ʡo~urip a miħo~uɬ~ɮo~up ʦiŋraanan.
S.TRANSL: Thus, the real purpose for which Jehovah, through Jesus, has freed us from the law of sin and of death is for us to live a life of dedication "as slaves of God."

S.FORM: Samaanen no wama wina padama ko wawa, palahad to paka'metay to tireng hani?
Samaanen no wama wina padama ko wawa, palahad to paka'metay to tireng hani?
S.PHON: samaanən no~u wama wina paɬ~ɮama ko~u wawa, paɾaħaɬ~ɮ to~u pakaʡmətaj to~u tirəŋ ħani?
S.TRANSL: How can you help your children to develop self-control?

S.FORM: Mamisa'icel kita padama to tamdaw.
Mamisa'icel kita padama to tamdaw.
S.PHON: mamisaʡiʦəɾ kita paɬ~ɮama to~u tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: Instead, we need to do all we can now to help people.

S.FORM: O sapafeli ni Yis a dipayal samaanay padama kitanan a ciheci hani?
O sapafeli ni Yis a dipayal samaanay padama kitanan a ciheci hani?
S.PHON: o~u sapafəɾi ni jis a ɬ~ɮipajaɾ samaanaj paɬ~ɮama kitanan a ʦiħəʦi ħani?
S.TRANSL: How does that gift, his peace, help us to bear fruit?

S.FORM: O dipayal samaanay padama kitaanan a ciheci hani?
O dipayal samaanay padama kitaanan a ciheci hani?
S.PHON: o~u ɬ~ɮipajaɾ samaanaj paɬ~ɮama kitaanan a ʦiħəʦi ħani?
