S.FORM: O matatodongay pihakelongan samanay padama to tamdaw milifok to so'linay a hemek?
O matatodongay pihakelongan samanay padama to tamdaw milifok to so'linay a hemek?
S.PHON: o~u matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj piħakəɾo~uŋan samanaj paɬ~ɮama to~u tamɬ~ɮaw miɾifo~uk to~u so~uʡɾinaj a ħəmək?
S.TRANSL: How does true religion promote happiness?

S.FORM: 'Olic 37:25 ato Hipray 13:5, samaanay padama ko wama wina patahekal to timolo?
'Olic 37:25 ato Hipray 13:5, samaanay padama ko wama wina patahekal to timolo?
S.PHON: ʡo~uɾiʦ **:** ato~u ħipraj **:*, samaanaj paɬ~ɮama ko~u wama wina pataħəkaɾ to~u timo~uɾo~u?
S.TRANSL: How can Psalm 37:25 and Hebrews 13:5 help parents?

S.FORM: O malohemay malitengay sasamaan padama takowanan, mitafo to patalipa'elalay ato fanekfekay hani?
O malohemay malitengay sasamaan padama takowanan, mitafo to patalipa'elalay ato fanekfekay hani?
S.PHON: o~u maɾo~uħəmaj maɾitəŋaj sasamaan paɬ~ɮama tako~uwanan, mitafo~u to~u pataɾipaʡəɾaɾaj ato~u fanəkfəkaj ħani?
S.TRANSL: How can congregation elders help us to be vigilant and active?

S.FORM: Misamaan padama to tao milifok to so'linay a rihaday hani?
Misamaan padama to tao milifok to so'linay a rihaday hani?
S.PHON: misamaan paɬ~ɮama to~u tao~u miɾifo~uk to~u so~uʡɾinaj a riħaɬ~ɮaj ħani?
S.TRANSL: What does God's Word say that can help us to find true and lasting peace?

S.FORM: Samanay ci Yihofa a padama ci Tafitian miremo to pasangaray?
Samanay ci Yihofa a padama ci Tafitian miremo to pasangaray?
S.PHON: samanaj ʦi jiħo~ufa a paɬ~ɮama ʦi tafitian mirəmo~u to~u pasaŋaraj?
S.TRANSL: How did Jehovah help David to cope with the challenges he faced?

S.FORM: Somowalay ko mikingkiway a tamdaw, padama to tamdaw 'matongalay ko araaw ato epoc no ka'orip, samanen mihaen to demak mirenecay to sasafaay a saali no tamdaw.'
Somowalay ko mikingkiway a tamdaw, padama to tamdaw 'matongalay ko araaw ato epoc no ka'orip, samanen mihaen to demak mirenecay to sasafaay a saali no tamdaw.'
S.PHON: so~umo~uwaɾaj ko~u mikiŋkiwaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, paɬ~ɮama to~u tamɬ~ɮaw ʡmato~uŋaɾaj ko~u araaw ato~u əpo~uʦ no~u kaʡo~urip, samanən miħaən to~u ɬ~ɮəmak mirənəʦaj to~u sasafaaj a saaɾi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw.ʡ
S.TRANSL: Helping others, researchers say, is important to developing "a greater sense of purpose and meaning" in life "because it fulfills basic human needs."

S.FORM: Samaanay padama ko fangcalay saocor i kitanan?
Samaanay padama ko fangcalay saocor i kitanan?
S.PHON: samaanaj paɬ~ɮama ko~u faŋʦaɾaj sao~uʦo~ur i kitanan?
S.TRANSL: How can holy spirit help us?

S.FORM: Caka halafin, so'linay malifet nangra ko pitengil ni Yihofa to satolon nangra, padama cangraanan.
Caka halafin, so'linay malifet nangra ko pitengil ni Yihofa to satolon nangra, padama cangraanan.
S.PHON: ʦaka ħaɾafin, so~uʡɾinaj maɾifət naŋra ko~u pitəŋiɾ ni jiħo~ufa to~u sato~uɾo~un naŋra, paɬ~ɮama ʦaŋraanan.
S.TRANSL: And indeed, shortly thereafter, they experienced how Jehovah answered their prayers for help.

S.FORM: "O TAPANG no pipanayan" ci Yihofa pakalalokay to adihayay salikaka nai romaroma kitakit malinah tayra i Miyanmar, tayni i Asia kitakit padama to mipanayay to no'adingoan a demak.
"O TAPANG no pipanayan" ci Yihofa pakalalokay to adihayay salikaka nai romaroma kitakit malinah tayra i Miyanmar, tayni i Asia kitakit padama to mipanayay to no'adingoan a demak.
S.PHON: "o~u tapan* no~u pipanajan" ʦi jiħo~ufa pakaɾaɾo~ukaj to~u aɬ~ɮiħajaj saɾikaka nai ro~umaro~uma kitakit maɾinaħ tajra i mijanmar, tajni i asia kitakit paɬ~ɮama to~u mipanajaj to~u no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan a ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: However, "the Master of the harvest," Jehovah, has touched the hearts of hundreds of brothers and sisters from different lands, and they have come to this country in Southeast Asia to assist in the spiritual harvest work.

S.FORM: Misamaanay pasifana' to tamdaw to so'linay kimad, wa padama kitaanan misetek to faloco' a midoedo to so'linay kimad a midemak hani?
Misamaanay pasifana' to tamdaw to so'linay kimad, wa padama kitaanan misetek to faloco' a midoedo to so'linay kimad a midemak hani?
S.PHON: misamaanaj pasifanaʡ to~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~u so~uʡɾinaj kimaɬ~ɮ, wa paɬ~ɮama kitaanan misətək to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ a miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u so~uʡɾinaj kimaɬ~ɮ a miɬ~ɮəmak ħani?
S.TRANSL: How does sharing the truth with others strengthen our determination to go on walking in the truth?

S.FORM: O micekiway to Fangcalay Cudad mamisamaan padama kitanan palahad to paka'metay to tireng a capeling hani?
O micekiway to Fangcalay Cudad mamisamaan padama kitanan palahad to paka'metay to tireng a capeling hani?
S.PHON: o~u miʦəkiwaj to~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ mamisamaan paɬ~ɮama kitanan paɾaħaɬ~ɮ to~u pakaʡmətaj to~u tirəŋ a ʦapəɾiŋ ħani?
S.TRANSL: How can Bible study help us to cultivate the godly quality of self-control?

S.FORM: Wa samaan kiso padama to salikaka hani?
Wa samaan kiso padama to salikaka hani?
S.PHON: wa samaan kiso~u paɬ~ɮama to~u saɾikaka ħani?
S.TRANSL: How might you be able to offer practical assistance to members of your congregation?

S.FORM: Sida'itay ci Yihofa misaday to sarikec ato safalod, padama kitaanan misalof to makapahay faloco' ato mitoor to pakayraan Ningra minengneng to demak.
Sida'itay ci Yihofa misaday to sarikec ato safalod, padama kitaanan misalof to makapahay faloco' ato mitoor to pakayraan Ningra minengneng to demak.
S.PHON: siɬ~ɮaʡitaj ʦi jiħo~ufa misaɬ~ɮaj to~u sarikəʦ ato~u safaɾo~uɬ~ɮ, paɬ~ɮama kitaanan misaɾo~uf to~u makapaħaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ato~u mito~uo~ur to~u pakajraan niŋra minəŋnəŋ to~u ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: Jehovah has lovingly provided both laws and principles to help us fine-tune our conscience and view things the way he does.

S.FORM: Misinanotay ci Yihofa to mararomay a tamdaw, padama cangranan mikitini i kimad Ningra milifok to sahinom, padamaho cangranan milifok to lipahak ato tahada'ocay 'orip.
Misinanotay ci Yihofa to mararomay a tamdaw, padama cangranan mikitini i kimad Ningra milifok to sahinom, padamaho cangranan milifok to lipahak ato tahada'ocay 'orip.
S.PHON: misinano~utaj ʦi jiħo~ufa to~u mararo~umaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, paɬ~ɮama ʦaŋranan mikitini i kimaɬ~ɮ niŋra miɾifo~uk to~u saħino~um, paɬ~ɮamaħo~u ʦaŋranan miɾifo~uk to~u ɾipaħak ato~u taħaɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦaj ʡo~urip.
S.TRANSL: Jehovah takes note of such sincere mourners; he comforts and blesses them with spiritual consolation, happiness, and life.

S.FORM: Sasamaan misi'ayaw to mato'olay a pakayraan?
Sasamaan misi'ayaw to mato'olay a pakayraan?
S.PHON: sasamaan misiʡajaw to~u mato~uʡo~uɾaj a pakajraan?
S.TRANSL: What about loneliness?

S.FORM: Saka tolo micowat to kala ceccay a pakayraan i, mikahi misodod to tao.
Saka tolo micowat to kala ceccay a pakayraan i, mikahi misodod to tao.
S.PHON: saka to~uɾo~u miʦo~uwat to~u kaɾa ʦəʦʦaj a pakajraan i, mikaħi miso~uɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮ to~u tao~u.
S.TRANSL: A third way we can promote unity is by freely forgiving others.

S.FORM: Itira i tikami ni Pawlo to Filipiay kasakopang paihekalay, miremo to cariraw a sanga'ayay a pakayraan i, o satolon.
Itira i tikami ni Pawlo to Filipiay kasakopang paihekalay, miremo to cariraw a sanga'ayay a pakayraan i, o satolon.
S.PHON: itira i tikami ni pawɾo~u to~u fiɾipiaj kasako~upaŋ paiħəkaɾaj, mirəmo~u to~u ʦariraw a saŋaʡajaj a pakajraan i, o~u sato~uɾo~un.
S.TRANSL: Paul's words to the Philippians show us that the antidote to worry is prayer.

S.FORM: O pakayraan no hekal...
O pakayraan no hekal...
S.PHON: o~u pakajraan no~u ħəkaɾ...
S.TRANSL: Will our world...; Would you say it is...?"

S.FORM: O roma pakayraan ni Yihofa pa'icel kitaanan, pakaynian i kasakopang a pakalalok kitaanan.
O roma pakayraan ni Yihofa pa'icel kitaanan, pakaynian i kasakopang a pakalalok kitaanan.
S.PHON: o~u ro~uma pakajraan ni jiħo~ufa paʡiʦəɾ kitaanan, pakajnian i kasako~upaŋ a pakaɾaɾo~uk kitaanan.
S.TRANSL: One means by which Jehovah builds us up in love is the Christian congregation.

S.FORM: Ano samaanto ko pakayraan i, sasamaan ko hademak ita wa malifok ko sapalemed ni Yihofa hani?
Ano samaanto ko pakayraan i, sasamaan ko hademak ita wa malifok ko sapalemed ni Yihofa hani?
S.PHON: ano~u samaanto~u ko~u pakajraan i, sasamaan ko~u ħaɬ~ɮəmak ita wa maɾifo~uk ko~u sapaɾəməɬ~ɮ ni jiħo~ufa ħani?
S.TRANSL: How can we give Jehovah something to bless regardless of our circumstances?

S.FORM: 'Ayaw no patireng to miiingay ko kasacefang no malohemay malitengay, wa misongila'miharateng to cecaceay pakayraan.
'Ayaw no patireng to miiingay ko kasacefang no malohemay malitengay, wa misongila'miharateng to cecaceay pakayraan.
S.PHON: ʡajaw no~u patirəŋ to~u miiiŋaj ko~u kasaʦəfaŋ no~u maɾo~uħəmaj maɾitəŋaj, wa miso~uŋiɾaʡmiħaratəŋ to~u ʦəʦaʦəaj pakajraan.
S.TRANSL: The body of elders carefully evaluates each situation to determine whether a judicial committee is warranted.

S.FORM: Kawrira, awaay ko pakayraan nangra, palahedaw to lalood, tatiihay demak, adada, ato nikaw, edeng o Hongti Kitakit no Kawas ko nganga'ay palahedaw to pades.
Kawrira, awaay ko pakayraan nangra, palahedaw to lalood, tatiihay demak, adada, ato nikaw, edeng o Hongti Kitakit no Kawas ko nganga'ay palahedaw to pades.
S.PHON: kawrira, awaaj ko~u pakajraan naŋra, paɾaħəɬ~ɮaw to~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, tatiiħaj ɬ~ɮəmak, aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa, ato~u nikaw, əɬ~ɮəŋ o~u ħo~uŋti kitakit no~u kawas ko~u ŋaŋaʡaj paɾaħəɬ~ɮaw to~u paɬ~ɮəs.
S.TRANSL: Clearly, such forces cannot eliminate war, crime, disease, and poverty, only God's Kingdom can.

S.FORM: Misamaanay hano pakaso'lin kita, miliyaway ma'orip no ikor o madadoedoay a pakayraan ko sapidemak?
Misamaanay hano pakaso'lin kita, miliyaway ma'orip no ikor o madadoedoay a pakayraan ko sapidemak?
S.PHON: misamaanaj ħano~u pakaso~uʡɾin kita, miɾijawaj maʡo~urip no~u iko~ur o~u maɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uaj a pakajraan ko~u sapiɬ~ɮəmak?
S.TRANSL: Why can we trust that the coming resurrection will be orderly?

S.FORM: So'lin tahalifa kita to katoledan a pakayraan, wa kamayan kita mitafo to kodaitay.
So'lin tahalifa kita to katoledan a pakayraan, wa kamayan kita mitafo to kodaitay.
S.PHON: so~uʡɾin taħaɾifa kita to~u kato~uɾəɬ~ɮan a pakajraan, wa kamajan kita mitafo~u to~u ko~uɬ~ɮaitaj.
S.TRANSL: So despite moments of discouragement, we endure.

S.FORM: Sasamaan tano pakalalokay a pakayraan ko malohemay malitengay misadak to sapirikec?
Sasamaan tano pakalalokay a pakayraan ko malohemay malitengay misadak to sapirikec?

S.TRANSL: How can the elders give counsel in an encouraging way?

S.FORM: Awaayto ko no'adingoan a kakaenen itira, awaay ko pakayraan a micawma' to salikaka.
Awaayto ko no'adingoan a kakaenen itira, awaay ko pakayraan a micawma' to salikaka.
S.PHON: awaajto~u ko~u no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan a kakaənən itira, awaaj ko~u pakajraan a miʦawmaʡ to~u saɾikaka.
S.TRANSL: Later, she shipped me off to my father at Peshawar, a town some 850 miles 1,370 km to the north.

S.FORM: Pakayni picada ni Yis to tao a pakayraan, mananamay ita ko maanan hani?

S.PHON: pakajni piʦaɬ~ɮa ni jis to~u tao~u a pakajraan, mananamaj ita ko~u maanan ħani?
S.TRANSL: What can we learn from the way Jesus treated people?

O maanan ko padamaay toniya mararamoday pakafilo to hatiniay ka calemceman a pakayraan hani?

S.TRANSL: What helped them to cope with their stressful situation?

S.PHON: i masamaanaj pakajraan a paso~uwaɾ ʦi jis to~u ɾako~uiŋ?

So'lin cowa ka hahecad ko pinangan ato paratoh no kasa niyaro', kawraan mahecaday ko pakayraan a paratoh.

S.TRANSL: Customs and words used may differ from place to place, but the basics of a greeting are much the same.

S.FORM: Itini roma pakayraan, mitoor ko Krisciyang to makayatay no Fangcalay Cudad a makapahay faloco', cowa ka hecad ko misa'osian.
Itini roma pakayraan, mitoor ko Krisciyang to makayatay no Fangcalay Cudad a makapahay faloco', cowa ka hecad ko misa'osian.

S.TRANSL: On certain matters, two different Christians with Bible-trained consciences might come to opposite conclusions.

S.FORM: Sinanotenho ita ko romaroma tinakoan i Fangcalay Cudad, to misamaanay ci Yihofa tano caay ka harateng ita a pakayraan a pala'osi to araaw Ningra.
Sinanotenho ita ko romaroma tinakoan i Fangcalay Cudad, to misamaanay ci Yihofa tano caay ka harateng ita a pakayraan a pala'osi to araaw Ningra.

S.TRANSL: Then, we will review some additional Scriptural examples of how Jehovah did the unexpected.

S.FORM: Ma'arawto ni Cikariya ko saka 7 mapolosi ikor, samaanayho ko pakayraan no Yirusalim?
Ma'arawto ni Cikariya ko saka 7 mapolosi ikor, samaanayho ko pakayraan no Yirusalim?

S.TRANSL: At the close of Zechariah's seventh vision, what was the situation of the Jews in Jerusalem?

S.FORM: Ano tooren ita to hakowaay ko hafay no tamdaw a misawkit to samaanay a tamdaw cingra, alatek wa mafekad ko misa'akawangay a pakayraan i kasakopang.
Ano tooren ita to hakowaay ko hafay no tamdaw a misawkit to samaanay a tamdaw cingra, alatek wa mafekad ko misa'akawangay a pakayraan i kasakopang.

S.TRANSL: If we judge others on the basis of their material wealth, we could create class distinctions in the congregation.

S.FORM: Dotoc, wa mi'araw kita to nolitengan tahanini, ano mafalic ko pakayraan i pairaay to samaanay rihadayay a faloco' ko sikawdan ni Yihofa.
Dotoc, wa mi'araw kita to nolitengan tahanini, ano mafalic ko pakayraan i pairaay to samaanay rihadayay a faloco' ko sikawdan ni Yihofa.

S.TRANSL: Let us consider how some Bible characters and some modern-day servants of Jehovah managed to maintain their inner peace despite changing circumstances.

S.FORM: O harateng ni Yis, na faloco'an ato pakayraan dademak, mahecaday ci Yihofaan, ono ka'orip mahecaday to araaw ato palinian no Kawas.
O harateng ni Yis, na faloco'an ato pakayraan dademak, mahecaday ci Yihofaan, ono ka'orip mahecaday to araaw ato palinian no Kawas.
S.PHON: o~u ħaratəŋ ni jis, na faɾo~uʦo~uʡan ato~u pakajraan ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak, maħəʦaɬ~ɮaj ʦi jiħo~ufaan, o~uno~u kaʡo~urip maħəʦaɬ~ɮaj to~u araaw ato~u paɾinian no~u kawas.
S.TRANSL: He thought, felt, and acted like Jehovah and lived in harmony with God's will and standards.

S.FORM: Itiniay i masamaanay a pakayraan mitiliday ci Icikil to Icikil 14:14 hani?
Itiniay i masamaanay a pakayraan mitiliday ci Icikil to Icikil 14:14 hani?

S.FORM: Itini i samaanay a pakayraan wa mirikec kita to mato'asay tamdaw hani?
Itini i samaanay a pakayraan wa mirikec kita to mato'asay tamdaw hani?
S.PHON: itini i samaanaj a pakajraan wa mirikəʦ kita to~u mato~uʡasaj tamɬ~ɮaw ħani?
S.TRANSL: In what circumstance might it be proper for us to give needed counsel or discipline to a person who is older than we are?

S.FORM: 'Faelohto' ko harateng ita, palahadho to faelohay a pakayraan miharatengan.
'Faelohto' ko harateng ita, palahadho to faelohay a pakayraan miharatengan.
S.PHON: ʡfaəɾo~uħto~uʡ ko~u ħaratəŋ ita, paɾaħaɬ~ɮħo~u to~u faəɾo~uħaj a pakajraan miħaratəŋan.
S.TRANSL: Our minds are 'made over,' and we develop a new pattern of thinking.

S.FORM: Nohatiniho kita mipa'icel to paso'lin ci Yihofaan, pakayraan Ningra ci Yisan a miki'ok kita, o materekay i pono' Ningra a tamdaw oha mamiliyaw a ma'orip.
Nohatiniho kita mipa'icel to paso'lin ci Yihofaan, pakayraan Ningra ci Yisan a miki'ok kita, o materekay i pono' Ningra a tamdaw oha mamiliyaw a ma'orip.
S.PHON: no~uħatiniħo~u kita mipaʡiʦəɾ to~u paso~uʡɾin ʦi jiħo~ufaan, pakajraan niŋra ʦi jisan a mikiʡo~uk kita, o~u matərəkaj i po~uno~uʡ niŋra a tamɬ~ɮaw o~uħa mamiɾijaw a maʡo~urip.
S.TRANSL: In the meantime, we should bolster our faith in Jehovah, who through Jesus assured us that the dead in God's memory will rise.

S.FORM: Samaanan ni Yihofa tano cowa ka harateng ni Yis a pakayraan mihayda cingra hani?
Samaanan ni Yihofa tano cowa ka harateng ni Yis a pakayraan mihayda cingra hani?
S.PHON: samaanan ni jiħo~ufa tano~u ʦo~uwa ka ħaratəŋ ni jis a pakajraan miħajɬ~ɮa ʦiŋra ħani?
S.TRANSL: How did Jehovah honor Jesus in an unexpected manner?

S.FORM: Wa samaan kita a miliyas to hatiniay a pakayraan hani?
Wa samaan kita a miliyas to hatiniay a pakayraan hani?
S.PHON: wa samaan kita a miɾijas to~u ħatiniaj a pakajraan ħani?
S.TRANSL: What can help us to prevent that from happening?

S.FORM: O maanan a pakayraan paihekal to timolo ni Nowa hani?
O maanan a pakayraan paihekal to timolo ni Nowa hani?
S.PHON: o~u maanan a pakajraan paiħəkaɾ to~u timo~uɾo~u ni no~uwa ħani?
S.TRANSL: In what ways did Noah show great courage?

S.FORM: Samaan kita i tosa pakayraan patado a miharateng to pitosilan a tamdaw, 1. wa hacowa a toki miliso' to tamdaw?
Samaan kita i tosa pakayraan patado a miharateng to pitosilan a tamdaw, 1. wa hacowa a toki miliso' to tamdaw?

S.TRANSL: How may consideration for our neighbors influence a. the time we call at their homes?

S.FORM: Makahi kita misongila'mitengil to sowal no tao, o paihkalay to misapoeneray a pakayraan.
Makahi kita misongila'mitengil to sowal no tao, o paihkalay to misapoeneray a pakayraan.
S.PHON: makaħi kita miso~uŋiɾaʡmitəŋiɾ to~u so~uwaɾ no~u tao~u, o~u paiħkaɾaj to~u misapo~uənəraj a pakajraan.
S.TRANSL: Another area that reveals the depth of our humility is our willingness to hear people out.

S.FORM: Nikawrira, ano maamaanan a pakayraan, sini'adaen ko tamdaw cowa ka saan.
Nikawrira, ano maamaanan a pakayraan, sini'adaen ko tamdaw cowa ka saan.
S.PHON: nikawrira, ano~u maamaanan a pakajraan, siniʡaɬ~ɮaən ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw ʦo~uwa ka saan.
S.TRANSL: That is not to say that compassion is to be shown in every situation.

S.FORM: Kedecen ita kono so'linay kimad a safaked to tatelecan, wa mitoor to so'linay kimad a ma'orip, i kihecod a pakayraan cowa ko mamisamangah.
Kedecen ita kono so'linay kimad a safaked to tatelecan, wa mitoor to so'linay kimad a ma'orip, i kihecod a pakayraan cowa ko mamisamangah.
S.PHON: kəɬ~ɮəʦən ita ko~uno~u so~uʡɾinaj kimaɬ~ɮ a safakəɬ~ɮ to~u tatəɾəʦan, wa mito~uo~ur to~u so~uʡɾinaj kimaɬ~ɮ a maʡo~urip, i kiħəʦo~uɬ~ɮ a pakajraan ʦo~uwa ko~u mamisamaŋaħ.
S.TRANSL: When Bible truth is wrapped around us tightly, as it were, we will be moved to live in harmony with it and to speak the truth at all times.

S.FORM: Somowalay ci Pawlo, itini i saikoray lintad, samaanay ko pakayraan no kalo tamdaw.
Somowalay ci Pawlo, itini i saikoray lintad, samaanay ko pakayraan no kalo tamdaw.
S.PHON: so~umo~uwaɾaj ʦi pawɾo~u, itini i saiko~uraj ɾintaɬ~ɮ, samaanaj ko~u pakajraan no~u kaɾo~u tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: Paul described how people living in the last days would relate to one another.

S.FORM: Mahecad ci Yosifan, wa tahasi'ayaw kita to cowa ka remo a pakayraan alatek.
Mahecad ci Yosifan, wa tahasi'ayaw kita to cowa ka remo a pakayraan alatek.
S.PHON: maħəʦaɬ~ɮ ʦi jo~usifan, wa taħasiʡajaw kita to~u ʦo~uwa ka rəmo~u a pakajraan aɾatək.
S.TRANSL: Like Joseph, we may find ourselves in a situation over which we have little or no control.

S.FORM: Mikitini kita i enem a pakayraan minanam.
Mikitini kita i enem a pakayraan minanam.
S.PHON: mikitini kita i ənəm a pakajraan minanam.
S.TRANSL: Consider six lessons you can draw from his example.

S.FORM: Mala pairasoray ci Cikariya i, samaanay ko pakayraan no kitakit no Israil tamdaw?
Mala pairasoray ci Cikariya i, samaanay ko pakayraan no kitakit no Israil tamdaw?
S.PHON: maɾa pairaso~uraj ʦi ʦikarija i, samaanaj ko~u pakajraan no~u kitakit no~u israiɾ tamɬ~ɮaw?
S.TRANSL: What was the situation of Jehovah's people when Zechariah began prophesying?

S.FORM: Tadtaden, o roma milingatay ci Ilisaan a patikolay pa'orip to mapatayay a ma'oningay.
Tadtaden, o roma milingatay ci Ilisaan a patikolay pa'orip to mapatayay a ma'oningay.
S.PHON: taɬ~ɮtaɬ~ɮən, o~u ro~uma miɾiŋataj ʦi iɾisaan a patiko~uɾaj paʡo~urip to~u mapatajaj a maʡo~uniŋaj.
S.TRANSL: Explain how Elisha was involved in the third resurrection related in the Bible.

S.FORM: Mangolaw ci Yihofa iraay ko roma a lalangian alatek.
Mangolaw ci Yihofa iraay ko roma a lalangian alatek.
S.PHON: maŋo~uɾaw ʦi jiħo~ufa iraaj ko~u ro~uma a ɾaɾaŋian aɾatək.
S.TRANSL: There is another possibility.

S.FORM: O roma salikaka tahacadaay to sapalak.
O roma salikaka tahacadaay to sapalak.
S.PHON: o~u ro~uma saɾikaka taħaʦaɬ~ɮaaj to~u sapaɾak.
S.TRANSL: Some of us are subjected to hostility.

S.FORM: O roma tamdaw matemoyay mafokil a miholol to lafang.
O roma tamdaw matemoyay mafokil a miholol to lafang.
S.PHON: o~u ro~uma tamɬ~ɮaw matəmo~ujaj mafo~ukiɾ a miħo~uɾo~uɾ to~u ɾafaŋ.
S.TRANSL: Some are shy and fear that conversation would lag or that guests might not feel entertained.

S.FORM: Ikorto iraay ko roma tamdaw misawacayay to miliyaway pa'orip a demak.
Ikorto iraay ko roma tamdaw misawacayay to miliyaway pa'orip a demak.
S.PHON: iko~urto~u iraaj ko~u ro~uma tamɬ~ɮaw misawaʦajaj to~u miɾijawaj paʡo~urip a ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: Others became eyewitnesses to another resurrection.

S.FORM: O roma tinakoan i, o wawa ni Yakop ci Yosif.
O roma tinakoan i, o wawa ni Yakop ci Yosif.
S.PHON: o~u ro~uma tinako~uan i, o~u wawa ni jako~up ʦi jo~usif.
S.TRANSL: Consider the young man Joseph, a son of Jacob.

S.FORM: O roma i, 'alomanay a tamdaw macadaay ko nai widang anca kafana'an a tamdaw a tano tingnaw ato soci a tikami.
O roma i, 'alomanay a tamdaw macadaay ko nai widang anca kafana'an a tamdaw a tano tingnaw ato soci a tikami.
S.PHON: o~u ro~uma i, ʡaɾo~umanaj a tamɬ~ɮaw maʦaɬ~ɮaaj ko~u nai wiɬ~ɮaŋ anʦa kafanaʡan a tamɬ~ɮaw a tano~u tiŋnaw ato~u so~uʦi a tikami.
S.TRANSL: Many people are also flooded with e-mails, text messages, and reports from well-meaning friends and acquaintances.

S.FORM: Ano kalacafay to roma fafahiyan ko fa'inay i, samaan ko demak nga' miharatengay to nafaloco'an no fafahi hani?
Ano kalacafay to roma fafahiyan ko fa'inay i, samaan ko demak nga' miharatengay to nafaloco'an no fafahi hani?
S.PHON: ano~u kaɾaʦafaj to~u ro~uma fafaħijan ko~u faʡinaj i, samaan ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak ŋaʡ miħaratəŋaj to~u nafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan no~u fafaħi ħani?
S.TRANSL: In his dealings with other women, how should a husband show consideration for his wife?

S.FORM: O roma i, ma'inapay ci Sawlo to kala'osi ni Tafiti sapipatayaw cingranan.
O roma i, ma'inapay ci Sawlo to kala'osi ni Tafiti sapipatayaw cingranan.
S.PHON: o~u ro~uma i, maʡinapaj ʦi sawɾo~u to~u kaɾaʡo~usi ni tafiti sapipatajaw ʦiŋranan.
S.TRANSL: Also, King Saul became jealous of David's success and tried to kill him.

S.FORM: So'linayto, awaay ko roma tayal to nganga'ay parenec kitanan.
So'linayto, awaay ko roma tayal to nganga'ay parenec kitanan.
S.PHON: so~uʡɾinajto~u, awaaj ko~u ro~uma tajaɾ to~u ŋaŋaʡaj parənəʦ kitanan.
S.TRANSL: No other career offers satisfaction like that.

S.FORM: O kasakilac kantok ato fafahi misaday a miliso' to roma a kasakopang.
O kasakilac kantok ato fafahi misaday a miliso' to roma a kasakopang.
S.PHON: o~u kasakiɾaʦ kanto~uk ato~u fafaħi misaɬ~ɮaj a miɾiso~uʡ to~u ro~uma a kasako~upaŋ.
S.TRANSL: A circuit overseer and his wife are ready to travel to the next congregation that they will visit.

S.FORM: O patadoay to fafahi miharateng a fa'inay, ano kalacafay to roma fafahiyan i, wa miharateng to nafaloco'an no fafahi.
O patadoay to fafahi miharateng a fa'inay, ano kalacafay to roma fafahiyan i, wa miharateng to nafaloco'an no fafahi.
S.PHON: o~u pataɬ~ɮo~uaj to~u fafaħi miħaratəŋ a faʡinaj, ano~u kaɾaʦafaj to~u ro~uma fafaħijan i, wa miħaratəŋ to~u nafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan no~u fafaħi.
S.TRANSL: A thoughtful husband also takes his wife's feelings into account when he interacts with other women.

S.FORM: O roma tamdaw mihadidiay to kato'as no tireng, adada anca masomad to kapatay no salawina.
O roma tamdaw mihadidiay to kato'as no tireng, adada anca masomad to kapatay no salawina.
S.PHON: o~u ro~uma tamɬ~ɮaw miħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮiaj to~u kato~uʡas no~u tirəŋ, aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa anʦa maso~umaɬ~ɮ to~u kapataj no~u saɾawina.
S.TRANSL: We may be struggling with heartaches resulting from advancing age, disease, or the loss of a loved one.

S.FORM: Na misi'ayaway ci Taniil to saconged, oniya saconged i laloma' no 30 romi'ad, hamaan pasayra i roma kawas anca tamdaw a mitolon.
Na misi'ayaway ci Taniil to saconged, oniya saconged i laloma' no 30 romi'ad, hamaan pasayra i roma kawas anca tamdaw a mitolon.
S.PHON: na misiʡajawaj ʦi taniiɾ to~u saʦo~uŋəɬ~ɮ, o~unija saʦo~uŋəɬ~ɮ i ɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ħamaan pasajra i ro~uma kawas anʦa tamɬ~ɮaw a mito~uɾo~un.
S.TRANSL: Consider what Daniel did when an official decree forbade prayer to any god or man other than the king for 30 days.

S.FORM: Nohatini, o kiciya no sinpon itiniay i roma a demakan ko kaciharatengan, o ta'angayay a demak koni.
Nohatini, o kiciya no sinpon itiniay i roma a demakan ko kaciharatengan, o ta'angayay a demak koni.
S.PHON: no~uħatini, o~u kiʦija no~u sinpo~un itiniaj i ro~uma a ɬ~ɮəmakan ko~u kaʦiħaratəŋan, o~u taʡaŋajaj a ɬ~ɮəmak ko~uni.
S.TRANSL: But now the traffic signals were old news.

S.FORM: O roma tamdaw hano cowa pihai a mafiyor no nima ko pinengneng nangra hani?
O roma tamdaw hano cowa pihai a mafiyor no nima ko pinengneng nangra hani?
S.PHON: o~u ro~uma tamɬ~ɮaw ħano~u ʦo~uwa piħai a mafijo~ur no~u nima ko~u pinəŋnəŋ naŋra ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why do some resist the idea of being molded by anyone?

S.FORM: Iti:yaho, so'lin pakidem ko raraw no roma tamdaw, miliyawayho milifok to olah no Kawas.
Iti:yaho, so'lin pakidem ko raraw no roma tamdaw, miliyawayho milifok to olah no Kawas.
S.PHON: iti:jaħo~u, so~uʡɾin pakiɬ~ɮəm ko~u raraw no~u ro~uma tamɬ~ɮaw, miɾijawajħo~u miɾifo~uk to~u o~uɾaħ no~u kawas.
S.TRANSL: Some in Bible times enjoyed his approval even though they had formerly committed grave sins.

S.FORM: O roma pala a tamdaw, pasowal to mata'lif ko kali tosa tatokian wa tosato ko toki.
O roma pala a tamdaw, pasowal to mata'lif ko kali tosa tatokian wa tosato ko toki.
S.PHON: o~u ro~uma paɾa a tamɬ~ɮaw, paso~uwaɾ to~u mataʡɾif ko~u kaɾi to~usa tato~ukian wa to~usato~u ko~u to~uki.
S.TRANSL: There are even places where that same time could be expressed as "half two," meaning 30 minutes before two.

S.FORM: O roma tamdaw na mirikecan no Kawas, mikitira milifetan nangra wa mananam ita ko maanan?
O roma tamdaw na mirikecan no Kawas, mikitira milifetan nangra wa mananam ita ko maanan?
S.PHON: o~u ro~uma tamɬ~ɮaw na mirikəʦan no~u kawas, mikitira miɾifətan naŋra wa mananam ita ko~u maanan?
S.TRANSL: What can we learn from those whom God disciplined in the past?

S.FORM: O roma misanga'an ni Satan a talakal o kafaheka' no tamdaw to misakawasay a 'icel.
O roma misanga'an ni Satan a talakal o kafaheka' no tamdaw to misakawasay a 'icel.
S.PHON: o~u ro~uma misaŋaʡan ni satan a taɾakaɾ o~u kafaħəkaʡ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~u misakawasaj a ʡiʦəɾ.
S.TRANSL: Another effective bait that Satan uses is curiosity about the occult.

S.FORM: So'li'lin, o roma tamdaw minanam tono kalitengay a Krisiya a sowal nga', cipinang to Fangcalay Cudad sanay, 'arawhan cowa ka hatira.
So'li'lin, o roma tamdaw minanam tono kalitengay a Krisiya a sowal nga', cipinang to Fangcalay Cudad sanay, 'arawhan cowa ka hatira.
S.PHON: so~uʡɾiʡɾin, o~u ro~uma tamɬ~ɮaw minanam to~uno~u kaɾitəŋaj a krisija a so~uwaɾ ŋaʡ, ʦipinaŋ to~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ sanaj, ʡarawħan ʦo~uwa ka ħatira.
S.TRANSL: Some have felt that they should learn ancient Hebrew and Greek so that they could read the Bible in the original languages.

S.FORM: O roma mamilengo, samaan a caka pisakakinih to tamdaw.
O roma mamilengo, samaan a caka pisakakinih to tamdaw.
S.PHON: o~u ro~uma mamiɾəŋo~u, samaan a ʦaka pisakakiniħ to~u tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: Further, it considers how we can progress in treating others impartially.

S.FORM: O roma tamdaw matalaway romadiw, samanen cowa ka fana' to sasamaan a romadiw.
O roma tamdaw matalaway romadiw, samanen cowa ka fana' to sasamaan a romadiw.
S.PHON: o~u ro~uma tamɬ~ɮaw mataɾawaj ro~umaɬ~ɮiw, samanən ʦo~uwa ka fanaʡ to~u sasamaan a ro~umaɬ~ɮiw.
S.TRANSL: Perhaps we are apprehensive about singing because we are unsure of how to sing.

S.FORM: O roma i, Faelohay Hekal Mihongyakan Fangcalay Cudad adihayay masasiroma ko sowal.
O roma i, Faelohay Hekal Mihongyakan Fangcalay Cudad adihayay masasiroma ko sowal.
S.PHON: o~u ro~uma i, faəɾo~uħaj ħəkaɾ miħo~uŋjakan faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ aɬ~ɮiħajaj masasiro~uma ko~u so~uwaɾ.
S.TRANSL: The New World Translation of the Holy Scriptures is published in many more languages.

S.FORM: O malinahay tayra i roma kitakit a wama wina, ano papadama to no'adingoan no wawa i, hano mamisinanot to pakayniay sasowalan a demak?
O malinahay tayra i roma kitakit a wama wina, ano papadama to no'adingoan no wawa i, hano mamisinanot to pakayniay sasowalan a demak?
S.PHON: o~u maɾinaħaj tajra i ro~uma kitakit a wama wina, ano~u papaɬ~ɮama to~u no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan no~u wawa i, ħano~u mamisinano~ut to~u pakajniaj saso~uwaɾan a ɬ~ɮəmak?
S.TRANSL: In helping their children spiritually, why should immigrant parents evaluate the matter of language?

S.FORM: O roma, adihayay demak misaaliay to kifaloco'ay kiyaho nga' padadotoc, misanga' ato mihongyak to cudad, ika, midama to taha padesay a demak, patireng to faelohay Hongti Kitakit kasa'opoan.

S.PHON: o~u ro~uma, aɬ~ɮiħajaj ɬ~ɮəmak misaaɾiaj to~u kifaɾo~uʦo~uʡaj kijaħo~u ŋaʡ paɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ, misaŋaʡ ato~u miħo~uŋjak to~u ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, ika, miɬ~ɮama to~u taħa paɬ~ɮəsaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, patirəŋ to~u faəɾo~uħaj ħo~uŋti kitakit kasaʡo~upo~uan.
S.TRANSL: In addition, the preparation and translation of literature and videos, the assistance with disaster relief efforts, and the construction of new Kingdom Halls are all cared for by our voluntary contributions.

S.FORM: So'lin hatira, nganga'ay linahen ko cinganganay to fisac a wawa i roma salikaka.
So'lin hatira, nganga'ay linahen ko cinganganay to fisac a wawa i roma salikaka.
S.PHON: so~uʡɾin ħatira, ŋaŋaʡaj ɾinaħən ko~u ʦiŋaŋanaj to~u fisaʦ a wawa i ro~uma saɾikaka.
S.TRANSL: But the right of firstborn could be transferred.

S.FORM: O roma sai, o mipatemeran ni Yihofa papitilid ci Pawloan a Fangcalay Cudad, adihayay ko epoc i kitaanan.
O roma sai, o mipatemeran ni Yihofa papitilid ci Pawloan a Fangcalay Cudad, adihayay ko epoc i kitaanan.
S.PHON: o~u ro~uma sai, o~u mipatəməran ni jiħo~ufa papitiɾiɬ~ɮ ʦi pawɾo~uan a faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, aɬ~ɮiħajaj ko~u əpo~uʦ i kitaanan.
S.TRANSL: And consider how much benefit we can draw from the Bible books that Jehovah inspired Paul to write.

S.FORM: 'Ayaw no Ta'angayay Lenlen, mikayhidan ni Satan ko roma coyoh madadi'i to fafahiyan no tamdaw.
'Ayaw no Ta'angayay Lenlen, mikayhidan ni Satan ko roma coyoh madadi'i to fafahiyan no tamdaw.
S.PHON: ʡajaw no~u taʡaŋajaj ɾənɾən, mikajħiɬ~ɮan ni satan ko~u ro~uma ʦo~ujo~uħ maɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮiʡi to~u fafaħijan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: Prior to the Flood, Satan lured at least some of them into having immoral relations with the daughters of men.

S.FORM: O roma, haratengen ko tinakoan ni Mariya.
O roma, haratengen ko tinakoan ni Mariya.
S.PHON: o~u ro~uma, ħaratəŋən ko~u tinako~uan ni marija.
S.TRANSL: Now consider another example, that of Mary.

S.FORM: O piliyaw ni Yis ma'orip ato roma miliyaway ma'orip, samanay a eca ka hecad hani?
O piliyaw ni Yis ma'orip ato roma miliyaway ma'orip, samanay a eca ka hecad hani?
S.PHON: o~u piɾijaw ni jis maʡo~urip ato~u ro~uma miɾijawaj maʡo~urip, samanaj a əʦa ka ħəʦaɬ~ɮ ħani?
S.TRANSL: How did the resurrection of Jesus differ from earlier ones?

S.FORM: O roma, masowalay ni Yihofa i Fangcalay Cudad ko Hongti Kitakit ni Misiya, somowalayho Cingra o mapasimalay Krisciyang iraay ko hatokel, tayra i kakarayan tahada'oc a ma'orip, o 'roma lopay'ay siri' wa itini i sera a Lakoing tahada'oc a ma'orip.

O roma, masowalay ni Yihofa i Fangcalay Cudad ko Hongti Kitakit ni Misiya, somowalayho Cingra o mapasimalay Krisciyang iraay ko hatokel, tayra i kakarayan tahada'oc a ma'orip, o 'roma lopay'ay siri' wa itini i sera a Lakoing tahada'oc a ma'orip.
S.PHON: o~u ro~uma, maso~uwaɾaj ni jiħo~ufa i faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ ko~u ħo~uŋti kitakit ni misija, so~umo~uwaɾajħo~u ʦiŋra o~u mapasimaɾaj krisʦijaŋ iraaj ko~u ħato~ukəɾ, tajra i kakarajan taħaɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ a maʡo~urip, o~u ʡro~uma ɾo~upajʡaj siriʡ wa itini i səra a ɾako~uiŋ taħaɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ a maʡo~urip.
S.TRANSL: Jehovah also informs us about the Messianic Kingdom, and he sets before the anointed the heavenly hope and before the "other sheep" the hope of the earthly Paradise.

S.FORM: Toya taykay kako ato roma tamdaw itiniay i kietecay a lako i ngata no nociyo micada to ino'.
Toya taykay kako ato roma tamdaw itiniay i kietecay a lako i ngata no nociyo micada to ino'.
S.PHON: to~uja tajkaj kako~u ato~u ro~uma tamɬ~ɮaw itiniaj i kiətəʦaj a ɾako~u i ŋata no~u no~uʦijo~u miʦaɬ~ɮa to~u ino~uʡ.
S.TRANSL: That assembly was also special for me because, along with a few others, I got baptized in a chilly farm pond nearby.

S.FORM: O tapang no Kapot no Hoing no Padaka ko miekoay to salikaka, misafelitay to Sarikec no Spay, sowal sa oniya sarikec, "o sapiconged to salasil a ciepocay lalosidan," sanay.
O tapang no Kapot no Hoing no Padaka ko miekoay to salikaka, misafelitay to Sarikec no Spay, sowal sa oniya sarikec, "o sapiconged to salasil a ciepocay lalosidan," sanay.
S.PHON: o~u tapaŋ no~u kapo~ut no~u ħo~uiŋ no~u paɬ~ɮaka ko~u miəko~uaj to~u saɾikaka, misafəɾitaj to~u sarikəʦ no~u spaj, so~uwaɾ sa o~unija sarikəʦ, "o~u sapiʦo~uŋəɬ~ɮ to~u saɾasiɾ a ʦiəpo~uʦaj ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan," sanaj.
S.TRANSL: The attorney general of the United States called the law they were accused of violating, the Espionage Act, an "effective weapon against propaganda."

S.FORM: Itini ka'orip ita awaawa sa misi'ayaway to ka calemceman, ka toledan, ka rorayan a demak.
Itini ka'orip ita awaawa sa misi'ayaway to ka calemceman, ka toledan, ka rorayan a demak.
S.PHON: itini kaʡo~urip ita awaawa sa misiʡajawaj to~u ka ʦaɾəmʦəman, ka to~uɾəɬ~ɮan, ka ro~urajan a ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: Perhaps worries, disappointments, and afflictions have become part of our life.

S.FORM: Mifekaday konini to pakidemay kasasongtol no pidoyongan, sa adihayay milaliway to pades a tamdaw.
Mifekaday konini to pakidemay kasasongtol no pidoyongan, sa adihayay milaliway to pades a tamdaw.
S.PHON: mifəkaɬ~ɮaj ko~unini to~u pakiɬ~ɮəmaj kasaso~uŋto~uɾ no~u piɬ~ɮo~ujo~uŋan, sa aɬ~ɮiħajaj miɾaɾiwaj to~u paɬ~ɮəs a tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: * This event triggered widespread religious violence among the people, resulting in one of the largest mass migrations in history.

S.FORM: Mansa ko 'alomanay tamdaw, awa ko pihakelongan ikakaay ko lipahak saan.
Mansa ko 'alomanay tamdaw, awa ko pihakelongan ikakaay ko lipahak saan.
S.PHON: mansa ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj tamɬ~ɮaw, awa ko~u piħakəɾo~uŋan ikakaaj ko~u ɾipaħak saan.
S.TRANSL: No wonder an increasing number of people feel that they can be happy without religion!

S.FORM: Rorayen ko ka'orip cowa ka saan ci Yihofa kitanan, cowa pikeceng kitanan a malawla.
Rorayen ko ka'orip cowa ka saan ci Yihofa kitanan, cowa pikeceng kitanan a malawla.
S.PHON: ro~urajən ko~u kaʡo~urip ʦo~uwa ka saan ʦi jiħo~ufa kitanan, ʦo~uwa pikəʦəŋ kitanan a maɾawɾa.
S.TRANSL: Jehovah does not want us to practice severe self-denial or to abstain from wholesome activities that bring enjoyment.

S.FORM: Samaanay ci Ipafras eca pisateked a ciharateng to salikaka hani?
Samaanay ci Ipafras eca pisateked a ciharateng to salikaka hani?
S.PHON: samaanaj ʦi ipafras əʦa pisatəkəɬ~ɮ a ʦiħaratəŋ to~u saɾikaka ħani?
S.TRANSL: How did Epaphras show unselfish concern for others?

S.FORM: O misapoeneray a capeling padamaay to salikaka ci Keristef micada to sapalimo'ot.
O misapoeneray a capeling padamaay to salikaka ci Keristef micada to sapalimo'ot.
S.PHON: o~u misapo~uənəraj a ʦapəɾiŋ paɬ~ɮamaaj to~u saɾikaka ʦi kəristəf miʦaɬ~ɮa to~u sapaɾimo~uʡo~ut.
S.TRANSL: Humility moved Christoph to accept good advice.

S.FORM: So'li'lin hatira, timoloayho ko salikaka a romakat a misingtin.
So'li'lin hatira, timoloayho ko salikaka a romakat a misingtin.
S.PHON: so~uʡɾiʡɾin ħatira, timo~uɾo~uajħo~u ko~u saɾikaka a ro~umakat a misiŋtin.
S.TRANSL: Despite opposition, fearless brothers and sisters kept taking to the streets.

S.FORM: Mahecad o tarokos, masowalay i'ayaw itiniay i kakatimolan no Iwropa a fafahiyan salikaka, minanamay to kalimelaan a sapasifana'.
Mahecad o tarokos, masowalay i'ayaw itiniay i kakatimolan no Iwropa a fafahiyan salikaka, minanamay to kalimelaan a sapasifana'.
S.PHON: maħəʦaɬ~ɮ o~u taro~uko~us, maso~uwaɾaj iʡajaw itiniaj i kakatimo~uɾan no~u iwro~upa a fafaħijan saɾikaka, minanamaj to~u kaɾiməɾaan a sapasifanaʡ.
S.TRANSL: The sister in southern Europe mentioned earlier learned this same lesson.

S.FORM: Hofochan ci Taniil ciadadaay to Tangsecen, sowal no ising caka halafin ko 'orip ningra sanay.
Hofochan ci Taniil ciadadaay to Tangsecen, sowal no ising caka halafin ko 'orip ningra sanay.
S.PHON: ħo~ufo~uʦħan ʦi taniiɾ ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj to~u taŋsəʦən, so~uwaɾ no~u isiŋ ʦaka ħaɾafin ko~u ʡo~urip niŋra sanaj.
S.TRANSL: He was severely affected with Down syndrome* and was not expected to live long.

S.FORM: O tatodong no ngangan ni Cikariya i, "Maharatengay ni Yihofa" o sanay.
O tatodong no ngangan ni Cikariya i, "Maharatengay ni Yihofa" o sanay.
S.PHON: o~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u ŋaŋan ni ʦikarija i, "maħaratəŋaj ni jiħo~ufa" o~u sanaj.
S.TRANSL: The very name Zechariah, which means "Jehovah Has Remembered," may have brought to mind a vital truth.

S.FORM: Micekiway to likisi no Yutaya ci Yosifos, maedeng 12 ko mihecaan ni Samuil itiya sanay.
Micekiway to likisi no Yutaya ci Yosifos, maedeng 12 ko mihecaan ni Samuil itiya sanay.
S.PHON: miʦəkiwaj to~u ɾikisi no~u jo~u~utaja ʦi jo~usifo~us, maəɬ~ɮəŋ ** ko~u miħəʦaan ni samo~u~uiɾ itija sanaj.
S.TRANSL: Jewish historian Josephus says that Samuel was 12 years old at the time.

S.FORM: Sanay padotoc ci Monika mitadtad to lalangian.
Sanay padotoc ci Monika mitadtad to lalangian.
S.PHON: sanaj paɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ ʦi mo~unika mitaɬ~ɮtaɬ~ɮ to~u ɾaɾaŋian.
S.TRANSL: Monique explains why.

S.FORM: Palidlid sanay ci Solomon miliyas to sarikec ni Yihofa, salikor midemakay to pakidemay a raraw.
Palidlid sanay ci Solomon miliyas to sarikec ni Yihofa, salikor midemakay to pakidemay a raraw.
S.PHON: paɾiɬ~ɮɾiɬ~ɮ sanaj ʦi so~uɾo~umo~un miɾijas to~u sarikəʦ ni jiħo~ufa, saɾiko~ur miɬ~ɮəmakaj to~u pakiɬ~ɮəmaj a raraw.
S.TRANSL: Solomon's gradual departure from Jehovah's requirements led him in time to extreme wrongdoing.

S.FORM: Sanay. Mikowaday tamiyanan koni sowal.
Sanay. Mikowaday tamiyanan koni sowal.
S.PHON: sanaj. miko~uwaɬ~ɮaj tamijanan ko~uni so~uwaɾ.
S.TRANSL: Their words encouraged us to make the move.

S.FORM: O sowal ni Satan, o mari'angay a mikowanay ko Kawas, ma'idiay palada' to tamdaw sanay.
O sowal ni Satan, o mari'angay a mikowanay ko Kawas, ma'idiay palada' to tamdaw sanay.
S.PHON: o~u so~uwaɾ ni satan, o~u mariʡaŋaj a miko~uwanaj ko~u kawas, maʡiɬ~ɮiaj paɾaɬ~ɮaʡ to~u tamɬ~ɮaw sanaj.
S.TRANSL: He contends that God's rulership is corrupt and that Jehovah withholds the best from his creatures.

S.FORM: Malengo ko Fangcalay Cudad to 'a'ideman no kasakopang ci Yis i, sanay: "Caay pakaynien ningra i ma'araway ningra ato matengilay ningra a lihaf ko nipihapinang ningra to dademaken a mikowan.
Malengo ko Fangcalay Cudad to 'a'ideman no kasakopang ci Yis i, sanay: "Caay pakaynien ningra i ma'araway ningra ato matengilay ningra a lihaf ko nipihapinang ningra to dademaken a mikowan.
S.PHON: maɾəŋo~u ko~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ to~u ʡaʡiɬ~ɮəman no~u kasako~upaŋ ʦi jis i, sanaj: "ʦaaj pakajniən niŋra i maʡarawaj niŋra ato~u matəŋiɾaj niŋra a ɾiħaf ko~u nipiħapinaŋ niŋra to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən a miko~uwan.
S.TRANSL: Regarding the head of the Christian congregation, Jesus, the Bible prophesied: "He will not judge by what appears to his eyes, nor reprove simply according to what his ears hear.

S.FORM: Salikor a mitilidan ni Pitiro o sapafeli to salikaka ningra, sanay a mitilid:
Salikor a mitilidan ni Pitiro o sapafeli to salikaka ningra, sanay a mitilid:
S.PHON: saɾiko~ur a mitiɾiɬ~ɮan ni pitiro~u o~u sapafəɾi to~u saɾikaka niŋra, sanaj a mitiɾiɬ~ɮ:
S.TRANSL: Peter's last comments were addressed to his siblings. He wrote:

S.FORM: Pakalalokay ko tarokos ci Pawlo to Krisciyang, sanay ko sowal: "Samatiyaen o faloco' ni Kristo ko faloco' namo...
Pakalalokay ko tarokos ci Pawlo to Krisciyang, sanay ko sowal: "Samatiyaen o faloco' ni Kristo ko faloco' namo...
S.PHON: pakaɾaɾo~ukaj ko~u taro~uko~us ʦi pawɾo~u to~u krisʦijaŋ, sanaj ko~u so~uwaɾ: "samatijaən o~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ni kristo~u ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ namo~u...
S.TRANSL: Hence, the apostle Paul urged Christians: "Keep this mental attitude in you that was also in Christ Jesus...

S.FORM: Macekiday ci Yohani to demak no simpo, sanay pasowal cingranan: "Cowato ko mamiliyaw kako micomod i Tingsokiw!"
Macekiday ci Yohani to demak no simpo, sanay pasowal cingranan: "Cowato ko mamiliyaw kako micomod i Tingsokiw!"
S.PHON: maʦəkiɬ~ɮaj ʦi jo~uħani to~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u simpo~u, sanaj paso~uwaɾ ʦiŋranan: "ʦo~uwato~u ko~u mamiɾijaw kako~u miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i tiŋso~ukiw!"
S.TRANSL: John was so shocked by the priest's behavior that he told the priest, "I will never set foot in a Catholic church again."

S.FORM: Sowal ni Pawlo 'maolahay to payso' ko tamdaw sanay.
Sowal ni Pawlo 'maolahay to payso' ko tamdaw sanay.
S.PHON: so~uwaɾ ni pawɾo~u ʡmao~uɾaħaj to~u pajso~uʡ ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw sanaj.
S.TRANSL: Paul wrote that people would be "lovers of money."

S.FORM: Ci Napal tatodong noni ngangan o "mafolaay" sanay.
Ci Napal tatodong noni ngangan o "mafolaay" sanay.
S.PHON: ʦi napaɾ tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~uni ŋaŋan o~u "mafo~uɾaaj" sanaj.
S.TRANSL: But Nabal, whose name means "Senseless" or "Stupid," lived up to his name.

S.FORM: Sanay ko sowal ni Yis: "Ano milokes ko tamdamdaw i tamowanan a mikari'ang a mipalafo to masamaamaanay a tatiihay a sowal tona mitoor kamo i takowanan i, o malemeday."
Sanay ko sowal ni Yis: "Ano milokes ko tamdamdaw i tamowanan a mikari'ang a mipalafo to masamaamaanay a tatiihay a sowal tona mitoor kamo i takowanan i, o malemeday."
S.PHON: sanaj ko~u so~uwaɾ ni jis: "ano~u miɾo~ukəs ko~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw i tamo~uwanan a mikariʡaŋ a mipaɾafo~u to~u masamaamaanaj a tatiiħaj a so~uwaɾ to~una mito~uo~ur kamo~u i tako~uwanan i, o~u maɾəməɬ~ɮaj."
S.TRANSL: "Happy are you when people reproach you and persecute you and lyingly say every sort of wicked thing against you for my sake."

S.FORM: Mihaenay haw i, maharek ci Pawlo somowal toni capeling i, sanay pa'icel ko sowal: "Itini tonini a demak a maemin i, pahapinangen ko olah.
Mihaenay haw i, maharek ci Pawlo somowal toni capeling i, sanay pa'icel ko sowal: "Itini tonini a demak a maemin i, pahapinangen ko olah.
S.PHON: miħaənaj ħaw i, maħarək ʦi pawɾo~u so~umo~uwaɾ to~uni ʦapəɾiŋ i, sanaj paʡiʦəɾ ko~u so~uwaɾ: "itini to~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak a maəmin i, paħapinaŋən ko~u o~uɾaħ.
S.TRANSL: Fittingly, the Bible's description of the new personality concludes with this powerful truth: "Besides all these things, clothe yourselves with love, for it is a perfect bond of union."

S.FORM: Itiniay Lintad ni Kristo a Palestan, sanay ko sowal, adihayay ko masasiromaay a kapot no Yutaya, o kasasiroma no pihakelongan milingatay to mirikecay a demak.
Itiniay Lintad ni Kristo a Palestan, sanay ko sowal, adihayay ko masasiromaay a kapot no Yutaya, o kasasiroma no pihakelongan milingatay to mirikecay a demak.
S.PHON: itiniaj ɾintaɬ~ɮ ni kristo~u a paɾəstan, sanaj ko~u so~uwaɾ, aɬ~ɮiħajaj ko~u masasiro~umaaj a kapo~ut no~u jo~u~utaja, o~u kasasiro~uma no~u piħakəɾo~uŋan miɾiŋataj to~u mirikəʦaj a ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: The book Daily Life in Palestine at the Time of Christ notes that "the religious sects into which the Jews were divided corresponded more or less to what we term political parties."

S.FORM: Ci Matis 15 ko mihecaan, sanay cingra: "Sapitooraw to palinian ni Yihofa a dademak, eca pahecad to demak no cafacafay, tada pasangarayto."
Ci Matis 15 ko mihecaan, sanay cingra: "Sapitooraw to palinian ni Yihofa a dademak, eca pahecad to demak no cafacafay, tada pasangarayto."
S.PHON: ʦi matis ** ko~u miħəʦaan, sanaj ʦiŋra: "sapito~uo~uraw to~u paɾinian ni jiħo~ufa a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak, əʦa paħəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u ʦafaʦafaj, taɬ~ɮa pasaŋarajto~u."
S.TRANSL: Madison, 15, says: "It's a struggle for me to stick to Jehovah's standards and not go along with what my peers think is cool or fun."

S.FORM: Oniya marefongay i sakayhid a tamdaw mihaydaay ci Yihofa cangranan sanay miharateng.
Oniya marefongay i sakayhid a tamdaw mihaydaay ci Yihofa cangranan sanay miharateng.
S.PHON: o~unija marəfo~uŋaj i sakajħiɬ~ɮ a tamɬ~ɮaw miħajɬ~ɮaaj ʦi jiħo~ufa ʦaŋranan sanaj miħaratəŋ.
S.TRANSL: Those who give in to temptation may think that they still have a good standing with Jehovah.

S.FORM: Dotoc a sowal ningra, kalasaka dademaken ko "dafong no hekal" a madimadi to Kawas sanay.
Dotoc a sowal ningra, kalasaka dademaken ko "dafong no hekal" a madimadi to Kawas sanay.
S.PHON: ɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ a so~uwaɾ niŋra, kaɾasaka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən ko~u "ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ no~u ħəkaɾ" a maɬ~ɮimaɬ~ɮi to~u kawas sanaj.
S.TRANSL: The verses that follow the illustration connect the use of "unrighteous riches" with faithfulness to God.

S.FORM: Sinanoten, sanay ci Pawlo: "Ikakaay no niharatengan no tamdaw a nano Kawas a rihaday."
Sinanoten, sanay ci Pawlo: "Ikakaay no niharatengan no tamdaw a nano Kawas a rihaday."
S.PHON: sinano~utən, sanaj ʦi pawɾo~u: "ikakaaj no~u niħaratəŋan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw a nano~u kawas a riħaɬ~ɮaj."
S.TRANSL: But notice that "the peace of God... surpasses all understanding."

S.FORM: Matengil ni Yis sanay ko sowal: "O tanoktokay a tamdaw i, caay ko papaisingen.
Matengil ni Yis sanay ko sowal: "O tanoktokay a tamdaw i, caay ko papaisingen.
S.PHON: matəŋiɾ ni jis sanaj ko~u so~uwaɾ: "o~u tano~ukto~ukaj a tamɬ~ɮaw i, ʦaaj ko~u papaisiŋən.
S.TRANSL: Jesus replied: "Healthy people do not need a physician, but those who are ill do.

S.FORM: O fangcalay ko 'orip sanay ci Yihofa, mangalefay ko 'orip no tamdaw.
O fangcalay ko 'orip sanay ci Yihofa, mangalefay ko 'orip no tamdaw.
S.PHON: o~u faŋʦaɾaj ko~u ʡo~urip sanaj ʦi jiħo~ufa, maŋaɾəfaj ko~u ʡo~urip no~u tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: In Jehovah's eyes, life, especially human life, is sacred.

S.FORM: O "tatiihay a raraw konini a fafahiyan" sanay ko coyoh a mitadatad.
O "tatiihay a raraw konini a fafahiyan" sanay ko coyoh a mitadatad.
S.PHON: o~u "tatiiħaj a raraw ko~unini a fafaħijan" sanaj ko~u ʦo~ujo~uħ a mitaɬ~ɮataɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: The angel explains that the woman in the container is "Wickedness."

S.FORM: Sanay ko sowal ningra: "Ano cirafas kako i, latek mana'ay kako i Tisowanan, 'somowal to "cima ci Yihofa?"
Sanay ko sowal ningra: "Ano cirafas kako i, latek mana'ay kako i Tisowanan, 'somowal to "cima ci Yihofa?"
S.PHON: sanaj ko~u so~uwaɾ niŋra: "ano~u ʦirafas kako~u i, ɾatək manaʡaj kako~u i tiso~uwanan, ʡso~umo~uwaɾ to~u "ʦima ʦi jiħo~ufa?"
S.TRANSL: He wrote: "So that I do not become satisfied and deny you and say, 'Who is Jehovah?'"

S.FORM: Pakayni i tada macahiway a tamdaw, komaen to kaeso'ay a kakaenen, mahecaday i lakoing sanay.
Pakayni i tada macahiway a tamdaw, komaen to kaeso'ay a kakaenen, mahecaday i lakoing sanay.
S.PHON: pakajni i taɬ~ɮa maʦaħiwaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, ko~umaən to~u kaəso~uʡaj a kakaənən, maħəʦaɬ~ɮaj i ɾako~uiŋ sanaj.
S.TRANSL: A starving man sitting at a banquet might feel that he is in paradise.

S.FORM: Micangacang to So'linay a Hafay
Micangacang to So'linay a Hafay
S.PHON: miʦaŋaʦaŋ to~u so~uʡɾinaj a ħafaj
S.TRANSL: Seeking Riches That Are True

Samaan kita milifok to so'linay a pasalat?
S.PHON: samaan kita miɾifo~uk to~u so~uʡɾinaj a pasaɾat?
S.TRANSL: How can we gain true freedom?

S.FORM: So'linay i, o tatodong no "sarikec" milingatay to sapasifana', mahecad o pasifana'no wama wina to wawa.
So'linay i, o tatodong no "sarikec" milingatay to sapasifana', mahecad o pasifana'no wama wina to wawa.
S.PHON: so~uʡɾinaj i, o~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u "sarikəʦ" miɾiŋataj to~u sapasifanaʡ, maħəʦaɬ~ɮ o~u pasifanaʡno~u wama wina to~u wawa.
S.TRANSL: Indeed, the meaning behind "discipline" primarily relates to education, such as that involved in raising a beloved child.

S.FORM: So'linay haw i, awaay ko pinang ita to samaanay ko tatirengan ato pising ni Pawlo.
So'linay haw i, awaay ko pinang ita to samaanay ko tatirengan ato pising ni Pawlo.
S.PHON: so~uʡɾinaj ħaw i, awaaj ko~u pinaŋ ita to~u samaanaj ko~u tatirəŋan ato~u pisiŋ ni pawɾo~u.
S.TRANSL: Frankly, no man today can be certain of Paul's appearance.

S.FORM: So'linay, o padek a safa ni Apraham ci Sara.
So'linay, o padek a safa ni Apraham ci Sara.
S.PHON: so~uʡɾinaj, o~u paɬ~ɮək a safa ni apraħam ʦi sara.
S.TRANSL: In fact, Sarah was Abraham's half sister.

S.FORM: So'linay a Krisciyang papaihekal to so'linay a olah.
So'linay a Krisciyang papaihekal to so'linay a olah.
S.PHON: so~uʡɾinaj a krisʦijaŋ papaiħəkaɾ to~u so~uʡɾinaj a o~uɾaħ.
S.TRANSL: Genuine love identifies true Christians.

S.FORM: Masamaanay a Olah Papaira to So'linay Lipahak?
Masamaanay a Olah Papaira to So'linay Lipahak?
S.PHON: masamaanaj a o~uɾaħ papaira to~u so~uʡɾinaj ɾipaħak?
S.TRANSL: What Kind of Love Brings True Happiness?

S.FORM: Misamaan kita nga', milifok to so'linay a pasalat?
Misamaan kita nga', milifok to so'linay a pasalat?
S.PHON: misamaan kita ŋaʡ, miɾifo~uk to~u so~uʡɾinaj a pasaɾat?
S.TRANSL: What freedom did Jesus promise, and how can we gain it?

S.FORM: So'linay tadi'ecen
So'linay tadi'ecen
S.PHON: so~uʡɾinaj taɬ~ɮiʡəʦən
S.TRANSL: Jehovah is a stronghold,

S.FORM: So'linay ko sowal ni Pawlo.
So'linay ko sowal ni Pawlo.
S.PHON: so~uʡɾinaj ko~u so~uwaɾ ni pawɾo~u.
S.TRANSL: What Paul wrote was true.

S.FORM: Masamaanay a tamdaw cowa ko mamilifok to so'linay a lipahak hani?
Masamaanay a tamdaw cowa ko mamilifok to so'linay a lipahak hani?
S.PHON: masamaanaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ʦo~uwa ko~u mamiɾifo~uk to~u so~uʡɾinaj a ɾipaħak ħani?
S.TRANSL: Who can never be truly happy?

S.FORM: Milifok to So'linay a Pasalat
Milifok to So'linay a Pasalat
S.PHON: miɾifo~uk to~u so~uʡɾinaj a pasaɾat
S.TRANSL: The Way to True Freedom

S.FORM: Sowal ni Yis, "o so'linay fadisoso' a kilang kako," ci Yihofa o "maomahay palahaday a tamdaw", o "ca'ang" ko nisawawaan.
Sowal ni Yis, "o so'linay fadisoso' a kilang kako," ci Yihofa o "maomahay palahaday a tamdaw", o "ca'ang" ko nisawawaan.
S.PHON: so~uwaɾ ni jis, "o~u so~uʡɾinaj faɬ~ɮiso~uso~uʡ a kiɾaŋ kako~u," ʦi jiħo~ufa o~u "mao~umaħaj paɾaħaɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw", o~u "ʦaʡaŋ" ko~u nisawawaan.
S.TRANSL: Jesus described Jehovah as "the cultivator," himself as "the true vine," and his disciples as "the branches."

S.FORM: Samanen ita misaka dademak ko Matay 5:3 mitadtad i tamdaw to samaan milifok to so'linay a hemek?
Samanen ita misaka dademak ko Matay 5:3 mitadtad i tamdaw to samaan milifok to so'linay a hemek?
S.PHON: samanən ita misaka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak ko~u mataj *:* mitaɬ~ɮtaɬ~ɮ i tamɬ~ɮaw to~u samaan miɾifo~uk to~u so~uʡɾinaj a ħəmək?
S.TRANSL: How can we use Matthew 5:3 to reason on the question, What makes people happy?

S.FORM: Itini ta'angayay kaemingay a demak no ka'orip, o so'linay Krisciyang wa 'ka sasiso'lin ko sowal'.
Itini ta'angayay kaemingay a demak no ka'orip, o so'linay Krisciyang wa 'ka sasiso'lin ko sowal'.
S.PHON: itini taʡaŋajaj kaəmiŋaj a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u kaʡo~urip, o~u so~uʡɾinaj krisʦijaŋ wa ʡka sasiso~uʡɾin ko~u so~uwaɾʡ.
S.TRANSL: In every aspect of life, true Christians "speak the truth with one another."

S.FORM: Miki'okan ni Yis a pasalat hano o "so'linay a pasalat" hani?
Miki'okan ni Yis a pasalat hano o "so'linay a pasalat" hani?
S.PHON: mikiʡo~ukan ni jis a pasaɾat ħano~u o~u "so~uʡɾinaj a pasaɾat" ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why can the freedom that Jesus promised make us "truly free"?

S.FORM: So'li'lin mapakidemay a mahakokay, so'linay a pidoyongan padadotocay a macowat.
So'li'lin mapakidemay a mahakokay, so'linay a pidoyongan padadotocay a macowat.
S.PHON: so~uʡɾiʡɾin mapakiɬ~ɮəmaj a maħako~ukaj, so~uʡɾinaj a piɬ~ɮo~ujo~uŋan paɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦaj a maʦo~uwat.
S.TRANSL: Still, persecution did not stop the expansion of true worship.

S.FORM: Misamaan kita nga' malifok ko so'linay a hemek ato sakasaloaw hani?
Misamaan kita nga' malifok ko so'linay a hemek ato sakasaloaw hani?
S.PHON: misamaan kita ŋaʡ maɾifo~uk ko~u so~uʡɾinaj a ħəmək ato~u sakasaɾo~uaw ħani?
S.TRANSL: What can we do to find true happiness and satisfaction?

S.FORM: So'linay malidong.
So'linay malidong.
S.PHON: so~uʡɾinaj maɾiɬ~ɮo~uŋ.
S.TRANSL: We see the things unseen.

S.FORM: Mikangodo to tao so'linay adihay ko epoc, nga'ayho a matafo ko rihaday, paira to dipayal.
Mikangodo to tao so'linay adihay ko epoc, nga'ayho a matafo ko rihaday, paira to dipayal.
S.PHON: mikaŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u to~u tao~u so~uʡɾinaj aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u əpo~uʦ, ŋaʡajħo~u a matafo~u ko~u riħaɬ~ɮaj, paira to~u ɬ~ɮipajaɾ.
S.TRANSL: Indeed, treating others with respect yields many fine benefits, including peace.

S.FORM: "Kao so'linay ko sowal" ita.
"Kao so'linay ko sowal" ita.
S.PHON: "kao~u so~uʡɾinaj ko~u so~uwaɾ" ita.
S.TRANSL: We "speak the truth."

S.FORM: Sapilifokaw to so'linay pasalat, palimo'otay ci Pawlo to tamdaw mitapal cimaanan hani?
Sapilifokaw to so'linay pasalat, palimo'otay ci Pawlo to tamdaw mitapal cimaanan hani?
S.PHON: sapiɾifo~ukaw to~u so~uʡɾinaj pasaɾat, paɾimo~uʡo~utaj ʦi pawɾo~u to~u tamɬ~ɮaw mitapaɾ ʦimaanan ħani?
S.TRANSL: To whom did Paul direct people so that they could gain true freedom?

S.FORM: Hacowa kita tomerep, hacowa pasowal to so'linay a demak hani?
Hacowa kita tomerep, hacowa pasowal to so'linay a demak hani?
S.PHON: ħaʦo~uwa kita to~umərəp, ħaʦo~uwa paso~uwaɾ to~u so~uʡɾinaj a ɬ~ɮəmak ħani?
S.TRANSL: How would you decide when to remain silent and when to tell the whole truth?

S.FORM: Pa'icelay koniya sowal ci Mariyaan.
Pa'icelay koniya sowal ci Mariyaan.
S.PHON: paʡiʦəɾaj ko~unija so~uwaɾ ʦi marijaan.
S.TRANSL: Those words strengthened her.

S.FORM: Mala'osi ko sowal.
Mala'osi ko sowal.
S.PHON: maɾaʡo~usi ko~u so~uwaɾ.
S.TRANSL: What he foretells comes to be.

S.FORM: O sowal no 'Olic 15:1, 2, o cima ko nganga'ay malo widang ni Yihofa hani?
O sowal no 'Olic 15:1, 2, o cima ko nganga'ay malo widang ni Yihofa hani?
S.PHON: o~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡo~uɾiʦ **:*, *, o~u ʦima ko~u ŋaŋaʡaj maɾo~u wiɬ~ɮaŋ ni jiħo~ufa ħani?
S.TRANSL: According to Psalm 15:1, 2, who only can be Jehovah's friend?

S.FORM: Sowal ni Yihofa,
Sowal ni Yihofa,
S.PHON: so~uwaɾ ni jiħo~ufa,
S.TRANSL: Sustained his life like bread.

S.FORM: Ikor malaymayay to sowal no Alpania, mipadang to mata'lifay ko 60 a tamdaw micada to ino'.
Ikor malaymayay to sowal no Alpania, mipadang to mata'lifay ko 60 a tamdaw micada to ino'.
S.PHON: iko~ur maɾajmajaj to~u so~uwaɾ no~u aɾpania, mipaɬ~ɮaŋ to~u mataʡɾifaj ko~u ** a tamɬ~ɮaw miʦaɬ~ɮa to~u ino~uʡ.
S.TRANSL: She mastered the Albanian language and has helped over 60 individuals to the point of dedication.

S.FORM: Halitosaan minengneng kono Finam ato Padaka a Mikecolay, palalini a mihatatanam tono Finam a sowal.
Halitosaan minengneng kono Finam ato Padaka a Mikecolay, palalini a mihatatanam tono Finam a sowal.
S.PHON: ħaɾito~usaan minəŋnəŋ ko~uno~u finam ato~u paɬ~ɮaka a mikəʦo~uɾaj, paɾaɾini a miħatatanam to~uno~u finam a so~uwaɾ.
S.TRANSL: For the most part, I learned by comparing the English and Vietnamese editions of The Watchtower.

S.FORM: O sowal ni Pawlo samaanay pahapinang kitanan, misa'icel wanga' mahelong ko katelangay pinangan?
O sowal ni Pawlo samaanay pahapinang kitanan, misa'icel wanga' mahelong ko katelangay pinangan?
S.PHON: o~u so~uwaɾ ni pawɾo~u samaanaj paħapinaŋ kitanan, misaʡiʦəɾ waŋaʡ maħəɾo~uŋ ko~u katəɾaŋaj pinaŋan?
S.TRANSL: How do Paul's words show that strong measures are needed to strip off the old personality?

S.FORM: Pakaynien i Krisciyang ko sowal, sakakaay kalimelaan a sarikec ono olah a sarikec.
Pakaynien i Krisciyang ko sowal, sakakaay kalimelaan a sarikec ono olah a sarikec.
S.PHON: pakajniən i krisʦijaŋ ko~u so~uwaɾ, sakakaaj kaɾiməɾaan a sarikəʦ o~uno~u o~uɾaħ a sarikəʦ.
S.TRANSL: The foremost law for Christians is the law of love.

S.FORM: Mahapinang ita i sowal ni Pawlo, no'adingoan a tamdaw ato midoedoay to tireng a tamdaw, cowa ko rarihaday a malacafay.
Mahapinang ita i sowal ni Pawlo, no'adingoan a tamdaw ato midoedoay to tireng a tamdaw, cowa ko rarihaday a malacafay.
S.PHON: maħapinaŋ ita i so~uwaɾ ni pawɾo~u, no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan a tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uaj to~u tirəŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw, ʦo~uwa ko~u rariħaɬ~ɮaj a maɾaʦafaj.
S.TRANSL: Paul's words clearly state that a spiritual person cannot enjoy complete harmony with a physical person.

S.FORM: Tinakoen mitadtad, minengneng to nowina a sowal a ika hakowaay ko kata'angay no pilingat.
Tinakoen mitadtad, minengneng to nowina a sowal a ika hakowaay ko kata'angay no pilingat.
S.PHON: tinako~uən mitaɬ~ɮtaɬ~ɮ, minəŋnəŋ to~u no~uwina a so~uwaɾ a ika ħako~uwaaj ko~u kataʡaŋaj no~u piɾiŋat.
S.TRANSL: Illustrate the impact that watching one of our videos in their own language can have on people.

S.FORM: Tano Tanteloay sowal mikimad ci Riana
Tano Tanteloay sowal mikimad ci Riana
S.PHON: tano~u tantəɾo~uaj so~uwaɾ mikimaɬ~ɮ ʦi riana
S.TRANSL: Riana giving a talk in the Tandroy language

S.FORM: Pakayni i ngangan ni Yihofa miketon to sowal, tada o karetengay a demak.
Pakayni i ngangan ni Yihofa miketon to sowal, tada o karetengay a demak.
S.PHON: pakajni i ŋaŋan ni jiħo~ufa mikəto~un to~u so~uwaɾ, taɬ~ɮa o~u karətəŋaj a ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: It is a very serious matter to swear an oath in the name of Jehovah.

S.FORM: Pakaynien i Krisciyang ko sowal, awaayto ko pakafiloay to hemek a macakat i no'adingoan ko pacekiwan a tamdaw.
Pakaynien i Krisciyang ko sowal, awaayto ko pakafiloay to hemek a macakat i no'adingoan ko pacekiwan a tamdaw.
S.PHON: pakajniən i krisʦijaŋ ko~u so~uwaɾ, awaajto~u ko~u pakafiɾo~uaj to~u ħəmək a maʦakat i no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan ko~u paʦəkiwan a tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: Many who have had the privilege of conducting progressive Bible studies will tell you that few things are more rewarding.

S.FORM: Alatek matengilay nangra ko sapaoraf a sowal pakayni kitaanan?
Alatek matengilay nangra ko sapaoraf a sowal pakayni kitaanan?
S.PHON: aɾatək matəŋiɾaj naŋra ko~u sapao~uraf a so~uwaɾ pakajni kitaanan?
S.TRANSL: Perhaps others have been told lies about our beliefs.

S.FORM: Samaanen ita ko sowal mihinom to mapatayay ko salawina a tamdaw?
Samaanen ita ko sowal mihinom to mapatayay ko salawina a tamdaw?
S.PHON: samaanən ita ko~u so~uwaɾ miħino~um to~u mapatajaj ko~u saɾawina a tamɬ~ɮaw?
S.TRANSL: How can we provide words of comfort to the bereaved?

S.FORM: Ano mitosil kita i, samaanen ita kalasaka dademak ko Sowal no Kawas hani?
Ano mitosil kita i, samaanen ita kalasaka dademak ko Sowal no Kawas hani?
S.PHON: ano~u mito~usiɾ kita i, samaanən ita kaɾasaka ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u kawas ħani?
S.TRANSL: What can help us to make good use of God's Word in our ministry?

S.FORM: Mihaen o sowal ni Pawlo, o midokoay to Kawas a tamdaw wa midemak to tatiihay a demak alatek.
Mihaen o sowal ni Pawlo, o midokoay to Kawas a tamdaw wa midemak to tatiihay a demak alatek.
S.PHON: miħaən o~u so~uwaɾ ni pawɾo~u, o~u miɬ~ɮo~uko~uaj to~u kawas a tamɬ~ɮaw wa miɬ~ɮəmak to~u tatiiħaj a ɬ~ɮəmak aɾatək.
S.TRANSL: As Paul pointed out, even true worshippers could become involved in wrong practices.

S.FORM: No Hipray sowal a "koing", mihongyak ko Krisiya, o "paratisos" paradeisos.
No Hipray sowal a "koing", mihongyak ko Krisiya, o "paratisos" paradeisos.
S.PHON: no~u ħipraj so~uwaɾ a "ko~uiŋ", miħo~uŋjak ko~u krisija, o~u "paratiso~us" paraɬ~ɮəiso~us.
S.TRANSL: Paradeisos is the Greek term that translates the Hebrew word for "garden."

S.FORM: Mafana'ay ci Yihofa to mararaway ko sowal ni Satan.
Mafana'ay ci Yihofa to mararaway ko sowal ni Satan.

Dofdofen ko sowal no Kawas,

S.TRANSL: We daily partake of its teachings;

Hano rikecen ni Yihofa ci Kain hani? O maanan ko sowal Ningra ci Kainan?
S.PHON: ħano~u rikəʦən ni jiħo~ufa ʦi kain ħani? o~u maanan ko~u so~uwaɾ niŋra ʦi kainan?

S.FORM: Pakayni piliyawan ni Kristo tayni a patikolay ma'orip, samanay ko sowal no Fangcalay Cudad?
Pakayni piliyawan ni Kristo tayni a patikolay ma'orip, samanay ko sowal no Fangcalay Cudad?
S.PHON: pakajni piɾijawan ni kristo~u tajni a patiko~uɾaj maʡo~urip, samanaj ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ?
S.TRANSL: What does the Bible indicate would happen regarding the resurrection during Christ's presence?

S.FORM: Katayni takowanan!'
Katayni takowanan!'
S.PHON: katajni tako~uwanan!ʡ
S.TRANSL: Come to me!"

S.FORM: Ikor cowato mitahidang takowanan."
Ikor cowato mitahidang takowanan."
S.PHON: iko~ur ʦo~uwato~u mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ tako~uwanan."

S.TRANSL: Life Story, Blessings Come From Doing What Jehovah Asks

Micawma' cangranan tada ta'angayay ko pifiyor takowanan.

S.TRANSL: Association with them really left an impression on me.

S.FORM: Ci Yihofa Cowa Patoled i Takowanan!
Ci Yihofa Cowa Patoled i Takowanan!
S.PHON: ʦi jiħo~ufa ʦo~uwa pato~uɾəɬ~ɮ i tako~uwanan!
S.TRANSL: Jehovah Has Never Failed Me!

S.FORM: Macekokay ko wina, micongeday takowanan padotoc a micawma' to Misawacayay Tamdaw ni Yihofa.
Macekokay ko wina, micongeday takowanan padotoc a micawma' to Misawacayay Tamdaw ni Yihofa.
S.PHON: maʦəko~ukaj ko~u wina, miʦo~uŋəɬ~ɮaj tako~uwanan paɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ a miʦawmaʡ to~u misawaʦajaj tamɬ~ɮaw ni jiħo~ufa.

S.FORM: Sida'itay ci Polayse midipot takowanan.
Sida'itay ci Polayse midipot takowanan.

S.TRANSL: Pryce Hughes, the kindly branch servant, took me under his wing.

S.FORM: Caka halafin, mitahidangay ci Atak takowanan, malacafay cingranan mitosil.
Caka halafin, mitahidangay ci Atak takowanan, malacafay cingranan mitosil.

S.FORM: Miako'iday kako to pihadidi no salikaka a pahatatanam takowanan.
Miako'iday kako to pihadidi no salikaka a pahatatanam takowanan.
S.PHON: miako~uʡiɬ~ɮaj kako~u to~u piħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮi no~u saɾikaka a paħatatanam tako~uwanan.

NALIFETAN NO TAMDAW, Ci Yihofa Cowa Patoled i Takowanan!

S.TRANSL: Life Story, Jehovah Has Never Failed Me!

S.FORM: O ngolaw noniya misasingsiay, padamaay takowanan pakaso'lin to Kawas!"
O ngolaw noniya misasingsiay, padamaay takowanan pakaso'lin to Kawas!"

S.TRANSL: Through this preacher's wrath we now praise God."

S.FORM: Mikitini Tuluan tahira Saranski 12 romi'ad patatikor mikalic to ci'acefelay, to mihecahecaan kamayan ci Mariya miliso' takowanan.

S.TRANSL: Once a year Maria traveled to Saransk to visit me, although the journey from Tulun and back took 12 days by train.

S.FORM: Tocerid tano olahay pakalalok takowanan, mihinom takowanan.
Tocerid tano olahay pakalalok takowanan, mihinom takowanan.
S.PHON: to~uʦəriɬ~ɮ tano~u o~uɾaħaj pakaɾaɾo~uk tako~uwanan, miħino~um tako~uwanan.

S.FORM: Nohatini kamayan i Pitil a matayal kako, to romi'ami'ad ta'angayay ko sadama ni Lila takowanan.
Nohatini kamayan i Pitil a matayal kako, to romi'ami'ad ta'angayay ko sadama ni Lila takowanan.
S.PHON: no~uħatini kamajan i pitiɾ a matajaɾ kako~u, to~u ro~umiʡamiʡaɬ~ɮ taʡaŋajaj ko~u saɬ~ɮama ni ɾiɾa tako~uwanan.
S.TRANSL: My Bethel service continues with the support of Lila each day.

S.FORM: Pakaynian ni Yihofa i likakawa Ningra pahatatanam takowanan."
Pakaynian ni Yihofa i likakawa Ningra pahatatanam takowanan."

S.TRANSL: Jehovah was training me through his organization."

S.FORM: 'Alomanay a madimadiay salikaka mipadamaay takowanan, miako'iday kako cangranan
'Alomanay a madimadiay salikaka mipadamaay takowanan, miako'iday kako cangranan

mamilasil i tamdaw.

Manaokaniw, masasi romaromaay a pinangan pairaay to sakacacoli no tamdaw.

S.FORM: Pakayni namisanga'an ko sakaira no 'orip, tano kakakan no tamdaw ko sapikilimaw to ca'of, telocto masasifoday no masakenaay a lihaf.
Pakayni namisanga'an ko sakaira no 'orip, tano kakakan no tamdaw ko sapikilimaw to ca'of, telocto masasifoday no masakenaay a lihaf.
S.PHON: pakajni namisaŋaʡan ko~u sakaira no~u ʡo~urip, tano~u kakakan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u sapikiɾimaw to~u ʦaʡo~uf, təɾo~uʦto~u masasifo~uɬ~ɮaj no~u masakənaaj a ɾiħaf.
S.TRANSL: When looking to science to determine whether life was created, a person can easily get lost in a fog of information.

Aawaay ko paka'osiay a tamdaw to fo'is no kakarayan.
