S.TRANSL: On the JW Library home page, click on the "Donations" link

S.FORM: Maherek ko tayal, malalitemohay ko 'alomanay i potal no niyaro', minengneng to iraay ko macepetay no dimeng a tamdaw hokira.
Maherek ko tayal, malalitemohay ko 'alomanay i potal no niyaro', minengneng to iraay ko macepetay no dimeng a tamdaw hokira.
S.PHON: maħərək ko~u tajaɾ, maɾaɾitəmo~uħaj ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj i po~utaɾ no~u nijaro~uʡ, minəŋnəŋ to~u iraaj ko~u maʦəpətaj no~u ɬ~ɮiməŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw ħo~ukira.
S.TRANSL: Afterward, we would meet up outside the city to check if anyone had been caught and arrested by the police.

S.FORM: Makahi kita a mirienang to tayal no likakawa no Kawas, wa adihay ko faelohay a widang.
Makahi kita a mirienang to tayal no likakawa no Kawas, wa adihay ko faelohay a widang.
S.PHON: makaħi kita a miriənaŋ to~u tajaɾ no~u ɾikakawa no~u kawas, wa aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u faəɾo~uħaj a wiɬ~ɮaŋ.
S.TRANSL: Those who volunteer for theocratic projects often make new friends.

S.FORM: Sasamaanen ita minengneng ko tayal i likakawa ni Yihofa?
Sasamaanen ita minengneng ko tayal i likakawa ni Yihofa?
S.PHON: sasamaanən ita minəŋnəŋ ko~u tajaɾ i ɾikakawa ni jiħo~ufa?
S.TRANSL: How should we view privileges in Jehovah's service?

S.FORM: Kaemangay Tamdaw, Ka 'Padotoc Misa'icel, Milahecito Sakalidong Namo a Tayal'
Kaemangay Tamdaw, Ka 'Padotoc Misa'icel, Milahecito Sakalidong Namo a Tayal'
S.PHON: kaəmaŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw, ka ʡpaɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ misaʡiʦəɾ, miɾaħəʦito~u sakaɾiɬ~ɮo~uŋ namo~u a tajaɾʡ
S.TRANSL: Young Ones, "Keep Working Out Your Own Salvation"

S.FORM: Kantangay ko ka'orip itini, adihayay ko toki midemak to tayal ni Yihofa.
Kantangay ko ka'orip itini, adihayay ko toki midemak to tayal ni Yihofa.
S.PHON: kantaŋaj ko~u kaʡo~urip itini, aɬ~ɮiħajaj ko~u to~uki miɬ~ɮəmak to~u tajaɾ ni jiħo~ufa.
S.TRANSL: Life here is so much simpler, and I can give more time to Jehovah's work.

S.FORM: Kalikoan tayal no Kawas,
Kalikoan tayal no Kawas,
S.PHON: kaɾiko~uan tajaɾ no~u kawas,
S.TRANSL: Our service to God is a priv'lege;

S.FORM: Malo "kapot no Kawas", samaanen ita midemak nga' macakat ko pasifana'ay a tayal hani?
Malo "kapot no Kawas", samaanen ita midemak nga' macakat ko pasifana'ay a tayal hani?
S.PHON: maɾo~u "kapo~ut no~u kawas", samaanən ita miɬ~ɮəmak ŋaʡ maʦakat ko~u pasifanaʡaj a tajaɾ ħani?
S.TRANSL: What must we do to succeed as "God's fellow workers"?

S.FORM: Maherek mifana' to minaro'an no tayal ilalomiheca, misatapangay misingkiw to tatiyakan.
Maherek mifana' to minaro'an no tayal ilalomiheca, misatapangay misingkiw to tatiyakan.
S.PHON: maħərək mifanaʡ to~u minaro~uʡan no~u tajaɾ iɾaɾo~umiħəʦa, misatapaŋaj misiŋkiw to~u tatijakan.
S.TRANSL: After a report on the preceding year's work, the annual election of directors was held.

S.FORM: Kaemangay Tamdaw, ka 'Padotoc Misa'icel, Milahecito Sakalidong Namo a Tayal'
Kaemangay Tamdaw, ka 'Padotoc Misa'icel, Milahecito Sakalidong Namo a Tayal'
S.PHON: kaəmaŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw, ka ʡpaɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ misaʡiʦəɾ, miɾaħəʦito~u sakaɾiɬ~ɮo~uŋ namo~u a tajaɾʡ
S.TRANSL: Young Ones, "Keep Working Out Your Own Salvation"

S.FORM: Maocoray ci Tanis tayra i Aielan, cecayayto ci Aser i Himoos.
Maocoray ci Tanis tayra i Aielan, cecayayto ci Aser i Himoos.
S.PHON: mao~uʦo~uraj ʦi tanis tajra i aiəɾan, ʦəʦajajto~u ʦi asər i ħimo~uo~us.
S.TRANSL: Very soon Dennis was assigned to Ireland, leaving Arthur without a partner.

S.FORM: Matatodongay ko katayni ni Fukusen, samanen macadaay ni Yangke ko sanilnil, wa tayra i faelohay kilac a mitosil, mahaopay ko kilac no Suwiay.
Matatodongay ko katayni ni Fukusen, samanen macadaay ni Yangke ko sanilnil, wa tayra i faelohay kilac a mitosil, mahaopay ko kilac no Suwiay.
S.PHON: matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj ko~u katajni ni fo~u~uko~u~usən, samanən maʦaɬ~ɮaaj ni jaŋkə ko~u saniɾniɾ, wa tajra i faəɾo~uħaj kiɾaʦ a mito~usiɾ, maħao~upaj ko~u kiɾaʦ no~u so~u~uwiaj.
S.TRANSL: Brother Ferguson's arrival was timely because Brother Young would soon move to other preaching assignments, including the Soviet Union.

S.FORM: Hano tayra malinah ci Riana hani?
Hano tayra malinah ci Riana hani?
S.PHON: ħano~u tajra maɾinaħ ʦi riana ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why did he go there?

S.FORM: Pinaay a romi'ad mikalic to lofa anca romakat tayra i sangataay a ciyataw, mikitira a midakaw to kasoling tayra i pitaykayan.
Pinaay a romi'ad mikalic to lofa anca romakat tayra i sangataay a ciyataw, mikitira a midakaw to kasoling tayra i pitaykayan.
S.PHON: pinaaj a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ mikaɾiʦ to~u ɾo~ufa anʦa ro~umakat tajra i saŋataaj a ʦijataw, mikitira a miɬ~ɮakaw to~u kaso~uɾiŋ tajra i pitajkajan.
S.TRANSL: Thus, delegates had to ride mules or walk for days just to reach a train that would take them to the convention city.

S.FORM: Tayra i donate.jw.org wangcan
Tayra i donate.jw.org wangcan
S.PHON: tajra i ɬ~ɮo~unatə.jw.o~ur* waŋʦan
S.TRANSL: Type donate.jw.org in a web browser

S.FORM: Mafana' ci Alon tada mahemekay, tangsolay tayra i sefi mikilim to lapi, pasowal toniya demak.
Mafana' ci Alon tada mahemekay, tangsolay tayra i sefi mikilim to lapi, pasowal toniya demak.
S.PHON: mafanaʡ ʦi aɾo~un taɬ~ɮa maħəməkaj, taŋso~uɾaj tajra i səfi mikiɾim to~u ɾapi, paso~uwaɾ to~unija ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: Excitedly, he went to the synagogue to share his wonderful discovery with the rabbis.

S.FORM: Rosofoan, tayra mirienang to toloay romi'ad a taykay.
Rosofoan, tayra mirienang to toloay romi'ad a taykay.
S.PHON: ro~uso~ufo~uan, tajra miriənaŋ to~u to~uɾo~uaj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a tajkaj.
S.TRANSL: Local Witnesses are also on hand with a hearty welcome for Brother Rutherford, who has come to attend their three-day national convention.

S.FORM: Ikor, malacafayay ci Ilisa atoniya fafahiyan tayra i Sunim.
Ikor, malacafayay ci Ilisa atoniya fafahiyan tayra i Sunim.
S.PHON: iko~ur, maɾaʦafajaj ʦi iɾisa ato~unija fafaħijan tajra i so~u~unim.
S.TRANSL: Then the grieving mother arrived with Elisha.

S.FORM: Mahaen ya nisowalan ci Titiay: "Tayra i misaaliay a kilac mitosil, wa pahatatanamay kitanan misaday to noikoran."
Mahaen ya nisowalan ci Titiay: "Tayra i misaaliay a kilac mitosil, wa pahatatanamay kitanan misaday to noikoran."
S.PHON: maħaən ja niso~uwaɾan ʦi titiaj: "tajra i misaaɾiaj a kiɾaʦ mito~usiɾ, wa paħatatanamaj kitanan misaɬ~ɮaj to~u no~uiko~uran."
S.TRANSL: As Didier, mentioned before, puts it, "serving where the need is greater is good training for the future!"

S.FORM: Ano palakat to paliding ato matayal wa misinanot, patireng, mingasaw, i lalan tayra kasa'opoan wa misinanot to sanawsaw.
Ano palakat to paliding ato matayal wa misinanot, patireng, mingasaw, i lalan tayra kasa'opoan wa misinanot to sanawsaw.
S.PHON: ano~u paɾakat to~u paɾiɬ~ɮiŋ ato~u matajaɾ wa misinano~ut, patirəŋ, miŋasaw, i ɾaɾan tajra kasaʡo~upo~uan wa misinano~ut to~u sanawsaw.
S.TRANSL: We must drive and work safely, even when we are building, maintaining, or traveling to places of worship.

S.FORM: Mafana'ay ci Cikariya tora minokayay tayra i Yirusalim a Israil tamdaw, 'ifowaay a pakaso'lin to Kawas.
Mafana'ay ci Cikariya tora minokayay tayra i Yirusalim a Israil tamdaw, 'ifowaay a pakaso'lin to Kawas.
S.PHON: mafanaʡaj ʦi ʦikarija to~ura mino~ukajaj tajra i jiro~u~usaɾim a israiɾ tamɬ~ɮaw, ʡifo~uwaaj a pakaso~uʡɾin to~u kawas.
S.TRANSL: Zechariah knew that the Jews who moved to Jerusalem were men and women of faith.

S.FORM: Palahad to Paka'metay to Tireng a Capeling
Palahad to Paka'metay to Tireng a Capeling
S.PHON: paɾaħaɬ~ɮ to~u pakaʡmətaj to~u tirəŋ a ʦapəɾiŋ
S.TRANSL: Cultivate Self-Control

S.FORM: Padadotocay ci Pitiro a misolimet to tireng.
Padadotocay ci Pitiro a misolimet to tireng.
S.PHON: paɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦaj ʦi pitiro~u a miso~uɾimət to~u tirəŋ.
S.TRANSL: Peter continued to maintain a clean appearance.

S.FORM: Itiya, ci Yosif, "makapahay, tanektekay ko tireng," maimahay ko fafahi ni Potifar, sapidi'iaw cingranan.
Itiya, ci Yosif, "makapahay, tanektekay ko tireng," maimahay ko fafahi ni Potifar, sapidi'iaw cingranan.
S.PHON: itija, ʦi jo~usif, "makapaħaj, tanəktəkaj ko~u tirəŋ," maimaħaj ko~u fafaħi ni po~utifar, sapiɬ~ɮiʡiaw ʦiŋranan.
S.TRANSL: Potiphar's wife set her eyes on Joseph, who was "well-built and handsome," and she tried to seduce him.

S.FORM: Ci Yihofa o paka'metay to tireng a sanga'ayay ta'arawan.
Ci Yihofa o paka'metay to tireng a sanga'ayay ta'arawan.
S.PHON: ʦi jiħo~ufa o~u pakaʡmətaj to~u tirəŋ a saŋaʡajaj taʡarawan.
S.TRANSL: Jehovah is the supreme example of self-control.

S.FORM: Samaan patahekal "to romi'ami'ad" to mitooran ita ko niketonan sowal a patafang to tireng i Kawas?
Samaan patahekal "to romi'ami'ad" to mitooran ita ko niketonan sowal a patafang to tireng i Kawas?
S.PHON: samaan pataħəkaɾ "to~u ro~umiʡamiʡaɬ~ɮ" to~u mito~uo~uran ita ko~u nikəto~unan so~uwaɾ a patafaŋ to~u tirəŋ i kawas?
S.TRANSL: How can we live up to our dedication to God "day after day"?

S.FORM: Misamaanay hano papalahad kita to paka'metay to tireng a capeling hani?
Misamaanay hano papalahad kita to paka'metay to tireng a capeling hani?
S.PHON: misamaanaj ħano~u papaɾaħaɬ~ɮ kita to~u pakaʡmətaj to~u tirəŋ a ʦapəɾiŋ ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why should you be interested in cultivating self-control?

S.FORM: Sowal no Fangcalay Cudad, 'no'adingoan a tamdaw' ato 'midoedoay to tireng a tamdaw,' o maanan ko kasasiromaan?
Sowal no Fangcalay Cudad, 'no'adingoan a tamdaw' ato 'midoedoay to tireng a tamdaw,' o maanan ko kasasiromaan?
S.PHON: so~uwaɾ no~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, ʡno~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan a tamɬ~ɮawʡ ato~u ʡmiɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uaj to~u tirəŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw,ʡ o~u maanan ko~u kasasiro~umaan?
S.TRANSL: How does the Bible's description of a physical man differ from that of a spiritual man?

S.FORM: Oniya hekal matomesay ko mirenecay to coos no tireng a pinangan.
Oniya hekal matomesay ko mirenecay to coos no tireng a pinangan.
S.PHON: o~unija ħəkaɾ mato~uməsaj ko~u mirənəʦaj to~u ʦo~uo~us no~u tirəŋ a pinaŋan.
S.TRANSL: The world has a predominant attitude that centers on the flesh.

S.FORM: Milomal to 'ayaway a demak, misi'ayaw to kato'as, ato adada no tireng, mananamay ko masakalimlaan a demak.
Milomal to 'ayaway a demak, misi'ayaw to kato'as, ato adada no tireng, mananamay ko masakalimlaan a demak.
S.PHON: miɾo~umaɾ to~u ʡajawaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, misiʡajaw to~u kato~uʡas, ato~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa no~u tirəŋ, mananamaj ko~u masakaɾimɾaan a ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: Looking back, I can see that I have learned useful lessons from the limitations imposed on us by health problems and advancing age.

S.FORM: Oniya hekal miowingay to 'coos no tireng, coos no mata, pahiyoay to dafong a waywayan.'
Oniya hekal miowingay to 'coos no tireng, coos no mata, pahiyoay to dafong a waywayan.'
S.PHON: o~unija ħəkaɾ mio~uwiŋaj to~u ʡʦo~uo~us no~u tirəŋ, ʦo~uo~us no~u mata, paħijo~uaj to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ a wajwajan.ʡ
S.TRANSL: The world aggressively promotes "the desire of the flesh and the desire of the eyes and the showy display of one's means of life."

S.FORM: Wa misamaan kita patahekal to mitooray to mihaydaan ita a sowal tiya patafang to tireng hani?
Wa misamaan kita patahekal to mitooray to mihaydaan ita a sowal tiya patafang to tireng hani?
S.PHON: wa misamaan kita pataħəkaɾ to~u mito~uo~uraj to~u miħajɬ~ɮaan ita a so~uwaɾ tija patafaŋ to~u tirəŋ ħani?
S.TRANSL: How can we prove true to our dedication vow?

S.FORM: O midoedoay to tireng a tamdaw iraay ko maanan a tahapinangan?
O midoedoay to tireng a tamdaw iraay ko maanan a tahapinangan?
S.PHON: o~u miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uaj to~u tirəŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw iraaj ko~u maanan a taħapinaŋan?
S.TRANSL: What are the characteristics of a physical person?

S.FORM: O midoedoay to tireng a tamdaw, samanay ko harateng ato waywayan hani?
O midoedoay to tireng a tamdaw, samanay ko harateng ato waywayan hani?
S.PHON: o~u miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uaj to~u tirəŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw, samanaj ko~u ħaratəŋ ato~u wajwajan ħani?
S.TRANSL: Consider first the attitude of a physical individual.

S.FORM: Pasowalan ningra ci Yihofa, misa'osi ko fafahiyan wawa ningra patafang to tireng, tada mahemekay cingra."
Pasowalan ningra ci Yihofa, misa'osi ko fafahiyan wawa ningra patafang to tireng, tada mahemekay cingra."
S.PHON: paso~uwaɾan niŋra ʦi jiħo~ufa, misaʡo~usi ko~u fafaħijan wawa niŋra patafaŋ to~u tirəŋ, taɬ~ɮa maħəməkaj ʦiŋra."
S.TRANSL: He told Jehovah that he was so happy about his little girl's decision to dedicate her life to Him."

S.FORM: Mitoor to pinangan no tireng ato mitoor to fangcalay saocor samaanay ko kasasi romaan?
Mitoor to pinangan no tireng ato mitoor to fangcalay saocor samaanay ko kasasi romaan?
S.PHON: mito~uo~ur to~u pinaŋan no~u tirəŋ ato~u mito~uo~ur to~u faŋʦaɾaj sao~uʦo~ur samaanaj ko~u kasasi ro~umaan?
S.TRANSL: What is the difference between "setting the mind on the flesh" and "setting the mind on the spirit"?

S.FORM: Misamaanay hano sapatafangaw to tireng a micada to ino' ko pacekiwan hani?
Misamaanay hano sapatafangaw to tireng a micada to ino' ko pacekiwan hani?
S.PHON: misamaanaj ħano~u sapatafaŋaw to~u tirəŋ a miʦaɬ~ɮa to~u ino~uʡ ko~u paʦəkiwan ħani?
S.TRANSL: What motivates Bible students today to get baptized?

S.FORM: Ma'araw no wama wina ko wawa patafang to tireng micada to ino', malo mihodopay ci Yihofaan a tamdaw, oha mamarenec a mahemek ko faloco'.
Ma'araw no wama wina ko wawa patafang to tireng micada to ino', malo mihodopay ci Yihofaan a tamdaw, oha mamarenec a mahemek ko faloco'.
S.PHON: maʡaraw no~u wama wina ko~u wawa patafaŋ to~u tirəŋ miʦaɬ~ɮa to~u ino~uʡ, maɾo~u miħo~uɬ~ɮo~upaj ʦi jiħo~ufaan a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~uħa mamarənəʦ a maħəmək ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ.
S.TRANSL: May you parents experience the joy and satisfaction that result from seeing your children become dedicated, baptized servants of Jehovah.

S.FORM: Ano sapatafangaw to tireng mamicada to ino'ko wawa i, wa calemcem ko wama wina to manan hani?
Ano sapatafangaw to tireng mamicada to ino'ko wawa i, wa calemcem ko wama wina to manan hani?
S.PHON: ano~u sapatafaŋaw to~u tirəŋ mamiʦaɬ~ɮa to~u ino~uʡko~u wawa i, wa ʦaɾəmʦəm ko~u wama wina to~u manan ħani?
S.TRANSL: Why might some parents have concerns when their children want to take the steps of dedication and baptism?

S.FORM: Misamaan kiso pa'icel to paka'metay to tireng hani?
Misamaan kiso pa'icel to paka'metay to tireng hani?
S.PHON: misamaan kiso~u paʡiʦəɾ to~u pakaʡmətaj to~u tirəŋ ħani?
S.TRANSL: What can you do to work on your self-control?

S.FORM: Mitadtaday ci Pawlo to kasasiroma 'no'adingoan a tamdaw' ato 'midoedoay to tireng a tamdaw,' padamaay konini kitanan cipinang to o maanan ko tatodong no no'adingoan a tamdaw.
Mitadtaday ci Pawlo to kasasiroma 'no'adingoan a tamdaw' ato 'midoedoay to tireng a tamdaw,' padamaay konini kitanan cipinang to o maanan ko tatodong no no'adingoan a tamdaw.
S.PHON: mitaɬ~ɮtaɬ~ɮaj ʦi pawɾo~u to~u kasasiro~uma ʡno~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan a tamɬ~ɮawʡ ato~u ʡmiɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uaj to~u tirəŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw,ʡ paɬ~ɮamaaj ko~unini kitanan ʦipinaŋ to~u o~u maanan ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u no~uʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~uan a tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: The apostle Paul helps us to understand what a spiritual person is by drawing a contrast between a "spiritual man" and "a physical man."

S.FORM: O patafangayto to tireng a Krisciyang mahecaday ci Nowaan, midofdof to Kawas a milaheci to patorodan Ningra a demak.
O patafangayto to tireng a Krisciyang mahecaday ci Nowaan, midofdof to Kawas a milaheci to patorodan Ningra a demak.
S.PHON: o~u patafaŋajto~u to~u tirəŋ a krisʦijaŋ maħəʦaɬ~ɮaj ʦi no~uwaan, miɬ~ɮo~ufɬ~ɮo~uf to~u kawas a miɾaħəʦi to~u pato~uro~uɬ~ɮan niŋra a ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.TRANSL: Like Noah, dedicated disciples obediently carry on in the work that God has assigned them to do.

S.FORM: Misamaanay hano sasakaretengen iso a minengneng ko miketonan a patafang to tireng ci Yihofaan?
Misamaanay hano sasakaretengen iso a minengneng ko miketonan a patafang to tireng ci Yihofaan?
S.PHON: misamaanaj ħano~u sasakarətəŋən iso~u a minəŋnəŋ ko~u mikəto~unan a patafaŋ to~u tirəŋ ʦi jiħo~ufaan?
S.TRANSL: Why do you treasure your dedication to Jehovah?

S.FORM: Pakayniay i coos no tireng a mifalah ci Isaw to 'fangcalay demak no Kawas.'
Pakayniay i coos no tireng a mifalah ci Isaw to 'fangcalay demak no Kawas.'
S.PHON: pakajniaj i ʦo~uo~us no~u tirəŋ a mifaɾaħ ʦi isaw to~u ʡfaŋʦaɾaj ɬ~ɮəmak no~u kawas.ʡ
S.TRANSL: If they did that, they would be like Esau.

S.FORM: Misamaanay misa'icel a mitafo to rihadayay, nganga'ay micowat to kalacecay?
Misamaanay misa'icel a mitafo to rihadayay, nganga'ay micowat to kalacecay?
S.PHON: misamaanaj misaʡiʦəɾ a mitafo~u to~u riħaɬ~ɮajaj, ŋaŋaʡaj miʦo~uwat to~u kaɾaʦəʦaj?
S.TRANSL: How does proving ourselves to be peacemakers promote unity?

S.FORM: Pafeliay to kalimlaan wawa.
Pafeliay to kalimlaan wawa.
S.PHON: pafəɾiaj to~u kaɾimɾaan wawa.
S.TRANSL: When for all mankind he offered his Firstborn.

S.FORM: Sa'osi no sarikec sakafalo romi'ad a hofocen ko fa'inayan a wawa, mamicada to kerit, samanen hofochanho a wawa kahenayay a ma'alitad ko 'irang.
Sa'osi no sarikec sakafalo romi'ad a hofocen ko fa'inayan a wawa, mamicada to kerit, samanen hofochanho a wawa kahenayay a ma'alitad ko 'irang.
S.PHON: saʡo~usi no~u sarikəʦ sakafaɾo~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a ħo~ufo~uʦən ko~u faʡinajan a wawa, mamiʦaɬ~ɮa to~u kərit, samanən ħo~ufo~uʦħanħo~u a wawa kaħənajaj a maʡaɾitaɬ~ɮ ko~u ʡiraŋ.
S.TRANSL: Circumcision was to be done on the eighth day of life, which was ideal with regard to the blood's ability to clot.

S.FORM: Samaanan ni Yihofa pakalalok ko wawa Ningra hani?
Samaanan ni Yihofa pakalalok ko wawa Ningra hani?
S.PHON: samaanan ni jiħo~ufa pakaɾaɾo~uk ko~u wawa niŋra ħani?
S.TRANSL: How did Jehovah encourage his Son?

S.FORM: Mihaenay o Krisciyang a wama wina mikitini 'engaengaho ko wawa i, o sapadamaaw to wawa micada to ino'a malo Krisciyang, misa'icel pasifana'cangranan.
Mihaenay o Krisciyang a wama wina mikitini 'engaengaho ko wawa i, o sapadamaaw to wawa micada to ino'a malo Krisciyang, misa'icel pasifana'cangranan.
S.PHON: miħaənaj o~u krisʦijaŋ a wama wina mikitini ʡəŋaəŋaħo~u ko~u wawa i, o~u sapaɬ~ɮamaaw to~u wawa miʦaɬ~ɮa to~u ino~uʡa maɾo~u krisʦijaŋ, misaʡiʦəɾ pasifanaʡʦaŋranan.
S.TRANSL: Thus, the goal of all Christian parents should be to teach their children from infancy with the intention of helping them become baptized disciples of Christ.

S.FORM: Pafeli ko Kawas kanono'an wawa,
Pafeli ko Kawas kanono'an wawa,
S.PHON: pafəɾi ko~u kawas kano~uno~uʡan wawa,
S.TRANSL: God gave his own beloved Son in your behalf;

S.FORM: Pakaynien toniya wama i, masakalimlaan ko sapafeli no wawa a hana mikikakaay to i omahay a hana.
Pakaynien toniya wama i, masakalimlaan ko sapafeli no wawa a hana mikikakaay to i omahay a hana.
S.PHON: pakajniən to~unija wama i, masakaɾimɾaan ko~u sapafəɾi no~u wawa a ħana mikikakaaj to~u i o~umaħaj a ħana.
S.TRANSL: Jehovah is no less delighted when we willingly devote ourselves to him exclusively.

S.FORM: Sapidipotaw ci Mariya to itiyaday a wawa, milaliway toya paisingan.
Sapidipotaw ci Mariya to itiyaday a wawa, milaliway toya paisingan.
S.PHON: sapiɬ~ɮipo~utaw ʦi marija to~u itijaɬ~ɮaj a wawa, miɾaɾiwaj to~uja paisiŋan.
S.TRANSL: To protect the unborn child, Maria ran away from the hospital.

S.FORM: Pakayni i pasifana'to wawa, samaan ko demak no wama wina o masaka limelaan hani?
Pakayni i pasifana'to wawa, samaan ko demak no wama wina o masaka limelaan hani?
S.PHON: pakajni i pasifanaʡto~u wawa, samaan ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u wama wina o~u masaka ɾiməɾaan ħani?
S.TRANSL: What should be an important part of your teaching?

S.FORM: Ano cato ka mapolin ko wawa i, pakihater hananay tono wama wina.
Ano cato ka mapolin ko wawa i, pakihater hananay tono wama wina.
S.PHON: ano~u ʦato~u ka mapo~uɾin ko~u wawa i, pakiħatər ħananaj to~uno~u wama wina.
S.TRANSL: He lets go altogether when the child can keep his balance.

S.FORM: Wa misamaan midipot ko wawa to niyahan, caka madenga no micoliay a micongangah a pinangan hani?
Wa misamaan midipot ko wawa to niyahan, caka madenga no micoliay a micongangah a pinangan hani?
S.PHON: wa misamaan miɬ~ɮipo~ut ko~u wawa to~u nijaħan, ʦaka maɬ~ɮəŋa no~u miʦo~uɾiaj a miʦo~uŋaŋaħ a pinaŋan ħani?
S.TRANSL: Children can protect themselves from being infected with the spirit of disobedience by reflecting on what their parents have done for them.

S.FORM: Micadato ko wawa to ino' ano pakidem ko raraw wa samaanto hani?"
Micadato ko wawa to ino' ano pakidem ko raraw wa samaanto hani?"
S.PHON: miʦaɬ~ɮato~u ko~u wawa to~u ino~uʡ ano~u pakiɬ~ɮəm ko~u raraw wa samaanto~u ħani?"
S.TRANSL: What if my child gets baptized and then falls into serious sin?'

S.FORM: Mahapinangay, tada misaaliay to sapakalalok ato sahinom ko wawa ni Yifta.
Mahapinangay, tada misaaliay to sapakalalok ato sahinom ko wawa ni Yifta.
S.PHON: maħapinaŋaj, taɬ~ɮa misaaɾiaj to~u sapakaɾaɾo~uk ato~u saħino~um ko~u wawa ni jifta.
S.TRANSL: If anyone, then, needed comfort and encouragement, she did.

S.FORM: Itini i 'apotoay a toki, palahedawan ni Satan ko matayalay ningra, saka'orip a maamaan ato mamoetep a kanono'an a wawa ningra.
Itini i 'apotoay a toki, palahedawan ni Satan ko matayalay ningra, saka'orip a maamaan ato mamoetep a kanono'an a wawa ningra.
S.PHON: itini i ʡapo~uto~uaj a to~uki, paɾaħəɬ~ɮawan ni satan ko~u matajaɾaj niŋra, sakaʡo~urip a maamaan ato~u mamo~uətəp a kano~uno~uʡan a wawa niŋra.
S.TRANSL: In a short time, Job lost his servants, his means of livelihood, and his ten beloved children.

S.FORM: Ano mafalahay ko wawa i, misamaan ko demak no wama wina nga' midoedoay to limasmas no Kawas hani?
Ano mafalahay ko wawa i, misamaan ko demak no wama wina nga' midoedoay to limasmas no Kawas hani?
S.PHON: ano~u mafaɾaħaj ko~u wawa i, misamaan ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u wama wina ŋaʡ miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uaj to~u ɾimasmas no~u kawas ħani?
S.TRANSL: If a child is disfellowshipped, how do Christian parents show that they obey God?

S.FORM: O wama wina samaan mitoor to harateng ni Yihofa mirikec ato palahad to wawa?
O wama wina samaan mitoor to harateng ni Yihofa mirikec ato palahad to wawa?
S.PHON: o~u wama wina samaan mito~uo~ur to~u ħaratəŋ ni jiħo~ufa mirikəʦ ato~u paɾaħaɬ~ɮ to~u wawa?
S.TRANSL: How can parents raise their children in the discipline of Jehovah?

S.FORM: Tiya pataynien ni Yihofa ko wawa Ningra i hekal i, mipili'ay toya misapoeneray a limecedan ci Mariya malo wina no wawa.
Tiya pataynien ni Yihofa ko wawa Ningra i hekal i, mipili'ay toya misapoeneray a limecedan ci Mariya malo wina no wawa.
S.PHON: tija patajniən ni jiħo~ufa ko~u wawa niŋra i ħəkaɾ i, mipiɾiʡaj to~uja misapo~uənəraj a ɾiməʦəɬ~ɮan ʦi marija maɾo~u wina no~u wawa.
S.TRANSL: When it came time for God's Son to be born as a human, Jehovah selected a humble virgin girl, Mary, to be the mother of this special child.

S.FORM: Manaokaniw, o wama wina ano caay ka sini'ada to wawa, wa pasangaren ko wawa a midofdof cangranan.
Manaokaniw, o wama wina ano caay ka sini'ada to wawa, wa pasangaren ko wawa a midofdof cangranan.
S.PHON: manao~ukaniw, o~u wama wina ano~u ʦaaj ka siniʡaɬ~ɮa to~u wawa, wa pasaŋarən ko~u wawa a miɬ~ɮo~ufɬ~ɮo~uf ʦaŋranan.
S.TRANSL: Of course, if parents have no natural affection for their children, it might be difficult for those children to obey from the heart.

S.FORM: Ikor, o fafahi noya salikaka ato wawa ningra misa'osiay to faloco' a midoko ci Yihofaan.
Ikor, o fafahi noya salikaka ato wawa ningra misa'osiay to faloco' a midoko ci Yihofaan.
S.PHON: iko~ur, o~u fafaħi no~uja saɾikaka ato~u wawa niŋra misaʡo~usiaj to~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ a miɬ~ɮo~uko~u ʦi jiħo~ufaan.
S.TRANSL: Mother and daughter both decided to serve Jehovah and got baptized.

S.FORM: Ano pasifana' ko Krisciyang to wawa anca pacekiwan a tamdaw i, hano haharatengen ko kalimelaan no picada to ino'?
Ano pasifana' ko Krisciyang to wawa anca pacekiwan a tamdaw i, hano haharatengen ko kalimelaan no picada to ino'?
S.PHON: ano~u pasifanaʡ ko~u krisʦijaŋ to~u wawa anʦa paʦəkiwan a tamɬ~ɮaw i, ħano~u ħaħaratəŋən ko~u kaɾiməɾaan no~u piʦaɬ~ɮa to~u ino~uʡ?
S.TRANSL: Why should a Christian teacher have the importance of baptism clearly in mind when teaching his child or another Bible student?

S.FORM: Pakalalokan ni Yihofa ko wawa Ningra ci Yis.
Pakalalokan ni Yihofa ko wawa Ningra ci Yis.
S.PHON: pakaɾaɾo~ukan ni jiħo~ufa ko~u wawa niŋra ʦi jis.
S.TRANSL: Jesus himself received encouragement from his Father.

S.FORM: Ano pasifana'ato mirikec ko tawki no loma'to wawa mamitodong ci Kristoan.
Ano pasifana'ato mirikec ko tawki no loma'to wawa mamitodong ci Kristoan.
S.PHON: ano~u pasifanaʡato~u mirikəʦ ko~u tawki no~u ɾo~umaʡto~u wawa mamito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ʦi kristo~uan.
S.TRANSL: The same basic principles apply in the family.

S.FORM: Sowal no Fangcalay Cudad, oyaan 'moecelay mangodoay to Kawas' a Simiyong ato 84 ko mihecaan a fafahiyan ci Anna hananay a pairasolay ko pahapinangan ni Yihofa ci Yisan, o cangrato ko milasilay to tamdaw, o mamalo Misiya a wawa masadakayto.

Sowal no Fangcalay Cudad, oyaan 'moecelay mangodoay to Kawas' a Simiyong ato 84 ko mihecaan a fafahiyan ci Anna hananay a pairasolay ko pahapinangan ni Yihofa ci Yisan, o cangrato ko milasilay to tamdaw, o mamalo Misiya a wawa masadakayto.
S.PHON: so~uwaɾ no~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, o~ujaan ʡmo~uəʦəɾaj maŋo~uɬ~ɮo~uaj to~u kawasʡ a simijo~uŋ ato~u ** ko~u miħəʦaan a fafaħijan ʦi anna ħananaj a pairaso~uɾaj ko~u paħapinaŋan ni jiħo~ufa ʦi jisan, o~u ʦaŋrato~u ko~u miɾasiɾaj to~u tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u mamaɾo~u misija a wawa masaɬ~ɮakajto~u.
S.TRANSL: Instead, Jehovah used a "righteous and devout" man named Simeon, along with an 84-year-old widow, the prophetess Anna, to acknowledge that this child would become the promised Messiah, or Christ.

S.FORM: Ci Cilisi ato fafahi miti'eray to sadama ni Yihofa, mihadidiay a pasifana' to wawa.
Ci Cilisi ato fafahi miti'eray to sadama ni Yihofa, mihadidiay a pasifana' to wawa.
S.PHON: ʦi ʦiɾisi ato~u fafaħi mitiʡəraj to~u saɬ~ɮama ni jiħo~ufa, miħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮiaj a pasifanaʡ to~u wawa.
S.TRANSL: Gillis and his wife trusted in Jehovah's support as they patiently worked with their son.
